If in normal times, Chen Rui would have agreed without hesitation, the problem was… “The End of the World” that Shea said before leaving made him feel guilty- The “adultery” has obviously been exposed, and the 2 “female protagonists” are about to meet. If the male protagonist is present foolishly, he deserves to be dead; a foolish death.

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t know that “The End of the World” was actually deliberately divulged by Madam Aunt to Princess Royal Highness. Although there were some elements of encouragement which were effective, it was also some % of demonstration and show off. Only Madam Aunt knew how much the % was.

Chen Rui immediately changed the topic, “Why are you looking for Princess Royal? I just came out of the palace, and she seems to be stabilizing her power.”

“2 very urgent news.” When it came to this, Isabella became serious, “This is not a place to talk. Let’s go to the palace. Olypheus, your injury has not fully recovered. Go back first.”

Ms. Black Dragon nodded obediently. Chen Rui didn’t think Isabella had any other intentions since she looked so stern, so he followed her to the palace.

Olypheus can always surprise me 🤣🤣. I thought she was going to look for her mom or something, turns out it was a reimbursement. Is Isabella really going to the palace though😏?

chapters.title: Chapter 554: The Really Urgent Matter
chapters.body:
Chapter 554: The Really Urgent Matter

Shea was a little surprised when she saw Chen Rui who had left and returned, but Isabella’s report immediately made her focus.

Isabella reported 2 matters. The first matter was from the Bloody Empire. Some time ago, the Bloody Empire Lord Raizen had some realization and went for closed doors training. He handed over the affairs of the empire to Great Prince Aleus, assisted by Second Prince Edmund. Obsidian’s crusade against the Dark Moon also deliberately chose this opportunity, but it was a pity that his army was defeated and he died in the war.

The 2 ruling princes of the Bloody Empire had fought openly and secretly for the position of the first heir. Now the contradictions were even worse. It had gradually evolved to an uncontrollable degree. A few days ago, Edmund, who was suppressed by Aleus, finally used the most extreme method to launch a mutiny while Aleus went out to patrol. However, he was ambushed by Aleus and was forced to lead the remnants to escape the capital. He was currently fighting against Aleus in the north of the Iron Fist Estate.

As the great prince of the empire, Aleus publicly declared Edmund as a traitor while Edmund claimed that Aleus persecuted his brothers, deceived his father Raizen, and conspired to overthrow the Bloody Empire. Now, the 2 forces were at a stalemate.

Chen Rui’s spirits lifted up, “The Bloody Empire has always been eyeing us. I was initially worried that the Bloody Empire would take advantage of this civil war in the Fallen Angel Empire. I didn’t expect them to actually start fighting on their own. It seems that Raizen chose the ‘right’ time to go for closed doors training. Without this worry, Princess Royal can quickly rush to the capital, immediately ascend the throne as the empress, and stabilize the entire empire.”

“No, Princess Royal Highness can’t go to the capital yet,” Isabella shook her head, “Because of the second news. The envoy sent by the Dark Shadow Empire to the Dark Moon is already on the way. When we received the news of the official visit, the envoy had passed Town Walan. Moreover, according to the latest intel, the Dark Shadow Empire is actively mobilizing its military forces.”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “The military mobilization of the Dark Shadow Empire?”

“From the current intel, it is to the east and south. The predicted target may be Town Leia in the west of the Dark Moon and the Tekula Fortress stationed by General Gerant. The Jergal Fortress, which is adjacent to the Bloody Empire, seems to be quiet. They are obviously targeting the Fallen Angel Empire.”

Shea looked solemn, “It seems that Gerant has guessed it correctly. The closest allies are probably the most ferocious enemies. Our greatest enemy now is not the Bloody Empire, but the Dark Shadow Empire.”

“Yes, there are some signs that the Dark Shadow Empire seems to have sold a lot of equipment and strategic materials to Aleus or Edmund. The purpose is obvious. And during our war with Obsidian, the Dark Shadow Empire’s economic restrictions have been loosened and many favorable conditions have been provided. It has attracted many merchants from the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Moon Estate.”

Isabella earnestly analyzed, “I have a guess that the Dark Moon’s gift of the magician legion and goblin team from the Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s General Crawford was probably instructed by Catherine the Great. Because the stronger we are, the more intense the war with Obsidian. In other words, the Fallen Angel Empire’s internal friction will be more intense. This Her Majesty Empress not only can wait patiently, but she also has a far vision. She can damage the enemy and strengthen her empire without a bloody war. She is indeed the first sage of the Demon Realm.”

Shea looked thoughtful and nodded. The Bloody Vine Flower Estate’s Lord Crawford has a good personal relationship with me, but Crawford is also the third general and an estate lord who is loyal to the Dark Shadow Empire. Putting aside some of the supplies that support the Dark Moon, the magician legion and goblin warriors are true elites which are also precious army resources. This kind of gift is too “valuable.” It now appears that the purpose is to increase the Dark Moon’s bargaining chip against the capital. The Dark Shadow Empire has been on the sidelines since the civil war of the Fallen Angel Empire began. The fact that the army led by Gerant to ambush the Dark Moon passed Town Leia smoothly may also be some kind of consent from the top.

Chen Rui was silent for a while. He knew Catherine better than Shea and Isabella. She is a wise and stubborn woman, a truly mature and powerful master of an empire. As long as she can create true peace, she will never spare war and force. The Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire had successive civil strife which gave Catherine a god-given opportunity. Although the Bloody Empire is in chaos, Raizen the Great is still there. With Raizen, the Bloody Empire will not fall. What Catherine could do is to further intensify the conflict between the 2 princes and try to make the Bloody Empire hurt its vitality this time. The Fallen Angel Empire is different. The war to crusade against the Dark Moon caused serious internal exhaustion. Several Demon Overlords, a dozen of Demon Emperors, the regent of the empire and the second general had died. The military strength has casualties of more than 500,000. In this weakest state, if Catherine is still indifferent, she is not Catherine.

There is no real friendship between countries. Even on the surface of peaceful coexistence, there are still countless meticulous games underneath. Chen Rui had a hunch that with Shea’s official ascension, he would inevitably become an enemy who stood opposite of Empress Catherine.

“Gerant and Rometty should have been preparing for the selection of soldiers. Immediately order him and Rometty’s Flying Cloud Legion to set off first using aerial demonic beasts to reach Tekula Fortress as quickly as possible. Tim’s Moon Shadow Legion has returned to Walan Fortress, but the military force is not enough.” Shea pondered, “The Dark Moon’s 3 legions lost nearly half of their forces in the war this time. The original capital coalition army suffered more than half of the casualties. It can be described as a huge setback in military strength. Although the recruitment of new recruits is smooth, it is impossible to form a legion in a short time. This is really nerve-racking.

“What about the undead legion?” Isabella squinted, “The casualties should be a good supplement to the undead legion.”

Shea shook his head, “If we haven’t eliminated Obsidian, we can do that, but now Obsidian is dead and the capital coalition army has all surrendered. If we transform their dead comrades into undead, then I will lose far more than I gain. Besides, in the battle with Obsidian, the Dark Moon’s trump cards have been completely exposed, and there is no secret in terms of military strength. With Catherine’s wisdom, if a war is really to be launched, there will definitely be targeted deployment.”

Isabella shrugged like Chen Rui’s habitual movements, but Shea faintly guessed that Isabella should be able to guess the problem of the undead, and the purpose of making this opinion was more to remind her.

Chen Rui finally spoke, “There is no need to worry about the materials of the undead. Guradam once said that there are at least 300,000 soldiers on the ancient battlefield of Town Yankou. If he assists in guarding the Walan Fortress, we should be able to block possible attacks. I guess the envoy of the Dark Shadow Empire will be here in a couple of days. Now we can only react to the situation and see what news this envoy brings. At the same time, Princess Royal Highness must be ready to go to the capital.”

Shea nodded. In fact, in the past few days, she had finished the settlement matters of the Dark Moon and was ready to leave, but Chen Rui had not been awake. The most important matter was that the Sword of Fallen Angel was missing, so she had been using the excuse of stabilizing her realm to wait.

The 3 discussed related matters for some time. Shea summoned Old Gauss, Sarandi, Gerant, and others to discuss. Chen Rui and Isabella left the palace to work separately.

When Chen Rui walked to the outer courtyard, he spoke up, “If you have confirmed the details of the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, let me know immediately.”

Isabella nodded. Her voice suddenly became charming as she asked, “Why don’t you ask me if I’m free tonight? Is it because of a Royal Highness matter that you are not in the mood?”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Mood is actually nothing. So… beautiful and attractive lady, do you remember a promise? Can you leave a door open for me tonight?”

“I’ve always had a good memory. It’s okay to leave a door open,” Isabella’s blue eyes rolled. “It’s just that you have to solve the little black dragon sister who is guarding the door first.”

Olypheus was now lingering in Isabella’s house every day, which meant that Chen Rui must first get rid of the troublesome Ms. Black Dragon if he wanted to gain certain benefits.

“Why did Olypheus stick to you all of a sudden? She even called you sister?”

Isabella stretched out her hands helplessly: Calling me as sister is better than calling me as her mother… The first thing the black dragon girl did after waking up from her drowsiness was to call her mother, almost making Ms. Secret Intelligence, who had always been calm, flustered.

When taking care of Olypheus to recover from her injuries these days, she didn’t deliberately express anything, but for some reason, the little girl liked her and clung to her.

Isabella sighed, “It’s quite nice to have Olypheus there, lest I have always been alone and deserted in my place. I can only eagerly look forward to the 1 or 2 hours that someone occasionally allocates to me.”

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui lowered his head guiltily, “I’m very selfish, why don’t you just move to…”

“Don’t think I’m easy to trick like your women.” Isabella sulked, but there was a faint tenderness in her gaze toward the man, “Since you feel guilty, then a certain promise is canceled. We don’t owe each other. If you are free, welcome to hang out at my deserted little place. I think Olypheus will be happy to see her rich employer.”

It’s over. Now even the benefits are gone.

Princess Royal Highness is like that, and Madam Aunt is the same. Princess Royal Highness at least deferred payment, but Madam Aunt simply canceled the account.

“You cast me aside after getting the benefit. Are women so irresponsible?” Chen Rui turned his head angrily and left. Seeing that there was no patrol guard nearby, he suddenly appeared in front of Isabella, and they teleported to a corner. He then lifted the veil and smooched to the purplish red lips.

[Double Teleportations] was used to do this kind of thing. It could be regarded as a pearl covered with dust. (Meaning valuable skills used for the trivial matter)

Isabella was caught off guard and tried to struggle, but now Chen Rui’s basic power had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, and his spirit power had reached S+. Isabella’s power was not strong, so she was unable to break free. She bit the man’s lips, but Chen Rui still did not let go. Slowly, the resistance turned into active entanglement. It took a long time before both sides slowly separated.

Isabella looked at his swollen lips, then she gently stroked with her fingers distressingly, “It’s not that I broke my promise, but… the difficulty hasn’t been completely overcome, has it?”

The so-called “overcoming difficulties” was the condition of the previous benefit.

“I don’t care what the difficulties are and how deep the scar in your heart is. I don’t even mind about being a substitute. You only need to know one thing.” Chen Rui hugged her domineeringly, “You owe me a few lives. Without my permission, you can never let yourself die again! Understand?”

Isabella trembled, “What do you mean?”

Chen Rui didn’t speak, but he looked directly into her eyes. Isabella looked away, gently broke free of his embrace, and put on the veil.

“Don’t act smart,” Isabella’s eyes were a little red. She turned her back and walked out slowly. “I want to go back to base and work on the envoy’s intel.”

“Yini…” Chen Rui sighed, “I only say this 1 sentence. You have already died once. Even life can start over again. What else can’t start over again?”

Isabella’s body paused and her voice was a little low, “Give me some time.”

It’s hard to step from emotional injury… Curious if Chirstina will really kill Chen Rui herself, hmmm

chapters.title: Chapter 555: Guradam’S Hope Of Advancement
chapters.body:
Chapter 555: Guradam’S Hope Of Advancement

Chen Rui watched Isabella get out of his sight in a complicated mood. In fact, since he really started to feel Isabella with his heart, he felt something abnormal.

This cold and charming woman was far superior to man in terms of mental means, and she could even easily manipulate people’s minds. She was a veritable Devil’s Snare. She smiled on the surface as if she didn’t care about anything and could give up everything, but in fact, her heart had been tightly closed. It was herself who really gave up.

Chen Rui didn’t know whether the past of the Breeze Shadow Boots left some indelible imprint, but he could feel the heavy shackles in Isabella’s heart. If Kia used a cheerful smile to evaporate the tears behind, then Isabella had become a pool of ashes that was about to burn out. Whether the next moment was a new lease of life or complete annihilation, it depended on her own.

There was no doubt that Isabella liked him. In the beginning, he might be just a substitute for some kind of illusory character in her mind. Step by step, she had a real fascination for him. Perhaps this kind of feeling could become the key to healing her soul, unlocking that heavy shackles step by step.

If life was just the first sight, Chen Rui had seen a tear that couldn’t be evaporated by the flames. That scene would be unforgettable for a lifetime. He would not let tragedy happen to his own woman again.

Anyway, in his heart, he had already decided to be the Sir Uncle of a guy.

Leaving the palace, Chen Rui put on a cloak and walked all the way out of the city gate. He found Guradam in the specially divided undead area in the southern suburbs.

Guradam became famous in this decisive battle. The entire Demon Realm knew that the undead magic master, who disappeared 2 years ago, was back, and he also brought powerful undead soldiers that were never seen before. Although the undead also exposed many shortcomings in the battle, they revealed more strength. They could compete with any regular elite army including the aerial legion and cavalry.

Facing this master who signed a master-subordinate contract with him, Guradam’s mentality was completely different from that of the past. At first, the 2 were hostile. Chen Rui was not his opponent. However, he used the water from the Fountain of Resurrection to severely wound Guradam and escaped. Then, Guradam was subdued by Paglio in Town Yankou, and he was forced to sign a master-subordinate contract with Chen Rui under coercion and lure.

To a certain extent, Guradam, like Zola, was an avid scientific research talent. In order to gain a long life to study the undead magic, this undead magic master did not hesitate to take the risk of transforming himself into an immortal corpse necromancer. This was also the reason why he succumbed to Chen Rui at that time. The master-subordinate contract was not like the master-servant contract. Although it was also impossible to betray, the death of the master would not lead to the death of the subordinate, and the master could not use the contract to prematurely end the life of the subordinate.

What Guradam did not expect was that it was precisely because of this “submission” that he was inspired by a qualitative change. Undead magician, undead cavalry, [Poison Explosion]… In addition, there were huge amounts of funding including massive standard army equipment, skeleton magician magic items, and even the complete giant dragon corpse. His great success today was absolutely inseparable from this master.

The power shown by Chen Rui also impressed Guradam. In Silent Night Wetland, he was only a Demon King-level power, and later his strength leaped at an unimaginable speed. Great Demon King, Demon Emperor… By the time of the decisive battle of Leith Wilderness, he was already able to fight against the peak stage of the Demon Overlord Obsidian!

“Master, rest assured, even if you are not there, I will completely obey madam’s dispatch.” Guradam said respectfully after learning Chen Rui’s intention of visiting.

Let alone Guradam’s best impression of Athena, just the beautiful lady with glasses was enough to make Guradam lower his head fearfully. He witnessed the scene where Ms. Zola crushed the 2 dragons of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord in full view. There were also several Demon Overlords present, and none of them dared to breathe.

Chen Rui nodded with satisfaction, “Try to complete the transformation of the undead in the ancient battlefield of Town Yankou. Don’t worry about the equipment, this time it is more than enough.”

“Master, there is 1 more thing. I reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor 2,000 years ago, but I have been stagnant after being transformed into a corpse necromancer. The body of the undead is unlike other creatures. For instance my current state, it is almost impossible to directly advance the level. Even if master you have black potions, they have no effect on me. Even longevity potion and resurrection potion are equivalent to severe poisons. According to ancient records, plus my research findings, if I want to advance to the next realm, it requires quite complicated rituals and considerable risks. All these are fine, the key is that it needs a lot of precious materials…”

Guradam didn’t feel at ease as the materials needed for the ceremony were extremely rare, and the types were extremely diverse. A lot of money was already spent to arm the undead previously. In fact, the value of the materials needed this time was even more than the huge sums of money for the undead. It was hard to get them all with his own strength, so he mentioned it nervously. What Chen Rui needs is my power to create undead. There is no shortage of Demon Overlords around him. There are even 3 dragons, plus the most terrifying madam (corpse necromancer did not know that Zola was also a dragon) . I also heard that the Earth Elemental King recognizes master as his only best friend.

“Tell me, how can I help you?” Chen Rui agreed without any hesitation. Guradam was his people. There was only benefit for him if Guradam became stronger. He was never stingy with his own people.

Hearing such a pleasant answer, Guradam suddenly had a strange feeling of “a true gentleman will sacrifice his life for a friend who understands him”. The 2 red lights in his eye sockets brightened, “The body of the corpse necromancer is a tool that can be discarded at any time, so the key lies in the soul fire. If I can get all the materials, I may undergo qualitative changes under special rituals. This kind of ritual requires very strict requirements and a lot of precious materials. Back then, some of them were in Master Paglio’s treasures, and I collected some after I came out… “

Paglio’s treasures ended up in Chen Rui’s hands back then, and the poor corpse necromancer, who was drenched in “sulfur acid”, barely took away his life box. Chen Rui understood what he meant. After asking about the required materials, he took them out 1 by 1 from the storage warehouse.

Some materials were used or not in the poison dragon’s treasure, but Chen Rui later got many good stuff including the crystal dragon’s treasures and the various materials gifted by the Custer Family. Guradam got more complete materials than he expected, so he couldn’t help but be overjoyed.

“The remaining materials are in short supply, but it shouldn’t be a big problem. I will commission the Custer Family, the top commercial family of the Dark Shadow Empire to collect them. But… What are these Dragon Power Essence and Siren’s Heart?” Guradam requested many rare materials, but Chen Rui knew their origin and purpose after he absorbed a lot of relevant knowledge in the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire’s Mechanical Association. Nonetheless, he had never heard of these 2 materials.

“I am not too clear as well. Dragon Power Essence should be related to giant dragon and siren is a kind of sea creature of the Dead Sea. I don’t know if the Siren’s Heart is their heart?”

Siren of the Dead Sea? Chen Rui thought of Earth Elemental King who was heading to the Dead Sea soon, and his heart moved, but it was better to understand the specific details of these 2 materials. If he got it wrong, then Guradam’s ritual was not an advancement but suicide instead.

“Leave the materials issue to me. You can handle the matter in hand at ease. My suggestion is just for reference. The bone magic and spirit dragon transformation should be executed based on your undead magic basic theory.”

Guradam nodded. He personally sent Chen Rui out of the southern suburbs.

Back in the Dark Moon City, Chen Rui did not return to his residence. Instead, he went to the southeast block. Dragon Power Essence and Siren’s Heart were very important to Guradam and must be figured out. He happened to have a teacher who received the inheritance of thousands of years. Therefore, he should be able to get a satisfactory answer. Besides, there were some important items from the ancient alchemy civilization that he wanted to give to Tetenis.

The backyard of the Cloak Gang was very lively and filled with the aroma of food. Tetenis, Skye and his wife, Eve, Alian, the old goblin and his daughters, Ms. Sasa, were all there. They were barbecuing in a circle. Master Xingxing was not present due to some affairs of the mechanics association.

The arrival of “Aguile” immediately attracted everyone’s attention. Especially the 2 girls, Alian and Eve, whose quick-witted eyes were shining with joy. The one who reacted most quickly was the old goblin, Didi, who immediately greeted him and bowed deeply, “Master.”

Chen Rui nodded and motioned the old goblin to continue to sit down without the need to be too polite.

“Teacher.” Chen Rui bowed to Tetenis and he greeted Skye and others. This time in the Dark Moon battle, the improved magic crystal cannon provided by Tetenis played a big role. As long as there was plenty of time to create more and better magic crystal cannons, then the military power of the Fallen Angel Empire would be greatly enhanced.

Skye spoke up, “The Dark Moon battle can be described as shocking to the Demon Realm. The incredible Regent Obsidian was killed by you and Princess Royal. The weak defeated the strong in this battle. It is unbelievable. You and Princess Shea will be recorded into the Demon Realm’s history to be extolled by future generations. Soon, you will be called Royal Highness Prince Consort.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Master Skye has overstated it. This is the credit of Princess Royal Highness and all the soldiers. As for the title… No matter what I look like, I’m just the master’s friend, Aguile.”

Skye smiled delightedly and nodded, “Since I’m a friend, don’t hesitate if you need my help. Although Xingxing is not here, I know that he also has this attitude.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. The Dark Moon’s estate is incomparable to the entire empire. For Shea, the capital is the core of her power, but it is also an unfamiliar environment that must be supported by all parties like the Mechanic Association. The Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association lacks top masters such as Nate and Anderson with the title of “top”, so its influence is far inferior to the other 2 empires. If Skye, who was the number 1 master of leather armor in the past, is willing to come out and join the association under the name of Fonsaq, and with the influence of Master Xingxing, it can definitely compete with the other 2 empires. It was a considerable help for Shea.

Skye glanced at his supportive wife and daughter, “You should be going to the capital, right? Now that Nate of the Bloody Empire is ruined and I don’t have to worry about revenge, I can come out to seek fame and fortune.”

Chen Rui knew Skye’s personality. Not only did he have no desire for fame and wealth, but he was also very indifferent to them. Especially after the great changes back then, he paid more attention to the family and he just wanted to live a stable life. Now he actively proposed to come out, it was obviously to repay his kindness.

“Since master is interested in fame and fortune, I can’t help but be a villain that helped you in hope of repayment.” Chen Rui did not pretend to refuse, but he accepted it generously. Both of them smiled at each other without any more words.

Siren? Don’t tell me he will get another siren into his harem… Dragon’s essence 🤔what ‘essence’🤨?

chapters.title: Chapter 556: The Mystery Of Ancient Civilization And Tetenis’ Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 556: The Mystery Of Ancient Civilization And Tetenis’ Decision

“Okay, if you 2 keep facing each other like this, I’m afraid that something will go wrong. My Lisa will be jealous.” The old man Tetenis spoke. For some reason, the old man was fond of Skye’s wife and Aldas’ sister, Lisa, who had a bold personality. He recognized them as his daughters.

“Eve and Alian are still here, what are you dirty old grandpa talking about?!” Lisa said resentfully as she poured another glass of wine to the old man.

“Why should mother be jealous? What will happen to Sir Aguile and father?” Alian asked curiously.

Eve shook her head. She was also a little confused.

But Ms. Sasa opened her mouth wide, “I see, this is the kind of ‘gay friends’ who like men in Alice’s book? No wonder Alice said that Sir Aguile is disgusting…”

“Shut up!” The old goblin was startled, and he immediately knocked his daughter’s head. Ms. Sasa held her head and looked at his father with a dejected expression.

Chen Rui’s face behind the mask was a little green. It seems that the poison of the little loli is everywhere.

“Sir Aguile is a good person. Alice still wants us to come up with an idea to deal with sir, but my sister and I didn’t agree.” Alian said, and Eve nodded quickly.

The little loli’s resentment for “Aguile”? Chen Rui smiled bitterly and shook his head. He took the good person card from Alian. At this time, Tetenis had already drunk the wine that Lisa poured, and he said, “You’re here to find me, right? Come with me.”

The old man drank a lot of wine today. His nose was red. He pulled Chen Rui toward the laboratory unsteadily.

After walking into the laboratory, Chen Rui brought a chair for the old man to sit down. The old man hiccuped and said, “This time I really foresee it wrongly. You can actually bring down the entire empire. This is an amazing miracle. You’re right. Things are impermanent and everything is possible. But you boy, I know, it’s impossible that you come here to study at this time. Don’t hide anything, you know that I don’t like to go around in circles. But it’s impossible to get me to come out to the public like Skye. My gambling agreement with Saman has only 1 year left. I just want to hurry up and teach you as well as Aldas all that I know, understand?”

“Understood.” Chen Rui was touched. The old man’s mind was just to pass on his knowledge before his death. He was really good to his apprentices. When the Dark Moon started the war, he wanted to forcibly take Chen Rui away from the war, but with him, the knowledge could be passed on. However, whether it was endless was still unknown.

“I came to see teacher today for 2 matters. Has teacher heard of the 2 materials, Dragon Power Essence and Siren’s Heart?”

“Dragon Power Essence is the essence of dragons’ souls that did not dissipate after death. It contains the dragon demeanor and part of the soul power of the dragons. This kind of material is extremely rare in the Demon Realm, but there is a lot of it in a place. But that place is a dead end even for the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. That’s the Dragon Island.”

“Dragon Island?” This is not the first time Chen Rui heard of this term. Dragon Island was a gathering place for grouped dragons, and it was not just an island. In fact, Krobelus came from a branch of Dragon Island. Dragon Island was equivalent to a family model. In contrast, Paglio and Zola were equivalent to stragglers without a group background.

Tetenis had a solemn expression, “I don’t know how many giant dragons there are on Dragon Island. Although the fertility rate of dragons is extremely low, no one knows how many giant dragons there are on Dragon Island. It is only reported that even Demi-God powerhouses didn’t dare to forcibly enter Dragon Island. The strength is evident.”

When Chen Rui initially understood from the literal “Dragon Power Essence”, he still wanted to go to Paglio and the others to find a way, but he didn’t expect it to be the soul essence after death. As for Dragon Island, there would still be future troubles after what happened on the last battlefield. Chen Rui wasn’t crazy enough to think about going there.

“Siren is the sea creature family of the Dead Sea. They are good at incorporating spirit power into singing to create powerful illusions. The so-called Siren’s Heart does not refer to their hearts. It is the vital crystal on their forehead. After losing it, their vitality will be greatly injured. It will take many years before they can recover. Siren’s temperament is very unyielding. If you don’t get their consent, you won’t get the Siren’s Heart even if you kill them.

Chen Rui frowned. This way, the idea of asking Earth Elemental King for help can also be dispelled. Guradam’s advancement is indeed not a simple matter , “Thank you for the answer, teacher. The second thing is that when I went out this time, Uh … under the guidance of the grand master’s inheritance, I got some relics of ancient civilizations. Please go through them first, teacher.”

With that said, Chen Rui took out the expired black potions from the ancient alchemy civilization site. When Tetenis heard the words “grand master’s inheritance” and “ancient civilization”, he was already very high-spirited, and he carefully took over the abandoned potions. He unplugged the stopper, smelled it with the tip of his nose, and he was suddenly sober, “Dead river flower, purple thought grass, deer tooth vine…Unexpectedly, after this bottle of Eternal Power expires, I can identify also a few of the ingredients! It’s just that dead sea flower and purple thought grass have always been incompatible. When used together, they will have a very violent effect. They are generally used to induce poison. How can they appear at the same time in black potions with a mild temperament and no side effects?”

“When the usage is different, the function is different. If we add the black feather root with a water-soluble method and acid-leaching method, the original explosive attribute can produce a kind of resonance power. I once consumed a full set of Eternal series potions. Besides the individual eternal buff attribute, after drinking the whole set, strange resonance fluctuations appeared in my body. My overall attribute has buffed again just like consuming the black potions again. Then, we can infer that dead sea flower, purple thought grass and black feather root should be the basic material of every Eternal series potion. Water-soluble method and acid-leaching method are the necessary secret methods for preparation.”

“Right!” Tetenis showed ecstasy as he jumped from his chair.

The black potions had been lost for so many years. Most of the prescriptions and secret methods were incomplete. Pharmaceutics was broad and profound. A small difference could change the attribute of the entire potion. Now that they confirmed part of the formula and secret method, combined with the inherited knowledge, there must be a certain breakthrough especially for Tetenis, the remarkable quasi-grand master.

The old man suddenly reacted. His eyes with red veins glared round, “How did you know that adding black feather root with the water-soluble method and acid-leaching method can have this effect? I have not taught you this combination method. Furthermore, there is no such method in my thousands of years of inheritance. Where did you learn it?”

Chen Rui also recovered his senses and pointed to his brain, “I don’t know why, I just know. It should be the result of the inheritance I got. Unfortunately, it’s only part of the grand master’s consciousness which is incomplete.”

“Ancient alchemy civilization! Your grand master must be from an ancient alchemy civilization!” The old man grabbed Chen Rui’s shoulder excitedly and shook for a while. If it weren’t for Chen Rui who had now reached the same level of strength as the old man, perhaps his bones would be shattered from the shake.

The secret recipe Chen Rui knew was actually obtained from memory fragments that he devoured in the trial of alchemy civilization. He just didn’t expect that the old man actually knew about the ancient alchemy civilization.

After a long time, the old man recovered his calmness. He realized that he exerted too much force in the clutch. He patted his apprentice on the shoulder embarrassedly. He told Chen Rui about some ancient records that were not seen in the history of the Demon Realm.

The present 7 great royal families and the other families of the Demon Realm were not the first to exist in the Demon Realm. Before that, there were countless civilizations or forces. These civilizations were only recorded in some fragments of ancient scrolls.

It was said that ancient alchemy civilization was the origin of alchemy. The scope of coverage was not limited to mechanics and potion. Alchemy covered every corner of life such as lighting. The current magic lamp of the Demon Realm was invented by the mechanic grand master, Martini, 70,000 years ago. The real value was comparable to any kind of artifact or even surpassed them. However, in the alchemy civilization, the magic lamp appeared long ago, but the original principle was different. It was made of a kind of light-gathering insect that had gone extinct in the Demon Realm. The insects were constantly dying and multiplying in the special environment of the lamp body, looping endlessly. This was equivalent to a kind of power that was close to eternity which was beyond the reach of the current magic lamp.

It was just that the alchemy civilization was annihilated for some reason in the vast history like many civilizations. Only part of the knowledge of mechanics and potion was passed down, and it had evolved into the current 2 major alchemy academic schools.

Chen Rui asked tentatively, “Does teacher know the Abyss Family?”

Tetenis was stunned and seemed thoughtful, “I haven’t heard of it, but the word ‘Abyss’ means ‘taboo’ in the ancient language. I don’t know what is the specific meaning… By the way, where did you get these abandoned black potions? Is there something else?”

When the old man talked about this, his eyes flashed with green light which gave Chen Rui goosebumps, but Chen Rui knew that what the old man valued was knowledge instead of property. Tetenis was similar to an expert professor who had devoted his life to academic research, a true scholar and researcher, rather than the “calling beast” (Chinese pronunciation similar to professor) Nate who chased fame and deceived the world.

“That is a place in the White Feather Estate. It should be a site of ancient alchemy civilization. Only some of the lamp spirits are still alive…”

“The lamp spirits?” Tetenis said excitedly, “I remember that there are ancient records that the lamp spirits are concubines and magicians in the alchemy civilization. You actually found the lamp spirits alive?”

“Not only the lamp spirits, but also some assemble puppets, crystal beasts, and so on, but unfortunately they are no longer usable.” Chen Rui thought, “It’s just that no one but me can enter the place. I did not have time to take away more things and only brought back these abandoned black potions as I was rushing back to the Dark Moon this time.”

“I’ve heard about the assemble puppet. What is a crystal beast?” The more unknown the thing, the more it aroused the interest of the old man. His face was full of enthusiasm, and he incoherently said, “Why did you rush back in a hurry! Why not more bring more of it out!”

Chen Rui rolled his eyes. The Dark Moon will be over if I don’t rush back. And I’m afraid that you have already run away with your foster daughter and family by now. However, he also knew the importance of the knowledge of alchemy civilization to Tetenis. It was not only a fanatical pursuit of knowledge, but also a deeper insight from the remnants of the alchemy civilization. Then, the fatal showdown 1 year later would not necessarily be a sure-lose game.

Chen Rui also wanted to use Tetenis’s ability to restore the combat power of those assemble puppets and crystal beasts. If the powerful troops left by the alchemy civilization could be restored, or even mass-produced into legions, then they wouldn’t be afraid of fighting against the Dark Shadow Empire or the Bloody Empire.

The giant crystal beast was an existence that could directly compete with a Demon Overlord. The assemble puppet, crystal beast and the lamp spirits also had very powerful combat power.

“I’ve decided!” The old man slammed his chair loudly,”If you are going to the capital, take me along. There is only 1 condition which is to get the things of alchemy civilization out for me to research!

This was really a desirable decision.

Baited 😏 Can Tetenis revive the mighty army of the ancient alchemy civilization?

chapters.title: Chapter 557: The Dark Shadow Empire’S Envoys
chapters.body:
Chapter 557: The Dark Shadow Empire’S Envoys

Chen Rui would naturally not refuse Tetenis’ request to go to the capital. With the reputation of the top leather armor master, Fonsaq, and the top accessories master, Tetenis, the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association would definitely surpass the other 2 empires.

The old man initially wanted to teach Chen Rui the memory knowledge inherited from the ancient times, but the important discoveries of the few materials just now gave him a lot of inspiration in the research of black potions. He was about to experiment, so he didn’t force Chen Rui to stay.

Chen Rui walked out of the laboratory and said goodbye to Skye, his wife and others. Before leaving, the eyes of the 2 dark elf girls made him feel a little uneasy. It seems like…

Chen Rui then shook his head. Eve and Alian are a couple of years younger than Alice, and they are only little girls. They usually have too little contact with the opposite sex, so they just have some vague immature feelings. As long as I keep a proper distance, it will be alright when they have seen the world more.

Back at the house, Chen Rui told the latest intel of the Dark Shadow Empire. Athena and Kia both seemed worried. The civil war in the Fallen Angel Empire just ceased, and the foreign enemies immediately coveted them; Delia looked a little dignified. She was the first to get the intel of the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy, but it was too late. After receiving the so-called “official” news about the mission, the envoy had already crossed Town Walan. The purpose was evident, which was to catch the Dark Moon by surprise.

Roman, Paglio, and Krobelus looked nonchalant. Only Zola said, “The powerhouse’s path is always full of thorns. You will experience countless fierce battles to break through the limit in order to reach the current level. As your woman and an experienced person, I will not be an obstacle in your journey toward the peak stage.”

Paglio had the most experience in the first half of the sentence. He watched this human’s strength take off step by step. After 2 years, he leaped to the level of the peak stage of the Demon Emperor from the Lesser Demon, and he also possessed the transformation ability that was comparable to the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord’s combat power. This was an unimaginable miracle. The “grand master inheritance” was certainly an important reason, but it was also due to the countless training and battles on the edge of life and death.

The fairy dragon’s voice became louder, “But you don’t need to devote everything to a mere empire. So what if the empire is gone. We can go to another place or escape far away from the 3 empires’ border. If you want Shea or other women, just take them away together.”

Chen Rui didn’t expect that Zola, who had always fake daze, would say this. He knew that Zola still had lingering fears because he had almost died with Obsidian on the battlefield. Although Shea was his beloved woman, the Dark Moon was also a result of his hard work. Nonetheless, his women were not only Shea (strictly speaking, Shea was not counted yet).

“I’m not asking you to run away now, but I’m just saying that we have a way to retreat. My man is not some kind of guy who abandons his comrades and runs away cowardly.” Zola said while looking at Paglio.

“Understood.” Chen Rui nodded honestly with warmth in his heart.

Seeing the demonstrative glance of Ms. Fairy Dragon, the Master Poison Dragon choked with a sip of wine in his throat. What have I got to do with you motivating your own man?

“I also hope that my man will become stronger and stronger, then he can explore and study more higher-level secrets with me such as the silver box…”

Master Poison Dragon’s eyes suddenly lit up, and he patted Chen Rui’s shoulder vigorously, “Prosper together! Develop together!”

Chen Rui looked at Paglio with a weird look. Is the next sentence building a harmonious society together?

In the afternoon of the next day, the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy finally arrived.

This time it was a man and a woman. The woman was Liliz who came to the Dark Moon with “Isis” to discuss the cooperation last time. Her power was the early stage of the Demon Emperor; the man could also be regarded as Chen Rui’s “acquaintance”, Terdila. He was an intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord whom Chen Rui had fought against in the Mountain Xilang’s Loki incident.

On the Dark Moon’s side, besides “Aguile”, Shea was surrounded by the capital’s Demon Overlords with Stiller as the leader. Sheriff Athena and Financial Officer Chen Rui disguised by Dodo were also there. According to Tetenis, the root cause of Dodo’s mutation was that it devoured the Dragon Power Essence of the red dragon, and the subsequent devil fruit induced and refined the power of Dragon Power Essence step by step. According to this principle, Dodo had great potential.

It was a pity that this slime was timid and cowardly. Now that he was with Chen Rui and others, he didn’t want to make progress at all, but his transformation ability was used to the fullest. With the cover of the secret treasure Evil Blue Tear from Roman’s Belphegor Royal Family, even Demon Overlord couldn’t see through him.

After both parties finished the ceremony, Liliz spoke, “Princess Royal Highness, the Dark Moon and the Bloody Vine Flower Estate of our Dark Shadow Empire have a very good foundation for cooperation. This time, I came by the order of Her Majesty Catherine to discuss with Your Highness about further in-depth cooperation.”

Shea immediately heard the meaning, “It is Catherine the Great, not Bloody Vine Flower Estate?”

“Yes.” Liliz smiled behind her thin veil. “Princess Shea shocked the Demon Realm in the battle of Town Leith Wilderness. This is a classic battle that can be included in the history. Her Majesty Catherine is full of praise for Royal Highness’s heroic strength and tactics. She wants to help Your Highness to smooth out the obstacles within the empire and ascend to the position of the empress.”

“Thank you very much for the kindness of Catherine the Great, but the affairs of the Fallen Angel Empire will be handled by the Lucifer Royal Family, so I will not trouble the Dark Shadow Empire. I will remember this kind intention in my heart as a testimony of the 2 empires going forward hand in hand.”

Terdila spoke with a rather hostile tone, “So, Lord the Dark Moon is going to reject the friendship of the empress of our empire?”

Shea was not an empress now. A lord rejecting the friendship of a great empress was a sufficient excuse to start a war. However, the excuse of war was only a justification. If they really wanted to start a war, they could do so without any reason. Terdila was just taking advantage of the situation.

“ Hmph! ” Stiller scoffed, faintly exuding the breath of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, “Are you threatening us?”

In the presence of so many powerful Demon Overlords, Terdila was still domineering, making it clear that he was not afraid of becoming hostile. He represented the powerful Dark Shadow Empire. Once these Demon Overlords dared to make a move, the entire Fallen Angel Empire would be retaliated by multiples.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the phrase “weak empire has no diplomatic relationship.” Diplomatic relationships were based on the power of the empire family, no matter in which world. Only when one’s own empire was truly powerful could it wash away the humiliation of history, deter the weaker ones, and be invincible on the international stage. The extreme methods would make one become an easy target of manipulation that made the true original intention deviate from the track further and further.

“Our empire and the Fallen Angel Empire have always been friendly and cooperating, and we also signed a peace agreement. How is there a ‘threat’?” Liliz’s expression remained unchanged, “Her Majesty Catherine also ascended step by step from the difficulties, so she naturally understood Princess Shea’s difficulties. Therefore, we came from afar with kind intention, hoping to help Your Highness.”

Chen Rui disguised by Dodo asked a prepared line under Athena’s hint, “What kind of help can Her Majesty Catherine provide?”

Liliz’s eyes were fixed on “Chen Rui” for a while and she replied, “Her Majesty Catherine has begun to stock up heavy troops in front of Tekula Fortress and Town Leia. It can go both ways to assist Princess Shea to control the entire empire by military force immediately in order to successfully ascend the throne.”

Liliz knew that the movements of the army in the territory could hardly be hidden from the eyes and ears of the Fallen Angel Empire, so she simply stated it with a high-sounding reason.

“‘Assist’? This word is used nicely” The real Chen Rui changed his voice and spoke behind the mask, “The Demon Realm has an old saying, there is never reaping without sowing. Then, in return of this “assistance”, what kind of price should we pay? Is it to pay a lot of money? Or to cede some important land?”

“Money and ceding of land cannot be equated with true friendship.” Liliz still had a charming smile. Everyone heard this remark. The cedes of land is not enough indeed.

“In fact, Her Majesty Catherine doesn’t want money or estate rewards, but she hopes to work hand in hand with Princess Shea to deepen the cooperation between both empires, including economic and military aspects. We will strengthen the trade between both empires and reduce the tax rates, promote development…” Liliz said a lot that sounded like a win-win situation, but in Chen Rui’s ears, these benefits contained a lot of prototypes of an economic war. I never thought Catherine actually has such insights.

“As a partner, we hope to get advanced ordnance manufacturing technologies such as the Dark Moon’s soil improvement technology, magic crystal cannon, heavy ballista, and so on. Including borrowing some exclusive talents such as the Sir Financial Officer Chen Rui…”

Liliz obviously came to the main point, and she smiled at “Chen Rui”, “Currently the 2 princes of the Bloody Empire are battling each other in the north of the Iron Fist Estate. After the Princess Royal Highness ascends the throne, Catherine the Great wants your empire from the Warlock Fortress to send troops to help the Bloody Empire quell the internal strife. Of course, the Dark Shadow Empire Army will enter the territory of your empire via Tekula Fortress to assist, and the First General Broc of our empire will also send troops from Jergal Fortress to put pressure on it.”

Chen Rui immediately understood Catherine’s intentions. The first was to obtain confidential technology and talents, and the latter was to seek benefit from the battle between the Fallen Angel Empire and the Bloody Empire. She really doesn’t need ceding of the land, nor does she need to seize the city. As long as the vital power of the Fallen Angel Empire and the Bloody Empire is exhausted, isn’t the lands within easy reach?

Looting a burning house, fishing in troubled waters , instigating fights among other enemies, conniving with us to damage a third party, then turning against us, watch in safety whilst others fight then reap the rewards when both sides are exhausted… There are countless strategies and calculations that supplement each other. Chen Rui lamented that he was incomparable. Judging from this trend, Catherine is determined to take advantage when the Fallen Angel Empire is at its weakest.

Shea and the capital’s Demon Overlords were not fools. Putting aside those economic and trade tricks, everyone could see the sinister intentions of the so-called “cooperation”. Shea immediately refused, “Please forgive that I can’t agree.”

Liliz was not surprised by Shea’s refusal, and she said with a smile, “Your Highness’ reply is too early. Anyway, Your Highness is now the lord of the Dark Moon, and you do not represent the will of the entire empire. If Your Highness does not agree, Her Majesty Empress can get another collaborator who can truly represent the Fallen Angel Empire such as… Sicali. Lucifer who occupies the capital of your empire or another more sincere royal family.”

The intention of the Dark Shadow Empire was very simple. Now the Fallen Angel Empire has no master. If you disagree, my army can invade and support a more obedient puppet to ascend to the throne.

This was a stark threat.

The faces of the Demon Overlords around Shea suddenly changed, and a wave of murderous aura shrouded Liliz. There seemed to be some kind of secret treasure beside Liliz as she still maintained a calm smile with a steady momentum.

Shea was recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel and defeated Obsidian. She was the recognized heir to the empire. Even if the Demon Overlords had their own plans in their hearts, they couldn’t deny this. The envoy of the Dark Shadow Empire blatantly threatened the future empress of the Fallen Angel Empire now, that was equivalent to threatening the entire Fallen Angel Empire. Furthermore, in the presence of so many Demon Overlords, they were naturally impossible to sit back and watch.

The Dark Shadow Empire was stronger than the Fallen Angel Empire. Especially in this kind of internal friction battle, the Fallen Angel Empire suffered severe setbacks and was pulled further by the other 2 empires. Once these 2 envoys were killed, their last hope would be cut off. The Dark Shadow Empire would send troops that were hoarded at the 2 borders without hesitation. One action could have a massive consequence. Although Stiller and other Demon Overlords were angry, they still did not dare to move.

“What Madam Liliz wants to express is that we have to accept Catherine the Great’s ‘friendship’, even if we are not willing?” Chen Rui pondered for a moment, and his voice broke the increasingly rigid atmosphere.

This sentence was obviously knowingly asking. Liliz smiled and said nothing while Terdila sneered and said, “Sir Aguile, after a hurried farewell at Mountain Xilang last time, I missed sir very much.”

“ Oh? I wonder if Sir Terdila’s golden puppet was repaired?” Chen Rui deliberately provoked Terdila. His current [Royal Star Transformation] power was no longer the same as the past, so he was not afraid of Terdila.

Then only everyone knew that Aguile actually fought against Terdila before, and it seemed that the latter had suffered a lot. However, Terdila didn’t fall for it. Instead, he added, “Sir’s strength is indeed extraordinary. With the God-Eating Mask in hand, I’m not an opponent. But what I can’t understand is why will the master of the dignified Beelzebub Royal Family actually submit to the Princess Royal Highness of the Dark Moon? The phrase ‘we’ just now is used so intimately like there is no feud between the 2 royal families.”

As soon as these words came out, the eyes of the capital’s Demon Overlord all locked on Chen Rui.

The God Eater Empire of Beelzebub was annihilated by the Fallen Angel Empire, and the 2 families could be described as enemies for generations. There had been rumors that Aguile was the remnants of Beelzebub, and everyone only thought it was a rumor.

Now the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy Terdila personally said that Aguile was the master of Beelzebub who also mastered the God-Eating Mask. Moreover, from the dialogue between the 2, Terdila was defeated by the God-Eating Mask back then, and his Asmodeus Royal Family’s gold puppet was also severely damaged.

The fiance of Princess Royal Shea, the future prince consort of the empire, is actually the master of the Beelzebub Royal Family!

How can this not be shocking? So what is the intention of Aguile. Beelzebub to help Shea like this? What scheme he has? Several quick-thinking Demon Overlords suddenly recalled that the reason Obsidian sanctioned against Shea included “Lost God-Eating Mask fragment”. Could it be…

In an instant, many people began to whisper, and they looked at Shea with a complicated gaze.

TL: The envoys obviously came prepared. How will the diplomatic meeting turn out?

chapters.title: Chapter 558: A Comeback
chapters.body:
Chapter 558: A Comeback

Chen Rui secretly gave Terdila a thumbs up for putting him into trouble. None of the 2 envoys of the Dark Shadow Empire this time are easy to deal with.

On the surface, Liliz is the good guy while Terdila is the bad guy, but the real move is made by Terdila. With a tacit understanding, these moves worked immediately. Before I figure out how to deal with the conditions of the Dark Shadow Empire, the Dark Moon is already messed up internally first.

Chen Rui’s eyes rolled, “It is said that although Catherine the Great of your empire has been single for many years, she has a soft spot for a man. I wonder if this rumor is true?”

A murderous look suddenly appeared in Terdila’s eyes, “How dare you slander Her Majesty Catherine!”

Chen Rui sneered, “I slander? What proof do you have to say that I’m a member of the Beelzebub Royal Family? I can also say that I’m a member of the Asmodeus Royal Family or a human, do you believe it?”

Terdila said coldly, “A guy who doesn’t even dare to admit his surname is not worthy to be the master of the family. I want to see what storms you can stir in the Fallen Angel Empire.”

Chen Rui shook his head. The truth was always hard to accept. In fact, Catherine was really interested in a man, and that man was indeed human.

Shea’s faint voice sounded, “It’s not the intention of the envoys to instigate our unity this time, right? Aguile is my fiancé, so outsiders don’t have to worry about this. I just want to ask both envoys, is the 3 empires’ peace agreement that Her Majesty Catherine personally participated in the signing still valid?”

“It was Regent Obsidian who signed the contract.” Liliz gave the final answer in one sentence, which was also Catherine’s true attitude.

Chen Rui asked, “This matter is too serious. Can you give us some time to consider?”

This sentence was already deciding for Princess Royal Shea. Stiller and the others changed their faces. Terdila replied, “Liliz and I must get a reply tomorrow morning at the latest. Otherwise, it can only be regarded as lord the Dark Moon rejecting the kindness of our empress.”

“Okay! I will give you an accurate answer tomorrow morning!” Chen Rui replied affirmatively.

Baroco was furious, “Hold on, Aguile! Why do you agree on behalf of Princess Shea!”

Suddenly, there was an immense chill in the hall. A sword appeared in front of Shea out of thin air. It was the Sword of Fallen Angel. The whispering stopped suddenly.

Shea stood up and said, “Aguile’s words are what I meant, so it was decided.”

Although Shea was not an empress yet, in the face of the highest artifact, Baroco and others have no choice but to bow together.

“Gauss, take both envoys to the royal inn to settle down.”

Old Gauss stepped forward and responded, leading Liliz and Terdila out of the hall.

The Sword of Fallen Angel gradually disappeared. Chen Rui saluted, “Princess Shea, I have something to discuss with Madam Athena and Sir Chen Rui. I will come later.”

Shea nodded and gestured the 3 to go out first. Several Demon Overlords’ emotional voices immediately sounded in the hall.

“Princess Royal, who is Aguile actually?!”

“That Terdila said Aguile is the master of Beelzebub. It doesn’t seem like a slander!”

“Even if he is not a member of Beelzebub Royal Family, he might be related to the Dark Shadow Empire. He pretends to defend us, but he actually agreed to the conditions of the Dark Shadow Empire on behalf of Your Highness…” Shea sat quietly on the highest chair and didn’t answer. Soon, the “Aguile” whom everyone condemned appeared in the hall.

The soundproof magic circle seemed to be activated again in the hall as it suddenly became quiet and no sound could be heard.

Time passed by every minute and every second. The light of the 2 moons gradually changed from white to purple.

Under the tranquil moonlight, there were many unsettling hearts.

The serene moonlight began to become slightly dazzling again, although it was not shining enough, it brought light to the entire Demon Realm.

Liliz and Terdila arrived at the palace early in the morning. Before Shea ascended the throne, it was the right time to exert more pressure harder. Once Shea really returned to the capital and ascended the throne, then the whole situation would change drastically.

The army of the Dark Shadow Empire had quickly mobilized to the 2 major points of the Fallen Angel Empire, and they probably would be assembled in 2 days. This was the real reason for giving the deadline for the Dark Moon to “think”. The extra time was for themselves to buffer in order to respond to change.

Outside the palace, Liliz and Terdila met Athena who greeted them. Athena was surrounded by an unfamiliar man and woman who were both Demon Overlords. The power of the green-haired woman was comparable to Terdila. Although the other man did not release his breath, he gave Terdila an intangible terrifying pressure.

Peak stage of the Demon Overlord! Terdila and Liliz exchanged glances quickly, only to hear Athena speak, “Greetings envoys, please come with me.”

Athena’s direction was actually not within the palace, so Liliz asked, “General Athena, where are we going?”

“Doesn’t Her Majesty Catherine want to listen to the lord of the Dark Moon’s reply?” Athena calmly said, “You will understand soon.”

Liliz and Terdila were a little surprised, but they were not worried. In just 1 night, what can Shea come up with? The Dark Moon don’t have the guts to set any traps anyway. Therefore, they immediately followed Athena to the outside.

The Dark Moon City did not suffer the disaster of war. Coupled with Shea’s great victory, the former prosperous situation had been mostly restored. There was an endless stream of residents and businessmen who came and went.

As Athena walked, she asked, “Both envoys, how is the economy of the Dark Moon compared to the Dark Shadow Empire?”

Liliz nodded and said, “The bustling Dark Moon Estate is well-known in the Demon Realm. Although it is not comparable to our Dark Shadow Empire, there are only a handful of estates or cities that can be compared to it. Being able to develop to this extent in such a short time, even inspired all estates to follow suit, the talents of Princess Shea and the general’s lover Sir Chen Rui are really impressive. I’ll say something inappropriate here in private. If general and Sir Chen Rui can switch to our empire, I believe Her Majesty Empress will meet any of your conditions.”

“Thank you Catherine Royal Highness and Madam Liliz for valuing us highly.” Athena smiled slightly, but she did not reply.

This was already a kind of tactful refusal. This attitude was not unexpected by Liliz. If it was so easy to win them over, it would not be Chen Rui or Athena. However, by saying this, it might pave the way for the future.

The group of people walked all the way out of the city gate. They rode the prepared demonic horses to the southern suburbs.

The increasingly ghastly breath made Terdila and Liliz had a look of vigilance in their eyes. Athena spoke up, “Don’t worry, this is the undead army barrack of our Dark Moon.”

Standing at the gate of the undead barrack was the terror knight Pegasus of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. After seeing Athena, he respectfully saluted and let everyone in. Inside was the endless undead army who were all equipped with armor and weapons like the regular army. All of them stood still like corpses as if they were dead. However, Terdila and Liliz knew that as long as the controller gave an order, these undead would become terrifying combat power. The battle of the Dark Moon brought about a huge change in the status of the undead soldiers in military operations. No one dared to underestimate the undead which could only be used as cannon fodders initially.

“What do you think of this undead army plus the 3 legions of the Dark Moon as compared to your empire’s army assembled at Town Leia?”

Terdila’s pupils contracted slightly. He was not Jiang Gan , so of course he would say ‘live up to the reputation’ as the plot of the Romance of the 3 Kingdoms because Athena was already provocative. At this critical moment, provocation meant…

A surprised expression flashed past Liliz’s eyes. She asked calmly, “General Athena, can your words represent the entire Dark Moon Estate?”

At this moment, the sound of fireworks came from the distant Dark Moon City. Some kind of cheering became louder and louder.

Terdila took a step forward and guarded Liliz. A knife-like gaze locked on Athena’s face, “What sound is this? What do you mean?”

“This is the voice of the Dark Moon celebrating. They should have received a magic message. Her Majesty Shea has successfully ascended the throne in the capital. As for Madam Liliz’s previous question…” Athena looked at Terdila directly, “Athena. Wales, representative lord of the Dark Moon, meets 2 envoys.”

Even Terdila and Liliz who were shrewd and deep couldn’t help but lost their composure when they heard Athena’s words.

Then both of them immediately calmed down. Their first reaction was that Athena was deliberately making things look mysterious. This is too unbelievable. Shea is enthroned in the capital? Yesterday afternoon, they even saw Shea and the Sword of Fallen Angel in the palace with their own eyes. It is absolutely impossible to disguise this. In just 1 night, Shea went to the capital and became the empress?

She must be hiding to escape this decision by confusing us. Then, putting up a play to buy time in order to rush to the capital.

Terdila said coldly, “We think too highly of the Princess Royal Highness. She actually used this kind of nasty trick. Even if she hides and refuses to meet us, it’s useless. If there is no answer, Walan Fortress, Red Spirit Estate and Tekula Fortress will be captured by us at the same time the day after tomorrow at the latest. By then, it will be too late for Princess Shea to get the throne that she really wants.”

“It is ridiculous that both of you are acting arrogant and smart, but how ignorant you are actually! Firstly, let me correct your basic mistake, now it is Her Majesty Shea instead of Royal Highness!” Athena knew that these 2 people did not believe, and she sneered, “Just last night, Her Majesty Shea brought several elder families and the royal families’ Demon Overlords to the capital. The enthronement ceremony is held today and she has successfully ascended the throne!”

Seeing the 2 envoys’ uncertain expressions, Athena showed pride, “I believe General Gerant, who left long ago, is about to arrive at Tekula Fortress. Red Spirit’s Lord Josh has returned to the Red Spirit Estate after the decisive battle, and he took the original 3 legions of the capital army. They are currently waiting in the frontier Town Sam. Behind Town Sam is the Town Moling which Kanita has operated for many years. It is extremely hard to attack. Even if it is an army of several times bigger, don’t think of breaking it in a short time. As for the Dark Moon side… I have led you to watch the prosperity of the Dark Moon and the military power of the Dark Moon just now. Isn’t that enough to explain our attitude? I forgot to tell you that Master Guradam has led half of the undead army to the Walan Fortress!”

This is only half of the undead army? Terdila and Liliz both gasped. If what Athena said is true, even if the Dark Shadow Empire is ready to fight and go all out, it will not be possible to take down the 3 key points of the Fallen Angel Empire in a short time.

“Finally, Her Majesty Shea asked me to convey a few original words to both of you. We can afford to fight and we can afford to prolong the fight! As long as the Dark Shadow Empire dares to fight, we dare to take it! Even if it benefits Raizen, I also want to perish together with the Dark Shadow Empire!”

TL: Will Catherine still choose to fight or she has expected this to happen?

chapters.title: Chapter 559: Her Majesty Shea
chapters.body:
Chapter 559: Her Majesty Shea

Liliz and Terdila were finally truly shocked. Athena’s current determination and performance are by no means pretended. Could Shea miraculously return to the capital in such a short time and ascend to the throne?

In theory, there are 2 ways to ignore space. The first is the water element magic [Time and Space Gate]. This magic has a short effective number of days and is easily disturbed. Within the effective days after activation, the spirit power will be consumed continuously every day.

The second method is to establish [Space Teleportation Portal]. This condition is more demanding and requires extremely high environmental requirements. The most basic facility is to build a strong magic pool. For the capital of an empire, this environment that exists will definitely be strictly guarded and eliminated. Moreover, based on the Fallen Angel Capital sanctions and guards against the Dark Moon over the past 300 years, Obsidian will surely not leave an entrance open for the Dark Moon.

The most important thing is that, whether it is [Time and Space Gate] or [Space Teleportation Portal], there are strict distance restrictions. It is impossible to reach the capital that is so far away from the Dark Moon Estate. Otherwise, a space gate can just be built to enable both humans and the Demon Realm to kill each other directly. Why wait to fight once in 500 years?

Liliz and Terdila’s only hope now was that they had made a wrong judgment. Catherine’s purpose is to take advantage of the critical moment when the Fallen Angel Empire has no master and drive the Fallen Angel Empire to fight against the Bloody Empire, not fighting against the Dark Shadow Empire desperately. Once the Fallen Angel Empire really goes all in to fight, and if they did not hesitate to use the power of the empire to exhaust the power of the Dark Shadow Empire, then just like Shea’s words, it will eventually benefit Raizen.

The Dark Shadow Empire will be dragged to hell together by the Fallen Angel Empire. This is by no means the goal of this mission!

This Princess Royal Highness… maybe she really has carried the name Her Majesty Shea, she can definitely do as she said. Otherwise, she would not furiously refuse Obsidian’s proposal to openly trigger a crusade.

“We have understood what General Athena meant. Now we want to return to Dark Moon City. I don’t know if general allows it?” Liliz’s tone softened a bit. There were 2 intermediate stage Demon Overlords beside Athena and 1 peak stage of the Demon Overlord. In addition to so many undead soldiers, it was easy to kill them. Liliz was not afraid of death, but she wanted to confirm the shocking news as soon as possible.

“Both of you are the guests of the Dark Moon. As the new lord, if there is any offense or poor hospitality, please forgive me. You can go as you want. If you want to return to the Dark Shadow Empire, I will… Uh , organize a farewell party to send you off.” At this point, Athena herself was a little uncomfortable. After all, she was also forced to do something out of her ability. She had always believed that she, like her father George and Mom, the red dragon, was most suitable for a career in the army. She lacked a sense of familiarity as a lord. Furthermore, it was the largest and most prosperous Dark Moon Estate in the entire empire.

However, Chen Rui helped Princess Royal to develop and grow the entire Dark Moon Estate, and she also contributed her part. Shea especially said before leaving last night, “Athena, guard our home.”

This sentence had a double meaning. Athena knew in her heart that some things would not change even if Shea became an empress. Chen Rui, who followed Shea to the capital, would not change as well.

It seemed that the “representative lord” might not be the “temporary” anymore.

Liliz and Terdila didn’t care about these details at all. Seeing that Athena didn’t intend to stop them, they hurriedly left. When they walked into the city, they saw almost all the residents cheering. Even the faces of the soldiers were filled with uncontrollable excitement. The cheers of “Long Live Her Majesty” sounded one after another. Many shops even took the opportunity to offer huge discounts. It was several times more grand than the festivals.

The hearts of the 2 envoys sank. Ascending to the throne is not a joke. With this kind of euphoric celebration among the military and residents, Shea will only put herself in trouble if there are any tricks. The case is completely different whether Shea is enthroned and not enthroned. Moreover, the Dark Moon is fully prepared at the 3 key points. It seems like I must report to Catherine the Great as soon as possible.

In fact, Athena’s words were full of bluff. Gerant couldn’t reach Tekula Fortress in such a short time. Josh only brought 1 legion back then, but the most important matter, Shea’s enthronement, was by no means a bluff.

Just after the 2 envoys left the palace yesterday afternoon, Chen Rui, Shea and others had a secret discussion in the hall.

Chen Rui proposed the best way: Rush to the capital, immediately ascend to the throne, and then show the attitude of willing to use the entire empire’s power to fight till death. A beggar can never be bankrupt. He believed the Dark Shadow Empire would not want to perish together and benefit the Bloody Empire for nothing.

Everyone knew this method, but even if they rode the fastest flying demonic beasts to the capital from the Dark Moon, it would take several days. By then, the Dark Shadow Empire’s deadline had already passed.

However, Chen Rui really had a shortcut that was the Rainbow Valley’s space of the fairy dragon. Of course, the outsiders should not be allowed to get a full view of the Rainbow Valley. The entrance was forcibly transferred to the palace by Zola using space magic, and the magic circles of ancient runes were activated in the Rainbow Valley. In the eyes of the accompanying Demon Overlords, the whole process was like starting from the palace and traveling through space just like some kind of big transfer technique. Only Stiller, who was extremely knowledgeable in magic, felt a little strange. Thinking of the terrifying magic power Zola had shown on the battlefield, her heart was full of awe.

After a period of “transfer”, everyone appeared in “the Rainbow Valley” within the scope of the capital which was a huge and dangerous valley, but with the speed of everyone, it took only a few hours to reach the capital.

The appearance of Shea gave General George and others a huge surprise. All the elder families and royal families were dumbfounded. When the Sword of Fallen Angel appeared with an awe-inspiring breath, besides “Aguile” and Zola who were next to Shea, Demon Overlords such as Sarandi and Stiller, the guards led by Oliver and Old Cowen, General George, Sicali and all the soldiers knelt on one knee at the feet of Shea who was recognized by the artifact.

Putting aside the artifact’s recognition, the capital and the 4 estates were in Shea’s hands after Obsidian’s death. Of the 3 generals, 2 supported Shea and 1 had been eliminated. This was all solid power. These royal families and family forces would truly surrender to the master of the artifact only with great power as the foundation.

The enthronement ceremony began overnight preparations. The families quickly released the news, and the soldiers went door to door to notify the residents. With the dissemination of General George and Sicali, the news that Obsidian was killed by Shea with the Sword of Fallen Angel in Dark Moon Estate had been circulating in the capital recently. The residents all knew that the future empress was Shea, but they didn’t expect her to be back to the capital so soon.

The capital was gloomy these days with rain from time to time.

It was the same today. The cold rain came with the cold wind.

Just when the sky was vaguely bright, the central plaza was already crowded with residents who were facing the heavily guarded and improvised high platform.

Shea appeared on the high platform in the eyes of everyone. It was the first time many people saw the Princess Royal in the legend, the granddaughter of the Lord of Midnight Sun. It was said that she was only in her 20s and she actually defeated Regent Obsidian who ruled the empire for 300 years to regain everything that belonged to her. Now was the time for her to be crowned.

Due to the urgency of the situation, a series of complicated rituals could not be held like the regular enthronement. Many steps were omitted. Under everyone’s gaze, under the light of the Sword of Fallen Angel artifact in mid-air, Shea finally wore the crown which was the symbol of a ruler.

For an instant, except for the new empress wearing a golden crown, everyone present knelt down. Shea tried her best to calm the excitement in her heart. The long-awaited wish of my father before his death is finally achieved! I initially thought that this day would take a long, long time, and even stay just as a wish for the rest of my life. I didn’t expect it to become a reality so soon.

This crown was not only a symbol of power, but it was also a symbol of responsibility. As the man said to her, the future of her, him, and the entire empire had just begun. In the future, she would face more difficulties than she had in the Dark Moon, but she would not be afraid and flinch because he would always be by her side.

After everyone got up, Shea’s voice sounded with a hint of seriousness.

“Former Regent Obsidian. Lucifer’s tyrannical behavior, frantically accumulating wealth for his own selfishness, excluding dissidents, and crusading against the estate. Because of this internal strife that our empire has wasted too much power. The soldiers who were deceived waved their swords and slashed toward our brothers and sisters. The lives of countless warriors fell into the hands of their own people and fell under the desire of Obsidian…”

As the winner, one must first list out the faults of the losers. The so-called winners rule, but many things were facts. Obsidian had lost the trust of the people over the years, especially after the fundraising scandal. Many people present were infected by this painful atmosphere.

The capital had the most powerful magic communication tower with direct access to all estates. Through this communication tower, all estates received relevant news early in the morning, and many residents gathered together. Shea’s oath was also spread immediately in this way to every corner of the empire. Although there was a certain delay due to equipment problems, it could be regarded as a live broadcast.

After condemning Obsidian’s guilt and expounding her victory, Shea’s voice became high-spirited again, “I, Shea. Lucifer, swear by the artifact the Sword of Fallen Angel today that I will use my entire life to eliminate the internal strife and eliminate poverty. The miracle of the Dark Moon Estate will reappear in every corner of the empire. I will the entire empire toward real prosperity and strength! Everyone, no matter where they are, will be proud of being the people of the Fallen Angel Empire!”

The firm vow and the light of the artifact filled the eyes of the soldiers and the residents with fiery heat. A person called out “Long live Her Majesty Shea.” The voices in the plaza began to rise and fall, and the residents’ voices became louder and louder. The wave-like sound impacted everyone’s heart as if it resonated with them. It gave birth to a feeling of conviction. Even the cold rain became warm with this eagerness.

The same voice sounded in every estate. Despite being in different places, their eyes had the same fiery heat.

Seeing the Royal Highness Princess Shea finally becoming Her Majesty Shea, Chen Rui felt a sense of accomplishment. He and Shea happened to look at each other. In those seemingly cold eyes, the same gentleness as before was glowing. It was a tacit understanding that required no words.

TL: Maybe one of Catherine’s weaknesses is that she calculates too much that she isn’t willing to take risks 🤔, but it’s not certain that she will give up on it.

chapters.title: Chapter 560: Resistance
chapters.body:
Chapter 560: Resistance
