“Although the Sword of Fallen Angel made Your Majesty’s accession to the throne received everyone’s support, many members of the royal families and elder families have expressed doubts about Your Majesty’s ability. Many people are still in the observation stage. Master Fonsaq joining the Mechanic Association is a good long-term move. It’s just that there will probably be great difficulties if Your Majesty wants to use the Princess Retail Store to change the current situation. The capital’s business structure is relatively fixed. Those families will unite to boycott the Princess Retail Store in order to prevent the sharing of interests, then I’m afraid…”

Shea shook her head, “I know what you mean. What I can tell you is that Master Fonsaq and Princess Retail Store have another role. It doesn’t matter if those branches are suppressed, crowded out, or even closed down. At the next meeting, I will raise the issue of the establishment of the financial minister, minister of military affairs, as well as the right and left prime ministers again. I can be certain that the elder family members will strongly oppose and reject the proposal of giving up a position. At that time, the Toro Family’s opposition can be a bit more fierce to make my failure seem more real.”

Old Cowen was taken aback, and he quickly reacted, “Your Majesty is deliberately showing weakness? But in doing so, Your Majesty must carefully weigh the gains and losses. If this continues, I’m afraid that Your Majesty’s prestige will…”

“Toro Family is the first elder family to support me. In the days to come, your experience and the power of the Toro Family will become one of my trusted arms. I hope I can listen more to your suggestions.” Shea’s eyes gleamed, “But in this current environment, there are some key things that I can’t disclose for the time being. You just need to do it, understand?”

Old Cowen looked at Shea’s determined eyes and felt a lot more at ease in his heart. He bowed deeply, “Understood.”

As expected, Shea suffered another setback in the next 2 meetings, and the intensity of decision-making began to become more tactful. The interests of the elder families were considered in many aspects. For Angley and others, this was a good signal. Shea was an empress after all. The original intention of Angley was not to spur Shea to step down, but to maintain the power and influence of the elder families, so he also showed proper obedience and concessions. Royce’s appointment was approved, and he became the lord of that small estate.

The estate Royce obtained was called Green Shade, which was a relatively small area with dangerous terrain and barren soil. It was located north of the Red Spirit Estate. In addition to the Red Spirit Estate, it also bordered several small and medium estates. To put it nicely, it was an important buffer zone for each estate, but to put it bluntly, its development space was restricted. However, this did not affect the joy and gratitude of Royce. The glory of the Kunda Family shone again at this moment rather than just restoring a surname. Royce knew very well what was the real reason for becoming a lord. He was very grateful for the decision to surrender in the Blue Lake. This was the most correct choice he made in his life. In the beginning, Royce and Arux were important pawns against Joseph for Chen Rui, but with the growth of Chen Rui’s power and the increase of the Dark Moon’s talents, his and Arux’s role was diminishing. However, after Shea ascended the throne, Chen Rui did not forget his servant who no longer had any usage value. The Kunda Family not only restored its honor in his hands, but it also became more shining. Royce secretly made up his mind to make some achievements to repay the master’s kindness.

With the permission of Madam Athena, Royce returned to the Dark Moon from the Red Spirit Estate, then he left the Dark Moon with his wife, Vasasha, his close friend, Arux, and some confidants toward the Green Shade Estate.

At the capital, apart from the original Leisure Moon Inn in the southern suburbs which was still being renovated and reorganized, 4 new Princess Retail Store branches were opened in the city. However, many shops nearby immediately began to sell products that were similar to the Princess Retail Store at lower prices and they used all kinds of means to grab the customers. The Princess Retail Stores were in an extremely difficult situation for a while, and it was unable to make ends meet.

When the Dark Moon’s Princess Retail Store first opened, there was a craze for novel products, then it quickly cooled down under the control of other merchants. Nowadays, the Princess Royal had become an empress, and the Princess Retail Store also represented Her Majesty Empress to a certain extent, but there were business circles and rules in business. The rule in this circle was also honoring strength. If you lost your competitiveness and just relied on the power of empress to gain a foothold, even if you could get a temporary benefit, it would not last for long. Shea would lose more people’s support. The gain was not worth the loss.

General George’s army withdrew from the capital and returned to the Warlock Fortress to guard. Sicali also withdrew a part of the army. The expression of this move made Angley and others more assured. There was a good feeling that the situation was under control.

During the confrontation between Shea and the elder families, Chen Rui did not stay in the capital, but he found a guard with a similar figure and wore a mask and a cloak to appear next to Shea from time to time. This was the benefit of the masked man. Anyway, no one knew the true face of “Aguile”.

Chen Rui went to the White Feather Estate. There were still many good things here that he did not have sufficient time to take away last time. He was finally able to free up his time. The medusa tribe was on standby in the White Feather City, and the lamp spirits who accompanied him to deal with “Sicali” had returned to the underground ruins of the Loeb Mine.

Chen Rui rode the wyvern and flew directly to Loeb Mine. Last time at his instruction, Sicali ordered the suspension of Loeb Mine mining under the pretext of demonic beasts issues. He closed the mining area for the lamp spirits to act. Chen Rui did not encounter any obstacles on his way, and he went straight to the underground ruins of Loeb Mine.

The ruins of the ancient alchemy civilization were actually a mobile mechanical castle. Unlike before he left, many damaged parts of the castle were repaired to a certain extent with glittering lights shining everywhere like countless brilliant gems.

“Master!” Genie and Gensha led the lamp spirits to salute Chen Rui. Genie once gave her life as the key to unlock the ruins. Chen Rui left behind a large number of aura fruits before he left, which were transformed into top-level energy essence that resurrected Genie and others. Not only that, there were more than 2,000 resurrected lamp spirits. There were 72 Demon Emperor golden-eyed lamp spirits including Genie and Gensha, 830 Demon King and Great Demon King silver-eyed lamp spirits, and 1,300 black-eyed lamp spirits of the Higher Demon level.

The lamp spirits of the Demon Emperor level did not have territory power, but they had a long-range energy attack and a special force field similar to territory. This force field could also be used in combination. The more people there were, the greater the power. Chen Rui had seen it in the illusion.

Due to the scarcity of energy, when Genie and others competed with medusas for the snake blood fruit, they could only use hand-to-hand combat and magic talents, and they could not use these energy-consuming special attacks. With the top-level energy essence provided by Chen Rui now, it was as if a poor person who lacked food and clothing became a wealthy rich man in one fell swoop, they could naturally exert their strongest power.

Such a large number of lamp spirits were a very powerful force. 70-plus Demon Emperor level lamp spirits could be dispatched at the right time to kill the ordinary Demon Overlord powerhouse. What’s more, there were terrifying war machines like the crystal beasts, assemble puppets and giant crystal beasts in the ruins.

However, they were all seriously damaged. The crystal beasts and giant crystal beasts were basically unusable. There were several complete assemble puppets which could be used as usual after replenishing energy. It was just that the attribute of the lamp spirits conflicted with the assemble puppets, so they could not act as a pilot.

Chen Rui frowned and asked Genie next to him, “Can you repair these crystal beasts or assemble puppets?”

Genie shook her head, “Lamp spirits do not have this ability. Even if our heart lamp is damaged and dying, we can’t downgrade to repair ourselves.”

Chen Rui showed a look of regret. It seems that only Tetenis can research this. Perhaps a large number of senior goblin warriors are needed as assistants.

“Master, why don’t you make gremlin servants? The giant crystal beasts may be more troublesome, but it shouldn’t be a problem for them to repair the crystal beast and assemble puppets.

Genie’s subsequent words ignited hope in Chen Rui’s eyes. Gremlin servants?

“Master is the inheritor of civilization. You don’t know about gremlin servants?” Genie showed curiosity.

Due to the devour, Chen Rui’s memory was very incomplete. He really hadn’t heard of it before. His mind shifted and he replied, “You should have heard from Gensha that after I accepted the inheritance, I fought against the strong enemy underground. Although I eventually defeated him, the inheritance memory was also affected because of this. Some of it is vague, and I can’t remember many things. Now you tell me about the gremlin servants.”

Genie did not doubt anything, and she replied respectfully, “In the alchemy civilization, the giant crystal beast is the guardian who defends the entire castle. The assemble puppet is equal to the war weapon. People can control it to exert power beyond themselves. The stronger the spirit power of the pilot, the greater the power of the war puppet. The crystal beast is equivalent to a guard who protects the safety of the master. We, the lamp spirits, are magicians on the battlefield; in life, we are the maids who dedicate everything to the master. The gremlin servants are the lowest servants with no combat power and they cannot leave the limited range of the castle, but they have the special ability to repair and manufacture. If we can create a large number of gremlin servants, plus the top-level energy essence provided by master, not only the crystal beasts, but the entire castle can be restored to operation.”

Chen Rui was overjoyed, then he was confused again, “So how do we make the gremlin servants?”

“There is now a large amount of top-level energy essence which is enough to activate the city’s central life crystal and control the entire territory castle, then a large number of gremlin servants can be created by just providing energy.”

Chen Rui noticed Genie’s words, “Territory castle?”

“The entire mobile castle is a territory kingdom. I only know this knowledge with my authority, and the rest is the inheritance memory of master.”

Territory kingdom? It was not the first time Chen Rui heard this term. He had heard it several times from Satan. It should be a territory mystery beyond the realm of Demon Overlord, and it was probably the prototype of [Kingdom of God].

According to Genie, this mobile castle is actually a territory kingdom? Chen Rui thought of Satan’s Mountain Seckred, and he faintly understood it. It was just that the so-called “inheritance memory” was just a guise for possession of the body, and the lamp spirits didn’t seem to know this. The Demi-God soul that was unsuccessful in possessing was eventually devoured by Chen Rui. Most of the power still remained undigested in [Star Conversion]. After all, Chen Rui was not worthy of the inheritor title. He could even be considered the enemy of the entire castle. It was uncertain if he could truly control the entire castle. Maybe there would even be a danger.

Gremlin servants, crystal beasts, assemble puppets, giant crystal beasts… and this huge and powerful territory kingdom. I have to give it a try no matter how.

“Genie, you take me to the central life crystal now.”

“Yes, master.”

Genie led Chen Rui all the way through to a large palace. It was very similar to the main city palace that Chen Rui had seen in the illusion. After walking into the palace and passing through the spiral stairs, Genie stopped in front of a huge underground room, “Master, before you activate the central life crystal, I can only lead you until here. The control center of the main city is inside.”

“You go down first then.” Chen Rui nodded, and Genie bowed and stepped down.

This huge room had no main door, but the dim light faintly shone from the inside which was mysterious. Chen Rui took a deep breath and walked in.

As soon as he approached the entrance of the room, he felt a strong spirit fluctuation which seemed to have a terrifying offensive effect. Once there was a change, he would be annihilated instantly. Chen Rui hesitated and continued to move forward.

The spirit fluctuations became more and more terrifying, and it increased with each step forward. Even Chen Rui who had the spirit power level of S+ now felt trembling in his heart as if he was taking step after step toward the abyss of death.

Chen Rui’s consciousness became blurry under the pressure, and his 5 senses gradually lost their effect, but his body still moved forward firmly with the support of his will and almost instinctive movements.

He couldn’t see or hear clearly what danger was ahead; he was just kept moving forward.

In the process of this advancement, Chen Rui felt the inexhaustible thoughts enveloping him and infiltrating into his soul. The Super System continuously converted it into aura, but the speed and intensity of infiltration was extremely strong. The speed of conversion almost couldn’t keep up with the speed of infiltration. If this continued, perhaps his entire soul would be in danger of collapse.

Could it be another damn possession? Chen Rui felt deceived and was trying to escape. At this moment, the soul power stored in [Star Conversion] began to fluctuate. By right, the power in [Star Conversion] would not convert automatically unless Chen Rui absorbed it or passed it to his chosen target through [Dual Training]. Now this situation should be drawn by foreign consciousness.

The soul power in [Star Conversion] fluctuated more and more intensely, resonating with the foreign consciousness. Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He infiltrated his own spirit power into these soul powers. If it was during the “inheritance”, he would definitely be unable to do it, but it was not a problem since these soul powers had already belonged to him now. It was equivalent to the food in the refrigerator that could be eaten at any time.

The Demi-God’s soul power wrapped in Chen Rui’s spirit power finally couldn’t be restrained. It was constantly surging out under the attraction of powerful consciousness from the outside. Although the soul power stored in [Star Conversion] was huge, the surge speed still made Chen Rui secretly surprised. Fortunately, the attraction quickly weakened, and the soul power that surged out miraculously returned to his body. There was also an extra thing which seemed to be a kind of spiritual imprint, blending with his own spirit.

Before Chen Rui could react, the whole room was dazzlingly bright which looked completely different.

The entire huge room looked boundless and seemed to be an independent space. The ground material was an unknown metal, and there were strange facilities everywhere. In the center, a huge crystal was floating in between 2 golden round platforms that attached to the ceiling and the ground. It seemed to be connecting the sky and the ground with all kinds of strange symbols flashing around.

The crystal emitted a soft purple light, and a tender female voice sounded, “The soul power fits 100%. The spiritual imprint has been added. Welcome, my master.”

Why is it so like a computer ai system? Chen Rui was taken aback, thinking that he had crossovered again and came to a world of science fiction.

TL: He gets a territory kingdom like that? Will it hinder him from realizing his own territory kingdom?

chapters.title: Chapter 567: Crystal Phoenix
chapters.body:
Chapter 567: Crystal Phoenix

Chen Rui felt a lot of strange things were added to his brain. His senses were suddenly sharpened by 100 times. His mind was extended from all directions; everything and every movement from the room to the entire palace were under his control.

This feeling did not consume his own spirit power, but it was an effect extended by the “network” of the central life crystal. It probably would disappear if he left this place.

This room was equivalent to the central control room of the entire castle. Judging from the surrounding conditions, it should also be an independent space. As Chen Rui tried to control with his mind, countless square shapes suddenly arched from the metal ground with strange luster, and they quickly transformed into a smooth chair.

Chen Rui felt very comfortable as he sat on it. This is not an illusion . He couldn’t help being overjoyed. He tried again one by one and found that the things in this room could indeed change freely with his mind. This meant that he had successfully activated the central life crystal and became the master.

His spontaneous idea just now to risk wrapping the soul power with his spirit power was correct.

Chen Rui tentatively asked, “What’s your name?”

The female voice replied, “My name is Crystal Phoenix, do I need to change it?”

Chen Rui had determined that this was a living entity that could interact, and he shook his head, “No. I ask a question. If my soul power can’t match, what will happen?”

“If the soul power fails to match, the intruder will be wiped out on the way into the control center; if it cannot be wiped out, the control center will self-explode. Now this control center has been printed with the spiritual imprint of the master which becomes an independent space. Master can enter the control center at any corner of the castle with just a thought. Without the permission of master, it is impossible to break in even if the entire Shike Castle is destroyed.”

Chen Rui secretly wiped a cold sweat when he realized that he had a near-death experience, “Shike Castle?”

“The castle was originally called Shike. Do you want to rename the castle?”

Chen Rui felt weird in his heart. Why does it seem to be a prompt to enter a game? Anyway, the name “Shike” is too hard to pronounce. He said, “Let’s call it City of Stars.”

“The renaming is complete! Please note that the City of Stars currently has a lot of damage and defects, and most of its functions are unavailable. It is estimated that 3,000 gremlin servants and 145 units of top-level energy essence will be required to complete the repair.”

When Chen Rui heard Crystal Phoenix mentioned “gremlin servants” which was just what he wanted to know. He asked, “How can we make gremlin servants?”

“After master provides enough energy, Crystal Phoenix will activate the Gremlin Factory. Through energy consumption, it will automatically manufacture gremlin souls and transform them into body materials to become gremlin servants. Each unit of top-level energy essence can produce 100 gremlin servants. For every 100 gremlin servants, a mutated gremlin supervisor who can control the gremlin servants to improve work efficiency has a chance to be born. It can manufacture and repair higher-grade equipment. Every 100 gremlin servants would consume 1 unit of top-level energy essence as food per month.”

Oh, I see! Chen Rui suppressed the surprise in his heart, “The energy is not a problem. What are the maximum amount of gremlin and other types of troops that can be produced?”

“The current castle is Level 2. With sufficient materials and energy, there can be up to 20,000 gremlin servants, 10,000 crystal beasts, 5,000 lamp spirits, 1,000 assemble puppets and 100 giant crystal beasts. The castle can be further upgraded to increase the upper limit of each category and enhance its functions, but it requires a lot of rare materials.”

The castle can even be upgraded? Chen Rui’s weird “game” feeling became more intense, then he got the answer from Crystal Phoenix. The life created by the castle was alchemy beings, and the soul core of the alchemy beings was the central life crystal, Crystal Phoenix. Because of this, every alchemy being produced will fully obey the ruler of the castle. The life crystal’s soul control had a certain limit. If it exceeded the number, it would be uncontrollable and the production would automatically stop.

In the alchemy civilization, life crystal was the core that determined all alchemy beings. Perhaps it could be called the maternal body of life creation. The upgrade was to improve the texture and strength of the central life crystal, so that the crystal could control more and more powerful life entities. In addition to the alchemy beings produced by the life crystal, there were a large number of human-like “aborigines” in alchemy civilization who gave birth to the next generation bloodline through the traditional mating method.

These aborigines could control the assemble puppets to unleash powerful combat power, and the ruler was also born from the competition. It was just that such “aborigines” in the current ruins had disappeared long ago. Otherwise, the “outsiders” like Chen Rui would not be able to benefit from it.

Chen Rui took a look at the materials required to upgrade the castle. Most of them are unheard of, and the quantity requirements are astonishing. The top priority is to repair the castle first , “Then create 3,000 gremlin servants to repair the castle.”

“Yes. The castle has already stocked 2,470 units of top-level energy essence. It will cost 50 units to activate the Gremlin Factory, and 30 units for 3,000 gremlin servants. It will take about 5 days if we start manufacturing now. After the gremlin servants are created, the repair will start automatically. We need to find the corresponding materials with high consistency for the repair. If the materials are complete, it will probably take 2 months to completely repair the castle. If a gremlin supervisor is born, the time can be further shortened.”

2 months was actually not a long time. In terms of energy, it was not a problem for Chen Rui who owned the Star Garden. Once the castle was repaired, then he could repair all the crystal beasts and giant beasts. By then it was equivalent to having a powerful army that was enough to build a small empire in the Demon Realm.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of something. An alchemy castle is just equivalent to a small force in the alchemy civilization, but it has such a powerful combat power. One can imagine the power of the entire ancient alchemy civilization. Then, isn’t the Abyss Family who destroyed the alchemy civilization more…

Whether in the illusion at the inheritance test or in the underground altar of Town Massimo, the terror of the Abyss Family was still vivid in Chen Rui’s memory. What he experienced should be just a fraction of the Abyss Family. Judging from the Demi-God powerhouse, Satan’s tone of voice, the Abyss Family seemed to be sealed or isolated in a certain space. For countless years, they had tried their best to break free from the seal.

It was just that these things were still far away from his current level. It was useless even if he was worried, so he didn’t think about it anymore. He asked, “What’s the matter with the territory kingdom?”

“This City of Stars is a territory kingdom, and the spiritual imprint has been transmitted to master. At present, master’s strength is too weak to fully integrate the imprint and control the territory kingdom.”

Chen Rui thought of the spiritual imprint he obtained previously, and his heart surged with ecstasy. The territory kingdom should be the power possessed by the Demi-God-level powerhouse. I can’t imagine that I can obtain it so easily. As long as I have enough strength, I can master this higher level power above the Demon Overlord realm!

Crystal Phoenix then sounded again, “Master can use the alchemy secret method to absorb the power of the lamp spirits to continuously strengthen yourself, then thoroughly integrate the spiritual imprint of the territory kingdom step by step. When master’s power is restored, master will be able to regain control of the entire kingdom.”

This sentence dampened Chen Rui’s ecstasy. The alchemy secret method that absorbs the power of the lamp spirits? I don’t seem to know it.

After consulting Crystal Phoenix repeatedly, Chen Rui determined 3 matters.

First, Crystal Phoenix was not the intelligent being that he thought of. The answers or solutions given couldn’t leave the scope of the life crystals “database”. She couldn’t solve anything beyond this scope. More precisely, Crystal Phoenix was just a smart tool. The real “brain” was still Chen Rui.

Secondly, his current strength was insufficient and he could only control this palace through Crystal Phoenix. Once his strength met the requirements, he could feel the entire castle in this “central control room” just like controlling his own arm, and he could remotely control the corresponding buildings and equipment.

Thirdly, the function of Crystal Phoenix was management, defense, production and development of the entire castle. It was impossible for her to give more answers about the training aspects of the territory kingdom. These should be things in the inheritance memory, but because the Demi-God soul failed to possess Chen Rui’s body, he only got some residual memory fragments, and he did not really get the so-called “inheritance.” Many things such as formulas and secret techniques were unclear. It was like he took over the inheritance in the name of the unlucky Demi-God. Although he got the inheritance, there was no key to open the safe. Taking out the treasure inside to use was still a difficult problem.

The Gremlin Factory would be activated soon. The process of manufacturing gremlin was an eye-opener to Chen Rui. The core of the soul was first generated, which was then placed in a petri dish-like crystal groove to condense the body. This process was not very fast, but the condensed form could be seen faintly. It seemed to be a kind of wonderful energy conversion process. This conversion was not done with energy alone; it required special materials which was one of the basic reserves of the castle. It was retained as a basic “working unit” in the castle.

As a senior gamer, Chen Rui couldn’t help thinking of the basic units of a strategy game. The first batch of gremlin servants was 100 which would take about 2.5 hours to complete. Chen Rui did not wait and he came to the busy lamp spirits.

The lamp spirits were using the aura fruit to make energy essence as well as cleaning and tidying the castle. Chen Rui approached Genie and asked, “Genie, do you know how to absorb the energy of the lamp spirits to enhance my power?”

Genie was stunned, and she replied, “The lamp spirits can directly absorb the energy essence. Master can use the secret method, sexual activity, to extract life energy from the lamp spirits to strengthen your physique and power, but the lamp spirits will lower their ranks or even be annihilated forever.”

This is the so-called “secret technique”? The words “collect and replenish” appeared in Chen Rui’s mind, and he frowned.

Regardless of whether this method was good or bad, the “human” of alchemy civilization was still different from the training of ordinary humans or demons. They used the life energy of yin and yang. The lamp spirits were like a kind of cauldron that would be discarded after their “nutrients” were completely absorbed.

Compared with this method of harming others for self-interest, Chen Rui’s [Dual Training] technique was much more benevolent by benefiting both man and woman. It was just that [Dual Training] for Chen Rui was more within the scope of assistance and skill rather than the fundamental way to improve his power. The lamp spirits were special alchemy beings that were different from ordinary life entities. The key of evolution was the heart lamp. They were unable to absorb [Dual Training]’s strength enhancement.

The golden-eyed lamp spirits were a little dim, yet she still spoke up without hesitation, “The energy in my body has reached the highest point now. Does master want to start absorbing it immediately?”

Chen Rui deliberately asked, “Your life will be in danger.”

Genie shook her head, “The fate of the lamp spirits is to dedicate everything, including life, to master.”

Chen Rui now understood the true meaning of “dedicate everything” as she said earlier, and he had a new understanding of the loyalty to these alchemy beings. It was a bit similar to the puppets controlled by the God-Eating Mask, but not exactly the same, their independent consciousness was stronger. They would be anxious or afraid of sacrifice, but they couldn’t defy the master’s order.

“Loyalty” was the first irreversible law that Crystal Phoenix instilled in the soul of these alchemy beings when creating them.

“Dedication and loyalty will do.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Although I have the inheritance, I have my own way of training. I don’t need to rely on absorbing your vitality. I won’t do it now and I won’t do it in the future either.

Genie’s eyes suddenly flashed with brilliance as a bright smile appeared behind the veil, “Master, do you need Genie to serve you? Or you want to add Gensha and Genlan together? We will try our best to meet all the needs of master.”

Seeing the lamp spirits with a hot body and sexy clothes, another ridiculous scene in the illusion appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. He couldn’t help but feel a bit mouth dry. Fortunately, he experienced the test of [Refined Mind] and was extremely strong-willed. He immediately came to his senses and shook his head.

Chen Rui didn’t like sex without emotion which was just succumbing to instinctive indulgence. Besides, there was no shortage of beloved women by his side which was already too much to handle.

(If I really indulge with more than 2,000 lamp spirits… Sooner or later my essence will be exhausted. Even the dragon’s physique will be useless)

“Master, please feel free to order us when you need it.” Genie didn’t think much. She asked again, “Master, can I tell the other lamp spirits about this news?”

Chen Rui knew that what Genie was referring to was his promise that he “would not absorb the vitality of the lamp spirits in the future”. For the lamp spirits, this was indeed good news.

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Of course you can. Also inform them that after the first batch of gremlin servants are manufactured, 100 lamp spirits will be left to guard the castle, and the rest will leave with me to perform tasks in the outside world. Remember to give me the energy conversion machine, I can supply the top-level energy essence you all need at any time.”

“Yes.” Genie bowed respectfully. With a single tap, she floated toward the lamp spirits.

Soon, these beauties with alluring figures and exotic charm cast surprised gazes at him simultaneously. Their cheers burst out in unison which sounded throughout the whole underground castle.

TL: Luckily, the lamp spirits couldn’t go against their master, otherwise he would be sucked dry. This territory kingdom sounds much more convenient than the Super System to me🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 568: Lamp Spirits Guard Team
chapters.body:
Chapter 568: Lamp Spirits Guard Team

Soon after, the first batch of gremlin servants was finally produced.

Gremlins were thin and not tall which was similar to goblins. They had yellow skin, sharp nails, and wore simple clothes. Although they looked ugly, they were neat and tidy. Compared with the magic talents of the lamp spirits, gremlins’ talents were more peculiar. They could turn their claws into various tools for measurement, calculation, and repair, which were convenient for work.

Chen Rui was quite lucky. There was a gremlin supervisor among the 100 gremlin servants. The gremlin supervisor was a bit bigger, the skin was tawny, and the clothes looked different. There was an item similar to magnifying glasses in his hand, which had the ability to control the gremlin servants, allocate teams and time reasonably to greatly improve efficiency. It could also repair and manufacture higher grade items.

Gremlins were not suitable for fighting as they were timid, but they were excellent craftsmen. Even the senior goblin warriors were much inferior.

Now Chen Rui had become the ruler of the castle. All the alchemy beings of the City of Stars could sense the special imprint breath of the “master”. Even the newly produced gremlin servants were no exception. The supervisor led the 100 gremlin servants to kneel down and salute, “Master.”

Seeing these gremlin servants, Chen Rui envisioned a huge army, and he was very energetic, “From now on, your name is Ludo, and there will be 2,900 gremlin servants produced in the future. You will be the leader of this group of 3,000 gremlin servants.

“Yes, thank you master for naming.” Ludo bowed down respectfully. “Immediately start repairing the castle facilities and the damaged crystal beasts, assemble puppets and giant crystal beasts. If necessary, create more gremlin servants. I want to see the resurrection of the guardians and the guards as soon as possible.”

Ludo thought for a while, took out a piece of paper and quickly wrote on it. After a while, he handed it forward, “To repair the facilities and guards as soon as possible, the gremlin servants must be mass-produced. In addition to energy, these materials are also needed. Please take a look, master.”

Chen Rui ran through and found that there were hundreds of materials listed, and he never heard of most of them. The ambitions in his heart were suddenly extinguished by half.

“By the way, in addition, the body materials of gremlin servants also need to be supplemented, otherwise it will only be enough to produce 5,000 gremlins at most.” Ludo took out a list and gave it to Chen Rui, making him distressed again. The list consisted of different kinds of meat and plants which were unfamiliar to him.

Chen Rui finally saw a familiar name: low-grade energy fruit. He reminisced when he first met the lamp spirits, the lamp spirits were fighting against the medusas for the snake blood fruit. This kind of snake blood fruit was called low-grade energy fruit by the lamp spirits. He had a thought. The ancient alchemy civilization has disappeared for many years. Many items may have changed their names. He immediately took out a pile of alchemy materials from the storage warehouse, “Ludo, do you know these things?”

“T-crystal! Black rain stone! Green damask wood…” Ludo reported each of them. The names were really different from what Chen Rui knew. Chen Rui was finally relieved. It seems that my guess is right. This way, the restoration of the castle and other matters are quite promising.

Chen Rui took out all types of materials and the seed samples obtained at the plant trade fair last time. After Ludo’s identification, most of the materials on the list were matched. Ludo also found some substitutes with similar compound requirements. At least, they could complete the restoration of the castle and the manufacture of gremlin servants. This was also thanks to Chen Rui’s storage warehouse in the Super System. Otherwise, he would not be able to produce so many materials. However, the complete variety was 1 thing, and the quantity was another. Especially for some main materials, the quantity required by Ludo was quite large. There were not so many in the storage warehouse, so he must find a way to gather them as soon as possible.

The repair of the crystal beasts and assemble puppets was a bit more troublesome as there were a lot of materials missing. With Chen Rui’s mechanical attainments, coupled with the identification function of [Analytical Eyes], he carefully studied with Ludo and sorted out a set of plans. Most of them could be replaced with similar materials. Only 2 materials couldn’t be replaced. 1 was blue star heavy water for the assemble puppets, and the other was phantom coral for the giant crystal demonic beasts. Phantom coral was not only an essential material for the manufacturing and repairing of giant crystal demonic beasts, it was also 1 of the materials for the giant crystal beasts.

The giant crystal beast was the strongest guardian and war machine, but the manufacturing process was much more subtle and complicated than ordinary alchemy beings. 10 gremlin supervisors were required to complete the repair of a giant crystal beast. In addition to the phantom coral, it also required a lot of mystic crystals.

Mystic crystals were high-purity gold crystals made by the secret method. There were many gold crystals in the storage warehouse. With the Super System’s refining room, he could make mystic crystals of the highest purity. The giant crystal beasts were undoubtedly very expensive, but once they were resurrected, the combat power they offered was also quite huge.

The only pity was that there were only 10 giant crystal beasts that could be repaired, and the rest couldn’t be repaired. If he wanted to re-manufacture them, in addition to more gremlin supervisors, he also needed the most important core material – Dragon Power Essence.

Dragon Power Essence was the essence of the dragon soul that had not dissipated after death. It contained the dragon demeanor and part of the soul power of the dragons. Except for the mysterious Dragon Island, such a thing couldn’t be found elsewhere. It was also 1 of the 2 essential materials for Guradam to be promoted to Demon Overlord. Even so, with Chen Rui’s current strength, he couldn’t break into Dragon Island. That place was the nest of giant dragons where even Demi-God dared not invade!

It seems that the plan to make the giant crystal beast can only be postponed indefinitely. I need to solve the crystal beasts and assemble puppets issues first. If I can find the phantom corals, I can also repair the 10 giant beasts which is also a very powerful combat power.

After making up his mind, Chen Rui left the 100 lamp spirits to assist the gremlins in repairing the castle facilities. He left the mine with the remaining 2,000 lamp spirits.

Chen Rui found the medusa tribe stationed in the White Feather City, then he headed south toward the capital with the medusa tribe and lamp spirits. There was no obstacle to entering the capital because, during this period, the White Feather Estate soldiers who were stationed in the capital were frequently mobilized. Chen Rui had instructed Sicali earlier, and with the cooperation of the capital’s secret intelligence department controlled by Isabella, the lamp spirits and medusas, totaling close to 5,000 of them, entered the secret barrack of the capital as the White Feather Estate Army late at night.

Chen Rui left the medusas and the lamp spirits in the barrack. He only took Queen Medusa and Genie into the palace.

At this time, the guards in the palace were replaced by the original crew of the Dark Moon, but due to the limited number of people, the defense force was quite limited.

In the palace, Chen Rui saw Her Majesty Empress, Ms. Secret Intelligence and Ms. Scientist, whom he had not seen for many days. Perhaps these 3 women temporarily united and planned to have a 3-juries trial when they heard a man returning with nearly 5,000 females.

This was not to blame Chen Rui as medusas were only females and the lamp spirits were all beauties.

“This is the lamp spirit you are talking about?” When Shea glanced at Genie, her eyes flashed with shock, “There are 72 Demon Emperor-level lamp spirits like her?”

“Yes, in addition to the golden-eyed Demon Emperors, there are 830 silver-eyed Great Demon King and Demon King as well as 1,200 black-eyed Higher Demon. The power that the grand master inheritance can dispatch is all here.” Chen Rui looked at Lanliza, “Aside from this Demon Emperor-level Queen Lanliza, the medusa tribe has 105 Great Demon Kings, 450 Demon Kings, and 1400 Higher Demons. The rest are Intermediate Demon level.”

Isabella’s eyes lit up. The strength of this medusa tribe is far better than the one in Mountain Xilang. What’s more powerful is the lamp spirits brought out from the relic civilization who have such a terrifying combat power. This force will be an important chip for the next action.

“My idea is to station all the lamp spirits in the palace and organize a powerful imperial guard. The medusas will be stationed in the secret intelligence department and cooperate with Isabella’s plan. When the capital situation stabilizes, medusas will go to Mountain Xilang in the Dark Moon to merge both tribes into 1.”

Shea and Isabella looked at each other and nodded. With the lamp spirits as the imperial guard, there would be a strong guarantee whether it was security or confidentiality. The medusas’ power could greatly be enhanced in Isabella’s hands.

Zola’s focus was not on the placement of the lamp spirits and medusas. A scorching light shone behind the spectacles as she looked at Genie, “Ancient alchemy beings? Also has the talent for instant buff magic? Quick! Try and cast magic on me now?”

As Genie glanced at Chen Rui hesitantly, Chen Rui nodded. When Genie waved her hand at Zola, a pale green light appeared and disappeared from Zola’s body. Zola squinted her eyes with enjoyment, “[Acceleration]. Judging from the elements’ cohesion, it seems like an imprint that is difficult to be canceled by ordinary magic. The effect is not bad.”

Zola could be regarded as the top magician of the Demon Realm. It was quite rare to be able to get a “not bad effect” evaluation from her.

Seeing Ms. Fairy Dragon looking interested, Chen Rui forced a cough and said, “Zola, it’s not the time now, let’s study it next time. Genie, this is one of your masters, Zola. You will follow her orders unconditionally in the future.”

Genie saluted Zola respectfully, “Master Zola.”

Zola nodded with satisfaction, “The way you cast magic has something in common with the ancient runes. Perhaps I can further improve your talent.”

“Thank you, Master Zola.”

Chen Rui keenly noticed something strange in Her Majesty Empress’ eyes, and he immediately said, “This is Her Majesty Shea who is also one of the masters of the lamp spirits. You must also obey her orders, and you will be responsible for her safety in the future.”

“Master Shea.” Genie saluted Shea again.

“It’s better to call me Your Majesty.” Shea nodded in satisfaction, but she turned her gaze on Isabella. Coincidentally, Zola also glanced at Isabella, then the strange gaze of Her Majesty Empress and Ms. Scientist were fixed on Chen Rui. He felt a flutter in his heart when he saw this.

Shea said faintly, “Aren’t introducing this… en ?”

Chen Rui’s forehead was a little sweaty while Isabella smiled, “I’m not qualified to be master. Ms. Genie, your appearance is very charming. Are the 2,000 lamp spirits as beautiful as you? They will all obey the master’s command?”

“Yes.” Genie nodded, “We can dedicate everything to master at any time.”

Hearing that there were still 2,000 beautiful women who could dedicate everything, 4 weird gazes plus a gloating gaze of a woman immediately shifted to Chen Rui’s body.

She is worthy of being the head of the secret intelligence department, she drew the disaster away with just 1 sentence. Under the scrutiny of 6 eyes, the male master who seemed like sitting on pins fled the palace with the excuse of setting up the secret barrack.

TL: Are they planning a coup to get rid of those elder families that oppose them?

chapters.title: Chapter 569: Zola’S Decision
chapters.body:
Chapter 569: Zola’S Decision

The lamp spirits quickly settled in the palace. With the help of Kaguli, they quickly became familiar with the environment of the palace and the duties of guards. On the surface, Kaguli was still an imperial guard commander. Even some ill-intentioned people only knew that a batch of new guards was added and the original manpower under Obsidian was all transferred. They had no idea of the true power of these guards.

Chen Rui found Teacher Tetenis in the house arranged by the secret intelligence department. Chen Rui learned from Tetenis that the phantom coral and blue star water were very rare materials which were still on the market 2,000 years ago, but they were hardly seen now. These 2 materials could only be found in the Dead Sea. The boundless and mysterious Dead Sea was located in the extreme south of the Fallen Angel Empire. Only a handful of people could come back alive from there. It was a very ominous land of the Demon Realm.

Chen Rui thought of the Earth Elemental King Moore in the underground world of Mountain Xilang. After Moore absorbed the power of Fertile Yuan Soil, he would go to the Dead Sea. It seems like it is necessary to travel with him by then.

This time, Chen Rui brought back something from the City of Stars which aroused great interest of Tetenis. The magic lamp made from the extinct light-gathering insect made the old man fall in love with it. Chen Rui also gave Tetenis 2 assemble puppets, 1 was complete while the other was damaged. He wanted to see if ordinary demons could control this powerful war machine.

Due to Shea’s “compromise”, the capital seemed calm on the surface, and the original Leisure Moon Inn in the southern suburbs was renovated without any hindrance. The initial Princess Retail Store’s branch also suffered a bleak business under the constraints of various merchants. Judging from this sign, Shea had already lost by 1 move.

Of course, for Shea, who was the ruler, the Princess Retail Store was just a trivial matter. During this time, she worked hard to solve many problems left by Obsidian. She also forked out a lot of money from the Dark Moon’s accounts to make considerable achievements in supporting the family and settling the residents. The destroyed places such as the Central Plaza, the arena, and the main streets were all repaired, and many special facilities were added. They seemed to have a brand-new outlook which left a pretty good impression on the people.

Shea did a very good job of winning people’s hearts. Since most of what she was fighting for was for the small families or residents, she did not take Angelie and the others to her heart. Moreover, the related industries of the elder families had also received a lot of care, so the progress was quite smooth.

Chen Rui was not in the capital these days. Instead, he stayed with Zola in the Rainbow Valley. As Shea now had the protection of the Lamp Spirit Guard Team and the imperial guard, Zola could free up her hands for her research work.

However, Ms. Fairy Dragon was not studying the lamp spirits this time. Instead, it was… Sir Deputy Valley Master.

Chen Rui did not hide anything from Zola during his trip to the civilization relics. He said everything including the territory kingdom’s spiritual imprint which he obtained. Zola’s eyes lit up when she heard this. She didn’t even care about the lamp spirits that she initially wanted to study. She directly took Chen Rui to the laboratory.

Then Chen Rui became the experiment subject again gloriously. Looking at the instruments and items, he couldn’t help but feel like he had returned to the time when he first met Ms. Fairy Dragon. Things were impermanent. The former “terrifying and cruel” mad scientist was now a gentle and lovable companion. She was also very careful to pay attention to his safety in those experiments.

Despite many precautions, Zola’s experiment was still not that safe. There were several dangerous situations. Fortunately, Chen Rui was not who he used to be. Whether it was in terms of experiment or magic circles, he could be called an expert. He quickly averted the disasters. However, Chen Rui was a little speechless by an experiment method used by Ms. Fairy Dragon at the end. It was the ancient runes with Demi-God’s territory power that contributed to the marriage of both of them back then.

Zola had a good grasp of these runes now and could control them freely. The dangerous front part was separated out, leaving the back part. The meaning of this part of ancient runes was… aphrodisiac, eros, mating…

In the spirit of dedicating to science, Chen Rui accepted the experiment with enthusiasm and excitement. To be honest, it really took perseverance to hold onto it when facing a group of beautiful lamp spirits who were ready to dedicate themselves all day long. He had suppressed his desires for a long time; he long wanted to have a vigorous sex. He initially wanted to resist from disturbing Zola since she wanted to concentrate on the experiment. Unexpectedly, Ms. Fairy Dragon actually used this experiment method. Why would the Deputy Valley Master not devote himself to the Madam Valley Master?

Under the urging of that rune, the 2 quickly rolled together, then there was the exciting banging scene. Chen Rui was naturally energetic. Ms. Zola, who was a dragon, was not weak either. Just now, she was exhausted and panting for mercy just now. After a while, she was vigorously taking the lead…

However, at the moment of extreme entanglement and enthusiasm, Zola suddenly felt like something terrifying. She trembled suddenly and forcibly suppressed the enthusiasm stimulated by runes, and fought hard to break free from Chen Rui. When she reached one side, she pointed her hand at the beam of light that released the power of runes, and the light gradually faded.

Chen Rui was taken aback. He thought that there was a major problem with her body, and the lustful desire quickly dissipated. He quickly sat up and held her shoulders, “Zola?”

“Don’t touch me!” Zola shuddered again and called out abnormally.

Since Chen Rui had the most intimate relationship with Zola, they had always been in love with each other. This intelligent woman who liked to fake daze had an extremely important position in his heart.

Objectively speaking, regardless of his power or appearance, he was actually not worthy of Zola. However, this arrogant dragon beauty just fell so hard for him and didn’t even mind that he had other women. Chen Rui was afraid of Zola at first, but now he was afraid of losing her. Now that he saw Zola’s abnormal demeanor, he was even more worried. His hands stopped.

Zola’s body was wrapped in a layer of cold current, and the redness on her body was quickly cooled down by this cold current. The current changed again and turned into a skirt that wrapped her attractive body.

“We… shouldn’t do this anymore.” Zola’s words made Chen Rui feel dejected.

“Why? What happened?”

“I have a problem with my body. Anyway… I have already decided.” Zola stood up and put on her glasses, “Before I surpass Demon Overlord or you completely master the power of this territory kingdom, let’s separate for a while.”

Chen Rui was stunned by these words. Both of them had been very close. Especially Zola had a certain nature of dragons. She not only had no resistance to sex. On the contrary, she was quite enthusiastic, second only to the little charming girl, Kia, but she suddenly made such a decision.

He got up and came to Zola as he looked into her eyes. A faint light shone on Zola’s glasses, blocking his gaze. Chen Rui knew Zola very well. This little means of trying to cover up was just a habitual expression of her guilty conscience. He understood and shook his head, “Did you just absorb the power of spiritual imprint just now?”

The light on Zola’s glasses flashed. She lowered her head, “En.”

Chen Rui was even more certain of his guess, “Tell me the truth, if we still have… sex in the future, what will happen?”

Zola bit her lip and answered, “The spiritual imprint you obtained contains the essence of the territory kingdom. My current power level has reached the final bottleneck of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. My territory is only one step away from the kingdom. I just wanted to use the power of runes to feel the mystery of this territory kingdom to facilitate my realization of the breakthrough. However, I accidentally devoured a little of the power essence, and the power in my body has also changed. This essence is extremely irresistible to me now. Even though without the urging of runes, as long as we… do that, I will involuntarily devour and absorb the power of that essence, then you will gradually lose the power of the imprint territory kingdom.”

While saying this, Zola lowered her head, “Unless you or I can break through to the level beyond Demon Overlord, otherwise… Although I’m only 1 step behind, this step is quite difficult. It was enough to make countless peaks stage Demon Overlords from ancient times to the present to have regrets for life. I have already benefited a lot after receiving the soul power from you, plus a bit of the essence of the territory kingdom that I absorbed today, I probably will be able to break through within 1,000 years. You’re the master of the territory kingdom. With the magic inheritance power, as long as you reach the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, the subsequent steps should be much faster than me. Before that, let’s not meet again. Let’s concentrate on training and strive to reach that realm as soon as possible. “

The thought of separating from the man she loved for hundreds or thousands of years made Zola feel sad, but she had to make this decision.

“I see.” Chen Rui sighed, “Since this is the case, then let’s… continue.”

“What?” This time it wasn’t Zola’s habitual fake daze, but she really thought she had heard it wrong.

“Don’t use magic! Listen to me first!” Chen Rui’s yelling managed to stun Ms. Fairy Dragon. He took 2 steps forward and held her tightly in his arms, “Can you directly break through the bottleneck if you absorb this territory kingdom’s essence power ?”

Zola understood what Chen Rui meant and refused resolutely, “No way!”

Chen Rui grinned, “To tell you the truth, people in the ancient alchemy civilization are not the same as me in physique and training methods. The power of this territory kingdom is actually not suitable for me. As long as the spiritual imprint is still there, it’s fine. As for the essence, I can give it all to you to help you break through the bottleneck.”

Zola didn’t believe him; she kept shaking her head. Chen Rui took off her glasses and cupped her face, “Look into my eyes! I have my own way of training. It won’t be long before I can break through Demon Overlord and catch up with you step by step. “

Chen Rui was telling the truth. What he really relied on was not the ancient alchemy civilization, but the Super System. That was his way. It would be a great choice if this territory kingdom could help Zola to break through to Demi-God as soon as possible. As for the City of Stars, it was still under his control as long as he did not die. The spiritual imprint would not disappear.

“If you really consider me to be your man, accept the power of this territory kingdom! If you let me go now, then I will never see you again!”

The last ultimatum that Chen Rui said shocked Zola. Her eyes were a little red, and she finally stopped shaking her head. She wanted to say something but she stopped because she knew that the 2 words “thank you” were really unnecessary based on their relationship.

“Tell you something, the way for those guys in the ancient alchemy civilization to increase their strength…” Chen Rui muttered a few words in Zola’s ear, “You don’t want me to do this, right? I have more than 2,000 lamp spirits by my side now.”

Zola nodded subconsciously as her face suddenly flushed red. The rune beams with “special” meanings around them began to flash again.

TL: Wouldn’t that mean the City of Stars can no longer be upgraded?

chapters.title: Chapter 570: The Dark Shadow Empire’S New Envoys
chapters.body:
Chapter 570: The Dark Shadow Empire’S New Envoys

On this day, the Fallen Angel Capital welcomed the most important guests.

The Dark Shadow Empire, which gathered a large number of troops on the border of the Fallen Angel Empire, finally sent new envoys after Shea speedily ascended the throne. They entered the Fallen Angel Empire via Tekula Fortress and arrived at the capital.

This time the envoys were “acquaintances.” The leader was Third General Crawford of the Dark Shadow Empire, and the deputy envoy was Celine, the new matriarch of the Custer Family, the top commercial family of the Dark Shadow Empire.

Crawford was an old friend of Shea. Shea had a bilateral visit when she was in the Dark Moon and had close cooperation with him. Celine’s Custer Family was the earliest commercial family to settle in the Dark Moon Estate. They even established a joint chamber of commerce with several families with the Dark Moon. Both sides had inextricably close relations. Both of them being the envoys should be a positive signal that implied a change in Catherine’s attitude.

Shea immediately led a group of officials to formally greet Crawford in the palace hall. At this time, the candidates for the prime ministers were not agreed while the financial minister and minister of military affairs were still held by the candidates recruited by the elder families.

“Greetings to Your Majesty Shea.” Crawford entered the hall with Celine behind him, and they bowed and saluted Shea.

Shea was no longer the lord back then, and an empress representing an empire. In this situation where the 2 empires were bordering each other, she did not treat the 2 acquaintances with joy. Instead, she said faintly, “Both envoys came from afar. You must have a tough journey.”

Crawford stood up straight and said without arrogance, “This time, I’m here on the order of Her Majesty Catherine to congratulate Your Majesty on becoming the Fallen Angel Empire’s ruler, and the other is to re-discuss the cooperation between both empires.”

“Thanks to the congratulations from Empress Catherine. The friendly relationship between the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire has a long history, but Her Majesty Catherine gathered heavy soldiers at the 2 borders of my empire. This does not seem to be a gesture of friendship?”

Crawford explained, “The reason for the gathering of troops was the unstable situation of your empire after Your Majesty Shea defeated Prince Obsidian in Town Leith Wilderness. In order to prevent internal strife, Her Majesty Catherine prepared to send troops to help Your Majesty Shea stabilize the political situation.”

This explanation was naturally just an excuse which was also used by Liliz in the Dark Moon.

“Before Her Majesty Catherine lent a ‘helping hand’, I had successfully ascended the throne, so I can only acknowledge her good intentions. I don’t know how long your empire’s way of showing ‘friendliness’ is going to continue?”

Crawford knew that the so-called “friendliness” meant the army on the border. He smiled slightly, “This is related to my second purpose here. Her Majesty Catherine hopes to establish friendly neighbor relations with Her Majesty Shea again after Regent Obsidian to renegotiate and sign a cooperation treaty between both empires to jointly move toward prosperity.

Without such an army, this was still a normal diplomatic relations establishment, but if there were army hoarding on the border, these words inevitably contained a hint of threat. The implication was that Obsidian and Shea were different. The Dark Shadow Empire could continue to live in peace with the Fallen Angel Empire, but they must sign a cooperation treaty that satisfies Catherine. Otherwise, the army was definitely not for display.

“I’m very optimistic about the prospects of friendly cooperation between both empires. My empire will support, go hand in hand, and create brilliance together with friends; if it is an enemy with unpredictable motives, even if the enemy is holding a sharp blade, the Fallen Angel Empire will not hesitate to directly and fearlessly face the difficulties. We would rather be crushed with the enemy than to abandon faith and dignity.” At the last sentence, Shea slowly stood up from the throne and looked at Crawford quietly.

There were only 2 steps to the throne. Even if Shea stood up, she was only of equivalent height to the tall Crawford. However, at this moment, Crawford was in a trance like he was really looking up at Shea. This woman who used to keep pace with him had risen to the level of an empress whom he most revered.

Not only Crawford, many ministers and elders in the hall, including Angley, had a strange feeling. Shea’s unrelenting strength and courage were exactly what Obsidian did not have before.

Crawford quickly recovered to his senses and took out a lacquered envelope, “I have seen Your Majesty Shea’s determination. Here is a letter written by Her Majesty Empress, please have a look at it, Your Majesty.”

Stiller, who was next to Shea took a few steps forward, took the envelope and handed it to Shea. In the process, Stiller had used 4 methods to test and found no danger. As Shea noticed Stiller’s gaze, she took the letter and opened it. After looking at it for a while, her eyes suddenly became a bit fierce. With a puff , a black flame ignited in her hand. The letter was instantly burned to ashes.

Doing this in front of Crawford was obviously very unfriendly. Judging from Shea’s expression, the content of the letter should be quite excessive. In any case, Shea was the empress of the Fallen Angel Empire after all. Her humiliation was the humiliation of the entire empire. Whether it was genuine anger or pretentious gestures, almost everyone had shown hostility toward Crawford and Celine. It was as if both envoys of the Dark Shadow Empire would be annihilated once an order was received.

The intangible pressure made Celine reveal a trace of fear while Crawford remained unchanged, “Your Majesty, I didn’t know the specific content of this letter beforehand, but I came to negotiate with your empire with the sincerity of the Dark Shadow Empire. When I came, Her Majesty Catherine had specially ordered that after Her Majesty Shea read the letter, I have 2 choices. First, immediately return to the Dark Shadow Empire; second, stay and continue to discuss cooperation matters. Your Majesty Shea please give me a choice now.”

This choice was actually given to Shea by Catherine, but Crawford’s language was very euphemistic, and it became Shea’s choice for him as an envoy. If Crawford was allowed to go back immediately, it would definitely mean that the discussion was unsuccessful. Then, it was very likely that the Fallen Angel Empire would really prepare for a tough war which was obviously not the intention of the Fallen Angel Empire.

“Her Majesty Catherine’s appetite is not small…” The purple light in Shea’s eyes changed as she took a deep breath. She sat down slowly and said calmly, “However, since the envoys are here to negotiate, there are a lot of uncertain matters before the result is determined. We can sit down and talk. It’s too late now, General Crawford and Ms. Celine must be tired after traveling around. Please stay in the Royal Hotel to rest first. I will host a banquet in the evening to entertain my Dark Shadow Empire’s friends.”

When the ministers and elders on both sides heard the first sentence, they had faintly guessed that Catherine must have made a request that touched Shea’s bottom line such as ceding the Dark Moon Estate. However, Shea quickly recovered her calmness and even planned to sit and negotiate with the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoys.

“Thank you for Your Majesty’s hospitality, then we shall not reject it.” Crawford bowed with Celine, and left the palace hall to go to the county hotel accompanied by the minister of foreign affairs. After the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoys left, Shea spoke up, “Everyone, although Catherine’s intention is not to fight us till death, the power of the Dark Shadow Empire is above us after all. Once a war is really triggered in a certain situation, then comparing the strengths of both empires, the result is likely to be death on our side and injuries on her side. On one hand, we must prepare for the war and prepare for the worst. On the other hand, we must be careful to deal with the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoys. Stiller and Disjaro will be in charge of the negotiation matters. Stebil, Angley, Redotan, and Merlotta will assist you. Delay the negotiation deadline. You can try to get in touch with those 2 envoys to get an idea of the bottom line. Catherine the Great has a big appetite. If we really sit down and negotiate peacefully, we who are weaker will definitely suffer a loss. How big this loss is and whether we can lean on the path of mutual benefit as much as possible depends on our efforts during this period of time.”

Angley and others had suppressed Shea previously, but the negotiation was the most important issue at the moment, and it was related to the fate of the entire empire. Therefore, they acted according to her orders.

After the meeting, Shea came to the side hall. Chen Rui and Isabella were waiting for her there. Chen Rui’s current identity was only deputy commander of the palace imperial guards, and Isabella’s identity was not suitable for public appearance, so they did not attend the meeting just now. However, they could see things very clearly behind the hall, especially the scene where Shea burned Catherine’s letter.

“What exactly is written in Catherine’s letter?” Chen Rui was now very curious about this incident. Generally speaking, Shea would not make such a move with her calmness.

Shea glanced at him, “Even you can’t guess it?”

“Don’t overestimate me. If the opponent is Catherine, even 10 of me may not be able to see through her.” Chen Rui’s mind was slightly rippling as he suddenly remembered those black eyes that were as deep as the lake water. He hadn’t seen the master of these eyes for a long time.

“You don’t have to look down at yourself, but Catherine is indeed a terrifying opponent.” Shea sighed, “But I burned that letter deliberately. It’s surprising, Catherine gave me an amazing plan in the letter. This plan…”

“Could it be… exactly the same as what we planned?” Isabella continued.

“It’s more powerful than what we planned,” Shea nodded slightly and sighed softly, “She has insight into everything, including the desperate attitude I want to make. I’m now subject to the suppression of the elder families. Her plan is to use the Blood and Iron Policy at an unpredictable time in order to take the opportunity to remove the obstacles. As a condition, she could use the army to build momentum on the border and help me to hold down or even eliminate Baroco and others. This will quell the opposition in the empire and let me completely control the power of the empire! The implication behind this plan is that she can use this in turn against me. If I do not agree, Catherine will also deliberately divulge the ‘cooperation’ plan and take the corresponding actions to show that she and I will work together to eradicate the elder families and other obstructive forces. On the verge of life and death, the elder families will surely rise up and resist. As a result, the capital and even the empire will end up in internal strife. Then she will take advantage of the situation to send troops, then it’s hard to drag the Dark Shadow Empire to perish together even if I want to…”

Isabella and Chen Rui looked at each other and saw the surprise in each other’s eyes. They finally understood why Shea feigned to burn the letter.

Chen Rui asked, “What are the conditions for Catherine?”

Shea took a deep look at him, “It’s even more demanding than last time. It’s simply unacceptable. She particularly emphasized that she wants the talent “Chen Rui”. It seems that you are more popular than I thought. Even the first beauty of the Demon Realm can’t forget you.

“I have no choice as my reputation is out there. “The Demon Realm’s First Minister”, right?” Chen Rui scratched his head guiltily with a vague bad omen.

Isabella noticed Chen Rui’s expression, and she suddenly chuckled, “Actually, there is a way.”

As soon as she said this, the eyes of Shea and Chen Rui were fixed on her at the same time, and Ms. Secret Intelligence smiled. Even though she was behind the veil, her moving style could still be felt.

TL: 😏is it sending the “The Demon Realm’s First Minister” to negotiate with Catherine herself?

chapters.title: Chapter 571: A Complete Treasure Map
chapters.body:
Chapter 571: A Complete Treasure Map

In the evening of the next day, Chen Rui came to the Royal Hotel in a mask and cloak. In the past 2 days, Crawford and Celine were very busy. In addition to the palace banquet, there were many invitations for entertainment which were simply overwhelming.

These invitations from large families or nobles mainly implemented Shea’s strategy to tentatively probe their intention. The visit of “Aguile” at this time was naturally reasonable.

Chen Rui bowed slightly to Crawford and Celine, “General and Miss Celine are old friends of Her Majesty Shea and the Dark Moon. Since both of you are visiting as envoys, there are many inconveniences, so I came by Her Majesty Shea’s personal entrustment this time to extend my most sincere greetings to sir and madam.”

The 2 hurriedly returned the courtesy and Crawford spoke up, “I understand that the visit this time is not an ordinary friendly visit. From a friend’s point of view, I don’t want to come, but I cannot disobey Catherine the Great’s order. If there is any offense by then, plead sir to apologize to Her Majesty Shea on my behalf.”

Crawford was an experienced person. The meaning of these remarks was very obvious. This time I come as an envoy with official responsibility. I will definitely fight for every interest when negotiating and I will not compromise because of our friendly relationship, so I plead guilty first.

“What are you talking about?” Chen Rui said with a smile in his tone, “We are working for our own masters now. If general compromise official matters for private reasons, it is not the General Crawford whom we know, nor the father that General Monroe respects.”

These words were sarcastic. Crawford once received the devil fruit gifted by Shea, and with the help of the Dark Moon, he helped solve the big problem of the underground mineral veins in the Crystal Valley. Shea also accepted Crawford’s son Monroe, who was wanted by the entire empire. Crawford’s rewards including the goblin warriors and magician legion now seemed to be Catherine’s instruction rather than a real reward.

Crawford’s behavior was understandable from the perspective of the empire. He almost even abandoned his son for the empire. He could be regarded as loyal, but he was not authentic from the perspective of a friend.

Chen Rui’s words made Crawford’s face blush. He said, “Speaking of which, it’s such a shame for me. Sir Aguile helped solve the problem of the underground mineral veins in the Crystal Valley. Monroe was also rescued by Sir Aguile and he even holds an important position in the Dark Moon now. I never had the opportunity to repay sir. I keep this kindness in my heart. If sir has any needs in the future, you can come to the Dark Shadow Empire to find me, I will do my best and not refuse.”

Chen Rui knew that Crawford could not compromise in the negotiation because of personal relationships. He did not want to make Crawford too embarrassed, so he nodded, “Okay, if there are difficulties, I will definitely trouble general. I already set up a banquet in the capital’s Cloak Hot Pot Restaurant. If general and Ms. Celine don’t mind, how about going for a drink together?”

Crawford previously agreed to Stiller’s invitation. Stiller was the main person in charge of this negotiation. Crawford also wanted to explore the ability of his opponent, but unexpectedly Chen Rui came out halfway. For a moment, he was in a difficult position.

Crawford thought to himself. I just mentioned his kindness. It will be too unrighteous to refuse him now. Just as he was about to resolutely agree, Celine, who had been silent on the side, said, “General Crawford has already agreed to Madam Stiller’s invitation and he is about to go to the Boll Family. It’s inconvenient to miss the appointment. How about this? I haven’t tasted the authentic hot pot of the Dark Moon for a long time. I wonder if I have the honor to have a few drinks with Sir Aguile alone?”

As soon as she said this, it was not good for “Aguile” to reject her, so he immediately agreed. So, the 3 went out of the hotel together. Crawford took a group of people to the Boll Family to attend the banquet, while Chen Rui got into a carriage with Celine and headed toward the hot pot branch opened by the Cloak Gang in the capital in the northern suburbs.

After Crawford separated from the 2 of them, he still secretly praised Celine for her adaptability. He had no idea that Chen Rui knew that he was going to the Boll Family for a banquet long ago. He was just finding an excuse to meet Celine alone.

The hot pot restaurant was located in the northern suburbs of the capital. The scale was not small, and the business was quite good. Chen Rui and Celine came to the VIP room. The waiters all withdrew after serving the wine and dishes. Chen Rui activated the soundproof magic circle that he prepared in advance. He nodded and said, “Now you can talk.”

Celine knew the disguise of Chen Rui long ago. It was precisely when she saw his eye gesture that she offered to come to the banquet on behalf of Crawford. Now that both of them were alone, she immediately lifted her veils and bowed deeply, “Greetings, master.”

Celine was only 18 years old. She looked sweet and lovely. Especially the pair of big breasts that didn’t fit her age; the typical childish look with big breasts. She was exuding a youthful temptation. However, the seemingly innocent and lively girl fought her 2 older brothers who were fighting for the position of the patriarch and took the position of the top commercial family in the Dark Shadow Empire. Everyone in the Custer Family was obedient to her under her means.

Celine was really capable. She managed the Custer Family properly and made the family business more prosperous. She was also appreciated and valued by Empress Catherine. In fact, she still had another most important identity that was Chen Rui’s servant. Chen Rui single-handedly contributed to Celine’s current status and power. The master-servant contract also deterred her from having ill intentions.

Celine was extremely smart. She knew that this master was the fiancé of the Fallen Angel Empire’s new empress, Shea. He was likely to control the entire empire in the future. His personal strength was equally unpredictable, so her expression was very humble.

“Sit down, don’t be overly polite.”

Celine respectfully poured a glass of wine for Chen Rui, then she sat down with him, “Master, please give me the order.”

This attitude was different from the last time when they met in Town Leia. Chen Rui nodded secretly, “This time you become an envoy with Crawford, did Catherine the Great give a time limit for negotiation? Did she especially mention the bottom line of the negotiation?”

“I’m just a deputy envoy who is responsible for assisting General Crawford. Even if she did mention it, only Crawford knows about it. As for the time limit. There must be a result within 7 days after we arrived at the Fallen Angel Capital. If Shea keeps delaying, we will show this deadline on the last day and catch the Fallen Angel Empire by surprise.”

Celine did not say what would happen if “no results were negotiated within 7 days”, but Chen Rui had already guessed that the Dark Shadow Empire would not give Shea too much time. They will definitely provoke the internal strife of the Fallen Angel Empire. When the empire is in chaos, Shea will also lose her chips to fight against Catherine without even having a war. She will be fully restrained by Catherine.

“7 days…” Chen Rui pondered for a moment, then he suddenly asked, “Have Catherine the Great asked you about ‘Master Arthur’?”

“She did ask. I did what master ordered. I said that I used the power of Master Arthur and the Dark Moon to ascend the Custer Family. I initially wanted to use the seduction and family financial resources to secure Master Arthur, but I didn’t expect the master to suddenly disappear.

Before the Custer Family entered the Dark Moon, I also specifically reported and got permission from Her Majesty Catherine.”

Chen Rui nodded thoughtfully. He took out a special communication talisman and put it on the table, “You have done a good job. Your identity is the Dark Shadow Empire envoy during this period. Don’t expose your flaws. If there is an emergency, you can use this communication talisman to contact me.”

“Got it, master.” Celine took the communication talisman and kept it as she said, “Master, you told me to look for something last time. In an accidental situation, I found this. I don’t know if it meets the requirements of master. Please have a look.”

As Celine spoke, she took out something. Chen Rui’s gaze narrowed. It turned out that Celine took out an ancient and torn leather scroll which was familiar to him because he already had 4 similar ones in his hand: Treasure Map Scroll!

This is indeed a surprise!

Chen Rui quickly took out the half-finished scroll in his hand. When the leather scroll brought by Celine approached the scroll, the scroll glowed faintly. They blended together perfectly and became a complete map.

After the map was restored intact, the original appearance suddenly changed. It moved like an animation, revealing an ocean. There was only 1 place in Demon Realm that had this geographical feature, the Dead Sea. When Chen Rui got the second fragment, the goblin profiteer once said that the treasure map recorded the location of the secret treasure in the Dead Sea. This secret treasure was the legacy of the Dark Dragon Emperor who ruled the Demon Realm hundreds of thousands of years ago. There were countless treasures in it. Now it seemed that it was not a lie.

It was just that this treasure map looked like a vast ocean. Chen Rui looked at it for a long time, but he didn’t find any special marks or prompts. He was a little bit puzzled. I got the treasure map together after much difficulty just to confirm that the location is somewhere in the Dead Sea? The Dead Sea is so vast, how can I find it? Or it will only be effective when I bring the map to the Dead Sea?

Chen Rui’s mechanic master’s eyes could identify that the treasure map was made of a special material which was definitely not as simple as it seemed. This material was very sensitive. If he used brute force to crack it, it was likely to cause the entire treasure map to be turned into ashes. It seemed that it would take a lot of research to unlock the mystery.

This time Chen Rui was planning to go to the Dead Sea. As long as he unlocked the secrets of the treasure map, there might be unexpected windfalls by then.

“You did a great job!” Chen Rui put away the treasure map while complimenting Celine, “Tell me, what reward do you want?”

Celine lowered her head and said, “I should do things for my master. I dare not ask for rewards.”
