I also promised Madam Zola to be responsible for the safety of the little princess. I didn’t expect to encounter such a thing. Speaking of it, I also have a great responsibility.”

(Long time? I met you at the plants trade fair last time… I am not good friends with this cunning big-breasted woman! Moreover, this girl actually wants to grab the master from the lady master? Ah, wrong, it should be grabbing Brother Chen Rui from me, the little princess!)

Alice muttered in her mind, but she nodded obediently on the surface.

After Celine pleaded for Alice, she sensibly left with the guard. The audience on the side understood the actual situation. Speaking of it, neither the little princess nor Celine is at fault, but the one who planned the scheme was to be blamed!

For a moment, most of the gaze turned to Angley and his son.

“It’s him!” Alice pointed at Zall and exclaimed angrily, “Sister, this man said a lot of disgusting things like doing things to me on the bed. I said I am a princess, but he still dares…”

(Actually, even if there is no smoke, I will automatically “faint” after saying these 4 words.)

Alice’s words made Shea’s face gloomy. The almost tangible murderous intent in her cold eyes shot at Zall. Zall already freaked out when Alice jumped out. How could he withstand the pressure of the Demon Overlord? He had already knelt on the ground and trembled.

If Lawson’s unruly desire for Celine previously was like kicking the iron board, then his kidnapping the little princess with the intention to infringe was simply to hit the iron wall with his head! No matter what kind of terrifying plan Her Majesty Empress had behind this incident, there was only a dead end in front of him now.

“Your Majesty!” Angley finally said, “All this is a misunderstanding. Zall didn’t know the true identity of the little princess. Otherwise, he would not dare to offend her at all. But by now, he has committed a serious crime and it’s irreversible. It’s my responsibility for not teaching him well, which caused him to be used, then acted unscrupulously. I just ask Your Majesty to leave a complete corpse considering the hard work of the Mishan Family over the years.”

Zall’s last glimmer of hope was lost. His body slumped down like a boneless body. It was obvious that Angley was going to sacrifice his biological son.

Angley put the blame entirely on Zall and Plinton. By attributing the crimes of kidnapping the little princess and envoy to Zall’s personal behavior (which was also true), he only had 2 intentions. The first was to sacrifice the pawn to save the general. The second was to drag the Boll Family into the water. Since it was dealing with the 2 major elder families at the same time, Shea would definitely consider it more carefully, especially in this sensitive period.

Shea’s anger gradually subsided. She looked at Zall and Lawson with a thoughtful look, “This matter is not trivial and must not be tolerated, but in my opinion, this kidnapping event should not be specially directed to the royal princess and the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy…”

This sentence gave this incident a definition. Not only did Angley and Stiller feel slightly relieved, but even the officials knew it well: It seems that the empress is still quite deterred by the elder families. She did not take advantage to exaggerate the situation. Moreover, facing the huge pressure from the foreign enemy of the Dark Shadow Empire, it is really not suitable for internal strife. From the overall point of view, the choice of the empress is very appropriate.

While everyone was waiting for the results of Shea’s handling of the matter, a large group of imperial guards walked into the courtyard. Once they entered the courtyard, they had attracted everyone’s attention.

There are about 300 imperial guards who are all women. Judging from their neat pace, it is obvious that they have tacit understanding and are well-trained. They are wearing uniform cloaks, holding scimitars, and wearing veils to hide their faces. The cloak is a high-quality close-fitting leather armor. The most surprising thing is that the strength of these guards is far beyond imagination. There are around 40 to 50 Demon Emperors! The rest are Great Demon Kings!

Well-trained elite legion can use the mediums such as magic tattoos to connect power and will as a whole to suppress and fight the Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord powerhouses. So, what is the concept of 40 to 50 well-trained Demon Emperors plus more than 200 Great Demon Kings? If the timing is right, even Demon Overlord would be finished off in a single blow.

Now the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire are in a tense situation. These powerful female guards should not be the support from the Dark Shadow Empire nor the White Feather Estate or the Warlock Fortress, but Shea’s own power!

Perhaps, what is revealed now is only part of it…

When everyone was shocked, a Demon Emperor stepped forward to report, “Your Majesty, the imperial guards and secret intelligence department were ordered to go to the Mishan Family to search, but we were met with strong resistance. All those who resist have been killed! Although the whereabouts of the envoy has not been found, we found some other very important items. Please have a look, Your Majesty.”

When Angley heard the phrase “All those who resist have been killed”, it was like a bolt from the blue. The rest of the people, especially those in the elder families, also changed their faces. Whispers sounded all of a sudden.

Just now, Shea’s meaning faintly revealed her intention of not going against the entire family. On the other hand, the guards immediately caused a massacre in the Mishan Family!

Regardless of whether it was due to the time difference between commands and regardless whether it was due to the envoy, this kind of massacre of the elder families was a deplorable act. Angley was filled with righteous indignation as he suddenly became a victim from a sinner. When he was about to unite all the elder families to put pressure on Shea, he saw what the imperial guard presented to Shea.

Some documents and a black box.

Angley’s whole body suddenly felt as if he had been punched head-on. He could hardly believe his eyes. His grief and indignation instantly solidified on his face.

Shea opened the file and took a look. Her pupils shrunk suddenly, then her eyes became colder as she read on. She said sternly, “What a descendant of a man of great merit! What a guardian family of the empire! You took the interests of the empire as the Mishan Family’s!”

The corners of Angley’s eyes twitched as he lowered without looking directly at her. After the ministers on the side heard Shea’s words and Angley’s demeanor, they vaguely guessed the contents of some documents. Many people began to feel anxious. The Mishan Family is not the only one who does transactions under the table and embezzles public funds. As the operator of the big families, whose hands are clean?

For so many years. Almost every family has an account. The Mishan Family is only exposed today because of the envoy incident. Our only hope is that these things will not affect us too much.

“Your Majesty, this box is protected by a powerful magic circle. We couldn’t open it despite trying many ways.”

A fluke surged in Angley’s heart. When it comes to the seriousness of the consequences, the contents of the box are 100 times more severe than the documents outside. Fortunately, this box is enchanted with a special powerful magic circle which is unbreakable. Only I can open it. Once the external force exceeds a certain limit, it will automatically destroy, then there will be no proof.

At this moment, the black box floated up suddenly and slowly flew in front of the stunning beauty with glasses. Zola stretched out her jade-white palm, and her 5 fingers danced quickly in a mysterious rhythm.

The suspended box kept shining with a strange light, then the light disappeared with a “ click ” sound. The “unbreakable” black box opened unharmed, shattering Angely’s last hope.

“No!” Angley yelled desperately. Flames were ignited all over on his body, and he instantly appeared in front of the black box. He punched in an attempt to destroy the contents inside.

Before the fist touched the black box, it solidified. The flames emerging from Angley’s body also solidified like a frozen ice sculpture. After a muffled sound, the “frozen flame” on the outside turned into dust, and Angley fell straight down. Although he was not dead, he lost even the power to commit suicide.

Dealing with Angley of the early stage of the Demon Emperor power was just a breeze for Zola.

Zola didn’t even look at Angley. The opened black box automatically floated in front of Shea. The sharp-eyed people on the side had already seen that there were several things inside such as a truncheon, medal, magic scroll, and a few booklets.

Shea took out a few booklets and flipped through it. The gloominess on her cold and beautiful face became more and more intense. When she picked up the truncheon and the magic leather scroll, she couldn’t restrain her rage at all.

“What should I call you? Honorable Marquis of the Bloody Empire… Sir Angley. Mishan?” Shea’s furious and cold voice shocked the audience.

Marquis of the Bloody Empire!

Angley?

Many people immediately realized why Angley rushed to the black box desperately and why the imperial guards were desperately resisted by the Mishan Family when they got these items.

Many families of the Demon Realm adhere to the principle of “don’t put all the eggs in 1 basket”. The family bloodline would be moved to the other empires separately. If the 2 empires were fighting with each other, then the 2 bloodlines would completely abandon the past entanglements and become true enemies. Regardless of victory or defeat, there would always be 1 that could be continued. This was a kind of unwritten rule.

The behavior of pedaling 2 boats by Angely, who was the Fallen Angel Empire’s elder family and a “part-time” Marquis of the Bloody Empire, had destroyed this unwritten rule which had a nature of betraying the empire.

If the kidnapping the envoy previously could still be attributed to personal behavior, then the reveal of this shocking secret had completely pushed the entire Mishan Family into the abyss of annihilation.

This way, the nature of kidnapping the envoy was no longer the so-called instigation or misleading. Once something happened to the envoy, it was likely to become the trigger of the war between the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire, then the beneficiary was naturally the Bloody Empire. Angley, who was the “Honorable Marquis” of the Bloody Empire, did so with extremely sinister intentions. There were only 2 words to describe the entire Mishan Family: Unforgivable crime.

“Impossible… Why…” Angley almost collapsed as he was just mumbling to himself.

In fact, Angley was not the undercover agent spy of the Bloody Empire. It was just that when he was sent to the Bloody Empire, he obtained the title of Honorable Marquis with some networking, leaving a way for himself and the Mishan Family.

What made Angley unable to believe it was that this secret was not even known to his closest friends. Besides the Bloody Empire’s Raizen the Great and Prince Aleus, only a woman knew about it. This woman had an extraordinary strategy and was proficient in the trap technique. She was once the controller of the most secret organization of the capital. With her help, Angley successfully arranged the secret rooms to hide these largest secrets. If outsiders wanted to break into it, they would only be destroyed with the items.

In such a short period of time, how could the imperial guards and the secret intelligence department find the black box hidden in that secret room without any problem?

There is only 1 possibility. Either the Bloody Empire or that woman betrayed me. The Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen is in closed doors training. Great Prince Aleus and Second Prince Edmund are fighting inextricably at the north of the Iron Fist Estate. With these 2 people’s identities, it is impossible to divulge this secret when the Mishan Family still has a great usage value. The woman is most suspicious, but there is nothing to be suspicious about because she is dead.

She died in a well-known accident about a year ago, which was witnessed by Regent Obsidian. Afterward, Obsidian, who flew into a rage, even hunted an organization in the entire empire to retaliate.

What is going on? Angley felt the entire sky collapse. From the incident of the Princess Villa, Mishan Family seemed to have entered a trap, then they waited for him to actively dive into it step by step. At this point, the evidence was conclusive, it was useless no matter how he refuted.

“Angley, what else do you have to say?”

“ Haha! ” Angley suddenly laughed with a hint of insanity. “It is indeed Your Majesty Empress. You actually made this setup. I admit my defeat! But why didn’t Your Majesty publicize the yellow booklet as well? Which families and royal families have done what activities with the Mishan Family in the past few hundred years, and what benefits they obtained, are all recorded in it! The crimes of many people are no less than my crime of”betraying the empire” today!”

Angley became more frantic as he looked at the nearby elder families and royal families, “You, you, you… you all can’t escape! Annihilate together with the Mishan Family!”

Wherever his eyes looked, few actually dared to look directly at him.

Under various complicated gazes, Shea took out the yellow booklet that she had browsed through just now. When she moved her hand slightly, the yellow booklet turned into ashes in the black flame with a “ wheeze ” and disappeared without a trace.

“Your death is imminent, but you still want to frame others. This is simply unforgivable!” Shea’s blade-like icy voice sounded. It cut into Angley’s heart like a sharp blade, and Angley felt dizzy. His remaining will completely collapsed.

TL: Who is the goat 🐐now?

chapters.title: Chapter 579: Kindness And Majesty
chapters.body:
Chapter 579: Kindness And Majesty

In stark contrast to the collapsed Angley, the rest of the families were grateful and relieved.

Chen Rui secretly praised Shea’s clever means. After Emperor Guangwu Liu Xiu killed his powerful enemy Wang Lang in the Battle of Julu , he burned thousands of materials on the interaction between officials and Wang Lang which slandered Liu Xiu. People were very grateful for that. In the later period of the 3 Kingdoms, after the Battle of Guandu , Cao Cao seized a large number of secret letters between his subordinates and Yuan Shao , but he burned them down without even looking at them to show that the past was forgotten. This won him the people’s hearts.

Shea didn’t exactly copy Liu Xiu or Cao Cao’s approach this time, but there were similarities. There were too many families involved in this. If she investigated thoroughly, perhaps the entire emperor empire would encounter unimaginable turbulence, giving foreign enemies a chance.

Shea’s practice of “burning after a few glances” showed her clever means. Especially after showing the power of the Lamp Spirits Guard Team under her, besides giving an alarm for the royal families and elder families, she also showed an attitude.

Shea looked at the changes in everyone’s expressions and spoke up, “The Mishan Family surrendered to the enemy and betrayed the empire. Such a crime is unforgivable. I have decided to take back all the glory including the Mishan surname and the elder family status, completely eradicate the traitors of the empire, and eliminate the troubles forever. Any objections from anyone?”

All royals and families agreed unanimously, “No objections. Your Majesty is wise!”

This was the smoothest resolution since Shea took over.

“Very well. Dark Demon, I’ll leave Angley, his son, and the Mishan Family to you. Remember not to leave any troubles. Genie, you lead the guard to fully cooperate with the secret intelligence department. Also, immediately notify Tekula Fortress’ Sarandi and Gerant to kill the Mishan Family’s traitor, Baroco.”

Isabella and Genie bowed together. 2 lamp spirits held Angley and Zall respectively, then they walked out of the courtyard.

The Mishan Family would be facing complete massacre and destruction soon. Those with the surname “Mishan” would be annihilated, even Baroco who led the army out there was no exception. Normally, perhaps some people would still plead mournfully, but in the midst of this intense situation, everyone knew that the Mishan Family couldn’t avoid the fate of being exterminated.

Shea had always shown tolerance and concessions previously. At this moment she finally showed her ferocious fangs. The ruthless Blood and Iron Policy made some fence sitters start to really think about taking sides.

Stiller took a deep breath and took a few steps forward with determination. She bowed to Zola and said, “Madam Zola, I have only seen real magic today, and I sincerely admire madam’s strength. I’m willing to be madam’s apprentice to explore the essence of magic further in my limited life.”

Stiller’s actions surprised everyone. Putting aside the strength of Stiller, with her identity in the Boll Family, and the weight of the Boll Family in the entire elder family, she chose this time to be an apprentice. Her choice of teacher was even a powerhouse on Shea’s side, so she obviously switched sides to Her Majesty Empress.

Stiller was clear that the incident this time was by no means simple. It was probably the careful planning of Her Majesty Empress. Even the wily old fox like Angley fell into her trap and died. The Mishan Family was also exterminated. The empress killed 1 family as a warning toward the others to show prowess. It was also her Iron and Blood Policy to truly control the capital. No one would have imagined that the empress would dare to take such a risk under the tremendous pressure of the Dark Shadow Empire. Perhaps it was this kind of courage that Prince Obsidian did not have that was able to surprise all the elder families.

The Boll Family incident involving the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy this time was serious in nature. If Shea wanted to expand the situation, the Mishan Family was a lesson for the past. So, Stiller made a decision immediately.

Only by surrendering to the empress could the life of the Boll Family and even Lawson be saved.

Shea naturally understood Stiller’s intention. The Boll Family and Toro Family were the 2 largest elder families. If they could surrender to her command, then it was equivalent to grasping half of the elder families’ right to speak. She turned her gaze toward Zola in a consulting manner.

Zola did not respond, but she just glanced at Lawson. Stiller gritted her teeth and waved the wand in her hand. Lawson screamed as his body sounded with continuous bursts. He instantly turned into an unconscious man covered in blood.

“Madam, his spirit power has been shattered and he will not be able to train for the rest of his life. I have only 1 grandson. If he dies, then my direct bloodline will be severed. Madam, please spare his life!”

When Stiller said this, her voice was a little sobbing. Everyone saw it clearly that Stiller didn’t reserve her power. Lawson had completely become a useless person.

Zola’s face was indifferent as she didn’t seem to be moved by it. In her opinion, the overall situation of the Fallen Angel Empire had nothing to do with her. Not to mention accepting apprentice, sparing Stiller’s life was already giving Shea a face.

“Madam!” Stiller knelt down to Zola on one knee while bursting into tears. Shumir, the patriarch of the Boll Family, also knelt down.

“Madam Stiller,” Chen Rui sighed, “You only have 1 grandson, but your grandson caused how many grandmothers lose their favorite grandson or granddaughter? Have you ever thought that Lawson would end up like this today, you, his grandmother who has been indulging and pampering him, should bear the most important responsibility?”

Stiller shuddered and lowered her head. Her hand which was holding the wand trembled slightly, not in anger, but in shame. “Aguile” is right. I am strict with my son, Shumir, but I had pampered this grandson since he was a child. I would give him everything he wanted. If he made a mistake outside, I would go all out to protect him, which resulted in the tragic consequences today.

In fact, her spoiling and connivance were the biggest reasons that caused Lawson to cause disaster and put the Boll Family in desperation. It was only now that Stiller came to her senses. Intertwined in the regret and hatred feelings, she tremblingly raised her wand to Lawson. Her knuckles had turned white as she was about to make a killing blow. Chen Rui’s figure instantly blocked in front of the wand.

“Find a place and let Lawson stay there forever. He can’t go out for a lifetime. When he has another offspring, I believe Madam Stiller will learn your lesson. What do you think, Zola?”

An ant like Lawson was a trivial thing to Zola. Now that her man had spoken up, she could no longer pretend not to hear, “ Oh. “

The treatment of life imprisonment was actually more uncomfortable for Lawson than death, but after all, it gave Stiller a chance to continue her bloodline. Stiller understood that this was the greatest magnanimity. She bowed deeply to Zola and Chen Rui, “Thank you Madam Zola! Thank you, Sir. Aguile! Madam Zola, I really want to learn magic from you. Please fulfill my wish, madam!”

Zola frowned while Chen Rui nodded slightly to her. Ms. Fairy Dragon thought for a while. It’s nothing more than another handyman or experiment subject . She finally agreed, “Okay.”

Stiller breathed a sigh of relief, and Shea also nodded. The significance of the apprenticeship was not as simple as seen on the surface. Now the Boll Family truly submitted to the empress.

The bystanders see most clearly. Some thoughtful people were secretly frightened when they saw that Zola’s obedience to “Aguile” was faintly above the empress level. They began to reevaluate the power and influence of “Aguile”.

Stiller’s choice made Elder Lunters of the Leif Family make a decision secretly. He stepped forward and said to Shea, “This time, Basroya was greedy and accepted a bribe from the Mishan Family which indirectly caused the Princess Villa to suffer serious losses. He has already submitted his resignation to the garrison guard department and accepted the most severe punishment within the family. Your Majesty, please reschedule a suitable candidate as the head of the garrison guard team.”

The chief of the garrison guard team was equivalent to the chief of police which was a very important position. This move by Lunters was obviously affected by the Mishan Family and Boll Family incidents. It could also be regarded as Leif Family’s compromise for the empress. After all, Basroya played a disgraceful role in this incident.

Shea nodded, “I agree with Basroya’s resignation. Montola of the Toro Family will be the chief of the garrison guard team.”

Usually, the “opposition” was led by the Mishan Family and Leif Family. Now that the Mishan Family had collapsed, the Leif Family took the initiative to show their favor. In addition to Shea’s previous methods, there was no objection this time.

Toro Family’s Old Cowen and others were secretly delighted, and they hurriedly came out to thank Her Majesty.

“All the Mishan Family properties will be confiscated. The control of the Night Chamber of Commerce will be taken over by the Boll Family, supported by the Leif Family. The specific affairs and benefits will be distributed by both your families. I just want to say that we must learn the lesson this time, don’t repeat the Mishan Family’s mistakes again.”

Since the Mishan Family’s business was confiscated, a big portion of market share was available. Just monopolizing the entire empire’s black grape wine sales would have considerable benefits.

Shea’s generous means made everyone show a strange look. Especially the family members of the Night Chamber of Commerce whose surprised expression was beyond words. If it was the former Royal Highness Regent, he would definitely hold these interests firmly in his hands. Her Majesty Empress’ courage was far beyond what Obsidian could compare.

Stiller and Lunters looked at each other and bowed together.

Alice blinked her big eyes, “Sister, the Princess Villa is now destroyed. I have some difficulties on hand. I want to do fundraising. Can I invite Disjaro, Oliver, Redotan, Shumir and other sirs to participate in the rebuilding of Princess Villa?”

The few people named by Alice were startled at first, then they showed joy. More people were surprised as they began to take the young little princess seriously.

The Princess Villa’s fine wine was only short-lived in this incident, but judging from Mishan Family’s effort to carry out the trick, it could be seen that this wine had huge market potential and benefits. It was also very likely to affect the entire Demon Realm’s wine industry market. Alice’s so-called “difficulty on hand” was just an excuse. In fact, it was equivalent to sending money to these royal families and the families that surrendered to the empress. From another perspective, it was also a kind of interest binding.

Shea was a little surprised by this proposal. She took a deep look at this sister who had been under her protection since she was a child as she nodded slightly, “This is Princess Villa’s matter. You can negotiate with the few sirs yourself.”

All the ambitious and savvy people present at the scene understood that if killing the Mishan Family was to show majesty, the Night Chamber of Commerce was equal to appeasement. Now the proposal of the little princess was kindness. These 3 steps conveyed Shea’s message: Those who follow me will prosper, those who oppose me will die!

Chen Rui nodded secretly: Employ both kindness and severity, stick and carrot. This time Shea should be able to truly gain control of the capital and the entire empire.

TL: Now that the elder families all submitted to Shea, will Catherine’s threat still work? Would she compromise for a cooperation with the Fallen Angel Empire instead?

chapters.title: Chapter 580: New Things
chapters.body:
Chapter 580: New Things

In just an afternoon, the Mishan Family was annihilated under Shea’s Blood and Iron Policy, the Mishan Family’s surname was banished, all their properties were confiscated, and a series of members led by Angley were beheaded.

The positions and market vacancies left by the Mishan Family were quickly replaced by the rest of the elder families. There were various signs that the empress’ decision this time was supported by all the families.

Less than 1 month after Shea ascended to the throne, she uprooted a powerful elder family. This Iron and Blood tactic made the people full of awe. There were many things that people didn’t know, including the emergency internal meeting of elder families and the lineup changes of the upper-level forces after the courtyard incident..

Many families had guessed that the Princess Villa incident was a plot carefully laid out by Her Majesty Empress. The entire layout was bold, ingenious and interlocking. The millet wine of the Princess Villa and the envoy were just an introduction which resolved the prey, Mishan Family. The deeper intention was to use the Mishan Family as a warning to deter the elder families and to truly control the decision-making power.

Shea’s method was not killing blindly. First, she made the Boll Family take the initiative to surrender and the Leif Family gave in, then she gave out the huge benefits of the Night Chamber of Commerce and the Princess Villa to win over the various families, tightly tying the royal families and several important elder families to her own side. Speaking of which, Celine became the empress’ most powerful use of chips in this incident.

In Obsidian’s era, there was a “fundraising scandal” event that shook the empire. Not only the large and small estates, even the capital’s royal families and major elder families also suffered huge economic losses. When Shea gave up the Mishan Family’s shares in the Night Chamber of Commerce and made the royal family and the 2 elder families the shareholders of the Princess Retail Store, it was tantamount to selling a large amount of interest which was an irresistible temptation for all families.

In fact, the real initiator was not Shea, but “Ms. Dark Demon”. Now Ms. Secret Intelligence of the secret intelligence department was in the palace hall in front of her boss, Her Majesty Empress. There was no third person in the hall.

“What does this mean?” Shea looked at a piece of paper in her hand.

Isabella spread her hand, “It’s just a letter of resignation.”

Shea’s gaze was a little odd as she turned the paper over to Isabella, “You won’t write a few more words?”

There were only 3 words on the paper, ‘Letter of Resignation’, and nothing else. If Chen Rui was present, he would definitely give the praise of “the most domineering resignation of the year”.

“Is there a need to write more?”

“Maybe not, but I need an explanation.”

“Just need an explanation?” Isabella asked with interest, “Then I can leave? I will not be killed or something?”

“What do you think?” Shea asked rhetorically. In this hall where there were no other people. The conversation between both of them was not like the boss-subordinate relationship between the empress and the head of the secret intelligence department. Instead, it was more like 2 women with a subtle relationship.

“Can I really explain it? Without any scruples?”

“Say it.”

“Then I will explain.” Isabella smiled charmingly. She said it was an explanation, but then she asked, “Shouldn’t Alice be the best candidate for lord of the Dark Moon?”

Shea suddenly showed a slight coldness in her eyes while looking at Isabella. Isabella’s blue eyes stared directly at her without avoiding.

The 2 looked at each other for a while, then Shea squinted slightly. She replied inconspicuously, “Your reason for resignation is not sufficient, so I reject it.”

Isabella shrugged, “Since this is the case, then I’ll go ahead with my business. I don’t have much free time to stay here for too long.”

She sounded justified.

Ms. Secret Intelligence turned her back, waved her hand, and walked out unscrupulously. After taking a few steps, she stopped again, “Your Majesty Empress, don’t you have a summary or a comment?”

Shea lowered her head slightly, “Perhaps you are right. I will remind myself not to repeat Stiller’s mistakes. But I hope there is no next time for some matters.”

“Understood.” Isabella understood that Shea was talking about using Alice. She didn’t stop her pace this time and went straight out.

Shea gently opened the palm of her hand which was holding an egg-sized crystal. This crystal loomed in black and white. Its light was dim because all the power in it had been absorbed. Shea quietly stared at this crystal stone that had lost its value as if it was the most precious treasure in the world. A touch of tenderness appeared in her purple eyes.

In the capital.

While the Mishan Family was being punished, many soldiers carried thick piles of items and distributed them from house to house. This was the lowest grade magic paper that could display animated content with limited time. The cost was very low and it was not uncommon. People were surprised at the content on this magic paper.

There were 2 contents. The first was a detailed list of the various crimes of the Mishan Family, including Patriarch Angley. Mishan’s dejected close-up. Below the “animation” was a kill order signed by Her Majesty Empress. She ordered the capital residents not to cover the remnants of the empire’s traitors. Those who provide the garrison guard department with the intel of the remnants would be rewarded.

The second content was also eye-catching. It was about a battle ball game. A battle ball game named Flame Cup will be held in the arena tonight. The opponents of the game were the imperial guards team vs. the capital coalition team.

The imperial guard team was previously Shea’s Red Blood Legion when she was in Dark Moon Estate. The birthplace of the battle ball was the Dark Moon. The strength of the imperial guard team was among the best in the Demon Realm. The capital coalition team was a joint team composed of several famous battle ball teams in the capital, and each position was a celebrity player familiar to the public. This game was a spectacular match which was a matchup of the highest level. For many fans of the battle ball, it was no different than a feast.

This match spread to the capital a few days ago. Even Her Majesty Empress and the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoys would go to the stadium to watch in person. The ticket price was hyped to an astonishing height. It was hard to get even 1 ticket.

The capital was not like other estates. There were so many rich and powerful people. In most battle ball games, before the ticket sales to the public started, many tickets were internally reserved by default and could not be bought at high prices. This time it was the same.

Ordinary spectators were often disappointed about not having tickets, and they sometimes even caused trouble by blocking outside the arena.

It was clearly written on the magic paper that fans who didn’t have the tickets could wait at the Central Plaza and several main streets. Her Majesty Empress would have a surprise for everyone by then.

As night fell, the Central Plaza and several main streets were already full of people. Teams of guard soldiers maintained the order on the scene. The vendors who had seen the opportunity rushed among the crowd, earning a lot of money.

It was about time that the Flame Cup in the arena started. Many people were waiting in wonder. At this moment, the huge black crystal board at the Central Plaza suddenly emitted a bright light to show projections of an activity. It was very clear, and everyone’s eyes were immediately attracted to it. Then it turned into cheers, and those projections were the battle ball game. Judging from the personnel and costumes of both sides, it was exactly the game at the arena today!

The match that they couldn’t watch even if they paid a high price, yet they could watch it for free at this place. Although it was not as merry as the atmosphere on the scene, it was definitely a timely help for those impatient fans!

Not only were there images on the screen, but the sound was also quite synchronized. In addition to the cheers and whistles at the scene, there was also an unfamiliar voice that introduced the lineup of both sides in detail and interspersed with comments. This was the first time that fans have heard this novel commentary. The provocative language seemed to make everyone immersed in the scene. Especially when it was close to the goal, almost everyone’s emotions rose to the climax and cheered excitedly.

After celebrating, people finally realized that the crystal boards set up by Her Majesty Empress long ago at the plaza and the main street were actually not decorations, but magic items that could broadcast the match! The function of this item was somewhat similar to the magic communication talisman, but the difference was that the communication talisman or communication tower had a time limit whereas this kind of item seemed infinite; it could broadcast forever.

At the end of the game, people still stayed on the crystal board and did not want to leave for a long time. There was another line of eye-catching characters on the crystal board: Tomorrow night at the same time, a battle ball match in Dark Moon Estate arena will be livestreamed.

People were even more surprised. Not only the capital, but even the matches far away in the Dark Moon can be “livestreamed”? If that’s the case, can we watch the matches from all the other places in the future?

A voice took the lead to call out “Long live the Empress”, then countless voices sounded in unison.

The next day, the soldiers began to distribute the animated magic paper again. People also knew that the name of this thing was called the “newspaper”, which mainly recorded the latest major and new events happening in the capital and the estate; each issue would not be repeated. The first 10 issues were completely free. Then onward, it could be purchased with a very small amount of white crystal coin in the future.

3 things were recorded in the second issue of the ‘Empire Daily’.

The most striking thing was that Empress Shea led the officials to solemnly take an oath to the people of the empire. The content of the oath was to unite as one and do everything possible to lead the entire empire toward prosperity and strength. She swore to defend the glory of the empire till death. She also officially announced a series of measures that would benefit the residents, such as lowering tax rates, strengthening public security, rewarding production innovation, and so on. There was also an image of the empress and the ministers taking an oath in front of the Sword of Fallen Angel artifact.

This public oath inspired the minds of everyone in the capital. The newspaper also grandly introduced the magic crystal board that broadcasted live competitions as “television” and attached a program list. In addition to the Dark Moon’s battle ball match that fans were looking forward to at night, there were also 2 programs during the day. The first was a lecture on how to maintain weapons and armors launched by the Mechanic Association, and the second was Lilu from the Princess Retail Store introducing some skincare tips for the females.

The third thing was also good news. The Princess Villa was temporarily unavailable during reconstruction. In order to meet the needs of the customers, the aromatic millet wine would be sold in limited quantities in the Princess Retail Store.

In the Royal Hotel, Crawford looked at the newspaper he had just obtained. His dignified expression was the same as Celine on the side.

“General, what did you see?”

“What I see is the strong bond and fighting spirit of the Fallen Angel Empire which is far exceeding our expectations. From the latest intel, Shea seems to have completely controlled the voice of the upper class. From the Dark Moon to the capital, it’s been less than a month! This is unbelievable!”

Celine replied, “I have different views from general. What I see is the terrifying power brought by new things like television, newspapers, and millet wine, as well as countless business opportunities and benefits! Today is the negotiation deadline given by Her Majesty. Should we…”

“Now that the situation has changed far beyond our expectation, we must report to Her Majesty immediately!” Crawford said decisively, but he sighed, “This time, I’m afraid Her Majesty’s plan…”

TL: Will fail? Are the bargaining chips enough?

chapters.title: Chapter 581: The Past
chapters.body:
Chapter 581: The Past

At night, the 2 purple moons hung high in the starry sky, revealing hazy and soft radiance in the clouds.

In the quiet courtyard below, there was a thin mist. The source of the mist was a pot on a small stove. Next to the small stove was a low table. A set of delicate utensils was placed on the small bamboo stand of the table.

A pair of jade-like slender hands skillfully poured the water from the pot into the teapot and small cups on the table. After rewashing, she poured it into the small bamboo table with a water absorption function. The water was gone instantly.

Dozens of pale green dried leaves were put into a small purple teapot and washed with boiling water. After draining, she added water again to soak the leaves. A faint fragrance began to diffuse into the air.

The jade-like hands poured the tea from the small teapot into the small purple cup with the cup holder in front of Chen Rui, then she poured another cup for herself.

Chen Rui picked up the cup, looked at the amber tea and sniffed it pleasantly while showing a look of enjoyment. He raised the cup, smiled at the veiled face on the opposite side, took a sip, and felt that unique fragrance spread into his body through the tongue. He nodded approvingly, “Good tea.”

This compliment made the beautiful blue eyes of the woman on the opposite side slightly bend. She was obviously very happy.

When he was about to finish drinking, the woman poured it for him again which was about two-thirds of the cup. It was exactly in line with the phrase “just the right amount of tea” as he said.

Although Chen Rui was a tea ceremony lover in his previous life, due to limited conditions, he only knew the surface knowledge. However, after teaching Isabella, whether it was material selection, water use and other steps, they were all meticulously completed. Her movements were natural and skillful. Without spending time to practice attentively, one couldn’t achieve it.

Chen Rui suddenly felt touched. Her effort was entirely for him.

Except for that compliment, both of them did not speak again and just quietly sipped the tea.

“Sir Aguile, don’t you even want to say something to me?” The charming female voice finally sounded, “Even just a few words of blame?”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly when he heard this name, “How dare I blame you? This time, your plan was very successful. Under the triple effect of the situation, force and interest, Shea has truly controlled the situation.”

Catherine’s plan was done very carefully with every conceivable possibility taken into account, which put Shea in a dilemma. Isabella’s approach was to seize time just like Shea used quick-ascension to break Catherine’s pressure on the Dark Moon. Before Catherine executed the plan, Shea cleared out the obstacles of the elder families and gained true control of the empire. As long as the Fallen Angel Empire truly reached unity, then Catherine’s fear would be greater, and she would be more hesitant to attack the Fallen Angel Empire.

The wine cellar of the Mishan Family was destroyed by Isabella. The guard, John, who provided Zall with the intel regarding Marlene was also a spy. Alice and Marlene were naturally caught deliberately. Especially Alice used some little tricks to conceal the royal family’s purple eyes, this caused Zall and Lawson to take Mishan Family and Boll Family step by step into the trap.

The subsequent newspapers and television were Chen Rui’s “inventions”. Chen Rui had already begun the research on television long before the start of Obsidian’s crusade. The Demon Realm was not the earth, and the knowledge required was naturally different. Magic was enough to replace things. Chen Rui only proposed related ideas, and he attracted the attention of the 3 masters. Especially the quasi-grand master old man was full of praise for this idea. The Demon Realm already had related items such as communication talisman, image recording stone, and sound recording stone. They didn’t need to start from scratch. Under the enthusiastic research of the masters, the prototype of the “magic television” gradually emerged.

After repeated experiments, the magic television was finally successfully manufactured, but it was kept aside because Obsidian launched the war. After Shea ascended to the throne quickly, Shea transformed the plaza and other places to set up a large “magic television”. The original plan was to use economic warfare to deal with the elder families. However, the arrival of the Dark Shadow Empire’s envoy made this plan implemented in advance. Chen Rui did not participate in the plan a few days ago. Instead, he was busy transforming the magic communication tower to receive signals far away from the Dark Moon for a live broadcast.

The Flame Cup competition was a marketing tool. Taking advantage of the shortage of tickets, they finally successfully popularized magic television.

Compared with the television, the emergence of newspapers appeared to be hastier. Like the television programs, the contents that were currently published were still quite limited, but this was only the beginning. Shea was preparing to set up a media department to be responsible for the newspaper and television content.

Newspapers and television would bring tremendous benefits and could become a source of interest for Shea to further control the elder families. More importantly, this immense power of official media orientation would become a powerful tool to consolidate the empress’ ruling. Shea’s oaths and decree for the benefit of the people in the second issue of the newspaper were already known to everyone in the shortest possible time without any misrepresentation.

Isabella picked up the teacup elegantly and took a sip under the veil, “I thought someone would blame me for dragging his innocent and cute little lover into this turbid chaos.”

“I just think of Alice as my younger sister.” Chen Rui shook his head, “But this time…”

“Feel sorry for her?” Isabella put down the teacup, “You have to figure out 2 things. First, she is the princess of the empire; second, she is the most suitable lord of the Dark Moon Estate, not Athena.”

Chen Rui frowned slightly, “Don’t you think it’s too early for Alice?”

“Do you want to say that your cute sister is only 14 years old?” Isabella smiled, “Do you know what I was doing when I was 14?”

“Killing everywhere? Planning a strategy?” Chen Rui scratched his head.

“You were wrong. When I was 14, I didn’t know anything. I only knew acting cute in front of my father, being notorious to my elder brother, and bullying my twin sister. Even though the Belphegor Royal Family has a patriarchal habit, my father and elder brother love me very much. They will shoulder everything and protect me from danger. Under their care, a notorious, arrogant, stupid damn girl grows up slowly.”

Isabella smiled as she poured the tea again. She took a sip, “Do you know what happened next?”

Chen Rui seemed to have expected what she was going to say, and his heart suddenly became heavy.

Isabella continued anyway, “This girl met a man from the human world, and soon fell into the trap of sweet talk. For this man, she did not hesitate to turn hostile against her beloved father, brother and twin sister. She even stole the most important artifact of the family and gave it to this man. After obtaining the artifact, this man immediately revealed his true colors. He did not hesitate to abandon her like a shoe and disappear. This girl was homeless and wandered around. She was finally found by her brother and brought back to the family. However, when she returned to the family, the family was under a large-scale attack by the enemy royal family. Due to the loss of the Breeze Shadow Boots, almost all of the Belphegor Royal Family was annihilated in this war. Even the father and mother who loved the girl the most died in this battle. Her brother, Terstein, desperately took the girl out of the siege and suffered a lifelong serious injury. 100 years later, he was even tortured to death by the soul shackles of the enemy…”

The tea in Isabella’s cup was already overflowing from the trembling, yet her face was still smiling, “The person who should not die was dead, and the person who should die is still alive. Demon God is really blind.”

Her smile made Chen Rui’s heart hurt, and he stood up.

“From that moment on, there was only 1 thing left in my life, hatred. Compared with the hatred for those people, what I hate the most is the girl who killed my parents, my brother and my people. I’m always thinking about how to kill these enemies, so I don’t hesitate to train with great risk of death. I don’t hesitate to join the Bloodfall where the enemy is… until who I’ve become now.”

Chen Rui finally understood what happened to Isabella back then. He finally understood why he could feel the dying will in her.

The calmer the voice, the more painful the heart is.

Chen Rui came to her, “Listen to me, Isabella, you have already died once.”

“It’s useless! Not enough! Not enough!” Isabella stood up abruptly, “For a woman who harms others and herself, even dying 1000 times or 10,000 times is not enough!”

This seemed to be a trigger. Isabella completely lost her usual composure and calmness. She grasped her hair tightly as all the things she had suppressed for many years burst out in an instant. Screaming and crying sounded in the yard. She was completely inconsolable.

Chen Rui tried to step forward to comfort her several times, but he was madly resisted or even bitten. In the end, Chen Rui, who was more powerful, finally hugged her tightly.

After a long time, the crying in the courtyard finally subsided.

After another moment of silence, the hoarse voice sounded, “Chen Rui. Take me out of here and go to a place where there are only both of us. Stay with me for the last 2 months. I promise you that I will let go of all the past, be your woman wholeheartedly and leave everything to you.”

“The last 2 months?” Chen Rui shuddered and suddenly realized something keenly.

Isabella gently broke free of his embrace, unbuttoned her clothes, and revealed the snow-white chest. The lace-rimmed sexy underwear could hardly restrain the 2 alluring plumps. Protruding buds could be seen on the underwear. Although the plumps were covered, they exuded a strong temptation.

The focus of Chen Rui’s gaze was on the left chest she was pointing at. The area near the chest revealed a strange pattern which was the shape of a flower. It seemed to be a mark.

“That person left this on me back then. It will absorb the vitality of the host. Every once in a while, there will be a throbbing pain. For 200 years, I have tried everything I can to remove this mark. Even if it was the last time I died and resurrected, the mark still exists. Now…there is only 2 months left.”

Chen Rui was utterly shocked, “Why didn’t you say it earlier?”

Isabella looked at him tenderly and shook her head gently, “It’s useless. I have read countless materials over the years. This is the most persisting and terrifying seal of the Light Divinity Temple, called [Light Annihilation Seal]. Even Zola can’t dispel it. There are only 2 ways to dispel, but none of them can be done.”

When Chen Rui heard that there was a way, his hope reignited, “What way? Say it!”

“The first method is to kill the caster. The second method is magic and medicine, and the most important herb is the Snow Dallet Flower.”

Chen Rui’s heart suddenly sank. The man back then must be in the human world. The Snow Dallet flower is a sacred flower unique to the Holy Light Mountain. No matter which method, I must go to the human world.

TL: 2 months, can he make it in time? Needless to say, Snow Dallet Flower as a sacred flower must be very rare. Can Chen Rui use Arthur’s identity as the human realm’s prince to get it?

chapters.title: Chapter 582: [Light Annihilation Seal]
chapters.body:
Chapter 582: [Light Annihilation Seal]

The 2 methods of dispelling the [Light Annihilation Seal] mentioned by Isabella were all related to the human world. Now there were only 2 months left, which was urgent.

“There must be some other way!” Chen Rui thought quickly, and his eyes lit up, “Longevity potion! [Light Annihilation Seal] is the loss of vitality, you have taken the longevity potion, it should be able to prolong life or at least alleviate the effect of the mark!”

“If it weren’t for longevity potion, I would have died before Obsidian crusades the Dark Moon. Black potions are only effective for the first time.” This sentence made Chen Rui’s heart tremble. Isabella gently lifted her veil to reveal her disfigured face. “Remember when Sicali came to visit the Dark Moon, the time I kissed you with the detonation as a threat? At that time, my life had come to an end.”

“At that time, you were only a shadow of ‘Charles’. I have to say that you were quite successful in the capital’s performance. Initially, my heart was dead. I didn’t expect that the illusory liar actually left a trace in it. In fact, I just want to indulge myself once at the last moment. Unfortunately, you fool didn’t seize the opportunity. When I ask you to enter the bedroom, you dare not do anything. The carefree acting skills you used to have were completely lost.”

“I really am a fool. I actually missed such a good benefit.” Chen Rui wanted to make a joke, but his nose twitched a little.

“Perhaps this is just the weirdness of playing hard to get.” Isabella’s cherry lips formed a warm smile, “Later, the longevity potion unexpectedly prolonged my life, but it made me fall step by step.”

An idea flashed past Chen Rui’s mind and he said with joy, “There is still a way! Symbiotic contract! After Paglio and I canceled the contract, somehow tens of thousands of years of lifespan were left. I can share some of the lifespans with you! But my training method is very unique, I can’t create a high level contract. Do you know how to create a symbiotic contract? Or should I ask Zola to teach you?”

The basis of contract conclusion was the combination of life power and element power, but Chen Rui’s training was based on the Super System, which was completely different from ordinary humans or demons. Even with element blessing, only [Gravity] could be cast directly. He was still unable to sense the power of elements now. His contract was concluded by the “spiritual link” function of the Super System, but due to the “Star Lord”’s authority issue, the spiritual link was currently only able to sign ordinary equality contracts and master-servant contracts. High level contracts like master-subordinate contract and symbiotic contract couldn’t be realized. Paglio’s symbiotic contract and Guradam’s master-subordinate contract were all initiated by them.

He could only use higher grade link power by breaking through to the Merak realm.

A shining brilliance flashed across Isabella’s face, “Are you really willing to share your life with me?”

Chen Rui nodded seriously, “I’m willing.”

“Demon God’s eyes are really blind, there is actually a foolish guy who is willing to share his life with such a damn woman.” Isabella’s blue eyes were brimming in tears. She stretched out her hand and gently stroked his face. For the first time, there was no coquettishness, only unpretentious gentleness.

“It’s a pity…” Isabella’s gentle gaze seemed unusually calm, “This method still doesn’t work. In order to get stronger and seek revenge, I broke into the Trevante underground cave 200 years ago to hunt the demon eye and captured the lifelong companion beast. It’s where you accompanied Roman last time. The lifelong companion beast is equivalent to a symbiotic contract of the soul which cannot be released. In other words, I can no longer sign a second contract.”

Even the symbiotic contract won’t work? Chen Rui clenched his fists until his white knuckles trembled slightly.

“I have been waiting for death in hatred for a long time. Death for me is just a relief. If it weren’t for killing Broc and Manu, I would have ended my life long ago. But now … I suddenly don’t want to die. I can even survive the pain of the [Light Annihilation Seal]. I just want to live, I just want to accompany you here every day to enjoy tea quietly…”

Chen Rui’s eyes were red, and he hugged her tightly in his arms as if to crush her.

“This 200 years have been too slow, but when it comes to the end, it is too fast…” Isabella felt the warmth of his embrace and closed her eyes, “It would be nice to meet you a few years ago. Fortunately, there are 2 more months.”

“2 months are too short. Just stay with me forever!” Chen Rui hugged her tightly, “Don’t give up hope, I will definitely think of a way, even if it is going to the human world! Remember that promise? I solemnly tell you again, I will personally pick a Snow Dallet and give it to you, my woman.”

This was the promise made by “Charles” at that time. It was a pretentious deal back then. When she died and resurrected, it was still this sentence which was only to give her hope. But now, it was a real promise.

Isabella trembled and did not speak. She just pressed her head to his chest like she was listening to the powerful voice of his heart.

After a long time.

“I’m not your woman yet.”

This sentence stunned Chen Rui. Isabella had already raised her head with an intoxicating blush on her face. She looked straight at him and said boldly, “If you are a man, prove it to me now.”

If she had said this a few hours ago, Chen Rui would definitely go wild, but now there was more sadness and heaviness in his heart. After a moment of silence, he finally made up his mind. He carried her and walked into the house.

The bedroom was still in a quiet and elegant style. Chen Rui put Isabella on the bed. As soon as he took off his shoes and socks, I took the initiative to press the man under her. Her rapid breath spread into his mouth; their lips were connected quickly.

Chen Rui felt her fiery passion. With the wonderful excitement being pressed by the big chest, his breathing became quicker too.

At this moment, Isabella’s body suddenly stiffened as if she was trying to suppress something. Chen Rui immediately felt something amiss. He wanted to stop, but she hugged him tightly, unwilling to let go.

But soon, Isabella couldn’t control it. Her body started trembling violently.

“No!” She didn’t think that the [Light Annihilation Seal] would be triggered at such an unexpected time!

How would Chen Rui have any sexual thoughts now? He immediately put her on the bed, then he saw the ‘flower pattern’ emitted a strange dark golden light on her chest. The pattern kept spreading all over her body. Her snow-white skin seemed to be broken down by countless tiny cracks.

Isabella clenched her teeth as her body twitched involuntarily. Cold sweats were dripping down her forehead, her face twisted with pain, and she groaned uncontrollably.

Chen Rui knew that Isabella’s temperament was extremely stoic. When she was fighting Broc, she suffered continuous severe injuries and still risked her life without a change of her facial expression. Now that she showed such an expression, she must be enduring tremendous pain beyond imagination.

He couldn’t help her relieve the pain. The only thing he could do was to hug her tightly. It felt more uncomfortable than when he was suffering.

After 3 hours, Isabella’s tight body slowly relaxed. Her whole body seemed to have collapsed as she was limp in Chen Rui’s arms. The dark golden “cracks” of her body gradually faded away and returned to the “flower pattern” on her chest.

At this time, Chen Rui’s body and the large bedsheet were soaked in her cold sweat. Her clenched fists left deep red marks and dried blood on her white jade palms.

“I’m sorry.” Isabella’s voice was weaker than ever.

“What are you talking.” Chen Rui’s eyes were red as he carefully wiped the sweat from her forehead, “How often does it happen?”

“In the beginning, it was about once a month, and then it became several times a month. Recently, it has been more frequent, almost every day… It used to happen mostly at noon or early morning, but I didn’t expect it to be today…”

Chen Rui then understood why Isabella often disappeared at noon. When she was dating him at night, she would resolutely ask him to leave once the time was late no matter how sweet it was.

“I’m sorry.” Chen Rui’s voice choked up. After so long, he never noticed this.

Isabella’s pale face barely smiled, “Don’t worry, I won’t die. I don’t want to die now.”

The previous sentence “I just want to live; I just want to accompany you here every day to enjoy tea quietly” was lingering in Chen Rui’s ear again. The brimming tears in his eyes finally could not be restrained and dripped down.

After carrying 200 years of scars and begging for death, she has a strong desire to survive at the last moment. She would rather endure the huge unknown pain every day, just to be able to accompany me to drink a pot of tea quietly under the moonlight.

Chen Rui asked himself at this moment. Who am I to deserve that?

“Trust me, I will help you completely dispel the [Light Annihilation Seal]! Before that, I will try to extend the 2-month deadline. Promise me that no matter what difficulties you encounter, you can’t give up, okay? “

Isabella felt the blazing heat dripping on her face and wanted to reach out to help him wipe away the tears, but she lost even this strength. She just looked directly at his resolute bloodshot gaze, then she finally nodded gently.

Chen Rui kissed her forehead and made up his mind: I must go to the human world! If I can’t find and kill the bastard who scammed the Breeze Shadow Boots, I will go to the Holy Light Mountain to pluck the Snow Dallet Flower!

The way for humans to break through the space in the Demon Realm to return was to use the “seed” implanted in their body beforehand. It was equivalent to a fixed coordinate, but it was a one-time use. He could not go back and forth. There was a considerable risk in the process of this kind of space transmission. He would be annihilated once he fell into the space turbulence.

Chen Rui could also use this method when going to the Demon Realm. Although space magic was almost lost in the Demon Realm, Zola happened to be a master of this. If he got her help, it should be doable.

In case Zola couldn’t do it, there was another way that was to seek the help of the Dark Elemental King. [Light Annihilation Seal] belonged to the spell of the light elementals, so the dark elementals, who were the enemy of the light elementals, would definitely have a solution or at least delay the time of the outbreak. The problem was that Chen Rui was also the enemy of the dark elementals because he killed a large number of dark elementals in the Blue Lava Estate including a Demon Emperor-level elite dark elementals. Therefore, he must look for the Earth Elemental King who was also one of the 3 Kings of Darkness as a mediator.

In fact, there was a “space seed” of the human world in Chen Rui’s body. It was obtained after killing Nero. However, this seed was absorbed by him in the “Shura state” at that time, so he was still unable to sense it now. He could thus only use the above 2 methods.

TL: Which method will work in the end?

chapters.title: Chapter 583: Negotiation And Methods
chapters.body:
Chapter 583: Negotiation And Methods

The next day, Shea met the 2 envoys of the Dark Shadow Empire in the council hall.

Yesterday was the last day of the 7-day period given by Catherine. It was also the day when Shea and Crawford agreed to start negotiations. However, after seeing the newspapers and magic television, Crawford spontaneously changed his strategy. He used the excuse that Celine needed a day’s rest as she had not recovered from the shock of the incident at the Princess Villa to delay the negotiation time.

In fact, Crawford used the communication talisman to get in touch with Catherine. After accepting the new instructions, he brought the “recovered” Celine to the palace.

There was a long white table in the council hall. Shea was sitting on the throne seat directly in front of the table. There were several chairs on each side. On the left side were Disjaro, Stiller and others. There was no one on the right which was obviously reserved for the 2 envoys.

Crawford and Celine bowed and saluted to Shea. Shea raised her hand to indicate that they were seated on the right side, and she spoke up, “Ms. Celine, what happened the day before yesterday has shocked you. It was verified that the kidnapping incident was planned by the elder family, Mishan Family, who is a spy of the Bloody Empire. The true identity of Patriarch Angley is the Bloody Empire’s Marquis. He has been lurking in the Fallen Angel Empire for many years. He was not discovered because of Obsidian’s incompetence previously. The purpose of Angley planning the kidnapping was obvious. He wanted to disrupt the peace talks and provoke the relationship between both empires so that the Bloody Empire could benefit from it. I have cleaned up the Mishan Family as quickly as possible. Lawson. Boll who offended Ms. Celine last time was also crippled. He will accept life imprisonment that is worse than death. I hope General Crawford and Ms. Celine can be satisfied with this kind of punishment.”

The entire elder family was executed, and the heirs of another elder family (on the surface) became crippled and imprisoned for a lifetime which was a living death was indeed a very heavy punishment.

However, everyone in the Fallen Angel Empire understood the nuances inside, especially Stiller. They were very grateful that Her Majesty Empress put all the blames on the Mishan Family. Lawson’s handling seemed very tragic on the surface, but it was Stiller who crippled him at that time in order to let Zola spare his life. It was totally unrelated to the envoy.

This was the advantage of standing as a team. If she didn’t submit to the empress, perhaps not only Lawson, even the entire Boll Family wouldn’t escape the catastrophe this time.

Crawford glanced at Celine. Then Celine immediately stood up and smiled cheerfully, “As I said, Your Majesty is the host and I’m just a guest. No matter what Your Majesty does, I have no objection. I would like to thank Your Majesty for your concern and help.”

Shea nodded, “Now that we have insight into the conspiracy of the Bloody Empire, we should unite as one and truly show the sincerity of cooperation to establish a mutually beneficial friendly relationship so that we can and jointly move toward prosperity.”

Crawford said, “Your Majesty is right. We are ordered by Catherine the Great to travel far and wide to the Fallen Angel Capital with a sincere friendship in order to further promote bilateral relations and development.”

The pleasantries of both parties were very well-said, but they all knew that the so-called friendship was just a nice shell. There was only a relationship of sheer interest deep inside between the empires.

There could only be 1 dominant party. Without the powerful Bloody Empire, the Dark Shadow Empire would have conquered the Fallen Angel Empire long ago. The Fallen Angel Empire was also using this most important point to deal with it. It was like when the Lord of Midnight Sun was in power, Catherine struggled to survive in the gap between the Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire.

The game relationship between the 3 empires was a bit similar to Chen Rui’s memory of the 3 Kingdoms era in the last years of the Middle Eastern Han Dynasty which was quite subtle.

Among the strong and the weak, one’s loss is another’s gain, but they had always stood firm over the years. It was still unknown which of the 3 empires would be eliminated first and which would claim victory at the end.

After exchanging the pleasantries, all that was left was to throw away the shell of hypocrisy and negotiate for the sheer interest.

At present, Shea used a surprising move to employ both kindness and majesty to deter the elder families and the royal families, which had greatly strengthened her control of the empire. Catherine’s original plan had failed, but Crawford’s attitude was still very tough and proposed a series of harsh conditions such as letting the Dark Shadow Empire Army station in the Dark Moon, sharing the secret formula for land improvement, and “talent exchange” including the Dark Moon Financial Officer Chen Rui.

These conditions sounded unbearable at first which gave an urge to beat Crawford up. Nevertheless, Disjaro, Stiller and others were also experienced in negotiation, and they were patient. They adopt a slow and careful strategy to tackle Crawford’s offense bit by bit.

In fact, both parties in the negotiation had a bottom line. On this basis, the seller asked for a sky-high price, and the buyer could make a down-to-earth offer. After intense negotiations, Crawford finally loosened up. The stationing of the army in the Dark Moon could be negotiated again, and an alternative for the land improvement and battle ball formulas could also be considered… But they were persistent on the “talent exchange”; they were determined to get Chen Rui.

Judging from the current situation, the Dark Shadow Empire’s attitude had greatly eased which was a good start. Since the Fallen Angel Empire’s strength was weaker than that of the other party, certain concessions must be made and it was inevitable to sacrifice some people or benefits. If handing over Chen Rui could promote the key to reaching an agreement between the 2 empires, then it would definitely be worth it.

The negotiators, Disjaro and Stiller, turned their attention to Her Majesty Empress. However, Her Majesty Empress’s expression remained the same as if she was not interested at all. They had to avoid the important issues and did not give a formal answer. Crawford was naturally very dissatisfied. He began to stress on some of the originally relaxed aspects again. After a few hours of verbal battle, both sides did not reach any substantive treaty.

It was noon, and Shea arranged for Crawford and Celine to have a meal and rest, and the negotiation team of the Fallen Angel Empire stayed here.

Disjaro spoke up, “Your Majesty, forgive my straightforwardness. I think we can consider agreeing to the talent exchange requirement of the Dark Shadow Empire. Although Chen Rui is a rare internal affairs talent, and he has made great contributions to the prosperity of the Dark Moon, but now Your Majesty has been enthroned, so the focus should be on the overall situation, not a Dark Moon Estate. It is necessary to make some sacrifice.”

Stiller and others also echoed the proposal, but Shea rejected this proposal in 1 sentence, “We can use a lot of soil crystals to replace the soil improvement formula, we can also provide the battle ball formula and share the magic television technology. However, we cannot make the slightest concession on Chen Rui’s matter!”

This resolute attitude made Disjaro and the others look at each other: A mere human actually has such weight in Her Majesty Empress’ mind? Is it more important than the secret formulas of the battle ball and magic television?

In the past, some representatives of the elder families would have jumped out and debated fiercely, but now they dared not say much, but Stiller tentatively asked, “Your Majesty, are you concerned about the Dark Moon’s representative lord, Athena…”

“It’s not Athena’s problem.” Shea looked at the puzzled people, “As there are no outsiders here, I will tell you a little. Has the battle ball, magic water conservancy system, aromatic millet wine…including newspapers and magic television appeared in the Demon Realm before?”

Everyone shook their heads. These were unprecedented new things. Several quick-thinking people had already reacted. Their faces were full of shock. Disjaro couldn’t help but ask, “Your Majesty means these are…”

“Yes,” Shea nodded, “He has contributed to each of these new things. Creative ideas such as magic television, battle ball, and magic water conservancy systems were developed at the Dark Moon. The newspapers created by Master Fonsaq and Xingxing were inspired by a plan he proposed some time ago, and the recipe for the aromatic millet wine was also provided by Chen Rui!”

Everyone was shocked at the same time. Unexpectedly, this human’s talents have reached this level. They finally understood why Shea did not give in on this matter at all.

Giving a man to fish is a completely different concept from teaching a man to fish. How can such a remarkable and talented person be lost to another empire!

Shea said with a solemn expression, “Everyone, remember that the matter about Chen Rui is a top secret that must not be divulged!”

Everyone nodded. In fact, Her Majesty Empress still did not reveal one of the biggest secrets. This human was the future Royal Highness Prince Consort who was the only man Her Majesty Empress had fallen in love with since she was a Princess Royal. How could she give him to others?

Chen Rui didn’t know that he had become a “highly demanded commodity” in the negotiation. At this time, he was taking Isabella to discuss with Zola in the Rainbow Valley about the [Light Annihilation Seal].

“Space magic is not as simple as you think.” Zola shook her head after asking Chen Rui’s intention to go to the human world, “The human magicians should have gone through countless experiments to create a fixed facility to detect the materials with the space coordinate attribute in the Demon Realm. Then, they use the approximate position coordinates of this coordinate to initiate a random teleportation across the space. This teleportation is quite dangerous. One may be annihilated upon falling into the space turbulence. I don’t have this kind of facility now. Even if I do, it will take several months to detect and experiment with the space coordinates of the human world, plus the testing of machines and teleportation… it will take at least a few years…”

Chen Rui’s enthusiasm seemed to be dampened and he suddenly felt discouraged, “Then what else can I do to go to the human world?”

“The human world has a summoning technique that uses a special magic circle to summon creatures in different spaces. If both parties sign the contract on a voluntary basis, they should be able to achieve the safe transmission of space, but generally, only lower-strength demon creatures are summoned. Furthermore, there is considerable luck involved, so it is difficult to achieve. Obviously, this method is not suitable for the current situation.

“Do you have a way to suppress [Light Annihilation Seal]?”

“If it’s the early stage of the curse, I might be able to neutralize or strip it with dark elements, but the curse has gone deep into her soul after 200 years. If it is removed by force, it will be annihilated together with the host’s soul.” Zola thought over and over again, “Now I can only properly relieve the pain of this kind of curse, but I can’t extend the time of the final outbreak. Let Yini stay here for a few tests, okay?”

Zola’s answer made Chen Rui’s mood heavy, “Isabella, you stay here. I will go to the Dark Moon now. The Earth Elemental King should already be on the way to the Dark Moon.”

Isabella smiled slightly and nodded, “Okay.”

The 2 women watched Chen Rui disappear into the [Teleportation Portal] of the Rainbow Valley. Zola pondered for a moment and asked, “Why don’t you let me tell him that there is another way to reach the human world?”

Isabella asked her back, “That method… are you sure of it?”

Zola shook her head, “No, if he breaks through the space directly, the danger is much greater than that of the human’s teleportation. Even I may fall into the space turbulence. I believe that even a Demi-God powerhouse dare not try it lightly.”

“You should know him. If there is no other way, he will definitely try.” Isabella shrugged, “So, as a woman, would you like to watch your beloved man risk his life for another woman?”

Isabella met Zola when she came to the Dark Moon to “save” her best friend, Krobelus. Both of them got along very well. Before coming to the Rainbow Valley with Chen Rui this time, Isabella deliberately rushed to ask Zola about the way to go to the human world before Chen Rui, and she asked Zola to keep the last method secret.

“Of course not.”

Zola answered without hesitation. After a moment of thought, she added, “However, if he is not a responsible man, he will not be my man.”

Isabella was slightly stunned as she looked at Zola’s eyes with an odd expression, “Really? I suddenly thought about something he said which I can’t understand previously. When the Nazis came to arrest the Communists, I remained silent because I’m not a Communist; when they come to catch the Jews, I remained silent because I’m not a Jew; when they come to catch trade unionists, I remained silent because I’m not a trade unionist; when they come to catch the Catholics, I remained silent because I was a Protestant; when they came to arrest me, no one spoke for me. Is that what… you mean?”

“What?” Zola frowned. She was not pretending to be stupid, “Why haven’t I heard this?”

“Is he saying different things to every woman? My Sister Zola, it seems that you have to take some time to give this guy some lessons.” Isabella smiled and said, “But before that, help me think of ways to deal with that [Light Annihilation Seal]. I’m afraid of pain to death.”

“ Oh .” Zola replied blankly, “I suddenly wanted to listen to a piece of music that Shea said. What is it called… “The End of the World”?”

Isabella was startled as it was the first time she encountered Ms. Fake Daze’s blackhearted attribute, “No problem.”

“By the way, I heard Olypheus said that… he often drinks a kind of drink at your place for a few hours.”

“Drink?”

“What?”

“It’s called tea. It tastes a bit bitter, so you may not be used to it.

“What?”

“Okay… I’ll make it for you to drink…”

“ Oh .”

TL: No need to make a concession, Chen Rui will acquire Catherine sooner or later, right🤔? Seems like he is destined to have a trip to the Dead Sea. What can he get from there? Will the Dark Elemental King help?

chapters.title: Chapter 584: The Destination! Dead Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 584: The Destination! Dead Sea

Chen Rui came to the sheriff’s house at the Dark Moon Estate through the [Teleportation Portal] of the Rainbow Valley. As soon as he came out, he happened to run into Roman and Dodo in the courtyard.

Dodo transformed into Paglio’s look to pour wine to Roman as a waitress. It seemed that Roman had been bullied by Master Poison Dragon recently. He wanted to redeem some pitiful self-esteem by using Dodo’s ability to transform.

“Master Roman, please drink wine.” Dodo very cooperatively offered a glass of wine with both hands respectfully.

Roman took a sip and deliberately spat it out, “Why does this wine taste a little sour? Didn’t I ask you to add fructose liquid!”

Dodo rolled his eyes and took the glass of wine as if he was tasting it carefully, but he drank it all and nodded pretentiously, “It’s a bit sour indeed. I’ll add more fructose liquid for master.”

“You stained my cup! Change another one! Cunning slime! Uh, no, it’s Paglio, the bastard!” Roman seemed to be full of resentment, “Bastard poison dragon, you were also hooking up with those 2 beauties last time. In the end, you betrayed me and brought Delia to the scene! As a result, I was grounded by Delia for 7 days!”

“This is too sour, this is too sweet…” While Master Roman cursed, the slime responsibly tasted the wine on the side. Each “tasting” was a full glass.

“Dodo! Hurry up!”

The slime shivered, grabbed a glass and handed it over.

Roman was just picking faults to vent previously, but this time he was too lazy to talk about it. He took the wine and drank it, then he took the meat that Dodo handed over. Finally, his resentment was relieved by a little- It’s good that the slime is here. Otherwise, I will be at the bottom of the society. I can’t even find someone to oppress.

Master Roman hiccuped and couldn’t help being stunned when he happened to see the master, Chen Rui, approaching. Dodo reacted faster than him. He immediately changed back to his original shape of the onion and bounced over. He uttered flattering words like a fountain without stagnation. It should be the result of practice during this period of time.

Chen Rui was not in the mood to play with Dodo, so he threw a few fruits to him and walked straight to Roman.
