With the help of Chen Rui, Moore caught up a little from the disadvantage position. At this time, amidst the weird and heavy breath, a tender power suddenly appeared. It turned into layers of ripples which actually enveloped both Hegel and Moore at the same time.

The 2 kings simultaneously felt the immense pressure contained in the seemingly soft ripples. Blade-like long bone spurs appeared in Hegel’s wrists. He retreated while waving at high speed. The ripples split apart before they came close. Before they reintegrated, they were completely corroded by the black mist, but he had taken 7 or 8 steps back.

A sponge-like power pattern appeared in front of Moore’s body. All the ripples were absorbed by these “sponge”. The swollen “sponge” slowly recovered and disappeared in the strange twist, but Moore completely sank into the soil below the knee joints

“What are you doing! Lambost!” Hegel roared.

“My hands are just a bit itchy when watching you guys fighting.” Lambost’s calm voice sounded. “By the way, I have no objection if you said that Moore is an ‘earth lump’, but you said that his elemental heart is flooded in ‘water’.” Therefore, I have valid reasons to regard it as your discrimination and provocation against the water elementals.”

TL: It seems like the Elemental Covenant is nothing for them; they just fight without care🤦♂️… So, the true ‘me’ that Moore mentioned is him after merging with the origin? How will Chen Rui make Hegel help him?

chapters.title: Chapter 595: Chaos! The Awakening Of The Worst Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 595: Chaos! The Awakening Of The Worst Enemy

On the Deep Blue Island, a large amount of sea water rolled up and soared to the sky, forming a huge “cover” shrouding the entire island.

The water elementals evacuated earlier under the king’s order; they were looking at the wonders of the Deep Blue Island.

Under the huge energy in the cover, it constantly trembled and underwent strange changes. Sometimes, it condensed into thick soil-like earth while other times it turned into boiling black gas. Sometimes, it turned into soft waves or cold crystals; other times it was mixed up in various colors. It was spectacular.

The most aggrieved person in the battle group was Hegel. He originally wanted to demonstrate prowess to the Earth Elemental King so that Moore would not stop him from killing the ant, but unexpectedly, the strength of the ant that could be crushed to death last time had grown to an unexpected level, and he also had special abilities. With the help of this ant, the Earth Elemental King, who had not fully integrated with the element imprint, actually turned the table and changed the previous disadvantage position. They were in a stalemate for a while.

What made the Dark Elemental King even more depressed was that Water Elemental King Lambos actually also made a move. He actually found a ridiculous excuse and indiscriminately made a move on both sides at the same time. Sometimes, he teamed up with Hegel to attack the Earth Elemental King; sometimes, he teamed up with the Earth Elemental King to attack Hegel; sometimes he fought both kings alone. The whole battle turned into a chaotic battle.

Is this still the cunning and suspicious water elemental? He’s more like the hot-tempered and aggressive fire elemental!

The person who felt most pressured in the battle group was not the 3 kings, but Chen Rui. After fully activating the [Royal Star Transformation], Chen Rui was only close to the strength of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. The 3 kings were mysterious beings who had realized their origin power, so their strength was far better than average peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Even the suppression of the [Galaxy Territory] skill couldn’t reach half of the normal effect. If it weren’t for Moore’s strongest defensive ability among the 6 Elemental Kings, perhaps he had already been annihilated by the terrifying power around him.

Chen Rui had not used the 3 life-saving trump cards of [Demonic Flies Transformation], [Star Diversion] and Demon Shield yet. Worse comes to worst, he could activate the first escape skill, [Star Gate]. It was just that the star points were in the Dark Moon and the capital. It was definitely impossible to set star points in this kind of battle now. Once he returned, it would be even harder to come here again without the guidance of the Earth Elemental King. Moreover, Lambost’s intention to participate in the war was a bit strange as he had agreed to help with the mediation earlier. Since Moore was here too, he had to survive this battle first.

In this kind of high-intensity battle, the power of the [Royal Star Transformation] was consumed very quickly.

With a strong determination, a black flame suddenly burned on Chen Rui’s body with a “ wheeze “. The flame full of vitality was quickly filled with a violent and manic breath. The color of his pupils began to have an abnormal change.

The water elementals who watched the battle in the distance saw a scorching red light suddenly appearing in the mixed color cover that enveloped the island. There was actually a faint sign of engulfing the black mist.

The eyes of the Dark Elemental King, who was inside the light cover, showed rare seriousness as he was facing the huge Scorching Dragon coming rapidly.

He once saw this big move in Town Lupin that “Aguile” activated when he fought against Hemos, the elite dark elemental under Hegel’s command. It was torn apart by Bridget’s bare hands. However, when this strange “demonic beast” appeared in front of his eyes again, its momentum was completely different from the last time!

If it was in a normal state, Hegel also had complete confidence to resist the Scorching Dragon’s attack even if it had reached the level of threatening the peak stage of the Demon Overlord. However, it was at a critical time when he was restrained by the Earth Elemental King and the Water Elemental King; he could hardly look after himself. This [Scorching Dragon Kill] was likely to be the last straw to defeat him.

As Hegel roared, the red light in his eyes flourished. The bone spurs of his body stood upright in the steaming black gas. He obviously wanted to go all in to take the blow. At this moment, the speed of the Scorching Dragon rushing toward him suddenly slowed down. The surrounding scorching red flame was also covered by a layer of ice blue crystals.

Gradually, the entire winding giant Scorching Dragon solidified and turned into an ice dragon sculpture. It was easily split in half and shattered by Hegel’s blade-like bone spurs.

Chen Rui felt that a terrifying icy air mixed with the destructive power invading his body. Even the passive attributes of [Astral Form] and [Damage Absorption] couldn’t completely resolve it. Amidst the shock of that power, his internal organs suffered serious injuries, and blood had spilled from the corners of his mouth.

Fortunately, he activated the [Star Devouring] and [Star Conversion] in his body immediately, quickly devouring the power of the 2 terrifying elements.

Chen Rui never thought that the Water Elemental King would suddenly “betray” when he went all in. His strongest trump card, Scorching Dragon, was completely frozen!

On the other hand, the Water Elemental King had joined forces with the Dark Elemental King to launch an attack. Hegel was not sure when the weird Lambost would change side again, so taking advantage of the current situation as “allies”, he launched an all-out attack on Moore and Chen Rui.

For a while, the mixed ice-blue and black mist shrouded Moore and Chen Rui. Moore was in a struggle as his pressure suddenly doubled. Chen Rui’s [Royal Star Transformation] armor cracked under this terrifying pressure. It was like a fully stretched bow that might break at any time.

In this environment, the time-limited [Demonic Flies Transformation] or [Star Diversion] could no longer play a big role. Chen Rui gritted his teeth and appeared in the air instantly. The surrounding space was distorted and a black hole gradually formed. In an instant, the power of the 3 Elemental Kings was simultaneously sucked into the black hole uncontrollably.

The 3 kings were shocked at the same time. They actually felt that they could not stop the rapid loss of power. The black hole was like a legendary ancient beast that was capable of devouring all existing substances.

And this kind of power was actually activated by the guy whose strength was obviously inferior to the 3 kings!

In fact, Chen Rui didn’t feel any better. The origin power of the 3 kings was not as easy to digest as ordinary “food”. It was close to the real Demi-God power, so the speed of [Star Conversion] couldn’t keep up with [Star Devouring]. The originally stored soul power of the ancient alchemy civilization’s Demi-God powerhouse was not completely digested yet. With the frantic influx of the 3 major elements’ origin power, it soon almost overflowed.

Chen Rui’s initial intention of activating [Star Devouring] was not an extravagant hope to suppress the battle alone, but it was to stop this chaotic battle before the [Royal Star Transformation] state disappeared. Just as he was about to speak, his soul power suddenly shook, and time seemed to have paused.

The 3 kings suddenly felt a subtle change in the powerful devour power. A dark red color appeared in the black hole.

The changes were getting more intense.

Destruction!

Endless destruction!

“It is actually this kind of destructive breath…” Even the Water Elemental King didn’t have the thought of disrupting the situation. A shocked expression passed through his eyes. Together with the eyes of the other 2 kings, they focused on the figure in the sky.

The original star-like armor had turned jet black with a hideous look. Flashing with a dark gem-like color, his entire person seemed to transform into the darkness of endless destruction. 2 dark red evil eyes were revealed in the helmet which were actually somewhat similar to the Dark Elemental King.

The figure let out a weird laugh. As the figure flickered, he turned into a wisp of black smoke and jumped into the black hole. The 3 kings immediately felt that the power of the black hole had increased by 10 times, and the loss of their origin power to the black hole doubled. At this time, the 3 kings knew that some unexpected change had taken place, so they joined forces in unison to resist the horrifying devour power of the black hole.

When the 3 kings were in the Elemental War, they were comrades who cooperated with each other tacitly. Now, once they really joined forces, their power was naturally extraordinary. The 3 origin powers were combined into 1 to resist the black hole. They were in a stalemate for a while.

The black hole trembled slightly. Finally, it disappeared at the same time with the combined force of the 3 kings with a “ boom “. The figure in the dark armor appeared in it. His hands drew a strange rhythm, and the 3 great powers attacked the 3 kings.

Dark Elemental King Hegel faced the softest and most powerful ripples, but it contained ice cold and sharpness that were completely different from softness. This power was extremely powerful. The dark breath on Hegel’s body was unleashed to the extreme. He immediately embraced his arms, and his whole body’s bone spurs quickly extended into a blade shape, flashing a deep and sharp light. Amidst a loud roar, he vigorously shook and shattered the soft power into innumerable ice flakes. It was not easy for Hegel to resist the blow. He was blown away for some distance before he could stabilize himself.

A sky full of black gas was whirring toward the Earth Elemental King Moore. Before it touched Moore, the surrounding solid water element ground had been shaved off by a force of corrosion. Moore raised his hands high, and the ground under his feet lifted him up toward the black gas. The earth-yellow light flashed at high speed, constantly canceling the black gas. Moore’s figure was getting taller and taller. When the black gas disappeared completely, the earth pillar under Moore’s feet was already 20 meters high and the pillar was full of mottled marks corroded by the power of darkness. The ground was also riddled with holes.

Relatively speaking, the Water Elemental King was much more relaxed. When the brilliance of the Crown of Wave on his head flashed, waves rippled away which resolved and eliminated the power of the thick and heavy earth element that charged toward him.

Although the 3 kings resolved the attack of the dark armored figure, the shock in their hearts was even greater because the other party launched the power of the 3 kings’ origin power of elements! He obviously reflected the 3 devoured powers with a certain mysterious technique!

No one thought the fight would escalate to such an extent including the Earth Elemental King. Chen Rui had the inheritance of the Pseudo-God powerhouse. His strength was improving rapidly and his future achievements were limitless. However, he could now compete with the 3 kings on his own which was far beyond Moore’s imagination.

Under the complex gazes of the 3 kings, the black hideous armor changed again and gradually returned to the original star-like brilliance. The terrifying destructive breath disappeared, returning to its original appearance.

Chen Rui didn’t have the high-spirit of fighting the 3 kings alone. On the contrary, his tired eyes revealed incomparable solemnity. The fists in his hands were tightly held- The worst enemy is actually awakened!

“I think we shall make a truce for now, okay?”

If it were before, Chen Rui’s words might not have any weight or effect, but now, even the Dark Elemental King had no objection.

TL: Is it Shura? Or it is something more like the Abyss Family…

chapters.title: Chapter 596: Exchange Conditions
chapters.body:
Chapter 596: Exchange Conditions

Under the effect of the rich water element, the damage on the Deep Blue Island gradually recovered. The entire sea area had also restored its former tranquility and beauty.

In the Deep Blue Palace, Water Elemental King Lambost sat on the top, Earth Elemental King Moore and Chen Rui sat on the left, and Dark Elemental King Hegel on the right.

Hegel’s gaze at Chen Rui was still full of murderous intent and hatred at this time, but compared with before, there was a hint of deterrence. In the battle just now, the power displayed by this enemy is really surprising. Especially, in the end, he is actually fighting the 3 kings alone. He has simply reached an incredible level.

“Hegel.” Lambost said, “I believe you already have a certain understanding of Moore’s strength. His recovery speed after rebirth is much faster than we expected. As long as he can integrate the element imprint, he can completely recover his old appearance.”

Hegel sneered, “Though that’s right, the problem is that our Royal Highness Earth Elemental King seems to have doubts about re-establishing the Elemental Covenant because of this outsider.”

“There are no absolute enemies in the world, Hegel.” Lambost glanced at Moore. “There are no absolute friends either.”

Moore smiled calmly without explaining, but Chen Rui frowned slightly. In this battle, I fully activated the power of the [Royal Star Transformation], so the aftereffect will be far greater than the previous few times. I already feel a kind of intense fatigue now.

He cut a dash in this battle. He activated [Star Devouring] to devour the power of the 3 Elemental Kings, then he retaliated with their own skill which led to the 3 kings each suffered a lot. However, apart from the previous activation of [Star Devouring], the powerful performance at the later part was not controlled by his will, but Shura.

Shura was the inner demon derived from the mysterious silver box. He had been lingering and existing in his consciousness since [Refined Mind] until now. During the battle with Sicali’s real body in the White Feather Estate’s Town Massimo underground back then, Shura did not hesitate to harm himself to forcibly break through Chen Rui’s will to suppress his appearance. After devouring the quasi-artifact Wheel of Hera, he fell asleep. Now, he had finally woken up.

This awakening was by no means accidental. Chen Rui had a hunch that perhaps some kind of biggest test was about to come.

In fact, he seemed to have entered a kind of wonderful state when he activated [Star Devouring] just now under the pressure from the 3 major elements’ origin power, but later, the appearance of Shura had broken the realization of this state.

Lambost smiled at the Dark Elemental King, “Hegel, do you understand what I mean? I think you need to make a more correct choice.”

Hegel’s tone became a little more agitated, “Lambost, it really surprised me that you would be biased toward this guy! Even if he has the [Armor of Faith] and some special ability, he is just a servant or follower of Demi-God. He can’t be compared with us, the Elemental Kings at all!”

“He is not a servant, but an inheritor.” Moore finally spoke, “And it’s not Demi-God, it’s Pseudo-God.”

Hegel and Lambost both showed shocked expressions. The inheritor of Pseudo-God!

That kind of bizarre power that almost reaches the origin of destruction… Even among the Pseudo-Gods, it is still a terrifying existence. Or in other words, it is quite close to a certain peak stage.

Hegel gradually retracted his murderous intent, but his attitude remained arrogant as he said, “Even if it’s a Pseudo-God, he can’t control the life and death of elements at will, not to mention that he is just an inheritor; he hasn’t even reached Pseudo-God now. Lambost, let’s put aside all the reasonings for now. You were also there at Town Lupin at the time. Hemos was killed by him, and countless dark elementals died in his hands. What would you do if it were the water elementals?”

“The life and death of elementals is nothing more than the conversion of energy. Creation comes from elements, and annihilation is returning to elements. If water elementals die, I will choose the most important matter such as the Elemental Covenant and… the origin fragment?”

Hegel was shocked when he mentioned the origin fragment.

Lambost gave a strange smile. The crown on top of his head began to emit a magnificent brilliance, “Have you not noticed yet, Hegel? Or you dare not confirm? In the battle just now, why could I easily overwhelm you? In fact, I still haven’t completely comprehended the power of the origin fragment.”

Hegel’s eyes were blazing red as he stared at the Crown of Wave above Lambost’s head. The flow of breath became intense, “Origin fragment of water element! Where did you get it! I remember you didn’t…”

“Yes, it was not there when you came some time ago.” Lambost smiled and glanced over at Moore and Chen Rui, “To be precise, before Moore and he arrived, I was still desperately searching for it.”

Hegel immediately reacted and looked at Moore. Moore shook his head and looked at Chen Rui. The Dark Elemental King’s bloody eyes suddenly became wider intertwined with surprise and realization. I finally understood why Lambost sided with “Aguile”. “Aguile” actually found the origin fragment of the water element and gave it to Lambost!

Moore’s calm voice sounded, “I encountered a powerful enemy and fought hard for hundreds of years. The earth elementals were almost killed and wounded. 3 years ago, Aguile appeared and helped me kill the strong enemy which saved the entire earth elementals. At that time, my elemental heart shattered. Aguile found Earth Source and requiem fruit and repaired my elemental heart within 1 year. Otherwise, I would have been annihilated and I don’t know when I will be born again. Although the elemental heart was repaired, the power that was damaged for hundreds of years could not be restored in a short time. Aguile found Fertile Yuan Soil which gave the entire earth elementals of the Earth Realm a new lease of life, so I was able to recover to the strength of the peak stage Demon Overlord in such a short period of time. Furthermore, the Fertile Yuan Soil also allowed the creation of Demon Emperor-level elite elementals in the Earth Realm.”

Moore’s words seemed to explain the friendship with Aguile, but Hegel heard the underlying meaning: Besides a strong inheritance, “Aguile” also has another strong thing that is luck.

Don’t underestimate this “attribute”. When one’s strength reached a certain level, luck was a very important factor. Whether it was Earth Source, requiem fruit or Fertile Yuan Soil, they were all extremely rare treasures. Aguile had an outstanding luck to be able to get these wanted items in a short time even if it was accidental.

“By the way, keep in mind that when I saw him 3 years ago, his strength was still at the Higher Demon.” Moore added calmly, shocking the Dark Elemental King and the Water Elemental King again.

Both Hegel and Lambost understood what Moore meant. In just 3 years, he reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor from Higher Demon. To be precise, his combat power is the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. What about another 3 years? He has the Pseudo-God powerhouse’s inheritance and unbelievable luck. What kind of level will this person reach?

Should we choose to be an enemy with such a person?

Hegel finally began to think seriously. After a while, he spoke up, “I can stop pursuing the matter of Hemos and dark elementals, but I have 1 condition.”

“Please speak.” Chen Rui tried to control his extremely exhausted mind and asked.

“Come with me to the Black Sea to find the origin fragment of the dark element.” The Dark Elemental King showed a weird smile, “Don’t you have strong luck? If you can help me find the origin fragment, then I can also promise you 1 condition.”

“Black Sea?” Moore glanced at Lambost consultatively.

Lambost extended his hands, and everyone saw a 3D hologram in front of them. It was a black sea area with islands of different shapes. It seemed to be covered with mist which couldn’t be seen clearly.

“This is the Black Sea. Starting from the Deep Blue Island, it will take about a month to reach at the earliest. The Black Sea is filled with strange power which is extremely dangerous. The surrounding area is the estate of the naga tribe whose combat power is very outstanding, but it’s not the most dangerous. There are even more powerful existences lurking in it. Even water elementals don’t dare to get involved. Hegel, have you found any clues on this trip?”

“ Hmph! Why will I come back if I have a clue?” Hegel said quietly, “The power there is strange. My airship can’t enter at all from the air. If you go by water, it’s a maze. The sailors and the dark elementals who I brought along this time disappeared in the sea area.”

Moore frowned, “Since it’s so dangerous…”

“Okay, Dark Elemental King, I promise you.” Chen Rui looked at the familiar islands in Lambost’s simulant magic with an odd light flashing through his eyes.

Moore frowned more tightly, “I’ll go with you.”

“I’m afraid that won’t work, Moore.” The Water Elemental King interjected, “You have just merged with the earth imprint. You must stay in the Deep Blue Palace for 3 months to be fully integrated. You can’t go anywhere before that.”

Moore looked at Chen Rui and shook his head, “This sea area is too dangerous. We can think of another solution for that matter.”

“I’ve decided.” Chen Rui yawned, then he showed a confident smile, “However, if I can find the origin fragment of the dark elements this time, you have to promise me 2 conditions, Your Highness Hegel.”

Hegel sneered, “Although I don’t know where your strange confidence comes from, I can listen to your conditions first.”

“Compared with the origin fragment, these 2 conditions are easy for Your Highness Hegel. First, help me save a friend who is cursed with the [Light Annihilation Seal]. Second, give me a trace of dark source power.”

Hegel thought for a moment and nodded, “Yes.”

“So… just in case, I want to conclude an equality contract with you that does not harm each other.”

Hegel smiled disdainfully, “You want to use this cheap trick to escape my pursuit? I can promise that I will not attack you while you are looking for the origin fragment. As for the contract, you are not qualified yet.”

“Then swear by the elemental heart.”

Moore’s words ignited Hegel’s hostility. Lambost added leisurely, “For some reasons, I suddenly look forward to this trip to find the origin fragment.”

The words “origin fragment” made Hegel’s eyes gimmer in red. He sneered and finally swore with the elemental heart.

“Very well… When I wake up, we will set off.”

Chen Rui barely finished saying this sentence, and he could no longer control the intense fatigue. He just fell asleep while leaning on the seat.

TL: First, it’s the Dead Sea, now it’s the Black Sea. What is the power that can even stop the Elemental King from advancing?

chapters.title: Chapter 597: Black Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 597: Black Sea

Note: Here are 3 extra chapters for achieving patreon community goal. Chen Rui woke up after 3 days and found himself sleeping in the cabin of the Devil’s Snare Ship. Dodo was guarding the door. The ship was moored on the shore of the Deep Blue Island.

Chen Rui did not wake up the slime who was asleep. He set a star point in the ship cabin, then he activated the [Star Gate] to return to the Dark Moon.

Since the Dark Moon had a passage from the Rainbow Valley to the outskirts of the capital, he abandoned the star point of the capital and set it here. The star point could not move with the ship, which was equivalent to being set on the bank of the Deep Blue Island.

It was a quiet night in the Dark Moon. Chen Rui didn’t disturb everyone and went straight to the Rainbow Valley. As usual, Zola hadn’t slept yet and was experimenting overnight.

When Chen Rui appeared in front of Ms. Fairy Dragon, Zola’s eyes suddenly glowed with surprise. The water source power that appeared afterward almost dazzled Ms. Fairy Dragon’s purple eyes.

She initially thought that it would take many years to comprehend the origin power. The excitement in Ms. Fairy Dragon’s heart was overwhelming when she got these 2 items. A super long kiss almost suffocated the man who was caught off guard. Facing the rare affection of Ms. Fairy Dragon who was always calm and dazed, the man who had forgotten the sense of affection after the long journey of nearly a month unscrupulously gave up the idea of returning to the Deep Blue Island to “enjoy” Zola alone.

In the early morning, Chen Rui kissed goodbye to Zola, left the conjugal bed and returned to the Deep Blue Island.

According to Zola, the cooperation between the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire was very smooth. All the troops stationed at the border of the Dark Shadow Empire had withdrawn. 2 new trade routes were opened to strengthen the business exchanges between both sides. With Shea’s vigorous promotion, the millet wine, magic television, and newspapers became popular throughout the empire. Based on the cooperation between the 2 empires, they would soon become popular throughout the Demon Realm.

For the Fallen Angel Empire, the ruling of the new empress was quickly stabilized in the fastest time. Mishan Family’s elder Baroco was killed by Sarandi and Salgar at the Tekula Fortress. Catherine also ordered the arrest of the accomplices who fled to the Dark Shadow Empire to be deported back to the Fallen Angel Empire. The remnant soldiers of Obsidian’s crusade against the Dark Moon had returned and reorganized into an army. Demon Overlord Faravit and the others of the elder families, who originally intended to suppress the empress’ imperial power, had sworn allegiance to Shea under the irresistible trend.

The turbulent situation of the Fallen Angel Empire finally settled down.

Back at the Deep Blue Island, Chen Rui embarked on a voyage to the Black Sea about a few hours later to find the origin fragment of the dark element. In fact, the reason why Chen Rui happily agreed to the Dark Elemental King was because the island in the Black Sea where the Dark Elemental King was going coincided with the scene shown in the treasure map!

Regardless of whether the origin fragment of the dark element is related to the treasure of the legendary Dark Dragon Emperor, the chance to enter the Black Sea should be quite big with the treasure map. The treasure is secondary. As long as I enter the Black Sea with the Dark Elemental King to find the origin fragment, Isabella can be saved.

In addition to the original sandmen on the Devil’s Snare Ship, there were 10 more water elementals sent by Lambost to assist in the sailing. Hegel did not board the same ship. He was still riding high above the airship, proudly looking down at the Devil’s Snare Ship.

Earth Elemental King handed over the command of the sandmen to Chen Rui. He also gave him a piece of sandstone essence just in case. It could revive the sandmen 3 times.

During the previous voyage, Chen Rui learned a lot of relevant navigation knowledge from Moore. At the same time, he learned about the many magic facilities and functions of this ship gifted by Tetenis.

But it was his first time to be the “captain” of this ship. Fortunately, he had [Analytical Eyes], so it was not a problem to communicate with the sandmen or the water elementals. These sailors were very obedient to his orders. After trying for a while, Chen Rui’s courage gradually grew. He became more and more familiar with the command, and it seemed promising.

The slime, who had the intent to please his master, transformed a sailor hat on his head and began to command the sailors loudly like he was the second-in-command on the ship. But these were just the slime’s one-man show. Both the sandmen and the water elementals turned a deaf ear to the slime’s yelling as they carried on with their work.

Day by day, with the proficient sailing skills of the sandmen coupled with the navigation and assistance of the water elementals, they gradually approached the destination Black Sea without encountering many obstacles along the way.

“Captain, we have entered the edge of the Black Sea.” A pathfinder water elemental reported, “This area belongs to the danger zone. The front is the outermost Thunder Snake Archipelago which belonged to the naga tribe’s estate. After the Thunder Snake Archipelago is a large island called the Hidden Misty Island. After that, there is a large area shrouded in a strange mist. The deeper we go, the more unknown dangers there are. Royal Highness Lambost personally went to the Hidden Misty Island to explore the area before, but he finally returned without success. He ordered the water elementals not to approach this sea area easily.”

Chen Rui nodded and ordered the sandmen to stop advancing. He returned to the captain’s room. There was a crystal ball inside which could complete the automatic magic map detection and drawing just like a computer’s 3D software modeling. However, this detection was limited by the distance, so the range couldn’t be too far. Only the image of the outer edge of the Thunder Snake Archipelago could be seen vaguely.

Chen Rui recalled the Black Sea’s hologram simulated by the Water Elemental King’s magic, and he compared the current map. He took out the ancient treasure map.

The sensible Dodo on the side immediately turned into a helmet. The front of the helmet was embedded with the glasses that was a transformation of the “infatuation ring”. This was the slime’s new trick. It was more conducive for Chen Rui to observe the map as it would not lose the label of the treasure location because of the dissipation of the Dragon Power Essence.

However, wearing this weird helmet with “sunglasses”, Chen Rui inexplicably thought of a certain pilot that transformed into a pig as designed by Miyazaki Hayao.

After putting on the Dodo helmet, the treasure map of the vast ocean immediately changed, and the area with the treasures appeared. After comparison, it was exactly the same as the Black Sea. Besides a vaguely gold light spot hidden in the mist, additional changes had taken place. There was an extra red light spot which should be Chen Rui’s current location. The islands on the outer edge of the picture began to become clearer like a “lighted up” map.

Chen Rui nodded. As soon as he walked out of the captain room, he saw a figure on the deck. It was the elite dark elemental, Helor, whom he had fought against in Town Lupin.

Helor’s blood-red eyes stared at Chen Rui coldly as he said, “Royal Highness Hegel will wait for you at the Hidden Misty Island in front. If you can’t reach it within 8 days, then Royal Highness will think that you have no ability to move forward with him. Royal Highness also has a sentence to convey to you, ‘I’m waiting to see your so-called luck’.”

After Helor finished speaking, he turned into a cloud of black smoke and floated toward the airship in the sky.

If it hadn’t been for Bridget tearing the [Scorching Dragon Kill] that day, Helor would have died in the hands of Chen Rui. In that battle, the other 2 elite dark elementals Hesak and Hemos were seriously injured and died respectively. Helor had a grudge against Chen Rui. However, after witnessing Chen Rui resisting the 3 kings on the airship on the Deep Blue Island, Helor was shocked. He knew that he could no longer contend with this former enemy.

The Thunder Snake Archipelago area in front contained many dangers, and it was also the estate of the nagas. The nagas were extremely aggressive. Helor hoped that Chen Rui would die in the hands of nagas which also Hegel’s wish. Passing the Thunder Snake Archipelago safely was considered a test of the Dark Elemental King.

Chen Rui frowned and asked the water elementals on the side, “Lambor, how long will it take from here to Hidden Misty Island via the Thunder Snake Archipelago?”

“About 3 days if there are no obstacles on the road.” Lambor replied respectfully, “In fact, Royal Highness Hegel will also encounter many dangers in the air. The air currents in this sea area are everchanging and strong. There are also many powerful flying sea beasts. It will probably take them 5 days at the earliest to reach the Hidden Misty Island.”

Chen Rui nodded. At this moment, it is impossible to back out. I can only move forward.

The airship in the air had begun to move forward at full speed. It turned into a small black spot and quickly disappeared into the clouds. The Devil’s Snare Ship below sailed at full speed in the direction of the Thunder Snake Archipelago while braving the wind and waves.

They could already see the nearest island faintly in front. Plenty of nagas lived in the Thunder Snake Archipelago. If Chen Rui brought the sirens on this trip, he might also come to the island to make contact with the nagas. However, the purpose this time was not phantom coral, but the origin fragment of the dark element, so he naturally did not want to see those powerful female creatures with many arms.

After going deep into the Black Sea, the map of the treasure map changed again. All the nearby islands were “lighted up”, and it can be rotated or zoomed through the mind. Even the topography of the island appeared very clear.

At this moment, strange undulations began to appear on the surface of the water. The ship swayed drastically. Chen Rui, who was observing the island and the map at the head of the ship, suddenly had an ominous hunch in his heart. At the same time, his [Analytical Eyes] quickly sensed some abnormal data below. He immediately shouted, “Left full rudder! Quick!”

The sandmen at the helm immediately executed the captain’s order. Just as the ship turned around, a huge thing burst out of the waves. The waves splashed onto the deck. The thing dived into the bottom of the sea again after failing the first attack.

The surrounding sea became undulating and turbulent. The ship began to waver. Dodo attached to Chen Rui’s shoulder nervously while looking at the turbulent sea in horror.

“Activate crystal stone and speed up! Get out of here!”

Before this order was executed, a muffled sound was heard from the bottom of the ship like it had been hit hard. The sailors on the deck staggered. Fortunately, the Devil’s Snare Ship was unusually strong, so it was not damaged. The sandmen hurriedly activated their talent to stick their feet to the deck. The water elementals transformed into a pool of water, flowing on the deck. Soon, they returned to an undamaged human form.

“ Whoosh! ” A huge thing on the right burst out again. This time Chen Rui clearly saw what it looked like: A huge sea snake!

The diameter alone is about 2 meters. The exposed body is about 10 meters. It is at least 20 meters in length. Chen Rui teleported above the sea snake in an instant. He slashed across the distance as the light of [Aura Blade] in his hand lit up. The blade made a 10-meter-long wave mark on the sea surface, but it only scratched the edge of the sea snake’s body.

The speed value of the huge sea snake was only A-, but its flexibility in the water could not be reflected in a simple value. The power of the water flow greatly weakened Chen Rui’s attack. In contrast, it was the best cover for the sea snake.

In the [Analytical Eyes], its Comprehensive Strength Assessment had reached A. A sea beast of Demon Emperor level!

Moreover, there is more than one!

TL: Sea snake? Can Chen Rui communicate with [Analytical Eyes] or he has to fight to the death with them?

chapters.title: Chapter 598: Nagas
chapters.body:
Chapter 598: Nagas

The sea began to tumble, and the Devil’s Snare Ship kept tumbling and tilting. If it weren’t for the special device, the ship would have sunk. Those huge sea snakes appeared from time to time to attack the ship and the sailors. The water arrows or ice bombs of the water elementals could not penetrate their smooth and tough skin. Instead, 2 water elementals were eaten.

Chen Rui was a step late in the rescue. In the midst of panic and anger, he soared into the air and swung the [Aura Blade] with all his strength. The sea snake’s neck happened to tilt and was cut into half of its flesh. It screamed in pain and plunged into the water again.

The sea snake who had suffered damage was even more cunning. It relied on its superiority in the water to continuously hit and toss the ship. Even if the Devil’s Snare Ship had a solid texture, it couldn’t withstand the attack for a long time. Many parts had begun to send out warnings. There was a danger of collapse if this continued.

“Activate the icebreaker and emergency thruster!” Chen Rui yelled as the nearby sea began to freeze unbelievably quickly.

The turbulent sea water froze at a speed visible to the naked eyes. The movement of the sea snakes emerging from the waves slowed down. As a sea snake was about to jump out, half of its body stiffened. Chen Rui teleported to the front in an instant to cut its head off.

Instead of blood overflowing, a large amount of blood in the cut wound was sucked into the broken limb strangely. It gradually solidified and froze.

The water elementals on the Devil’s Snare Ship were the most sensitive to the water element power. They instinctively felt that this freezing power was not the power of pure water elementals, but a kind of chill that penetrated into the soul of life from inside to outside with a horrifying destructive breath.

Although the water elementals were not the targets of the chill, they still couldn’t help but shudder.

The sandmen faithfully executed the order. The tail of the Devil’s Snare Ship blasted blue flames, and the entire sail was expanded to its limit. The ship glowed with light blue light as it hurried to the nearby island.

The movement of the sea snakes behind had become extremely slow. Their entire bodies and souls were all stunned by the cold. They were temporarily unable to pursue the Devil’s Snare Ship. Their frozen parts in the sea made a continuous burst of sound and gradually began to dissolve. At this time, the sea water showed a pool of red color. The severed limbs floated on the surface of the water, and the bloody smell gradually spread out.

This was the [Winter Territory] that Chen Rui realized without the help of the Super System. Even the huge sea snakes that dived into the water couldn’t escape the power of destruction that went deep into the soul.

There was an irregular churning in the sea ahead. It seemed that a large number of sea snakes rushed toward their side at an extremely fast speed.

Chen Rui thought that the Devil’s Snare Ship would definitely be unstoppable in this environment. He immediately activated [Sonic Boom] and caught up with the Devil’s Snare Ship. He issued an order loudly, “Right rudder 18. Get ashore at full speed!”

Although he avoided the nagas on the Thunder Snake Archipelago, it was impossible not to dock at the shore with the current emergency situation.

The Devil’s Snare Ship turned to the right and sailed quickly to the nearest island. The sea snakes coming from behind smelled the blood of their companions, and they came surging at a startling speed.

According to this acceleration calculation, I’m afraid that Devil’s Snare Ship will be surrounded before it gets to the shore. Chen Rui’s figure turned around in the air, then he flew in the direction of the sea snakes. He landed on a rock that was about 5 meters wide.

When Chen Rui stretched his hands, a huge light ball spurted out continuously at the direction of the sea snakes. The [Aurora Shot] directly “dived” into the sea and burst due to some kind of pressure. It splashed out a water pillar that was more than 10 meters high. Chen Rui’s mind shifted. He continuously launched [Aurora Shots], and the bursting water pillar suddenly became blood-red. Those with weaker power were blown into several segments.

The attack and massacre attracted the attention of the sea snakes. They rushed toward the reef. Chen Rui did not fly away from the reef, but he quietly watched the undulating and rolling waves approaching.

“ Boom! ” The surface of the water almost exploded apart. A meandering and huge body burst out of the waves, and it rushed straight to Chen Rui. He could already clearly see the hideous appearance and extremely sharp teeth.

The sea snake’s movements were extremely swift and violent, but the moment the body jumped out of the water, it suddenly became slow. The black and green skin lost its luster. It seemed to have aged countless times in an instant. Not only for this sea snake, but also for the 2 snakes rushing out from behind. Before the sea snake dived into the water, a faint purple sword light flashed, cutting off the big head. The giant body twisted and fell to the surface of the sea after the decapitation. The blood spread quickly in sea. As for the other 2 sea snakes, one was beheaded while the other was wounded and dived into the sea.

The blood of the companions made the sea snakes become more ferocious. In an instant, several huge bodies burst out of the water and attacked in a roar like there was a giant monster with multiple heads at the bottom of the sea.

Chen Rui activated [Autumn Territory] with all his strength. He clenched his left hand and bombarded the enemy with multiple waves. The “sharp” feature of the Northsea Sword in his right hand was brought into full play. He successively killed several huge sea snakes, and the blood stained the nearby sea into red color.

The sea snakes’ offense was even more frantic. Chen Rui finally began to be overwhelmed. With the protective shields on his body, he fell into a passive position. He could kill all these sea snakes if he went all out, but the purpose of this trip was not this. He was just entering the Black Sea now, and there were many dangers behind. Skills like [Royal Star Transformation] were definitely not suitable for use at present as the aftereffect was too strong.

The cracks of the blue shield gradually increased. Then, the rock beneath his feet was empty. It turned out that the reef was shattered from the bottom by the sea snakes. When Chen Rui saw the Devil’s Snare Ship approaching the shore, his body teleported, and he appeared in the sky instantly. The infuriated sea snakes roared out of the water, but they couldn’t reach the target.

Chen Rui did not continue to attack. He quickly flew toward the island where the ship was docked.

The sea snakes immediately kept pursuing. The sandmen and the earth elementals had already quickly disembarked after landing as Chen Rui ordered. In the previous battle, Dodo was frightened by the sea snakes. He formed 2 hands to cover his own mouth tightly, lest he attracts the attention of the sea snakes.

When Chen Rui moved past the Devil’s Snare Ship, he quickly used the storage warehouse. The entire ship disappeared out of thin air, then he took Dodo and sailors into the valley beside the shore at the fastest speed.

The sea snakes that couldn’t catch up wandered furiously along the shore; they couldn’t wait to revenge when the enemy came out. Chen Rui, who witnessed all of this on the cliff, knew that he could no longer sail on this road. He immediately led everyone to move forward.

This island was very large and the terrain was complex. Items such as magic map or magic compass were basically unusable due to the interference by some kind of foreign force. They could only move forward by relying on a special sensing of the water elementals. This is only the outer edge of the Thunder Snake Archipelago. According to this schedule, I’m afraid it will be more difficult to reach the Hidden Misty Island within the time set by the Dark Elemental King.

Chen Rui ordered them to have a rest as they walked to a forest. Dodo, who had been hungry and thirsty for a long time, immediately slumped down and lay on the ground and gasped. The power of the sandmen and water elementals was also weakened a lot. The water element in the sea area was abundant, so the water elementals could automatically absorb the power of the water element to replenish their energy. Meanwhile, the sandmen could search for sand and gravel to replenish the defects and exhaustion on their bodies.

Due to the lack of appetite caused by seasickness, Dodo’s favorite foods in the past such as barbecued meat already tasted like chewing wax. Perhaps only fresh plants could increase his appetite. The slime sneaked away while the master asked the water elementals about the situation of the islands nearby.

In this dense forest. There were many novel plants which were not even in the memory of the slime who was a “plant delicacy enthusiast”. Dodo’s onion face suddenly had a long nose like Pinocchio in Chen Rui’s story. He was sniffing while foraging.

After enjoying 2 lush vines and a big yellow round fruit, the slime’s appetite increased. His previous anorexia was gone. His long nose twitched as he smelled a tempting scent again. After searching along the scent, he saw a fist-sized red fruit which resembled a strawberry growing in a bush.

The salivating slime immediately jumped toward the red fruit and swallowed it in one bite. The taste was indescribable. After eating more than 10 of them, he felt dizzy. His body was uncontrollable as if he drank some kind of strong alcoholic drink.

Just when Dodo staggered back in a drunken state, he suddenly bumped into something. The drunk slime screamed, “Who dares to stop Master Dodo’s way!”

This tone was quite similar to Paglio and Roman’s arrogance, but a cold murderous aura instantly locked the slime. Master Dodo shivered suddenly and was partly sober. His mouth opened wide agape when he saw a tall body in front of him.

After looking up to see the appearance of this body, Master Dodo’s mouth exaggeratedly widened two-thirds of his face. The next second, a piercing scream came out.

Dodo’s scream immediately caught Chen Rui’s attention. He was about to look in the direction of the call, but he stopped abruptly and showed a vigilant expression. He ordered the sandmen and the water elementals to gather together.

Soon, there was a rustling sound from the woods; a figure appeared in the line of sight.

This creature was about 2 meters tall with long green hair and a beautiful appearance. The upper body had obvious female characteristics. The towering chest was tightly wrapped by 2 simple golden scale armors, and the lower body was a maroon snake body covered with fine scales. What was even more surprising was that she had 6 arms, each of which held a long scimitar.

The nagas!

On the outermost island of the Thunder Snake Archipelago, I still couldn’t avoid the naga tribe!

Chen Rui’s eyes showed a high degree of vigilance. This nagas actually had S level comprehensive strength in [Analytical Eyes], and the value was quite close to S+. She exuded a violent fighting intent as she firmly locked her gaze on him. She did not put her guard down at all because he appeared to be the strength of the peak stage Demon Emperor.

The naga began to move, squirming in unhurriedly. Chen Rui’s current eyesight was no longer what it used to be. He noticed that the naga’s posture of holding the scimitars while on the move was almost impeccable. She could issue a thunderous horrible blow at any time.

In the dense forest behind, the rustling sounds sounded one after another. One after another terrifying figures appeared. Besides a few 6-armed ones, most of them had 4 arms.

The leader of this group of nagas was obviously the one moving forward in front of him. Chen Rui thought about it, saluted to the leader, and said in the common language, “Please forgive my friends and I for breaking into the naga estate, but we have no hostile intent. We are willing to make friendship and efforts to become friends of the naga tribe.”

The naga stopped 4-5 meters in front of Chen Rui and spoke up coldly, “I will give you 2 choices. First, resist and die now; second, give up resistance and die in 2 days!”

TL: Will Chen Rui find another way to resolve this crisis? Meanwhile, Dodo is just doing Dodos thing😆…

chapters.title: Chapter 599: Scimitar And Harp
chapters.body:
Chapter 599: Scimitar And Harp

Nagas did not have the snake hair and snake eyes like the medusas. Its appearance was no different from humans or demons. This naga had a gorgeous appearance with a vigorous heroic vibe between the brows. Her slightly tanned skin was flawless, and her slightly deep voice was quite sexy. If one did not look at the part below the 6 arms and belly button, she should be a seductive beauty.

It was just that no one would associate the word “seductive” with her now because the 2 choices she gave Chen Rui had only 1 result, death!

“I’m the young tribe chief of the naga tribe and the leader of White Tower Front Camp, Strena. Now I will give you the last minute to think. Otherwise, you will choose the first choice by default.” Strena said with a strong murderous aura. Moore once said the nagas were a very powerful tribe with inherent fighting instincts which were far better than ordinary tribes or demonic beasts. Their melee combat ability was particularly terrifying. This Strena was definitely a strong enemy.

At the back, naga figures emerged one after another, surrounding the entire forest. In addition to Strena, there was at least 1 early stage of the Demon Overlord and more than 10 Demon Emperors. The rest were at least the peak stage Demon King.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked in his mind. A young tribe chief has such power. These nagas are obviously only part of the entire naga tribe. No wonder the siren tribe can barely capture a small part of the phantom coral to survive despite uniting with the harpy witches. This does not mean that I will wait to be captured, but my peak stage of the Demon Emperor power is definitely unable to withstand the enemy. If I use the [Royal Star Transformation] to launch an attack with full force, even if I can’t kill all the nagas, at least I can break through the siege. The sandmen can be resurrected, but the water elementals will definitely not survive. Not to mention that water elementals are my sailors, without the water elementals’ navigation, the sandmen definitely can’t reach the Hidden Misty Island within the time limit of Hegel in this misty Black Sea.

I will fall into a deep sleep after [Royal Star Transformation], so it should not be activated until the last moment.

Chen Rui took a deep breath. He secretly gathered power and asked, “Ms. Strena, I want to ask 1 last thing before making a choice. What is the difference between dying 2 days later and dying now?”

Strena looked at this unexpectedly calm enemy and replied coldly, “The naga tribe will hold a sea sacrifice in the Hidden Misty Sea 2 days later. At that time, you will be sacrificed to the Black Sea God.”

The Hidden Misty Sea? Black Sea God? Nagas’ sea sacrifice? Chen Rui immediately thought of the first stop, Hidden Misty Island, that he was going to this time. His thoughts began to turn sharply.

“Or… if you are lucky, you might survive the sea sacrifice.” Strena added. A strange look flashed across her green eyes, and she seemed a little distracted. Chen Rui’s spirit power noticed this subtle change immediately. If I want to make a move, now should be the best time.

At this moment, Dodo’s cry came from the group of nagas, “Master! Help!”

Strena’s eyes flashed, and she restored her composure in an instant. When the 6 arms holding the scimitars slightly changed a posture, Chen Rui could clearly feel in the spirit power summary that his various positions had been locked by the 6 scimitars at the same time. As long as he moved rashly, he would definitely suffer a terrifying attack.

“Time is up! Intruder, tell me your choice.”

Chen Rui frowned as he looked at the sandmen and water elementals again. Finally, he made up his mind and tentatively asked, “Can I exchange some precious treasures for the lives of my companions and I?”

“The most valuable thing is your life.” Strena sneered with an intense murderous aura, “Don’t talk nonsense. Delaying time will only speed up your death.”

“Madam Strena, please listen to me first. In exchange for my life, I will naturally not be stingy with anything other than life such as the most precious… devil fruit in the legend? Maybe it can bring unexpected surprises to madam.”

“Devil fruit?” Strena’s green eyes shined which seemed like an unusual excitement. The bloodline memory told her that the devil fruit was a rare fruit in the legend which could not only increase power, but it could also greatly enhance one’s potential. There was even an extremely slim chance to get additional special abilities.

“Yes, it is the devil fruit.” A red fruit that was faintly glowing appeared in Chen Rui’s hand.

Strena’s spirit power was very powerful. She could sense the special breath that this fruit emitted. She trembled a little. When she was about to step forward, the fruit disappeared in Chen Rui’s palm.

“Forgive me, this is just a little trick of space magic.” Chen Rui showed firmness, “As long as madam let my companions and I go, this devil fruit will be madam’s. Otherwise, it will accompany me to death.”

Strena stared at Chen Rui for a moment, then she slowly nodded, “If it can really have the effect as per the legend, I can swear by the golden tent of the naga tribe to let you go safely. Before that, you must go to the Thunder Snake Island with me first to see someone.”

As he said, Strena beckoned to the back. Several nagas came up with some shackles, “This is a blue charm shackle made of blue star heavy water and phantom coral reef. It can restrain power and magic. Let me warn you, don’t try to do any futile struggle.”

Blue star heavy water? It seems to be the material needed for the assemble puppet in the ancient alchemy civilization right? Chen Rui was slightly startled, but it was obviously not the time to pay attention to this. Under his sign, neither the sandmen nor the water elementals resisted the restraint of the shackles.

Dodo, who was the first captive, was kept in a cage that seemed to be specially made. He looked weakened. It seemed like he had suffered a lot. Chen Rui and others were escorted by Strena’s team through the woods and came to a hillside with several huge white stone houses. There were dozens of nagas patrolling and guarding. There was also a tall lookout tower on the top of the hill opposite. This should be a lookout point for nagas at the outer edge of Thunder Snake Archipelago.

“Madam Strena, you are back.” A naga leader of the early stage of the Demon Overlord folded her hands on her chest and bowed.

“Metty, prepare the ship immediately. I will personally escort these captives to the Thunder Snake Island to meet the madam tribe chief.”

Metty frowned slightly, “Madam Strena, please forgive me. The Chief has specially ordered that you can’t leave here without her order.”

There was a chill in Strena’s green eyes. 6 scimitars suddenly appeared in her hands as her voice became colder, “I’m the highest leader of the White Tower Front Camp, I will say it again, prepare a ship now.”

Metty felt that she was shrouded by a terrifying killing intent which was definitely not a pretense. She was taken aback. Her body wriggled a few steps backward, “No, Madam Strena! Chief, she…”

Before she finished speaking, the light of the scimitars flashed and immediately disappeared. Metty still stood there. Her forehead was already full of cold sweat. Chen Rui at the back, whose spirit power had reached S+, could clearly sense that Strena already made 54 slashes in that brief moment. According to the strength of Demon Overlord level, it was not very fast, but Strena’s 54 slashes were all on the eyelashes of Metty’s left eye. She cut just 54 eyelashes; no more, no less.

This was not a performance, but a real attack. Metty almost had no time to react, and Strena could control the power to such a subtle level while swinging the scimitars at high speed. “Doing as pleased” was insufficient to describe this kind of terrifying blade skills.

[6 Wield]. This was exactly the naga tribe’s blade skills that had gone deep into the bloodline. It was incisively manifested by the naga young tribe chief.

Chen Rui secretly thought that if he faced this blow, perhaps it would still be difficult to withstand even if he activated the [Royal Star Transformation]. It is really a tribe with marvelous melee combat ability.

“Give me the Thunder Light Ship!” Strena shouted.

On the surface, Metty’s strength level was only a small realm lower than Strena, but she was trembling because of the terrifying momentum. After hesitating for a moment, she finally took out a coconut-sized transparent ball with a miniature purple sail ship inside.

A scimitar in Strena’s hand disappeared instantly. After receiving the ball, Metty felt the murderous aura that was locking her gradually faded. She secretly heaved a sigh of relief and did not dare to say another word.

“Kate, Judy, you guys come with me with your teams!”

Strena called more than a dozen nagas. Upon glancing at Metty who bowed her head in silence, she blurted a sentence, “I will explain to the tribe chief”. Then, she brought Chen Rui and others to the back of the lookout tower without looking back.

This scene made Chen Rui feel a little strange. Could it be that the young tribe chief is sanctioned or suspected by the tribe chief? Or is there any special struggle amongst the nagas? If there is something strange, then the emergence of the devil fruit is just a hot potato . This better not be self-defeating later.

After a few hours, they came to the shore on the other side of the island.

Strena threw the ball into the water, and the ball burst like a soap bubble. A large purple ship with a strange appearance appeared in front of him which was exactly the same as the previous “model”.

When everyone boarded the ship, the nagas began to set sail. According to Strena, the destination this time was the Thunder Snake Island, the core of Thunder Snake Archipelago, which was also the core base of the naga tribe. The strange thing was that this “Thunder Light Ship” seemed to have a strange breath. Although there were many huge sea snakes along the way, it did not attack the nagas.

At the request of Chen Rui, he and his servant were kept in a cell alone. The blue charm shackles did not have much effect on Dodo, but the cunning and timid slime was afraid of the power of the nagas, so he pretended to be restrained and stayed in it obediently.

After the guards left, Chen Rui asked Dodo to slip out. He took out the glasses transformed from the Purple Flame Heart ring and began to observe the treasure map. Sure enough, he saw that the light spot representing his position had moved a little more toward the center. The sea and islands on the way had “lighted up”. When he used his mind to zoom in, he could even see some specific scenes and situations just like the satellite map in his previous life. Moreover, it was even active. (Real time monitoring?)

The places that had not been explored or reached were still blurry. He could only see a rough appearance. This alone made this treasure map mystical.

After a day and a night, the Thunder Light Ship finally stopped.

The captives such as Chen Rui were escorted ashore. This was a huge island which was dozens of times larger than the island where the White Tower Front Camp was located.

Along the way, he could see a lot of nagas. Seeing Strena saluting, it should be Thunder Snake Island where the nagas lair was located.

“You, come with me!” Strena ordered Chen Rui.

Chen Rui thought quickly, “Are we going to meet your chief?”

“You don’t need to know.” Strena replied coldly, “You only need to know that if the devil fruit is fake or does not have the legendary effect, then you and your people will become the sacrifice of tomorrow’s sea sacrifice.”

Chen Rui didn’t ask much. He obediently followed Strena forward, turning here and there before coming to a secluded valley. There was a white hut in the valley with various flowers planted nearby, exuding a fragrance that was completely different from that of the sea breeze.

This does not seem to be the location of the naga tribe chief. Who is living here?

When they were approaching the hut, there was a sudden sound of a harp inside.

Yes, it was a harp sound . After Chen Rui was stunned for a while, he immediately realized that it was not his own illusion.

Strena reached out to stop him and motioned him to stop walking so as not to interfere with the sound of the harp.

Chen Rui stopped and listened together with Strena. Chen Rui noticed that Strena’s overbearing and determined face actually showed a rare gentleness along the way. The sound of the harp was very melodious. He could hear that the performer was quite qualified, but because the performer was affected by a certain mood, it was difficult to sustain the original calm and quiet mood.

At this moment, a crisp instrument sounded. The sound of the harp was led by the instrument sound and became smooth again. Previously, the harp was matched by the sound of the instrument. Later, the harp sound was gradually led by the rhythm of the instrument sound.

After a long while, the sound of the performance gradually ceased. Strena glared at Chen Rui fiercely. Chen Rui put away the Quqin in his hand and shrugged his shoulders with an innocent look on his face.

“Is it sister? Did you bring a special guest?” The voice of a girl in the room sounded.

“I’m back, Adeline.” Strena’s voice became unusually soft. She entered with Chen Rui.

Although there were not many furnishings in the room, they were all exquisite. One could see that it took a lot of effort. The most eye-catching was a naga girl with blue hair and a fresh and beautiful face. She only had 2 arms. There was a golden harp in front of her. It was this harp that played a wonderful piece of music just now.

Chen Rui noticed that the girl’s beautiful blue eyes looked dim and dull as if she could not see.

Strena came to the girl and hugged her lightly, “Adeline! I have good news to tell you. I brought back a person this time. This person has the legendary devil fruit. Just eat it. It can radically improve your power, and your physique will also change!”

Adeline was silent for a moment, and she shook her head slightly, “Sister, it’s okay, thank you.”

“Adeline, there is real hope this time! This person…”

Adeline sighed, “Madam Mother has announced in public that I will be the sacrifice of this batch to the Black Sea God.”

Strena’s face changed drastically, “What? Didn’t I find many sacrifices? Why did she do this! Don’t worry, I will go to her now. No one can force you with me around!”

“No, no one forced me. I did it voluntarily. Moreover, it is too late because I have accepted the main sacrifice imprint.” Adeline’s words were like a bolt from the blue. Strena was shocked; she suddenly froze in place.

TL: A sacrifice imprint? Can Chen Rui help with this? Who is the Black Sea God?

chapters.title: Chapter 600: Sisters, Mother And Daughter
chapters.body:
Chapter 600: Sisters, Mother And Daughter

“Main … main sacrifice imprint!”

Strena murmured to herself, and she was dumbfounded for a moment. All of a sudden, she rushed out of the house. Everything along the way fell to the ground, and the door was knocked halfway down.

Immediately afterward, the entire valley shook, echoing Strena’s furious roar.

The girl moved to the door in panic, trying to catch up with her sister, but because she couldn’t see things, she tripped over something on the ground. Chen Rui frowned as he helped the naga girl, who was only a Higher Demon, to walk outside the door step by step.

More than half of the mountain slope in front had collapsed. The ground was full of exaggerated and criss-crossed deep trenches which seemed to be traces of slashes. Amidst the sand and gravel, the 6-armed figure roared up to the sky. Her shout was full of rage and sadness.

“Sister…” The girl’s body seemed to have lost the power to hold on. She could only rely on Chen Rui’s support to barely stand as tears slipped down from her dim blue eyes.

From the previous words and deeds, Chen Rui faintly guessed something which was completely different from the internal power struggle prediction that he had previously. Seeing that Strena was so sad and angry for her sister, he inexplicably thought of a sister in the palace.

Strena’s roar stopped abruptly. Her eyes turned to a figure that appeared in the valley. The figure’s majestic voice sounded, “Strena, shouldn’t you stay in the White Tower Island? Who allowed you to return to the Thunder Snake Island?”

This voice came from a tall naga who was wearing a black armor and a golden crown on her head. The face that should have been beautiful looked cold and stern, making people tremble with fear. It should be the naga tribe’s queen.

Race: Naga (mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+.

Physique: S+, Power: S+, Spirit: S, Speed: S+.

[Analysis]: Dangerous.

“Chief!” The girl Adeline quickly wiped away her tears and showed a respectful look. She folded her hands on her chest and bowed deeply.

“Mother!” Strena did not salute. She looked directly at Queen Naga and exclaimed emotionally, “Tell me! Why Adeline will be the main sacrifice of tomorrow’s sea sacrifice! Why do you have to personally send your daughter to death!”

“Strena! You should call me chief or Your Highness Modesty!” Queen Naga said coldly, “In fact, you already know the answer to your question! Survival of the fittest is the tradition of the naga tribe, not to mention that this is the dangerous Black Sea!”

Strena snarled fearlessly, “Are you going to watch Adeline being devoured by that monster! Isn’t she your biological daughter?”

“I have to follow this rule even more because she is my daughter!” Queen Naga glanced at Adeline sternly, “The fate of the naga tribe is in jeopardy. How can a naga, who has no talent for fighting and doesn’t even have the will to fight, protect herself? How can she fight? Use that ridiculous harp? She is destined to be eliminated!”

Strena yelled hysterically, “She doesn’t need to fight! I can protect her! You can too! Why aren’t you willing to do this! If you don’t even have the ability to protect your own daughter, how can you protect the people? You’re not worthy of being a mother! You’re not worthy to be our chief!”

Modesty’s face suddenly became gloomy. A terrifying aura quickly filled the entire valley, “It is not your place as a daughter to evaluate whether I’m worthy to be a mother. Without me, you wouldn’t even have life! As for the chief… Are you not the heir? According to tradition, the position of the chief is yours as long as you can beat me! At that time, I can’t control you even if you want to forgo the survival rule and destiny of the naga tribe to protect her!”

‘ Whoosh ’, Strena’s 6 arms had 6 long and narrow scimitars at the same time. Her powerful fighting spirit had surged to the apex in an instant as her angry eyes were tightly locked on Queen Naga.

“I will challenge you now!”

“Very good!” Modesty smiled coldly. She slowly pulled out 2 scimitars with her pair of hands in the front. “Let me see how far you have reached. Or let my scimitars tell you what stupidity and overestimating yourself is!”

Strena’s breath sore quickly. The snake’s body vibrated and appeared in front of Modesty almost instantly.

Chen Rui who was next to Adeline only saw the light of the scimitars in the sky. In the blink of an eye, Strena made at least 200 slashes. Not only the speed, but the high-speed flow of the scimitars turned into arcs, blocking Modesty in all directions as if the space was split. There were countless hidden moves in the arc. Unless Modesty stood still and withstand the attack, otherwise once she only moved, it would trigger a chain strangulation of all scimitars.

Facing the mother who had reached the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and was also the most powerful powerhouse in the tribe, Strena went all out and didn’t hold back her power.

Chen Rui was secretly palpitating as he watched the mysteriousness of the scimitar light. If he faced this blow, he could only use teleportation to escape the scimitar light range or withstand it with a protective shield before trying to counterattack.

In this “unmovable” situation, Modesty still moved unbelievably. Then, she slashed the left and right sides.

On the surface, she simply waved the scimitars in both hands, but in Chen Rui’s feeling, these 2 “simple” slashes contained profound rhythm. The seemingly impeccable scimitar light of Strena was like a neat and meticulous painting dipped in large swaths of ink. The entire conception, including the hidden moves, was destroyed. Not only that, this large swath of ink also forced the style of meticulous brushwork into a freehand brushwork against the object.

As the scimitar light flickered, those “arcs” broke apart one after another. Strena’s figure staggered backward as countless dense blood stains appeared on her body.

It was just 2 slashes.

This was not only a difference in power alone, but a huge gap in the realm. Both had scimitars and the martial skill talent of nagas, [6 Wield]. Strena had already thoroughly trained and tempered this kind of sword skill to its finest. It was like an object that she had produced countless times; she could clearly tell which part should be more or less with her eyes closed. However, in the hands of Modesty, [6 Wield] was more like a piece of artwork. Objects could be duplicated, but the artwork was unique.

Strena had mastered the ‘technique’ of [6 Wield] while Modesty had sublimated to the level of ‘principle’. It could be said that this Queen Naga was the strongest weapon master since Chen Rui came to this world. Of course, no matter how strong Modesty’s [6 Scimitars Wield] was, she couldn’t break through the category of Demon Overlord, nor could she truly compete with Supremo powerhouse who had kingdomized or even Demi-God powerhouse.

In the face of “power” with an absolute gap, no matter how subtle “technique” or “rule” is, it was in vain.

However, Queen Naga was still an insurmountable barrier for the current Strena.

“Unrealistic ambition! You haven’t mastered 2 scimitars yet, and you are going to use 6 scimitars?” Modesty looked at Strena contemptuously.

Strena yelled and pounced again.

“Have you lost even your calm? This kind of naive attack is simply worse than the child who just awakened the [6 Wield]!”

“Flaws! All flaws! Even if you work hard like this, you will only kill yourself first!”

“Flashy! Too many extra moves!”

“…”

In Queen Naga’s mocking sneer, Strena was knocked down again and again. She got up again and again, and was knocked down again…

Her golden armor was broken, and her body was covered with bloody scars; some were even deep into the bones. If it weren’t for the naga tribe’s extremely strong body, she would have been seriously injured and died. This was still under Modesty’s mercy.

Chen Rui could tell that even though the battle was very cruel, Queen Naga did not intend to kill Strena. It was more about feeding her with tricks. Many of the points pointed out were Strena’s key shortcomings. It was a pity that a certain naga sister was clouded by grief and rage. She was just thinking of how to defeat her mother. All those pointers became real mockery in her ears.

Although Adeline couldn’t see the battle, she could clearly hear everything that happened, but she didn’t speak to stop them. She just covered her mouth tightly in tears for fear that her crying might disturb Strena.

The girl knew her sister’s personality very well. Advising or crying would only make her elder sister more irrational.

Finally, the exhausted Strena fell to the ground and couldn’t get up anymore. She seemed to actually faint.

“You can’t even grasp the level of your strength, how can you grasp the naga tribe?” Queen Naga didn’t even look at the seriously injured daughter who fainted. She wriggled the snake body and came to Adeline. She looked at Chen Rui who was beside the girl with scrutiny.

After being scanned by the cold eyes, a chill came from Chen Rui’s back. He couldn’t help but shiver.

“Who are you? Why did you come here with Strena?”

Chen Rui quickly explained the fact that Strena agreed to exchange the devil fruit for the safety of him and his sailors. Queen Naga’s eyes flashed when she heard the words “devil fruit”. When she looked at Adeline, who was sobbing softly, she suddenly understood Strena’s intention.

“Demon, I believe you have seen it too, I will not show mercy to my daughter. If Strena is not the heir of the naga tribe and is related to the future of the whole tribe, I will execute her for just the offense alone.” Queen Naga said faintly, “Now hand over the devil fruit, otherwise I will kill you and your companions immediately.”

Chen Rui could hear that the ruthless queen could do what she said, so he did not hesitate to take out a devil fruit. Queen Naga took the fruit, smelled it, and her eyes lit up. Instead of taking it herself, she looked at Adeline, glanced at the harp lying on the ground in the house, pondered for a moment, and went toward the unconscious Strena.

Chen Rui clearly saw Modesty bent down and stuffed the fruit into Strena’s mouth. This action made Chen Rui feel strange.

“Dear Your Highness Queen Modesty, I have handed over the most important treasure, devil fruit. According to the prior agreement, I have the right to ask Your Highness to fulfill the promise. Please let my sailors and I go.”

A sullen smile appeared on Modesty’s face, “You have to be clear of 2 things. First, you and Strena may have an agreement, but it’s not with me. I just asked you to hand over the fruit. Second, it is useless even if I promised you because as a sacrifice for tomorrow’s sea sacrifice, you no longer have any power including the power to let me fulfill my promise. Guards! Take him down!”

2 naga warriors came forward from outside the valley and grabbed Chen Rui’s arms.

“Chief.” Adeline said, “Please allow me to have a few words with this demon.”

Modesty frowned slightly, “3 minutes.”

Adeline came to Chen Rui based on her feelings and bowed to him, “First of all thank you for the fruit, but… I’m sorry; I’m so sorry…”

Chen Rui saw the girl’s heartfelt sadness and guilt, and he did not blame her. He just said, “My name is Aguile.”

Adeline was a little surprised by Chen Rui’s calmness. She hesitated for a moment, and she said, “My name is Adeline. The music you played is very nice. Can you tell me what the name is?”

“Castle in the Sky”.

This was a piece that Chen Rui liked very much in his previous life. It was played by Master Hisaishi. He was bored at the sea these days. He took great effort to recall and practiced hard. It was also a small achievement. He wanted to give Isabella a surprise, but it made a debut here.

“Castle in the Sky… Is there really a castle floating in the sky?”

“Yes, as long as you have hope, it is in the air.” Chen Rui glanced at Queen Naga and shrugged, “There is a saying in my hometown that life can be taken away, but hope will always exist.”

“Hope?” Adeline nodded slightly, “Thank you…”

At this time, Modesty’s stern voice interrupted the conversation between the 2, “3 minutes is over! Demon, don’t waste your time. Even if you delude my daughter with flowery words, it is useless. She and you can’t escape the same fate! Ok, guards, take him away immediately! Put Strena in custody too!”

Chen Rui and the unconscious Strena were both taken away. Modesty turned around and walked for a few steps. With her back against Adeline, she suddenly added, “Adeline, the main sacrifice imprint cannot be removed… You should understand.”

“I understand, please tell sister not to be sad for me, chief. Everything is my will.” Adeline lowered her head and politely bowed to Modesty, “Also… take care, chief…”

Modesty stopped and turned her head slightly, “It’s the last time. You can call me Madam Mother…”

Adeline still kept her head down, keeping her salute posture. Her body trembled slightly, but she didn’t say a word.

Modesty’s lips moved as if to say something, but she didn’t say anything in the end. She turned and moved forward quickly.

At this time, the glittering tears that had been brimming in the eye sockets just slipped from the girl’s cheek with her head down, dripping into the ground and disappearing.

TL: 😰, can Chen Rui remove the imprint with his power? The Black Sea God is likely to be the target of this trip, will the Dark Elemental King help?

chapters.title: Chapter 601: Sea ​​Sacrifice
chapters.body:
Chapter 601: Sea ​​Sacrifice

Chen Rui wore the blue charm shackles and was taken to a dungeon by 2 naga warriors. To his surprise, in addition to the sandmen, water elementals, and some sea tribes, the dungeon actually also had dark elementals. Obviously, they were all the ‘sacrifice’ for tomorrow’s sea sacrifice.

I remember that the Water Elemental King once said that the Dark Elemental King Hegel sent the dark elementals to explore the Black Sea several times, but all of them disappeared and never survived. Therefore, they chose the air route in the end. I didn’t expect they were actually imprisoned by the nagas in the Thunder Snake Island.

Chen Rui didn’t break free from the shackles, but he just thought quietly. If it is just Strena and Adeline, I still have some ideas to handle them, but I can’t do anything when facing Queen Naga Modesty who could even abandon her biological daughter. This is the Thunder Snake Island which is the base camp of nagas that is tightly guarded. There are plenty of powerhouses.
