Mana was dead, so this meal could no longer be continued. These people in the church must be calmed first. Fatty City Lord offered a large sum of money to comfort and appease the church people while arranging manpower to clean up the scene.

However, unexpected changes happened again.

Eliza was listening casually to Fatty City Lord’s compliment when suddenly a strong crisis emerged. This feeling had no warning beforehand; it was entirely due to the battle instinct from repeated tempering. At this moment, Chen Rui’s voice sounded, “Ms. Eliza, watch your back!”

Behind Eliza was a short bodyguard who was clearing the bodies. However, it was this ordinary guard who suddenly exploded with a terrifying murderous intent the second after Chen Rui shouted.

No one would have thought that after the assassination, there would be a second assassination! In other words, the previous assassination was just a fake move, this blow was the real killing move!

The murderous intent target was Eliza!

In an instant, everyone felt that the entire sky seemed to turn into a sea of blood that was full of a massacre and death vibe. Everyone was affected by the terrifying pressure. They could hardly breathe and move. In contrast, the suppression of the [Dark Sky] just now was just a kid’s trick. This was just an aftereffect of the murderous intent!

With a terrifying will of death, a light stream swept toward the heart’s position on Eliza’s back at an indescribable speed. Eliza, who felt the threat of death, had her hair all over her body stood up. Her eyes were gleaming with silver light as a powerful spirit burst out. Eliza no longer hid any power at the critical moment of life and death.

Everyone around her was blown away by the powerful repulsive force except for the will of death.

The light stream only paused, then it cast a heavy blow to Eliza’s back. However, Eliza had already used this precious pause time to take advantage of the momentum to thrust forward which not only weakened the power of the blow, but she also dodged the vital parts.

Even so, Eliza still couldn’t completely avoid the blow. She spat out a mouthful of blood. A hole was actually penetrated in the ground.

After Eliza was struck, she twisted her body quickly and turned her palm into a knife. She threw her arm like a whip. The ‘guard’ assassin behind her did not manage to regain his stance. The left shoulder was slashed by the knife. The assassin immediately flew backward with a muffled sound.

A large fan-shaped crack appeared on the ground which had stretched for nearly 10 meters in an instant. Several tall pillars were shattered and collapsed by the intangible aftershock. The bodies of the guards who didn’t manage to dodge burst open. The power contained in the strike was evident.

After the assassin missed a blow, he seemed to know that it would be difficult to do more, so he decisively chose to retreat. By borrowing the power of Eliza’s blow, he fled into the darkness in a few blinks.

Eliza held her right chest with agony as she spat out another mouthful of blood. Her body shook a little, “Wesley, hurry up. Send me back to church and ask Paul to come and help me heal my injuries!”

The Light Knights quickly protected Eliza and returned to the church. Solanton and Chen Rui followed them with a bunch of friars, leaving only the Sir City Lord drenched in cold sweat standing there, feeling helpless for a while.

On the other side, a short and thin figure wearing a security guard uniform held onto his left shoulder and sprinted quickly in the night. Suddenly, the figure stopped and looked behind him vigilantly, but he found nothing unusual.

Just after the assassin turned his head, he was shocked to see that a figure had already been waiting in front. The figure’s face was blurry; only the pair of eyes were shining, exuding a faint destructive breath.

TL: Shura? Who is behind these assassinations?

chapters.title: Chapter 652: Female Assassin
chapters.body:
Chapter 652: Female Assassin

The assassin’s reaction was quick. Right after the shock, the light stream in his hand swept toward the figure swiftly.

This strike did not have the astonishing momentum of the previous sneak attack on Eliza, but it was more concise and effective, and its power was not inferior.

The mysterious figure did not move. Just as he was about to be pierced by the blow, the light stream suddenly came to a standstill like a viper whose vital part was caught.

It turned out it was an awl with a white blade and a strange texture faintly visible on the handle. The tip of the awl was easily held by a hand. No matter how hard the assassin tried, he couldn’t move at the slightest.

When the assassin’s full blow was easily taken by the opponent, he promptly gave up his weapon. At the same time, a ball of flame burst open. Then, under the cover of the flame, his body quickly retreated like light smoke. She was already far away with a few moves.

In fact, this fleeing smoky figure was just a phantom, the assassin’s real body had silently sneaked in the other direction. He quickly put on a cloak while sneaking away.

The cloaked person swaggered for a few blocks and came to an alley where he finally had no sense of danger. Just as he was about to breathe a sigh of relief, he felt that there was something in his hand. An awl. The tip of the awl was held casually by 1 hand, and he couldn’t move no matter how hard she exerted force.

Was it just… an illusion? The assassin had goosebumps. Knowing that the strength of this mysterious enemy was unfathomable, the tip of his tongue quickly chanted an inaudible spell without bothering hiding herself. The sharp awl suddenly shot out a dazzling light, “[Light Extinction]!”

With the sharp awl as the center, the burst of light spread out. It was like a small sun bursting out with strong destruction of light and heat.

To the assassin’s horror, everything within the range of the ‘sun rays’ did not burn and evaporate as expected. The surrounding space was full of a strange power. The [Extinction Light] seemed to plunge into a quagmire and was quickly devoured.

The assassin felt his power gushing out to the opponent through the awl in his hand uncontrollably. His body was trembling constantly. Finally, the other party stopped devouring his power and let go of his hand.

The assassin staggered back a few steps while holding the awl, but he didn’t escape- The power gap between this mysterious enemy and I is too huge. It’s unrealistic to escape or fight back. As a last resort, at least there is the possibility of ending my life.

“Who are you?” The assassin finally said. It was a woman’s voice which was a bit hoarse, it was unknown whether it was her original voice.

“This sentence should be my question.” The other party seemed to smile. Although his face couldn’t be seen, she could feel the meaning of that smile. [Light Extinction] is the top light element magic, right? When you attacked that girl just now, you seemed to deliberately hide your most commonly used attack methods and power characteristics?”

The female assassin was silent for a while, then she asked again, “Are you not under her?”

“She? That girl? I don’t know her.” The man said with interest, “It’s just that as a diner, I am interested in what just happened, especially the series of killing plots you laid out. First, the failure of the group of assassins was used to attract everyone’s attention. However, when everyone relaxed their vigilance, you suddenly used the killing move. I will be caught off guard too.”

The female assassin clutched her injured shoulder and shook her head, “If I face a real Saint powerhouse, I can’t achieve my goal even if it’s a sneak attack. Moreover, the so-called killing plot was set by herself, I just had a spontaneous idea to play a small role in the plot.”

Although the face of the female assassin was concealed by a layer of strange power, the man’s red gaze seemed to penetrate the concealment to look directly at her true face and even her heart. The woman felt naked. She was secretly shocked: This mysterious man must be a real Saint powerhouse, and he even reached the peak of Saint. In the human world, this kind of powerhouse is already the peak stage existence that everyone needs to look up to. Unless it is those closest to god on the legendary peak stage such as…

“It turns out to be a plot within a plot.” The man seemed to have realized, and he nodded, “If… I said that you can use the truth behind this whole matter in exchange for the opportunity to leave, how would you choose?”

The female assassin replied decisively, “I would rather die.”

“I can see your determination from the look in your eyes, so…” The man thought for a while holding his chin, “Okay, you can go now.”

The female assassin was a little astonished, then she showed an expression of suspicion. He let me go so easily? Is he really just a passerby who is asking out of curiosity?

“By the way, you still have to pay a little…”

The figure of the man appeared in front of her instantly. The female assassin was about to make a move, but she felt that her body was completely out of control. Then, a strong male breath approached. Before she could react, her mouth was already covered by the man’s lips. She shuddered and seemed to fall into a dream.

After waking up, the man and the strange magic power disappeared without a trace as if it was really just a dream just now.

The female assassin subconsciously touched her wet lips. She gritted her teeth, held her shoulder, and disappeared into the night.

At the same time, Chen Rui at the Mansion of Light also touched his lips showing a dumbfounded look- The clone could have a relatively independent consciousness under his permission and could act alone as another person. This kind of consciousness had some prohibited behavior, but it had some of Shura’s original personality characteristics such as… the behavior just now.

The feeling of intimacy was transmitted to the subject through some wonderful connection, leaving Chen Rui quite speechless.

In the Mansion of Light, Paul had arrived after hearing the news and took Eliza into the room for emergency treatment. Outside, Wesley and other Light Knights were guarding tightly. Even Solanton was not allowed to get near them.

This assassination was very strange. At the moment, they were surrounded by the [Dark Sky], Chen Rui clearly felt that Eliza’s spirit power was peeping at him. Chen Rui didn’t know where his flaws were exposed. At that moment, Eliza wasn’t most concerned about the assassin but him. It might also be due to the assassin’s strength not being enough to make Eliza cautious.

When Chen Rui discovered that one of the assassin’s targets was Fatty Pastor Mana, he had a few thoughts in his mind, but he didn’t make a move in the end. Mana’s goal was to be the bishop of the Yang Shao Capital. In the past 2 days, Chen Rui successfully got the ‘appreciation’ of Eliza which made Mana’s mind more active. While feeling ecstatic, he was also afraid that his partner would be uncontrollable after this appreciation, so he asked Chen Rui to go to the Yang Shao Capital church as a Light Knight. There was even a faint hint of using the contract as a threat.

How could Chen Rui have the time to accompany the fatty into the power game of the church? As for the threat, it was even more of a joke. Since Eliza was peeping at him, he simply stood by and watched.

He didn’t foresee the second assassination, but the strength of the assassin’s peak stage of the Demon Emperor couldn’t hide from his senses. After realizing that the assassin’s target was Eliza, Chen Rui decisively issued a reminder this time.

Eliza had a special identity. Once she died here, everyone present could not steer clear of the incident. This would definitely affect his plan to sneak into the White Cliff, so he made a resolute decision. As a result, Eliza and the assassin were both injured, and she survived in the end.

The information given by Shura made Chen Rui a little puzzled. Judging from the mental fluctuation of the female assassin, she should not be lying. This time it is not a series of killings. It was a plot within a plot, that is to say, the first assassination was controlled by Eliza herself. The female assassin only cleverly mixed into Eliza’s layout and took the opportunity to launch a killing blow.

So the real murderer who killed Mana was Eliza? Mana has been eagerly pleasing Eliza now, let alone offending her. Besides, if Eliza really wants to kill Mana, with her strength, she can just use her fingers. What is the purpose of using the name of the ‘Dagger Brotherhood’ to make a move?

Also, who planned the Dagger Brotherhood attack on the way to Garden City?

With all kinds of doubts, Chen Rui set his eyes on the VIP building guarded by several Light Knights in the distance. With a thought, his body suddenly became transparent as he blended with the night and disappeared.

In Paul’s room, there was a bright light.

The 2 figures were sitting cross-legged 1 behind the other. Paul’s left hand glowed with mist-bearing golden light which went into Eliza’s naked back. There was a terrifying wound on that back. This process was slow and cautious. Sweat dripped from Paul’s forehead while Eliza’s skin began to appear strangely distorted as if there was a snake inside. Eliza gritted her teeth to endure the pain as much as she could. She secreted cold sweat all over her body. The speed of the wiggling became more and more rapid as it moved toward an opening cut from the right wrist, then a yellow liquid gushed out.

When the liquid fell on the ground, those specially made hard wooden boards were corroded in an instant. The yellow liquid gradually turned red, and it finally turned into blood. Paul breathed a sigh of relief and withdrew the golden light. A soft white light appeared in his right hand. Eliza’s wound on the back gradually healed. In the end, even the scar was gone.

There was no doubt that light element magic had magical effects that water element magic couldn’t match, but the healing magic was not omnipotent and there was a time limit. Continuous use would not only greatly reduce the effect, but it would also destroy the body’s self-healing ability and cause hidden wounds unless the person had a special physique like the [Body of Light Blessing].

Eliza was severely injured this time. Although Paul’s help removed the power that hindered her, the light element magic could only heal her external wounds; the internal wounds needed a long period of recuperation to heal.

“Okay… thank you.” Eliza’s tight body softened, “Help me get dressed, I’m running out of strength.”

Paul stood up, put a robe on her, and stepped back.

“Am I so terrifying?” Eliza’s voice was a little weak, “Help me wipe off my sweat. I really don’t know how you are a man; not likable by women at all.”

Paul took the towel and wiped the sweat from her face. As he set his gaze on the tall peaks, he looked away slightly.

Eliza was a little dissatisfied with his disregard. Just as she was about to speak, Paul had already spoken, “What is going on with this assassination? Such a terrifying red scorpion power. Is it the Saint-level assassin of Rogue Union?”

“ Hmph! ” Speaking of this, Eliza’s eyes flashed a cold light, “It’s not Rogue Union! Although she can hide from others by deliberately using the attack method and power attribute that she is not good at, she can’t hide it from me!”

Paul’s expression trembled slightly as if he thought of something, but he didn’t speak in the end.

TL: Was that Joanna? Shouldn’t be right?

chapters.title: Chapter 653: The Empress Meets The Empress! Empress Meeting
chapters.body:
Chapter 653: The Empress Meets The Empress! Empress Meeting

“Don’t you want to ask something?” Eliza looked at Paul, “Or you want to play safe, lest you get involved in the battle of the Holy Lady Faction?”

Paul didn’t answer and just frowned.

Eliza smiled with a sophistication disproportionate to her age, “From the moment you become a candidate for Divinity Temple Knight, it is impossible to not get involved. Not everyone can be like your teacher Paladin Captain Sir Parsali. Or in other words, you simply don’t have this strength right now. What’s even more wrong than standing in the wrong team is not having a team. Although sometimes the fence sitters are sought by all parties at the same time, it is impossible to gain true trust. They will always be the object of exclusion and contempt.”

Paul was silent. Eliza took a deep breath and stood up, “There is a saying that there are many incidental opportunities, but only people who are prepared can grasp it. Okay, I’m going back to rest, thank you for your help.”

When Eliza reached the door in a few steps, she turned around again, “There is another saying, the opportunity cannot be missed, or it will never come. Even if you are prepared, opportunities are not always there. Once you lose it, it may never come again. Think about what I said to you last time. I won’t say it again.”

Paul seemed thoughtful. He didn’t even realize that Eliza had walked out of the room.

Chen Rui, who was peeping from the side, quietly exited the room. When he heard the ‘Holy Lady Faction battle’, he had a general outline in his mind. The female assassin should also be under the Holy Lady who is likely to be involved in the inheritor disputes. The purpose of Eliza’s previous killing plot should not be only to kill Mana. Instead, it was more for causing an effect on the chain reaction of the forces behind Solanton and Mana.

The situation in the Holy Church was too deep, and he was not interested in finding out. As long as it would not affect him following Paul into the Holy Light Mountain. Although the human world was the homeland that Arthur dreamed of returning to, for Chen Rui, the Demon Realm was his true belonging. He missed his beloved women, friends, confidants as well as the purple moonlight world.

Chen Rui had a dream that night. In his dream, he was a king, Athena, Zola, Isabella… all his lovers were his concubines, including the 2 Her Majesty Empress. For an otaku, what can be more fulfilling than realizing the dream of crystal harem? Since then, Classmate King had a merry and happy life every day. Hugging left and right, sleeping together, full of joy. As for the political affairs, it was too exhausting, so it was better to keep his energy for sex.

The more the harem concubine, the better. But it would be a headache to fight for favor. they would often quarrel, sometimes causing the male protagonist to be blamed despite not doing anything. He had to be the blood sacrifice for the crystal harem. At the same time, the behavior of ‘the king sleeping till the sun rose high from then on’ caused complaints and commotion amongst the officials. In the end, when the rebels attacked the gate of the capital, he had no choice but to run away with his concubines. As a result, because of the dispute over whether to travel via water or land, the harem once again habitually quarreled, causing sparks all over the place. When the fight was settled, they were already surrounded by the rebels. At this moment, the male protagonist Classmate King finally cried…

When he woke up the next day, Chen Rui still had an endless aftertaste of this dream. Of course, what he remembered was the most beautiful first half of the story. As for the ending, it was selectively ignored- As the saying goes, don’t sweat over the small stuff.

One cannot live without pursuit. This noble dream must be realized, and it will surely be realized! Sisters, empresses, wait for me, I will definitely be back…

It seemed to be some kind of tacit understanding or the willpower (resentment?) of the otaku, at the same time, in another world… or it should be called A-level space, 2 attention-grabbing leaders shuddered suddenly at their first meeting in a grand ceremony.

These 2 were women. 1 was a cold iceberg beauty; the other was a mysterious beauty with a veil. They were the 2 most powerful women in the Demon Realm who were also the empresses of the 2 major empires.

The Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, Catherine the Great, who had arrived at the Fallen Angel Capital, had a week-long empire visit to the Fallen Angel Empire. This would be a meeting that attracted the attention of the entire Demon Realm.

There was no lack of female rulers in the history of the Demon Realm, but it was very rare that 2 empresses appeared at the same time, especially when there were only 3 major empires. However, when the 2 empresses first met, they actually shivered at the same time which surprised the surrounding officials.

“The wind is a bit strong, Her Majesty Shea,” Catherine recovered first with a charming smile behind the veil, “This time I came to the beautiful Fallen Angel Empire with peace and hope. As this is the first time I meet with Your Majesty, I am inevitably a little nervous. Now I feel a lot more at ease because at least we already have 1 thing in common.”

If a male protagonist who had the dream was here, he would surely snicker- You 2 sisters have 1 more important thing in common…

Shea also showed a friendly smile, “Your Majesty Catherine, it is indeed an unexpected ‘common ground’ which is a good sign. I’m very much looking forward to the next 7 days of meeting to promote more mutual benefit between both empires.”

Catherine nodded, and the 2 empresses walked into the palace side by side.

In the past few months, after the Fallen Angel Empire had experienced a series of diplomatic incidents with the Dark Shadow Empire, the relationship between the 2 empires had finally recovered and they had cooperated in some areas. As the time was not long and many of them were just at the beginning, so some results were not obvious, but in the long run, it had considerable potential and benefits.

The most surprising was the Green Shade Estate of the Fallen Angel Empire which was a small estate located north of the Red Spirit Estate. The soil was barren and the terrain was dangerous. It faced the Fallen Angel Empire to the west. In addition to the Red Spirit Estate, it also shared borders with several small and medium estates. It was originally a buffer zone with minimal development space. After Royce, appointed by Shea, took office, he did not hesitate to build roads and expand towns at his own private expense. He was once cited as a laughing stock by the lords.

However, the Green Shade Estate was quickly classified as a special economic zone by Empress Shea. Various pilot projects were launched. Under Royce’s active operation, various projects were successfully implemented and carried out with extraordinary results. The previous road building and town expansion had played a crucial role. The initial disadvantage of being unable to be developed due to restrictions by the estates had turned into the advantages of communication links. Although many things were just starting to take shape, extremely attractive prospects could be foreseen. If they continued to develop this way, this poor and initially mediocre estate would become 1 of the most important economic hubs of the Fallen Angel Empire.

This made the people admire Her Majesty Shea’s means of turning barren land into something magical. It was also what the former Regent Obsidian could not do.

This was the first most formal and important foreign affairs visit since Shea ascended the throne. Compared with the Bloody Empire, which was still trapped in the internal strife, Catherine’s friendly visit had massive positive significance. It was very likely to even affect the future trend of the Demon Realm.

The 2 empresses sat side by side on the 2 thrones on the steps of the main hall. Shea, the host, was on the left and Catherine, the guest, was on the right.

Shea spoke up, “Your Majesty Catherine. Allow me to introduce you. This is the Left Prime Minister Oliver. Lucifer, Right Prime Minister Stiller. Boll…”

Every time a name was mentioned, the corresponding character bowed and saluted. Catherine nodded one by one. When introducing a masked man in the cloak, Catherine took the initiative to speak, “I believe this is Your Majesty Shea’s fiancé, Sir Aguile.”

The name made Shea’s eyes have a touch of warmth with a faint longing, “Yes, he is Aguile. Due to a certain life oath. He can’t take off the mask on his face. Please forgive him, Your Majesty Catherine.”

“It’s okay. I’ve always been a little curious… How did this mysterious man capture Your Majesty Shea’s heart.” As Catherine spoke, her watery black eyes glowed with scorching light which penetrated the veil and stared closely at the man in the cloak.

After the man in the cloak bowed slightly, he had already raised his head. The purple eyes behind the mask exchanged a glance with Catherine. In an instant, everyone in the vicinity felt a strange throbbing as if 2 powerful forces collided silently. Then, it soon returned to calm as if nothing happened. Many people thought it was an illusion.

Catherine’s eyes squinted behind the veil, intertwining with dignified, surprised, confused, and puzzled expressions. She bowed her head to the man in the cloak, indicating a special respect which was a respect for the powerhouse.

The man in the cloak also bowed his head in return, then he retreated to the group of officials. Many of the officials’ gazes toward ‘Aguile’ changed. This mysterious man who merely goes with the title of imperial guard’s deputy commander actually possesses a powerful strength that is respected by the Demon Realm’s top sage and second powerhouse, Catherine!

“It is indeed the powerhouse who once killed Obsidian. He is much stronger than the rumors. Congratulations to Your Majesty Shea. You have found a true guardian.” Catherine’s eyes have returned to clear, “Your Majesty Shea has many respectable qualities. Among them, what I admire most is Your Majesty’s vision. For example… the human Chen Rui, who was a powerless human captive at the beginning, is now the Demon Realm’s top minister of internal affairs. I think the development of the Green Shade Estate’s special zone this time should be inseparable from his planning.”

When Catherine said this, she had been observing Shea’s expression. Shea replied calmly, “Her Majesty Catherine has overpraised. As Your Majesty guessed, the special zone did contain Chen Rui’s plan. I want to appoint him as the financial minister, but unfortunately, he doesn’t care about power, and he doesn’t want to leave the Dark Moon Estate… To be precise, he is reluctant to leave his lover, the Dark Moon representative lord, the new third general of the empire, General Athena. Wales. He prefers a simple life of just doing some planning behind the scenes, so he even resigned from the post of the estate’s financial officer.”

“There is actually such a human.” Catherine smiled, “Your Majesty Shea means that if I have the conditions to ‘borrow’ this talent this time, I must bring along Athena, the lord of the Dark Moon and the third general? General Athena’s father is George, the first general of the empire, and he is loyal to Your Majesty… In this way, I seem to have no hope.”

Shea smiled slightly, “Your Majesty is humorous. Our cooperation is not based on sacrificing the interests of any party, but on a mutually beneficial win-win situation. By the way, the popularity of magic television is already quite high. Can the long-planned battle ball league between both empires be officially launched?”

“Of course, I believe that this will become a grand event that the people of the 2 empires are looking forward to. The advertisements, broadcasts, and merchandise will also bring huge economic benefits.” Catherine did not ask about Chen Rui again, and she started talking enthusiastically. However, a touch of doubt still did not dissipate from the corners of her eyes.

TL: Will Catherine notice that Chen Rui is gone? Now that the 2 empires collaborate, will the Blood Empire do something?

chapters.title: Chapter 654: Trust
chapters.body:
Chapter 654: Trust

The anticipated initial meeting between the 2 empresses was quite successful. Both sides ended the first day of meeting in a friendly atmosphere.

In the secret palace of the Fallen Angel Empire, Shea looked at ‘Aguile’ who had taken off the cloak and mask, and she nodded, “Zola, thank you.”

It turned out that the ‘Aguile’ in front of Catherine was disguised by Zola. Anyway, ‘Aguile’ was usually dressed in a cloak. No one had seen his real face, so as long as there was Shea’s permission, it was not difficult to disguise.

“ Oh. ” Ms. Fairy Dragon responded.

Shea shifted her gaze to Isabella who was aside, “How are you?”

“Still surviving for the time being.” Isabella yawned and showed a casual smile, “It’s just that I have nothing to do now, so I have become lazy. I feel a little sleepy all day, and I’m even afraid of the cold. It’s a good thing too. If I go into a long sleep someday, I can let go of everything.”

After Shea learned about Isabella’s seal imprint, she asked her to temporarily put down the tasks of the secret intelligence department and rest peacefully. This time, Isabella learned that Catherine was visiting and took the initiative to come up with the idea to let Zola replace Chen Rui’s avatar, Aguile.

Zola had very few friends. Athena was the best one, followed by the little charming girl, who was the second comrade-in-bed and costume designer. During the period of recuperation in the Rainbow Valley, Isabella fully demonstrated her diplomatic ability and established a very harmonious relationship with Zola. Previously, when Zola was protecting Shea, she had a good relationship with Shea and her sister. The little loli deliberately flattered her by calling her sister and teacher in order to learn the big-breasted magic secret technique. Ms. Fairy Dragon really couldn’t have the idea of rejecting her. Therefore, Ms. Fairy Dragon specially put down training and experiments to help out this time.

“Zola, are you sure you can beat Catherine the Great?” Isabella asked Zola to disguise as Aguile mainly to deter Catherine, but it was also to explore the power of the Demon Realm’s second powerhouse as well as to create a reverence for Chen Rui’s identity. In the future, whether it was to grant or act, including the marriage with Shea, it would be more smooth.

Recently, the capital had a lot of doubts about the fiance of Her Majesty Empress. If Shea was just the previous lord of the Dark Moon, she would not be troubled by this. Many people thought that since Shea was the empress of an empire, although her prince consort had no real power, it represented the highest status symbol of the entire empire. Therefore, a person of unknown origin like Aguile should not be a prince consort. As such, Her Majesty Shea should choose a spouse from the royal family so as to ensure the uniqueness of the bloodline of the descendants because it was difficult for high-level powerhouses to give birth to children.

Zola didn’t fake daze this time. She thought for a while, “I don’t know.”

Isabella and Shea looked at each other with surprise in their eyes. Zola is recognized as a super powerhouse at the peak stage of the Demon Overlord level. The dragons of the Demon Overlord were ravaged by Ms. Fairy Dragon like a side dish. The right prime minister, Stiller. Boll, who is the empire’s top magician, is her registered apprentice. Now that she has received the earth source power from the Earth Elemental King, she’s 1 step closer to kingdomize. I can’t imagine that with this level of strength, she is actually not sure of defeating Catherine.

Catherine has more than wisdom and beauty. She also has strong power. She is indeed the Demon Realm’s second powerhouse. Then… what about the top powerhouse, Raizen the Great?

“That Catherine’s power is very strong, and she is almost at the same level as me.” A bright light flashed past Zola’s eyes behind the glasses, “Not only that. 1 of the talents of the Asmodeus Royal Family is [Element Weakening] which is difficult to deal with using magic. If the opponent is Catherine, she will be more difficult to deal with than the black dragon’s immune physique. The specific victory or defeat is uncertain now. It will be known after the battle. I’m confident that at least I would not lose.”

“Well, our Majesty should be preparing for the evening ball, right? I’m going back to sleep for a while; I’m so sleepy.” Isabella nodded, yawned, and did not pay much respect. She put on the veil and went straight out.

There was an expression of worry in Shea’s eyes. Despite the suppression of the Fertile Yuan Soil’s power, Isabella’s recent state seemed to have begun to become a little undesirable. It might be a precursor to the [Light Annihilation Seal].

“Don’t worry, he… will definitely be back in time.”

Shea’s voice halted Isabella who walked toward the gate. Although the 2 were rivals in the issue of men, there was actually a strange emotion and trust between Her Majesty Empress and Ms. Secret Intelligence. This confidant-like feeling began with the Dark Moon crusade of Obsidian.

“Yes, that guy will never let us down.” It was the fake daze Ms. Fairy Dragon who cherished words like gold. The phrase ‘us’ contained many meanings.

“ En. ” Isabella replied casually, and she continued to walk outside. Her body suddenly became warm. She felt that the wind outside was not so cold.

On the other side of the space, Chen Rui did not know that the special zone he planned had developed to such a degree in a short period of time, nor did he know that his 2 empresses had started their first formal meeting. In fact, at the time of the Dark Moon Estate, Her Majesty Empress, whose alias was Isis, once pretended to be an envoy guard to meet with Shea. She even captured Chen Rui’s father-in-law, Azgalor.

He was now being invited by Eliza to go to this lady’s room. Wesley and other Light Knight guards were not outside Eliza’s room. Chen Rui stepped forward and knocked on the concealed door. A sweet voice sounded, “Please come in.”

Chen Rui walked in and saw Eliza wearing a white dress, leaning lazily on the sofa in the living room. She showed a different style, but Chen Rui didn’t have any thoughts. He bowed to her, ” Ms. Eliza, good morning.”

“Good morning, Richard.” Eliza sat up, “Close the door.”

Chen Rui closed the door, and Eliza stretched her hand to signal him to sit down on the opposite sofa, “Richard, I called you to thank you. The situation yesterday was extremely critical. If it weren’t for your reminder, I might have died in the hands of that assassin.”

“You are welcome, Ms. Eliza. This is what I should do. Besides, with Miss’ strength… I’m ashamed to say that I never knew Miss’ strength is so strong. Even if I didn’t say anything, Miss should be able to overcome the danger.”

Eliza smiled slightly without commenting. She narrowed her eyes, “I am curious about 1 thing. At the time, I didn’t even notice that the guard had a problem. How did you find out?”

Chen Rui was prepared for this question and replied, “This is the case. Miss should know that my soul language can be used to communicate with demonic beasts. At that time, the thunderbird on my shoulder sensed the murderous intent of the guard in advance, and it produced a strong sense of fear. This phenomenon did not happen when the assassins appeared previously. I sensed this abnormal phenomenon, so I shouted desperately.”

Many demonic beasts had sensing talents that humans couldn’t match, let alone a rare beast like the thunderbird. This explanation was reasonable. Eliza nodded, and she did not continue to question. Instead, she changed the topic, “In any case, I should thank you so much. Before that, I want to confess 1 thing. Actually… I have always had some doubts about you.”

“Doubts?” Chen Rui showed a surprised expression. This reaction was not entirely faked. He had already sensed Eliza’s suspicion, but he didn’t expect that she would personally say it now.

“I have had a strong spiritual talent since I was a child, so I’m able to sense others’ mood swings and even psychological changes acutely. For example, Lord Walli’s coveting of my body, the Fatty City Lord’s extreme desire for power, and also a certain future Divinity Temple Knight who is actually interested in me, but it has been hidden in his heart for various reasons… These can’t be hidden from my senses.”

Having said this, Eliza stared into Chen Rui’s eyes and slowly said, “But you, according to your origin, you should have desires and pursuits for many things, but it gives me a feeling of ‘want nothing’ or ‘indifferent’ which is very abnormal. That is why I have always been suspicious of you. I even suspected that you were a spy sent by 1 of my enemies… until you reminded me and saved my life at a critical moment which dispelled my doubts.”

Chen Rui began to feel vigilant. Turns out that this is the reason. Samuel used [Truth Eyes] to see through my [Camouflage] technique previously. Now Eliza has demonstrated this sensing ability. There are also many people with extraordinary talents and wisdom in the human world who should not be underestimated. I should be more cautious with my actions in the future.

However, his reminder out of the considerations of his own plan this time just happened to dispel Eliza’s doubts. It was considered accidental luck.

“What the lady sensed… may be related to the soul language I got from the elf, and…” Chen Rui smiled wryly, “To be honest Miss, I have experienced many events and failures including emotional aspects, so certain emotions. …”

“ Oh ? Is it related to that elf?”

Chen Rui nodded, “From the moment she died in my arms, I felt that everything about me was destroyed. I didn’t cheer myself up until a long time later, but I don’t know why, I seem to have lost all feelings for other women. It seems to be a spiritual implication she gave me before her death…”

Chen Rui initially wanted to directly say that he preferred man now, but in the end he felt that the taste was too heavy, so he had to change to a vague explanation.

This time it was Eliza’s turn to be surprised. Her gaze toward him was a little weird, especially the look that made Chen Rui have the urge to roll his eyes: Okay, let it be weird. It is better than doubt, brother will bear it.

“ Um, since we have said so clearly, then I’m not going to beat around the bushes, Richard.” Eliza didn’t bother with his gender preference, and she said with a serious face, “I hope you can be my right-hand man. I will definitely value you. This is not only a thank you, but also a recognition of your talents. You can stay in the Garden City or go to the Royal Capital. I can guarantee that within 3 years, you can become a Light Knight. Perhaps there may be hope of entering the White Cliff. Even if you don’t plan to develop into a clergyman for life, as the Light Knight, with my help, I can satisfy your biggest wish even if you are the prince of a certain king’s empire.”

For ‘Richard’, this condition was quite attractive.

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up as he showed an intrigued expression, then he hesitated again. After a long time, he finally gritted his teeth and said, “I’m sorry, Ms. Eliza, your condition actually made me very excited, but unfortunately, I have already sworn to become Sir Paul’s subordinate. I originally signed a contract with Pastor Mana. Now that Pastor Mana is dead, the contract is canceled. I will save this contract until the moment I see Sir Paul as the official Divinity Temple Knight. This is my promise to Sir Paul.”

Eliza frowned, “My uncle is the cardinal and my teacher is Holy Light Lady. Isn’t following me better than Paul?”

“Ms. Eliza’s background is far greater than Sir Paul’s.” Chen Rui shook his head. This time, he was more determined than before, “However, as a subordinate who betrayed the master for profit, even if Ms. Eliza trusts me, I would have no face to stay with Miss.

“Richard, I am surprised and in awe of your persistence and aptitude at the same time,” Eliza showed a complicated expression, “Should I congratulate you for having such a subordinate? Or should I be jealous of you? My Sir Paul?”

As soon as this sentence ended, Paul slowly walked out of the room and looked at Chen Rui with undisguised appreciation in his eyes. From this moment, Chen Rui knew that he had completely gained Paul’s trust and also dispelled Eliza’s vigilance.

Eliza should have a real intention to solicit Chen Rui. The kind of persuasion that was lured with affection and benefit was not only to win Chen Rui, but also to show Paul. She should already know that Chen Rui had become Paul’s subordinate. Once Chen Rui was really tempted by those benefits, Paul would definitely lose trust in this subordinate, then she would be able to truly succeed in talent hunting. Unfortunately, she failed.

In fact, what Paul and Eliza didn’t know was that even though Paul had suppressed his breath, Chen Rui knew that he was hiding in the room long ago. The reason he said so was to secure Paul’s heart, and secondly, the contract matter was also very cleverly delayed until after entering the White Cliff.

“You can go back and rest, my most loyal Sir Assistant,” Paul smiled at Chen Rui for the first time, “Ms. Eliza and I still have something to talk about. By the way, you have to be ready to leave at any time these days. Follow me back to the Dragon Bright Empire to finish 1 matter first, then I will take you to the White Cliff to participate in the selection of the Divinity Temple Knight. I can guarantee that you will see me receive the Divinity Temple Knight’s sword with your own eyes in the Holy Light Mountain. This will also be an important moment that you will never forget.”

Chen Rui responded to Paul with a smile before he bowed and left the room. However, he added a sentence in his heart: You will also never forget what happened at that time, dear Sir Divinity Temple Knight.

TL: Why did Eliza look more interested in him after knowing his ‘gender preference’🤔?

chapters.title: Chapter 655: Unexpected Change! Joanna’S Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 655: Unexpected Change! Joanna’S Crisis

After Chen Rui left the room, Eliza spoke, “This is a good subordinate, but isn’t it too early to say that sentence? Do you think you can definitely become a Divinity Temple Knight?”

Seeing the added confidence in Paul’s smile, Eliza shook her head slightly, “Your strength has reached Saint, and your teacher is Paladin Captain. It should be quite promising. But there is an old saying that things are impermanent.”

“What do you actually mean?” Paul frowned.

“The White Cliff is a place full of rules.” Eliza stood up, “Although absolute strength can override everything, your strength is not enough to override certain rules, even your teacher, Parsali also cannot violate some rules. With your wisdom, I don’t need to say more.”

Paul’s face became gloomy, “Are you threatening me?”

“Don’t get me wrong, I’m just telling you the truth.” Eliza looked directly at Paul without fear, “If you want to choose the path of Sir Parsali, it obviously won’t work. You must think about your own position, otherwise you will be eliminated by the rules sooner or later.”

With that said, Eliza smiled again, “The matter I suggested last time… have you made up your mind? Although you seem to be arrogant on the surface, I know you are a smart person. You didn’t say anything, but you must have gone through serious thinking in your mind- Don’t doubt my judgment, I did not lie to Richard about my sensing talent. I know you are hesitating. Since there is no third person here, I will just make it clear. The Loman Family is only a middle-level family. You become Sir Parsali’s apprentice mainly for the opportunities and learning. Secondly, you want to use the influence power of the Holy Light Mountain to expand your family’s power. That’s also your biggest purpose of pursuing Joanna, right? She is the eldest daughter of the family, and has no younger brother. As long as the means are right, the entire Philip Family will become a puppet under your control in the future. With the help of the Holy Light Mountain, it is possible for the Loman Family to become the top family of the Dragon Bright Empire.”

Paul raised his brows as Eliza’s tone changed, “But have you ever thought about it. Even if your ideal is successfully realized, you will still be just a pawn in the king’s hands, and your involvement with the Holy Light Mountain will cause suspicion. Maybe one day all of your hard work will be gone once the king has a change of mind! You should put away your half-heartedness and make the most correct choice.”

Paul finally explained, “For me, there is no difference between choosing the Dragon Bright Empire and choosing a church. At least there is only 1 king in the Dragon Bright Empire, and there are too many major characters in the church game. I am just an insignificant chess piece, so I can’t put all my bets on the church’s side.”

“Still don’t understand? In the eyes of the church, you have a mastermind king behind you; in the eyes of Lex the Great, you’re a member of the church. You will only displease both sides at that time. It doesn’t matter if you are just a lowly pawn, but you are a person with lofty ambitions. This dangerous situation will become more and more obvious as you and the Loman Family become stronger— You should have received the news that Lex the Great will personally host the second duel between you and Samuel this time. I believe this is enough to explain something.”

A bead of sweat appeared on Paul’s forehead. He was always prudent. However, he couldn’t see clearly when he was involved. Eliza’s words were like a wake-up call. He did not carefully consider some things previously indeed.

“It’s not too late to wake up.” Eliza saw through Paul’s thoughts, “Of course, you can give up the church and bet on the Dragon Bright Empire, but I want to remind you that this is very likely to be self-defeating due to Lex the Great’s paranoia. Even if he chooses to trust you, will you still have any value in the eyes of others after losing the most important background of the Holy Light Mountain? I boldly predict that even the Philip Family’s first reaction is to cancel the engagement…”

Paul took a deep breath, “Are you trying to say that as the selection of the Divinity Temple Knight is happening soon, I must make a decision before then?”

“It seems that you have made a decision.” Eliza smiled, “Although the White Cliff has many factions, the 3 main factions dominate. Pope Faction, who represents the archangel, is the leader of 3 factions, followed by 2 bishops, Pusmeer and my teacher Eudora. There are many talents in the Pope Faction. My uncle Cardinal Roger and Chief Judge Seus are the 2 main controllers, and the internal competition is very fierce. Cardinal Birmingham is the next faction under Pusmeer. Both Solanton and the dead Mana belong to this faction. In recent years, the power has expanded extremely fast. Lastly, Cardinal Gralin is under the Holy Lady Faction. Compared with other factions, the Holy Lady Faction is more low-key… Finally, I have to mention your teacher Parsali. Sir Parsali is a true paladin who adheres to the creed of loyalty to the light and guards justice. He is known for his justice and strictness. However, it is precisely because he is too obsessed with the creed and not adaptive, he has offended everyone in almost every faction, so his situation is not easy. With your talents, you should know which faction is most suitable.”

Paul thought for a long time and sighed, “Although the Holy Lady Faction is the most low-key and the weakest among the 3 main factions, it is also 1 of the indispensable main factions. The Loman Family does not have much background. If I choose the other 2 forces, I’m afraid that I will not be valued with limited competitiveness. I may never be able to take the lead, so I don’t have too many choices.”

“Talking to smart people is easy.” Eliza became serious, “Then I will ask 1 last thing, have you really made up your mind?”

Paul showed a determined expression and nodded slowly.

“Great, I believe that the Holy Lady will be very happy to see such a talent with such potential joining us. Let me remind you a bit, despite the low-key attitude of the Holy Lady Faction, Sir Raphael behind us is a wise angel who is willing to be lonely.”

Paul was not an idiot. He wouldn’t ask Eliza silly questions like, as Roger’s niece, why she wanted to join the Holy Lady Faction. In fact, he knew in his heart that the reason Eliza valued him so much was related to the identity of ‘Paladin Captain’s apprentice’. It was very likely that the Holy Lady had the intention to win over Parsali and Glorious Knight by this. At least, it could send a certain signal to the outside world. It might also be related to a long-term plan of the wise angel, under the Light God, behind the Holy Lady.

Eliza’s previous analysis was on point which made him see further things. In any case, the Holy Lady Faction was indeed the best faction for him and the Loman Family.

Paul finally made up his mind and bowed to Eliza, “Then, Miss, please look after me in the future.”

Eliza was the direct apprentice of the Holy Lady. Since he was determined to serve the Holy Lady, he must have a good relationship with Eliza.

“Why are you so polite? Our relationship will be very close in the future, we can’t be so distant.” Eliza smiled like a flower, “But before that, you have to prove your determination by action.”

“Action?”

“Since you have chosen the right path, shouldn’t you change your original development plan in the Dragon Bright Empire? For example… the marriage with the Philip Family?”

Paul frowned again, “You mean…”

Eliza smiled and came close to Paul’s ear to whisper, “What if I want you to… kill Joanna to really prove your determination?”

Paul was shocked. He didn’t expect Eliza would suggest such a condition to let him kill his fiancée who was also her best friend. Seeing the innocent and cute smile on the girl’s face, Paul couldn’t help but to have goosebumps.

“If I have to use this to prove myself, then I…” Paul’s breathing was a bit short. His eyes were intertwined with complex expressions. He seemed to be struggling before he finally gritted his teeth, “I… I will finish off Joanna by myself!”

“ Haha !” Eliza laughed softly. The laughter was full of other meanings. After a while, the laughter gradually became smaller, “Actually, this is just a joke. However, your performance makes me very satisfied. You have passed my test. After returning to the Yang Shao Capital, I will return to the White Cliff as soon as possible and report this to the Holy Lady. With the support of the Holy Lady and your own strength, becoming a Divinity Temple Knight is almost certain. At that time, you can use the identity of the Divinity Temple Knight to gradually expand the strength of your family in the Dragon Bright Empire. Even Lex the Great will be deterred to some extent.”

Paul secretly breathed a sigh of relief. The reason why he pursued Joanna was mainly because of benefits, but he had always been obsessed with Joanna’s beauty. The decision just now was actually very difficult, but for the future and ambition, not to mention Joanna who liked another person, he also couldn’t afford to care so much even if it was someone who liked him.

“After you return to the Yang Shao Capital this time, don’t make too much movement on the family side for the time being. After dealing with the necessary affairs, leave for the White Cliff as soon as possible. Remember to bring your loyal subordinate. I am quite interested in his soul language talent… As for the duel, don’t worry, because your opponent won’t show up because if everything goes smoothly.”

Paul was startled, “Why?”

“Because Joanna has already ‘eloped’ with him. This will set back the Kemplot Family and the Philip Family which will also be of great benefit to your future development plans.”

Seeing the suspicious look on Paul’s face, Eliza sat down again and stretched out on the sofa, “I might as well tell you, Joanna’s early departure is actually an idea I gave her, but I let the Light Knight escorted her to ‘return’ not to the Red Dragon City of the Dragon Bright Empire, but the Storm Island. The port here is not very far from Storm Island. According to the itinerary, she should be near the sea area already… “

“What? Storm Island!” Paul was taken aback. Storm Island was located in the dangerous sea area south of Garden City. It was 1 of the most dangerous places in the human world. There were countless dangers in it. Just the Titan alone could make the real Saint powerhouse stay away.

Chen Rui, who was invisible and eavesdropping, was also surprised. He was also there when Joanna left. He didn’t expect such a thing to happen. This seemingly innocent girl’s scheming and viciousness were far beyond expectation, making Chen Rui’s murderous intent rise.

TL: Will Chen Rui go to rescue Joanna? Judging by his relationship with Samuel, he will very likely do so…

chapters.title: Chapter 656: Rush To The Rescue
chapters.body:
Chapter 656: Rush To The Rescue

In the room, Eliza’s voice continued.

“Originally, I was a little guilty about this matter whether it was to you or to Joanna, but since you just agreed to kill Joanna with your own hands, my guilt is only for Joanna… After all, she is a good friend of mine. Due to this, I can’t bear to directly make a move. Instead, I let her go to Storm Island, maybe… there is still a chance of survival.”

Eliza said guilt, but there was no guilty expression on her face which made Paul shudder. With the dangers of Storm Island, it would be difficult to survive even if Paul went by himself, let alone Joanna.

This time, Paul’s inner struggle was much smaller than before. After all, he was getting used to it. He knew very well that Eliza did not fully trust him. Killing Joanna was to cut off his way to back off and avoid half-heartedness.

“By the way, I sent someone to tell Samuel yesterday afternoon that Joanna was trapped in Storm Island. According to the intel I received, he has immediately rushed to Storm Island to rescue her. It happened to help you get rid of this annoying guy.” Eliza’s eyes flashed, “You don’t have to be too grateful to me. As a close comrade in the same faction, this is what I should do.”

Chen Rui’s heart sank. He didn’t listen anymore as he left the room silently. He gained the trust of Eliza and Paul with great difficulty, and he was soon able to mix into the White Cliff. Killing Eliza rashly would only mess up the bigger plan. The top priority was to try to help the young couple out of danger first.

Chen Rui left the church immediately and went to look for Lucio. As a subordinate of Chen Rui. Lucio also stayed in the church during this period, but he spent a lot of time wandering in the Garden City to inquire about various news.

When Chen Rui found Lucio, he was accompanied by someone familiar, Commander Ina of the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad.

The 3 met in a remote alley, but Ina still looked around cautiously. Then, she took out something and handed it to Chen Rui.

“Samuel asked me to pass it to you, although I don’t know why he did it.” The female mercenary was clearly confused. In fact, Ina had already felt that Samuel might have an unusual relationship with ‘Richard’ when they were at the Thick Soil Castle of the mountain hobbit. However, she dispelled her doubt when both of them had some conflicts after that and they parted ways unhappily.

Unexpectedly, Samuel gave Ina something before he hurriedly left the Garden City yesterday. He asked her to pass it to ‘Richard’ who had already joined the church.

This raised the suspicion in the female mercenary’s mind again. As there seemed to be a church-related assassination in a certain manor last night, City Lord Kraut ordered the city guards to be sent out overnight to search for people of unknown origin. The city was still under martial law now. The church also closed its doors, suspending the entry of believers and outsiders. Ina never had the opportunity to meet Chen Rui until she found Lucio today.

Chen Rui took the long package, opened it and had a look. There was a broken sword inside which was broken when he pointed at Samuel.

Samuel asked Ina to pass the sword to him as a sign of a farewell apology because the Silver Knight knew that he might not be able to return from the Storm Island this time, so he could no longer continue his allegiance to Royal Highness Arthur’.

“Do you know where he is going this time?” Chen Rui asked.

Ina shook her head, bit her lip, and said, “He didn’t say, he just confessed a few strange words to me. But… I can feel that he seems to be going to accomplish an extremely dangerous thing.”

“I have to say that a woman’s intuition is very accurate.” Chen Rui sighed, “This guy left with a determination to die.”

Samuel did not ask Chen Rui for help. Storm Island was also a dangerous place for the real Saint powerhouse. He was unable to fulfill his vow to ‘Royal Highness’ for his beloved woman. How could he put ‘Royal Highness’ in danger?

These words shocked Ina, “Do you know where he went?”

“As a mercenary, you have completed the mission.” Chen Rui shook his head, “You don’t need to worry about the rest.”

“This is not a mission!” Ina revealed a furious expression, “I don’t know what’s your relationship with him, but as a friend who cares about him, I have the right to know the truth! What danger is he facing?”

Chen Rui looked at Ina’s emotional expression, and he suddenly understood something. He pondered and asked, “Do you know why I deliberately break the tie with the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad? Because I don’t want to hurt you! If you are really not afraid of being involved, you have to be quite prepared. At least you have to disassociate yourself from the Iron Shield Mercenary Squad, and you may even need to remain anonymous in your life…”

Ina didn’t expect such serious consequences, so Chen Rui added, “I will only reveal 1 thing. He risks his own life this time in order to save his beloved woman. Are you sure you still want to get involved?”

Ina was shocked. Her emotional expression finally calmed down; her eyes were filled with disappointment.

“Leave. Since he trusts you, I won’t do anything extra to you. However, you must forget what happened today, including this thing.” Chen Rui raised the broken sword in his hand and gestured to Lucio. They walked forward, leaving Ina blankly on the spot.

After leaving the alley, Chen Rui spoke to Lucio, “How much do you know about Storm Island?”

“Master, you mean that Samuel went to Storm Island?” Lucio was taken aback, then he replied, “Starting from Port Thor which is south of the Garden City, you can reach the Storm Sea area. If we are fast, it takes about 2 days. When I completed the mercenary mission 3 years ago, I passed through the sea area, but I didn’t dare to approach it.”

“If you were to go to Storm Island now, do you have the guts?”

Lucio was shocked again. He hesitated for a moment and gritted his teeth, “If it weren’t for master, I’m still a half-dead trash. Since I followed master, my life has been given to master! Don’t mention going to Storm Island, I will not hesitate to even go to the Demon Realm!”

Chen Rui was taken aback by the last sentence, then he smiled, “The Demon Realm… Don’t worry. Going to Storm Island this time will not kill you. Get a small fishing boat immediately. Remember, the duller the better. No shipmen or sailors, and no supplies. Oh, I also need a related sea area map.”

“Fishing boat?” Lucio thought he had heard it wrong, “Master, we need at least a sea ship and a few sailors, right? The storm sea area is not an inland river.”

“Do as I say, the sooner the better.” Chen Rui thought for a while, “Also, I may soon leave the Garden City, go to the Dragon Bright Empire, and then go to the White Cliff. Neither do I know what kind of turmoil will be caused by then. Therefore, you must first ‘die’ once, then change your identity so that you can avoid being implicated.”

“ Huh? ” Lucio was taken aback, then he reacted and bowed respectfully without asking more.

My strength is just like a trivial ant for a Saint powerhouse like ‘Richard’. However, this powerhouse whom I need to look up at even considers the details of my safety and did not use methods such as killing the witness. In any case, he is truly a master worth following.

About 2 hours later, the fatty City Lord Kraut received urgent news from the patrol that the church’s Reserve Light Knight ‘Richard’ was ambushed by a group of unknown people in the third block and was severely injured. His subordinate, Lucio, unfortunately died.

Fatty City Lord’s heart was tight. Normally, he did not need to worry about a Reserve Light Knight being injured at all. However, the assassination of apprentice Eliza, the cardinal’s niece and the Holy Lady’s apprentice, happened in the Fragrance Manor yesterday. As a result, Eliza was seriously injured while Pastor Mana of Town Gudam was assassinated. This incident was likely to affect his position as the city lord. In this sensitive period, the second assassination of the people in the church took place.

The 2 assassinations should be closely related and were probably caused by the same forces. Then, the fatty City Lord received the news that Richard was the person who reminded Eliza at a critical moment yesterday. He was appreciated by Eliza and had already become Paul’s subordinate, the top genius of the Dragon Bright Empire and the apprentice of Paladin Captain.

Damn, these are all the people who I can’t afford to offend! The fatty was almost weeping. He hurried to the scene personally to console and treat the seriously injured ‘Richard’. At this time, the church people led by Pastor Solanton and Paul also came.

“Sir Paul!”

Chen Rui showed a strenuous expression. As he was about to struggle to get up, he was supported by Paul, “Richard! How is your injury? I will use the Holy Magic to treat you now!”

The Fatty City Lord on the side was secretly nervous as he looked. It seems that Paul and this follower have a rather unusual relationship. Fortunately, I did not neglect this matter.

Chen Rui sneered secretly. Paul is a ruthless character who can even kill his beloved woman with his own hands for the benefit. This is just to buy people’s hearts . Nonetheless, he still showed a moving expression in cooperation, “it’s okay, Sir Paul. City Lord Kraut has already asked someone to treat me. I’m fine now. I’ll be alright after a couple of days of rest. It’s just… My servant Lucio was hit by the assassin’s poison dagger. Even his corpse…”

“What is really going on?” Paul’s brows frowned tightly as he looked at the wound that Chen Rui had used [Camouflage] to mutilate.

“I don’t know. I came out of the Mansion of Light, found my servant Lucio, and asked him to prepare something to set off. Suddenly, I was ambushed by a group of assassins. If it hadn’t been for the thunderbird to remind me, I would be dead. I suspect… these assassins are related to those people in the manor last night.”

Chen Rui’s assassination actually had a lot of eyewitnesses, but those passers-by saw the illusion that Shura cast using magical power. The real Lucio already changed his appearance and went to Port Thor.

“Could it be a revenge for reminding Eliza last night?” Paul clenched his fist and patted Chen Rui’s shoulder lightly, “That servant will not die in vain. I will definitely not let this matter go! Since Eliza’s injury has not recovered, I also need to stay here for a few days. You can heal your wounds at ease, then come back to the Dragon Bright Empire with me.”

“Yes, sir.”

Back at the church, Solanton arranged a clean and peaceful room for Chen Rui to recuperate. Eliza also visited him specially. To be precise, Eliza was not visiting Chen Rui at this moment, but Shura.

Chen Rui set up a star point in the church. He left Shura here to ‘recover’ and continue to steal faith power here while he rushed to Port Thor.

TL: Can’t Eliza see through Shura with her own talent? Shura seems to have his own personality, right? Btw, what is the marriage custom of the human world? Is polygamy common here?

chapters.title: Chapter 657: The Storm Sea Area
chapters.body:
Chapter 657: The Storm Sea Area

Grats! 4 chapters are released for achieving monthly goal and weekly goal!

When Chen Rui arrived at Port Thor in a cloak, the disguised Lucio had obtained a small boat and opened up the guarding points at the port. They were ready to set sail at any time.

What surprised Chen Rui was that there was an unfamiliar woman on the ship. Although she changed her appearance, Chen Rui recognized at a glance that it was Ina.

When Chen Rui glanced at Lucio, Lucio lowered his head in shame.

“It’s not Lucio’s fault.” Ina said, “Before I met you with Samuel’s broken sword, I secretly left a secret tracking green fennel on Lucio. I also heard about that strange assassination. I initially wanted to come and have a look, but I ran into Lucio in disguise on the road. Even if he changed his outfit, he still couldn’t hide the smell of the green fennel. So I was able to follow him along all the way and use this incident to threaten him to tell me the destination. It turns out that Samuel actually went to Storm Island! Speaking of the Storm Sea area, I’m much more familiar than Lucio. I can shorten the voyage by at least a quarter. Don’t you need a guide?”

Chen Rui stared into Ina’s eyes, “Did you really think it through?”

Ina spread her hands. “My father was a merchant. He died of a serious illness. I was forced to become a mercenary to make ends meet. I have always regretted that I could not inherit his legacy. This is a good chance. I have given the commander position to Silva… Before changing careers, I can help a friend first.”

“Merchant?” Chen Rui stared at her for a moment, then he suddenly smiled, “Well, Ms. Merchant, if you have already decided… I think we can set sail. Also, Sir Lucio, if you still can’t obtain Ms. Ina’s favor after trying your best, I’m very sorry because you missed a very good woman.”

Ina’s face suddenly blushed while Lucio smiled embarrassedly a few times. He began to push the boat away from the shore. The spearman’s skills in handling the boat were very amateurish. The fishing ship staggered out of the harbor.

Ina had returned to normal. She frowned as she watched Lucio steer the boat with difficulty, “Although I’m not the most professional guide, you guys seem to be more amateur. We… are just going to sail this small fishing boat to the Storm Sea area? I’m not sure what you can do to rescue Samuel, but what’s certain is that as long as a wave hits, not just me, everything from this ‘big’ boat to this ‘sailor’, then to you sir ‘captain’, will be buried in the belly of the fish.”

Before Ina’s words were finished, a large ship suddenly appeared in front of the small boat. This was not a mockery of the female mercenary. It was really a large jet-black sail ship which was gorgeous and magnificent. It gave a strong visual impact like a black pearl in the blue sea.

Not only Ina, but even Lucio was also stunned. Where did this ship come from? It was taken out of space equipment? I have never heard of a space ring or bracelet that can store such a large ship! What is this method?

At this time, Chen Rui’s voice sounded from the enormous sail ship, “Welcome to my Devil’s Snare Ship, Ms. Guide and the amateur Sir Sailor.”

Ina and Lucio climbed the released rope onto the huge ship. They were surprised to see everything in front of them. They were also considered well-informed mercenaries, but many facilities on this ship were unheard of. Even the deck underneath seemed to be made of very rare materials.

“Master, such a huge ship, I…” Just as Lucio was about to say that he was a sailor who was more amateur than he imagined, he saw Chen Rui take out a yellow glowing stone which then scattered into countless blue sand on the deck.

The sand began to move quickly to form human shapes. After the glow dissipated, dozens of blue sandmen appeared in front of them.

The sandmen were exhausted to death in the battle with Corpse Necromancer King Glorios under the Dead Sea, but the Earth Elemental King once gave Chen Rui a piece of sandstone essence which could revive the sandmen 3 times. This was the first time.

The sandmen were naturally very familiar with Chen Rui. They bowed together. With Chen Rui’s order, they began to work on their respective tasks: raise the sails, steer the helm, and look out. The cooperation was very tacit.

Lucio and Ina stared at the scene in front of them dumbfoundedly, Lucio even bit his finger to check if he was dreaming. Ina was keenly aware that these ‘monsters’ not only possessed extremely sophisticated sailing skills, but they were also all experienced old sailors. None of them were inferior to her.

What is the origin of this Richard? He can actually control these powerful monsters that are unheard of.

“It seems that many damages from the previous battle cannot be repaired automatically, but it should be enough for the time being.” Chen Rui looked at the facilities of the Devil’s Snare Ship and turned his gaze to the stunned Ina, “Okay, Ms. Guide, it’s time for you to play a role. What we have to do now is to speed up and try to get to Storm Island as soon as possible.”

Ina seemed to be awake from a dream. She quickly took out the sea area map.

After 1 day and 1 night, the Devil’s Snare Ship finally sailed into the Storm Sea area.

As its name suggested, the Storm Sea area’s entire sky was gray and hazy with no sunlight all year round. From time to time, one could see the wonders of sea tornadoes like ‘dragons sucking water’. For the nearby ship, this spectacular sight was like a nightmare of Death God.

“Wait a minute, captain, slow down first!” Ina yelled. Chen Rui’s ability to command and sail made her admire him sincerely. Although she noticed the ‘master’ title that Lucio accidentally revealed, she was a smart mercenary. She still pretended not to hear and directly referred to Chen Rui as captain.

“Storm Island is not far from the Garden City, but few people can enter it. In addition to the powerful terrifying creatures on the island, the tornado in the Storm Sea area is also one of the important reasons. The tornado here is very terrifying and it could swirl a large sea ship hundreds of meters in the air. The tornadoes will never disappear due to some mysterious power. Fortunately, there are strong and weak tornadoes, but it must be noted that even if we pass through the weakest tornado, there is also the danger of subversion at any time. Generally speaking, it is possible to pass if we have a wind element or water element magician who can use the power of the corresponding elements to properly offset the effect and reduce the risks…”

Chen Rui took a close look at the sea area map for a while, then he looked at the tornadoes circling in front of him. He gave an order to the sandmen, and the Devil’s Snare Ship sailed toward it quickly.

“Captain!” Ina was taken aback. She didn’t expect that her previous painstaking explanations were all in vain. This sailing direction might be a quick route to Storm Island, but it was also the most stormy area.

With the terrifying tornado ahead, the sea was violently surging while the wind was whistling in their ears. This was only the edge area. The Devil’s Snare Ship had activated the magic thruster and was breaking through the waves. Lucio nervously grabbed the handle on the ship’s side. The sweat on his face was blown dry by the whistling wind as soon as it came out. The sandmen did not hesitate as they faithfully executed Chen Rui’s orders.

When Ina was about to yell stop, she saw Chen Rui’s figure slowly floating up——’ Richard’ is not only a beast tamer? He is also a wind element magician? However, even a high level wind element magician can’t control these raging wind elements, let alone deal with the strongest tornado head-on.

A deafening sound overwhelmed the whirring wind for a while. The figure flew straight toward the tornado like a meteor while feeling the increasingly turbulent and raging air current rushing toward his face. Starlights glimmered in his black eyes, and the power of the whole body boiled like flames.

In the next second, Ina and Lucio saw an unforgettable scene at the same time – A hazy figure faced the terrifying tornado at lightning speed, then he punched out.

The entire line of sight seemed to shake violently. The huge tornado connecting the sky and the sea suddenly split into halves. Due to this terrifying power, the sea below was split into 2 and rolled backward like a cracked canyon.

“Go!” Chen Rui’s voice sounded, completely overshadowing the whistling wind. The Devil’s Snare Ship immediately turned on the magic thruster at full speed. The arc of the sails reached its limit, and the ship thrust forward toward the ‘canyon’ like a sharp arrow.

Ina and Lucio stared at the water walls tens of meters high on both sides of the ship. The water could not fall under the action of that powerful force field. Only after the Devil’s Snare Ship drove through the Stormy Sea area, the water returned into its original state, but the huge hurricane turned into 2 small tornadoes that were greatly reduced in power. They moved slowly to the sides under the aftereffect of that punch.

Chen Rui’s figure had returned to the ship as if he had just done a trivial thing. He continued to look at the sea area map.

It took a long time for Ina to react: A simple punch can tear such a terrifying tornado in half? Is this… a wind element magician? Or is this a beast tamer?

The strength demonstrated by this punch alone far surpassed Samuel’s power.

A real Saint?

The female mercenary finally understood why when Samuel and Tecklin went into conflict at the Black Rock Mountain, a word of ‘Richard’ caused the deputy commander who had always been persistent to immediately cool down. It seems that my previous guesses were all wrong. This relationship between ‘Richard’ and Samuel is perhaps…

By the way, the reasons for passing the Thick Soil Castle smoothly…

“Ms. Ina, can you come over and confirm this. Sailing south in this direction should be the quickest route, right? Are there any hidden reef areas or other obstacles on the way?”

Chen Rui’s voice awakened the female mercenary from her imagination. She quickly stepped forward to confirm it carefully.

During the next voyage, Chen Rui crushed several storms in succession. Coupled with the Devil’s Snare Ship’s powerful mobility and balance device, the whole journey was smooth and unobstructed. It was as if this was not the most dangerous Storm Sea area, but just a lake with a breeze.

Ina and Lucio were already a little numb to this. They were in a mesmerized state while witnessing the miracle. They stood on the head of the ship and leisurely ‘watched’ the spectacular view of the tornado being dissected until an island appeared in their line of sight.

Storm Island.

TL: This is just the tip of an iceberg😏 when they see his full strength, they will pray him like a God😆

chapters.title: Chapter 658: Titan
chapters.body:
Chapter 658: Titan

The area of Storm Island was much larger than the Hidden Misty Island of the Dead Sea. Unlike the storm raging in the external sea area, there was no hurricane near the Storm Island which was shrouded in mist. It was as if the tornadoes were a barrier surrounding the Storm Island.

“ Roar! “

The roar of beasts and the sound of beating against the water surface sounded among the mist. The roar quickly turned into a groan. Ina knew that at least 2 giant nether hydras were killed. This kind of murderous sea beast hidden in the mist to frighten adventurers would simply end up in tragedy upon meeting the more ‘murderous’ ‘Richard’.

In this situation, Ina and Lucio already had considerable immunity. Compared with breaking the tornado with bare hands, this was just a child’s play.

“There seems to be a ship on the shore in front!” Chen Rui’s voice sounded from the air, “Turn to the southeast direction 18 degrees. Hurry, go closer!”

The Devil’s Snare Ship quickly approached the island. No doubt, 2 ships were moored on the shore.

1 ship was shattered and seemed to have been attacked by a giant nether hydra. The other ship was relatively intact. There were no living people on both ships, only corpses.

The 2 ships should have arrived 1 after another. The corpses on the ship that arrived first were all caused by humans. Judging from the look of their attire, they were ordinary sailors, and they died for more than 1 day.

The ship that arrived later, which was suspected of being attacked by the nether hydra, should belong to Samuel. The cause of the people’s death was obviously the sea beast. Judging from the remaining blood stains, the time of death did not exceed 12 hours. This meant that it wasn’t long since Samuel went ashore.

Chen Rui looked at the magic compass that was unusable due to strong interference, “You guys wait for me here first.”

“I’ll go with you! Items like magic maps are not usable here.” Ina glanced at the special magic compass, “I have completed 2 collection missions here. I’m more familiar with the surrounding terrain than you. I should be helpful to you.”

Seeing the female mercenary’s resolute gaze, Chen Rui slightly pondered and nodded. He instructed Lucio and the sandmen to stay on the shore. With the firepower and sturdiness of the Devil’s Snare Ship, even if it encountered a sea beast’s surprise attack, it could handle it.

At this point, somewhere on Storm Island. Samuel whom Chen Rui was looking for was facing an intense battle.

There were corpses lying on the ground. Part of them were the Kemplot Family guards who came with Samuel, and the rest were naturally the enemies. Joanna was behind Samuel, surrounded by several guards. Although the enemy suffered a lot of casualties, the rest were about 30 or so elites in a circle. The front was a swordsman in armor, and the back was a magician holding a magic wand.

As far as individual strength was concerned, none of the opponents could match Samuel, but this group of enemies was all well-trained. They had a special combination formation that could disperse Samuel’s powerful attacks on everyone in the formation, so the damage was greatly reduced. Coupled with the intentional attack on Joanna, it distracted Samuel. They were in a stalemate for a while.

The last guard of the Kemplot Family collapsed. Samuel’s figure flashed in front of Joanna. As the long sword in his hand launched a light arc, blood splattered; the 2 swordsmen who were approaching were beheaded.

The blood was splashed on Joanna’s long dress. The fishy smell pierced through her nostrils. The young lady resisted the panic and kept quiet for fear of distracting Samuel. Her nails had penetrated deep into her flesh.

“[Dawn Extinction]!” Samuel shouted loudly. There was another sword in his hand, and a huge light mark appeared under his feet. With the swing of the 2 swords, countless crisscross sharp lights spread around. Compared with the past, this move had simplified a lot. There was not much of a fancy effect. The power did not decrease but increased instead. It was the result of Samuel’s improvement after listening to Chen Rui’s opinions.

After the light dissipated, the surrounded swordsmen collapsed in a circle. Even the magicians behind them were killed by this move.
