Samuel once launched this move not long ago. At that time, the magicians used magical barriers combined with special formations to offset most of the power, so it only killed 4 enemies. The lethality this time was several times more than the last time. It was not that Samuel had hidden his strength previously, but he suddenly realized another magical use of [Dawn Extinction] at the moment of crisis.

The 2 long swords in Samuel’s hand only had 1 handle. It turned out that he had deliberately compressed the power, shattered the blade, and sprayed it out with the light of [Dawn Extinction]. It broke the surface with points, effectively penetrating the magician’s barrier to achieve a decisive result.

Although Samuel’s continuous use of killing moves had consumed a lot of power, the enemy only barely had 2 swordsmen leaders standing, and the magician behind had almost exhausted his magic power. Just like a wolf that had lost its claws with no threatening force.

“You are a Saint powerhouse indeed.” The leader swordsman clutched the cut in his abdomen that was penetrated by the short blade with blood constantly spilling between his fingers, “We have exhausted all means, but we are still unable to win despite you having to protect the hostage.”

“You are Light Knight? Tell the mastermind behind you! This is the only chance to survive!” Samuel’s endurance had improved greatly. He quickly adjusted his breathing. With a wave, a long sword from the ground came into his hand. Even if it was not a handy weapon, it was enough to deal with these remnants.

“You don’t need to know.” The swordsman sneered as if he didn’t put life and death in his eyes at all. Samuel knew at a glance that these were fearless warriors.

“Sir Hebel, did… Eliza ask you to do this?” Joanna’s trembling voice sounded. The 2 leader swordsmen Hebel and Lawrence were the Light Knights sent by Eliza to escort her back to Red Dragon City- Eliza was the one who came up with the idea this time for her to return to Red Dragon City in order to get rid of Paul.

To Joanna’s surprise, she actually did not go to Town Vegas of the Red Dragon City. Instead, she was held hostage on the most dangerous Storm Island. If this matter was instructed by her friend, Eliza…

“I’m sorry, Ms. Joanna, it’s impossible for you to get an answer from us.” Lawrence said, “I admit that we are not Sir Samuel’s opponent, but the real losers are both of you! You will all die here!!”

Samuel wouldn’t give the enemy the time to recover. He snorted and was about to finish off these people when his facial expression suddenly changed.

The ground began to shake as if something huge was gradually approaching here.

“ Ah! “

In the woods, Ina’s screaming sounded. This was a black mutated wind leopard whose strength had reached C. It was far better than Mana’s tamed one. With Ina’s D-level strength, she couldn’t resist at all. She was about to be thrown to the ground, but the wind leopard’s movements stopped abruptly. A hand strangled on the wind leopard’s neck, and with a casual flick, the fierce beast was thrown away like a kitten. After breaking many branches, it barely recovered its balance in the air by relying on the instinct of cats before it rolled a few times on the ground, got up again, and limped into the depths of the jungle.

“Are you okay?” Chen Rui’s voice sounded. In fact, Ms. Guide, who was ‘familiar with the terrain’, actually got lost when she took the hirer through the woods. Chen Rui had no choice but to explore the way. When he returned, he happened to save the female mercenary who was sneak attacked by the wind leopard.

“I’m sorry.” Ina lowered her head guiltily. She felt that her strength was as fragile as a newborn baby here. If it weren’t for ‘Richard’, it would be difficult to move at all. She originally wanted to help, but now she had become a real burden.

“It’s not the time to talk about this.” Chen Rui knew that Ina was worried about Samuel, so there was no reason to blame her. He stretched out his hand, “I have found a way out, let’s go through the air.”

Ina nodded and grabbed his arm with both hands. Chen Rui’s feet flicked, and they rose into the air. At this moment, Chen Rui, whose spirit power was fully activated, heard a slight sound from the wind which seemed to be some kind of furious roar.

Chen Rui’s eyes flashed as he shouted to Ina, “Hold tight!”

In the basin, Samuel panted as he looked at the huge figure in front of him vigilantly. This was a ‘human’, a man, but this man’s height was too astonishing. He was about 10 meters tall and had short golden hair. His eyes flashed with pale golden light and his skin had a dark silver metal luster. He was wearing simple armor, exuding a terrifying aura.

When Samuel flew to the front and launched a desperate punch with his remaining power just now, it only left a dent on the dark silver skin which then recovered instantly.

The most powerful creature in Storm Island, titan!

titan was a legendary top existence that could directly use brute force to compete with the giant dragon family. It also had strong element power which could activate range attacks and was immune to all spiritual debuff magic.

Samuel didn’t want to take the initiative to attack this dangerous and powerful creature. He initially wanted to escape with Joanna, but Hebel and Lawrence led the magicians to entangle the 2 desperately. Finally, the titan’s huge figure appeared in Joanna’s horrified eyes.

titan had no distinction between enemies and friends. Perhaps in their eyes, all foreign races were invaders that must be killed. It stepped a magician into minced flesh as soon as it appeared. Hebel and several magicians were annihilated by the [Thunder] launched by titan. Lawrence’s feet also turned into coke due to the lightning that spread out. He fell to the ground and was unable to move.

If Samuel hadn’t carried Joanna to hide quickly, they would have followed in the footsteps of Hebel and the others.

The strength of this giant was at least 2 small realms higher than Samuel. Plus the powerful talent and combat power of the titan, it couldn’t be matched at all.

With the current strength of Samuel, it was difficult to escape alone, let alone with Joanna. Therefore, the Silver Knight chose to fight to the death. Unfortunately, he used too much energy previously to launch a desperate punch, but it did not even penetrate the titan’s skin.

“ Haha! You get it now?!” Lawrence, who fell on the ground, laughed out loud despite his distorted expression in pain and dripping sweat, “Repeat it 1 one last time, let’s die together!”

Samuel gritted his teeth, leaped high, and swung his long sword with another dazzling slash. However, the effect was worse this time. After a few hurried rolls, he avoided the titan’s stomp. He tapped his feet and pulled the distance quickly.

The exhausted Silver Knight gasped violently. Suddenly, he seemed to sense something.He looked back at Joanna. Even though she was far away, he could clearly see her gaze.

In those beautiful dark blue eyes, there was no fear and anxiety as before. There was only a kind of tranquility that was already above the fear; a kind of no regrets of dying together.

Samuel felt the blood in his chest burned again, and his entire life burned. With a roar, a strong light burst out from his body. A powerful momentum surged toward the huge figure.

At this moment, he had surpassed his limit.

The titan’s pale golden eyes flashed. Facing the surging power, a trace of disdain passed in its eyes. It groaned and greeted him with a berserk breath of power.

As the 2 breaths resisted each other in the air, a series of long and narrow cracks quickly spread from the ground. The nearby soil and rocks were rolled up by the air current like a small hurricane.

Although Samuel had burned his full potential with his life, there was still a remarkable power gap between both sides. After holding on for a while, the Silver Knight was on the verge of collapsing. His feet moved backward involuntarily, leaving 2 deep grooves on the ground.

In the blink of an eye, the speed of retreat was getting faster and faster. His momentum was suppressed to the lowest point, and he finally could not stand it. His whole person was thrown away by that huge power.

Suddenly, a light flashed. Samuel, who lost his balance, was supported by a soft power and slowly descended to the ground. There were already 2 more people behind him, 1 man and 1 woman.

Lawrence looked at the familiar man in surprise as he blurted out, “Richard?”

Isn’t this Richard the beast tamer whom Ms. Eliza kind of admires? He also passed his Reserve Light Knight test with her special authority. Why did he appear here?

Samuel was surprised by their appearance, then he came to Chen Rui with a mix of emotion and shame in his eyes. He bowed his head and knelt down on 1 knee.

This action represented an absolute difference between superiority and inferiority. Not only Joanna and Ina, who knew Samuel’s arrogant personality well, but Lawrence also showed an expression of shock: A Saint powerhouse actually knelt to the mediocre ‘beast tamer’…

Chen Rui knew Samuel’s feelings well and didn’t say anything. He just patted him on the shoulder and motioned him to stand up. At this moment, the titan, who felt ignored, surged with a murderous aura as it strode toward them.

The titan only took 2 steps before its action suddenly stagnated. There was already a figure in front; it was Chen Rui.

Compared with the titan’s huge body, Chen Rui’s height could only be regarded as tiny. However, the titan’s eyes showed incomparable vigilance as if this tiny figure needed to be looked up at.

The titant’s power suddenly flourished; the lightning’s crackling sounded in its palm.

Before the titan could attack, Chen Rui suddenly shouted. The titan’s movements became stiff, and its huge body was actually blasted away by an intangible force. “ Boom! ” It fell on a distant mound, and the ground shook violently. A huge human-shaped pit appeared on the mound.

Except for Samuel, the rest of the people were completely shocked by this scene. He shook away the titan with just his momentum!

This is a titan that can easily suppress the strength of Samuel who is at Saint level!

TL: Are they safe now?

chapters.title: Chapter 659: Unexpected Hatred
chapters.body:
Chapter 659: Unexpected Hatred

The titan slowly got up. With a furious shout, it shot a bolt of lightning toward Chen Rui. The titan’s long-range attack method was different from the magic cast by the magicians. They were more like manifesting the power of the elements and throwing it out as javelin.

This lightning contained scorching heat and high pressure which was enough to melt the metal in an instant. The speed of the titan’s throw was quite remarkable. It was several times more powerful than the previous strike against the Light Knight.

The lightning suddenly stopped. This was a 7 meters long ‘javelin’ surrounded by dozens of powerful lightning snakes. There was a palm not far in front of the ‘javelin’. It was the power of this palm that blocked the lightning from going 1 step further.

Chen Rui could feel that kind of raging power. When his open 5 fingers suddenly clutched, the ‘javelin’ shook slightly and disappeared with a ‘boom’ .

The titan’s strongest [Thunder] talent attack was actually crushed by a hand! Lawrence, whose legs were destroyed by the afterwave of the [Thunder] just now, couldn’t believe his eyes. He finally understood why even a person like Samuel would bow to his knees— ‘Richard’ is definitely the real Saint powerhouse who has most probably reached the peak stage of Saint! Such a top powerhouse hides his strength and humbles himself to become a Reserve Light Knight. Even Samuel, the second son of the Dragon Bright Empire’s Kemplot Family, is a subordinate of this person. There is definitely a terrifying scheme in it!

Chen Rui did not give the titan a second chance to launch [Thunder]. He appeared in front of the titan and punched its chest. Compared to the huge body, his fist could only be described as ‘insignificant’, but this ‘little’ punch blasted a horrifying momentum. The titan’s metal breastplate showed a dent. Wave-like impactful power penetrated the armor and spread out in titan’s body, destroying his every resistance.

The titan let out a painful roar. Its huge body was knocked back, leaving a dent on the ground again. It was unable to stand up for a while.

Lawrence smiled wryly. Too powerful! This kind of power can rival the strongest Paladin Captain Parsali of the White Cliff! With this kind of powerhouse intervening, it’s impossible to complete the mission ordered by Eliza this time. We must try to escape and pass this important news to Ms. Eliza!

The strength of this titan had almost reached Demon Overlord. Power and physique were both A+, spirit power was A; only the speed was relatively slow, B+. With Chen Rui’s strength, it was not difficult to kill the opponent, but he did not kill the opponent because the [Analytical Eyes]’s ‘race’ column actually stated: Titan (Alchemy beings)!

Chen Rui first came into contact with alchemy beings in the Loeb Mine of the Demon Realm’s White Feather Estate, then he experienced an unforgettable ‘dream’ and became the master of the ruins of the ancient alchemy civilization and the alchemy beings. The lamp spirits had now become the strongest imperial guards of the Fallen Angel Empire, guarding the safety of Shea. In the memory of the ancient alchemy civilization obtained by Chen Rui, there were no such alchemy beings as the titan. Is it related to the ancient alchemy civilization or is there an ancient alchemy civilization inheritor like me on the Storm Island?

Lawrence had already propped up his body with his hands and moved back secretly. Chen Rui suddenly frowned and looked at Lawrence’s side. Lawrence suddenly felt the sky darkening. Before he could react, his entire body had been trampled into flesh by a huge foot.

Another titan!

This titan was burlier than the one defeated by Chen Rui. It wore a helmet on its head. Its pale silver skin glowed in light green with bright golden eyes. The strength was S which was the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord!

Judging from the tremors on the ground, more than 1 titan is approaching the basin.

“Samuel, take them away!” Chen Rui shouted to Samuel, “Ina, you lead the way and wait for me on the ship!”

Samuel has already reacted. Staying here will only become a burden to His Highness. He quickly carried Joanna on his back and followed Ina.

The titan of the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord was about to attack Samuel and others who were running away, but Chen Rui’s figure instantly appeared in front and launched a dazzling white light ball.

This light ball was 5 meters in diameter and was an amplified version of [Aurora Shot]. The titan noticed the powerful destructive power contained in it, so it immediately gave up the intention of attacking Samuel and others and made a defensive posture.

The moment the titan touched the [Aurora Shot], it trembled with a strenuous expression on his face. Its feet involuntarily took 2 steps back. The heavy footsteps sounded like a giant drum beating, and the rhythm became more and more rapid. After retreating for nearly 200 meters, the light ball gradually disappeared. The armor on the titan’s body was deformed due to the huge pressure. The silver liquid resembling blood overflowed from its mouth and nose.

The titan’s physique and power were probably higher than Chen Rui’s. It seemed that the titan race really had the physical power comparable to the dragons. Of course, Chen Rui deliberately held back the power of this [Aurora Shot]. Before clarifying the relationship between the titans and the ancient alchemy civilization, he didn’t want to cause excessive hatred from the titans.

The pale golden eyes of the titan who was knocked off glowed fiercely. Chen Rui felt the surrounding airflow begin to spin uncontrollably; it was full of violent power. In the blink of an eye, he had been wrapped in a black storm with a terrifying momentum. Obviously, this was a titan with the [Storm] talent which was also known as the storm titan.

The storm continued to rotate at a high speed with lightning flashing inside. The flying sand and rocks in this area made it almost impossible to see. After a long time, it gradually stopped. The titan’s golden eyes suddenly showed horror. A figure appeared safely in the gradually calming sand. The blue shield around his body gradually disappeared as if it was just a refreshing breeze that had just been blowing.

At this time, 4 more titans appeared in the basin. The first titan who was knocked down also got up and surrounded Chen Rui. There were 3 Demon Overlords and 3 Demon Emperors in total. The strongest giant with the pale golden skin had reached the strength of S+. Even Chen Rui dared not underestimate him.

As Chen Rui’s thoughts moved, a special spirit power was emitted. This spirit power contained the spiritual imprint power derived from the ancient alchemy civilization. With Chen Rui’s current realm, he was able to control the breath of this imprint freely.

The titans paused when they sensed the breath of the ancient alchemy civilization’s spiritual imprint. However, something unexpected happened. The titans roared together, and the roar was full of rage.

Chen Rui did not expect this. He was taken aback when he felt the unprecedented hatred and murderous intent in the emotions of the giants from the [Analytical Eyes]. He immediately sent out a spiritual message, “Please wait a moment, I’m not malicious!”

The titans ignored his explanation. A cluster of golden lightning appeared in the hands of the pale golden-skinned titan, and it threw it over.

The power of this cluster of lightning was far from comparable to that of the Demon Emperor titan. Chen Rui couldn’t easily take it with his bare hands like last time. A light blue defensive shield suddenly appeared in front of him. After the protective shield was upgraded to a defensive shield, the ability of absorption and defense was greatly enhanced; it was also easier to use than before. As long as it did not collapse, it could be activated and deactivated repeatedly. Also, it could automatically restore defense power slowly.

The [Storm] of the storm titan did not leave a single crack on the defensive shield just now. At this moment, facing the golden lightning of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord titan, it once again showed strong defensive power. After the lightning dissipated, the nearby land and rock had been melted into crystals by the high temperature of the lightning, but the defensive shield remained motionless with just a few more cracks.

The golden lightning struck again. Chen Rui did not take it forcefully this time. His figure flickered and instantly appeared in another direction, followed by another teleport to avoid the stomp of another titan.

The 6-star evolution’s teleportation skill had no limit on the number of times, but if it was activated continuously, it would consume a considerable amount of spirit power. Furthermore, due to the distance and speed, normal teleportation was not very useful anymore in the battle of Demon Overlord level and above unless it was a higher level of movement such as the one activated by the holy dragon in the Tower of Destruction’s territory.

The physique and power of the titans were very powerful. Their melee combat ability was enough to match the giant dragon, and they also had an extremely firm will. The only weakness was the speed of movement. Chen Rui used this to give full play to the speed advantage. He dodged the [Thunder] among the [Storm] while secretly calculating the time for Samuel and others to leave.

“ Boom! ” Storm titan’s fist made a hole on the hill, but Chen Rui had moved behind the titan instantaneously before the fist arrived. He used the [Aura Blade] to slash horizontally. The storm titan only had time to turn sideways, barely avoiding the vitals. The armor on its back suddenly showed a several meters long blade mark, flowing out silver ‘blood’.

Storm titan cried out with agony. A hurricane whirled around his body at a high speed. Chen Rui had already teleported 100 meters away. Before he could launch a second attack, he immediately sensed that a golden lightning whistled from behind.

Chen Rui’s hand flashed with light. and he drew waves of soft ripples. When the golden lightning encountered these ‘ripples’, it was directed at the black hurricane 100 meters away.

When the golden light in the black hurricane flourished, the lightning and thunder stopped abruptly. Only the sound of heavy objects falling to the ground was heard. After the dust dissipated, the storm titan had fallen to the ground. Its body was constantly convulsing in the golden arc. Although it was not dead, it obviously lost its combat power.

The pale golden-skinned titan was furious. As it was about to launch another attack, Chen Rui’s figure soared into the sky. Subsequently, all the titans felt their body becoming heavier by dozens of times in an instant at the same time. They stood unsteadily and fell down.

[Gravity]!

[Gravity] had greater damage to the heavier enemy. This was the only magic Chen Rui possessed. It was derived from the element blessing of the Earth Elemental King. Combined with his S++ spirit power, it made the titans fall to the ground.

Perhaps due to the call of the companion’s roar, huge bodies appeared 1 after another in the distance. Chen Rui couldn’t help but shudder. Whether in the Demon Realm or the human world, Demon Emperor and Demon Overlord powerhouses are very rare. In the titans’ lair on Storm Island that we plunged into now, the weakest titan is also of Demon Emperor level. I don’t know if there is anything more terrifying.

Calculating the time, Samuels and the rest should have arrived on the Devil’s Snare Ship. Chen Rui did not want to fight, so he activated the [Light Boom] to turn into a ray of light and disappear in the sky quickly.

If he stayed at this time, then he would be able to see that among the titans coming from behind, there was also the existence of a special human form. These mysterious human forms traveled by floating. They were about 2 meters high. Their lower body was like a whirlwind-like airflow which faintly revealed electric sparks.

TL: Can they leave this Storm Island? The ancient alchemy civilization of the Demon Realm seems to be their sworn enemies or some sort, maybe he will have to face another Demi-God again…

chapters.title: Chapter 660: Wind Elemental King
chapters.body:
Chapter 660: Wind Elemental King

Due to Chen Rui’s departure, the [Gravity] gradually weakened. The pale golden-skinned titan stood up first. At this time, there were more than 20 huge figures and dozens of green human figures with whirlwinds on their lower bodies near the basin. The strange thing was that the titans, who were always hostile to the outsiders, did not attack these green human figures. Instead, they seemed to be tacit partners.

1 of the green figures slowly flew into the basin. Sensing the remaining [Gravity] breath, his eyes suddenly glowed with a spark as he made a sharp roar. His figure flashed and disappeared.

The figures behind him all screamed in echoes. They rose into the air and quickly followed the green figure.

Chen Rui just left the basin, and he was about to fly in the direction of the Devil’s Snare Ship when he suddenly heard sharp and long whistling sounds behind him. With his hearing ability, he could hear that 1 of the long whistling sounds with powerful strength was quickly approaching. The speed was simply not inferior to his [Sonic Boom].

With a thought, Chen Rui immediately activated [Sonic Boom] and changed the direction of his advancement. When he flew to a rocky mountain, he suddenly decelerated and landed. He activated the 2 skills of [Breath Holding] and [Sneak] to conceal his figure.

Soon, a green figure appeared in the line of sight. The speed was no doubt astonishing. The green figure in high-speed flying stopped instantly as he seemed to sense something. He looked around vigilantly.

Chen Rui finally saw the approaching figure’s whirlwind lower body, and he was shocked.

At the same time, the corresponding information was displayed in the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Wind elementals.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+.

Physique: S+, power: S+, spirit: S++, speed: S++.

[Analysis]: Wind attribute. Wind element magic immunity. Speed talent. The degree of danger (High).

It is actually a wind elemental!

It turns out that on the Storm Island, there are also wind elementals in addition to the powerful creatures like the titans!

Chen Rui seemed to realize something as he thought of the environment of Storm Island.

The wind elemental in front of him gave him a very strange feeling. It seemed to have a mysterious breath that surpassed the ordinary peak stage of the Demon Overlord. He had sensed this kind of breath before in the 3 Elemental Kings. Meanwhile, the upgraded [ Analytical Eyes]’s analysis data was more detailed. It showed that the speed and spirit power had reached the level of S++. Then this wind elemental is probably 1 of the 3 Kings of Light…

At this moment, dozens of green figures came whistling in the air behind. They were all wind elementals. When the first wind elemental raised his hand, the rest of the wind elementals behind stopped altogether. They kept a certain distance and didn’t dare to get too close. This action further confirmed Chen Rui’s guess, Wind Elemental King!

Wind elementals were the enemy of the earth elementals. They had the fastest speed talent among all elementals, and they could also manipulate the highly aggressive wind element magic.

The overall strength of the wind elementals of the human world surpassed any elementals of the Demon Realm. In the Demon Realm, there were no Demon Overlord-level elite elementals under the 3 Kings of Darkness, but the Wind Elemental King had 4 Demon Overlord wind elementals. There were more than 10 Demon Emperor-level wind elementals.

Chen Rui once heard Moore mention that the level of elite elementals had a lot to do with the origin fragments. Among the 3 Kings of Darkness, only Water Elemental King Lambost with a water origin fragment benefited from the gift of Chen Rui while Dark Elemental King Hegel did not hesitate to take risks for the dark origin fragment. He was currently trapped in the Tower of Destruction.

Wind Elemental King must have the wind origin fragment at hand!

The sensing ability of Wind Elemental King was extremely keen. He actually noticed an anomaly and ordered the wind elementals to search around. Fortunately, Chen Rui’s [Breath Holding] and [Sneak] skills were very magical. Coupled with his S++ spirit power, he was not discovered.

Chen Rui suddenly thought of the wind source power needed by Zola’s Kingdom of Elements. At this moment, there were heavy footsteps behind. It turned out that the titans were coming.

To Chen Rui’s surprise, titans were obviously in a group with the wind elementals. Not only did they not have any conflicts, but they cooperated with the search.

The 2 groups of people searched for a long time to no avail. Wind Elemental King showed a puzzled expression, and he finally did not linger. He greeted the titans and continued to fly forward like lightning. The titans followed suit in heavy steps.

Storm Island was by no means a friendly place. If Chen Rui wanted to obtain the wind source power from Wind Elemental King, he could only use force.

Elemental King’s level of strength was limited to the peak stage of the Demon Overlord for some reason, but in fact, they all had the origin power. Their combat power was far from comparable to the ordinary peak stage of the Demon Overlord. Coupled with the super speed talent of wind elementals, Chen Rui might not be able to secure the victory without using [Pole Star Transformation] in 1-to-1 battle.

Besides, there were also elite wind elementals and Demon Overlord titans. There were 7 peak stage of the Demon Overlords including the Wind Elemental King.

Chen Rui himself didn’t know what kind of power [Pole Star Transformation] could achieve, but he didn’t think too much due to the cost of 10,000 faith crystals. Every faith crystal was extremely precious now. He must hold them tightly and not splurge.

There were priorities. After the 6-star evolution, the star point’s validity period had been extended to 3 years. As long as there was enough faith crystal, Chen Rui could return to the human world from the Demon Realm to get the wind source power next time. Isabella’s matter is the most urgent right now. There is not much time left. I must first gather the 1 million faith crystal needed to return to the Demon Realm.

Seeing the titans’ going away, Chen Rui sneaked silently in the opposite direction and proceeded cautiously all the way. After spending some time, he finally reached the bank where the Devil’s Snare Ship was located.

After boarding the ship, Chen Rui immediately gave the order to leave. The sandmen began to quickly set sail.

“Captain… I…” Samuel was scrupulous about Lucio and others, so he didn’t dare to call Chen Rui ‘Your Highness’ directly. After the Devil’s Snare Ship sailed away from Storm Island, he took a long time to call him this. This time, he not only disappointed the pledge of allegiance back then, ‘His Highness’ even took the risk and rescued him and Joanna in the end. The Silver Knight’s heart was full of shame and guilt.

“Okay, stop talking nonsense.” Chen Rui patted Samuel on the shoulder, “This time you will return to the Dragon Bright Empire to defeat Paul in front of everyone. Also, keep my affairs secret for the time being. Don’t reveal it to anyone including my… ‘father’.”

“Yes! Your… captain, I understand.” Samuel didn’t say more. He just secretly felt grateful in his heart.

“What’s the matter with the 2 ladies?” Chen Rui showed a strange look as he glanced at Joanna and Ina who were talking intimately at the end of the ship, “Sir Silver Knight, it seems that your coordination ability in a certain aspect is far above my imagination.”

“I didn’t do anything.” Samuel said innocently, “It’s just that when we evacuated, Ina was bitten by a viper to protect Joanna in the woods. Then, I helped Ina to suck the poison out. After that… On the ship, Joanna took Ina to the side to talk… and they have been ignoring me.”

The legendary poison sucking to heal injuries? Chen Rui showed a knowing expression when he looked at the white gauze wrapped around Ina’s thigh. The strange gaze made the Silver Knight’s heart shiver. Fortunately, His Highness did not go on gossiping, “Although it is dangerous this time, your gains should not be small. What you have to do now is to calmly comprehend these gains and stabilize your new realm. I was still considering whether to use another external force to increase your power, but it seems that this is no longer necessary.”

Samuel nodded with strong confidence in his eyes, “I will definitely beat Paul.”

“I’ll return this to you.” Chen Rui handed something over. Samuel had mixed feelings at the moment he saw that it was the broken sword. He bowed deeply to Chen Rui. Chen Rui nodded slightly and smiled.

Not far away, Lucio was secretly surprised when he saw Samuel’s respectful expression. He sensibly didn’t ask much.

With Chen Rui in the presence, the Devil’s Snare Ship smoothly left the Storm Sea area. They did not return to the Garden City port, but they drove into the Town Vegas sea area to the southwest.

“Ina, you really don’t want to come back to the Dragon Bright Empire with us?” Joanna looked at Ina in surprise, “We can be best friends. I would like to invite you to be the bridesmaid for my wedding in the future.”

Ina glanced at Samuel and smiled, “We are already good friends. I will definitely come to your wedding. He knows how to find me.”

From the side, Chen Rui could see clearly that the 2 ladies were not as harmonious as they seemed on the surface. Samuel was likely to suffer. As someone who had experienced this, Chen Rui patted Samuel on the shoulder, “Take care.”

The duel was just around the corner. Samuel and Joanna went from Town Vegas to the Red Dragon City of the Dragon Bright Empire by water. Ina had left the mercenary group, saying that she wanted to fulfill his father’s last wish to try starting a business. Lucio, who had been ‘dead’ once, changed his face and decided to follow Ina to see the world himself. Of course, the spearman also had some small plans in his heart. Chen Rui kept the Devil’s Snare Ship and used the method taught by Earth Elemental King to keep the sandmen into the soil essence. He activated the [Star Gate] and immediately returned to the church in the Garden City.

In the Garden City church, Shura had completely stolen the faith power of the Garden City. As a ‘wounded’ in the retreat, he did not arouse any suspicion. Eliza’s injury had almost fully recovered and she was about to set off to the Yang Shao Capital escorted by Paul. Chen Rui naturally went with him.

Paul had received a duel notification from the Dragon Bright Empire. After escorting Eliza to the Yang Shao Capital this time, he must return directly to the Dragon Bright Empire to participate in the duel hosted by Lex the Great. The opponent was the empire’s Silver Knight, Samuel, the second son of the Kemplot Family.

After the duel, Paul would go to the White Cliff to participate in the selection of Divinity Temple Knight.

TL: Well, will Paul still have the face to participate after the duel though? It’s surprising that Chen Rui met the wind elementals so fast. It seemed like the Kings of Light seemed to win in the previous Elemental War as they still retained the origin fragments. Luckily, he didn’t stay and ‘reason’ with the wind elementals and the titans, otherwise there would be no return…

chapters.title: Chapter 661: Throbbing
chapters.body:
Chapter 661: Throbbing

“Richard, what are you thinking? You seem to be in a daze all the time?” Paul jumped off his horse and handed the reins to the servant who came up at the station. He looked at Chen Rui who was in a daze and asked.

When Paul escorted Eliza to the Yang Shao Capital, Eliza’s uncle, Cardinal Roger happened to go to a church in the city to inspect and had not returned. The Chief Bishop and a few bishops accompanied him. Only the Light Knight Captain Rumman stayed in the Hall of Light.

As the duel was around the corner and Lex the Great hosted it himself, Paul didn’t dare to neglect it. He just rested in the church of the Yang Shao Capital for 1 night, then he set off immediately the next morning to the neighboring Dragon Bright Empire. With the identity of Paul, the 2 successfully passed the border fortress of the Dragon Bright Empire and rode their horses all the way to the nearest Dragon Tooth City.

The rich faith power in the Yang Shao Capital’s Hall of Light made Chen Rui intrigued, so he sneaked into the prayer hall that night and had a ‘full meal’. The strategic success of the original body going to Storm Island while the clone stayed in the Garden City as a substitute this time gave Chen Rui inspiration, and a bold plan began to take shape.

Due to the fusion of memories, an unexplainable mood began to surge in Chen Rui’s heart upon entering the Dragon Bright Empire as if he was close to his hometown.

“Sir, I’m just thinking that Samuel was defeated by sir last time, but this time he took the initiative to challenge you publicly, I’m afraid it’s not that simple.” Chen Rui deliberately showed a thoughtful expression, “It is likely that his strength has already broken through or he has mastered a certain secret technique… He cannot be underestimated.”

Paul replied dismissively, “Don’t worry, I have absolute confidence.”

“Sir, don’t blame me for talking too much.” Chen Rui frowned, “My teacher said, strategically, we must despise the enemy, and tactically, we must pay attention to the enemy. Even if the strength of sir is higher than that of Samuel, you must be cautious and very careful.”

“I know your loyalty. There are things that are inconvenient for me to say. I can only tell you not to worry about it.” Paul knew Eliza’s terrifying means. The Storm Island is an extremely terrifying place. Since Eliza is sure that Samuel and Joanna won’t come back alive, so even if Samuel’s strength is really not what it used to be, he will definitely die. The only pity is Joanna, but this woman’s heart is not with me. In the future, as long as I really master power and authority, there will be more and better women even in exchange for Joanna’s death.

“But……”

“No ‘but’. I will surely win this battle.” Paul naturally didn’t know that the subordinate’s intention was to reinforce him, and he smiled slightly, “We have passed the fortress. The Dragon Tooth City is in front of us. In order to get to the capital, Yerodisha, as soon as possible, I have asked the family to arrange 2 griffons in advance. Have you ever had the experience of riding griffons? Even the tamed griffons are superior to ordinary flying demonic beasts.”

“I have had a lot of flying experience, but this is the first time for a griffon. However, sir should have confidence in my beast taming skill. I’m an expert in this respect.” Of course, Chen Rui wouldn’t say: A mere griffon is nothing. I’m a dragon knight. It was even a double meaning. In further discussion, this was related to the difficulty of different postures.

When the griffon saw the little thunderbird on Chen Rui’s shoulder, it showed slight anxiety and hostility. As a powerhouse in the sky, the thunderbird’s level was even above the griffon. Although this thunderbird was only a young bird, it was enough to arouse the griffon’s vigilance. Chen Rui’s ‘beast taming skill’ immediately played a role in smoothly resolving the abnormality of the griffon. Then, he rode the griffon into the air.

Griffon’s flying speed was not lower than the wyvern, but the endurance was slightly inferior. However, Paul’s Loman Family was quite influential; replacement mounts were arranged along the way so that the 2 always flew at the fastest speed.

After 5 days, the 2 finally arrived at Yerodisha, the capital of the Dragon Bright Empire. There were still 3 days before the duel.

‘Yerodisha’ meant ‘shiny gem’ in the dragon language.

As everyone knew, the Dragon Bright Empire, 1 of the 2 major empires of the human world, had an extremely close relationship with dragons. They had the only dragon knight legion in the human world— these were real giant dragons. In comparison, the wyvern riders in the Demon Realm could only be regarded as a pirated version.

Yerodisha was 1 of the most famous cities among humans. It was not only the political and military center of the Dragon Soul Empire, but it was also the largest commercial center. It was magnificent and prosperous. The roads were large enough for 10 large carriages to run side by side. The streets and lanes on both sides were crisscrossed, the buildings were lined, the pedestrians were bustling, and the traffic was endless. The shops were no longer limited to a certain area, but it could be seen everywhere. The bard music could be heard nearby the mini plazas and landmark buildings along the way.

The 3 capitals of the Demon Realm weren’t as prosperous as the capital of the Dragon Bright Empire. Chen Rui, who was a human, was also dazzled.

Paul was the eldest son of the Loman Family, the first inheritor, and his father Salvador. Loman was the deputy director of the Dragon Bright Empire’s Academic Affairs Department. Unlike the House of Representatives of the Blue Glory Empire, the Dragon Bright Empire had a more unique monarchy and a more thorough ruling. Under the king were ‘2 councils and 3 departments’. Namely, Government Administration Council, Military Administration Council, Legal Affairs Department, Finance Affairs Department, and Academic Affairs Department.

The Government Administration Council handled the empire’s political affairs; the Military Administration Council was responsible for the affairs of the empire’s army; the Legal Affairs Department was the institution that enforced and maintained the empire law; the Finance Affairs Department was in charge of economic projects such as commerce and agriculture; the Academic Affairs Department was in charge of colleges and education.

The empire had clear levels of authority and distinct powers. The Demon Realm empires could really learn from them in many aspects.

In terms of strength and background, the Loman Family was originally a small family in the empire. Relying on the great efforts of recent generations, the power had gradually increased. It had gradually entered the upper level of the empire. After Paul became the most famous swordmaster among humans and the apprentice of the Holy Light Mountain Paladin Captain Parsali, his influence and power further expanded. In addition to his recent marriage contract with the Philip Family, many butterfly effects had occurred. The former Academic Affairs Department’s director, Old Lyon, submitted his resignation to Lex the Great several times due to his age. Rumors said that he finally got the approval of Lex the Great not long ago. The new Academic Affairs Department director would be elected among the 3 deputy directors, of which Paul’s father, Salvador, got the most support. It was said that when Salvador accompanied Lex the Great to inspect the Star Dragon College last week, Lex the Great personally revealed this intention. Although the formal appointment letter had not arrived yet, many people in the Academic Affairs Department had begun to curry favor with the future deputy director.

Chen Rui followed Paul to the Loman Family’s mansion just in time to see Salvador, who was personally sending a few people out of the gate. When these people saw Paul, they all smiled, and some bowed. Paul recognized the leader as the patriarch of the Lincoln Family who was once a former competitor of the Loman Family. In recent years, as the power of the Loman Family had grown, the Lincoln Family had begun to change its strategy to form a good relationship with the Loman Family.

Now that Paul’s participation in the Divinity Temple Knight selection was imminent and the wedding date was approaching, the Lincoln Family Patriarch personally sent his second son, Diego, to the Loman Family to become a subordinate of Paul. This symbolized that the Lincoln Family would completely surrender to the Loman Family. Salvador would naturally not refuse, and he had already agreed on behalf of his son.

Paul thought for a while and did not express any objection. Although the emergence of this ‘competitor’ was a bit unexpected, Chen Rui did not take it seriously. His ‘beast taming skill’ and ‘soul language’ were highly valued by Eliza, and his ‘loyalty’ to Paul had been tested. To say the least, whether this subordinate would stay with Paul after the duel was still a question.

Seeing Chen Rui’s calm look, Paul nodded approvingly. As a powerhouse, he would definitely have more than 1 subordinate in the future, but subordinates were also divided into excellent and bad qualities. Compared with Diego with a hint of impetuous in his eyes, the ability and loyalty of ‘Richard’ were obviously more trustworthy.

The Philip Family and Kemplot Family did not seem to have any movement. There was no news of Samuel or Joanna as well. Paul was more confident in his heart. In the following days, he either participated frequently in various socializing or led Chen Rui and Diego to show off in the capital; Chen Rui had the chance to witness Yerodisha’s prosperity.

3 days later, the date for the duel finally arrived.

The location of the duel was in the capital’s largest royal arena. The reputation of Paul’s top genius swordsman was very widespread in Yerodisha. Furthermore, the Dragon Bright Empire Lex the Great personally hosted it this time. The upper noble families were all present. In addition to the civilians who were here to join in the fun, the huge arena was packed.

Paul’s appearance was very ideal. He wore a dazzling blue gem armor and a silver cloak today. The entire person looked dazzling and attracted the attention of many people. When he walked elegantly into the arena, many noble families’ young ladies and women screamed in high pitch one after another.

Gossip related to this duel was also circulating in the crowd. For instance, in the ‘triangular relationship’ between Joanna, Samuel, and Paul, Samuel lost his fiance in the duel back then, and so on. Before the duel started, the entire scene was already quite vibrant.

Chen Rui was in Paul’s ‘friends and relatives group’ which was located just opposite the VIP seat. Although it was far away, he could clearly see the scene of the opposite VIP seat with his vision.

1 of the 2 great kings of the humans, Lex. Roland sat in the very center of the VIP seat.

Lex wore a pale gold robe with a crown on his head and a staff in his hand. He was about 35 years old. He was handsome and had a beard which was full of the charm of a mature man. Arthur’s outline was faintly visible on his facial features, and his eyes were flashing with a supreme deterrence.

After seeing Lex’s face clearly, Chen Rui’s heartbeat accelerated a lot. There was a strange feeling of intimacy in his heart which originated from the fusion memory. In the memory, the king seemed to be a doting father, at least, he used to be.

There was a young man with silver hair and golden pupils beside Lex with a casual expression. Judging from the position of the seat beside the king, this person’s status should be very special. This young man faintly gave Chen Rui a dangerous feeling. It was like seeing Raizen in the Bloody Empire back then. At that time, Chen Rui was only at the level of the Demon Emperor.

Perhaps the young man had noticed the peeping, so he glanced over. Chen Rui immediately retracted his gaze, then he shouted and cheered along with Diego for Paul. After the young man looked for a while and found no abnormalities, he turned his head again.

Chen Rui was secretly vigilant. Just in case, he didn’t dare to look at the young man again. However, a special feeling in his heart became stronger as if something was attracting him. His eyes moved involuntarily to the side, and they were finally fixed on the person on the left of Lex.

This was a woman with short golden brown hair and deep beautiful blue eyes. She was sitting next to a man. In contrast to the exposed sexy outfits of other noble families, she was wrapped in a tight robe and wore a veil.

At the moment Chen Rui saw this woman, he felt that the frequency of his heartbeat like never before. With his will and power at the moment, he was actually unable to restrain it.

This was the throbbing of ‘Arthur’. For the first time, it was so strong.

TL: Is she Arthur’s first love?

chapters.title: Chapter 662: Duel
chapters.body:
Chapter 662: Duel

In Chen Rui’s mind, some memory fragments began to appear. Most of these fragments were incomplete and vague, but they all had a common feature – The eyes.

The blue eyes were as beautiful as the sea, and there was a touch of sadness in the deep tenderness.

In a trance, all the fragments began to overlap, combining into a blurred scene. A warm hand gently brushed the boy’s face before the person slowly turned away. The distant back became more and more blurred in the boy’s tears.

This was the most vivid scene in Arthur’s subconscious mind. Or maybe it was called obsessiveness. Even Chen Rui’s subconsciousness, which had been fused with the memory fragments, couldn’t obliterate this strong obsession.

Chen Rui took a deep breath as he finally suppressed the strong mood swings. He frowned and asked Diego on the side, “Who is the woman sitting in the second row to the left of His Majesty?”

“Second row from the left?” Diego squinted his eyes for a long time. He couldn’t see clearly, but he refused to show weakness. He deliberately said, “ Oh, it’s her. Don’t be delusional. A woman who can sit in that position is not someone a small character like you can covet.”

Chen Rui said in his heart: Covet your sister! If I really show you my royal identity, I’m afraid your sister will covet me. Before he could ask any more, Paul in the arena spoke up.

Paul bowed to Lex the Great in the VIP seat, then he exhaled and said, “Your Majesty Lex, Your Highnesses, sirs, and guests.”

Paul’s powerful voice overwhelmed the audience. The noisy arena gradually became quiet.

“I’m very sorry for keeping everyone waiting. You must feel very strange, why hasn’t my opponent Samuel. Kemplot shown up yet?”

Paul’s words caused whispers which were obviously guessing the reason. According to the time, the challenger Samuel should have appeared, but he was nowhere to be seen even now!

The patriarch of the Kemplot Family, Samuel’s father, the empire’s Finance Affairs Department’s deputy director Carlo. Kemplot had already begun to sweat, Samuel was the Silver Knight of the Empire, and the duel was hosted by Lex the Great himself. Cowardice and defeat were 2 complete concepts. If Samuel hadn’t appeared yet, it would no longer be a question of the outcome of the duel. The Kemplot Family wouldn’t be able to bear the anger of Lex the Great.

“Here I want to announce to you the news that I just got today. The channel of this news is originally very reliable, but because the content of the news is too shocking, I have not been sure. However, as Samuel has not shown up now, it is enough to prove the truthfulness of this news.”

Paul glanced at Carlo, who was constantly wiping his sweat, and turned his gaze on the Philip Family’s patriarch and Joanna’s father Frett with a sneer, “The news is that Samuel knows he is not my opponent. Just under the guise of a duel, he has eloped with my fiancee Joanna long ago!”

This was indeed explosive news. There was a sudden commotion in the arena stands with more and more discussions. Many people knew about Samuel and Joanna’s love relationship, and they also knew about Samuel’s loss in the last duel. Regardless of his daughter’s objections, Joanna’s father set a wedding date with the Loman Family. It was unexpected that Samuel was so bold this time that he ignored the duel hosted by Lex the Great and escaped with Joanna!

Patriarch Frett of the Philip Family was shocked. His gaze at Paul was full of shock and anger. Joanna went to the Garden City to relax and had not returned. Even if she eloped with Samuel, it was not impossible. But Frett didn’t expect Paul, who had always been respectful to him, didn’t inform him beforehand. Instead, he directly revealed the incident in front of His Majesty Lex and everyone. It was equivalent to humiliating the Philip Family in the face. Not only that, this scandal was tantamount to directly damaging the reputation of the arbiter Lex the Great. It would bring extremely serious consequences to both the Philip Family and the Kemplot Family.

If it was before Eliza’s persuasion, Paul would definitely not offend the Philip Family. Now that he had decided on his future, he must show his determination to the church and the Holy Lady. If the 2 families could be suppressed at the same time, it would definitely benefit the Loman Family’s expansion without any harm. As long as the Loman Family grew to a certain degree, plus the church’s secret support, even Lex the Great would be deterred to a certain degree.

Many people in the VIP seats also whispered while Lex the Great was still indifferent without joy and anger. No one knew what he was thinking.

At this moment, the surrounding discussion suddenly subsided. Paul was slightly shocked as he seemed to sense something. A disbelief light flashed in his eyes as he slowly turned his head.

2 people appeared in the court, 1 man and 1 woman; it was Samuel and Joanna.

Paul couldn’t believe his eyes. Shouldn’t Samuel and Joanna be killed in Storm Island? Is this Eliza’s trick? This is even more impossible. Eliza finally managed to win me over. She has no motive to frame me!

“First of all, I want to plead guilty to Your Majesty. Due to some special reasons, I’m late.” Samuel saluted toward the VIP table, “I was delayed because I went to a dangerous place to save the favorite woman in my life. That place is called Storm Island.”

As soon as this sentence came out, the audience was once again in a commotion. The Storm Island! That is a dangerous place that even a Saint Powerhouse dares not to approach! For Joanna, Samuel actually… By the way, why was Joanna on Storm Island?

“What a joke! How can you save people from Storm Island?” Paul had quickly recovered from the shock. His thoughts had changed sharply, “It’s obviously you who seduced my fiancée… then both of you colluded to make up this ridiculous lie!”

“Joanna is no longer your fiancée. Regardless of the outcome of this duel, the marriage contract between the Philip Family and Loman Family will be canceled.” It was Patriarch Frett of the Philip Family. The Philip Family’s power was even above the Loman Family. In the beginning, he forced his daughter to marry Paul because of the Kemplot Family’s fall from grace and Paul’s potential and church background. Now, Paul humiliated the Philip Family severely in front of everyone and almost destroyed the Philip Family, he naturally wouldn’t be so stupid that he would give Samuel another chance to humiliate them.

This decision was expected by many people, including Paul, but when he heard Frett’s announcement in person, he still had an heartache. A strong resentment that surged in his heart was naturally directed at Joanna and Samuel.

At this moment, Lex the Great’s low voice sounded from the VIP seat. The surroundings suddenly fell silent.

“Since the 2 parties of the duel have arrived, then the duel begins.”

Samuel nodded to Joanna. Joanna sensibly didn’t say a word. She just gave him a lovely smile and walked to the stand.

Paul’s face was already covered with haze, and his eyes were full of hostility. Joanna had always been cold to him and had never smiled like that- This damn couple can come back alive in Storm Island and show up in the arena in time. This really causes a heavy setback to me. Now that things have developed to this point, I must defeat Samuel in the duel. As a winner, I will insist that Samuel and Joanna colluded to frame me. Then, I’ll rush to the Holy Light Mountain to become the Divinity Temple Knight and make use of the Holy Light Mountain’s power to protect the Loman Family.

Although many of the previous plans have to be aborted in this way, it is the only way to remedy and reverse the situation.

Paul groaned and exuded a murderous aura as he clenched a long sword in both hands. This was a 2-handed sword named ‘Magnificent Light’ gifted by Paul’s teacher, Paladin Captain Parsali. The 2-handed sword was also called a 2-handed greatsword. The width and length of the sword body were far beyond that of ordinary 1-handed swords. There was a ricasso between the blade and the hilt which could not only play a role in connection, but it was also inlaid with a magic gem that also acted as a buff. The quillons were slightly tilted upwards with sharp blades at the end like the fangs of a beast.

Samuel slowly drew out a long sword. Compared with ‘Magnificent Light’, this excellent grade sword was just an ordinary item. The breath on the Silver Knight did not have any specific fluctuation. Compared with Paul’s aggressive aura, his aura was like a calm well.

Lex the Great’s gaze stopped for a while on Samuel, brightened slightly, and was calm again. The young man on the side suddenly yawned as if he had foreseen the outcome of the victory and defeat. He was not interested in watching anymore. This action seemed rude to Lex the Great, but Lex didn’t mind at all while the rest of the people didn’t seem to notice it.

Paul’s figure flashed, and he quickly approached Samuel. The 2-handed sword swept across with the sound of a terrifying wind. As long as there was a space to wield the 2-handed sword, its power was quite terrifying. Staggering cracks had already appeared on the solid ground protected by the enchantment due to the wind pressure of the sword.

Samuel didn’t take it forcibly. He mainly dodged and adopted a guerilla strategy. It seemed that he wanted to exhaust Paul’s physical strength. Paul was unmoved as his attack became more vigorous.

In fact, the last time Paul had a duel with Samuel, he didn’t use his true strength. This time, Samuel’s strength obviously went to the next level as he entered Saint (Pseudo-Saint) which was equal to him. However, Paul was aware of the weakness of Samuel’s lack of endurance which was precisely Paul’s strength. Since Samuel defended and dodged with great difficulty under this kind of high-pressure attack, his consumption of physical strength would be greater, so he would definitely first be exhausted by then.

Suddenly, Samuel’s long sword drew an unimaginable arc. The back of the blade was pressed against the spine of the greatsword swiftly. This speed and power were above imagination.

Paul was taken aback. He turned his head hurriedly, and he felt a chill on his face. His face had been slashed by the sword. Samuel didn’t give him another chance. The long sword in his hand was like a cunning viper, bypassing the sharp edge of the greatsword and frequently locking in Paul’s vitals.

In the dim light of the sword, there were several cuts on the blue gem armor on Paul’s body, and there was blood dripping on the ground. It was Paul’s blood.

Chen Rui nodded secretly. Since accepting the pointers, Samuel’s combat skills and power use have made great progress. In fact, the difference in strength between the 2 sides is not very large. Paul’s strength is only 1 step away from the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor while Samuel has just been promoted to the intermediate stage of the Demon Emperor. There is no suspense in this battle. I can plan the next move with peace of mind now.

TL: Does Paul still have some hidden power?

chapters.title: Chapter 663: Confer Rewards
chapters.body:
Chapter 663: Confer Rewards

“[Unassailable]!”

The greatsword’s gem in Paul’s hands shone with crystal light. When the sword was thrust into the ground, his body was immediately wrapped in flames. The flames instantly turned into countless interlaced translucent light shields. This technique was taught by his teacher, Parsali. It was equivalent to an absolute defensive compression territory power; the effect was far above the general protection magic.

Paul himself did not expect that he would actually be completely suppressed by someone he formerly defeated in this duel, and he was forced to activate this move so soon.

Samuel couldn’t break through the [Unassailable] territory despite the continuous attacks. With a flick of his figure, he pulled a distance from Paul. A huge light mark appeared under his feet with a strong destructive breath as his long sword pointed at Paul.

“[Dawn Extinction]?” Paul sneered secretly. Samuel also used this move in the last duel, but it was easily cracked by him. He knew the characteristics of this move. This move also contained territory power and the attack range was very large. The disadvantage was that it consumed a lot of power, and the attack surface was relatively scattered. The defensive characteristics of the [Unassailable] happened to restrain it.

Although Samuel had shown the strength to overwhelm him, as long as he guarded against this trump card, and then launched a counterattack while Samuel’s physical strength was exhausted, he could reverse the dire situation in a move, or even make a comeback.

In the midst of the fierce battles, the opportunities were only fleeting, so the time to judge or think was extremely short. Normally, only 1 choice could be made which was more of an instinctive reaction. Samuel’s sword had burst out an extremely sharp qi. Paul made a decision in an instant to not dodge it. He fully channeled the territory power to tank it with [Unassailable].

The light in the arena was shining, and the nearby protective enchantment vibrated violently. That kind of customized high-strength defensive stone slabs could not withstand the huge pressure and shattered 1 after another.

Paul sensed the strong impact against the [Unassailable]. Those transparent light shields began to thin out and were even slightly distorted, but he was not surprised but rejoiced instead. The characteristic of [Unassailable] is somewhat similar to springs. The thinner the shield, the stronger the defense – The power of [Dawn Extinction] is no doubt terrifying, but with the [Unassailable] sturdiness, it can definitely hold on till the end.

At this moment, Paul suddenly felt that the flow of territory power was different. With a swoosh , there was a pain in his shoulder. Something sharp had penetrated into his armor. It was a throbbing pain. Immediately afterward, sharp objects continued to break through the shield at high speed. It was like Paul was shot continuously. His body shook violently. There were pierced holes on the surface of the [Unassailable] shield. Although they gradually healed automatically, they were still unable to resist that kind of sharp impact.

After the burst of light flashed, Paul had become a bloody man. The transparent shield surface had collapsed as he staggered back. As soon as he stood firm, before he had time to make the next reaction, he stopped breathing abruptly. There was already a sharp sword on his throat.

A broken sword.

At this moment, Paul finally realized it. It turns out that [Dawn Extinction] is completely different from before. The scattered attacks are condensed together, and the power is multiplied. What is even more difficult to guard against is that Samuel deliberately shattered the long sword and mixed it with [Dawn Extinction] to shoot out. The shattering blade that contains the territory power is extremely sharp. The lethality is so amazing that even [Unassailable] can’t resist it. He must have done something to the sword. No wonder he rarely defended my Magnificent Light greatsword previously. He is well-prepared in this fight!

Paul’s second reaction was shocked. I have lost to Samuel in front of Joanna, Lex the Great, the upper class nobles, and all the audience!

Both of their movements were extremely fast just now. Many of the audience could not see clearly. When this scene was frozen, the stands were silent: The result of the duel is shocking. The top genius, Paul, whom the audience thought highly of before the duel, actually lost! Judging from the bloody scene, it was even a fiasco!

Samuel glanced at Paul calmly and did not say anything like the winner’s declaration, but he slowly retracted the broken sword and turned around.

This was plain ignorance. A strong shame and anger surged in Paul’s heart. He had the urge to do a sneak attack from behind to slash Samuel into halves, but this idea was only fleeting. This was not the wilderness, but the royal arena. The arbiter Lex the Great alone was 1 of the strongest Saints in the human world. If he dared to act rashly, he and the Loman Family would definitely be dead even if Samuel’s life or death was unknown.

“Samuel won this duel.” Lex the Great’s voice sounded. He was still calm.

Samuel bowed to Lex the Great. At this time, a smiling man sitting at the bottom right of Lex the Great stood up and spoke, “Father once said that in order to achieve real success, hard work is better than talent. More importantly, I can imagine how much hard work our Silver Knight has put in to achieve the impressive victory today. Sir Samuel, I’m very interested in your heroic deeds in Storm Island this time. May I know if you can satisfy my curiosity? Maybe you can take out some trophies to widen my horizons?”

The man spoke eloquently, but he was actually questioning the incident at Storm Island. He obviously was ill-intentioned to ask in this situation where Samuel had just won.

Chen Rui knew that this man was his ‘second brother’ Garfield. The Golden Estate of ‘Arthur’ was currently ruled ‘on behalf’ by Garfield. Garfield and Samuel’s father, Carlo, had a long-term grudge, so he had often framed and suppressed them. The current plight of the Kemplot Family was inseparable from the ‘effort’ of the second prince.

Facing Garfield’s attack, Samuel looked very calm as he bowed, “Your Highness Garfield, unfortunately, I went to the Storm Island just to save my lover who was framed by a sinister plan. I am not a hero. Furthermore, if it was not for a fluke to escape the Storm Island, Joanna and I would have died in the hands of the titans.”

The titans? The surrounding discussions began to intensify again. Rumor has it that the titan can contend with the giant dragon. Unexpectedly, Samuel actually encountered this terrifying giant creature!

With that said, Samuel took out a piece of palm-sized silver metal, “This is what I found when I was escaping. It is not a trophy. I initially wanted to keep it by my side as a reminder and to give myself a higher goal to work toward. Perhaps this can satisfy Your Highness.”

The young man next to Lex the Great stared at the piece of metal from a distance. His silver eyes gleaming, “The silver scale armor piece is indeed the titan’s craftsmanship. This little brat is pretty good.”

The young man’s voice was not loud, but Garfield on the side heard it. He didn’t dare to question any more, so he sat down.

Lex the Great nodded slightly, “Samuel, I acknowledge your courage and strength. I shall confer you the title of the empire’s golden knight. The official conferring ceremony will be held 3 days later.”

Lex the Great paused and glanced at the young man on the side and added another sentence, “I will give you the qualification to participate in the Dragon Valley Meeting in the second half of the year. If you can get the approval of the dragons, you will officially become a member of the Dragon Knight Legion.”

Samuel was overjoyed and quickly knelt down on 1 knee to thank the reward. The reward of Lex the Great caused a sensation in the entire royal arena. It is not too surprising for Samuel to become a golden knight. After reaching the corresponding level of strength, he is qualified to become the golden knight. Paul is the reserve golden knight. It’s just that Samuel skipped the reserve level only. With Samuel’s performance in beating Paul today, this kind of skipping is understandable.

The most important matter is the qualifications for the Dragon Valley Meeting at the end. This kind of meeting is actually the strongest and highest-ranking dragon knight selection competition. It is held every 50 years with only 10 candidates at a time. The competition is extremely fierce. Even the golden knight can hardly obtain this qualification. Unexpectedly, Lex the Great actually directly awarded 1 of these places to Samuel today!

Many upper-level noble families had begun to speculate whether this was a sign of the re-emergence of the Kemplot Family? Patriarch Carlo of the Kemplot Family showed an excited expression as he bowed deeply to Lex the Great from afar. After Joanna’s father, Frett, publicly announced that Joanna and Paul’s marriage was invalid, he was still thinking of whether to accept Samuel whom he once rejected. He immediately made up his mind after hearing the reward. The second prince Garfield still had a smile on his face, but there was no joy in the stiff smile.

Paul, who was standing still in the arena, was more like an outsider at this time. The glory and reward Samuel had obtained were equivalent to a slap in his face. He was the top talented swordsman of the empire and the apprentice of Paladin Captain Parsali. He was high-spirited as if nobody could beat him. He had always been shrouded by the halo of genius and winner. When had he ever suffered such a tragic defeat?

It wasn’t until Chen Rui walked into the court and held him that Paul came back to his senses. He felt as if his body had lost power, and he could only stagger down with Chen Rui’s support.

The news that Samuel defeated the top genius, Paul, and was conferred as the golden knight spread all over Yerodisha in an instant. It seemed to be a chain reaction; the result of the duel triggered a series of events that followed. The resignation of Lyon, the old director of the Empire Academic Affairs Department, was approved by Lex the Great, and the successor was the former Finance Affairs Department director Gruccia; the Academic Affairs Department deputy director Salvador. Norman was transferred to the Military Administration Council; Patriarch Carlo of the Kemplot Family was promoted as the Finance Affairs Department director…

Many discerning people had noticed that this series of personnel changes were more like a long-prepared reshuffling. The so-called duel was just the fuse. In recent years, the church-related family power had expanded more and more which has long aroused Lex the Great’s vigilance. In any case, the supreme ruler of an empire was the king after all.

The Loman Family’s Patriarch Salvador was originally the most popular candidate for the Academic Affairs Department director. Even Lex the Great verbally revealed the relevant intent, but he was now transferred to the Military Administration Council. The position of the 2 councils was higher than that of the 3 departments. This kind of transfer seemed to be a promotion on the surface. In fact, Salvador just carried a nameless title in the Military Administration Council. It was not comparable to the Academic Affairs Department’s director who had the real power. The network of contacts and interests that he initially worked hard to build over the years in the Academic Affairs Department would gradually disintegrate too.

This incident caused the Loman Family to suffer a more severe setback than on the surface. The family’s business was affected in all aspects. The initially crowded mansion was now deserted and quiet; no one came to visit. Even the Lincoln Family subordinate, Diego, disappeared. It was the superficiality of human relationships. Only Chen Rui, the ‘loyal’ subordinate, still stayed in. He continued to encourage the frustrated Paul.

Paul was moved as he watched the sincere eyes of his subordinate. He finally made up his mind to cheer up again and go to the White Cliff to participate in the selection of Divinity Temple Knight- Poor Paul, he could not see the hidden motives behind Richard’s ‘sincerity’. Otherwise, he would perhaps be moved until his 7 orifices bleed.

TL: That would be a great scene…

chapters.title: Chapter 664: Beast
chapters.body:
Chapter 664: Beast

In the evening, in the lounge of a tavern.

“Is it just an engagement?” Chen Rui smiled and raised his cup.

Compared with the major personnel changes of the capital, the news of Samuel and Joanna’s engagement was trivial. Of course, for the 2 ‘involved parties’, this was the most important. After all kinds of hardships, the 2 lovers were finally able to come together.

Samuel hurriedly got up and bottomed up his drink, “The family has family rules. After the engagement, it will take at least 3 months before the wedding can be officially held.”

“Sit down, as I said, don’t be so restrained, “Chen Rui waved his hand to Samuel. What I hate the most is the unnecessary rules.”

Samuel sat down and said with a smile, “If Your Highness returns to the palace now, then your marriage with Princess Landbis of the Blue Glory Empire will definitely be resumed. Princess Landbis is known as the most shining pearl of the Blue Glory Empire. This marriage was envied by many people back then. I can be sure that Your Highness will experience more ‘rules’ in marriage than me now.”

Princess Landbis? The most shining pearl? Chen Rui frowned, and he shook his head indifferently. So what if she’s a princess? I even have 2 empresses. How can this Landbis be comparable?

“This is for you.” Chen Rui took out a long sword with a sheath in his hand and handed it over.

Samuel took the sword respectfully. When he touched it, the touch of the dark red sheath gave him an extraordinary feeling. At Chen Rui’s gesture, Samuel gently drew out the sword. He suddenly felt a chill, and he couldn’t help but shiver. The whole sword had no fancy accessories and no dazzling light. It was silent when it was waved, and the blade was extremely sharp. The pale blue sword had a faint texture like fish scales which looked simple and mysterious.

The weight and length of this sword were extremely handy. What surprised Samuel was the wonderful sense of combining with the sword as if it was a part of his body. He could activate its power and skill at ease. After just a few wielding, he was so fond of it and unwilling to put it down.

“I will follow Paul to the White Cliff soon, so I cannot participate in your engagement and even your wedding.” Chen Rui shrugged, “The quality of this ‘Flying Obliteration’ should be considered top grade in the legendary grade. I made it by myself. Consider it as a gift for you in advance. In addition to the buff attribute, there is also a feature that you would like very much. As long as you activate the rune on the sword with a special method, the blade can be turned into fragments and burst out. As long as you activate the corresponding, the fragments will automatically retract back.”

Flying Obliteration- Sharp, deepen wounds, increase wielding speed by 50%, absorb enemy power through damage to slowly restore physical strength.

Special attribute: The blade has the characteristics of splitting and merging; it can be split into hundreds of fragments and retracted. The fragment state increases the splash damage by 30%.

With Chen Rui’s current mechanical skills. The probability of making legendary grade equipment was quite high, but it was not so easy to make a quasi-artifact. In addition to personal status, he must also have corresponding inspiration like the Iron Tree Spark House in the mountain hobbit last time. Nonetheless, the value of this sword was definitely not under the quasi-artifact for Samuel.

Samuel’s eyes lit up as he stroked Flying Obliteration like it was a treasure. This sword attribute is too suitable for me, especially the characteristics of spliting and merging. It is just tailor-made for the improved version of [Dawn Extinction]. By the way, His Highness made it specially for me. He must have taken a considerable amount of effort to accommodate my new move. His Highness really put in effort in this…

Wait! Top grade legendary item? Made by hand?

Samuel suddenly thought that the full set of eternal black potions he had consumed was also from the hands of this Third Highness, and his heart beat violently: Peak stage of the Saint! Potion grand master! Also, a top mechanic master!

If the Third Highness returns to the palace now, it is very possible to directly become the first inheritor of the throne with this kind of strength. Why should…

“Your Highness,” Samuel barely suppressed the shock in his heart, “Forgive me for asking…”

Chen Rui shook his head, patted Samuel, and interrupted his question, “Everyone has a pursuit and perseverance in their hearts, just like you go to the Demon Realm and the Storm Island to train for Joanna, I also have my own goals. I can’t answer you too much right now. I have only 1 request – No matter what happens, you can’t reveal my identity to anyone at any time without my permission. If you want to treat this as an order, then this is my only order.”

Samuel didn’t ask anymore. He just nodded solemnly.

“Okay, I should go too. I hope that when we meet next time, you are already a dragon knight.” Chen Rui stood up and said, “By the way, that… Um , nothing. Take care.”

Chen Rui wanted to ask who the woman wearing the veil was, but he didn’t ask any more.

The veiled woman and Arthur must have such a deep bond that even the fusion of part of Arthur’s consciousness has produced such a strong reaction, but so what? Arthur is Arthur, me is me.

The Dragon Bright Empire is Arthur’s home, but not mine. I am just an occasional passer-by. Even if I came here, I will leave eventually.

It was like the sentence he often said to his beloved woman: I’m Chen Rui, Chen Rui’s Chen, Chen Rui’s Rui.

At this moment, he suddenly missed them badly in the Demon Realm.

The Demon Realm.

Dark Moon Estate.

The former residence of the sheriff and financial officer.

A pair of beautiful eyes were looking at the 2 purple moons in the sky. Her red gem-like pupils seemed to be covered with a thin layer of mist.

“ Hey, Athena, why are you in a daze? Hurry up and eat, otherwise Paglio and the others will take it all.” Olypheus was slurred with a braised hoof in her mouth. In fact, judging from Ms. Black Dragon’s heap of food in front of her, the dishes on Paglio and Roman’s side were just insignificant.

“Alright, Olypheus.” Athena turned her head and smiled.

Delia on the side had experienced this before, so she understood what Athena was thinking. She handed over a glass of wine, “Miss him?”

“ En .” Athena responded gently and took the wine. She was not someone who could hide her mind, especially in front of good friends.

Today was Delia’s birthday and a small party was held. Due to a series of large-scale events such as Catherine’s visit and follow-up cooperation, Shea, the empress, and Princess Alice couldn’t get out of the capital while Zola was unable to come as her training had reached a critical juncture. The rest of the friends had shown up.

“I’m sorry.” Isabella, who was sitting next to Krobelus across the table, said. Chen Rui went to the Dead Sea to look for the Dark Elemental King for several months without any news, and this dangerous journey was precisely for her.

For these close friends, this matter was no longer a secret including the relationship between Chen Rui and Isabella. Only Roman was a bit awkward. After all, Isabella was his father’s sister; even though it was nothing in the Demon Realm and he also contributed to this at the beginning.

Facing Athena and Kia, Ms. Secret Intelligence actually had a guilty conscience. It was completely different from facing Shea. Except for Zola, she usually avoided meeting them as much as possible. She just stayed in the Rainbow Valley for recuperation and occasionally went to the capital to help Her Majesty Empress to strategize. Isabella received an invitation from Roman for Delia’s birthday this time. Her close friend, Krobelus, also tried her best to convince her to go. Thinking that she might not have much time, Ms. Yini simply let go.

Surprisingly, perhaps out of sympathy, Isabella saw more of friendliness and tolerance in Athena’s eyes. It was not a deliberate pretense, but genuine kindness. This silenced the Devil’s Snare who was usually socially active; she did not speak until this moment.

“You don’t have to apologize.” Athena shook her head and smiled, “If it’s me or someone else, he will do the same. You should know him well, so you should trust him. He will be back in time.”

Kia also nodded. In fact, the little charming girl even secretly whispered to Athena beforehand, and she proposed to join forces to deter Isabella. However, when she really faced Isabella, the succubus maid couldn’t bear to be hard-hearted anymore when she suddenly remembered that she had been tortured by the [Soul Shackles] and waited for death every day.
