It was not the first time Isabella heard the last sentence. Her nose was suddenly prickly, and she turned her face away, “Thank you.”

“Actually, I also miss my boss very much. I really miss him.” Ms. Black Dragon on the side interrupted with a bitter expression on her face as she wiped her greasy mouth. The pile of food in front of her had actually disappeared; not even many bones were left.

The one who responded most quickly was the little charming girl. She immediately revealed a vigilant expression. When did this little foodie female dragon hook up with my man?

The bias of this kind of speculation was quite problematic. She obviously blamed Olypheus first instead of the playboy.

Athena and Olypheus had been on the battlefield together. They knew Ms. Black Dragon much better than Kia, so they smiled nonchalantly. Isabella, who had recovered, asked, “You miss his salary, right? Is it almost time to pay?”

Olypheus nodded as she counted with her fingers earnestly and said, “The salary and all benefits are converted into 52 black crystal coins, 10 purple crystal coins and 13 white crystal coins per day. For 1 year, I should be paid 30,000 black crystal coins.”

Speaking of 30,000 black crystal coins, Ms. Black Dragon’s pupils all turned into the shape of black crystal coins. She almost salivated.

“Wait a minute, even if it is 53 black crystal coins per day, it should be less than 10,000 in half a year.” Kia was now the head of the Dark Moon’s Princess Retail Store, so she was very sensitive to the amount of money. She discovered Ms. Black Dragon’s error immediately.

“It should be 9,534 black crystal coins, based on the calculation of 183 days in half a year.” Isabella speedily calculated the result, “Olypheus, how did you calculate your 30,000?”

Ms. Black Dragon said frankly, “Isn’t it rounded up? 52 black crystal coins can be rounded up into 100, and the rest is less than 4, so I reluctantly discard it…”

Isabella, “…”

Everyone, “…”

“Who taught you to round up like this? And you even count half a year as 300 days.” Krobelus interjected. Although Ms. Emerald Dragon was weak in Dragon Inscription, she was not bad in mathematics related to financial management.

Seeing so many people pointing out her mistakes, Ms. Black Dragon said aggrievedly, “I am not very good at math… Uh, but according to your calculation, sister seems to have missed out a fraction just now. It should be 9,534 black crystal coins, 53 purple crystal coins and 79 white crystal coins.”

Isabella, “…”

Everyone, “…”

Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes gleamed as she suddenly thought of something, “By the way, boss also promised to pay me a special service fee to be a personal bodyguard. That is extra. There should be many, many…”

“Personal bodyguard? Also special service? What is it?” The little charming girl was all-ears again. Speaking of ‘special service’, the succubus was the most proficient among several sisters, so a kind of leap of association was immediately produced.

“This is a secret between boss and I! I can’t tell other people.” Olypheus shook her head resolutely, “My mother once taught me that I must be credible as a dragon.”

At this time, everyone shifted their attention with a different gaze. Did that guy really hook up with Olypheus?

Classmate Nephew slammed the table and said with envy and jealousy, “What a beast!”

The little charming girl had an idea and used the trump card, “Olypheus, if you tell us this secret, I will give you 100 black crystal coins.”

Olypheus’s eyes lit up suddenly, but she shook her head, “Mum said that a dragon should be determined and not easily change one’s position.”

Although Olypheus was somewhat unreliable, she was not a very scheming person, uh… dragon. These words inevitably made people suspicious. Athena’s voice immediately sounded, “1,000 black crystal coins.”

“Athena, you are such a good person!” Ms. Black Dragon was moved to tears, but she finally held on to her position, “But my mother also taught me…”

“10,000 black crystal coins.” This time, it was Isabella. In an instant, the 3 women seemed to form a tacit association.

“Mom also… wait a minute, 10,000 black crystal coins? Not white crystal coins or purple crystal coins?” The shiny-eyed Olypheus held Isabella’s hands, “Mom… uh , sister, are you really giving them to me?”

Hearing the title of ‘mother’, Isabella didn’t know whether to cry or to laugh as she broke free of Ms. Black Dragon’s greasy hands, “If you really think of me as a sister, you must tell us the whole secret.”

“ En en! ” Ms. Black Dragon said immediately, “My boss said that the special service is that if someone gets in the way, I will beat him up; if there is a magical bomb on the ground, I will step on it first; if there is a puddle, I will jump in and fill in…”

These words were far beyond everyone’s expectations. Although these unequal conditions were suspected of exploiting labor and abuse of child labor, they did not have the content as expected, which disappointed the 2 guys who were waiting for the good show.

“That’s it?” Isabella asked uneasily.

“Of course not. My memory is good.” Olypheus said triumphantly, “My boss also said that when I’m with sister, if a man dares to approach my sister, I will beat up that person badly; if sister’s yard door is locked, I will help the boss to secretly open it from the inside; if boss comes over the wall, I will act like I didn’t see it; if the boss wants to papapa with sister, I will help him guard the door… Uhm , what is papapa ?? Can it be eaten?

Isabella, “…”

Everyone, “…”

The sister mentioned by Ms. Black Dragon was none other than Isabella. All of a sudden, several gazes turned to her. Ms. Secret Intelligence did not expect that she would spend 10,000 black crystal coins to mess things up. Her face was rarely blushed.

Master Poison Dragon and nephew at the side looked at each other, and they said indignantly, “Beast!”

TL: The little miser never fails to fuck things up 🤣. It can be ‘eaten’ depends on how to interpret it 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 665: The Black Death Follower And The Scapegoat
chapters.body:
Chapter 665: The Black Death Follower And The Scapegoat

3 days later, Chen Rui and Paul left the Dragon Bright Capital, Yerodisha, together.

In contrast to their high-profile arrival, it could be described as a minimal escort this time. Both of them set off at night. Nevertheless, Yerodisha’s nightlife was very lively. There were still many people seeing Paul along the way, so it was inevitable that there would be discussions.

Although the voice of the discussion was smaller and the horse speed of the 2 was faster, with Paul’s ear power, he still heard clearly. He could not help but look more gloomy as he tightened the grip of the rein in his hand.

The 2 passed the interrogation of the inner city and the outer city. After leaving the city, Paul lashed his mount desperately and rushed all the way as if to vent his anger. It was not until the suburbs that his speed gradually slowed down.

“Sir Paul!” Chen Rui showed a strenuous appearance as he followed from behind on a horse.

Paul’s breathing was a little heavy, and his knuckles had turned white, “Richard, am I a loser?”

“Life cannot be smooth sailing. Losers, various setbacks and difficulties will become part of our lives, but as long as we don’t give up hope, we will defeat any setbacks. The true winners will stand up from countless setbacks and failures. To be able to stand up is to achieve at least half of the success already. If we give up now, then we will never succeed.”

Chen Rui urged his mount to go alongside Paul as he smiled, “At least, sir has already half-succeeded.”

Paul adjusted his breath and felt his fighting spirit burned up again. He nodded, “I’m fortunate to have a subordinate like you and a true friend like a mentor and helpful friend. I regret not listening to your advice previously… Don’t worry, this time I will really stand up to become the Divinity Temple Knight! At that time, we will return to Yerodisha upright! I will also help you fulfill your wish!”

“I’m relieved.” Chen Rui said, “I believe sir will not let me down.”

Paul didn’t know the true meaning of this sentence. He continued to ride his horse forward.He had returned to his normal speed this time. Chen Rui glanced back at the brightly lit ‘sparkling gem’ behind him, suppressing the inexplicable sadness in his heart—— After this departure, I shouldn’t be back again.

Whether it is ‘home’, ‘father’, or those blue eyes, I’m just a passerby after all. I’m Chen Rui, and I don’t belong here.

“Go!” Chen Rui turned his head, flicked the rein and followed Paul’s figure.

The 2 of them returned to Dragon Tooth City using the same route this time because in the Hall of Light in the Dragon Tooth City, there was a one-way [Teleportation Portal] that led directly to the White Cliff.

[Teleportation Portal] was similar to [Teleportation Array] whereby both used the principle of water element magic, the number of transmissions was affected by magic power and energy, and they had corresponding restrictions. This one-way [Teleportation Portal] could only be entered but not exited, and it was not open to the public; it could only be used with special permission.

Although the Dragon Tooth City was at the border of the Dragon Bright Empire, it was far larger than the Garden City and even the Yang Shao Capital. The faith power was extremely strong. In fact, the Dragon Bright Capital, Yerodisha, did not set up any Hall of Light. Chen Rui had already guessed a bit from Lex the Great’s reshuffle through the duel.

“ Divine right of kings ” was a universal method for the deification of the human monarch system. The power to proclaim the king was given by God and had natural rationality. Any disobedience or even rebellion was a blasphemy against God. However, the Light Divinity Temple was a special institution that represented the highest theocracy. The perceived coordinated monarchy and theocracy had actually always been a conflict that couldn’t be resolved.

This conflict was particularly prominent in the 2 holy empires. Whether it was the Dragon Bright Empire or the Blue Glory Empire, they needed the name of God to consolidate their rule and reinforce their power; on the other hand, this could support a regime or overturn it. At the same time, the kings felt deeply afraid of the theocracy that could override the monarchy, and even regarded it as the greatest threat. They either openly or secretly used means to suppress it.

The pages of the history of the human world were flipped chapter after chapter in the development of this contradiction. The exact time of the Light Divinity Temple’s appearance was no longer able to be determined. A noteworthy matter was that the Divinity Temple had always stood firm over the years regardless of the empire’s rise and fall.

Pastor Adola of the Dragon Tooth City’s Hall of Light was Paul’s acquaintance. Hearing the news of Paul’s arrival, he personally greeted him at the gate.

“Sir Adola.” Paul looked at the Hall of Light all the way, which was 10 times more heavily guarded than previously, “It’s already night, yet it’s still in a state of alert. Has something major happened?”

Adola nodded and glanced at Chen Rui. Paul smiled, “Sir Adola, introducing my most loyal subordinate and most trusted friend, Richard, a Reserve Light Knight. He will follow me to the White Cliff to participate in the selection of the Divinity Temple Knight this time. Don’t shy away from anything, please speak up.”

Chen Rui showed a touched emotion in his eyes, but he was very disdainful of Paul’s methods of winning over people’s hearts: How could a ruthless character who can kill his beloved woman for profit truly believe in people other than himself. The wealth and status of’ Richard’ are of great value to Paul’s future plans, and he has shown rare loyalty at present, so Paul must pay attention to this talent now. Once the value of ‘Richard’ is exhausted or there is a higher benefit, Paul will definitely abandon me without hesitation.

Adola couldn’t help but glance at Chen Rui. He nodded and said in a low voice, “The Black Death Follower has appeared and is blatantly outrageous this time. Their black hand has reached the capital of the Yang Shao Empire. There must be a great conspiracy to appear during the sensitive period of Temple Knight Divinity selection. At present, the White Cliff has initiated emergency response measures. Not only has a large number of Light Knights been dispatched, but Sir Chief Judge Seus also personally led the judges to the Yang Shao Capital to investigate and eliminate the Black Death Follower. The Hall of Light of the nearby empires are all on full alert. The distance between the Dragon Tooth City and the Yang Shao Empire is not too far, so we are also on full alert here.”

The Black Death Follower? Chen Rui was puzzled by the unfamiliar name. Judging from Adola’s expressions and words, the Black Death Follower should be a force that opposed the Holy Church, and their whereabouts are hidden and unknown to ordinary people. They are seen as a great enemy by the church.

Unexpectedly, the Holy Church, which covers almost all human beliefs in the human world, actually has such an opponent.

“The phenomenon of weak faith was discovered in the Yang Shao Capital. The judges have found that the actual source should be from Town Gudam, then the Garden City, and then to the Yang Shao Capital.” Speaking of the Black Death Follower, Adola was no longer smiling. She showed a solemn expression, “By the way, weren’t you and Ms. Eliza assassinated in Garden City? Even Pastor Mana of Town Gudam was killed in the assassination. The Dagger Brotherhood must be closely related to the Black Death Follower. Sir Seus has ordered the eradication of the Dagger Brotherhood. I believe it will not be long before the Dagger Brotherhood is uprooted. It’s late now. You will rest here for 1 night, then I will send you to [Teleportation Portal] tomorrow morning. “

Paul nodded, “I’ll have to trouble Sir Adola then.”

Chen Rui and Paul were arranged to rest in the guest room. Adola gave Paul many gifts. In fact, Sir Pastor heard the news of Paul’s failure in the capital duel in time, but he kept silent about it and was very polite. Once Paul could become the Divinity Temple Knight of the Holy Light Mountain this time, his level was still higher than his level as the person in charge of a city-level church. Anyway, it was definitely right to make a good relationship in advance.

After Adola left, Chen Rui looked curious and asked, “Sir Paul, what exactly is the Black Death Follower?”

“The Black Death Follower are the believers in a secret church. This church advocates for darkness and destruction. The believers are extremely fanatical. They created the bloody case of massacring the lives in 10 cities in order to offer sacrifices to the Evil God 20,000 years ago, which shocked the whole human world. Although they were jointly eliminated by the Holy Church and the empires, they were never completely eliminated. Instead, they turned to the dark side and acted more secretly. They are 1 of the most feared enemies of the Holy Church and must be eradicated. However, this church has disappeared in recent years for some unknown reasons.”

Massacre sacrifice? Chen Rui had a faintly familiar feeling. He had an idea and asked, “Since this secret church has disappeared, what signs can tell the identity of these believers? Is it black magic? Pastor Mana and I encountered a sneak attack by the assassins using black magic in a forest previously.”

“It’s not black magic.” Paul pondered for a moment, and he whispered, “This is an internal secret of the church. I can tell you, but you must keep it a secret. The Black Death Followers have become the most feared enemies of the Holy Church because they have the power of blaspheming faith which can transform the light faith into destruction and evil power.”

Chen Rui felt that his heartbeat raced. He sensed something wrong when he heard Adola mention the route of “Town Gudam to the Garden City and then to the Yang Shao Capital” of the Black Death Follower. He was finally sure now – The ‘culprit’ was not the Black Death Follower, but Shura!

This was actually Chen Rui’s spontaneous plan because [Cloning] had a wonderful connection with the original body. Even if he was a long distance away, he could still transform the faith crystal. When Chen Rui followed Paul to leave the Yang Shao Capital, he left Shura, the clone, there. The goal was the faith power of the Hall of Light in the capital. It was only a few days ago that Chen Rui retrieved him back after Shura was ‘full’.

He didn’t expect to be spotted by the Holy Church so quickly. Fortunately, Shura did not follow Chen Rui all the time. Instead, he acted separately in the Yang Shao Capital. Otherwise, if the route of stealing faith was exactly the same as ‘Richard’’s route, he would inevitably be suspected. What was more fortunate was that the Black Death Follower actually existed in the human world, becoming the scapegoat for Shura and Richard.

Now that the abnormality of the faith power has been noticed by the Holy Church, the investigation is in the limelight, and I am going to go to the Holy Church’s base, I should keep Shura from showing up for the time being.

I will go to the White Cliff tomorrow. Chen Rui secretly squeezed his fist . I must get the Snow Dallet Flower on this trip!

TL: Can’t he get faith power from the believers of the Black Death Follower too, hmm ?

chapters.title: Chapter 666: The White Cliff
chapters.body:
Chapter 666: The White Cliff

The next morning, Adola sent the 2 people to a large building. This was a one-way [Teleportation Portal] that led directly to the Holy Light Mountain. They could enter but not exit. Only internal members who reached a certain level could use it.

It was currently the selection period of the Divinity Temple Knight, yet the Black Death Follower incident recurred again, so the [Teleportation Portal] was quite strictly guarded. Even if Paul was a familiar face and he showed the qualification badge for the selection of Divinity Temple Knight, he still had to go through the routine verification. After confirming that Paul’s identity was correct, Chen Rui as the subordinate seemed insignificant. After a simple registration, they passed through smoothly.

Chen Rui could see that this one-way [Teleportation Portal] was very particular. In addition to the order in which the magic stones were placed, it also required a special medium. If one used force to break in, he was likely to be transported to an unknown place. When the magic circle was ready, it emitted a blue light. Soon, the 2 figures began to twist and disappear into the air.

After a wonderful feeling of being immersed in the water, Chen Rui and Paul appeared in a new place which should be a fixed teleportation platform. It was surrounded by a large number of Light Knights. Upon seeing both of them, they immediately greeted them.

After confirming their identities, Chen Rui and Paul rode forward on 2 reserved horses. Chen Rui still had the little thunderbird on his shoulders as a cover for the identity of the beast tamer.

The road was spacious and flat. There were many undulating mountains along the way. The rocks were mostly white. Perhaps it was the origin of the name ‘White Cliff’. The most conspicuous thing was the highest mountain in the distance. It was outstanding and magnificent.

“That is the Holy Light Mountain of the White Cliff.” Paul pointed to the towering mountain and said high-spiritedly, “As long as I can pass this selection, I will accept His Holiness Pope’s canonization under the Snow Dallet Holy Tree at the Holy Light Mountain’s Snowy Summit Stage and become the Divinity Temple Knight who is respected by thousands of people!”

“Definitely!” Chen Rui stared at the Holy Light Mountain with his eyes wide open like a strange uncle who caught sight of an innocent child: It really doesn’t take a lot of effort to find the answer. I got the news of the Snow Dallet before I even asked. It’s right at the Holy Light Mountain’s Snowy Summit Stage!

“If I can become the Divinity Temple Knight, I will also have the opportunity to be summoned by the 3 archangels. Maybe I can become a holy envoy or even a holy apprentice!” Paul shook the reins, “The official selection is in 2 days. Come, let’s go to the Heavenly Thunder Hall of the Glorious Knight now!”

Holy envoy? Holy apprentice? These 2 terms sound familiar? Chen Rui remembered that it was during the battle of the Dark Demon in the Dark Moon Estate. Nero mistook the [Royal Star Transformation] for the [Armor of Faith] of the holy apprentice. From this point of view, the holy apprentice was clearly the highest believer selected by ‘3 archangels’.

Chen Rui was no longer clueless about the Holy Church after being with Paul these days: The White Cliff had 3 major factions: the pope and the 2 chief archbishops were the representatives of the 3 factions which corresponded to the 3 archangels under the Light God.

Behind the Glorious Pope Vantis was Chief Archangel Michael as the highest leader of the Holy Church. It was also the most powerful faction. The 2 most powerful assistants under his command were Cardinal Roger and Chief Judge Seus.

Behind Archbishop Pusmeer was Seraph Gabriel. Birmingham, 1 of the 3 major Cardinals, belonged to this faction.

Another archbishop was the Holy Light Lady Eudora; Cherub Raphael was behind her. 1 of the 3 Cardinals, Gralin, belonged to this faction.

There were plenty of open and secret struggles between the 3 factions, but they always maintained a delicate balance like the 3 basic pivot points supporting the church. Even if there were changes, the main entity could always remain stable.

The names of these 3 archangels reminded Chen Rui of the religious legends of another world. Judging from the names of Michael, Satan, and Lucifer, there are still many surprising coincidences in the 2 separate parallel worlds.

What puzzled Chen Rui was that the Demon Realm did not have a large faith organization such as the Dark Divinity Temple. That Sir Demon God had hardly shown miracles. Could it be that Sir Light God knocked him out?

The White Cliff’s defense was very strict. Every section was guarded by Light Knights. An identity certificate must be present when passing. However, the White Cliff was now closed to the outside world. As a participant of the Divinity Temple Knight’s selection, Paul led Chen Rui and went all the way unimpeded.

At the foot of the Holy Light Mountain was a city that was as large as the Dragon Bright Capital Yerodisha – Holy Light City.

The residents here were superior to ordinary people in terms of life span and physical condition. They could participate in various activities organized by the church to meet those legendary bigshots. Sometimes they could witness some miracles that only come by luck. For believers who worshipped the light, it was the greatest glory to join the Holy Light City and become the devout people closest to God.

The number of people in the Holy Light City was strictly limited, and only some new residents were taken in every few years. Only the most devout believers could become the residents of Holy Light City, and they had to pass various assessments. Even so, believers still flocked to it.

Holy Light City usually received a large number of foreign pilgrims every day, but it was much quieter now. The devout residents abide by the orders of the church to stay indoors during this period so as not to disturb the selection of Divinity Temple Knight.

Whether it was His Holiness Pope, the 2 archbishops, or the 3 cardinals, none of them lived in Holy Light City, but in the halls of the Holy Light Mountain. The high halls seemed to be like gods in the clouds, looking down at the lowly common people at their feet.

Paul led Chen Rui to the Heavenly Thunder Hall on the side of the Holy Light Mountain which was the highest command of the Glorious Knight. Paul had trained in the Heavenly Thunder Hall for many years and was very familiar with it. He greeted a lot of guard knights whom he knew along the way until they came to the hall and met the highest commander of the Glorious Knight, Paladin Captain Parsali.

Among the Glorious Knights, Light Knight was the lowest level, followed by Divinity Temple Knight, and Paladin was the highest. There were more than 1 Paladin in the Holy Light Mountain, but only Parsali could be called the ‘Paladin Captain’.

Although the Glorious Knight obeyed the command and transfer of the highest leader of the church, strictly speaking, it did not belong to any of the 3 archangels’ factions. As the Paladin Captain, Parsali, nicknamed ‘Glorious Swordmaster’, had always adhered to the knight’s creed of loyalty to the light and guarding justice, treating people with fairness and integrity, and won the respect of knights. However, people who were too principled tend to offend people easily. In the eyes of many people at the top of the church, this Glorious Swordmaster was actually an unpleasant and stubborn stone.

Parsali was more than 200 years old, but he looked just about 40 years old. He had a square face, energetic eyes, and short black hair without a trace of white hair. He looked vibrant.

“Teacher.” Paul bowed respectfully, “I’m here, this is my subordinate, Richard.”

In the [Analytical Eyes], Parsali’s comprehensive strength level was S+. Except for physique, which was S, all other power, spirit, and speed had reached S+ level. [Analysis] showed him as a light attribute magic swordsman, and the degree of danger showed ‘higher’.

By just looking at the data, S+ was the peak stage of the Demon Overlord, but Chen Rui sensed that the strength of this Glorious Swordmaster should be higher than that of the pale golden-skinned Giant Titan in the Storm Valley. He is not an opponent that can be easily defeated. The Holy Light Mountain is the base camp of the Holy Church. I don’t know how many of the top notch powerhouses in the human world are hidden here. In a sense, it far surpasses the 2 holy empires.

In addition to this Parsali, Chen Rui could sense 10 Demon Overlord Paladins in the Heavenly Thunder Hall. The 3 giant leaders – Pope Vantis, Archbishop Pusmeer, and Holy Lady Eudora were also considered to be the top powerhouses. What’s more, there were really terrifying super powerhouses behind the church: 3 archangels.

Although Paul knew very little about 3 Archangels, Chen Rui remembered one thing: The holy dragon Rodriguez’s remnant soul that I encountered in the Tower of Destruction mentioned the name ‘Raphael’. Rodriguez’s strength during his optimum state back then should have been close to or even Pseudo-God, but he was still severely injured by Raphael. Furthermore, he was still full of fear now.

Therefore, the strength of the 3 archangels, Raphael, Michael and Gabriel, should have reached Pseudo-God. Chen Rui was now able to deal with the Demon Overlord powerhouse freely. Maybe there was also a chance against the kingdomized powerhouse if he used the unknown [Pole Star Transformation]. However, he had almost no resistance at all when facing a real Pseudo God powerhouse. Perhaps even the [Star Gate] would be destroyed before it was opened.

So in this enemy’s den, I must be careful. Before I get the Snow Dallet, I can’t make any mistakes in any way.

“Greeting to you, Sir Parsali!” Chen Rui hurriedly bowed, showing just the right excitement on his face.

Parsali did not pay attention to Chen Rui. He nodded slightly, and said to Paul, “The day after tomorrow, the Divinity Temple Knight’s selection contest will officially begin. The candidate’s residence is in the Silver Villa in Holy Light City. Someone will take you there. Prepare yourself in these 2 days. You know my temperament. Although I’m 1 of the chief examiners, I will not give you the slightest advantage just because you are my apprentice.”

“I understand.” Paul bowed again, “Teacher, please rest assured, I will not embarrass you.”

Parsali nodded. He asked a Light Knight to lead them out of the Heavenly Thunder Hall and into the Silver Villa in Holy Light City.

The Silver Villa was the largest ‘hotel’ in Holy Light City. When Paul came here, many candidates had already settled in. Paul only knew a few of the competitors here. Most of them brought their subordinates.

The role of a subordinate was not to show off. For example, the subordinates could go out and walk around to inquire about various intels and news of competitors in this period. Chen Rui intended to inquire about the location of the Snowy Summit Stage, so he immediately volunteered to complete the task of snooping news. Paul naturally agreed. Just as he was about to go out, suddenly someone knocked on the door and opened it. It turned out to be an old acquaintance, Eliza.

“Sir Future Divinity Temple Knight, I returned to the White Cliff before you.” Eliza smiled sweetly.

Paul had already agreed to Eliza to join the Holy Lady Faction, so naturally he didn’t dare to neglect her, “Is there anything, Ms. Eliza?”

“I can’t come if there’s nothing?” Eliza pouted her mouth unhappily, “Alright, I know that you have to calm down and prepare. I’ll not look for you, so I will borrow him instead.”

“Me?” Chen Rui pointed to his nose in surprise. He did not expect that Eliza was looking for him.

Paul was a little surprised. He looked at Chen Rui’s gaze that was asking for help, and he smiled, “Richard still has an important task, but since it is Ms. Eliza’s request, Richard, you can go. Listen to Ms. Eliza.”

TL: Will Eliza bring him to the archangel? What is his plan now? There is no way he can get the Snow Dallet Flower under the eyes of so many powerhouses…

chapters.title: Chapter 667: Half-Elf
chapters.body:
Chapter 667: Half-Elf

Another chapter here🥳! Patreon Community Goal 3 accomplished!

Obviously, Eliza purposely came to look for Chen Rui, not Paul. Chen Rui didn’t know what Eliza was trying to do with him, a humble subordinate. He initially wanted to explore the intel related to the Holy Light Mountain, especially the location of the Snowy Summit Stage. It could only be postponed this time.

“Ms. Eliza, do you have any order?” Chen Rui saw Eliza demonstrated her power during the last assassination in the Garden City, so he followed behind Eliza carefully all the way with a respectful expression toward the powerhouse.

“Why are you so restrained?” Eliza chuckled, “Thanks to you for reminding me last time in the Garden City. Otherwise, I’m afraid I would have died long ago. Since you came to the White Cliff this time, I can repay you.”

“I didn’t actually do anything that time.” Chen Rui said with a wry smile he pointed to the little thunderbird on his shoulder, “To be precise, it’s all thanks to this.”

“Then I will repay it too.” Eliza’s fingers flicked in a strange rhythm, swaying in front of the little thunderbird, then she slowly stretched over to touch the little thunderbird. The little thunderbird was staring indifferently at the extended hand. Its feathers on the top of its head stood up, showing a desperate look.

Eliza retracted her hand and stuck her tongue out, “That’s an unruly little guy. It seems that my beast taming skill is much worse than your soul language. It doesn’t accept me at all.”

The action of sticking out her tongue admittedly looked cute, but Chen Rui knew the insidiousness hidden behind this innocent and pleasant girl. In fact, this expression was often used by Alice who was really cute. Chen Rui couldn’t help showing a hint of warmth in his eyes when he thought of the little loli whom he hadn’t seen for a long time.

This expression was sensitively noticed by Eliza, and she thought her performance was successful. She was secretly proud, “Let’s go, Richard. Since it’s the first time you have come to the White Cliff, I will take you around.”

“That, Ms. Eliza. I still have a very important task to help Sir Paul find out…”

“Here is a booklet that records the list and information of all the participants selected by the Divinity Temple Knight. I originally wanted to hand it to Paul, but I forgot it accidentally. I don’t know if you can pass it on for me?” Eliza took out and swayed a booklet. She clearly intended to give him credit. Chen Rui nodded his head with a surprised look.

Eliza led Chen Rui to stroll around the Holy Light City. Holy Light City was inferior to the Dragon Bright Capital Yerodisha in terms of prosperity. However, the unique charm and atmosphere of a religious city were something that Yerodisha did not possess. One could see buildings and cultural goods with the theme of light faith everywhere, and every corner of the city was filled with strong faith power. The concentration of faith power even in ordinary places was not less than the Hall of Faith in the Garden City.

This kind of faith power was very tempting for Chen Rui, but with the lessons learned from the Yang Shao Capital, he dared not easily release Shura to devour these faiths. He couldn’t act rashly; at least before he got the Snow Dallet Flower.

“ Hey, Richard, why are you in a daze again?” Eliza stretched out her hand and shook it in front of his eyes, “What do you think of the few people we met just now?”

“What do you mean what do I think?” Chen Rui was startled. Eliza knew the Holy Light City very well. She introduced a lot of people to him along the way.

Eliza showed a strange expression and pulled him to a corner, whispering, “Those people. Don’t you like them? There’s one who looks a lot like Paul.”

“ Ah? Ah? Ah! ” Chen Rui was stunned, and he finally got it. It turns out that Eliza’s real intention is to… pimp!

😦 ! Eliza is actually introducing men to me!

In an instant, Chen Rui felt more uncomfortable than swallowing a dead mouse. He was dumbfounded. In order to cope with Eliza’s suspicion, he made up a poignant story about encountering a beautiful elf. In the story, the beautiful female elf died in the arms of the male protagonist, giving the power of soul language to the male protagonist. Perhaps because of some kind of spiritual hint from the lover before her death, the male protagonist lost all hope and he seemed to lose interest in women.

The story ended here. At that time, he successfully passed the blunder, but now Eliza had actually made a follow-up plot. She ‘kindly’ introduced men to him who were mostly muscular. What’s more speechless was that there was actually another guy who resembled Paul.

What the hell! She actually treats me as the bottom one! At least, I should be the top one… Ba! What crap! My entire being likes girls!

So in Eliza’s view, the real reason for Chen Rui’s loyalty to Paul should be due to the… affection hidden in his heart.

If Isabella dared to suspect so, Chen Rui would immediately push her down and use actual actions to prove his orientation. However, Chen Rui did not know whether Eliza was testing him by introducing ‘boyfriend’ like this, but in any case, he wouldn’t sacrifice his body.

“Ms. Eliza, I think… you have misunderstood.” Chen Rui finally uttered a word.

“No misunderstanding, you don’t need to explain,” Eliza patted him ‘empathetically’. “I understand.”

Understand your ass! Chen Rui almost jumped up and cursed that her whole family was gay.

“Ms. Eliza, you really misunderstood, I… have no interest in men at all.” Chen Rui said hesitantly, “Actually, after that time, I really don’t have any special feelings for human women, but I want to find another female elf if possible…”

“Elf?” Eliza realized that she had made a mistake.

The men and women of the elf tribe were all handsome men and women. Many high-ranking officials had coveted the beauty of the elf, but the elf tribe was not easy to deal with. In addition to their powerful power, they had also signed an alliance agreement with 1 of the 2 holy empires, the Blue Glory Empire. Any human who dared to capture an elf would be listed as an enemy of the Blue Glory Empire and be sanctioned jointly by Jade Forest Sea and the Blue Glory Empire.

The Blue Glory Empire was also known as the magic empire where the Magician Headquarter was located. It gathered the most peak and elite magic power in the human world. Each city had a magician tower and various magic devices. With the support of the elf tribe, the Blue Glory Empire was by no means weaker than the Dragon Bright Empire.

“I can’t help with the elf tribe.” Eliza spread her hands, “But I know a half-elf woman, but that woman is sinister and vicious; she’s not as easy to get along with as me…”

Love was a wonderful thing, and it was often not constrained by race. There were many examples of the combination of human and elf in history. However, compared with the elf who had a lifespan of thousands of years, the life of humans was too short, so this kind of marriage was naturally extremely short-term.

Chen Rui now knew that the human world did not have the singularity of fertility race like the Demon Realm. Instead, they had a large number of mixed races. Half-elf was the mixed race born between elf and other races (mainly humans here). Half-elf’s life was twice as long as an ordinary human, but the half-elf was shorter than a real elf. Most of half-elf’s appearance inherited the handsomeness and beauty of the elf tribe, but it differed in individual characteristics such as ears.

However, half-elf was often not recognized by the true elf tribe, so most of them live in human society. Their beautiful looks were easily accepted by humans, but the bloodline of the elf part would also be rejected accordingly. As they were not blessed by the elf tribe, it sometimes caused misfortune.

With that said, Eliza’s eyes flashed with light, and she revealed a smile, “You are lucky, Richard. A half-elf comes right away just as we talk about this.”

Judging from Eliza’s tone and expression, she seemed to be strongly hostile. Following her gaze, a woman walked from the small plaza in front of them. This woman had a graceful figure, fair skin, long blonde hair, and beautiful facial features, but she looked cold like ‘Strangers do not get close’ was written on her face.

“Sister Miranda!” Eliza shouted loudly. She held Chen Rui’s arm intimately and walked toward the woman.

Miranda frowned when she saw Eliza walking over with a man, “Eliza, is there something?”

Her voice was as cold as her appearance.

“Can’t I say hello if there’s nothing? My dear senior, we are both teacher’s apprentices. I will be sad if you are so unkind.”

Another apprentice of the Holy Lady?

The relevant data displayed in the [Analytical Eyes] made Chen Rui’s eyes light up slightly. No wonder there is a familiar feeling, it turns out…

“Sad?” Miranda’s green eyes flashed a hint of sarcasm as she turned to Chen Rui who had a thunderbird on his shoulders, “Who is he?”

“You don’t know him already?” Eliza said with a pun, “ Oh , yes, it should be the first time both of you met. Let me introduce him. This is my new friend, Richard, a Reserve Light Knight with great potential. Last time in the Garden City, if it weren’t for Richard, I would have been killed by that sinister assassin. Richard, this is Miranda, my beautiful half-elf senior.”

Out of character needs, Chen Rui stared at Miranda’s face intently. He bowed and stammered, “Ms. Miranda! Your beauty is comparable to… the moon in the sky…”

“I have something to do, so I’ll go first.” Miranda showed an expression of disgust and said to Eliza while ignoring Chen Rui, then she turned away.

Seeing that tall back figure walking away, Chen Rui’s mind was clear: Although her height and voice have changed, I can be sure that Miranda is the female assassin who nearly killed Eliza in the Garden City last time! By the way, [Cloning] also absorbed a little ‘special’ interest from the half-elf lady…

Holy Lady Faction attacking each other? Is it for private grievances? Or for higher interests? Both of them should know about the Garden City assassination incident, but they both seemed indifferent.

“She is gone, why are you still staring?” Eliza pinched Chen Rui’s arm and said unhappily.

Chen Rui chuckled a few words, “This Ms. Miranda… Uh , she’s really a half-elf?”

“She’s even a half-elf with the [Body of Light Blessing].” Eliza was mixed with fleeting murderous intent and jealousy, then her smile was restored. “It looks like you are interested in her?”

“I…” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “I don’t know if it is the power of soul language. I have some familiar feelings for Ms. Miranda, but I’m just a Reserve Light Knight. How dare I have any delusions.”

Eliza smiled, “Identity is not a problem. Your talent is very special, I can introduce you to my teacher Her Holiness Eudora alone. As for Miranda… as long as you have the courage, I can help you. Consider that I’m repaying your life-saving grace.”

Chen Rui faintly understood that Eliza must have some conspiracy to use him. His mind shifted and revealed a hopeful expression, “Really?”

TL: What does she want from him? This man is dangerous, what if her teacher falls for him 😦

chapters.title: Chapter 668: Summon
chapters.body:
Chapter 668: Summon

Eliza smiled cheerfully when he saw him being interested, “Don’t worry, I will do my best to help you.”

Chen Rui showed a hesitant expression, “But I…”

“I said that as long as your special abilities can be recognized by my teacher, identity is definitely not a problem.” Eliza sighed, “If you don’t even have the courage, then forget it. Otherwise, all my effort will go to waste.”

“No, just now you… said she is sinister and vicious?”

Eliza shook her head decisively, “You heard it wrong. Miranda is my senior, I’m not talking about her, but another sinister enemy. I almost died in the hands of that enemy.”

“It turned out to be like this.” Chen Rui hesitated for a moment, and he seemed to finally make up his mind, “Ms. Eliza, can you tell me something about the Holy Light Mountain? Including… Ms. Miranda’s situation.”

“Of course.” Eliza said with a smile, “I’m very glad to be able to repay your life-saving grace with this method of combining the best of both worlds, dear Sir Richard.

Chen Rui’s eyes brightened as he nodded repeatedly.

Chen Rui and Eliza walked around the city for a while and returned to the Silver Villa. The booklet that he brought back made Paul quite satisfied, and Paul praised him greatly.

“Sir Paul… I have something to tell you.”

Paul shuddered suddenly when he saw Chen Rui hesitating, “Richard, can we wait until the selection of Divinity Temple Knight is over?”

Chen Rui was taken aback, “Why? At that time, I’m afraid it’s too late. This matter is very important to me.”

Paul’s expression was a bit distorted, and he stepped back subconsciously. “Before you say this, listen to me first. I know that some experiences have caused a great impact on your life. I can understand some things. We have shared weal and woe just like brothers and siblings, but my relationship is limited to this… Uhm , I really don’t suit you.”

Chen Rui’s face became 😦 dumbfounded again. I finally understand why Paul shuddered. It’s just like Eliza’s misunderstanding! Damn! Blame that damn elf story!

Chen Rui resisted the urge to pinch Paul to death and told him about ‘admiring’ Miranda. Paul breathed a sigh of relief as he listened. (Chen Rui: Damn! It’s like relieving a heavy burden!)

“Sir Paul, what do you think I should do?” Chen Rui lowered his head, “I know it’s daydreaming, but when I first saw Ms. Miranda, I felt that she is completely different from those human women. My heart raced uncontrollably. I don’t know what I should do. Should I do as Ms. Eliza said? That’s why I want to seek your advice.”

“Eliza asked you to pursue Miranda?” Paul frowned. It seemed like he sensed the conspiracy.

“Yes, Ms. Eliza said that in return for my previous life-saving grace, she will introduce me to Her Holiness Holy Lady.”

Paul quickly thought about the gains and losses, and he didn’t remind Chen Rui of anything. Instead, he nodded, “Since it’s Eliza’s intent and you are really interested in Miranda, then just do it. I understand your feeling of love at first sight.”

“Thank you, sir!” Chen Rui exclaimed, “By the way, I want to know something related to the Holy Light Mountain in order to avoid unnecessary mistakes at that time, I wonder if sir can tell me?”

“No problem.” Paul really did not doubt him and said.

The 3 main peaks of the Holy Light Mountain had 3 halls respectively. Namely the Divinity Seal Hall of Pope Vantis, the Star Summit of Archbishop Pusmeer, and the Holy Blessing Hall of Holy Lady Eudora.

Generally speaking, these 3 halls represented the power of the entire Holy Church, collectively referred to as the Light Divinity Temple, but they were not yet the real Light Divinity Temple.

The real Light Divinity Temple was located on the top of the Holy Light Mountain and was said to be a sacred place connected to the will of God. Only the pope and the 2 archbishops were eligible to enter. Light God would deliver its will or show miracles through the Light Divinity Temple, and sometimes send angels to come. There was no doubt about this because the residents of the Holy Light City had witnessed miracles more than once.

The Snowy Summit Stage where the Snow Dallet Flower was located was at the Divinity Seal Summit which was near the Divinity Seal Hall. The Snow Dallet Flower was also known as the Holy Flower. It was bred by the purest light faith and possessed the magical and powerful light power. It was said that it could assimilate all evil power. The Holy Light Mountain had only 3 trees in the Snowy Summit Stage which was extremely rare. As 1 of the symbols of the Holy Light Mountain, the Divinity Temple Knight conferring had been held under the Snow Dallet Tree over the years.

In fact, Chen Rui had received some relevant news from Eliza before. The reason for coming to Paul was mainly to be cautious. What Paul said was similar to what Eliza said, and it was more comprehensive. So I’m sure that the Snow Dallet Flower is at the Snowy Summit Stage east of the Divinity Seal Summit.

In addition to the mysterious 3 Archangels, I don’t know whether the Holy Light Mountain has other powerhouses beyond the Demon Overlord level. The existing Demon Overlord powerhouse alone is not easy to handle. There is probably only 1 chance to steal the Snow Dallet Flower, so there is no room for mistake.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui decided to calm down first and become more familiar with the environment and the location of the target. As soon as the selection of the Divinity Temple Knight, which attracted most people’s attention, began, he would formally make his move to succeed in one fell swoop.

At this time, it was less than 2 days since the selection contest of the Divinity Temple Knight. Paul was behind the closed doors as he adjusted his state in peace while Chen Rui inquired about the news as a subordinate. He chatted with other subordinates and got some intel.

In the blink of an eye, the Divinity Temple Knight’s selection contest finally began.

This time, the Divinity Temple Knight’s selection contest had a total of more than 200 participants, all of whom were elites from all over the world. It was divided into 3 categories, martial arts battle, riding battle, and team battle.

Martial arts battle was a 1-on-1 battle which compared individual strength.

Riding battle was a competition on mounts. In addition to their own strength and combat skills, the requirements for riding skills were quite high.

Team battle was to test the command ability. Participants would command an equal number of Light Knights to determine the outcome of a team battle.

The martial arts battle was divided into 5 groups. These 5 groups would first go through single elimination matches in the way of drawing lots. Single elimination was a 1-on-1 battle. The loser was eliminated and lost the qualification to participate in the next round. The winner would qualify for the next round. They went up level by level until the final winner was determined.

A total of 5 winners would be determined in the 5 groups, then these 5 players were in a round robin, that was, each opponent would fight against each other once; the 1 with the most victories would be the final winner.

The first group of people eliminated in the martial arts battle would be directly disqualified, and the remaining half would participate in the next event, the riding battle. The 5 people who enter the martial arts finals would be able to directly participate in the second round of the riding battle.

Riding battle would eliminate a group of people again before the team battle. Around 90% of the 200 plus people would be eliminated. Only 20 people could become the final winner. The pope would personally confer them as the Divinity Temple Knight. The competition was evidently cruel.

Some people might have strength, but bad luck. The phenomenon of being eliminated in the first round after encountering the strongest opponent also existed, but luck was also a kind of strength. Losing and winning had no process; only results. In any case, the 20 people who would be able to stay in the end must be the undisputed true elites.

There are 4 chief examiners this time. Namely the 3 major Cardinals and Paladin Captain Parsali. Originally, Chief Judge Seus was also 1 of the chief examiners. However, due to the emergency of the Black Death Follower, Seus was leading the Tribunal elites to eliminate those cultists, so he had no time to participate in the selection.

After the drawing lots, the selection contest started. The names and the draw lots matchups were all listed on 5 huge magic signboards. Paul was placed in the fifth group.

Elimination matches in the first stage were carried out in various venues at the same time. Each game had its judge to decide the outcome as well as the staff responsible for recording with magic devices. Those who disagreed could appeal the chief examiner’s ruling.

The strength of the contestants was mostly B-level with a handful of A-level. Chen Rui was naturally very interested in this level of battle. Paul had good luck. After 2 days of the game, he defeated his opponent, and he drew an empty slot in the next round. This meant that he could take a half-day rest tomorrow morning. As long as he won 2 more rounds, he would be the first in the group to qualify directly.

In the evening, Eliza came and brought a message that Holy Lady Eudora summoned him.

In addition to Paul, the subordinate Chen Rui was also summoned as well.

Eliza took Chen Rui and Paul out of the Holy Light City and entered the Holy Light Mountain all the way.

The first impression of the Holy Light Mountain was the spacious and long stairs which were all paved with valuable white fluorite. The simple style was magnificent.

What intrigued Chen Rui the most was that rich faith power which was stronger than the Holy Light City, but it was obviously not the time to beard the lion in his den , so he had to resist the temptation and move on.

As it was Chen Rui’s first time setting foot on the Holy Light Mountain, he was curious to ask some questions from time to time. Eliza answered patiently, but she did not know that he was verifying the imaginative map based on the previously obtained intel with the actual terrain 1 by 1.

The stone steps in front were divided into 3. Eliza smiled, “The left is the road to the Star Hall, the middle is the Divinity Seal Hall, and the right is the Holy Blessing Hall that we are going to. Richard, Madam Holy Lady doesn’t like long-winded people, so I won’t be able to answer your question like this later.”

“Understood, thank you Miss. I know what to do.”

Although Paul knew that Eliza had other plans for Chen Rui, he inevitably felt a kind of dejectedness when he heard Eliza taking care of and instructing his lowly subordinate like this. Of course, such a feeling was only hidden in his heart.

As Chen Rui got closer to the Holy Family Hall, he felt a more intense feeling in his heart. It seemed that every breath he took was within a special sensing – Kingdom power!

Chen Rui subconsciously raised his head and saw a quaint hall in the distance. There was a huge white statue in front of the hall with 6 pairs of wings behind it. The whole hall exuded a rich and incomparable faith power which was even more than the way up the mountain; 100 times richer!

TL: What is this summon for?

chapters.title: Chapter 669: Holy Lady
chapters.body:
Chapter 669: Holy Lady

The extremely rich faith power of the Holy Blessing Hall made Chen Rui almost unable to hold back. Taking a bite here would be more than stealing for a couple of days in an ordinary city.

However, this place was within the territory kingdom. Although the power of this kingdom seemed to be weaker than the kingdoms of the Octopus King, the mirage, and Lich King that Chen Rui had encountered before, it seemed to be a new kingdomized powerhouse, but it was still a kingdomized powerhouse after all. With Chen Rui’s current strength, he was by no means an opponent, not to mention that this was not the time to expose his true strength.

Chen Rui suppressed his thoughts and continued to walk forward, but the closer he got to the giant angel statue, the more he felt something was wrong. The faith power surrounding the angel statue was not emitted by the statue. On the contrary, the statue also faintly revealed a special devour power that was slowly absorbing the faith power.

Due to the slow absorption rate, and the faith power was constantly flowing from some place, the statue was always wrapped in a very high concentration of faith like an intangible cocoon.

Doubts arose in Chen Rui’s mind. At this time, they came to the end of the stone steps. There was a vast square in front of him. The ground of the square was smoothly paved with large stone slabs that were smooth and square. A giant angel statue stood in the center of the square. The sculpture had magnificent features and a solemn face. It held a long sword in the right hand and a shield in the left hand. There were 12 wings behind it. It exuded a faint sacred breath which made people have a kind of impulse to worship.

As Chen Rui noticed the abnormal change of faith power, this seemingly sacred breath seemed very strange in Chen Rui’s senses.

There was a quaint hall at the end of the square with many small buildings behind it. It was one of the Holy Light Mountain’s 3 major summits, the Holy Blessing Hall.

Chen Rui followed Eliza and Paul and entered the square. When passing by the giant angel statue, the data that suddenly appeared from the [Analytical Eyes] shocked his mind.

Race: Unable to determine!

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unable to determine!

[Analysis]: Extremely dangerous!

Since Chen Rui entered the 6-star evolution, this was the first time he encountered an ‘unable to determine’ target, and the target was actually this lifeless statue!

With his current senses, even without the [Analytical Eyes], he could judge the level of this opponent. However, his S++ level of spirit power actually couldn’t see through this giant statue. He just sensed an abnormality in the faith power just now. If it were not for the skill of the [Analytical Eyes], he had no way to know that the statue would have such terrifying power.

What is this angel statue? Fighter machine? Or maybe inside…

Chen Rui took a few deep breaths. He quickly put away the surprise in his eyes and looked around with a surprised look while gasping in amazement.

Eliza was not suspicious. This cherub statue was the symbol of the Holy Blessing. Many people would be attracted by the magnificence and sacred breath of the statue when they first come here, and they would be amazed.

Soon, they passed the square and entered the Holy Blessing Hall.

In the hall, Chen Rui finally met 1 of the 3 giant leaders of the Holy Light Mountain, Archbishop Holy Lady Eudora.

The first impression Eudora gave Chen Rui was transcendent. It was as though she was above the material attractions of the world. The extraordinary temperament faintly exuded ethereal power which was aloof from the mundane world. It made people involuntarily have a feeling of looking up.

In fact, he really needed to look up at the Holy Lady because Eudora was extremely slender. She was taller than Chen Rui and was wearing a snow-white robe. Her long light blue hair was slightly curly, and her blue eyes were covered with a layer of translucent white gauze. One could faintly see the beautiful face that seemed to be carved.

For some reason, when Chen Rui saw Eudora, he couldn’t help but feel a sense of familiarity. He didn’t know if he had seen her anywhere, or whether it was from the consciousness of ‘Arthur’ or Chen Rui’s own memory, he couldn’t remember for a while.

However, his attention quickly shifted to the [Analytical Eyes]’s data.

Race: Human.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS- (S++)

Physique: S+ (S), Power: S+ (S), Spirit: SS-(S++), Speed: S+ (S).

[Analysis]: Light attribute. Degree of danger: Very dangerous.

This data was very strange. Although Chen Rui saw the SS level for the first time, he could understand that it should be the level of the kingdomized powerhouse while S++ was the level between the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and the kingdomized. Chen Rui’s own spirit now power was S++.

The strange thing was that powerhouses normally hide their strengths. For example, Chen Rui’s S+ level strength was hidden as C, and the [Analytical Eyes] should display ‘C (S+)’. However, Holy Lady Eudora’s status was just the opposite. On the surface, her strength seemed like that of a kingdomized powerhouse. In fact, she had not yet reached the real kingdomized.

What caused this situation? Is it the 12-winged angel statue outside? Or this hall?

While Chen Rui was thinking about it, Eliza in front of him had already bowed to Eudora, “Teacher, I have brought Paul and Richard.”

Chen Rui followed Paul to bow. The Holy Lady looked at Paul, nodded, and praised, “As expected of Parsali’s genius apprentice, the famous young talent of the Dragon Bright Empire, who is only 30 years old and is about to break through Pseudo-Saint’s first small realm, or in other words, there is hope for a breakthrough in this selection. If this continues, entering the real Saint is just around the corner.”

This voice was remote and illusory at first, but it was gentle and moving which made people feel more cordial.

Paul quickly said a few humble words. Eudora spoke up, “You don’t need to be too modest. I’m very optimistic about your potential. I believe you will shine in the selection competition this time. If you can become a Divinity Temple Knight, are you willing to become the guardian knight of the Holy Family Summit?”

Each temple had its own guardian knight. Only Divinity Temple Knight was eligible to become a guardian knight. Joining a temple naturally represented the choice of standing in a team.

Paul had already made a decision when he was in the Garden City. He bowed, “Paul. Loman is willing to be a member of the Holy Blessing Hall.”

“I’m very happy with the choice you made.” The Holy Lady nodded slightly, “It’s just that this choice might upset your teacher.”

Parsali had always remained neutral among the 3 major temples and had not joined any faction. If he knew that his inheritor, Paul, whom he valued, had chosen the Holy Blessing Hall without his consent, he would definitely be very infuriated.

Paul lowered his head, “I will explain to teacher. No matter what, I will stick to my choice.”

“I have witnessed your determination, the future guardian knight.” The Holy Lady waved her hand slightly, and a small box slowly flew in front of Paul, “Help me pass this thing to him. Maybe he won’t be mad at you.”

Paul didn’t ask what it was. He respectfully took it with both hands.

Eudora’s eyes turned to Chen Rui, “Your name is Richard?”

“Yes, Your Holiness Holy Lady.” Chen Rui looked scared and lowered his head.

“I heard Eliza say that you have a soul language that only the elf tribe’s special elite has, and you can control any demonic beasts? You also tamed a thunderbird?”

“Your Holiness, I… I, to avoid offense, I didn’t bring the thunderbird, my soul language, in fact… any demonic beasts, no, I’m sorry…” Chen Rui’s tone was emotional, and he seemed a little incoherent. There was a sharp contrast compared to Paul’s steadiness.

“Don’t be nervous.” The Holy Lady’s voice seemed more gentle, “If you really have the ability as Eliza said, I will give you the best stage for you to unleash your ability, if… you want to.”

“Your Holiness, of… of course I am willing!” Chen Rui nodded quickly.

“There is new assessment content added for this year’s riding battle. Richard, as a subordinate, you will also have the opportunity to participate. I look forward to you and Paul’s performance by then.”

Chen Rui and Paul both showed surprised expressions. Subordinates will also participate? Nevertheless, they still bowed together, expressing their understanding.

The Holy Lady’s summoning was over. Eliza took the 2 of them down the Holy Light Mountain and looked back at the giant statue that should be Cherub Raphael. Chen Rui thought quickly in his mind. Although the strength of the Holy Light Mountain that he saw was only the tip of the iceberg, it was enough to arouse his vigilance. The Holy Light Mountain contains huge secrets and power far beyond imagination. It seems that certain steps of the original plan must be adjusted. No matter how, I must obtain the Snow Dallet Flower.

Eliza sent the 2 to the foot of the mountain and blinked her big eye at Chen Rui, “Richard, you must work hard!”

With that said, she nodded to Paul, and she jumped step by step up the mountain.

Paul looked at Chen Rui thoughtfully, “Richard? What are you thinking?”

Chen Rui scratched his head, “I was thinking why didn’t I see Ms. Miranda?”

Paul smiled and patted him on the shoulder, “Didn’t Her Holiness Holy Lady say it? New content will be added to this riding battle, and you will also participate at that time. Don’t think too much. Concentrate on preparing. Her Holiness is looking forward to our performance.”

“ En , for Sir Paul and also for Ms. Miranda!” Chen Rui lifted his spirits, raised his fist, but he shouted in his heart, “For the leader of secret intelligence, Madam Yini!”

The first category of the Divinity Temple Knight selection, martial arts individual battle, was finally over.

Paul fought all the way in the fifth group and became the winner in the group to enter the final stage, but he encountered strong opponents in the 5-man final round. He lost to 2 people, but he finally won the third place in the end.

As 1 of the 5 people who participated in the first category’s final stage, Paul obtained the qualification to directly participate in the quarter finals of the second category, riding battle.

As Holy Lady Eudora said, the content of the riding battle had changed this time. The original riding battle competition was where the candidates each rode on a mount to attack, but now the candidates would ride on the 5-horse chariot and use a specially made magic javelin against their opponents. Each candidate had 30 javelins; the 1 who accurately shot the most was the winner.

Participants could appoint an assistant to ride the mount. If there was no suitable assistant, the chief examiner would arrange a Light Knight as an assistant. Chen Rui finally understood why the Holy Lady said that he, the subordinate, would also be able to unleash his ability.

TL: He can just control the opponent’s horses and win 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 670: Riding Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 670: Riding Battle

Half of the people had been eliminated in the previous individual battle. Those who were eligible to participate in the second category were not weak. After these people had passed through another round of screening in the riding battle, the rest could be regarded as the elite level of this selection contest.

Now Chen Rui and Paul would be facing this kind of opponent. This kind of riding battle was no easier than the first individual battle. Participants couldn’t attack outside of the chariot or they would lose. In addition to their own strength, controlling the mount and commanding the battle were indispensable.

Within the specified time or in the case of running out of javelin, the side that shot the opponent’s chariot the most times would be the winner. If both sides failed to strike the opponent, they would be eliminated at the same time.

Aside from Paul, most people chose the Light Knight prepared by the organizer. A small number of participants chose their own servants to control the mount. These servants should be good at riding; they work together more tacitly because of mutual understanding.

Paul’s first opponent was a B-level Warrior named Tamm who chose the Light Knight to ride. If it was a 1-to-1, the victory or defeat would be determined in just the blink of an eye, but this kind of long-range battle was completely different. First of all, the chariot was specially made like the magnets of the same polar that repelled each other so that the 2 chariots could maintain about 50 meters distance. Then the magic javelin was also specially made so that it would not cause harm to the contestants. It could greatly absorb the power of the user as well as greatly reduce the speed and power of the throw. This would balance the strength of both parties. Although there were still differences between strengths, the gap had been narrowed a lot, and the outcome would become more unpredictable.

Paul’s game began. The 2 sides rushed out of the opposing channels in a huge ring-shaped field and began a long-range battle.

Each chariot had 4 horses. For Chen Rui with the [Analytical Eyes], these finest thoroughbred horses were much easier to communicate with than the thunderbirds and others. He quickly got full control.

The opponent knew that Paul’s strength had already entered Saint, so he didn’t plan to fight face-to-face recklessly. In the beginning, he commanded the carriage to turn around and kept away from Paul. Because of the limited time, they would be eliminated at the same time if both sides did not make a shot. Of course, no one wanted to be eliminated. Therefore, 1 party would definitely make a move first. Mistakes were prone to occur when there was urgency for success,. This way, he had the opportunity to seize the opportunity to fight back and defeat the strong opponent.

Tamm’s combat experience and scheming were good, and his plan was also very precise. However, when the chariot rushed forward, he suddenly noticed something. The opponent was getting closer. He couldn’t help but frown.

If the horses are going at full speed now, the horsepower will be unavailable later. It seems that the opponent has no patience to fight for a long time and wants to end it quickly. It’s just the right time to take advantage of this psychological delay. He immediately ordered, “Speed up! Keep your distance from them!”

Light Knight controlled the horses according to his words, but although the chariot’s speed greatly increased, Paul was still approaching quickly behind, and the distance was shortened again. He was secretly shocked as he hurriedly shouted, “Hurry up!”

“Faster”

“Quick!”

The Light Knight’s answer sounded, “It’s already the fastest!”

“ Huh? Wait, how can they be so fast?” Tamm was taken aback. When he saw Paul’s figure standing on the chariot while holding a magic javelin in his hand, he exclaimed, “Turn right immediately!”

However, it was too late. Seeing the light flashing 1 after another, Paul actually threw out 20 javelins in an instant, and the golden javelins lined up in a continuous arc. In an instant, Tamm felt his vision slowed down. Then, in the blink of an eye, everything became dozens of times faster. Before he could react, there was a series of bombing sounds from the chariot.

All 20 strikes hit the target, and Tamm was eliminated.

The first reaction of Tamm who was defeated was to appeal, questioning Paul’s horse speed. After careful inspection by the chief examiner, they unanimously ruled that the horses of both sides were the same, and they didn’t use any tricks. The reason why Paul’s horse could perform at super speed was because the rider used his brilliant beast taming skill.

This complaint made Chen Rui, who was originally unremarkable, quickly enter the sight of the contestants. Everyone knew that Paul had a subordinate who was proficient in beast taming. In the next competition, Chen Rui perfectly demonstrated the ‘brilliant’ beast taming skill interpreted by the chief examiner and shined brightly.

The most anticipated battle occurred in the semifinals where Paul and Stanwell played against each other.

Stanwell’s power was close to the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He was the champion of the first individual battle category. He easily defeated Paul in the final stage of the individual battle. However, in the riding battle, when he met his defeated opponent again, he encountered a result beyond his expectation.

Due to the characteristics of the javelin, the strength difference between the 2 sides was narrowed. After a dazzling round of long-range battle, Paul and Stanwell each struck each other with 7 shots. On the surface, the results were equal, and Paul’s seventh throw was still ahead of Stanwell which had a time advantage. However, Stanwell still had 5 javelins in his hand, and Paul did not have any more javelins. As long as Stanwell struck Paul with once, Paul could be eliminated.

Just when Stanwell, who thought he was winning, launched an attack, Paul’s chariot suddenly made incredible moves: S-shaped and Z-shaped dodging, sudden braking, and even unprecedented ‘drift’… In the midst of the series of incredible actions, Stanwell’s all 5 javelins actually missed, and the final result was 7-7. As Paul’s striking time was before Stanwell, Stanwell was eliminated.

This battle caused a sensation in the audience. Almost everyone was talking about the chariot’s amazing moves and ‘Richard”s wonderful beast control. There was not much suspense in the finals on the second day because Paul’s advantage was too obvious. He only needed to focus on the offense. His most helpful servant, ‘Richard’, would take care of riding or commanding.

This way, Paul won the first place in the second category of riding battle. The top 3 would be listed as the seeded players and would directly enter the finals of the third category of team battle. After the elimination of the first 2 battles, the third category had only 48 participants in total. In the round robin, Paul could become one of the final 20 winners with just 1 victory. The title of Divinity Temple Knight was almost certain.

After Paul won the riding battle, he immediately received the olive branch thrown by the Divinity Seal Hall and the Stars Hall. If it was before going to the Garden City, perhaps Paul would hesitate to join which faction, but now he had chosen Holy Blessing Hall and even met the Holy Lady. If he was still hesitant, he would offend both sides, so he didn’t hesitate at the moment to politley reject 1 by 1.

In the afternoon, Holy Lady no doubt summoned Paul and Chen Rui again. This time it was not Eliza who took them up the mountain, but the half-elf Miranda. Because of the made-up elf story, Chen Rui had to show considerable enthusiasm for Miranda in order to avoid being regarded as a homosexual. Fortunately, the half-elf lady seemed extremely disgusted with ‘Richard’ and completely ignored his flattery. Chen Rui just appeared to be ‘embarrassed’ in response. Paul saw this and thought of himself being rejected by Joanna in the same way. The depression hidden in his heart was inexplicably relieved, and he patted the frustrated subordinate in consolation.

After passing the strange angel statue, several people entered the Holy Blessing Hall. Chen Rui saw Holy Lady Eudora again.

“Miranda, you go down first.” Eudora said faintly. Miranda bowed and retreated. Although Chen Rui bowed his head respectfully, the corner of his eyes secretly stared at the graceful back walking away. He controlled his heartbeat to be somewhat quick.

Eudora’s blue eyes flashed a faint light as she noticed this scene. She spoke up, “Paul, congratulations on your winning in the riding battle. Now you are only 1 step away from the Divinity Temple Knight, but don’t let your guards down. I hope you can win the final championship this time if possible. This will also be the glory of the Holy Blessing Hall. Perhaps you will get the attention and appreciation of a certain sir.”

Paul was overjoyed at the last sentence, and he quickly spoke up, “Your Holiness, I will definitely try my best to win.”

Compared with individual battles and riding battles, the final team battle was about command. Participants, as commanders, were not allowed to fight in person. Therefore, opponents with super personal power such as Stanwell couldn’t unleash the talents, but Paul was quite confident of his own military strategy.

Eudora nodded approvingly and asked, “Did you give that item to your teacher last time? Did he say anything?”

“I have handed it to teacher in accordance with Your Holiness’s instructions. Teacher seemed to be lost in thought and asked if I had made a decision. I said yes.” Paul lowered his head and took out a bottle. “Teacher didn’t say much after keeping the item. He just took out another item and let me forward it to Your Holiness with a message… Call it even.”

Eudora pondered for a moment. When she waved, the bottle flew into her hand, “I see. Go back first. Richard, you stay.”

Paul was a little surprised that the Holy Lady asked Chen Rui to stay alone, but he did not ask more questions and left after bowing.

After Paul left, Eudora walked slowly to Chen Rui, “Richard, is this your real name?”

Chen Rui didn’t know why Eudora made him stay by himself. He rapidly thought about it, and replied, “Your Holiness, frankly speaking, this is not my real name. It’s just 1 of the many names I’ve used. I came from a big family of an empire and was forced to leave because of failure in some competitions. I once swore a heavy vow that I will just be an ordinary wanderer before taking back what belonged to me.”

“So you chose Paul to use his power to regain everything?”

“Yes.” Chen Rui knew that Eudora must have investigated his details, and ‘Richard’ was not existent before in Town Gudam, so he deliberately said that ‘Richard’ was just 1 of the pseudonyms used.

“So, strictly speaking, you are a person of unknown origin, but judging from what you just said, whether it is emotions or heartbeats, there are only 2 possibilities. First, you are telling the truth. Second, you have an extremely terrifying mind and power that can deceive my senses.” With that said, Eudora’s eyes stared scorchingly on Chen Rui’s face.

Chen Rui was secretly relieved. Fortunately, he deliberately controlled the mood swings with spirit power just now. He immediately put on a surprised look on his face, then he smiled bitterly, “I would rather be the second one if I can.”

Eudora smiled slightly behind the veil, “As long as you join the Holy Blessing Hall and help me accomplish 1 thing, I will fulfill 3 of your requirements. Whether you want to become a powerhouse, have power and authority or others, it will not be a dream.”

TL: What does she want from Chen Rui as a ‘beast tamer’? Did she already know the identity of Arthur?

chapters.title: Chapter 671: Egg
chapters.body:
Chapter 671: Egg

Chen Rui was surprised at the generous promise of the Holy Lady, plus her previous action of letting Paul go and leaving him alone.As the saying went, there must be an interest behind a move. ‘Richard’ was nothing but a ‘weakling’ with a beast taming skill. Was there anything else that Her Holiness Holy Lady could take advantage of?

Chen Rui reacted quickly and immediately showed a high-spirited expression, “Any 3 conditions?”

“Yes, the prerequisite is that you have to accomplish something.”

“No problem! I’m willing to join the Holy Blessing Hall and work for Your Holiness!” Chen Rui seemed extremely excited as if he had received the windfall. Although he didn’t know what the Holy Lady wanted him to do, he understood the so-called ‘any’ 3 conditions should not be unlimited. For example, if he really mentioned the Snow Dallet as a condition, perhaps he would be detained immediately.

Eudora walked down slowly, looked at him a few times, and nodded in satisfaction, “You can’t tell anyone including Paul about what you see next and what I want you to do. Otherwise… Everything you hope for will vanish, including your life.”

“Understood, Your Holiness.”

Although this was a pure threat, the kind voice of the Holy Lady seemed to have a magical power that made it almost impossible for people to have an adverse feeling.

“Take this and don’t let it go.” When Eudora waved, a ping-pong-sized white ball appeared in front of Chen Rui, “Come with me. Remember, don’t leave 5 meters away from me.”

Holding the white ball, Chen Rui shuddered as he felt the chills coming from the ball. He followed Eudora toward the back of the hall.

The 2 made a few turns and walked through 1 passage after another. In fact, Chen Rui could clearly see that he and Eudora only took 3 turns. The other turns were illusions made by a magic circle. In addition to the magic circle, there were… ancient runes.

Ancient runes were called the language of gods, and it was said that they could be used to glimpse the mysteries of the gods. Cherub Raphael was behind the Holy Blessing Hall. It was not surprising that there would be ancient runes here, but the nearby runes were very profound. Even some sentences and combinations were unknown to Zola. As Chen Rui’s mind moved, he activated the [Deep Analysis] to quickly analyze and record.

After walking for a long time, after passing a corridor with various hidden traps, a door appeared in front of him. Eudora’s mind moved, and the door slowly opened.

Once the door just opened, Chen Rui felt a blazing heat rushing toward his face. At this time, the refreshing cold air of the white ball effectively offset the heat, so he felt very comfortable.

This small palace was arranged like a volcanic environment, exuding terrifying heat. If it were not for the cold protection of the white ball, ‘Richard’ would definitely not be able to bear it with his Demon King strength level.

There was another person in the palace, Eliza.

Eliza’s clothes at the moment were very revealing. Except for some quirky accessories on her body, she almost wore a bikini. Her figure looked a lot more mature than her appearance. Although her breasts were not as rich as Celine’s, they were still plump. She had a graceful figure and white skin, exuding a layer of sweat. It had a different kind of temptation full.

Chen Rui’s [Analytical Eyes] could identify that Eliza’s necklace, armband, bracelet, and anklet were a set of equipment that could greatly enhance spirit power and sensing power.

Eliza sat on the ground in the center of the palace. Her body was steaming with white mist, and her hands were sending out strong spirit fluctuations toward something which was like a… bird’s nest. In the nest, there was a coconut-sized round object, wrapped in the white mist.

“Eliza, how is it?”
