“Teacher.” Eliza stood up and bowed, “The runes have been amplified by twice in the past few days, but it is still the same as before. I sense almost no fluctuation.”

Eudora glanced at Chen Rui, “Richard, your soul language and beast taming skills have shown amazing magical effects in the riding battle which made me more determined to rely on your power. As you see, that demonic beast egg is very important to me…”

Chen Rui’s heart suddenly beat at a glance at the ‘demonic beast egg’. This detail was immediately noticed by Eudora. Her eyes flashed. Just as she was about to speak, Chen Rui covered his chest and showed a painful expression. It took a long time before he recovered.

“Your Holiness! What demonic beast egg is this?” Chen Rui seemed like he was still badly shaken.

“Can your spirit power sense it?” Eudora’s eyes lit up.

“It’s just a little bit. As soon as my spirit power touches it, my soul seems to be burned to death by the boundless flames. It’s really terrifying!”

“The feeling of burning?” Eudora took a deep breath, “Very well, the soul language you have is more acute than I expected!”

In fact, Chen Rui was indeed intensely electrocuted just now. The painful look was just to hide the shock of his mind.

In the [Analytical Eyes], the data of this egg appeared.

Race: Phoenix (Egg)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: Unknown.

[Analysis]: Sleeping state, hatchable.

Holy Lady Eudora actually has a phoenix egg here!

‘Phoenix’ was no stranger to the Chinese on Earth. It was the king of birds. The appearance of the phoenix represented auspiciousness and it was also a kind of tribe totem.

In this magic world, there was also the existence of phoenix. Chen Rui only heard this name occasionally from Zola and Paglio. This was an ancient creature that had almost disappeared. It was older than the giant dragon family. As 1 of the top creatures ever, it possessed tyrannical and mysterious power. As it was ages ago, many records were incomplete. Only 2 attributes were known: Immune to all flame power and could be resurrected in the flames.

These 2 attributes of fire immunity and rebirth alone were abnormal enough.

“Wear this, it should increase your resistance.” Eudora took out a necklace and gave it to Chen Rui. “Now, adjust your power and try to sense with your soul language.”

Chen Rui took the necklace which was actually a legendary grade accessory. It would increase the wearer’s spirit power by 30%, shield spirit fluctuations, increase mental resistance, and reduce the damage of fire elements by 50%. It seemed that Her Holiness Holy Lady was no doubt very generous.

Chen Rui put on the necklace without hesitating and tried to really use the [Analytical Eyes] to communicate with the phoenix’s egg. Gradually, the phoenix’s egg, which had not reacted at all, seemed to sense some kind of intimate power hidden in him and began to radiate slight fluctuation.

Even Eliza could sense this special fluctuation. Eudora’s eyes suddenly exuded brilliant light, and her clothes fluttered slightly, seeming to suppress the excitement in her heart. The phoenix’s egg, which has been silent, actually has such an obvious reaction!

Chen Rui felt a familiar breath in this kind of fluctuation as if it had some resonance with his spirit power. The [Analytical Eyes] also sent the emotion of intimacy at the same time. He could not help but be slightly surprised. This breath… power of Nirvana!

Eudora and Eliza could not sense the intimate emotion of the phoenix’s egg toward Chen Rui. Due to the necklace’s function of shielding mental fluctuations, plus Chen Rui’s own S++ spirit power and [Breath Holding] skill, even Eudora could not detect the abnormality of his spirit power. However, the change of the phoenix’s egg alone utterly shocked both of them.

Chen Rui retracted his spirit power, wiped the sweat from his head and showed a tired look, “Your Holiness, my soul language can only barely sense its life and existence. It seems that I will not be able to live up to Your Holiness’ expectations.”

“You’re wrong, I’m very satisfied with your ability.” Eudora had recovered and shook her head gracefully, “You know? The change of the riding battle is actually due to my intervention. The purpose is to test your ability. I’m gratified that your performance exceeded my expectations. As I said, it will give you the best stage for your ability. As long as you can successfully hatch this egg, then I will honor my previous promise to satisfy any 3 of your conditions, including… Miranda.”

Chen Rui was surprised. Only then did he realize that the new rule of the original riding battle was actually changed by the Holy Lady in order to deliberately test him. The purpose is precisely for the phoenix’s egg. Also, Miranda is Eudora’s apprentice, and Her Holiness Holy Lady threw her out as a bargaining chip without even thinking about it. This is definitely the means of an ambitious and ruthless person. Then, once ‘Richard’ really hatches the egg, whether will Her Holiness Holy Lady fulfill her promise or kill me, only the damn Light God will know.

However, ‘Richard’ was also not an amateur. Perhaps even the damn Light God will not know who will cry or laugh at that time.

Thinking of this, Chen Rui nodded in joy, “Yes! Your Holiness!”

“Since this is the case, you make the Blood Oath of Light according to this contract.” The Holy Lady’s mind moved and a contract appeared in front of Chen Rui. Chen Rui was no stranger to the Blood Oath of Light. Samuel used this contract power back then to become Chen Rui’s subordinate.

“Your Holiness, to tell you the truth, I once promised Sir Paul to sign a subordinate contract after he becomes Divinity Temple Knight.” Chen Rui slightly pondered and showed an expression of hesitation.

“You fool!” Eliza shouted, “So many people eagerly wanted to be teacher’s subordinate, yet you are still hesitating at this time? Teacher can give you 100 times better rewards than what Paul can give you.”

“Of course I know, and the trust of Her Holiness Holy Lady makes me unable to refuse.” Chen Rui said sincerely, “I have only 1 request. After I made the Blood Oath of Light, I want to accompany Sir Paul until the end of the Divinity Temple Knight Selection Contest.”

“No problem.” Eudora’s voice had a hint of praise, “I admire this quality of finishing what one started. I’m glad to have a subordinate like you. From now on, you are the highest-level Holy Light Guardian Knight in the Holy Blessing Hall with the privilege of entering and exiting the Holy Blessing Summit. Of course, to enter this Hall of Flame, you must first get my permission. Otherwise, even if a Saint powerhouse tries to break in, he will lose his life with the multiple traps along the way.”

“I’m willing to serve Your Holiness.” Chen Rui bowed deeply and stretched out his hand to the Blood Oath of Light without hesitation.

TL: By the time he hatched the egg, he had already brought the phoenix back to the Demon Realm. He can already open a zoo to show off his collections 🤔

chapters.title: Chapter 672: The Fire Source Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 672: The Fire Source Power

The contract’s light flickered for a while before gradually fading, representing the completion of the contract.

In the Blood Oath of Light and the master-subordinate contract, although the master couldn’t kill the subordinate, the power of the contract required the subordinate to be loyal to the master and never betray him. It was a commonly used high level contract in the human world.

But for Chen Rui, it was nothing more than a spiritual link that could be easily canceled at the cost of aura.

Eudora’s gaze was a little confused, “Simon, is this your real name? This kind of contract power feels a little strange to me. Have you signed a contract with anyone before?”

Chen Rui was slightly surprised. His contract power was made by a spiritual link. I remember that Shura mentioned that this contract power rule is very special. I didn’t expect that Eudora could actually sense it.

He changed his mind and explained, “I had signed an equality contract with the Pastor Mana of Town Gudam. Later, Pastor Mana was assassinated and the contract was canceled. Your Holiness’ feeling should have something to do with my special talent. It was precisely because of this I can get the soul language power of the elf tribe.”

Eudora’s real power should not have reached the real kingdomized level. The reason for the SS-level strength is probably due to the power of this Holy Blessing Hall similar to the buff of the Star Conferring Platform or [Armor of Faith]. It seems that the real Demi-God powerhouse will likely sense the special nature of the spiritual link contract. I must be cautious in the future.

Eudora thought for a moment and nodded. ‘Simon’ has a special talent. What’s more, now that the master-subordinate contract has been successfully signed, I’m not afraid of any changes in him. In the future, if I need to conclude the same contract with other more valuable people, I can just directly kill this subordinate.

In fact, the murderous intent that the Holy Lady had been hiding was kept away only at the moment Chen Rui accepted the contract. The phoenix’s egg was one of her most important secrets. If Simon’s beast taming skill could not succeed, then he would definitely be killed.

Chen Rui was only faintly aware of this kind of murder intent. Even if he didn’t sense it, he could roughly guess- Her Holiness Holy Lady is by no means an innocent beauty or a merciful goddess, but a fierce and ruthless character.

Eudora took out a small bottle which was the 1 Paul brought. Chen Rui remembered that Parsali said ‘call it even’. When Eudora opened the bottle, a dazzling red light shone from inside, and a pure and rich fire element power radiated. The entire palace was reflected in red, and the hot feeling suddenly became 100 times stronger.

The coldness of the white ball had already reached its extreme, and a faint mist emerged from Chen Rui’s body, but it had evaporated in an instant. If it hadn’t been for the legendary grade necklace given by Eudora earlier that greatly reduced the erosion of the fire power, ‘Richard’ would no longer be able to support it.

Eudora flicked slightly. A gust of liquid ‘flame’ was slowly pulled out from the bottle and turned into a circle to surround the phoenix’s egg. Eudora’s fingers began to change rapidly. Chen Rui could see that she was activating and adjusting the ancient runes near the nest. Gradually, the liquid flame condensed into symbols and. The heat was greatly reduced. Only the phoenix’s egg had a faint redness.

“This is the fire source power. You must be careful and never touch it because the power contained in the fire source power is very terrifying; it will turn you into flying ash in an instant. All you have to do is use the soul language to communicate with the life in the demonic beast’s egg and induce it to absorb the fire source power in order to hatch as soon as possible.”

“Yes, Your Holiness.” Chen Rui bowed his head. His eyes flashed with brilliance when he lowered his head: It is too unexpected, but it is an unexpected surprise! It turns out that the fire source power is in Parsali’s bottle! I found it by chance after traveling far and wide in search of it!

“Divinity Temple Knight’s most exciting team battle will begin tomorrow. In the finals, His Holiness Vantis, His Holiness Pusmeer and I will all attend. With Paul’s previous results, he will directly enter the second round of the finals. Richard, when Paul is not competing, Eliza will take you into this Hall of Flame. Eliza, if Richard needs any materials or equipment, you have to cooperate fully and report to me at any time if there is any changes. Both of you may leave now. I still need to lay out the magic circle.”

Eliza and Chen Rui left. Along the way, Eliza had put on a cloak, covering her exposed figure. She looked at Chen Rui with a smile, “Congratulations, Holy Light Guardian Knight Sir Simon. Oh , I’ll just continue calling you ‘Richard’. By the way, the guardian knight is divided into 3 levels: White Brilliance, Silver Splendor, and Holy Light. Holy Light is the highest level guardian knight. It seems that teacher attaches more importance to you than I expected. However, even if Paul wins the Divinity Temple Knight championship, he is at best a Silver Splendor Guardian Knight, so his status is lower than yours.”

Chen Rui was taken aback. That will embarrass Paul and ‘Richard’ will not be able to face Paul or they would even become enemies. Judging from the hostility between Eliza and Miranda, Holy Lady seems to be accustomed to the means of division, allowing her apprentices to ‘compete’ with each other. From a different point of view, the more divided the followers, the less threat they are, and the easier they are to control.

“Don’t worry, just tell me if you need anything in the future.” Eliza looked at his surprised look and smiled happily, “As you are now the Holy Light Guardian Knight, pursuing Miranda shouldn’t be a problem. I can’t help you much on this.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up and nodded, “Thank you so much, Ms. Eliza. Why are you helping me like this? Words can’t express my gratitude to you.”

“Call me Eliza.” Eliza smiled sweetly, “I like you, but don’t get me wrong, it’s a simple liking. Starting from the Garden City, you look more pleasing to the eye than those who have attempted to gain something from me. I hope to be your most trusted friend.”

“You already are, Ms. Eliza… No, Eliza.” Chen Rui cooperated with a sincere expression.

After bidding farewell to Eliza, Chen Rui returned to Holy Light City. When he walked to the Silver Villa’s room, he ran into Paul at the door.

“What did Her Holiness Holy Lady say to you?” Paul asked directly.

Chen Rui showed a hesitating expression, “Sir, please forgive me. Her Holiness has specially told me not to tell anyone.”

Paul nodded and walked out without saying anything, but his eyes were a little bit more hazy: ‘Richard’ has been so popular recently. He even attracted the attention of Her Holiness Holy Lady, asking him to stay for some important matters. On the other hand, I, as his master, seem to be ignored.

Chen Rui felt Paul’s suspicion, but he didn’t even bother to think about it. With Paul’s strength, he was just a small pawn, and his use value would soon be exhausted.

This trip to meet the Holy Lady was an unexpected gain for Chen Rui. It was not referring to the white ball and legendary grade equipment he got, but the fire source power. He initially thought that he could only get the fire source power when he found the Fire Elemental King whom he didn’t know the whereabouts of, yet the source power actually appeared in Parsali’s hands and was given to Eudora.

The fire source power was an important part of Zola’s establishment of the Kingdom of Elements, and it must be obtained. As for phoenix’s egg, Chen Rui had an idea to pack it and take it away. Although the storage warehouse of the Super System couldn’t store living things, the space equipment could store this incomplete ‘life’. It was the same for the previous manticore egg. The 2 could be regarded as complementary.

Chen Rui had to give up that little thunderbird because only he could use the [Star Gate] unless the little thunderbird could be turned back into the egg.

In the following days, Chen Rui would go to the Holy Blessing Hall every day to communicate with the phoenix’s egg in soul language according to the instructions of the Holy Lady. Of course, Eliza would lead the way and ‘assist’ every time.

In his spare time, Chen Rui also pursued the half-elf, Ms. Miranda. Miranda was very disgusted with Chen Rui without even hiding it which saved Chen Rui a lot of time. Eliza had a very close relationship with Chen Rui during this period. She also helped to come up with an idea to pursue Miranda, and she took him to wander around to relax. If Chen Rui hadn’t known her nature a long time ago, he would really think she was an enthusiastic younger sister.

With the help of this ‘enthusiastic younger sister’, in addition to clinging to Ms. Half-elf, Chen Rui also gained a clearer understanding of the terrain of the Holy Light Mountain while ‘wandering’. Unfortunately, he still couldn’t enter the hinterland of the other 2 temples.

He also had an astonishing discovery. According to Chen Rui’s observations and calculations these days, there should be a huge and complicated magic circle in the underground of the Holy Blessing Hall’s square. This magic circle could absorb and graft the faith power, transferring elsewhere’s faith power to Cherub Raphael’s statue. To put it bluntly, it is similar to Shura, stealing faith!

The difference is that they do it blatantly. The sneaky Shura pales into insignificance in comparison to this.

This finding is very intriguing. If Raphael is 1 of Light God’s archangels, what does such ‘stealing’ mean? In addition to Raphael, are Michael and Gabriel the same? Why are these Light God servants doing this?

Chen Rui faintly felt that he had revealed a corner of a great secret, but now Isabella didn’t have much time left, so it was not the time to satisfy this curiosity.

Others might not feel it, but Chen Rui, who had a Tower of Faith in [Galaxy Territory], could clearly sense the flow of faith power. The source of the faith power absorbed by the Raphael statue should be from the highest place in the Holy Light Mountain. It was very likely to be the Light Divinity Temple on the top of the Holy Light Mountain. The Light Divinity Temple was the forbidden area of the Holy Light Mountain where God gives his will and displays miracles. Only the pope and 2 archbishops were eligible to enter.

That should be the place where the concentration of light faith is highest in the Holy Light Mountain and the entire human world. If Shura can steal there, even if it is only a small part, the time to obtain 1 million faith crystals will be greatly shortened.

Snow Dallet Flower! Faith power! Fire source power+phoenix’s egg! Chen Rui’s eyes flashed while counting his goals this time.

The team battle finals of the Divinity Temple Knight will be held in the arena of Holy Light City. Eudora once said that the 3 giant leaders of the Holy Light Mountain will attend the finals. At that time, the attention of the Holy Light Mountain will shift to the Holy Light City’s arena – That time will be the best time to make a move!

TL: Can he end the short trip to the human world and return to the Demon Realm?

chapters.title: Chapter 673: Eliza’S Final Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 673: Eliza’S Final Plan

The last team battle of the Divinity Temple Knight selection contest had finally begun. The competition of the team battle was far more intense than the previous 2 rounds because the contestants as the commander couldn’t take action by themselves. They could only dispatch soldiers under their command to fight. As a result, the difference in strength between the 2 sides was equivalent to non-existent, and they both returned to the same starting line.

The combat weapons were all specially made. After being hit, they would be automatically teleported out of the field. The one who ‘eliminated’ all the opponent’s pawn or if the opponent conceded defeat would win.

Paul skipped the first round as the riding battle champion, and he went directly to the second round of the 24-men battle. He became 1 of the top 4 with an unbeaten record in the round robin.

The semi-finals’ opponent would be decided by drawing lots. Paul once again drew his old opponent, Stanwell, and tried his best, but he eventually lost by a narrow margin. Stanwell and another person, Sovlin, entered the finals.

Although the results of the top 4 had been quite excellent and the expected goal of the Divinity Temple Knight had been achieved, Paul still felt very frustrated because the pope and the 2 archbishops would be here to watch the finals. Her Holiness Holy Lady also said that if he won the championship, he might be able to attract the attention of the archangels and get unimaginable benefits… However, now all of this was gone.

Paul looked at the sparse silhouette in the square and sighed. The anticipated champion and runner-up finals in the presence of the pope and archbishops were about to start. He was supposed to show his power to everyone on that stage, but now he was only a spectator like many losers.

He was in a bad mood and didn’t even want to go to the arena.

“Paul.” A familiar voice sounded from behind with an alluring sweetness.

Paul knew who it was even if he didn’t look back. He frowned and asked, “Eliza, why are you here? Aren’t you staying with Richard all day?”

“Why, are you jealous?” Eliza chuckled, “Come with me. This is not a place to talk.”

Paul frowned more tightly, “Where is Richard?”

“I gave him a bunch of rare ice blue roses and asked him to give it to the half-elf. During this time, he made a lot of effort. Unfortunately, in the eyes of half-elf, he was just an ugly man.”

Hearing the news of Chen Rui’s setbacks, Paul felt a lot more happy, “Why are you looking for me?”

Eliza looked around and stopped, “There are 2 matters which are both important to you. I can tell the first one free of charge.”

“I need to pay for the second one?” Paul looked suspicious, “Why don’t you tell me about the first thing first?”

“You don’t know yet, right? Your subordinate, Richard, has already become the Holy Light Guardian Knight of the Holy Blessing Hall when the Holy Lady asked him to stay back for the first time.”

Paul was shocked. The expressions of surprise, gloom, and anger in his eyes began to interweave quickly – The Holy Light Guardian Knight was the highest of the 3 guardian knights who had special power and status and was directly authorized and appointed by the archbishop. Ordinary guardian knight might not reach this level in his life. After Paul shifted from his Teacher Parsali’s Temple of Thunder and joined the Holy Blessing Hall, even if he won the Divinity Temple Knight, he was at best the second-level Silver Splendor Guardian Knight. Now that he had no hope of winning, he could probably only be the lowest White Brilliance Knight. In the eyes of the outside world, this was already a high honor. But this meant that he, as a dignified Saint powerhouse, would have to bow his head to his former subordinate in the future. How could the arrogant Paul accept this?

‘Richard’ is just a weak beast tamer. What method did he use to cause Her Holiness Holy Lady to value him so much? Paul felt strong resentment when he thought of ‘Richard’ hiding this from him. Is this guy using me to enter the Holy Light Mountain to use me as a springboard to advance his position all along?

Thinking of this, the resentment inevitably turned into a cold killing intent. In fact, Paul’s ‘misunderstanding’ was half right. Chen Rui really used him to enter the Holy Light Mountain.

Feeling the murder in Paul’s mind, Eliza smiled even more, “What are you thinking? Do you want to bow to Richard in the future?”

“ Hmph! ” Paul’s face became gloomy after being poked in the pain, “Ms. Eliza, is this your second matter?”

This kind of appellation had already expressed Paul’s extreme dissatisfaction. Eliza still kept smiling regardless, “If you don’t want to bend over and live under his shadow in this life, then we can talk about the second matter.”

“ Oh? You are going against him? Haven’t you been very close to him recently?” Paul thought he had misheard. He suddenly thought that Eliza and Joanna were also close friends, but when Joanna was not aware, she sent Joanna into a deadly place like the Storm Island.

Seeing Eliza grinning, Paul couldn’t help but feel a chill, and he gradually calmed down, “He is now being valued by Her Holiness Holy Lady. If there is any accident, Her Holiness Holy Lady will investigate it…”

“What teacher values is a certain special value of Richard. If the value is no longer there or is transferred, there is naturally no reason to continue to value him.” Eliza’s smile had a hint of sinister, “Once my plan is successful, neither Miranda nor Richard will become a threat, and teacher will not blame us. The only thing I need now is a helper.”

“What can I get?” Since the other party was Eliza, Paul didn’t talk nonsense, and he directly asked about the benefits.

“Silver Splendor Guardian Knight, full support for the Loman Family. I will help you become a Holy Light Guardian Knight in the future.”

“That’s it?”

“Isn’t this enough? I’m doing you a favor to get rid of the threat of Richard without you taking the responsibility. Of course, I also need to take the opportunity to get rid of Miranda. This is a win-win cooperation.” Eliza looked at Paul lightly, “Besides, what I promised is within the scope of my ability. If I promise greater benefits, do you think I’m sincere?”

Paul thought for a moment, and he finally nodded, “When are you making a move?”

A strange light flashed in Eliza’s eyes, “Now!”

Neither of them knew that a hidden figure was leaving silently behind them.

The Holy Light Mountain, the garden house of the Holy Blessing Hall.

This was actually a big garden with all kinds of flowers and plants. The surrounding was full of refreshing fragrance, and there were many trees in the garden.

“What are you doing here again?” The half-elf Miranda stood at the gate of the garden while looking at Chen Rui with a cold face. Chen Rui’s hands were behind him; he was holding a large bouquet of blue roses.

“This… is for you.” Chen Rui handed the blue roses hidden behind him.

“Ice blue roses?” Miranda was slightly surprised, “Where did you get it?”

Chen Rui said in accordance with the lines taught by Eliza, “I bought it with great effort. This ice blue rose is said to be very rare and can be planted directly to survive. Don’t you like flowers…”

“Yes, but the flowers you send, no matter what they are, are detestable.” Miranda interrupted Chen Rui coldly.

“Sorry to interrupt. Ms. Miranda.” Chen Rui showed a dejected expression, “In any case, there is nothing wrong with the flowers. I’m the 1 who is wrong. I know you like them. Before I leave, please accept these ice blue roses because I really don’t know how to take care of them. You also can’t bear to let them wither like this.”

Miranda was slightly less cold, and she finally nodded. The ice blue rose was an extremely rare flower. Moreover, the fragrance and pollen of the flowers were very helpful to her training.

The half-elf took the flowers handed by Chen Rui and smelled them, then she suddenly frowned. As she took a closer look and picked out a few blue grasses from the roses, her complexion changed drastically, “Ecstasy grass!”

Ecstasy grass was rarer than ice blue rose, but its characteristic was bewitching. It could make people who smell the fragrance lose their power quickly, and it had an additional attribute which was a certain aphrodisiac effect.

“Despicable!” Miranda immediately reacted, and the ecstasy grass turned to ashes in a furious shout. At the same time, Chen Rui was thrown away by a huge power. Before he landed, he was caught by a figure. It was Eliza.

“Miranda! What are you doing?”

“I’m going to kill this shameless guy!” Miranda was very angry. She didn’t expect that ‘Richard’ would be so bold and despicable. He dared to use ecstasy grass to harm her. She accidentally inhaled the fragrance of the ecstasy grass just now, so her power had begun to show signs of weakening.

“Richard is a good friend of mine. You don’t have to accept his pursuit, but how dare you kill him!” Eliza put down her badly injured and pale ‘close friend’. As she opened her hands, a cloud of white light wrapped around Chen Rui while she pounced at Miranda.

Before Miranda could speak, Eliza was already approaching quickly, so she had to face it. The 2 graceful figures began to exchange hits quickly; it was almost impossible to see their movements. The flowers and leaves that were affected by the aftereffect fluttered all over the sky, “ Boom! ” Miranda was knocked backward and staggered back.

Due to the medicinal properties of the ecstasy grass, the half-elf did not want to prolong the fight. She chanted the spells quickly and a white light glowed in her hands. She wanted to activate [Light Extinction] to repel Eliza. At this moment, there was a warning sign in her heart which suddenly interrupted the spell. She hopped and avoided a deadly slash, but she was still struck by the remaining force. Blood overflowed from her mouth, and a terrifying red mark spread behind her back.

Miranda showed an expression of agony, mostly because of the spirit power recoil caused by forcibly interrupting the spell. Before she had just landed on her heels, she heard the whistling sound from the front. As she could not avoid it, she blocked it with her arm.

“ Crack! ” In the sound of the fracture, she was shaken by a huge force and flew out, breaking countless flowers and trees along the way, and he finally fell on the largest ancient tree. The ancient tree shook and dropped countless branches and leaves. The half-elf’s body slowly slid down and sat down on the ground. The injury was so severe that she could no longer stand up.

Looking at Eliza and Paul who attacked her, Miranda finally understood. Ice blue roses, ecstasy grass, sneak attack… This is clearly a long-prepared attack! The mastermind of the conspiracy is Eliza! As for ‘Richard’, he’s just being used!

“So what if you have the [Body of Light Blessing], can you be immune to this?” Eliza raised a sledgehammer in her hand, and showed unabashed pride in her sneer, “How is this compared to the cone you used last time? You never expect I can return it to you so soon right! Don’t try to ask for help. Teacher has gone down the mountain to the Holy Light City to watch the Divinity Temple Knight final match, and I have sent away the surrounding guardian knights and servants.”

Miranda desperately wanted to condense her remaining power to flee or make a near-death counterattack, but the ecstasy grass’ effectiveness had been fully unleashed. Her severely injured body couldn’t gather a trace of power. Instead, it produced a strange heat.

“The effect of ecstasy grass will stay for a while. Paul, you go and watch her first. Don’t kill her for now, I still need her later.”

Paul nodded and walked over. The greatsword, ‘Magnificent Light’, in his hands glowed with icy cold light.

Eliza’s body flickered and she came in front of ‘Richard’. After removing the white light, she saw ‘Richard’ lying there, gasping for breath. Eliza helped Chen Rui up, “Richard! How are you?”

Chen Rui barely opened his eyelids, “What happened just now?”

“That bitch Miranda wants to kill you, but now she has escaped.” The white light not only held ‘Richard’s’ breath, but it also had the effect of isolation.

“Ms. Miranda…” Chen Rui’s eyes became darker as his voice became weaker and weaker, “Why would she do this?”

“She’s not worthy of you!” Eliza gently stroked Chen Rui’s face with a faint brilliance in her hands, “You still have me. We are best friends. No matter what happens, I will be by your side.”

The dazzling power made Chen Rui feel very comfortable. His eyes gradually calmed down, “Thank you, Eliza, I’m afraid I can’t hold on.”

“Relax, with me here, I will do my best to heal you.” Eliza’s voice was getting softer and softer, “I’m your most trusted friend and the closest person.”

“The most trusted friend…” Chen Rui murmured after her, “The closest person, Eliza…”

“Are you really going to die?”

“Am I really going to die…”

“Can’t you hold on? You can’t just die like this!”

‘I can’t hold on anymore… I can’t die like this…”

Eliza’s eyes glowed strangely as she guided him step by step, “Be sure to pass the soul language to the closest person…”

“Pass the soul language to the closest person…”

“Who is the closest person?”

“Eliza…”

Eliza had a triumphant smile. She has a special kind of spiritual power that could manipulate the opponent’s mind to a certain extent, but this kind of spiritual power was not omnipotent. Unless the person was willing, the stronger the opponent’s will, the higher resistance it would be. Once it failed, she would suffer a terrifying recoil, so she would not easily activate it.

In the Garden City, after Eliza heard the story of the inheritance of soul language and confirmed it, she began to plan all this. She wanted to make Chen Rui a subordinate and seize his soul language power. Unexpectedly, Chen Rui finally chose Paul. But Eliza still didn’t give up and started a series of plans. After Chen Rui showed his ability to communicate with the phoenix egg, she became more determined and finally set the scene. Now, it was close to the successful end.

This time, not only can I get the soul language, but I can also get rid of my nemesis, Miranda. It’s killing 2 birds with 1 stone. Even if Eudora discovered this, I can still be valued by relying on the soul language.

“Pass the soul language to Eliza.” Eliza’s voice became softer and full of allure.

“Pass it to Eliza…” Chen Rui’s eyes gradually glowed with red light.

TL: If he fakes death now, he will be completely invisible which makes it easier for his plans. But, will he?

chapters.title: Chapter 674: The Snow Dallet
chapters.body:
Chapter 674: The Snow Dallet

Seeing that success was imminent, Eliza’s heart was filled with ecstasy. As long as she got the power of soul language, and then set up the scene where she and Paul came to kill Miranda after Miranda rejected and killed ‘Richard’, this long-prepared plan was complete.

Eliza understood her teacher’s personality. What Eudora valued was not the person, ‘Richard’, but his ability to communicate with the phoenix’s egg. As long as Eliza had the power of soul language, she assumed that she could use it better than Richard. With this kind of use value, plus the scene setup to excuse herself, she didn’t have to worry about punishment even if Miranda was sacrificed.

The pupils of ‘Richard’ had turned red. Eliza knew that it was a sign of the inheritance of soul language. She quickly stared at those eyes, only to feel that she was surrounded by a strange amount of spirit power. She felt very comfortable. In a trance, she became the master of the Holy Blessing Hall, trampled her former teacher under her feet, and then defeated the other 2 temples and became the supreme ruler of the Holy Light Mountain, looking down on all the creatures like a god. Although her subconscious told her that this should be a dream, the feeling of incomparable satisfaction made her unwilling to wake up from the dream, and she became more and more addicted.

A voice sounded, “Why kill Richard?”

“I want to get Richard’s soul language…” Eliza replied involuntarily.

“Why kill Miranda?”

“I have an insoluble hatred for her. In 1 mission, I killed her sister. Teacher also acquiesced to the struggle between us within the rule, the winner takes it all.”

“Why does Eudora need that demonic beast’s egg?”

“That’s a phoenix’s egg. Teacher is a fire and light element trainer. She wants to hatch a phoenix and use the secret technique to devour it. Then, she will have a chance to be promoted to a real kingdomized powerhouse.”

“Even Miranda can’t enter the Hall of Flame, why do you know this secret?”

“Because I have the ability to enchant one’s mind, and, I can’t say…” Eliza seemed to struggle a little.

“Answer me!”

“My… my mother is teacher’s sister…”

The answer was somewhat unexpected. Uncle is cardinal, aunty is Archbishop Holy Lady, the official born royal and raised up in a proper way? So, does it mean that she knows more secrets?

“Have you seen Raphael before? What is the secret of the 3 archangels?”

“Raphael… angel…” Eliza’s breathing became heavier.

“Answer!”

Eliza trembled. With a painful expression, her whole body trembled, and she suddenly screamed.

On the other side, Paul was holding swords in both hands and staring at Miranda, who was seriously injured under the old tree. He watched the half-elf’s skin gradually turn crimson. Paul showed a wretched smile, “Is the effect of the ecstasy grass acting up? If you climb here and lick my boots. Maybe I can give you a taste of a man before you die.”

Miranda desperately suppressed the desire that surged in her heart. Due to the loss of power and the aggravation of the injury, her will became weak. Even the remaining desperate strength began to disappear. She knew Eliza very well. In this case, she would never give her a way out. There would be even more vicious tortures. The only thing that she could do was to end her life before the remaining strength completely dissipated.

At this moment, Paul and Miranda heard Eliza’s scream at the same time. This cry was full of fear and pain. Normally, it would definitely attract the guardian knights, but the nearby guard knights were sent away by Eliza herself.

As soon as Paul turned his head, he saw Eliza screaming on the ground while holding her head in the distance; ‘Richard’ seemed to be missing.

Paul suddenly sensed an inexplicable sense of danger. The greatsword in his hands burst with light, and he slashed forward with all his strength before turning his head back.

The Magnificent Light greatsword stopped abruptly, and the light went out instantly. It was like a candle that extinguished with a single blow. Paul looked at the figure in front of him in disbelief, this figure that could easily block his full blow with only 2 fingers.

This familiar figure.

“Richard…” Paul exclaimed in shock, “How is it possible?!”

“Dear Sir Paul.” ‘Richard’ showed a wicked smile, “Every possibility is created from the impossible. In the end, I should thank you for your care along the way.”

Paul tried his best to withdraw the Magnificent Light pinched by the opponent’s 2 fingers, but he had overestimated his own ability. The greatsword could not move at all. This kind of terrifying strength, even my teacher, the first Paladin Captain, Glorious Swordmaster Parsali is nothing more than this!

Peak stage of the Saint powerhouse! Paul’s hairs stood up as he exclaimed, “Who are you?!”

This kind of peak stage powerhouse of the human world does not hesitate to hide his identity as a subordinate along the way, so the purpose of this person… The more Paul thought about it, the more fearful he was. He heard the other person’s calm voice, “My time is tight, I have no time to talk nonsense with ants like you. You were just tricked and you don’t need to die, but unfortunately, you want to kill me, so you have to die.”

This was the last sentence Paul heard in his life. The next second, a finger tapped on his forehead. With a ‘ bang ’, his consciousness began to dissipate together with his ambition, desire, and body…

In Miranda’s vague eyes, Paul’s body scattered like sands. It became nothingness in the blink of an eye.

Miranda’s mind was not completely blurred, and there was a trace of self-deprecating expression in her eyes: It turns out that everyone has overlooked. The ‘ugly man’ that I have always looked down upon is actually a real ‘giant dragon’.

“Do you need some help? Ms. Assassin of the Garden City?” He knelt down and looked at her with a smile.

“It’s you!” Miranda suddenly thought of something; her eyes showed shock. In the Garden City, she disguised herself and tried to assassinate Eliza. As a result, she ran into an unfathomable mysterious person while escaping. The other party did not trouble her. He just… took her first kiss.

As soon as Miranda shifted her mind, she saw a finger pointed to her forehead. She gritted her teeth and said, “Wait a minute!”

The finger paused. The half-elf did not beg for mercy, but she asked, “What happened to Eliza?”

“She wanted to control me, but was countered by my magical power. Later, because of some kind of spiritual implication power, she completely collapsed. If nothing else happened, she will not be able to wake up in her life.”

Eliza was innocent and cute on the outside, but gloomy and vicious on the inside, this time she herself was to be blamed. She deserved the consequences.

“Well, you are going to die anyway. Answer me 2 questions before you die; consider it as my reward for revenge for your sister. First, what’s the secret of Angel Raphael? Second, what’s in the Light Divinity Temple on top of the Holy Light Mountain?”

Miranda shook her head, “I haven’t seen Sir Raphael before. I only know that the last time the 3 archangels came was more than 300 years ago. As for the Light Divinity Temple, only the pope and 2 archbishops can enter there, and there are holy beasts along the way. My understanding of that place is no different from others.”

“Indeed. You didn’t lie, it’s a pity that the intel is a bit short,” As soon as he finished speaking, his finger was already pressed on Miranda’s forehead.

Miranda was closing her eyes to die, but she suddenly felt a coolness on her forehead. The ecstasy grass’ effect was quickly fading, and the lust to make her body hot was gradually dissipating.

The half-elf opened her eyes in surprise, and saw that the figure in front of him had disappeared. A voice sounded in his ear, “This is to reward your honesty. Go get a good night’s sleep, half-elf girl with very soft lips…”

The intense sleepiness hit, and the half-elf’s beautiful eyes began to blur.

At the same time, a hidden figure was walking silently on the way to the Divinity Seal Summit. For the sake of caution, his speed was not very fast. Although he was very familiar with the road of the Holy Blessing Summit, it was the first time he entered the area inside the Divinity Seal Summit.

This figure was naturally Chen Rui. The previous 1 was Shura in the Holy Blessing Hall. Shura’s mission was to accompany Eliza in acting while the mission of the original body was naturally the most important goal of this plan – The Snow Dallet!

The location of the Snow Dallet was at the Snowy Summit Stage near the Divinity Seal Hall.

He did not encounter any obstacles along the way to the Divinty Seal Summit, but Chen Rui was slightly surprised when he arrived at the Divinity Seal Hall. The layout of the Divinity Seal Hall was completely different from the Holy Blessing Hall. The Holy Blessing Hall had Raphael’s statue standing on the square, and behind it was the palace. The main peak of the Divinity Seal Hall was a giant statue. All the buildings were under the overlook of the statue. The Raphael statue could only be regarded as a small toy in comparison.

Like the Holy Blessing Hall, the faith power here was also in the abnormal state of being devoured. Seems like the 3 major temples are like this. Then the so-called 3 archangels, Light God’s most loyal and powerful servant, in turn steal the master’s faith power. What kind of tricks are they playing?

Chen Rui thought of the intel that had been reported from Shura. The last time the 3 archangels descended was more than 300 years ago. It happened to be the time of the war between the Demon Realm and humans. Could it be…

These mysteries contain amazing secrets, but the most important thing now is the Snow Dallet. Other things will be discussed later. Chen Rui’s eyes were fixed on a small mountain peak at the bottom left of the main peak of Divinity Seal Hall. According to the intel he inquired, that was the Snowy Summit Stage.

Chen Rui took a deep breath and continued to move forward by taking advantage of the [Sneak] skill with 20 minutes left.

The Snowy Summit Stage was a spacious small square with a simple and elegant style. It listed several embossed columns. Chen Rui had no time to appreciate these. His mind was firmly attracted by the 3 white trees in front of him.

There were no other plants here, only these 3 trees. The 3 trees were about 5 meters high, close to each other, like 3 close friends whispering. A faint mist surrounded the tree, and a few fist-sized white flowers grew among the green leaves. These flowers were crystal clear flashing with dazzling light like exquisitely carved gems.

Chen Rui felt the strong light element power coming from the 3 trees, and he became excited: Snow Dallet! Holy Flower!

With it, I can cancel Isabella’s [Light Annihilation Seal] curse! Get rid of the clutches of death!

At this moment, Chen Rui rushed to the Snow Dallet Tree and suddenly stopped. He seemed to sense some danger.

The corresponding prompt had appeared in the [Analytical Eyes].

Race: Light elemental.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+.

Physique:S+, power: S++, spirit: S++, speed: S+.

[Analysis]: Light attribute, light element magic immunity, strengthening talent, resurrection talent. The degree of danger (high)!

TL: Is that a Light Elemental King? This could be his first true fight ever since he advanced, but does he have enough faith crystal to fight and return to the Demon Realm?

chapters.title: Chapter 675: The Light Elemental King
chapters.body:
Chapter 675: The Light Elemental King

The data displayed by the [Analytical Eyes] made Chen Rui stop. It was not unusual to see the light elementals in the human world, especially in the Holy Light Mountain which was known as the origin of light element magic. It was just that the light elementals with this kind of data had only 1 identity, the Light Elemental King!

The Light Elemental King’s whole body was filled with white light, and a human figure appeared from within. It was too difficult to see the facial features. Although the white light was not particularly dazzling, there was a piercing sensation in the eyes after looking at it for a long time. This was 1 of the characteristics of light elementals that could allow them to strike first.

So far, Chen Rui has met 5 Elemental Kings. Except for the Fire Elemental King, he had met all the 6 kings – Not only meeting each other, but Moore in 3 Kings of Darkness was also his best friend.

The Light Elemental King was blocking in front of the Snow Dallet Tree. Currently, the [Sneak] technique still has a few minutes. Chen Rui didn’t want to create extra complications. He walked carefully to 1 side, but he heard a scoff from the silhouette in the light, “Despicable guy, no matter how brilliant your hiding talents are, nothing can hide from my eyes!”

As soon as he spoke, the dazzling light flickered, and a horrible destructive light flew out swiftly. The target was Chen Rui who was in a hidden state.

In the burst of light, the exposed human form had been irradiated, but the dazzling light was quickly extinguished in the palm of one hand, leaving no trace.

The Light Elemental King’s white pupils flickered as his eyesight locked tightly on the man who took his blow with 1 hand. As his mind moved, countless white lights rushed toward him, the ground trembled slightly, and the light gradually disappeared. The man still stood on the spot in a defensive posture without any damage.

“Who are you?” The Light Elemental King showed a puzzled expression, “Compared to the strength of peak stage of the Saint, your physique surprised me more. You are actually absorbing my attack? [Body of Light Blessing]? No! [Body of Light Blessing] definitely does not have such a strong effect…”

“My name is Richard.” Chen Rui bowed slightly, “It’s an honor to meet Your Highness Elemental King. I first declare that I have no intention of being an enemy of Your Highness.”

“I’m Light Elemental King Delkus. Your vision is as impressive as your strength, but your courage is greater than your strength. How dare you sneak in here. Don’t tell me you are here for sightseeing. Your goal… Hmph. It’s nothing more than the Snow Dallet.”

Chen Rui was immediately exposed. Without denying it, he nodded and said, “The Snow Dallet Flower is of vital importance to me. If possible, please do me a favor, Your Highness Delkus. I will remember the favor of Your Highness, and I will surely repay you in the future.”

“The most important role of the Snow Dallet Flower is the necessary materials to transform the [Body of Light Blessing] ceremony. It has no effect on your physique.” Delkus sneered, “The Snow Dallet Flower is not an ordinary plant. It is the flower of light faith; only Vantis that has obtained the divine faith seal can pluck it freely with the secret method. Otherwise, even if you pluck it off, it will become a powerless ordinary flower in a short time! If you don’t know anything about this, how dare you sneak in here alone? Don’t try to fool an Elemental King. Unless you can beat me, don’t even think about touching the Snow Dallet Tree!”

It was indeed the first time Chen Rui heard of these secrets. Even Eliza and others didn’t know it. It turns out that [Body of Light Blessing] can be transformed through a certain ritual in addition to heredity. The Snow Dallet is actually a necessary material. The most troublesome thing is that only Pope Vantis with some seal kind of faith seal can pluck it. Otherwise, it will lose its effect soon. Do I need to actually grab the pope to pluck it?

Judging from the strength of Holy Lady Eudora, she has reached the peak stage of Saint level which is very close to the kingdom level, plus she is strengthened by some mysterious power. She can have the strength of the kingdom level within the scope of the Holy Family Summit. Pope Vantis is the same. I’m afraid that his strength is even higher than Eudora, so this is definitely not possible. Now, I can only try it with the power of the Star Garden, pack the entire Snow Dallet Tree and take it away. Let’s see if Zola and Moore have a way.

But before that, the Light Elemental King Delkus must be finished off.

Chen Rui’s [Body of Light Glory] could absorb most of the light element damage which gave him a greater advantage against the Light Elemental King than against the other 5 kings. The problem was that even with the physique restraint, he was still unable to defeat Delkus, whose power and spirit had reached S++ in a short period of time. If this alarmed the 3 giant leaders under the mountain, it would be troublesome.

Moore once said that the 6 elementals have their own personalities.

Earth elementals had a calm personality – If others didn’t offend them, they would reciprocate;

Dark elementals were very vengeful and had a strong desire for revenge (Chen Rui already personally experienced this);

Water elementals were good at thinking, but suspicious by nature;

Wind elementals were everchanging and easy to change their minds;

Fire elementals were straightforward and hot-tempered, and they were the most combative;

The light elementals were characterized by arrogance and a strong sense of honor.

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he slowly walked a few steps. He spoke up, “I feel very strange, why did a proud Light Elemental King become a guard of the church?”

Delkus no doubt showed anger. He blinked and appeared in front of Chen Rui with a punch, “Who said I am a guard? I am just absorbing the power of the Snow Dallet’s light element to breed more elite light elementals!”

Breeding? Although the elementals had no gender characteristics, Delkus’ appearance was clearly a man. When he said this word, Chen Rui felt like he was electrocuted. He was almost hit by the punch and quickly backed away. Delkus was relentless. The attack was like a storm. Despite the [Body of Light Glory], the S++ strength was really difficult to cope with. Chen Rui didn’t forcefully take it. He focused on dodging and waited for an opportunity to counterattack. The battle gradually moved in the direction of the Snow Dallet Tree.

The power of enchantment in the 3 major temple areas was very strong, and the strength was far more than that of ordinary places. With the strength of both of them, only a few cracks were left on the ground under ordinary attacks. In a short time, they had exchanged a few moves at a very fast speed. If there were spectators around, they would definitely be dazzled.

“Elite light elementals? Wait a minute.” Chen Rui suddenly yelled, “Light origin fragment!”

Delkus’ action immediately stopped. Chen Rui took advantage of the distance and smiled, “If there is no light origin fragment, no matter how many the elite light elementals, there will be no qualitative change. Am I right, Your Highness Delkus?”

Delkus’ voice obviously sounded surprised, “How do you know this?”

Chen Rui turned his back to the Snow Dallet Tree, and his spirit power expanded, but he felt as if he was blocked in some way. He frowned, but his words didn’t stop, “3 conditions, I can give you a light origin fragment.”

“ Hmph! Don’t waste your time, the Snow Dallet Tree is surrounded by powerful magic circle protection. Even if it is attacked by several powerhouses of the Saint peak stage, they can’t break the defense,” Delkus’ surprise turned into a proud expression, “I don’t know where you hear about the term origin fragment, put away this little trick! You can’t fool me!”

Although the Light Elemental King was arrogant, it didn’t mean that he had no wisdom. He immediately saw Chen Rui’s attempt. Chen Rui was secretly cursing, but his smile remained the same, “It’s just a magic circle of 23 yuan ancient runes. It’s not difficult to dispel it as long as I spend some time on it. As for the light origin fragment… …Have Your Highness heard of the holy dragon called Rodriguez hundreds of thousands of years ago?”

Delkus was surprised when he heard Chen Rui uttered the exact level of the ancient runes, then he was shocked when he heard the name ‘Rodriguez’, “You know where he is?”

Chen Rui moved his finger quickly behind his back, trying to dispel the ancient runes’ magic circle around the Snow Dallet Tree. He asked back, “Does Your Highness still suspect that I’m fooling you?”

“Back then, when the church got the light origin fragment, it should belong to me according to the agreement. I didn’t expect it to be stolen by the holy dragon. His whereabouts are still unknown. As long as you tell the whereabouts of Rodriguez, I can abandon the agreement with the church and leave without stopping you from doing anything!”

“You have too few chips, Your Highness Delkus.” Chen Rui shook his head, “In fact, Rodriguez has been defeated by my friend, and the light origin fragment is also in his hand. I can bring it to you, but in addition to the conditions you just mentioned, I want 3 more things.”

For the light elementals, the light origin fragment was so important that Delkus did not bargain. He said without thinking, “Which 3?”

“The first 2 are the light source power and wind source power. I will tell you the third one when I get the first 2. Don’t worry, I will bring the light origin fragment to prove my sincerity.”

Zola had already obtained the water source power and earth source power, plus the fire source power of the Hall of Flame. There were 3 in total. Upon returning this time, he would go to the Dead Sea to rescue Hegel, so the dark source power was naturally not a problem. If he could get the light source power and the wind source power, then the 6 source power that the fairy dragon needed was complete.

As for the third condition mentioned by Chen Rui was the clue of the earth origin fragment. Earth Elemental King was 1 of the 3 Kings of Darkness. If he revealed this condition now, it would definitely arouse Delkus’ suspicion and hostility, so he deliberately did not mention it for now.

Delkus frowned, “The light source power is not a problem, but the wind source power… I’m not Wind Elemental King.”

Chen Rui said confidently, “As the 3 Kings of Light, it’s impossible that the Wind Elemental King does not know the role of the origin fragment in Elemental War. As long as you go to the Storm Island yourself, the wind source power is also not a problem.”

Delkus was shocked again, “You actually know Elemental War and 3 Kings of Light! Who are you?”

“Richard, an insignificant outsider…” Chen Rui actually didn’t know the real inside story of the Elemental War, he just heard a few words from the 3 Kings of Darkness when he was on the Deep Blue Island.

The more Chen Rui said this, the more Delkus felt that he was unfathomable. He pondered for a moment, and said, “I can, I won’t care about things here, but…”

A strange smile appeared on the shining face of the Light Elemental King, and his figure gradually blurred, “Don’t think I’m very foolish. You have been talking for a long time, but it is just empty talk. If you can pass this test now, I will truly believe you. “

“Test?” Chen Rui was stunned. Suddenly, his spirit sensed several people were already coming here. The speed was extremely fast, especially the first one, which reached an incredible level.

Chen Rui shook. The voice of the Light Elemental King sounded, “I forgot to tell you just now. Vantis has a special sense connection with the Snow Dallet Tree. Just when you tried to dispel the magic circle, it had already alarmed him.”

“Fuck!” Chen Rui couldn’t help but blurt out in foul language.

TL: These Elemental Kings are really easy to convince, but will Hegel let him take and give away the light origin fragment so easily? Also, how can he solve this predicament?

chapters.title: Chapter 676: Diversion Tactic?
chapters.body:
Chapter 676: Diversion Tactic?

Chen Rui’s plan was to work separately. The original body headed to the Snowy Summit Stage to get the Snow Dallet Flower, and the avatar Shura went the other way. It was not just to act with Eliza; The real goal was the top of the Holy Light Mountain.

The 2 started to work separately in the Holy Family Hall. Just when Chen Rui encountered the Light Elemental King, Shura, who had dealt with Eliza and Paul, had bypassed the 3 major temples and headed directly to the top of the Holy Light Mountain which was the forbidden area accessible only by the pope and 3 archbishops: Light Divinity Temple.

After bypassing the guards around the entrance, there was no hindrance along the way. It seemed to be inconsistent with the name of the so-called ‘forbidden area’, but the road seemed to be endless. After walking for a long time, he was still here at the mountain. The summit seemed to be not far away, but it still maintained the same distance as if it was far away.

Shura frowned, and his figure disappeared suddenly. A huge object broke through the ground, hitting his original position, and the hard stone steps suddenly shattered. This was a giant golden tentacle that was about 4 meters in diameter and 10 meters in length. After the missed attack, it stretched for a few meters and whipped straight toward Shura who appeared in the air. Shura avoided it again. One after another tentacles appeared on the ground as if the entire hill was a huge octopus.

“This is the ‘holy beast’?” Shura thought of what Miranda had said about the temple, and he smiled contemptuously, “Putting aside the power, it is inferior judging from its aesthetic.”

Countless tentacles entangled and Shura’s figure flashed rapidly. After some dazzling movements, those tentacles were entangled and actually tied a dead knot. The ground was constantly cracking and trembling because of the intense struggle, but it could not break away from the dead knot.

“It seems that this scene can often be seen in the cartoons in memory. This is a killing move against the tentacles…” Shura said to himself, and his tone suddenly rose, “Come out! The guy watching the show. The trick in this section of the road should be your work, right? As long as I kill you, I can go to the top of the mountain to see the scenery.”

“What a bold claim!” A man’s figure gradually faded out in the air. A silver-haired man wearing a golden robe with a deep outline of his face. “I haven’t met an ignorant intruder in a long time. I’ll annihilate you in this holy glory!”

A blazing flame whistled over. Shura’s eyes flashed with a red light, and he swung his arm to deflect the flame. It happened to fall and explode on the huge tentacles that were tangled together. Then, the huge tentacles turned into ashes.

Although Shura knocked the man’s flame away, he was pushed a few steps in the opposite direction. He felt his arm tingling. “ Hmph, there is a bit of brute force.”

“You have a bit of strength to be able to block the blow from me, Sir Radamanro. Don’t worry, I haven’t been active for tens of thousands of years. I won’t let you die too quickly.” When Radamaro said the last word, he already appeared in front of Shura. His arms turned into dozens of shadows which surrounded Shura.

Shura staggered left and right, barely defending, but he was still unable to resist. His body was torn into several pieces in the blink of an eye. Radamaro’s expression was full of disdain, “What a disappointing guy…”

Before he finished speaking, he saw a weird smile flashed past Shura’s torn face. Radamaro immediately came to a realization, “Illusion?”

Before Radamaro could react, a warning sign surged. He was blown away by a strong wind behind him. Almost at the same time as he flew out, a ghostly figure intercepted the unbalanced Radamaro in midair. “ Boom boom boom “. Deafening blows sounded. Radamaro was a little stunned by this round of attacks. His body that flew out was pulled back and thrown into the sky with a strong inertia. Shura’s figure instantly appeared at the highest point in the sky. He clasped his fist and smashed it down with massive power.

“ Boom! ” After the smoke dissipated, there was a hole on the ground like a fallen meteorite. Radamaro slowly stood up, gritted his teeth and looked at the enemy in the sky. At this time, the shining golden robe was already torn into strips. He was covered in dirt and had a haggard look.

What caught Shura’s attention was that there were no scars on Radamaro’s body under this continuous violent blow. This guy’s attack and defense capabilities are surprisingly high.

There were a few more exchanges in hit; The 2 sides had already attacked each other countless times at high speed. At this time, Radamaro did not dare to look down upon Shura. This enemy not only had the same strength as him, but he was also proficient in illusion. The mixture of reality and illusion almost cost him a severe setback.

Radamaro faked a punch, pulled the distance away, and suddenly the flames all over his body skyrocketed. The surrounding space seemed to be burned by flames with a strange distortion. The dark clouds in the sky exuded a territory power that could destroy the world.

At the moment, Shura’s breath seemed to be suppressed to the lowest point. The violent voice of Radamaro sounded, “[Stardust Rainstorm]!”

The dark clouds in the sky exploded. Countless lightning and shining huge raindrops poured down on Shura; he was unable to avoid it. In addition to the territory power of Radamaro, this blow also contained a special strengthening buff. If Chen Rui was here, he should be able to use the [Analytical Eyes] to judge that Radamaro’s strength had reached the S++ level!

Shura instinctively felt the huge threat of this blow. His eyes were flourished with red light. In the blink of an eye, he was completely enveloped by the power of [Stardust Rainstorm]. However, what surprised Radamaro happened. The trajectory of [Stardust Rainstorm] suddenly changed strangely. It seemed to be strongly attracted to something. Shura was like a big mouth; he was actually ‘devouring’ all the lightning and light rain.

Even more incredible was that Shura stretched his hands and shouted, “[Stardust Rainstorm]!”

Countless lightning and light rain gushed out toward Radamaro. Radamaro was dumbfounded. This was his killing move!

Illusion?

A strong sense of crisis told him that this was by no means an illusion!

The violent rain of stars sprinkled frantically on the mountain peak, and the entire mountain peak became devastated in the blink of an eye.

At the center of the attack, the body of Radamaro who was hit by his own killing move was covered with bloody holes, completely becoming a bloody man. The frightened and furious Radamaro let out a beastly groan. His body began to swell rapidly with huge bat wings sticking out from behind.

There were wounds in Shura’s body in many places. Although there was no blood flow out, the damage was obviously not light. In fact, Radamaro’s strength was not small. After activating the ‘retaliating with one’s own skill’, he suffered severe damage too.

“It turns out that you are the real ‘holy beast’… You should be called the holy dragon? To be precise, this is the second holy dragon I have ever seen.”

Shura said lightly as he quietly witnessed the changes in Radamaro. Stars appeared in his pupils, and his figure began to be hazy. Stacks of his figure seemed to appear.

“[Stardust Rainstorm] is just a light breeze and drizzle, I’ll let you see what a real star explosion is!”

In the Divinity Seal Hall of the Snowy Summit Stage.

Chen Rui’s fingers tightened and the light flourished in front of the Snow Dallet Tree. The Snow Dallet Flower’s ancient runes magic circle had been forcibly broken. Normally, it would take at least half a day to crack it, but now since his whereabouts were exposed, he used the fastest way to drag the ancient runes to collide with each other, and finally quickly canceled the protective magic circles.

Almost at the same time, a figure wearing a silver robe appeared in Chen Rui’s sight at an extremely fast speed. This was an old man in his sixties with white hair and beard. Judging from his clothing and crown, it should be the supreme master of the Holy Light Mountain, the glorious Pope Vantis.

Race: Human.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS-(S++).

Physique: S-(S), power: S+(S), spirit: SS-(S++), speed: S++(SS-).

[Analysis]: Light attribute. Degree of danger: Very dangerous.

The strength of Vantis was similar to that of Holy Lady Eudora. His real strength had not yet reached the kingdom level, but he could activate kingdom level power within the scope of this Divinity Seal Hall. If Chen Rui forcefully fought against him, Chen Rui was definitely not an opponent.

“It turned out to be His Holiness Vantis.” Chen Rui’s palm contained a destructive white light, and he aimed it at the Snow Dallet Tree, “Don’t act rashly, Your Holiness, maybe you have the ability to kill me in an instant… But I also have the ability to let these 3 sacred trees accompany my death in an instant.”

A cold light flashed in Vantis’s eyes as his figure slowly landed, “Who are you? Why did you break into the Holy Light Mountain?!”

Of course, Chen Rui couldn’t say that his purpose was the Snow Dallet Tree which was the current ‘hostage’. He just showed a relaxed look, “If I say, I’m here for sightseeing, do you believe me, Your Holiness?”

At this time, there were a few more figures in the air behind. They landed on the ground one after another. These included Holy Lady Eudora, Paladin Captain Parsali and 3 cardinals. There was also a middle-aged person who went hand-in-hand with Eudora. He should be 1 of the 3 giant leaders, the master of Star Hall, Archbishop Pusmeer. Except for the Chief Judge Seus who was eradicating the Black Death Follower outside, the highest level of the Holy Church was all here.

“It’s you!” Looking at Chen Rui who maintained the face of ‘Richard’, Eudora was in disbelief. It was obvious that it was the Holy Family Hall’s Holy Light Guardian Knight whom she personally appointed! Chen Rui once shined in the riding battle, so Parsali and others who recognized him also showed shock.

At this moment, Eudora was even more shocked when she felt that the power of the Blood Oath of Light contract was suddenly disconnected: To cancel the contract, he must have Demi-God-level strength. This ‘Richard’ is actually…

“Who is he?” Vantis frowned.

Eudora replied, “His name is Richard, his real name may be Simon. He disguised as the subordinate of Parsali’s apprentice, Paul, to participate in the selection of the Divinity Temple Knight. He also tricked me into conferring him as the Holy Family Hall’s guardian knight. I didn’t expect him to be a spy!”

“Simon? What is your purpose?”

“Have you ever heard of the term ‘Diversion Tactic’? If I say, I still have accomplices, and I’m here only to attract your attention…” Chen Rui’s hands were still preparing to destroy the Snow Dallet Tree as he said leisurely, “Then guess where our real destination?”

With that said, Chen Rui deliberately looked at the mountain top deep into the clouds. As soon as he said this, Vantis, Eudora, and Pusmeer all shook together. Vantis’ figure appeared in the distance instantly, and his furious voice sounded, “I’ll go to the Light Divinity Temple. You take care of it here!”

TL: Hmmm , the situation still isn’t good. The pope who could pluck the Snow Dallet Flower was gone, so how did he plan to get the flower? Pokeball the entire tree?

chapters.title: Chapter 677: The Top Of The Holy Light Mountain
chapters.body:
Chapter 677: The Top Of The Holy Light Mountain

Vantis disappeared in the blink of an eye, and 6 people remained: The 3 major cardinals’ combat powers were relatively weak, but each had their own means; Paladin Captain Parsali, known as Glorious Swordmaster, had been famous for many years with extremely rich combat experience and powerful combat power; Holy Lady Eudora and Archbishop Pusmeer’s strength had reached the S++ level. This was not their ‘home field’ of the Holy Blessing Hall and Star Hall, so they could only display their own original power, but neither of them was an opponent that could be easily solved.

What’s more, Vantis might return at any time, so he must hurry up.

Chen Rui smiled casually as he slowly walked a few steps toward the Snow Dallet Tree, “Everyone is the top powerhouse of the church. Since I have come here, I have prepared for the worst, but before I die there are 3 holy trees to be buried with; I’m not dead in vain.”

“Do you think this can threaten us?” Eudora’s gaze was exceptionally gloomy. Although her face could not be seen clearly, one could imagine the expression on her face at this moment. She always had a witty mind, but she was tricked easily by this ‘Richard’ who lurked beside her. She even conferred him as the Holy Light Guardian Knight in the Holy Blessing Hall which was a shame.

She had at least half of the responsibility that ‘Richard’ could sneak into and make trouble at the Snowy Summit Stage. Besides, there was 1 thing that Eudora worried about the most – The phoenix’s egg of the Hall of Flame!

“Her Holiness Holy Lady, if I were you, I wouldn’t stay here now.” Chen Rui’s simple sentence hit Eudora’s concern severely. In fact, the phoenix’s egg was now in his space ring, the fire source power was also in the storage warehouse, and the Hall of Flame only had an array of ancient runes to create illusions.

Eudora’s complexion changed. Her eyes flickered for a moment, and she finally calmed down, “Don’t think about playing any tricks! I will take you down by myself!”

Chen Rui didn’t expect Eudora to leave because of a word. He smiled coldly and ignored her.

At this time, Paladin Captain Parsali spoke, “Sir Richard, I’ll just call you that for now. As a powerhouse with at least the strength of peak stage Saint, don’t you think this kind of threat is too naive? I, Parsali. Stron, is willing to be your opponent to fight you upright.”

“You’re more naive than me, Sir Parsali. Even if I defeat you, can you guarantee me to leave here?” Chen Rui laughed, “I know you all want to kill me. These 3 trees are key material for the transformation ritual of the [Body of Light Blessing]. If it is completely cut off because of me, my life will be worth it.”

Chen Rui just learned the role of the Snow Dallet Tree from the Light Elemental King, and he immediately used it now. No doubt, everyone had a greater expression of fear. They dared not step forward.

Archbishop Pusmeer frowned, “Don’t be impulsive! As long as you don’t touch the Snow Dallet Tree, I can guarantee you will leave the Holy Light Mountain safely.”

Don’t touch the Snow Dallet? I came here for this!

“His Holiness Pusmeer, do you think I’m a child? As long as I leave this position, I’m afraid you will all attack together!” Chen Rui sneered as he threateningly stretched his hand closer toward the Snow Dallet Tree. A faint mist radiated without a trace, blending into the mist on the outside of the Snow Dallet Tree. It was the power of the Star Garden.

The Super System prompted, “Unknown faith creature, Star Garden cannot transplant”.

Faith creature? Unable to transplant? Chen Rui’s heart sank, but the prompt was not over yet, “It can be converted to the Star Conferring Platform. The conversion takes 20 minutes and consumes 100,000 faith crystals. Do you want to convert?”

It turns out that Star Conferring Platform even has such a function! Chen Rui was ecstatic. The number of faith crystals consumed is staggering, but even more is worth it!

This was thanks to the use of Shura’s power to steal a lot of faith power along the way. After transforming the faith power obtained by the Yang Shao Capital, coupled with the automatic generation in the Super System, the total number of faith crystals was close to 300,000, which was enough to cover this expensive conversion fee.

“Yes!” Chen Rui muttered silently in his heart. A star-like brilliance covered the Snow Dallet Tree like a translucent light cocoon.

System reminder: The conversion begins. The controller must not leave within 100 meters of the conversion. Otherwise, the conversion will fail. The current progress is 1%.

Everyone in the church thought he wanted to perish together with the trees, and they all shouted, “Stop!”

Chen Rui used conversion for the first time, and he didn’t know it caused such a huge commotion. He secretly lamented. Parsali, Pusmeer, and Eudora had already rushed up first. He immediately shouted, “Back off now! Otherwise, I’ll let the Snow Dallet Trees shatter now!”

Their movements undoubtedly paused. Parsali shouted angrily, “What did you do to the Snow Dallet Tree?

“It’s just a preventive measure because I have already thought of a way to get out that is- defeat all of you.” Chen Rui deliberately made up a reason to delay time.

Pusmeer’s eyes narrowed, “Are you sure you have this ability?”,

“I’m not sure if I have it, but I’m not sure if I don’t either.” Chen Rui’s smile showed great confidence, “I only have 1 condition, 1-on-1! Do you have the guts?”

Parsali’s eyes flickered, “Good spirit! 1-on-1 then!”

“Perhaps Sir Paladin Captain really wants to fight with me 1-on-1, but who can guarantee that the others will not join forces, so my precautions are necessary.”

Several balls appeared in Chen Rui’s hand and slowly floated around the Snow Dallet Tree. At the same time, his fingers began to draw a variety of mysterious symbols, “This is magic thunder that can be triggered by the mind. Once it explodes, even Saint powerhouses will inevitably be injured, let alone the Snow Dallet Tree that loses its protection magic circle. If you dare to sneak attack or fight in groups, I will set off these magic thunder and turn the Snow Dallet Tree into ashes.”

Eudora sneered coldly, “How do you guarantee that you won’t set off the magic thunder to perish together when you lose?”

Chen Rui was glad to talk more to delay time, “If you have the ability, you can knock me out or kill me before I can trigger it. Or let’s talk about other possible conditions?”

Pusmeer slightly pondered, “Okay, just a 1-on-1 battle. If you can really defeat the 6 of us 1 by 1, you can naturally leave here openly!”

Eudora glanced at Pusmeer, and she seemed to understand something. She didn’t say anymore.

Parsali took a few steps forward, holding a greatsword with both hands, “I will be your first opponent!”

“It’s a great honor to face the Glorious Swordmaster in the first battle.” Chen Rui shrugged and secretly calculated the progress of the conversion, “Before the battle, may all unrelated personnel retreat outside 100 meters.”

On a hill near the top of the Holy Light Mountain, “[Supernova Explosion]!” 3 overlapping voices sounded.

Immediately afterward, a strong ray of light rose from the top of the mountain. It was even more dazzling than the sun as if the star exploded. The whole part of the top of the mountain shook and turned into nothing. It was suddenly shorter.

The terrifying destructive light gradually dissipated, and a huge body fell from the air. When it fell to the ground, it actually fell apart like glass. The huge giant dragon head rolled to the feet of the figures that gradually merged into 1. The almost collapsed vertical pupil was still filled with horror and disbelief.

With a move of that foot, the giant dragon’s head was kicked out and torn apart in mid-air.

Shura’s disdainful voice sounded, “ Hmph! The holy dragon is known as the strongest dragon, but that’s all! Besides, you’re just a puffy guy strengthened by power that doesn’t belong to you.”

Although he killed the guard, Holy Dragon Radamaro, Shura’s body was already in badly damaged due to his injuries and power loss, but his red pupils seemed carefree. His body fluttered and swiftly appeared on the mountain road ahead. He continued to walk quickly toward the top of the mountain.

In the front, he didn’t feel anything, but when approaching the top of the Holy Light Mountain, he sensed danger. As the intangible pressure gradually increased, Shura could clearly sense it. This was the power of faith.

The difference from the past was that this faith power was no longer gentle. Instead, it contained strong aggression and destruction. It should have been drawn by some kind of foreign force and changed. It was just like the soft and gentle water in the ordinary days had suddenly changed to become the ice that could easily cut one’s throat.

The mountain wind blew on Shura’s face. With a ‘Swoosh’ sound, his face actually had a wound cut open by the wind.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh…

1 after another terrifying wound appeared on his body as if they were not wind, but countless sharp blades.

Not only the wind, but the trees, stones and even light… Everything in the environment had become a deadly weapon.

Shura’s eyes flashed with red light. His body suddenly twisted and turned into a black hole. The black hole moved forward slowly. All the offensive faith power that struck nearby was devoured.

These faith powers were all pure and condensed powers. The quality was even above the 3 temples. It was far superior to the Holy Light City or the Yang Shao Capital. The ‘stock’ that had been emptied was immediately replenished. However, the more forward, the stronger was the faith power. Even with the extremely powerful devour characteristics of the black hole, there was a faint tendency to be torn apart.

A red light vaguely appeared in the black hole with destructive breath. Shura had integrated illusion, devour, and destructive power into 1. He tried his best to activate the power of the black hole to progress step by step to the top of the Holy Light Mountain.

He could already vaguely see the hall on the top of the mountain shrouded in white light. A special breath suddenly appeared in the air. This special breath instinctively made Shura feel an unprecedented restraint. His destructive power was suppressed to the lowest point. He could no longer maintain the state of the black hole and was returned to the human form.

As soon as he regained his human form, his body slowly disintegrated and dispersed like ashes. It was just like the ice and snow approaching the sun. At the same time, Vantis’ raging shout sounded behind him.
