It focused on the food and beverage industry; the second was ‘Princess Clothing’ that included ready-to-wear series and exclusive boutique series for upper noble families; the third was ‘Princess Magic’ which sold magic television, demon-fighting chess and other products. When Chen Rui led Alice to establish the Princess Retail Store, he never thought it would be the scale it was today.

As the top designer of Princess Clothing and the general manager of the Dark Moon’s Princess Retail Store, Kia’s designs once again became the fashion vane of the upper noble families. Coupled with limited sales promotion methods, they were in short supply every time.

For the little succubus who had lost her mother (the father was equal to non-existent), apart from Chen Rui, she was closest with Athena. Of course, Zola and Alice were also rare friends. In order to help Athena, Kia resolutely resigned as the leader of the Princess Retail Store and assisted Lord Athena in managing the estate affairs. Athena was born in the Warlock Fortress, so she was proficient at military affairs, but she really had a headache for the complicated affairs of the estate.

However, for some reason the reporting leaders of several departments were blocked by the female guards today, saying that madam lord had important affairs, and the report time was changed to tomorrow.

The important affair for madam lord at this moment was to lie in the arms of a man in the palace, biting his neck.

It was not that the great demon mutated into a vampire, but because of… the secretary’s report.

“ En , this is the smell of Zola… It should be Olypheus, but it is very indistinct, there should be no close contact, and finally this… is Isabella! The smell is the strongest. Should have hung out for more than 2 hours.”

Hearing this, madam lord couldn’t help but bit the man again. I haven’t seen this guy for a few months, and he went to Isabella to hang out for more than 2 hours once he was back! No matter how careless a woman was, she would never be negligent in this regard. Furthermore, the Dark Moon’s lord and the third general of the empire, Athena, was just generous, not careless.

Chen Rui looked dumbfounded at the little succubus maid who was taking off his clothes while sniffing. When did she have the cerberus talent for smell?

What’s more terrible was that the little maid ‘checking’ was not just using her nose; she even used lips and tongue… Chen Rui couldn’t help but shudder. In terms of flirting methods, the succubus could be said to be the best in the 2 worlds. With just the stimulation from certain parts, the man’s strong sexual desire which was suppressed for several months was evoked. What’s more, the cunning little succubus just didn’t go straight to the subject. She was just teasing him.

“Is Isabella okay?” Athena asked suddenly, and the little succubus underneath also paused. Obviously, both of them were still quite concerned about this matter.

“It’s not a big problem. It only takes time and medicine to recover… Ouch !”

It turned out that after hearing the news, Madam Lord nodded, and then took 2 bites, “This is to punish you for making out with Isabella first. This is the punishment as you are about to become the son in law of the Dragon Emperor…”

“I’m wronged, Athena! I have no interest in Olypheus at all. I’m completely forced by the situation and I’m trying to think of excuses. As for Isabella, I came back just to cure her. Nothing really happened!”

Naturally, Chen Rui would not be so stupid as to say how he was intimate with Isabella in front of Athena and Kia. In fact, he and Madam Aunt really didn’t do anything, they just talked… Uh , plus kisses, hugs and touches. The most important thing was once they finished chatting, some obstructive chick woke up blurry.

However, Isabella also said that marriage with Olypheus was imperative because the power of Dragon Emperor Auglas was too strong. Even if Chen Rui, Zola and others join forces, they couldn’t compete with it.

The indoctrination of the black dragon power was actually a process of transforming the physique. It must be done voluntarily by the other party. A careless mistake would cause failure, and also serious damage to the caster, Auglas. Isabella’s current biggest reliance was threatening death. If she died, no one could control Olypheus’ spiritual imprint which was very likely to cause Olypheus to succumb step by step into true hopeless madness. Marrying Olypheus was actually Isabella’s proposal. Auglas was the Dragon Emperor and Demi-God powerhouse after all. If she kept threatening, he would run out of patience long-term. Giving him a glimmer of hope, on the contrary, could better stabilize the situation. No doubt, Auglas accepted this proposal, and did not take her and Zola away. Finally, they waited for Chen Rui’s return.

However, once Auglas found that Isabella had fully recovered, then Royal Highness Dragon Emperor might go back on his words and kidnap people. Not only Isabella and Olypheus, but Zola, Paglio, and Krobelus would all be captured. The spirit dragon that appeared back then might be used as an excuse to settle old accounts.

Isabella’s analysis made Chen Rui have to give up the idea of postponing because Isabella’s curse could no longer be delayed. What needs to be done now is to prepare supplementary herbs as soon as possible to get rid of the [Light Annihilation Seal] that has tormented Isabella for many years. The Snow Dallet is the nemesis of light element curse, and there is still time. There will be no more accidents in this regard. However, before that, it is necessary to determine the relationship with Olypheus and try to win the real favor of Auglas.

Just as he was thinking, Athena had stopped the punishment. She layed in his arms, bit her lip and said, “My strength can’t keep up with you. I can only look at you alone in battles. The only thing I can do is not to become a burden to you.”

“Athena.” Chen Rui caressed Athena’s somewhat reduced face lovingly, “You’re wrong. In fact, you have always been by my side. As long as you care about me, I will never be alone. Without you, it is impossible to be strong. From the beginning to the present, it has always been like this. If you dare to say the word burden, I will punish you.”

Athena felt warm as she reminiscenced the moments in Mountain Xilang back then, but the little maid who was listening attentively was jealous. She instantly took over the vampire bloodline of madam lord, and took 3 bites under someone’s ribs.

It’s really cerberus… Chen Rui added awkwardly, “And Kia, we have experienced so many things in order to be together. I cherish everything between us very much. You all are the most important people in my life.

The little maid, whose heart was in full bloom, no doubt loosened her teeth and licked the bite mark gently. She was full of temptation.

Chen Rui felt that small tongue slip all the way down, and he just cursed in his heart, “Seductive little succubus.” Suddenly, he took a deep breath; the little charming girl had swallowed the steel-like object into her mouth. The long lost warmth made him shudder in comfort.

The little charming girl sucked for a while, then she spat out again with seductive horny eyes. She said like an expert in the field, “Well, there is no Isabella smell here, and there is no Zola’s…. Athena, it seems that we are going to be the first!”

2 red clouds puffed on Athena’s face as her body heated up involuntarily. She gently stroked Chen Rui’s chest, only to hear the man sighed suddenly, “Kia, I’m afraid your plan will fall.”

There was a commotion in the conference hall, and a figure appeared; it was Zola.

Is this trigger teleportation runes? Chen Rui suddenly understood. It turned out that Zola had planted ancient runes on his clothes. As long as he took off his clothes, he would be positioned, triggering a short-distance transmission. He actually didn’t notice these runes beforehand. It seems that Ms. Fairy Dragon’s ancient runes have been used to perfection, but… it’s actually used in this aspect.

“ Hmph! ” Zola watched the movements of the little charming girl, and a gleam flashed behind the glasses.

(Fortunately, I was prepared. This man with no ethics almost let the little charming girl eat alone first!)

“Zola, the first person he saw when he came back was you. Now it’s our turn, don’t you think?” The little maid stood up and said plainly.

Zola was taken aback by this plausible remark. It seemed that there was some truth in saying that. Just as she was about to nod… (Wait a minute, it doesn’t seem to be right!)

Ms. Fairy Dragon immediately faked a daze, “What?”

“Old rules!” The little maid dismissed her fake daze. Although she usually had a very good relationship with Zola, she was not negligent in this aspect. There was a pair of cards in her hand, “Draw the card to determine the order.”

When Zola was about to draw a card, she heard a depressed groan from the bed. The little maid and Ms. Fairy Dragon unanimously turned their eyes to madam lord, who had begun to ‘secretly eat’, “Athena!”

In fact, Athena was innocent. The one who really secretly ate was the guy who had suppressed his desire for several months… He was aroused by the little charming girl just now.

In short, tonight was destined to be fierce battles on the bed.

TL: If Olypheus is the one who officially married him, the crystal harem will face a great disaster…

chapters.title: Chapter 710 - Enlightenment And Old Enemy
chapters.body:
Chapter 710 - Enlightenment And Old Enemy

The next day, the Dark Moon’s madam lord announced that she was unwell and declined to see guests again.

The so-called unwell was caused by a night of indulgence after reuniting for a long time. Now Athena was sleeping soundly in the bed, even the little maid with special physique and Ms. Fairy Dragon were no exception.

As the saying goes, there would only be exhausted cows and no over plowing farm. But what’s very unscientific was that Chen Rui was very energetic now, and he got up early in the morning. This was naturally the magical effect of the first passive attribute [Dual Training]. Perhaps due to illusion, even the Shackles of True Flame’s conversion process seemed to have accelerated a bit faster than usual.

Chen Rui did not disturb the dreams of his 3 beloved women. He got up quietly, put on clothes, and ordered the lamp spirits guards not to disturb them, then he opened the [Star Gate] and arrived at the Fallen Angel Capital.

Isabella’s matter had not been completely resolved due to Olypheus’s father, but her life was safe with the Snow Dallet Flower. Chen Rui was going to Teacher Tetenis’ place now.

Now Fonsaq (Skye) stepped up to become the president of the Fallen Angel Empire Mechanic Association now, attracting a large number of alchemists. After Aldas received the true inheritance of Tetenis and the black potions provided by Chen Rui, his pharmaceutics knowledge had improved by leaps and bounds. With the support of Shea, he had also become the president of the Potioneer Association.

Tetenis had been living in seclusion in a house in the Fallen Angel Capital. He would normally stay indoor to conduct research and experiments in the house. Fonsaq and his wife would often bring Alian and Eve to visit him. Aldas would come to visit him from time to time. Days were leisurely and free – If not for the approaching battle of life and death.

“You finally came back!” The old man was not as calm as Chen Rui’s wives. When he saw Chen Rui appear in front of him, he suddenly yelled with spittle flying. The content was nothing more than accusing someone of losing his wisdom over women, not doing a decent job, wasting alchemy talent and so on.

Chen Rui wanted to explain, but it was a pity that he couldn’t interject, so he had to let the old man scold him first.

The old man scolded him vexedly for a while. Seeing Chen Rui looking numb and indifferent, he threw a thin book in a huff, “All my mechanic knowledge is here. I also gave a pharmacy book to Aldas. You can ask him for reference if you need it. If you find it useless, find a solid mechanic master to pass it on.”

Chen Rui saw that this book should have been newly written, and it had accumulated his life’s hard work. Although the old man scolded fiercely, it was solely for the sake of the 2 apprentices. This action… was obviously making arrangements for his death.

Chen Rui accepted the book with a smile, then he took out a sword and put it on the table. This sword was very ordinary. According to the rank, it barely reached the excellent grade, but it had a strange spirituality.

The old man frowned and his gaze suddenly became serious. He carefully held up the sword. The more he looked at it, the more surprised he became. His hands actually trembled slightly, “You… forged this sword?”

“No.” Chen Rui shook his head, “I went to… Uh, the Dead Sea this time, and I ran into a reclusive mechanic grand master.”

A cold light flashed in Tetenis’s eyes, “What does this grand master look like? Is it a great demon with 1 eye blind?”

“No, it’s a dark elf. He gave me a lot of inspiration. This sword was his work.” This trip to the human world was too sensational, so Chen Rui didn’t say it very clearly, but he fully explained the mechanics experience gained from the 2 grand masters at the Jade Forest Sea.

Tetenis listened attentively and muttered to himself, “Mechanics is creating life’? Life…”

The old man seemed to be deeply engrossed and ignored Chen Rui. Referring to the sword, he began hammering on the forging platform set up in the yard.

The initial form of a sword was gradually taking shape. From Chen Rui’s eyes, this initial form could create a legendary grade weapon, but the old man threw it aside in annoyance, “No!”

“How could such a profound truth be expressed in such a clumsy way. How could it be possible!”

“Wrong again!”

“…”

The old man’s expression was alternating between joy and rage. After hammering for a while, he stopped to look at the sword and thought for a while, then he started to hammer again.

Chen Rui knew that this was the sign of breaking through the bottleneck. He had the same experience in the refinery of the Super System, and even almost fell into a state of madness, destroying everything. Tetenis was a quasi-grand master who had inherited knowledge for thousands of years, and his own accumulation was also very abundant. It was only 1 step away from the grand master. What was missing was just an epiphany.

As long as he really realized it, he could pierce this layer of window paper and enter a whole new realm.

In the blink of an eye, 3 days had passed. Tetenis couldn’t even sleep and just kept forging. When he was hungry and thirsty, he picked up what Chen Rui put on the table to eat. He didn’t say a word to others. He even held that sword when he occasionally took a break.

Chen Rui had been accompanying Tetenis. He also helped the old man to stop the visit from Lisa and Aldas.

On the afternoon of the third day, Tetenis suddenly threw the sword that had been precious to his life into the furnace. He closed his eyes, and let the sword from the grand master melt step by step into a liquid state.

After a while, Tetenis’ eyes suddenly opened. He solidified the iron, refined and hammered into shape… A series of processes were flowing like a stream and finished in one go.

Soon, a brand new sword appeared in front of his eyes. This sword was completely different from Bernd’s rugged style. It had a fine and delicate vibe, but they both faintly exuded a hint of spirituality.

Although the spirituality of this sword was obviously not as good as the one that was destroyed. It was still spirituality just like… the bud of life.

“Haha!” Tetenis’ usual stern face changed, and he laughed wildly. Although he lost a sword made by the grand master, he gained more.

“Congratulations, teacher! You finally really touched the edge of the grand master.” Chen Rui lamented in his mind. In contrast to me using the ‘creation’ law of the Super System to perceive the way of life in alchemy, Tetenis just broke his current framework and established a new understanding, really jumping out of his original framework that restricted himself and finding his own way. These are the so-called different routes leading to the same goal.

“Touched the edge?” Tetenis took a deep look at Chen Rui, “Honestly, are you…”

“Hehe, I’m far worse than teacher.” Chen Rui scratched his head and didn’t deny it. In fact, he spent hundreds of days in the Super System to understand it while Tetenis only took 3 days. Of course, Tetenis’s accumulation was not what Chen Rui could match at present.

Tetenis’ eyes shined with surprise; he was even happier than his own success. He didn’t have much time left. Even if he touched the edge of the grand master, he was still not the opponent of that strong enemy. Chen Rui can actually reach a realm similar to me at such an age. This savvy and talent can be called an infinite genius. With time, he can definitely become the most dazzling alchemy grand master in the history of the Demon Realm.

With such an inheritor, even if I’m defeated in this alchemy match, I can still die with a smile.

At this moment, Tetenis suddenly sensed something, and Chen Rui also glanced at the door. There was only a knock on the door. Before they could open the door, there were already 2 figures in the yard. The protective magic circle of the door seemed to be non-existent to these 2 people.

Both of them wore black cloaks which seemed very mysterious.

1 of the figures let out a weird laugh, “Tetenis, you are in a good mood.”

Race: Great demon (mutated).

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S.

Physique: S-, Strength: S, Spirit: S, Speed: S-.

[Analysis]: Fire attribute. Risk level: low.

Now the Demon Overlord-level strength was no longer a threat in Chen Rui’s eyes. What really caught his attention was another figure.

Race: Corpse necromancer.

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S+.

Physique: A-, Strength: A-, Spirit: S+, Speed: A-.

[Analysis]: Clone. Degree of danger: Fair.

The corpse necromancer of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord was not surprising. What made Chen Rui secretly startled was the ‘clone’ shown in [Analysis] – Chen Rui encountered Lich King Glorios in the Land of Hatred in the Dead Sea, and Glorios was a kingdom-level powerhouse. As his soul was restricted by the power of the holy dragon, he could only appear as a clone of the Demon Overlord level. As a result, the Dark Elemental King and Chen Rui teamed up to destroy his life box.

Now, another corpse necromancer of the peak stage of the Demon Overlord appeared in front of Chen Rui. Then, this clone’s original body is most likely a kingdom-level powerhouse! Thinking of this, Chen Rui’s gaze suddenly became serious.

“Saman!” Tetenis gritted his teeth while Chen Rui raised his brows: This man in the cloak is actually the old enemy that teacher will face, Alchemist Saman, who deceived and annihilated his master more than 9,000 years ago.

Saman lifted off the cloak on his head. He looked like a middle-aged man. His one eye was blind, and he had a few scars on his face and looked very hideous.

“Don’t you welcome me?” Saman’s voice was unpleasantly hoarse, “I came to visit you specially. Take care of yourself, your life is mine… By the way, you can have it for 3 months. “

Saman was the apprentice of the Demon Realm’s mechanics grand master, Rosenberg. In order to covet the Inheritance Crystal formed by Rosenberg and another potion grand master, he killed Dawor, the winner of the inheritance assessment, and severely injured his teacher, Rosenberg. Rosenberg launched a special contract in the Inheritance Crystal and divided the inherited imprint into halves which landed on Dawor and Saman respectively, so the 2 became the inheritors of the crystal at the same time.

Under the power of contract, Dawor was resurrected and could not be killed by Saman. Only by using the rule to win the opponent’s life could he completely get rid of the contract and obtain all the inheritance. If the opponent was killed by other means, not only could he not be able to obtain the complete inheritance, but there would also be a terrifying recoil. This kind of imprint was very wonderful and could be passed on from generation to generation using the method of inheritance within a 10,000 year contract period.

Not only that, Rosenberg did not hesitate to burn his life as the medium to perform the most powerful curse on Saman. The most important restriction in the curse was that Saman’s imprint could not be inherited. It meant that if Saman failed once, he would truly die. As a result, the 2 sides’ imprint battle would last for 10,000 years. However, Saman had some miraculous encounters, remained undefeated and lived to the present. Tetenis’ teacher was defeated and died in Saman’s hands. This competition with Tetenis would be the last time in the 10,000-year period.

After this time, Saman would completely get rid of the shackles of the contract and curse.

TL: Saman definitely has absolute strength, how can Tetenis get up to that level in just 3 months?

chapters.title: Chapter 711: Contest Agreement
chapters.body:
Chapter 711: Contest Agreement

Chapter 711: Contest Agreement

Facing the arrival of his old enemy, Saman, Tetenis’ eyes showed hatred, “Saman, you are not welcome here.”

“Don’t worry, little guy.” Saman laughed strangely. To him who had lived for tens of thousands of years, Tetenis was indeed only a ‘little guy’.

Saman looked at the situation in the yard. His eyes were fixed on the forged sword, and he was slightly surprised, “I didn’t expect you to have reached this level, at least as strong as your teacher, Lunce. So, it seems that the Death Game 3 months later will be more interesting than I imagined.”

Chen Rui heard from Tetenis that the contract of Inheritance Crystal was very magical. Saman and Tetenis couldn’t harm each other within the scope of the contract, nor could they be injured by external forces. Even if Tetenis could surpass the crystal rule and kill Saman, then he would also die, so he could only win through the rule.

“This young man is your apprentice?” Saman looked at Chen Rui for a while, and shook his head. “What a wonderful young vitality. It seems that your teacher is too stingy. He doesn’t even want to leave the true inheritance to his apprentice.”

“I also want to find a scapegoat who can be an inheritor.” Tetenis sneered, “It’s a pity that there is only 1 fighting muscle in this mind, which is not the right material at all.”

Chen Rui was silent for a while and did not say anything. He knew that the old man’s sarcastic irony was to protect him, even at the expense of himself.

Tetenis once asked Chen Rui when he was accepting an apprentice. Unsurprisingly, Chen Rui did not accept it. As time went on, Chen Rui had been regarded by Tetenis as the true successor. Even if Chen Rui wanted to accept it, he wouldn’t agree.

“Really? That’s really a shame… 10,000 years will be over soon. As a remembrance, and as a return to Rosenberg’s curse, I will separate your soul separately and place it in a magic container to torture slowly like a living hell.” Saman said sternly, “Don’t blame me. Blame you for being an inheritor of the Dawor bloodline. With the contract of soul imprint, it’s useless to run away. So, better enjoy your last 3months.”

Tetenis had already put life and death out of the picture. He showed a contemptuous sneer, “If you come here just to fart, then you are done. Get out!”

“Wait a minute, teacher.” Chen Rui said. This title made Tetenis and Saman’s facial expressions change at the same time. Tetenis was furious while Saman showed a hideous smile.

Chen Rui said unhurriedly, “Sir Saman, don’t you think 3 months later is inopportune? Next year… Uh, about 10 months later, the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire will jointly organize a potioneer contest. At that time, how about determining the outcome in front of all the spectators present? Once the 10,000-year time limit expires, the curse and other restrictions disappear. If you win, you can use this to become famous in the Demon Realm and become the strongest grand master. What do you think?”

“Interesting.” Saman stared at Chen Rui with a wary look, “I don’t know what tricks you have, but I won’t agree. I don’t want to wait even a day!”

At this moment, the silent corpse necromancer clone said, “No, you can agree, but the prerequisite is that you have to accept the imprint to replace Tetenis. The bet is naturally your life.”

Saman looked at the corpse necromancer in surprise, but the corpse necromancer ignored Saman. He just glared at Chen Rui with the flickering flames in his eyes. Saman frowned and nodded, “Yes, that’s the condition!”

“No!” Tetenis said furiously, “He is not the inheritor of the soul imprint. He is not qualified to participate!”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I think my teacher won’t be so stingy, right?”

Due to the special attribute of the soul imprint, if the inheritor was not specified, the half soul imprint of Dawor would automatically find the next successor. However, this was the last competition. The soul imprint would be completely integrated and would not be automatically inherited. In other words, as long as Chen Rui didn’t take the initiative to accept the inheritance, even if Tetenis died, he would be fine.

However, Chen Rui proposed to accept the inheritance at this time, which was no different from seeking death. The old man, Tetenis, was the most angry. He didn’t expect that this most important apprentice would propose to accept the inheritance at this most critical moment, and in the face of his great nemesis!

“It’s no use even if he wants to be stingy. As long as you are willing to pay a certain amount of life force as the price, and get my approval as the opponent.” Saman smiled hideously when he saw Tetenis’ rage, “Tetenis, you want to give him the imprint yourself or let me tell him that incantation?”

Tetenis shook as if he was electrocuted.

Saman lamented, “History is always surprisingly similar. Tetenis, Lunce didn’t designate you as the next inheritor in the past. In order to seek revenge, you also used this incantation to obtain the right of imprint inheritance. Now your apprentice is willing to die on behalf of you. What an enviable relationship between teacher and apprentice! Haha!“

Tetenis trembled and clenched his fists. Chen Rui just realized that there was such a secret, so he interjected, “This old guy is very stubborn, I think Sir Saman should tell me the incantation.”

“Hold on!” Tetenis seemed to be 100 years older in an instant, and his voice was full of depression, “I will pass on the soul imprint to you, but Saman, you must swear by the imprint first, the time of the battle will change to the potioneer contest next year!”

Saman glanced at the corpse necromancer clone next to him and nodded, “Okay!”

After Saman swore by the imprint, the inheritance of the soul imprint was very smooth. It was as if countless compressed memories had entered his mind. This information volume was so huge that even Chen Rui with great spirit power was dizzy for a long time before recovering.

Saman did not linger anymore after witnessing the success of the soul imprint inheritance. He laughed and left with the corpse necromancer clone.

Tetenis who had gotten rid of the soul imprint was equivalent to escaping from the death race. This had no effect on life, but the old man sat down on the chair dazedly as if he had lost his life.

Chen Rui’s mind shifted, and his figure quickly faded.

After leaving the house, Saman immediately asked the corpse necromancer clone, “Ukleus! Why did you agree to that kid’s request? The cost of extending the contract is too great. Each day extension will shorten our life by 1 month. 10 months is 300 years!”

“Hmph! What do you know! No pain no gain!” 2 gloomy flames glowed in the black cloak of the corpse necromancer, “I can sense the strong vitality breath on that young man. How can it be compared to the mere 300 years? If we can get his lifespan, then even Dragon Island…”

At this time, Saman seemed to sense something and glanced at the house behind. Although Ukleus didn’t notice anything, he immediately stopped the topic vigilantly and only said, “Let’s go. We will harvest during next year’s potioneer contest!”

The corpse necromancer clone used some method, and the 2 of them gradually faded in the blink of an eye.

Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of the house. Although there were only a few sentences in the conversation between the 2, some clues could be heard. It turned out that Ukleus’s purpose was for Chen Rui’s tens of thousands of years of life. There seems to be a special connection between this corpse necromancer and Saman. They also mentioned Dragon Island in the end.

It’s a pity that there is a special sensing power among soul imprints that even [Sneak] skills can’t block. That’s why I was almost caught by Saman just now.

Chen Rui thought for a while. When he returned to the yard, he saw the old man still sitting there dazedly.

Chen Rui grinned as he came to the old man, “Old man, I have something to do. I’ll go back first.”

“Bastard kid!” Tetenis suddenly jumped up and raised his hand to slap Chen Rui’s face. With his current strength, there was no way he could hit Chen Rui, but Chen Rui didn’t dodge. He just looked at the old man while smiling.

Tetenis’ hand trembled, but he did not hit Chen Rui in the end. He grasped his shoulders, “You fool! Your aptitude is better than mine, and you are younger. You even have the inheritance of the grand master. Sooner or later you will become the top grand master in the history of the Demon Realm. Why do such a stupid thing?! Why?!”

“No need ‘sooner or later’. Now is a good time. As long as I defeat Saman in the highly anticipated competition, won’t I become the promising grand master of the Demon Realm?” Chen Rui smiled indifferently, “Alchemy is similar to training. How can I unleash my talent without any experiences? Old man, don’t underestimate me. I have black potions, and I got half of the soul imprint, and I will soon become a mechanic grand master. A small character like Saman will only become my stepping stone.”

Tetenis sighed. The amount of knowledge contained in the soul imprint was extremely huge. Due to time and energy, Tetenis had only digested and understood a part of it over the years. How can he be promoted to grand master in such a short period of time? Even with black potions, Chen Rui’s knowledge is not as good as Tetenis, and the ability to ‘create’ black potions depends on the grand master’s ‘spiritual thought’. It is incomparable to Saman’s true understanding of black potions. Furthermore, the Death Game of the spiritual imprint is very random; once the grand master’s spirit fails to work during the competition, it will be too late to regret.

The old man was only half right. The Super System would not fail unless Chen Rui had an individual problem. However, mechanical skills were indeed his weakness. Chen Rui had just touched the level of the grand master; he would undoubtedly lose the match against Saman, who had already been a grand master for many years.

While the old man was thinking, Chen Rui had broken free from his strong clutch as he smiled, “There is a saying, called the back wave of Yangtze River pushes the front wave, and the front wave died on the beach (metaphor for young people replacing the old in every field)… Forget it, you won’t understand it anyway. Old man, you are so old now, why do you want to be in the limelight? Give this opportunity to become famous to young people. At your free time, you can drink a little wine, do some research, or go out with Lisa and Alian. Do you want me to get you a woman?”

With red eyes, the old man smashed everything he could pick up at Chen Rui, “Get lost!”

Seeing the apprentice’s squirming figure holding his head. Tetenis wanted to say something, but he hesitated. There were a lot of tears with mixed feelings.

chapters.title: Chapter 712: Forced Marriage
chapters.body:
Chapter 712: Forced Marriage

Chapter 712: Forced Marriage

At noon the next day, it was already lunch time when Chen Rui returned to the house.

As always, Olypheus was engaged in a fierce food battle with Paglio and Roman. Student Nephew and Master Poison Dragon were both very insensible people. Although Ms. Black Dragon’s Demi-God Dad watched closely from the side, they didn’t mean to give in at all. This was what Master Poison Dragon usually said “I still want to eat even if I have to die”.

Compared with these 3 foodies, Ms. Emerald Dragon Krobelus and Ms. Black Dragon Julia could be considered elegant. As for the truly elegant Delia, she couldn’t be compared at all.

The fierce clash of tableware, sharp gaze exchanges, and the loud chewing sound had become a song on the dining table.

The old Auglas was drinking wine on the ground and didn’t intend to favor his daughter. He could see that Olypheus was very happy and really liked being with these friends.

Of course, Sir Dragon Emperor was the type who would overprotect his family. The damn poison dragon and that Roman dared to grab Olypheus’ portion, this account would be kept until the time of ‘pointers’ training.

Olypheus successfully grabbed a dish of cabbage, then she suddenly thought of something, and handed it to Isabella, “Sister, you like to eat this one.”

A certain Demi-God father was a little jealous because Olypheus didn’t even spare the food in front of his father; Isabella was an exception.

“Thank you, I’ll just eat 1 piece.” Isabella forked a piece with a smile, and she looked at Ms. Black Dragon’s bulging mouth adoringly, “Eat slowly, Olypheus. If Chen Rui comes, I will ask him to cook barbecue for you to eat.”

Ms. Black Dragon nodded vigorously. All of a sudden, her eyes lit up as she pointed to the door and said vaguely, “Barbecue… is here.”

“Look who is that?” Roman jumped up, “Isn’t that leader? You only came back after 4-5 days? Sir leader, you have worked hard. Aren’t you afraid of kidney deficiency due to overwork?”

While he was speaking, the 3 dishes in front of him were snatched away. 2 dishes were taken by Olypheus and 1 was Paglio - Dragons were more practical indeed. They snatch and eat to their fullest before anything else.

Chen Rui sensed the weird gazes of everyone. He wished to slam a wine bottle at the sarcastic man. He bowed slightly to Auglas, smiled and nodded to Delia and Krobelus, and then went straight to Isabella, holding her hand in front of everyone, “Yini, our nephew seems to be a little impolite. We will have to discipline him later.”

Roman suddenly collapsed. In any case, Isabella was indeed his aunty, and this bastard was indeed Madam Aunt’s lover. In fact, the original cause of this incident was the secret he revealed.

“He does need to be disciplined.” Madam Aunt’s inhumane words which favored her lover made the nephew almost hide in the corner to draw circles, but she quickly and insinuatingly added, “But he was right, you have worked hard in the capital these 3 days.”

Chen Rui heard Madam Aunt’s obvious dissatisfaction and hurriedly protested against the accusation. In fact, he had been guarding Tetenis for the past 3 days, so he went to the palace last night and had a long conversation with Her Majesty Empress.

Naturally, it was Her Majesty Empress lying in his arms to talk that night, but the talk was really serious. Although it was true that he hoped to do so-called overwork, Her Majesty Empress made it clear that he shouldn’t think about it before the wedding.

The Fallen Angel Empire’s current economic momentum was very pleasing. In addition to the 2 focus estates, the Dark Moon and Green Shade, the remaining large and small estates were also developing rapidly under favorable policies. The families and lords’ deflated pockets due to war, fundraising scandal and other reasons, slowly began to bulge again. The life of the estate residents also began to improve. More importantly, they could see a bright future, so their loyalty naturally increased in proportion.

Magic television and newspapers had been popularized throughout the empire. The sales volume of magic television was astonishing. The income from television and newspaper advertisements had gradually emerged, attracting the attention of many businesses. The specific management, implementation and other matters were handled by the newly established media department. Patriarch Redotan of the Toro Family was the minister. The media brought more than just economic benefits. The estates could hear the voice from the capital for the first time, which played a good role in spreading news.

Under various comprehensive factors, the cohesion of the capital had increased day by day. Shea’s position as an empress had been unshakable.

Externally, the cooperation with the Dark Shadow Empire was very successful. 1 of the signs was the battle ball leagues jointly-held by the 2 empires which attracted the attention of all the Demon Realm fans including the Bloody Empire’s fans. Television would broadcast it live and rebroadcast at a fixed time, which also made a large number of the Bloody Empire merchants flood into the Fallen Angel Empire to order magic television.

The internal strife of the Bloody Empire was still going on, but after a few consecutive defeats, Second Prince Edmund had gradually weakened. He was just nestling at the Iron Fist Estate which was at the north of the Warlock Fortress. If nothing unexpected occurred, Great Prince Aleus would claim the final victory.

In the last visit, Catherine deliberately revealed her intention to unite with Shea to fight against the Bloody Empire which was in turmoil. Shea changed the topic. What the Fallen Angel Empire needed at present was not to expand its territory, but to recuperate. If they were anxious to expand, they might fail and even lose their foundation. Judging from the current situation of the Demon Realm, maintaining a stable situation was more beneficial to the Fallen Angel Empire.

“En?” Ms. Black Dragon twitched her nose. “Boss, what did you sprinkle? It smells so good! Barbecue doesn’t seem to have such a smell before.”

Auglas pondered for a moment and said, “It should be the seed of blue cumin grass. Blue cumin grass is a light element plant which is very rare in the Demon Realm.”

“It is the blue cumin grass indeed. Sir Dragon Emperor no doubt has vast knowledge.” Chen Rui handed the grilled skewers to Olypheus.

Olypheus took a bite and burst into tears, “It’s too too too tasty! Boss has the best skill. I like it the most! Boss, it’s great that you are back!”

Chen Rui smiled slightly, and he passed her a few more skewers. Ms. Black Dragon almost even ate the bamboo sticks. Auglas saw all these in his eyes, then he took a gulp of wine.

“It’s really nice to smell!” Someone who was attracted by the scent also said cheeky, “Sir Uncle really has the best skill. I like it the most. Sir Uncle, it’s great that you are back!”

Just after saying a sentence, his ears were pinched upward by the smiling Isabella. He screamed in pain, but there were a few more skewers of barbecued meat given by her aunty in his hand.

“Olypheus.” Auglas spoke up, “Do you want to let this guy barbecue for you for a lifetime?”

Ms. Black Dragon was engrossed in eating, and she nodded without having the time to speak.

“Do you want… him to cook anything you want to eat in the future?”

Ms. Black Dragon continued nodding.

“Do you want someone to pay the bill when you eat out in the future?”

Ms. Black Dragon nodded vigorously.

“Do you want to use all his money in the future?”

Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes turned into coin shape as she nodded desperately.

Auglas nodded conclusively and said to Chen Rui, “I told you Olypheus has no opinion on this marriage, right? Then, it is decided.”

Chen Rui: …

Everyone: …

“Um…Sir Auglas.” Chen Rui wiped the cold sweat from his forehead and said, “I would like to talk to you alone.”

“It just so happens that I also have a few words to tell you.” Auglas glanced at everyone, and the several dragons stood up sensibly. Roman also took Delia to work in the secret intelligence department. Only Olypheus did not realize anything and continued feasting.

Isabella walked over, wiped the girl’s greasy face, and dragged her back to the room.

“Sir Auglas, you can talk first.”

“Hmph, kid. I’ll leave Olypheus to you. You must make her happy every day. If you dare to let her be wronged or if you can’t replace Isabella as her most attached person in 70 years, then…”

Chen Rui shrugged, “Be annihilated?”

There was a cold light in Auglas’s eyes, “No, I won’t kill you. I will let you live well, but I will kill everyone else! Including your beloved women, your most trusted friends, and even every person you know!”

“No doubt this method is cruel.” Chen Rui narrowed his eyes and showed a strange smile, “However, it’s fine as long as I’m okay.”

“Don’t pretend anymore, my eyes are not blind.” Auglas said coldly, “If you are such a person, would Zola die for you? Would Isabella spare her life for you? Would I give Olypheus to you?”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment and nodded, “Since this is the case, let me say a few words to sir. I have always regarded Olypheus as my sister, and I have no extra thoughts. Sir also saw it, Olypheus is very happy here. We also regard her as a member of this big family. Even if there is no sir’s intimidation, I will always take care of her to prevent her from being bullied and wronged. It’s just that Olypheus doesn’t understand anything now. If she encounters a person that she really likes in the future, wouldn’t I be harming her? I very much hope that I can guard her as a brother. If we really have a relationship between man and woman in the future, then it will happen naturally. Otherwise, if we force Olypheus, she will never know real happiness.”

A cold light flashed in Auglas’s eyes, “You’re still rejecting now? The daughter of Auglas. Sierrasalomekre is not worthy of you?”

“It’s because I see Olypheus as my most important partner, so I have to be honest with her father, instead of succumbing to the pretense of strength and profit.” Chen Rui raised his head and looked directly at Auglas without fear, “From a sage’s point of view, my approach is simply foolish. Yes, as sir sees it, I’m such a fool.”

Auglas looked at Chen Rui for a moment, and he suddenly showed an approval expression, “No doubt my eyes are not blind.”

Chen Rui’s eyes lit up, “Sir means…”

“What you said is really good and reasonable.”

“So……”

“You and Olypheus are getting married now! Otherwise, I will take away all your women and friends!”

“…”

“Fuck!” Chen Rui couldn’t help but blurt out. He only felt that his eloquence had never failed so far. The delay strategy actually has the opposite effect?

chapters.title: Chapter 713: Engagement And Past Events
chapters.body:
Chapter 713: Engagement And Past Events

Chapter 713: Engagement and Past Events

Auglas looked at his prospective son-in-law who was staring at him, and he sighed, “Olypheus’ mother passed away early. She is actually a little girl who doesn’t understand anything. She has a simple personality and could hardly adapt to the world. If she didn’t fortunately run into you, it’s likely… I can’t see her anymore.”

This sentence made Chen Rui’s face blush. To be honest, Olypheus was basically tricked by him into being a bodyguard. That kind of low price would make ‘humans’ bristle with anger, let alone ‘dragons’.

“Isabella is a very smart woman. I have learned more than once. I can guess that she will definitely propose for you to marry Olypheus to settle me. This is a strategy that best suits the current situation and interests. But you don’t seem to follow her plan… I can take this as you are a guy who does not act according to common sense, or as you say, you are a fool.” Auglas suddenly showed a rare expression of appreciation, “You are also a real man. I admire you very much. Well, consider Olypheus your fiancée, I believe in your sense of responsibility. As for the future… I don’t care about it. You all can decide on your own!”

Chen Rui was a little surprised. Sir Dark Dragon Emperor used this attitude to speak to him for the first time. As for the fiancée…

Auglas took a few steps forward, looking far into the sky with far-reaching eyes, “The road to strength is like walking on thin ice, there is danger everywhere. Even if it is Demi-God, there is still the danger of annihilation at any time. Condensing Godhood is like gambling on life for a Demi-God. If you win, you can touch the threshold of becoming a god. Once you fail, your strength will be greatly damaged, and the worst will be annihilated. I encountered a powerful enemy many years ago, and my soul has not been healed yet. This situation is very dangerous for breaking through the bottleneck, but Olypheus’s situation is actually very unstable. Isabella’s soothing cannot really cure it, and there is not much time left for me, so I want to take the risk.”

Chen Rui was secretly surprised. It turns out that Auglas still has such a hidden danger. He said hurriedly, “Sir, actually…”

“I know what you want to persuade me.” Auglas interrupted him, “But you don’t understand the feelings of a father. Olypheus is my only bloodline. If I can’t even keep her, what use is it for me to become a god?”

Chen Rui was shocked and finally moved. For the first time, he had a real respect for Auglas.

“In case I’m annihilated by this, do your best to take care of Olypheus for the rest of your life. Will you promise me?” Auglas had completely put down his tough Demi-God demeanor and pleaded as a father.

The immature figure yelling ‘daddy’ appeared in Chen Rui’s mind. His eyes were a little flushed as he blurted out, “Okay!”

Auglas nodded in relief, patted his shoulder, and turned around, but there was a triumphant smile on his face: Hmph! No doubt is a fool. I just did a little bit of tricks, and he fell into it so easily.

Chen Rui agreed on an impulse, then he felt something wrong in his mind. Before thinking about it, Auglas had already handed over a space ring, “This is for you, the [6 Elements Territory Kingdom] that Zola wants to train is the most powerful kingdom. Every time she successfully comprehends the power of an element, the power increases exponentially, and so does the danger. I know that you are collecting the element source power, but only the Elemental Kings own the element source power. It is extremely difficult for ordinary people to obtain 1; not to mention collecting all 6 elements. This ring contains the element of the kingdom-level Dragon Power Essence which can consolidate her kingdom power and further reduce the risk of training on the basis of having the element source power.”

If it was an ordinary treasure, it was still fine, but this was related to Zola’s training and even life safety, so Chen Rui quickly accepted it. Auglas was even more smug- I just need to use gentle means to deal with this kind of guy. As the saying goes, you will always lose if you are greedy.

Chen Rui remembered that the Dragon Power Essence was also required for the giant crystal beast in the ancient alchemy civilization stronghold, so he asked, “Sir, I still need some Dragon Power Essences, I wonder if…”

“Is it to experiment with the undead giant dragon? That’s blasphemy to the body of a giant dragon!” Auglas frowned, “For the sake of Olypheus, I won’t pursue the undead giant dragon previously, but I don’t allow a second one! Understand?”

Chen Rui shook his head, “I assure sir that it is definitely not used for the undead experiment… This involves a secret of mine. In fact, I’m the inheritor of the ancient alchemy civilization and I need the Dragon Power Essence to repair the stronghold remains. If the sir is willing to provide it to me, I can exchange equivalent rare treasures such as devil fruit, Fountain of Vitality… or even black potions.”

These exchange treasures surprised Auglas, “It turns out that you are actually the inheritor of the ancient alchemy civilization. No wonder you have such strength and talent. If you promise that it is not used for the undead experiment, an equivalent exchange is still possible, but it’s just that I don’t have any more Dragon Power Essences. I need to go back to Dragon Island to discuss with a few elders.”

“Okay.” Chen Rui’s eyes lit up. I didn’t expect that the most difficult problem of the ancient alchemy civilization is solved. The alchemy stronghold, the ‘City of Stars’ should be completely repaired already. As long as I go to the Dead Sea to get the blue star heavy water and phantom coral, giant crystal beasts and assemble puppets can be produced. These are powerful combat power.

“You and Olypheus… perform an engagement ceremony.” Auglas rolled his eyes, and he finally returned to the subject, “I can also let go of my concerns and return to Dragon Island to reach the realm closest to God with all my strength.”

By now, the other party had made a considerable concession, so Chen Rui could no longer refuse, “Sir Auglas, just do as you want, but I have a request, can you accompany me to the Dead Sea?”

“The Dead Sea?”

Chen Rui briefly talked about the Dead Sea. When he mentioned the Land of Hatred, Auglas’ eyes were shining, “Dark Dragon Emperor? Rodriguez?”

Chen Rui saw the reaction of Auglas, “Sir knows Rodriguez?”

Auglas showed an expression of hatred, “The strong enemy I encountered back then was Rodriguez! Rodriguez was the strongest holy dragon in the human world. He came to the Demon Realm for some reason, killed several black dragons and took them away. At that time, the Dragon Emperor was my father, Crusier. I was just the first inheritor of the Dragon Emperor. When I was investigating this incident, I met Rodriguez. His strength was far greater than mine. My soul was severely injured by him. Fortunately, my father arrived in time and fought Rodriguez for 3 days and 3 nights. Finally, he used [Dragon God Eyes] to destroy his body and kingdom, but his soul escaped. My father also suffered serious injuries, but when my father and I returned to Dragon Island, we encountered another huge change!”

Although Crusier killed Rodriguez, he was seriously injured and he planned to pass the throne to Auglas. However, the second inheritor, Auglas’ younger brother, Ukleus, had a grudge against it and actually killed his father and put the blame on Auglas. After being persecuted and hunted down, Auglas desperately protected his pregnant wife, Liana, to escape, then he was imprisoned by Ukleus. Auglas did his best to use the [Dragon God Eyes] handed down by his father to escape and hide in a secret place. He finally returned to Dragon Island to regain the throne after defeating Ukleus with his great power. Unfortunately, he could never find his lost wife, Liana, and his child.

Chen Rui suddenly realized that Rodriguez once mentioned that he came to the Demon Realm after being severely injured by Raphael. He encountered a powerful enemy and his body and kingdom were destroyed. It turns out that it was actually the father of Auglas!

The father, son and brothers killed each other for the throne, this is actually a very old plot, but this kind of matter has been common since ancient times, even for dragons.

Ukleus? This name sounds familiar. Chen Rui was startled, but his attention was quickly drawn to another question, “Sir Auglas, the Rodriguez matter should have been tens of thousands of years… Uh, even longer. Then I want to ask… how old is Olypheus?”

“Hmph! Don’t you know that the period from dragons’ pregnancy to hatching can range from a few years to thousands of years?” Auglas gave him a stern glance, “Olypheus is the age of a little girl now; much younger than Zola!”

Chen Rui was dumbfounded for a while. He cleverly did not ask any further questions on this issue, “So, Sir Auglas, when shall we leave for the Dead Sea?”

“Rodriguez is my enemy. I will definitely not let him go. Moreover, he has lost his kingdom and body now. Even if he recovers a part of his strength, he is not my opponent.” Auglas glanced at Chen Rui as he sneered, “Don’t change the topic! Let’s talk about getting engaged to Olypheus first!”

This old man is not easy to deal with. Chen Rui smiled bitterly. Now, he had no more choices. Moreover, once Olypheus’ matter was done, Isabella could use the Snow Dallet Flower to treat the curse with peace of mind.

Engaging with Olypheus was actually very simple. It was just to give Olypheus a ring in front of everyone. For Ms. Black Dragon, free items were naturally most welcome, so she was on cloud nine.

When Olypheus asked seriously, “Can engagement be eaten?” Chen Rui suddenly felt a sense of crime to deceive a naive girl.

However, when Sir Dark Dragon Emperor solemnly told his daughter “You can”, Chen Rui suddenly felt that he was being deceived.

What made Chen Rui feel stressed was the look in the eyes of Athena, Zola, and Kia. It seemed that… he didn’t hold any engagement ceremony with them; it seemed that… women like to compare the most.

In contrast, Isabella seemed more empathetic as she had been helping him. However, after the ceremony was over and they had a short time alone, Madam Aunt immediately showed her true colors to him.

“After returning from this Dead Sea trip, I must be the first woman you touch. Otherwise I will marry Auglas and ask you to call me ‘mother’ like Olypheus!”

Too poisonous! She really is Devil’s Snare! Chen Rui burst into tears immediately.

chapters.title: Chapter 714: Return To The Dead Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 714: Return To The Dead Sea

Chapter 714: Return to the Dead Sea

The engagement with Olypheus was just a ritual. Apart from a symbolic kiss, there were no more intimate actions nor follow-up of sex. Although Ms. Black Dragon showed a rare blush during the kiss, her attention quickly shifted to the precious gem inlaid with the ring.

Auglas did not break his promise. He went to the Dead Sea with Chen Rui the next day. Auglas thought that it was too slow and turned into a huge black dragon. He grabbed his son-in-law in his claws. After some whistling sounds, they were already out of the range of Dark Moon Estate.

Even the Demi-God giant dragon didn’t use the ‘supernatural powers of shifting’, the ability to fly alone was quite terrifying. The speed was close to [Space Compression]. If it was an ordinary person, his body would be crushed by the wind.

Thus, it didn’t take long for the 2 to reach the edge of the Dead Sea which was at the south of the Blue Lava Estate.

The Dead Sea was boundless. Auglas did not put up a tough pretense this time and got on the Devil’s Snare Ship.

It was not Chen Rui’s first visit to the Dead Sea. Those sandmen were also experienced sailors, so they traveled to the sea area of ??the water elementals with ease.

On the way, there were singing voices in the distance.

“Siren?” Auglas had hundreds of thousands of years of experience, so he immediately identified the source of the singing.

Chen Rui nodded. When he and Moore entered this sea area, they were attacked by the harpies and sirens. As a result, Moore showed great power as he killed a large number of the assaulting harpies and subdued the siren tribe.

The sensing power of Auglas was far better than Chen Rui’s, so he heard more things, “This song… they seem to be fighting.”

Chen Rui subconsciously frowned when he thought of the sirens and harpies uniting to murder the passengers on the ships, and he ordered the sandmen to move closer to the singing.

The sight that he saw was a bit unexpected. The enemy who fought with the sirens were not the passing travelers, but a kind of sea demonic beasts with blue scales and 2 fangs sticking out of their mouths, looking very ferocious.

The combat power of these demonic beasts was amazing. The sirens’ singing didn’t seem to have much impact on them. Under the fierce attack of the demonic beasts, the siren’s casualties were increasing.

“Blue ice fanged beast!” Chen Rui had some impressions of this kind of demonic beasts. The Earth Elemental King had hunted down several of these demonic beasts.

In Auglas’ eyes, this kind of ‘intense’ fighting was no different from ants’ fight. Sir Dragon Emperor’s gaze was fixed on a particular siren with interest, “The singing of that little siren is a bit interesting.”

Chen Rui saw that it was the Siren Princess Helen. This was a stubborn chick with the strongest talent. Her singing voice could shake the soul. Compared with the stunning appearance, he was even more impressed by the sentence ‘If you can help the siren completely solve the problems of nagas and phantom coral problems, I’m yours.’

“I know these sirens. I’ll go help them.” At Chen Rui’s current level, Helen’s singing could no longer shake the defense of his soul.

“Siren has a strong temperament, and the singing of that siren should be helpful to Olypheus. I was still thinking about how to grab one and let her sing to Olypheus obediently.” Auglas looked at Chen Rui, “Go ahead, Let me take a look at your strongest power. If you can solve it in 3 seconds… Um, 3 minutes, I will directly agree to the Dragon Power Essence request. At worst, I’ll go back and beat up those old guys who oppose it.”

As soon as he finished talking, Chen Rui’s figure had disappeared and appeared on the battlefield in the blink of an eye. Some sirens had noticed the Devil’s Snare Ship before, but they had no time to be distracted.

Chen Rui used the face that the sirens had seen before, and he smoothly came to Siren Queen Elena to ask, “Elena, what’s the matter?”

“It’s Sir Aguile! Some abnormality has happened in the sea area recently. We have been frequently attacked by blue ice fanged beasts, and our people have suffered heavy casualties. Is the Royal Highness Earth Elemental King with you? Please help the siren tribe!”

Abnormality? Chen Rui frowned as he looked at the battle and said, “Queen, immediately order all the sirens to retreat. I will deal with them.”

“You?” Elena was startled. In her impression, this ‘Aguile’ was just taking advantage of the power of the Earth Elemental King. Although he has a certain strength, he cannot be compared to the Elemental King with the strongest peak stage of the Demon Overlord. He actually wants to deal with thousands of blue ice fanged beasts alone!

Auglas’ voice sounded in Chen Rui’s ears, “There are still two 2 minutes and 11 seconds.”

Sir Dragon Emperor even counted the time on the way. Chen Rui suddenly exuded a strong aura and shouted to Elena, “Quick!”

The deterring breath surprised Elena. She sang a strange tone, and the sirens began to retreat quickly.

The retreating Helen also recognized Chen Rui who flew forward. She looked at the figure facing thousands of demonic beasts alone in surprise.

The nearby sirens and blue ice fanged beasts felt an extremely horrifying breath at the same time. This kind of breath exuded extremely strong destruction, fierceness, mania… Their senses seemed to be flooded by this horrible breath. As the sea began to stir, strange whirlpools appeared out of thin air.

Such a terrifying power in just gaining momentum!

On the Devil’s Snare Ship, Auglas raised his brows, “Interesting.”

Despite sensing the intense danger, the blue ice fanged beasts were ferocious and aggressive by nature, plus they had an advantage in numbers, so they were still swarming at Chen Rui.

Facing the approaching blue ice fanged beast, Chen Rui’s pupils suddenly burned with flame-like light.

“[Scorching Dragon Roar]!”

In an instant, everyone saw only crimson color, then, countless long serpentine huge beasts covered in flames flew forward, winding, twisting, and criss-crossing centered on that figure. The entire sea area became a death prison shrouded by huge beasts.

The sea was boiling frantically, and the blue ice fanged beast screamed in horror. Everywhere the red light passed by, it was rampantly harvesting life like the scythe of Death God.

It took a long time for the sea to return to calmness. The surface of the sea was full of floating blue ice fanged beast corpses, and more of them were turned into ashes under the raging Scorching Dragon. There were less than 400 beasts left; many of them managed to escape because of the distance.

Even if the blue ice fanged beasts were so cruel, their fighting spirit also plummeted. The seriously injured one in the distance seemed to be the leader of the blue ice fanged beasts.

“You have exceeded the time.” Auglas’ figure instantly appeared beside Chen Rui.

“After the move is issued, it cannot be timed. The actual time used is only 1 minute and 32 seconds. I counted it.”

“Ha!” Auglas didn’t further argue, “Your move is quite flashy. Even opponents of the same level will find it difficult to resist. The disadvantage is that the power is too scattered and can only be attacked in an area. If you can gather those ‘demonic beasts’ at 1 point, even if there is no qualitative improvement, the power can be increased several times. It may even injure a junior kingdom powerhouse.”

Auglas’ knowledge was extraordinary. This suggestion pinpointed the [Scorching Dragon Roar]’s key weakness, but theory and practice were 2 different things. For his current strength, the power of the Scorching Dragon was too great to control, let alone so many of them. It was quite difficult to reach the level Auglas said.

The gazes of the siren at the back toward Chen Rui were full of awe after witnessing Chen Rui’s finishing off the blue ice fanged beasts, especially Queen Elena. Now she had truly seen the real strength of this man. Even the Elemental King may not have such terrifying combat power!

“Sir Aguile, thank you for your help. Please forgive my impoliteness before the rescue.” Elena turned into a human body and stepped on the wave surface to give a respectful bow. The sirens behind bowed their heads in the water; it was a majestic view.

“You’re welcome, Queen.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “The things I promised you haven’t been done yet. Did the Fountain of Vitality last time have any effect?”

The Dead Sea had undergone some kind of abnormal changes. Many sea races had been eroded by a strange force, and their reproduction rate had been greatly reduced. They had to rely on phantom corals to resolve this erosion. Otherwise, there was a danger of extinction. Therefore, the sirens and the harpies formed an association to fight against the naga tribe for the phantom corals to survive.

When Moore subdued the siren tribe last time, Chen Rui promised to help the sirens to solve the phantom coral problem, and he also provided the Fountain of Vitality. Later, he entered the Black Sea and couldn’t have the chance to ask about the situation.

“The function of the Fountain of Vitality is very magical, but it can’t replace the function of phantom coral” Elena hesitated a little, “However, the Fountain of Vitality has also caused some changes in the sirens where our strength has increased. Otherwise, we can’t compete with the blue ice fanged beasts.”

“What is it about the blue ice fanged beasts and the abnormality you mentioned earlier?”

“I don’t know the specific reason. Although the blue ice fanged beasts are powerful, their wisdom is not very high. We never had any conflict with them. I don’t know why they suddenly attacked us. Not only the blue ice fanged beasts, many races in the sea area nearby are killing each other.”

Auglas suddenly intervened, “I’m afraid it’s not a simple matter. Let’s go to our destination immediately. However, this little girl should go with us.”

Auglas was referring to Helen. Elena’s facial expression changed slightly. Helen slowly swam over and said to Chen Rui blankly, “I will go with you all but you must fulfill your previous promise of helping the sirens to solve the problem of the phantom coral and nagas. Otherwise, you will only get a corpse.”

The siren princess knew very well that with the strength of the siren tribe, there was no way to stop the other party from using brute force, so she simply agreed.

The problem of the Black Sea God had been solved. The nagas did not need to sacrifice the tribe with sea sacrifices anymore. In addition to the relationship with Strena and Adeline, even without the use of force, Chen Rui was confident to persuade Queen Naga Modesty to share the phantom corals with the sirens.

“I promise you.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “I have no interest in your corpse, but I’m interested in the corpse of the blue ice fanged beasts. Their bodies, eyeballs, teeth and blood are all valuable things. “

With that said, Chen Rui’s figure appeared on the sea as he began to collect the body of the blue ice fanged beasts.

“Greedy guy.” The little mermaid princess whispered.

Sir Dragon Emperor approvingly looked at the figure and nodded, “Yes, he has the virtue of dragons.”

chapters.title: Chapter 715: Abnormality
chapters.body:
Chapter 715: Abnormality

Chapter 715: Abnormality

The Devil’s Snare Ship sailed all the way along with Siren Princess Helen to the deep blue sea area of ??the water elementals.

Helen never showed a pleasant facial expression to this guy who forcibly took her away. In fact, the criminal who kidnapped the civil girl this time should be the father-in-law of ‘that guy’. According to Auglas, even Chen Rui’s current state could benefit from the singing of the little mermaid princess, but the prerequisite was that she was willing to sing to him wholeheartedly.

If he used puppetry or something, she would lose the strength of the soul. It could only be out of her own will. Unfortunately, judging from the current attitude of Helen to Chen Rui, this possibility was basically zero. The strength of the sirens was not very good, but their temperament was a hot one, even Auglas had no good way about it.

Water elementals were no strangers to the Devil’s Snare Ship, so Chen Rui smoothly boarded the Deep Blue Island.

Water Elemental King Lambost received the report and greeted them with Earth Elemental King Moore.

The 2 Elemental Kings’ knowledge of Chen Rui’s itinerary still remained as of a few months ago when he went to the Dead Sea with Hegel. The 2 initially wanted to know the situation of the search for the dark origin fragment, but their eyes turned to Auglas behind Chen Rui before they asked anything.

Lambost and Moore looked at each other in surprise. They performed an ancient etiquette and said in unison, “It’s an honor to see the inheritor of the [Dragon God Eyes], the emperor of the Dragon Island.”

“You can recognize the breath of the [Dragon God Eyes] at a glance.” Auglas solemnly saluted back, “It is indeed the avatars of Elemental Kings. If I have the opportunity to enter the elemental world, I will visit the 2 noble kings.”

Avatar? Elemental world? The ‘noble’ kings? Chen Rui thought of what Moore had said before, and he seemed to have realized something. He smiled bitterly, “Can you guys not be so knowledgeable? How come I don’t understand?”

The old man gave his son-in-law a disdainful look of being ‘uneducated’, and he didn’t bother to reply.

Moore came to Chen Rui’s side and smiled, “My friend, please forgive me as there are some things I didn’t tell you. You will understand later. By the way, I’m surprised by your strength and advancement. It seems that the Black Sea’s harvest is quite bountiful this time, but… where is Hegel?”

Lambost also noticed the change in Chen Rui’s strength. He spoke up, “Let’s go into the palace and talk. Not to mention this cunning Sir Aguile, if we let the Royal Highness Dark Dragon Emperor stand outside, it would be my rudeness.”

Auglas was slightly surprised. He could see that the friendship between Earth Elemental King and Chen Rui was quite deep as Isabella once said. It was evident from the words and attitude, but he wondered why even the Water Elemental King was casual as a friend toward Chen Rui.

Sir Dark Dragon Emperor would not be so surprised if he knew that the Crown of Wave on the Water Elemental King was a gift from the human.

Lambost knew that the water source power that Chen Rui asked for was nothing at all compared with the water origin fragment. Speaking of which, he still owed Chen Rui a favor.

After entering the Deep Blue Palace, Chen Rui recounted his and Hegel’s general experience of going to the Black Sea. Of course, he couldn’t tell the part where he was transmitted to the human world due to the living space seed in his body being triggered. He only said that he used the space secret technique to escape. As a result, he was in a coma for a long time before waking up. This time, he invited Auglas along just to deal with Rodriguez.

“A Pseudo-God holy dragon soul!” The Water Elemental King and the Earth Elemental King showed surprised gazes at the same time. They did not expect such an existence in the Black Sea area.

“In this way, there should be a reasonable explanation for the recent changes in the Dead Sea.” Lambost nodded suddenly.

As Queen Siren said, the Dead Sea had undergone some changes. The battles between races had become more frequent, and most of them were tribes that had no conflicts. These groups who took the initiative to attack were generally of low intelligence. Their temperament suddenly became very violent, and they usually fought to the death. The increasing scope of race fighting had gradually evolved into war, and even the strongest water elementals in this area had been attacked.

“Now it’s just the creatures with lower intelligence, but with the enhancement of this strength, more and more sea creatures will be affected, so the scale of the massacre will become larger and larger.” Lambost’s tone appeared very solemn, “These days, Moore and I can faintly sense that the battle and disappearance of these lives seems to be attracted by some special and powerful strength, just like…”

“Sacrifice?” Auglas interjected, revealing a rare solemn expression, “According to Chen… Aguile, the soul of the holy dragon Rodriguez should have fallen into a deep sleep, and this mutation is likely to be related to the recovery of his kingdom power. When my father, Cruiser, defeated him, he was already in the realm of Pseudo-God. A Pseudo-God kingdom… The power is extremely terrifying. If he completely awakened, even if he was only left with half of the strength, it is not what we can match. At that time, it will bring a destructive disaster to the Dead Sea and even the entire Demon Realm. Therefore, it is necessary to completely eliminate his soul while his strength has not recovered.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. When I fought against Rodriguez back then, I used Shura to make him fall asleep, but I did not sense such a terrifying strength. Now the incomplete kingdom power can influence such a far range. Then, what kind of power will the kingdom of Pseudo-God be like in its peak?

Pseudo-God is already like this, then what about the real god?

Auglas’ words made Lambost nod. Unless he migrated with the water elementals, or else once the holy dragon really recovered, this dark blue sea area would definitely not be spared.

“Yes, we must hurry up and head to the Black Sea. With my sensing ability for water elementals, I should be able to find the Land of Hatred hidden in the deep sea.”

“Then, let’s go together.” Moore also spoke as he smiled at Chen Rui.

Soon, there were 2 more guests on the Devil’s Snare Ship which were the 2 Elemental Kings. Lambost did not bring the elite water elementals. Because of the abnormality, the deep blue sea area needed a defense force. Furthermore, in this trip to the Land of Hatred, ordinary powerhouses simply couldn’t get involved.

The little mermaid Princess Helen looked at Lambost and Moore who had just boarded the ship. The Earth Elemental King is still fine, but as the supreme powerhouse in the sea area, the Water Elemental King Lambost actually talked with Aguile freely. I don’t know how that cunning and scheming guy has such a skill! By the way, the other guy who wants me to sing for his daughter is also very annoying.

Chen Rui noticed her shocking expression. After these days of getting along, he immediately understood something. If the little mermaid knew that the ‘annoying guy’ that she said is the emperor of the giant dragons plus Demi-God powerhouse, I wonder if she still has the courage to be as cynical as usual?

Judging from the stubbornness of those nice golden eyes, it seems to be… yes right?

The Devil’s Snare Ship reached the Thunder Snake Archipelago outside the black sea area at a speed several times higher than usual under Lambost’s water element power. This was the estate of the naga tribe.

When entering the Thunder Snake Archipelago area, the Devil’s Snare Ship was surrounded by sea snakes appearing in all directions. Then, dozens of large ships appeared in front. On the ship were female warriors with snake bodies holding scimitars, and some of them had 4 arms; some had 6 arms!

The leader was Queen Naga Modesty who was wearing a crown. In the past few months, the naga tribe had been sneak attacked many times. Even the huge sea snakes that had been tamed by the nagas had started to fight back against their masters. Modesty made a resolute decision and ordered the killing of a large number of rebellious sea snakes. She also used a lot of secret medicine to firmly control the remaining sea snakes to eliminate a large number of invading sea beasts.

In order to prevent the sneak attack, Modesty personally led the army and set up tight protections around the Thunder Snake Archipelago.

Facing the ship that invaded the nagas site now, one after another nagas clenched the scimitar in their hands. When the queen gave an order, they would rush forward to tear the whole ship apart.

At this moment, Modesty’s facial expression suddenly changed, and the bright sky suddenly darkened. A suppressing feeling flooded into the mind of every nagas. At the same time, an indescribable terrifying pressure came from the enemy’s ship, and the rushing sea was instantly silent. All the nagas including Modesty lost their mobility at the same time. The only thing they could do was to tremble under this pressure.

A scoff sounded from the Devil’s Snare Ship. A round of vigorous strength wave spread out, and the sea snakes besieging the ship began to turn into particles and dissipate at a speed visible to the naked eye. This wave gradually extended everywhere, everything except the sea water was annihilated in an instant; the sturdy ships of the nagas were no exception.

The nagas sensed the terrifying threat of death, but they couldn’t move. They could only watch death approaching step by step.

At the life and death moment, a voice sounded from the ship, “Wait a minute.”

The terrifying annihilation force suddenly stagnated and gradually disappeared along with the pressure that restrained the nagas. The nagas, who had recovered their ability to act, did not dare to move rashly anymore. Although they were not clear of the existence on that ship, it was definitely not something they could contend with. If they were not careful, the naga tribe would be in danger of extinction.

Modesty slowly floated up, walked to the Devil’s Snare Ship, folded her hands on her chest, and bowed to the Devil’s Snare Ship respectfully from a distance.

“Dear powerhouse, I’m Queen Modesty of the naga tribe. Please allow me to apologize sincerely. Recently we have been attacked by unknown enemies countless times. So this time we offended you out of ignorance, please forgive me.”

“Royal Highness Queen, remember me?” Chen Rui’s figure appeared in front of Modesty.

“You”…” Modesty saw Chen Rui’s face clearly and exclaimed, “You’re the Aguile who participated in the sea sacrifice! Aren’t you…

Modesty had fresh memories of the sea sacrifice a few months ago. At that time, she had gritted her teeth and was mentally prepared to lose a daughter, but in the end she lost 2, one of which was the future queen of the naga tribe.

This incident became the deepest pain in the queen’s heart. The nagas under her also felt that Royal Highness Queen’s gaze became dimmer, and she became more and more moody.

Now seeing this ‘demon’ who was on the ship as a sacrifice with Adeline appearing in front of her alive, even Modesty, who has always been stoic, almost lost her calmness.

“Royal Highness Queen, come to the ship to talk about it. I need to know the latest situation in the black sea area before my companions and I go to save Strena and Adeline.” Chen Rui uttered and flew back slowly.

Modesty was stunned. She followed Chen Rui to the Devil’s Snare Ship with a teardrop falling from her stern eyes.

Great, still alive! My daughter…s!

chapters.title: Chapter 716: The Old Father-In-Law And Octopus King
chapters.body:
Chapter 716: The Old Father-In-Law And Octopus King

Chapter 716: The Old Father-In-Law and Octopus King

Judging from Modesty’s narrative and the intel obtained by the Water Elemental King, the scope of the abnormality no doubt radiated from the Black Sea, and the scope was quite wide, covering almost all the sea area in the vicinity.

Many lurking sea beasts in the Black Sea had surfaced. Not only that, the output of phantom coral had suddenly doubled under the influence of this abnormal force, but the effect seemed to have dropped a lot. If this continued, even if no other changes occur, it would cause the creatures in this large sea area to gradually become extinct.

So, on the other hand, as long as the source of the abnormal force was eliminated, the original creatures’ dependence on the phantom coral due to the abnormality would disappear, and there would no longer be the risk of extinction and fertility problems.

Of course, natural laws were always generated according to the environment. A new demand chain and food chain were likely to be formed by then.

Carrying the hope of Queen Modesty, the Devil’s Snare Ship passed through the Thunder Snake Archipelago and entered the Black Sea.

The journey was smooth sailing without any hindrance, but in the early morning of the next day, something finally happened.

The sea was rolling ahead, and a large group of black demonic beasts was massacring. One side was the demonic sharks that Chen Rui had encountered before, and the other was the unknown sea beast with an enormous body. Although the strength of demonic sharks was weaker than that of the sea beasts, the number of them was extremely large. The death of their companions made their attacks even more frenzied. Those sea beasts were gradually exhausted; they were swarmed and gnawed into white bones. The surrounding sea was dyed red. The scene was extremely gruesome.

Seeing all this, the little mermaid princess showed an uncomfortable expression. Even though she had participated in the war more than once, she couldn’t help but turn her face away at this moment.

After the demonic sharks finished off the sea beasts, they immediately turned their target to the newly discovered Devil’s Snare Ship and swarmed toward it.

Chen Rui looked at the old father-in-law who slept leisurely on a recliner while drinking wine; he had no intention of doing anything. Just as Chen Rui was about to fly forward, Lambost, who had been sitting and chatting with Moore, stood up.

“Sir Captain, let me go this time. Take it as the reimbursement for this free trip.” Lambost smiled slightly. His neutral and soft face was quite charming, especially to aunties.
