The surrounding space rippled like water as the Water Elemental King appeared in the group of demonic sharks in the distance.

The demonic sharks didn’t seem to sense the pressure from Lambost, and they still rushed to the Elemental King fiercely. Lambost drew a circle with his fingers, and the surging sea began to condense quickly not into ice but a jelly-like state. This change made the movements of all demonic sharks come to a halt like they were wrapped by that ‘jelly’. Then, when Lambost bent his index finger and flicked, all the solidified ‘jelly’ was disintegrated. Not crushed, but disintegrated. The whole process was as soft as a drop of water.

After the sea water had disintegrated, it was still sea water while the demonic sharks… had dissipated into particles and melted without a trace in the sea water, not even blood was left behind. Lambost’s move seemed to be mild and unfancy, but the effect was really horrifying. No matter which Elemental Kings, the origin strength they possessed was staggeringly powerful.

The strength of the water was very soft yet very powerful.

Chen Rui couldn’t help but think of a sentence in ‘Tao Te Ching’ - “The softest thing in the world dashes against and overcomes the hardest.” It seemed that he had a sense of realization and a deeper understanding of the meaning of water swordsmanship.

At this moment, Auglas, who was relaxing on the recliner and enjoying the superb aromatic millet wine, had an abrupt action and sat up.

Lambost, who easily decimated the demonic sharks, suddenly had a different expression in his eyes. The calm water surface suddenly burst open, and a huge tentacle emerged. The tentacle was dark red and nearly 10 meters in diameter. The tentacle outside of the water was about 30 meters. The tentacles were covered with scary suckers and barbs, exuding a dreadful vibe.

Lambost seemed to be caught off guard as he was directly hit by the tentacle. His whole body suddenly shattered into countless drops of water which shocked Chen Rui.

However, Lambost’s figure appeared above the tentacle in the next second. The surrounding temperature suddenly dropped, and the water surface solidified into ice. The tentacle froze at a speed visible to the naked eye like an icicle suddenly appeared in the sea.

With a wave of water ripples, Lambost had returned to the Devil’s Snare Ship.

“Sir Auglas, this is a blood-marked demonic octopus that is about to enter the Demi-God level. I can’t suppress it, so may I trouble sir to make a move?”

“With your strength, you can hold on for at least another half an hour, and even injure that guy a bit.” Auglas glanced over the Crown of Wave on Lambost’s head and took a sip of wine, “This kind of slack off… can it be regarded as the cunning of the water elementals?”

At this time, the icicles had begun to crack. Lambost had an ice wine cup in his hand as he raised a toast to the Dark Dragon Emperor unhurriedly, “I should understand it as sir’s wise praise of the water elementals.”

“This blood-marked demonic octopus… I know him.”

It was Chen Rui who spoke. This blood-marked demonic octopus was the Octopus King known as the ‘Black Sea God’. Now the [Analytical Eyes] could show detailed strength registration. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS+.

As Lambost said, he was already at a peak stage of the kingdom-level, and it was almost close to the real Demi-God realm.

“His name is Red Pipit, and he signed an equality contract with me.” Chen Rui who had fully activated his perception and communication frowned, “For some reasons, his consciousness is full of struggle now as if he is contending with violence, massacre and other emotions. I cannot communicate with him temporarily.”

“It’s very simple. Just hit him until he’s sober.” Naturally only the old father-in-law could say such arrogant words. Seeing the old sir raise the empty wine bottle to him, Student Son-in-law immediately handed him a bottle sensibly.

“Your Highness Lambost, would you like a drink?”

The Water Elemental King shook his head, “This kind of plant-fermented liquid can’t interest the water elementals even if it contains a little diluted Fountain of Vitality.”

This sentence made Chen Rui and Earth Elemental King smile at each other because Moore also said something similar in the past. There was some flashing blue liquid in the ice cup of Lambost, “For the water elementals, the blue star heavy water is the real fine wine.”

Blue star heavy water? Chen Rui’s mind moved. This is the most important material to produce the assemble puppet that is missing.

Helen did not listen to the conversation clearly. Instead, she stared in horror at the huge tentacle that had shattered the ice wall. Suddenly, she saw a figure in front of the tentacle who was still holding a bottle of wine.

In an instant, the tentacles were gone, and the figure was gone.

Just when the little mermaid thought it was an illusion, the nearby sea water suddenly boiled, and the giant wave was tens of meters high. Lambost sighed, “It seems that the Royal Highness Dark Dragon Emperor still doesn’t want the wisdom of the water elemental to succeed.”

With that said, the Crown of Wave of the Water Elemental King emitted a faint brilliance, and the Devil’s Snare Ship was wrapped in a huge crystal ball, suspended in the air. No matter how powerful the wave below was, it stayed still.

The turbulent waves became stronger and stronger, and the heaven and earth seemed to be turned upside down. The sky was not flowing with clouds, but turbulent sea water. Various strange shapes were constantly changing in the terrifying force field.

Suddenly, a light was flourishing in front, then a huge body was faintly seen flying out of the wave into the air. Judging from the unbalanced state of the swaying tentacles, it seemed to be thrown up. Then, countless water pillars rose up and caught up with the huge body in the air like giant snakes exuding black gas.

“Boom boom boom…“

The entire sky was shaking. The white protective crystal ball disappeared, and the suspended ‘ship of the sky’ returned to the sea.

Soon, everything returned to calm, but the huge figure that flew to the sky seemed to have disappeared; it hadn’t fallen.

Chen Rui and the 2 Elemental Kings looked up at the same time, only to see a figure falling from mid-air onto the deck.

This was a burly man, uh, to be more precise, he was fat. He was wearing dark red clothing and had a blue nose. His face was bruised. At first glance, Chen Rui thought that Zhu Bajie had also crossed over.

Race: Blood-marked Demonic Octopus. Comprehensive Strength Assessment: SS+.

Physique: SS+, Strength: SS+, Spirit: SS-, Speed: SS-.

[Analysis]: Water attribute, [Regeneration].

Degree of danger: Extremely dangerous!

It turns out to be Octopus King!

“Sir Red Pipit?” Chen Rui asked tentatively from the [Analytical Eyes].

This voice made Octopus King barely open his bruised eyes, and he was surprised when he saw Chen Rui clearly, “It’s you!”

Chen Rui nodded. It seems that he is really beaten sober this time. Auglas had somehow returned to the recliner and continued to drink wine as if the ‘special effects movie scene’ just now had nothing to do with him.

Chen Rui didn’t use the [Analytical Eyes] anymore and said directly, “You seem to have lost your mind just now and were attacking us, so, my… uh, wife’s father helped you sober up.”

Octopus King was secretly horrified. No doubt this guy is not simple. There is actually such a powerhouse backing him.

That title made the old father-in-law feel comfortable, and he said to Red Pipit, “Little octopus, do you want more ‘help’?”

Octopus King shook his head quickly with fear in his eyes. In fact, he was already awake during the battle. He tried his best to defeat this sudden enemy, but he didn’t even touch the opponent. Obviously, the strength of the 2 was not at the same level at all. It would be a breeze if the ‘father of his wife’ wanted to kill him. The reason he survived was perhaps because of the person in front of him… whom he used to regard as an ant.

“Um, Sir Aguile, didn’t you go to the Hidden Misty Sea? Why did you come back here?” Octopus King’s tone was very polite which was completely different from the impossibility when they first met. He had no choice as Chen Rui’s father-in-law was very powerful.

“The last exploration failed, so I came again… By the way, I know that the sea area in this area has some abnormalities. As a result, the demonic beasts with low intelligence are killing each other, but why even Sir Red Pipit also… What happened?”

Red Pipit stood up with a painful look, then he looked at Auglas with deterrence before saying, “It should be related to the Dark Dragon Emperor. The contract power that binds my soul has some changes, causing me to fall into a crazy massacre from time to time. Even the believers whom I nurtured with great efforts died in my own hands.”

Having said this, Red Pipit couldn’t help gritting his teeth. Auglas frowned, “Since when?”

“I just faintly sensed a slight abnormality previously. About 2 months ago, this abnormality became more and more serious. My actions began to be out of control. The power of the contract in my mind continuously triggered my killing intent. If it wasn’t because of the restraints, I would have ran away a long time ago.” Red Pipit bowed to Auglas, “Sir, please help me get out of this trouble, considering that Sir Aguile and I are old acquaintances and we have a contract too. I will surely repay you greatly.”

The Octopus King was not foolish. ‘Aguile’ failed last time, so he found a backer this time. He must be determined to win. Whether I can get rid of this massacre consciousness and even regain my freedom, it is completely in his hands.

Chen Rui knew in his mind that the abnormality was not so simple. At first, Rodriguez used the strength of the light origin fragment which mistakenly buffed his [Body of Light Blessing] into [Body of Light Glory]. Later, he was suppressed tightly by Shura, so he occupied Dodo’s body as the last resolution. As a result, Dodo’s strength was too weak that he was beaten up badly. The holy dragon activated the mental cage and wanted to imprison Chen Rui for 10,000 years while he went into a deep sleep to restore his strength.

Rodriguez must have never thought that Chen Rui actually left the cage and went to the human world. However, Chen Rui did not expect that in just a few months, Rodriguez, who should have been sleeping, seemed to have undergone some unexpected changes, and his strength had become greater. Not only that, the resurrected kingdom also began to radiate an abnormal force to affect the surrounding sea area; he should be using massacre to speed up the recovery.

“Wait for my good news in the Black Sea, Sir Red Pipit.” Chen Rui dropped the Octopus King with a thread of hope before he sailed the Devil’s Snare Ship away from the sea area.

The Hidden Misty Sea, the Hidden Misty Island.

A shivering blue-haired girl was curled up on a corner of the beach rock.

The girl’s face was fresh and beautiful, and the snake body on her lower body was exactly the characteristic of the naga tribe. The girl’s facial expression was pale at the moment, full of pain and fear, “It’s here again, that kind of terrifying feeling…”

“Aguile, Aguile…” The girl tremblingly called the name, and her eyes cleared a lot. She seemed to have found the courage to continue holding on.

After a long time, the young girl finally recovered, panting against the stone exhaustedly. She chewed and swallowed a handful of herbs in her hand, and her pale face looked a little better.

“Adeline…”

There seemed to be some kind of calling sound in the wind.

The girl was startled, thinking that she had misheard. She pinch her arm fiercely, and the pain and increasingly clearer voice told her that this was not an illusion.

The girl’s pupils suddenly lit up with a strong brilliance, and the usual gloom in her eyes was swept away. She somehow gathered the strength and got up.

The snake body gradually turned into 2 legs. After walking a few steps, she hesitated again, and it finally turned back into a snake body. She walked quickly toward the source of the sound as she shouted with the loudest sound in her life, “I’m here!”

chapters.title: Chapter 717: The Land Of Hatred
chapters.body:
Chapter 717: The Land Of Hatred

Chapter 717: The Land of Hatred

On the Devil’s Snare Ship, Chen Rui looked back at the Hidden Misty Island surrounded by mist. Although he could not see the scene behind the mist, he could imagine the thin figure still waving.

As he didn’t know exactly what major abnormality had happened to the Land of Hatred, Chen Rui did not take Adeline with him, leaving Helen with her to accompany the naga girl who couldn’t see properly on the Hidden Misty Island.

“Still thinking about that snake girl? Hmph! Do you believe I will destroy that island now!?” Auglas was not happy on the side. Why didn’t you miss my precious girl?

When they saw Adeline on the island earlier, the naga girl tripped because of excitement and she was caught by Chen Rui. The old father-in-law began to suppress a certain son-in-law with a scrutinizing gaze.

Chen Rui ignored Auglas’s gaze. For the naga girl, he only had guilt in his heart. Adeline’s temperament was weak, but she had lived alone on this island for several months. The loneliness and fear alone were unbearable, and the stronger force from somewhere on the bottom of the Nether Sea also made the naga girl with keen senses to be tormented mentally every day.

“Adeline, do you remember the promise I made to you? Wait for me.”

The naga girl looked at the Devil’s Snare Ship that disappeared in the mist, and the last words that Chen Rui said echoed in her ears.

You will see the castle in the sky with your own eyes…

Your beautiful harper melody will intoxicate everyone…

Chen Rui took out a bottle of wine, toasted the old father-in-law, and briefly told the story of meeting Adeline, “In my heart, she is a very loving sister.”

This confession made the old father-in-law’s face a little paler. Sir Dark Dragon Emperor’s eyes flashed through the vicissitudes of life, and he never mentioned the topic of destroying the island anymore, but after drinking a big sip of wine, he caught a keyword, “Olypheus is also a ‘sister’? How many ‘sisters’ do you, greedy guy, have?”

“Lyrics?” Chen Rui looked at Auglas with a strange look, the latter felt puzzled, then the human shrugged, “Olypheus is still my sister for the time being, but I will work hard…”

“For the time being? You clearly are brushing me off!” Auglas said coldly, “But at least you didn’t lie. I warn you, except for Olypheus, the other ‘sisters’ can only be sisters!”

After these days of getting along, Chen Rui had a good understanding of the old father-in-law’s temperament. He held up the wine bottle and smiled slightly, “I understand.”

1 day later, the Devil’s Snare Ship that passed the Hidden Misty Sea entered the Nether Sea area.

There was no living thing in the Nether Sea because, under the cruel means of Lich King Glorios, all the creatures had become undead. Now that Lich King was annihilated, the undead that would obstruct them along the way disappeared naturally, so they were not attacked on the way, but the weather was still bad with a thunderstorm.

Lambost frowned, “Did you sense it, Moore?”

Moore nodded solemnly, “The element’s breath is quite disordered, full of restlessness and irritability as if a terrifying strength is being bred.”

“The sea faintly has a breath of the kingdom which is not very strong, but it feels weird.” Auglas’s observation angle was different from that of the 2 Elemental Kings, “It seems that it is not as easy as I imagined this time.”

After all, Chen Rui’s knowledge and experience were far inferior to the 3 of them. He just faintly sensed the abnormal breath. He asked, “Your Highness Lambost, the Land of Hatred should be somewhere in the deep sea of ??this sea area. Back then, Hegel and I used the dark elemental’s ship to dive into the seabed, but there is no dark element ship now. I wonder if Your Highness has a way to go to the seabed?”

“Of course, I’m the Water Elemental King.” When Lambost took off the Crown of Wave and threw it into the sea, a strange ship appeared in front of everyone which was a little like a yacht. It was completely transparent as if it was made of glass. It glowed with magnificent blue light, “Just call it… Aqua Water Ship.”

Chen Rui collected the sandmen into sandstone essence, put away the Devil’s Snare Ship, and entered the Aqua Water Ship together with Auglas and Moore. The Aqua Water Ship gradually closed, and its appearance began to undergo wonderful changes, transforming into the shape of a big fish before it dived into the sea.

The speed of the Aqua Water Ship was very fast. It was like a real sea fish, flexibly diving in the water. The light it emitted was not very bright, but Chen Rui could clearly see the outside situation from the inside as if he was sharing the vision with the fish.

The wonders were more than that. In the belly of the big fish, they did not feel the water pressure or turbulence outside; it was like flat ground. Various furnishings such as tables and seats could appear at any time just like the mimicry magic of water element. Compared with this, the dark elemental’s ship, Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle Ship, that surprised Chen Rui could only be described as way more inferior.

Lambost opened his hands, and that hand actually merged with the wall of the Aqua Water Ship. There were 2 more golden lights in big fish’s eyes, sensing the changes in the element power in the sea and adjusting the direction.

After 1 day and 1 night, a luminous spot appeared in front of them.

With the advancement of the Aqua Water Ship, the luminous spot had become bigger, but the specific situation was not clear.

“It should be here.” Lambost stared at the bright place ahead, “This enchantment is very powerful. I want to try to breach it forcibly first.”

The Aqua Water Ship shone, and a thick blue light ball was ejected from the cylinder outlet. It was like a giant sea bomb, shooting toward the bright place in an attempt to open a gap. However, the enchantment of the light only trembled slightly, then countless rays of light like meteors drew white trajectories in the water, blasting toward the Aqua Water Ship.

As Lambost’s mind shifted, the Aqua Water Ship was wrapped in a huge crystal ball. There was a massive shock when the white lights hit the crystal ball. One after another cracks appeared on the crystal ball, but they survived this round of attack in the end.

Chen Rui was secretly shocked. When Hegel and I came here previously, there was absolutely no such powerful enchantment, plus they would take the initiative to attack the intruder. Otherwise, we would be destroyed before we entered last time, and it would be impossible for the subsequent events to happen.

What abnormality actually occurred?

“This is the power of the light element! It is actually comparable to the strength of the Crown of Wave.” Lambost frowned, “Such a pure light element strength, is it…”

“Light origin fragment!” Chen Rui reacted and said solemnly.

Lambost and others all heard Chen Rui talk about the battle with Rodriguez at that time. Apart from going to the human world, which was a secret related to the Super System, Chen Rui did not conceal the rest of the details including the light origin fragment and dark origin fragment.

Moore’s eyes showed doubt, “Without the Light Elemental King, how can the light origin fragment exhibit such a strength?”

“You will know the truth once the enchantment is breached.” Auglas put down the wine bottle in his hand and stared at the dazzling light in front of him. There seemed to be a black flame burning in his pupils.

“Sir Auglas, the light element is a big nemesis for you. Besides, we don’t know what else will happen inside. Don’t waste your strength now.” Moore stood up slowly, “I have a way. Although the strength of this enchantment is strong, it is relatively scattered. It will become weak when attacking. I will go out to attract the power of these light elements, and Lambost will take this opportunity to use the water origin fragment to break the enchantment… Go all in, don’t preserve your strength.”

“I always go by the saying, ‘the problem that can be solved by 30% strength should never be solved by 40%’, but from the current situation, I’m afraid that it will take 100%.” Lambost smiled slightly, “But you haven’t completely digested the earth imprint yet. The consumption of strength is definitely unavoidable, just don’t be shattered.”

Moore also smiled, “Not to that extent, the defense of the earth elementals is not delicate like the water elementals.”

“Wait a minute, Moore, I’ll go.” Chen Rui said.

“You?” Lambost frowned, “It’s not the time to show off. Even Moore with the strongest defensive power can’t be safe under the power of that light element.”

“I am not trying to show off, but I’m more confident than Moore in the face of this kind of strength. Moore, do you trust your friend?”

“It’s the best friend.” Moore added a word, then he sighed, “Well, I choose to trust as always.”

Lambost did not talk nonsense. He opened the exit of the Aqua Water Ship. Chen Rui smiled at the 3 and flew out.

As soon as he went out, he sensed the terrifying pressure of the deep sea. If it was an ordinary person, his bones and internal organs would have been shattered, but for Chen Rui whose physique had reached S+ and trained in the deep sea training ground of the Super System for hundreds of years, it was not a big deal.

A faint brilliance appeared in Chen Rui’s hand. With a wave from a distance, a ripple of vacuum wrapped in water slid toward the enchantment. The enchantment immediately responded, and countless brilliance was launched.

Chen Rui didn’t evade, but he made a defensive posture as he was wrapped in white light in the blink of an eye, causing a violent tremor.

As soon as the white lights attacked Chen Rui, the Aqua Water Ship quickly changed into the form of a swordfish that was shining in blue light, and rushed toward the enchantment. The entire enchantment shook violently, and a gap appeared as if a blade pierced through it.

At this time, the tail of the ‘swordfish’ turned into a tentacle, rolling up the figure in the fading white light, then they quickly passed through the closing gap.

“Are you okay?” Moore looked at the almost unscathed Chen Rui in surprise, “Your defense really surprised me.”

In fact, unlike Lambost, who was engrossed in Crown of Wave, Moore also discovered that the light element strength seemed to be devoured by Chen Rui’s body. It might be related to his human identity or some special physique, but Moore did not point it out.

“It’s considered okay.” Auglas’s tone was disparaging, but his expression was a little proud, “Without some strength, how can he be worthy of my daughter?”

Now that they had entered a strange, dry and waterless space, Lambost kept the Crown of Wave.

In this space, the sea was blocked by the sky, and the water was faintly visible. It was the Land of Hatred.

The only building was the white tall tower in the distance. Above the tower, there were 2 strange forces flying around, 1 was a billowing black gas, the other was a dazzling white light. The 2 forces mixed together and formed a figure that faintly resembled the shadow of a giant dragon.

A terrifying power surged at Chen Rui and the others as if sensing the arrival of the intruders.

Auglas’ facial expression changed slightly. As his figure flashed, he appeared in front of Chen Rui with black flames on his hands. There were countless phantasm-like translucent scenes approaching them.

“Don’t move, this is the fight of Demi-God-level kingdom power!” The crown’s light on Lambost’s head flickered, and a soft protective force wrapped the 3 of them.

chapters.title: Chapter 718: The Holy Dragon Awakened
chapters.body:
Chapter 718: The Holy Dragon Awakened

Chapter 718: The Holy Dragon Awakened

Chen Rui was shocked by Lambost’s words: Demi-God-level kingdom power? Putting aside Auglas, when did Rodriguez’s remnant soul in the Tower of Hatred recover to the level of Demi-God?

“Try to restrain your breath.” Moore reminded, “So as not to affect the kingdom and distract Sir Auglas.”

Chen Rui immediately activated the [Breath Holding] skill, converging both strength and breath. Despite the protection of Crown of Wave from the indirect impact, Chen Rui could still clearly feel that the strength of these 2 forces was unprecedentedly powerful. The mental suppression alone was unparalleled as if a world collided with another world. The strength of the Demon Overlord was as small as an ant in this ‘world’.

It was like ordinary people couldn’t resist the strength of nature even if their bodies were tempered to the peak stage. This was an essential difference unless… one truly transformed into nature.

Although Chen Rui couldn’t activate [Pole Star Transformation]’s [Blue Star Kingdom], when he sensed this Demi-God-level kingdom power, his concept of ‘quality’ had deepened a bit. If he could break away from [Pole Star Transformation] and really comprehend the ‘kingdom’, perhaps it was the time he would break through the Blue Pole Star Level.

The black flames of Auglas’ hands were getting lower and lower which seemed like he was suppressed. In fact, he was accumulating energy. The black pupils suddenly become the vertical pupils of the giant dragon. In a shout, he spread his hands, and the kingdom power of the Tower of Hatred was suddenly torn apart. All the phantasms disappeared in an instant.

Chen Rui felt that the suppression was suddenly released, then the scene changed and the Tower of Hatred appeared in front of everyone. The blow just now should have disintegrated a certain kind of space barrier.

In front of the Tower of Destruction, there were statues, not only the silent Dark Iron Mystic Ghosts, but also the nagas, elementals and resentful souls including Strena.

Strena and the others seemed to have lost their souls, their bodies were plated with a layer of alternating metal brilliance of gold and silver; they were solidified. It was caused by the aftereffect of Rodriguez’s light and dark imprisonment back then.

The Dragon Eye Ring, the key to opening the Tower of Destruction, had fallen into the hands of the holy dragon, but Tower of Destruction did not seem to need a key to open it at the moment because Auglas hit the Tower of Destruction with a punch in the air. It trembled violently, and large cracks appeared on the surface. If it were not for Chen Rui’s prior reminder, the aftermath of this blow would destroy all the statues.

The 2 surrounding black and white breath whistled out, and quickly solidified into the shape of a giant dragon. The eyes of the giant dragon slowly opened. The left pupil was golden while the right was silver, giving out a terrifying light.

“Who dares to destroy the cage and awaken the long sleep of the Dark Dragon Emperor?” A deep and thick voice sounded.

“Dark Dragon Emperor?” Auglas sneered, “How dare you, a holy dragon of the human world, claim to be the Dark Dragon Emperor?”

The giant dragon seemed to have just awakened, and he was stunned by the sentence. His eyes piercingly looked at Auglas, “A Demi-God black dragon? Who are you!”

A familiar voice sounded beside him, “Sir Rodriguez, do you remember me?”

“It’s you! You damn human!” Rodriguez roared suddenly. He couldn’t forget the shame of being forced to sleep to avoid complete annihilation. “Could it be that 10,000 years have passed?”

When the Water Elemental King heard the word ‘human’, a shocked expression flashed across his eyes, and he saw Moore nod to him. Lambost thought for a while and recovered his calm again.

“Cut the crap.” Auglas’ black eyes turned into vertical pupils again, and his breath began to change rapidly, “The accounts back then will be settled together today!”

“[Dragon God Eyes]!” Rodriguez’s voice was filled with horror and anger, “You’re Crusier… No! Now I remember! You’re the little black dragon back then!

“The Dragon Island Emperor, Auglas. Sierrasalomekre.” Auglas’s vertical pupils were shining brightly as his breath skyrocketed. He punched the giant dragon phantasm, “Today, I will completely annihilate your remnant soul!”

The Tower of Destruction suddenly emitted a strange light. Under this light, the surface cracks that were caused by Auglas earlier began to peel off quickly, exposing the crystal-like white jade material inside. The inscriptions on the surface jumped as if they were alive. Auglas’ blow was actually canceled out.

“Remnant soul? Ignorant black dragon, I’ll let you see how powerful this remnant soul is!” Rodriguez laughed sharply, “Oh, I just remembered something, human. This time is a blessing in disguise. Most of my soul and kingdom power have been restored, and I am able to activate the Tower of Glory. It’s all thanks to your previous invasion. In order to express my gratitude, I will let you enjoy all the pain before you die slowly!”

“Tower of Glory!” The name made Earth Elemental King and the Water Elemental King exclaimed at the same time. Chen Rui saw that countless mysterious inscriptions suddenly appeared under his feet. In the blink of an eye, the scene had changed suddenly. He appeared in a strange space which was full of chaotic and powerful breaths.

“Yes, Tower of Glory. The feeling of re-mastering it is really refreshing.” Rodriguez’s voice sounded, “If it wasn’t for this space artifact, I would have died in Raphael’s hands. Today, you will all be buried here! [Dragon God Eyes] will also become my trophy!”

The sun and the moon appeared in the sky at the same time, and the originally chaotic power breath suddenly became more tyrannical. The overwhelming pressure seemed to be from a high god.

“Did you see it? This is the supreme strength of the fusion of light and darkness!” Rodriguez’s laughter was full of triumph, “As long as I fully comprehend this rule, I will step on the road to the real god!”

Before launching an attack, the pressure from this sound wave almost stopped Chen Rui’s blood flow. The pressure was several times greater than when he was with Auglas previously. Even the 2 Elemental Kings found it difficult to move.

The only person who could move was Auglas. His pupils ignited black flames which quickly spread to the whole body, and a pair of majestic full-body armor appeared. It was the first time Chen Rui saw the Demi-God-level [Armor of Faith]. This armor was completely black, exuding a deterrent breath that was impossible to look at directly.

After putting on this armor, Auglas’s power skyrocketed. Chen Rui and the other 2 suddenly felt the pressure relieved as they regained their mobility.

“The fusion of light and darkness? Bullsh*t! It’s just that the strength of the light origin fragment and the dark origin fragment are barely blended by some coincidence.” As Auglas yelled, the previously seen kingdom phantasm appeared beside him. The sceneries such as mountains, castles, and so on quickly spread in space and intertwined with the kingdom of the sun and the moon.

The sceneries of the 2 kingdoms began to collapse and shatter; only the sun and moon in the sky remained the same. When Auglas showed a strenuous expression, Moore and Lambost looked at each other before they unanimously moved vertically, turning into 2 clouds - 1 blue and 1 yellow to cover the sunlight and moonlight.

With the help of the 2 Elemental Kings, Auglas had been able to resist Rodriguez’s kingdom and shouted, “Chen Rui, although Rodriguez’s kingdom has undergone some kind of abnormality, his real body’s strength cannot be synchronized. It hasn’t even reached the kingdom level! 3 of us will resist his kingdom and space artifact. You immediately find out his real body and kill him!”

Chen Rui knew that the situation was urgent, so his perception was fully open as he searched for Rodriguez’s whereabouts.

Rodriguez’s laughter sounded from all directions, “Even this ant-like human can kill me? Last time, I was just careless, I won’t make the same mistake twice! You’re already trapped in my kingdom power, as long as I kill him, you will gradually become exhausted and eventually be annihilated. See how you lose your last hope with your own eyes!”

As soon as the voice ended, countless rays of light appeared around Chen Rui. They were strands of high-concentration energy filaments that were enough to split the space. They wrapped around him, wanting to mince this human into pieces.

A transparent blue shield appeared, and the light left countless terrifying cracks on the shield. In the end, it was unable to destroy the defensive shield’s protection. Before the next round of attacks began, the shield suddenly disappeared along with the human figure in it.

The disappearing Chen Rui surprised Rodriguez who was also hiding in the dark. He began to launch various attacks, but he could not find the other party’s whereabouts as if he was really missing.

At this moment, Rodriguez, who was in the air, suddenly had a bad premonition. He revealed himself and waved his hand abruptly to the back. In a flash, a figure teleported to the distance. It was Chen Rui.

Rodriguez was slightly startled, “You actually know that I’m here?”

Of course, Chen Rui wouldn’t say that he used the [Analytical Eyes] to find him. He just said nonchalantly, “I also do this kind of simple sneaky trick, stop putting shame on yourself.”

Race: Slime (Mutated)

Comprehensive Strength Assessment: S++

Physique: S++, Strength: S++, Spirit: S++, Speed: S++

Analysis: Transformation talent, devour talent, immortality, recovery talent, absorption and imitation talent, dragon demeanor.

Risk Level: Quite high.

At such a rating level, no doubt he has not reached the kingdom level, but he is still above my current strength, especially the slime’s talents are scary… Wait, the slime? Chen Rui seemed to have a realization, and his mind immediately entered the Super System. In the spiritual link, Dodo’s master-servant link was still maintained. In this way, the soul of Dodo had not completely disappeared, but still existed in the body.

Rodriguez didn’t know that Chen Rui’s [Sneak] had a time limit. He really didn’t use concealment anymore once he heard it, “It’s been less than a year since the last battle. I didn’t expect your strength to grow very fast. It’s a pity. My changes are far beyond your imagination!”

Chen Rui’s mind turned, “Does the so-called change mean that the holy dragon has become… a slime?”

“This slime is not simple as it can actually devour the strength of the dark origin fragment and the dark origin fragment, merging the 2 together. My soul power and kingdom are also quickly recovered under this merging.” Rodriguez sneered, “Thank you for sending me this body. As long as my soul is fully recovered and I have mastered the highest law of the unity of light and dark, I can truly be reborn even without the body of the black dragon. Then, the entire Demon Realm will kneel under the majesty of a newborn god!”

Chen Rui took a deep breath, and his strength channeled at high speed, “You seem to forget something?”

“Are you talking about the master-servant contract?” Rodriguez gave a weird smile, “You can try.”

chapters.title: Chapter 719: An Idea
chapters.body:
Chapter 719: An Idea

Chapter 719: An Idea

“The contract power in the slime is very weird, I can’t cancel it, but you may not be able to kill me through the destructive power of the contract.” Rodriguez’s gold and silver pupils glowed strangely, “Want to try it? Maybe something interesting will happen?”

Playing hard to get? Or is it a confusion strategy? Chen Rui kept his distance from Rodriguez vigilantly as his mind shifted quickly. The soul of Dodo should not disappear completely. I’m not sure if he is assimilated or merged. With the master-servant contract, killing Dodo is just a mere effort.

Rodriguez snatched Dodo’s body to survive, but he has not destroyed Dodo’s original soul. It should not be because of soft-heartedness. It must be because the 2 have already had a subtle relationship. If Dodo is killed, even if Rodriguez does not die, he should suffer considerable damage as well.

For a long time, Dodo has played a mascot who only knows to flatter… gluttonous and lazy, plus a cunning servant who secretly reports to the madams.

Chen Rui had been in the Demon Realm since he first entered the Demon Realm. On the road of training and survival, his hands had been stained with blood. So many lives were ended in his hands. He was resolute and merciless even to beauties such as Sabrina and Colina. However, facing the subordinate that seemed to be easily discarded, he couldn’t bear to be merciless.

Dodo once shared difficulties with Chen Rui in Mountain Xilang. This time he could enter the treasure of the Dark Dragon Emperor thanks to its discovery. The years of living together also made the slime unknowingly become part of the ‘family’ in the Dark Moon.

“You… How do you know Dodo is a slime? Don’t kill Dodo!”

“Who dares to stop Master Dodo’s way!”

“Sir Dodo is really amazing, I finally found a treasure of the highest quality!”

“Master, don’t blame me. I was forced by madam…”

“Master! This is Dodo’s collection for many years! I stole it with great effort from a ferocious demonic beast…”

Chen Rui took a deep breath and cut off the idea of ??using the contract as a killing move - Defeat Rodriguez by myself! Then try my best to try to save the slime!

At this moment, a familiar voice sounded.

“Don’t act rashly! The talent of the slime merges the power of light and darkness, but he confines Rodriguez’s soul instead! If you eliminate the soul of the slime, Rodriguez will fully control the body, truly merge and be in harmony with the kingdom!”

The sound came from the ‘moon’ in the sky. It was Hegel’s voice. Chen Rui was startled, and he understood that the Dark Elemental King had involuntarily become a part of Rodriguez’s [Light and Dark Kingdom]!

“Damn it!” Rodriguez’s trick to lure Chen Rui into annihilating Dodo was exposed. He was infuriated. As his pupils flashed, Hegel’s voice suddenly became weak.

“Just defeat him and take away the 2 element origin fragments…”

Chen Rui only managed to hear this sentence before he sensed a danger. Rodriguez was already close in the blink of an eye as he punched. Chen Rui had already crossed his arms to defend. The opponent’s fist was extremely powerful, making him walk a few steps to the side. His arm was aching. Before he regained his balance, Rodriguez’s figure had appeared behind him. Chen Rui immediately launched a teleport, dodging the opponent’s kick.

Rodriguez was about to pursue, but he frowned suddenly. A shield with the head of the giant dragon appeared in his hand. Sparks splattered as he blocked Chen Rui’s slash, but the intangible sharp qi of the blade passed through the defense of the dragon shield, leaving an astonishing wound on Rodriguez’s cheek.

“You even have this trick. Unfortunately, you forgot that this is an immortal body.” The wound on Rodriguez’s face quickly healed at a speed visible to the naked eye, and he recovered in an instant. “This trick is really interesting…

Before he finished his sentence, his figure appeared in front of Chen Rui’s eyes. His 5 fingers scratched toward him like a beast claw, exuding terrifying red lightning.

S++ level’s speed was extremely amazing. Even if Chen Rui reacted in time to retreat, 5 shallow claw marks were left on his ribs. Although this claw did not break the Mystic Jade Armor’s defense, some remaining power still penetrated the armor, making him feel a burning pain.

“Hehe… how is my trick?” Rodriguez didn’t pursue it as his voice was filled with triumph.

This kind of claw strength was very similar to the [Aura Blade] just now. The direct power was still more powerful, and the intangible sword qi was relatively weak. This was enough to make Chen Rui secretly shocked. Due to Dodo’s timid personality and laziness, he originally had a strong potential, but his combat power was very low. After being taken over by Rodriguez, these talents became more difficult to deal with.

Other than the equal level of spirit power, Chen Rui’s other qualities were below Rodriguez. The most important thing was that he was restrained by the Shackles of True Flame and could not activate the [Pole Star Transformation], so he could only fight with S+ strength. A fierce battle was inevitable. “You don’t have the slightest hope of winning. If you give up resistance, I can make your death easier.” Rodriguez’s claw was sizzling with lightning. Chen Rui seemed to see a terrifying giant dragon figure roaring at him.

Chen Rui did not hesitate or fear at all. There were countless stars around his body as he rushed to the giant dragon.

The Hidden Misty Island.

The elegant harp sound echoed in the haze like countless elves flying with a touch of sadness, bringing thoughts to the distant sky.

“It’s so beautiful.” Helen showed an intoxicated expression, “I have never heard such beautiful music. What kind of tune is this?”

Although the little mermaid princess had a strong resistance to the naga girl at the beginning, for the 2 music-loving persons, there was nothing better to communicate than music. The distance between the 2 gradually narrowed. After a few days, they became friends.

“Castle in the Sky.” Adeline’s dim eyes seemed to have a strange light beating, “This is my favorite song. It is composed by Sir Aguile.”

“That bad guy?” There was an incredible light in the little mermaid princess’ golden eyes, “Are you sure?! He can make such a beautiful song?”

“Helen, I have told you several times. Sir Aguile is definitely not a bad guy.” The naga girl had a nostalgic expression on her face, “Life can be taken away, but hope will always exist. Without him, I as a sacrifice would have died in despair more than once. I will always remember that when we first met, he said that life can be taken away, but hope will always exist.”

“Hmph!” Helen’s pretty eyebrows wrinkled, “You’re too kind and don’t know how sinister people are. Don’t be fooled by this guy’s sweet words!”

Adeline smiled confidently, “The mouth can lie, but the heart can’t lie. I can clearly sense the persistence and kindness in his heart… You have misunderstood him. I believe you will understand if you spend some time with him.”

“I don’t want to spend time with that kind of bastard…” The little mermaid suddenly felt depressed when she thought that this was not up to her.

Hope, does it exist forever… The 2 of them were silent for a while with their own concerns.

After a long time.

The siren’s voice suddenly sounded. It was that ‘Castle in the Sky’ with no songs, no accompaniment, only a light and melodious humming with a hint of hope in her heart, even if the hope was in the sky.

Tower of Glory.

The shining flames in the space went from intense to dim and then disappeared.

A whole day had passed unknowingly.

After a violent collision, the 2 fighting figures finally separated. They were looking for the best time for the next attack.

“Unbelievable strength.” Rodriguez took a deep breath and gradually adjusted his breathing. “I didn’t expect that you could fight me to such an extent!”

Chen Rui did not speak, but he violently gasped and gripped the sword in his hand. His body was full of shocking wounds, and his physical strength was extremely exhausted. Despite the passive characteristics of recovery and self-healing, plus the supplement of potion, his strength was almost exhausted too.

Rodriguez’s body did not have any wounds, but his armor was covered with cracks and holes. The light of the gold and silver pupils also dimmed a lot, showing the intensity of the battle.

“Multiple territories, time law… these are no longer ordinary powerhouse methods; even ordinary Demi-God can’t have this kind of law!” Rodriguez’s voice was full of surprise, “What surprised me most is that sword in your hand, as well as the mask and shield. They should be… What kind of existence are you? You can actually surpass the power of the bloodline to control the legendary supreme…”

Chen Rui still did not answer. All he could do was to seize every second of his precious time to replenish his combat power. Up to now, he had exhausted his trump cards. Any other enemy would have already collapsed, but Dodo’s physique was too special. There was simply no solution for that kind of immortal body and super self-healing ability. Ordinary attacks were almost ineffective; the only thing that could restrain it was the Sword of Fallen Angel with the [Soul Searing] feature.

After it hit an enemy, it would directly kill and split the enemy’s soul power, then it would devour the flesh and blood into the user’s strength.

“No matter who you are, you will be a loser today.” Rodriguez suddenly thought of something, “This slime has a special talent for devouring which can have the opportunity to gain the ability of the devoured. I want to devour you, maybe there will be unexpected surprises by then.”

With that said, Rodriguez couldn’t help laughing with hands on his hips. The kind of smug attitude was almost… just like Dodo in the usual days.

Rodriguez reacted instantly again and put his hand down, “Damn habit.”

It was not the first time that Chen Rui had discovered the existence of this ‘habit’. He had used this ‘flaw’ to avoid being killed 3 times before. The effect of Dodo’s soul on this body was still there, but Rodriguez had become dominant.

Wait… habit? Chen Rui had an idea. He moved in an instant, and the Sword of Fallen Angel in his hand touched Rodriguez’s armpit quickly.

Rodriguez was about to fight back when he saw that there was something in the opponent’s hand - a fruit with a strange fragrance.

When Chen Rui threw the fruit into the sky, Rodriguez involuntarily turned into a horse-shaped demonic beast, jumping toward the sky. While catching the fruit, he felt a pain in his abdomen as he was pierced by the Sword of Fallen Angel. The characteristics of [Soul Searing] caused Rodriguez’s soul power to be severely wounded.

Rodriguez screamed as he desperately broke away from the sword. He returned to his human form and fell to the ground as he shouted, “What is actually going on!”

chapters.title: Chapter 720: Unbelievable! The Holy Dragon
chapters.body:
Chapter 720: Unbelievable! The Holy Dragon

Chapter 720: Unbelievable! The Holy Dragon

If it were not for the pain in the abdomen and the weakening of the soul power, Rodriguez would have thought that an illusion had just occurred. What method did he use to successfully pierce me?

Chen Rui flew forward again, and Rodriguez focused 90% of his attention on that hand, thinking that even if the strange red fruit appeared again, he would not make the mistake just now.

However, the opponent did not repeat the trick this time. The sword drew with water ripples. This was not the first time Rodriguez saw this marvelous sword skill, so he had also figured out how to deal with it. His body became extremely soft, swaying along with the power of the water ripple. He did not rush to defend or attack, just moving with the flow while waiting for an opportunity.

Chen Rui’s sword intent suddenly changed, and the water ripple turned into a surging wave. This was originally an overlapping punch. After this actual combat training, he could already launch it with the sword. Layers of sword qi swarmed over loudly which was completely different from the previous soft whispers.

Rodriguez was about to dodge when he saw Chen Rui throw something out. The holy dragon, who had been on alert, immediately stopped the ability to transform so as not to be fooled again.

The holy dragon didn’t expect that the other party would throw a very ordinary wine bottle with its cork opened. The fragrance of the wine was released, and there was no poison or dangerous breath.

When Rodriguez hesitated, Chen Rui already held a cup in his hand. The holy dragon subconsciously caught the wine bottle with both hands and leaned forward to pour the wine, habitually showing his flattery smile.

Before Rodriguez could control his involuntary body, he saw that the Sword of Fallen Angel in the opponent’s hand had disappeared. Just as he had a bad omen, the tip of the sword came out from his forehead. It turned out that the Sword of Fallen Angel had already penetrated him from the back of his head.

The Fallen Angel Empire special skill, [Sword Control] - doubles the damage, and can control the sword within the effective range to launch various attacks.

Chen Rui’s figure instantly appeared behind the holy dragon. He drew out his sword and made a swift slash, cutting Rodriguez’s body in half. If it was another person, he would definitely die, but Rodriguez had an immortal body, so this blow was not fatal for him. The 2 halves healed and merged again in the blink of an eye.

Although the body had recovered, the Sword of Fallen Angel’s ability to sear the soul was inevitable. For the holy dragon’s soul, this was quite a fatal injury. Rodriguez uttered a painful howl. He already understood it- Damn wine bottle! Damn habit! Damn slime!

Dodo’s body was an immortal body, but reborn was not endless. Once the strength was exhausted, it couldn’t be reborn, which meant true death. In particular, the Sword of Fallen Angel was also the nemesis of the soul. With the weakening of Rodriguez’s soul power, the strength of the [Light and Dark Kingdom] had also weakened accordingly. With the help of the 2 Elemental Kings, Auglas had steadily resisted the strong pressure. Once he found a chance to strike back, Rodriguez would undoubtedly lose.

While Rodriguez was distracted, Chen Rui took advantage of the gap and succeeded consecutively. Rodriguez’s figure suddenly trembled as the 2 colors of gold and silver in his eyes quickly faded, and his movements also came to a halt.

“Master…”

It’s the voice of Dodo! Chen Rui was surprised, “Dodo! How are you?”

It seemed that this battle, especially the successive major injuries just now, had damaged the holy dragon’s soul, so Dodo’s soul that had been sleeping had finally begun to awaken.

“It hurts so bad!” ‘Rodriguez’ said with a grin as his eyes flashed with gold and silver again, and his claws madly attacked Chen Rui.

“Clang! Clang! Clang!” The terrifying attack was completely blocked by the Demon Shield in Chen Rui’s hands. The Demon Shield’s defensive power was very special. The sharp qi of the dragon claws could not penetrate it. Meanwhile, the wine fragrance behind the shield made Rodriguez’s eyes constantly change strangely.

“So fragrant!” Dodo’s voice finally sounded again as his nose suddenly became 10cm long, greedily sniffing the fragrance of wine. His face suddenly became bitter again. “Master, there are 2 strange things in Dodo’s body. It’s uncomfortable…”

Dodo’s voice stopped abruptly, and it turned into Rodriguez’s angry shout, but it was obvious that Rodriguez could not completely suppress Dodo. Chen Rui took the opportunity to attack, and the Sword of Fallen Angel hit him successively.

However, after Dodo woke up, his soul was no longer immune to harm. His crying sound came at the same time, “It hurts! No, don’t kill me! Master…”

This cry caused Chen Rui to stop his attack. He couldn’t continue to attack. The souls of Dodo and Rodriguez appear alternately, apparently fighting fiercely.

According to Hegel, Dodo’s soul should have undergone some kind of mutation which in turn restrained Rodriguez. Both sides were evenly matched, so Dodo could survive to this day. It was a pity that the slime was timid and weak by nature. Even if its soul level could compete with Rodriguez, his will was far from it. The holy dragon had the upper hand without any suspense.

Chen Rui couldn’t attack, but he knew Dodo’s weakness very well, so he shouted, “Dodo, don’t give up! As long as you get the 2 origin fragments in the body, you will be able to restore your freedom! When the time comes, let’s go home together!”

Rodriguez’s pupils suddenly contracted, and his whole body began to twist strangely. It seemed that he could no longer maintain his human form; the dragon’s armor was scattered all over the ground.

“Dodo wants to go home! Dodo wants delicious food!”

This voice was accompanied by a strong obsession. In Chen Rui’s eyes, the constantly writhing object sometimes turned into a human shape, sometimes a huge dragon body, and sometimes an onion. The strength of the entire territory kingdom also began to be chaotic. Auglas and others were all veterans, so they immediately increased their strength, changing defense into offense. The [Light and Dark Kingdom] was suppressed step by step, and the moon in the sky began to show a crack.

However, it was slime after all. A weakling could not become powerful with just a few encouragements, especially the opponent was the holy dragon with hundreds of thousands of years of combat experience. After the obsession passed, he waned again and again. The slime fell into a disadvantage again.

“Master, Dodo is nearly… Ah! I can’t!”

“Master… Dodo can’t stand it anymore!”

“Master Slime is dying!”

“Help!”

Although Chen Rui wanted to help Dodo very much, he was unable to intervene. There was a flash of inspiration in his mind as he suddenly remembered something.

Star Conferring Platform!

The role of the Star Conferring Platform was to grant star positions. Those who get the star position title could have special attributes and characteristics. The attribute power and quota of the star position were related to the Pole Star Level of the Pole Star Emperor. The current Blue Pole Star Level had 3 types of stars that could be conferred: Star General, Star Servant, and Star Apprentice. In this case, the person who had obtained the star title could directly have the corresponding attribute buff, and the recipient must be a spiritual link contractor or a firm believer whose belief level met the requirements.

Among them, the star buff of Star Servant was the A+ spirit power with the [Concentration] feature which would speed up the magic casting and the spirit power recovery. Coupled with the existence of the S-level plant, Snow Dallet, he could reduce the star position requirement by 30 and increase the effect by 30%.

Chen Rui entered the Star Conferring Platform of the Super System without hesitation and initiated the star conferring with his mind. The system prompted: After the star conferment, it consumes 1 faith crystal every day. It takes 3 days to cancel the original star conferment, and re-appointed can only be made after 1 month.

Do you want to spend 1,500 faith crystals to confer the star position of Star Servant to Dodo in the master-servant link?

Chen Rui immediately confirmed the conferment. Je immediately felt a strange connection in his spirit. It seemed that his spirit power had also been strengthened in some way. In the spiritual link, Dodo’s name suddenly had a blue title of Star Servant. Remarks: Spirit buff A+, [Concentration] attribute. Gains additional 30% buff30. Consumes 1 faith crystal every day.

The spirit power of A+ was nothing to an S++ level, but when the strengths of both sides were extremely close, it was likely to be the last straw that broke the camel’s back. No doubt, the 2 sides were back on the same starting line. Not only that, the [Light and Dark Kingdom]’s weakening was also bringing him down. Finally, Rodriguez couldn’t hold on as the light of his pupils dimmed.

Chen Rui made use of the chance, “Dodo, as long as you take out the 2 original fragments, I will give you 20 bottles of superb aromatic millet wine! 20 catties of 5-spice barbecue! 20 boxes of cream cakes! 20 boxes of jelly pudding!”

These were the slime’s favorites. Every time he said a type of food, the constantly changing body trembled. Then, the body desperately protrudes out of a tentacle-like object which barely transformed into a palm. 3 trembling fingers were raised.

30 each?

Chen Rui wiped the cold sweat on his forehead, “Deal!”

As soon as he agreed, the slime’s body immediately squirmed violently. Accompanied by Rodriguez’s infuriated roar, the cracks in the moon in the sky gradually spread and finally exploded. It turned into a black light that fell on the ground and recovered into a human form. It was the Dark Elemental King Hegel.

Hegel’s breath was extremely weak, yet his eyes still looked spirited. He had obviously gotten rid of Rodriguez’s control. The Dark Elemental King didn’t rest or recover, and he turned into a black cloud, supporting the 2 rays of light of Lambost and Moore.

Rodriguez’s infuriated roar had turned into a tragic scream as the [Light and Dark Kingdom] began to distort and flicker. When Auglas shouted, the 3 Elemental Kings exerted their power at the same time, and the whole [Light and Dark Kingdom] was shattered into pieces which turned into nothingness and disappeared without a trace.

The 2 colors of gold and silver in Dodo’s pupils had completely faded, and it had returned to the shape of an onion. Each of its hands was holding a shiny object, 1 black and 1 white.

A cluster of crystal mist emerged from Dodo’s body; it was Rodriguez’s remnant soul.

Now that the [Light and Dark Kingdom] collapsed and the origin fragment was seized, this remnant soul was at the brink of collapse.

“Unbelievable, I actually lost to 20 catties…”

Before he finished speaking, the mist gradually solidified, turning into a crystal clear bead that fell on the ground. He completely lost his vitality. The Pseudo-God powerhouse, the holy dragon, who shocked the human world, was finally annihilated completely in unwillingness.

“It’s 30!” Master Dodo held the 2 element origin fragments tightly while panting, sternly correcting the holy dragon’s last mistake.

chapters.title: Chapter 721: Unknown Secret
chapters.body:
Chapter 721: Unknown Secret

Chapter 721: Unknown Secret

In the wavy Black Sea, no sea creature dared to approach this area because a huge figure was roaring. The dark red tentacles slammed the sea, splashing the waves to the sky. If there were observant people, they should be able to find out that this roar was full of joy - a cheer of freedom.

On the Hidden Misty Island, Adeline was stunned slightly as a faint gleam appeared in her dim pupils, sliding down her cheeks. Helen on the side was taken aback.

“What’s wrong? Adeline?”

“Hope.” The naga girl shed tears and showed a blissful smile, “I really saw it with the eyes in my heart.”

At the moment when the holy dragon turned into a crystal bead, not only the distant sea area, but the entire Land of Hatred also changed. The Tower of Glory’s radiance was brilliant. Within the scope of the radiance, the surface of the solidified gold and silver ‘statues’ quickly melted as they regained vitality.

The resentful souls felt that the most terrifying thing oppressing their souls had disappeared. Meanwhile, the awakened Strena and elementals looked at the shining ‘Tower of Destruction’ in surprise.

In the Tower of Glory, the exhausted slime snored contentedly while holding the space ring given by the master which was naturally 30 of each ‘good stuff’. Chen Rui wiped the sweat from his forehead again as he understood the holy dragon’s unwillingness before he died. The Pseudo-God powerhouse did not fall into the hands of the archangels or the former Dragon Emperor, but he was annihilated because of a foodie.

“Pseudo God’s Dragon Power Essence.”

Auglas walked over and looked at the crystal beads in Chen Rui’s hand with a little surprise. Not every giant dragon’s soul would condense into the Dragon Power Essence when their souls were annihilated. The Dragon Power Essence in Chen Rui’s hand was not only completely pure, but it also contained a Pseudo-God’s huge strength.

“The strength of this Dragon Power Essence is extremely powerful. With it, your castle of the ancient alchemy civilization should be completely restored.” Auglas slightly pondered, “But can I have it?”

“Of course.” Chen Rui handed the Dragon Power Essence to Auglas without hesitation. If it wasn’t for the old father-in-law to contend in the [Light and Dark Kingdom], even if he and the 3 kings joined forces, it would be impossible to defeat the mutated Rodriguez, so it was reasonable to give this trophy to the old father-in-law.

“You really didn’t notice the strength contained in this Dragon Power Essence? If I tell you that it can even allow you to directly enter the kingdom level… Would you still give it to me so quickly?” Auglas did not continue immediately as he was taking a deep look at Chen Rui.

“It seems too late to regret now.” Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “With the strength of Sir Auglas, I have no room for resistance if you want to get it from my hands. Can this be regarded as a little… test for me?”

“I can barely consider that you have passed.” The old father-in-law snorted, but he was beyond satisfied. Sir Dark Dragon Emperor saw it clearly. Just now when he said that the Dragon Power Essence could directly make Chen Rui advance to the kingdom level, Chen Rui didn’t even move his hand, and his emotions didn’t fluctuate much. It was indeed sincere.

“This Dragon Power Essence can make up for the damage to my soul in the past, and the success rate of breaking through to Pseudo-God will also increase a lot. No matter what, Olypheus will be handed over to you in the future. Don’t let me down.”

“Got it.” Chen Rui scratched his head, “Actually, I have my own strength training method. The Dragon Power Essence is of little significance to me. As for the castle of the alchemy civilization, I look forward to the follow-up transaction with Dragon Island. “

The advancement of the Super System was different from ordinary trainers, and the accumulation of ‘quantity’ alone couldn’t truly achieve the breakthrough of Blue Pole Star Level, so Chen Rui was telling the truth, but the old father-in-law didn’t know this. His good impression of the human son-in-law doubled. He nodded and took over the Dragon Power Essence.

Auglas closed his eyes and used some method to turn the Dragon Power Essence into liquid which blended into his palm. The brilliance in the Tower of Glory space began to gradually change.

Chen Rui did not disturb Auglas. He walked toward the 3 Elemental Kings who just exhausted a lot of power, especially the Dark Elemental King Hegel. He combined with Lambost and Moore to launch a counterattack against the [Light and Dark Kingdom] before his injury strength was restored; it was an injury on top of injury.

Hegel’s condition was not very ideal. Lambost and Moore were using the origin power to help Hegel stabilize the injury. At this time, a hand stretched out and a black diamond-shaped crystal was lying quietly inside.

“Dark origin fragment!” Hegel’s eyes narrowed slightly as his red pupils glowed strangely.

“It’s yours, just as we agreed.”

Hegel ventured into the Black Sea area in order to get the origin fragment. Naturally, he would not be courteous. When the diamond-shaped crystal entered Hegel’s hands, it suddenly turned into an armband and appeared on his left arm.

After getting the origin fragment he dreamed of, Hegel couldn’t hide his joy, but he still remembered the original exchange terms, “With the Nightmare Band, my injury is no longer a big deal. We can leave as soon as possible to save your friend.”

Chen Rui shook his head, “Something unexpected happened in this matter, uh… Your Highness needs not to take action anymore.”

Moore on the side was taken aback as he thought that Isabella had been met by accident, “Could it be…”

Seeing Chen Rui’s relaxed look, Earth Elemental King realized that he had guessed wrongly and smiled.

Hegel frowned. The exchange between the 2 was that he would help Chen Rui’s friend dispel the light element seal. Now the dark origin fragment had been obtained with the help of the other party, but he had lost the bargaining chip that he could pay.

He also owed Chen Rui 1 more favor as he was able to get out of trouble this time.

“Aguile.” Hegel pondered for a moment and then said, “The grudge between the dark elementals and you is cleared from now on. I can also give you the dark source power. Of course, compared with what I have obtained, these are not equivalent. I know you have many secrets, including the supreme… En, the Demon Realm’s 7 artifacts, your identity, your physique… and many more. I can guarantee that under no circumstances will any secrets about you be revealed, and I will promise to help you do 1 thing.”

“Thank you so much, Your Highness.” Chen Rui hesitated, “In fact, between us…”

The Dark Elemental King seemed to predict what he was going to say, “The dark elementals are clear between grace and grudges. I said before that we will not be friends, but I also don’t want to be your enemies. I have a piece of advice. Before you fully integrate all 7 artifacts, don’t disclose this to anyone else. Otherwise, you are likely to encounter an unimaginable horrible disaster.”

A blue light flowed in the Water Elemental King’s eyes, “Hegel, you mean he can integrate…”

Hegel said sternly, “Don’t play tricks. Although you and Moore are focused on fighting against the kingdom just now, you should have seen something. I believe you have already guessed in your mind.”

Lambost smiled indifferently. “So my guess is right? Moore, have you known about this a long time ago?”

“Before you guys.” Moore nodded, “However, the situation was a bit special at the time.”

Moore’s words were a bit vague. He witnessed the process of Chen Rui eliminating Glorfin and being ‘possessed’ by the God-Eating Mask at Mountain Xilang back then. He once thought that Chen Rui was from the Beelzebub Royal Family. As for the later Demon Shield and the Sword of Fallen Angel, he was really unaware of it.

“Well, then I will also promise to keep this secret for you.” Lambost solemnly made a promise and smiled again, “Besides that, I will give you some blue star heavy water. Don’t doubt the wisdom of water elementals. Although you didn’t mention this condition to me on the ship, I can see that you need it. Consider this as a gift of friendship from the water elementals. I’m not like the stubborn dark elementals. Plus, it is worthwhile to have a friend like you.”

Hegel scoffed and didn’t speak.

“Thank you very much then.” Chen Rui was overjoyed and his mind suddenly moved, “What will happen if I can integrate all 7 artifacts?”

The 3 Elemental Kings were silent at the same time. After a while, Moore spoke up, “It may be the end of everything or it may be a new beginning… We can’t tell you more about this matter. If you really have the destiny to shoulder something, then naturally you will understand everything at that time.”

“It seems that there are too many secrets that I don’t know, including… Elemental War?” Chen Rui asked rhetorically, “I would like to ask, if I want to exchange something with the Light Origin Fragment from the Light Elemental King, will it affect the Elemental War?”

Moore knew about Zola’s [6 Elements Territory Kingdom], and he suddenly realized something, “You want to exchange the light source power?”

“2 items. The light source power and the wind source power. With these 2, plus the dark source power given by Your Highness Hegel, the 6 element source powers will be complete.”

Both Lambost and Hegel were very experienced people. They immediately reacted and asked in unison, “Moore, who is attempting the [6 Elements Kingdom]?”

“Probably the most talented magician I have ever seen.” Moore glanced at Chen Rui, “She is also his wife. If you can get the 6 element source powers, maybe… I mean, ‘maybe’ she can really succeed or even go further. “

Lambost seemed to be doing some communication as he glanced at Hegel. He revealed a mysterious smile, “If you hand over the origin fragment to the Light Elemental King, perhaps it will cause us to be defeated in the next Elemental War, perhaps 1 out of the 3 of us will die because of this. However, we will not stop you from handing over the light origin fragment to the Light Elemental King. I will not disclose the specific reason, just like you have countless secrets that are inconvenient to disclose to us. If possible, I hope that every piece of origin fragment will be returned to the respective Elemental King. This is not only my hope, but also the hope of the 6 Elemental Kings and all elementals. At that time, perhaps the real end and beginning will come…”

Chen Rui was savoring the meaning of these words when the surrounding space began to shake violently. In the blink of an eye, everyone had appeared in the Land of Hatred outside the tower. The ‘Tower of Destruction’ changed to a palm-sized golden pagoda that fell into Auglas’ hands.

“This is for you. It depends on your ability to use it.” Auglas threw the little golden pagoda to Chen Rui. Before Chen Rui had time to see more, his ears were already flooded by the huge sound of the sea. It was the cheers from the resentful souls, nagas, and elementals.

chapters.title: Chapter 722: Your Snow Dallet
chapters.body:
Chapter 722: Your Snow Dallet

Chapter 722: Your Snow Dallet

A few days later, at the Thunder Snake Archipelago.

Strena silently watched the sailing ship drift away, and the purple moonlight stretched the lonely shadow.

On the ship, there was her closest sister and… that man. They would go to a place far away from the Thunder Snake Archipelago and away from the Dead Sea. She didn’t know when she would be able to see them again.

That man, who had saved her and her sister in the hands of the Black Sea God, miraculously defeated a series of enemies including the Dark Dragon Emperor who was close to God level.

He had released countless resentful souls of the Dead Sea including hundreds of millions of naga heroes from endless sorrow and pain, but he seemed to have forgotten her promise to ‘agree to any of your requests’ when she pleaded for him to do so.

After the Dark Dragon Emperor was annihilated, not only did the abnormal power that induced creatures in the sea area to kill each other disappeared, but even the mysterious strength that had always plagued the survival of all creatures in the sea area no longer existed. This was equivalent to saving all the sea tribes including the nagas and sirens.

The man only took away the phantom coral which had lost its value, and of course, Adeline who voluntarily followed him.

Strena actually envied Adeline. In some ways, Adeline was more courageous than her elder sister.

“Regret it?”

Queen Naga Modesty’s voice sounded from behind. Strena frowned and snorted while she still stared at the Devil’s Snare Ship which had turned into a small black spot in the distance.

As a mother, Modesty seemed to be deliberately trying to uncover the scars in her daughter’s mind, “Regret not leaving with Adeline? You seem to have made some wrong choices because of cowardice. You may still catch up now. Would you like me to give you a ship?”

Strena’s red eyes suddenly shot sharp qi, and there were 6 scimitars in her hand, “Let my scimitar tell you if my choice is wrong.”

“I will see it as a challenge for the position of patriarch.” Modesty sneered playfully, and she slowly took out the scimitars. This time it was not 2, but 6 scimitars, “I heard that you learned the whole profound meaning [6 Scimitars Break] in the Land of Hatred. Let me see how much you have improved.”

In the moonlight, the crisp sound of blade clashes seemed to be sending off the distant ship.

On the Devil’s Snare Ship, Adeline, who had left her mother and sister, laid in Helen’s arms and wept bitterly. The little mermaid princess also shed a lot of tears. She stared fiercely at the ‘culprit’, Chen Rui, with her red eyes.

Chen Rui faced the little mermaid’s glare innocently. It was Adeline’s own request to follow him. Now it seemed that he was kidnapping the civil girl. Out of helplessness, he had to force himself to step forward and comfort her, “Don’t cry, Adeline. I have good news to tell you, Sir Auglas just gave me a precious treasure called Spiritual Mind Eyes, a derivative of [Dragon God Eyes] that can make your eyes see the light again.”

Adeline was taken aback. There were already 2 cold beads with a hint of refreshing power in her hand.

“When you have calmed down later, drip your blood on it and put it in front of your eyes. They will turn into liquid in your eyes to restore your vision. In addition, the [Royal Divine Eyes] also has a special strength, but to activate it, you need great spirit power. You already have a part of the mirage’s illusion power, so your spirit power level has reached the Demon Overlord level, but you are still an amateur. It is incomparable with the real Demon Overlord. You must pay attention to training in this direction in order to see things with the Spiritual Mind Eyes freely.”

“Thank you Sir Aguile!” Adeline was pleasantly surprised as she held the 2 beads tightly. Then, she bowed to the direction of Auglas in her spirit sensing, “Thank you, Sir Auglas.”

“En.” Auglas nodded to the naga girl, but he glanced sideways at the son-in-law, making Chen Rui a little depressed.

But speaking of it, the old father-in-law really treated him quite well. Take the ‘Tower of Glory’ as an example, after the old father-in-law worked hard to completely cancel the imprint left by Rodriguez, he just directly threw it to him.

There were actually a lot of Rodriguez’s treasures in this space treasure. Unfortunately, 80% of these treasures had been ‘confiscated’ by Auglas. The old father-in-law solemnly stated that the remaining 20% would be divided equally between his daughter and son-in-law.

With the dragons’ ‘financial management talent’, it was already very, very, very generous to leave 20%. This was even on the consideration of Chen Rui’s outstanding performance during this period. Otherwise, probably his half would be lost.

Apart from those treasures, the Tower of Glory itself was an extremely precious treasure. This was a real and rare space artifact which Chen Rui’s pseudo-artifacts could not compare to. The holy dragon Rodriguez used it to escape the pursuit of the 3 archangels, Raphael. With Chen Rui’s current Demon Overlord level strength, it was actually very difficult to master this artifact, but he had the golden finger Super System. Currently, Tower of Glory was being ‘cracked’ by the [Deep Analysis]. Despite the slow progress, success should only be a matter of time.

Chen Rui’s harvest was very abundant. In addition to the Tower of Glory and the treasures, he also obtained the dark source power that Zola needed, a large amount of blue star heavy water and phantom coral that the ancient alchemy civilization needed. He also resolved the grudge between the dark elementals and gained the favor of the water elementals.

Due to Rodriguez’s ‘possession’, Dodo’s strength soared to S++, so he became the character with the highest level of strength. After returning, Master Roman’s status would probably be at the bottom.

When Rodriguez was annihilated, the contract pillar that bound Octopus King Red Pipit in the Tower of Glory disappeared. Chen Rui found the spirit crystal ball of Red Pipit from the treasure and gave it to the Octopus King when he returned to the Black Sea.

Without this crystal ball, the soul of Octopus King would not be complete and his strength would be stagnant for the rest of his life. Rodriguez used this method to confine him. He was exhilarated that he got the spirit crystal ball now.

It was worth mentioning that Chen Rui first canceled the equality contract link with Octopus King, and then took out the spirit crystal ball. This situation shocked the Red Pipit. He is just a small ‘Demon Overlord’, yet he can directly ‘tear’ the contract with me who is about to reach Demi-God powerhouse. It seems that this person’s origin and potential are deep and unpredictable.

Chen Rui’s approach was obvious, it was to sell favors. Since he wanted to sell, he naturally would sell it openly. The Red Pipit knew this very well. Even without the terrifying dragon powerhouse, Octopus King was also very grateful to Chen Rui who gave him freedom and promised to go to the Fallen Angel Empire after restoring the soul power to thank him.

Dark Moon Estate.

A quiet courtyard.

The copper kettle on the magic stove whistled because of the boiling water inside. A white jade-like hand lifted the copper kettle, cleaning the delicate tea set placed on a small bamboo table. Her movements were elegant and skillful.

She put the green tea leaves in a small purple pot, washed them with boiling water, and strained them. After adding water to soak the leaves, a fragrance gradually diffused.

There were 2 tea cups on the low table. The woman poured the tea in the purple pot into the 2 tea cups respectively, and she looked at the empty seat opposite as if there was a person she had been waiting for.

Somehow, this kind of waiting has become a habit.

Even when life was closest to death, this habit remained the same, or in other words, it was a kind of hope.

A hope that supported her to keep waiting.

After a long time, the woman picked up the tea cup and took a sip with faint longing in her gem-like emerald eyes.

“The tea doesn’t taste good when it’s cold.”

A voice sounded, and the teacup in the woman’s hand trembled suddenly. A few drops of tea spilled out, then she regained her composure again, but the thoughts in the emerald eyes had turned into infinite joy. Nevertheless, her voice seemed quite indifferent, “When did you come back?”

“Just now.”

“Really? So, they are willing to let you come to me?”

“To be precise, I came back secretly using a certain spatial ability because… your previous threat was very effective.”

A smile appeared behind the woman’s veil when the word ‘threat’ was mentioned, and her squinted eyes looked like 2 beautiful crescent moons.

——After returning from this trip to the Dead Sea, I must be the first woman you touch. Otherwise, I will marry Auglas and let you call me ‘mommy’ like Olypheus!

She herself had to admit that this threat was too poisonous.

She was the Devil’s Snare Flower after all.

A poisonous flower publicly recognized by the Fallen Angel Empire.

“Sit down.”

She stood up, poured out the cold tea in the teacup, and started boiling the water again.

“The matter is finally resolved?”

“En.”

“You haven’t finished talking about the human world last time, go ahead…”

“Okay…”

The woman poured tea while listening casually. In fact, she was a little absent-minded. For the first time, when listening to him, her thoughts drifted away.

Before meeting him, she held great authority, and was admired by countless young talents. She easily played the empire in her hands with intelligence, but she had nothing except hatred and disgust.

After meeting him, especially after being resurrected by him, although she was reborn, she still couldn’t face the pain in her heart and just waited quietly for her death. There was never any hope, just like an incomplete person.

Until now, she was a complete woman.

By the way, not yet.

But soon.

Her face was suddenly red as she glanced at him secretly, only to find that he was also looking at her.

At this moment, her heart that has always been indifferent and calm jumped quickly, intertwined with tension and anticipation.
