Next, the specific process seemed very blur in her mind. Was it he came to her or she took the initiative to come to him. It just felt that everything was progressing very naturally. Just like him carrying her toward the room now.

This time, it was definitely not superficial.

As she saw the bed, she knew what was going to happen. Her cheeks were red, but she did not evade his eyes with the tears of happiness dripping from her eyes.

Finally there is such a person. I no longer need to conceal everything in front of him.

The past had become the past.

In the future, the beauty and poison of Devil’s Snare would still bloom in the world.

However, in front of this man, she would always be a Snow Dallet.

Your Snow Dallet.

No regrets in life or death.

chapters.title: Chapter 723: 2 Plans
chapters.body:
Chapter 723: 2 Plans

Chapter 723: 2 Plans

Chen Rui’s current mood could be described as ‘feeling refreshed because of a joyful occasion.

As he wished, Isabella became his woman.

What surprised Chen Rui was that he was actually Isabella’s first man.

He knew that Isabella was deceived back then. The damn guy from the human world schemed the Breeze Shadow Boots, but he dismissed Isabella’s dedication. However, it had been more than 100 years since that incident happened.

In the past 100 years, as a well-known socialite in the Fallen Angel Capital, it was said that countless men fell for the ‘Devil’s Snare Flower’, Isabella, but she had remained chaste. Of course, there was the past trauma that caused Madam Aunt to hate men, but it was ultimately due to her character of keeping herself clean.

Underneath the seemingly poisonous Devil’s Snare, it was the fragrance of the Snow Dallet.

This made Chen Rui cherish Isabella a little more, but he inevitably had a bit of vanity in his mind. In the next few days, Isabella completely let go of the line of defense for this man whom she devoted wholeheartedly, unreservedly dedicating everything including some special services which were indescribable for outsiders.

With the arrival of Earth Elemental King, Adeline and Helen, the gluey world of the 2 finally came to an end. As for the old father-in-law… the Pseudo-God level Dragon Power Essence needed to be digested as soon as possible with a special ritual. In order to prevent the precious strength from losing, Auglas immediately returned to the Dragon Island.

To be precise, Dragon Island was also within the large area of ??the Dead Sea, which belonged to the deep sea area in the extreme east. It was completely in a different direction from this sea area, and the distance was extremely far away. With the help of the Water Elemental King, a special teleporting ability of the Deep Blue Palace was used to send Auglas to a closer area.

Due to the departure of the old father-in-law, someone only dared to use the [Star Gate] to return to the Dark Moon to have some intimate time with Madam Aunt in advance.

Knowing that Chen Rui ‘brought’ back the 2 sisters, there was another commotion in the crystal harem. Chen Rui barely explained that the little mermaid princess was appointed by Auglas to help Olypheus recover, and she was also quite beneficial for ordinary training. As for the naga girl… she was a younger sister worthy of sympathy.

This statement inevitably aroused the suspicion of several harems. However, after contact with the 2 girls, they generally believed that the most suspicious Adeline was far less ‘dangerous’ than that of the charming and alluring siren princess. The naga girl’s current inability to see (yet to recover), as well as the twists and turns of her growth experience, had also aroused the sympathy of Athena and others. The little succubus maid came up with a bad idea to ask Adeline to recognize Chen Rui as her elder brother, and several ‘sisters-in-laws’ would take care of her. This idea was unanimously approved.

The sibling relationship made the naga girl uncertain in terms of gain and loss, but she finally integrated into the family smoothly. She had never experienced that kind of warmth brought by the small group before. In addition, she had a weak and humble temperament which was very easy to get along with. Everyone liked her very much. The smile on the girl’s face also began to appear more frequently.

In the eyes of the little mermaid princess, although Aguile’s ‘conveniently’ saved the fate of the sea creature tribe including the siren tribe while looking for the treasure of the Dark Dragon Emperor, he couldn’t conceal his despicable acts of abduction and coercion.

Birds of a feather flock together. His friends are not good either. In this kind of biased eyes, the bragging Master Poison Dragon, the lustful nephew, the lazy and gluttonous slime… the shortcomings of these guys were unlimitedly magnified. Therefore, the little mermaid princess had no good impression of them at the slightest, so her words were straightforward. This attitude greatly reduced the inner hostility of the female family members. After getting along, Helen became good friends with Athena, Delia, and Krobelus.

When the little mermaid princess was chatting, it was inevitable to have mocking remarks like ‘you fresh flowers are stuck with an ant’ and the girls laughed it off.

The proudest of all was Master Dodo who became powerful overnight, turning from a pathetic loser to Mr. Perfect. Except for Zola, his strength was even slightly higher than Paglio who received the guidance of Auglas.

The slime was still respectful and flattering to the master and madams who controlled his own life and death. He was also honest to madams’ friends, Delia and Krobelus, but he was not courteous to the poison dragon and Roman who had been stepping on him before. It was a pity that combat power and strength were 2 different things, especially the slime’s courage and will have not undergone a corresponding qualitative change. In a ‘friendly battle’ with Paglio, he was scared off by the opponent’s overwhelming momentum. Master Poison Dragon barely defended his status in the end.

Roman also wanted to imitate the poison dragon, but he knew that the strength gap was too big. If the imitation failed, he might fail in his motive and be trampled by Dodo. Since then, his position would fall to the bottom in the house. Under this circumstance, the poison dragon and Roman began to train hard uncharacteristically. Roman actually broke through to the Demon Overlord level, and Paglio also had a trend of kingdomized. From another perspective, Master Dodo contributed a lot.

Except for the secret incident of returning to the Dark Moon to have an intimate moment in advance, the relationship between Chen Rui and Isabella was no longer a secret. Although it was known that Madam Aunt would become Boss Chen’s woman sooner or later, when she really came into the picture, it caused a small earthquake and the crystal harem cracked a few tiles.

It was worth mentioning that Madam Aunt was very sensible. She still lived in the secluded yard and did not move into this ‘group dormitory’. She occasionally came for small gatherings and was also dressed in a veil. Her words and deeds were low-key, and she got along with all the girls and women… At least, the crystal harem still seemed harmonious on the surface. As for secretly… events such as squeezing, blood sacrifice, hatchet, and chainsaw were unknown.

Because of this incident, a certain nephew was always in an inferior position when he saw the leader who was blazing with power. What to do? Who expected the jokes back then to come true? He really became Sir Uncle. In short, Master Roman had been really unlucky lately.

The Fallen Angel Empire palace.

“You seem to be having a leisurely time lately?”

“I’m not leisurely anymore.” Chen Rui heard the questioning meaning in Her Majesty Empress’ words and sneered. This month, he was really not leisurely. Auglas sent Daniel to the Dark Moon to be responsible for the transaction of the Dragon Power Essence with Chen Rui. The exchange items were black potions and devil fruits. Daniel was the blue dragon that was crushed by Zola in the decisive battle of Obsidian, Paglio’s old acquaintance, and the husband of Julia, the black dragon who stayed at the Dark Moon.

Daniel was surprised when he saw Chen Rui being able to produce so many devil fruits and black potions. When Ms. Fairy Dragon looked docile and pleasant next to Chen Rui, the Blue Dragon’s surprise turned into worship. He is worthy of being the Royal Highness Dark Dragon Emperor’s son-in-law! He can only be described as formidable!

Ms. Fairy Dragon had been in a very good mood recently. With the help of the Dragon Power Essence given by Auglas, the foundation of the Kingdom of Elements had been successfully constructed. All that was left was to understand the original power of various elements. Originally, it would take a long time and great danger to comprehend any kind of element origin, but now there were 4 kinds of element source power, so it was surprisingly smooth. That man also guaranteed to get the remaining light element source power and wind element source power. Once the 6 types were collected and a complete [6 Elements Kingdom] was cultivated, not only was it difficult to find an opponent at the kingdom level, she might have the power to fight with Demi-God.

With the Dragon Power Essence brought by Daniel, plus the blue star heavy water and phantom coral from the Dead Sea, the 3 types of armies of crystal beast, assemble puppet and giant crystal beast in the stronghold the ‘City of Stars’ of the ancient alchemy had begun its production. The number of lamp spirits was also continuously increasing. However, the stronghold of the City of Stars currently had a control limit that could accommodate up to 20,000 gremlin servants, 10,000 crystal beasts, 5,000 lamp spirits, 1,000 assemble puppets, and 100 giant crystal beasts.

The giant crystal beast was comparable to the existence of Demon Overlord. If he could produce 100 of them, then the high-end combat power alone should already be the strongest existence of the Demon Realm.

Although Chen Rui did not travel around during this period, he was really not leisurely because of the City of Stars matter, Tetenis’ supervision on the alchemy training… um, the most important thing to add was the night ‘self-sacrifices’ in order to coordinate the crystal harem.

If his current harem deeds were to be thrown into the circle of otaku in his previous life, it would be absolutely eye-catching… Uh, with the existence of the target, his portrait would be made into a strawman by countless jealous men, cursed day and night with nails and arrows. Even if he turned into flying ash, he would also get a lot of grievance couplets like ‘Having a harem must die’.

== “Really? So, you have worked hard.” Her Majesty Empress could guess the most important matter even with her eyes closed. The envy in this sentence was self-evident.

Someone replied without blushing, “It’s not hard to work for Her Majesty Empress.”

This sentence made Shea angry. You think I don’t know who you are ‘working hard’ with? Let alone Athena, Kia and Zola, even the ‘bridesmaid’ actually took the lead.

Her Majesty Empress suddenly regretted keeping this guy’s appetite for a while. If I had known earlier, I would ‘give’ it to him at the Dark Moon… but she definitely couldn’t say this.

Chen Rui looked at the unkind expression of Her Majesty Empress and quickly said, “I’m actually planning 2 major events recently. I wonder if Your Majesty Empress is interested in listening?”

Shea’s attention no doubt was diverted. After listening to these 2 events, she revealed a shocked expression, “Are you sure that the Mechanical Association of the Fallen Angel Empire can have the reputation comparable to the other 2 empires?”

“Of course I’m sure.” Chen Rui nodded firmly, and suddenly he grinned, “Such a meritorious minister, should Your Majesty reward me well?”

Shea saw this guy’s gaze sweeping toward the open neckline on her chest, and her face was slightly hot, but she sneered coldly, “Don’t you still have a big event? I will reward you with taking Alice to participate. Recently, she has been pestering me to look for you every day. I heard that there seems to be an agreement between her and someone?”

Chen Rui’s smile froze. He didn’t expect that the 3-year appointment he used to coax the little loli with was known by Shea, and he couldn’t help but feel guilty.

“Hmph!” Her Majesty Empress scowled, “Don’t quibble. Accompany Alice well this time. Remember, don’t have extra thoughts! Also, after these 2 matters are done, we should also prepare for our marriage. Remember, the bridesmaid must be there. Tell her that I hope she can play a song at the wedding, um… I don’t mind even the song ‘The End of the World’, just like some things are the same.”

Seeing the hatchet-like light in Her Majesty Empress’s purple eyes, the sir quasi-prince consort shuddered.

Really don’t mind?

chapters.title: Chapter 724: Things That Change The World
chapters.body:
Chapter 724: Things That Change The World

Chapter 724: Things that Change the World

Green.

Everywhere was in green hue, but the air was filled with the hot breath that should belong to the flaming red. The misty and bubbling mud swamp was like molten slurry, carrying the terrifying heat that distorted the line of sight.

Roman walked casually in this terrifying misty swamp with a sword in his hand.

The seemingly slothful posture and unhurried speed were the best conditions for adjusting body functions to respond to emergencies.

His leather armor was already in tatters, and his body was full of wounds, especially the terrifying scars on his chest and abdomen. It looked like a terrifying beast’s paw almost cut it open. Roman’s breathing was a bit disordered while the hand holding the sword was still steady.

All of a sudden, several terrifying tall figures popped out of the fiery mud and pounced toward Roman in a roar.

Roman flicked the 2 swords and slashed toward those figures. The pale blue sword light struck out several lightning in the air.

After the slash, Roman had more wounds on his body, and he still moved forward unhurriedly in a tired look. The air was still hot, but the ferocious figures behind him suddenly turned into countless fragments and disappeared without a trace.

White.

White could be understood to be pure and flawless, but when this piece of white filled the whole mind, it had nothing to do with purity.

Delia was in this situation now - her mind was blank. She lost consciousness repeatedly, and she only recovered after a long while. She felt dizzy, stuffy and nauseous. This was not the first time she felt this way.

As soon as she was awake, she found herself in a rocky cliff. Her body was rushing toward a hard mountain wall, and she was about to be crushed into pieces. A strange light appeared in Delia’s right eye, and a strange air flow broke out around her body. She barely flew away from the mountain wall.

As she surged to the sky, another warning sign appeared in her sight. Delia hurriedly turned around. Numerous red lights blasted past her shoulders. Delia, who had lost her balance, lifted her hand. A huge object was launched forward, accurately bombarding the source of the light. With a ‘boom’, dazzling fire sparks burst out.

Despite that, she still couldn’t avoid 1 red light. Delia’s vision and body kept vibrating, and her reaction was extremely fast. She kicked the mountain wall and bounced toward the source of the attack. This was a metal ball that was more than 1 meter high, suspended in the air. It had black tubes on all sides.

Delia’s ‘fists’ attacked like a storm, and the metal ball was blown out in an instant. Although she eliminated the opponent, the feeling of ‘blankness’ reappeared during high-speed movement which made her feel annoyed for a while. This discomfort was obviously shorter than the last time. After barely regaining her spirit, Delia controlled her ‘body’ and continued to fly forward.

Black.

Although this world was colorful, Alice saw black in her eyes. This was the color of the black crystal coins. The black crystal coins entered the little loli’s ‘space cashbox’ like flowing water. Watching the number of the cashbox kept rising, the little loli smiled cheerfully.

This was her shop, a restaurant. Although it was not very big, the customers still came and went in an endless stream under her diligent management.

As the shopkeeper, she had several staff with different characteristics. Some were proficient in cooking, some were good at service, and some were good at cleaning… She allocated suitable positions for them. These staff were not perfect, but with the increase of work experience, their ‘level’ would also rise. Every once in a while, someone would come to apply for job. If she was lucky, she could hire some talents with special skills or very high potential.

Customers were not easy to deal with either. Although there were suitable staff, mistakes were always inevitable, and the needs of customers varied. If she observed carefully, there would be unexpected gains. For example, she once helped an old grandmother to find a missing item, and she got a new secret recipe of ‘West Lake Sour Fish’. After the chef became proficient in this dish, many more guests came here, and the turnover skyrocketed. Of course, this kind of adventure was not absolute. The beggar whom she helped last month stole 20 black crystal coins from her.

The accountant came to report, “Shopkeeper, our pork bellies and spices are all out of stock. It’s all Wang San’s fault. He forgot to stock up after getting drunk.”

“Ask Wang San to buy them right away, even if it is 10 times higher than the purchase price!” The little loli promptly ordered while secretly thinking, Wang San’s ‘arithmetic’ expertise is very useful, and he can bargain a very low purchase price, but it is too easy to make mistakes with his ‘wine abuse’. This is not the first time such a thing happened this month. When new recruits apply next month, I must change to a new purchaser.

The little loli’s eyes gradually became solemn. It is almost the end of the month. The business volume of 30,000 black crystal coins must be completed. Otherwise, all the previous efforts will be in vain!

In the hot mud, the monsters’ figures continued to be annihilated, Roman’s swords were still swinging, but they were far less agile than before. A burly figure in front gradually became clear. This was a man with red eyes and a greatsword in his hand.

Roman showed a highly vigilant expression. He already sensed that the extremely dangerous breath exuded from this man was far greater than the previous monsters. Before he could react, the man appeared before him in a blink and slashed.

This slash was simple and pure.

Can’t take it! Roman instinctively felt a chill in his heart. He moved hundreds of meters away at an incredible speed. It was the bloodline talent of the Belphegor Royal Family, [Flash]. A golden light appeared in his left eye and shot toward the man. .

The man didn’t even look at the golden light, and the momentum of the sword remained unabated as if nothing could stop this simple and pure movement.

Hundreds of meters away, Roman’s body suddenly became 2 pieces.

Although he used [Flash] to avoid this sword on the surface, he did not avoid the rule contained in this sword.

So, Roman died.

Delia was also worn out. In her sight, various ‘components’ were about to collapse. Her spirit power exhaustion was quite serious, and even [The Eye of Incubus] couldn’t keep up the loss of spirit power.

After barely dodging the slash of the metal enemy behind, she was hit by the silver light from the front. Under the cold death ray, her entire body began to freeze and the enemy behind took the opportunity to split her apart with an axe.

“Damn!” Roman opened his eyes and took off the metal helmet covering his head, “This so-called boss is too psycho. What’s even worse is that he is a man. I’m really unwilling to die in the hands of a man… Leader should design a sexy beauty like the kind of beauty with a whip…”

“Haha!” The little loli’s excited cheer sounded, “I passed the level! Chen Restaurant’s 1 star missions are all completed! Is there any more below?”

“Hmph! With that guy’s morals, he certainly doesn’t have that below.”

The little loli took off her helmet and asked curiously, “What does it mean by no below? I don’t understand.”

“No below means…” Roman grinned. Before he finished speaking, he suddenly felt the thorns on his back. He turned his head and saw that Delia was looking at him calmly not far away. This guy was sweating coldly, and he immediately changed his words, “It means that’s it, there may be no more levels.”

“What are all of you talking about?” Chen Rui walked into the room.

“Brother!” The little loli immediately jumped over and held his arm affectionately, then she suddenly glared at Roman, “Brother, this bad Roman just cursed that you are not a man.”

Master Roman on the side burst into tears: Ms. Little Princess! I thought you didn’t understand?

“He is obviously jealous. We should be sympathetic to this kind of person.” Chen Rui patted the little loli’s head and coughed to Roman, “Little Roman, you are still immature. I’ll let Yini cook some pig brain soup for you some day to replenish it.”

Little Roman? Master Roman gritted his teeth and almost uttered ‘little your sister’, but he had little sisters like Adeline and the little princess whom he couldn’t offend easily. Moreover, he could step on his nephew’s head and laughed sardonically by mentioning Yini. Therefore, Master Roman had to pretend not to hear him with a blank face.

This made Chen Rui even more contemptuous. This expression is too artificial, far worse than Zola.

“Leader.” Delia said, “The training system I just tried is amazing. It can not only exercise spirit power, but also train virtually. If I can complete the training, can I control that kind of assemble puppet?”

“Almost.” Chen Rui nodded, “You just tried the virtual training course of assemble puppet in the ancient alchemy civilization. The ancient alchemy civilization’s aborigines themselves don’t have much strength, but the assemble puppet can give them at least the combat power of the Demon Emperor. Your talent in this area is very high, and you have completed the basic courses which is quite remarkable. With your own strength, as long as you can perfectly control the strength of the assemble puppet, your combat power will most probably break through the Demon Emperor level. However, this kind of control requires higher spirit power. If you are a beginner, don’t be too anxious for actual combat training. Lay the foundation first before anything else.”

Delia’s strength had been staying at the early stage of the Great Demon King. Hearing Chen Rui’s words, her eyes lit up, “Got it, leader.”

“Brother, I have also completed the 1 star mission of the restaurant!” The little loli quickly showed her achievement, “Isn’t it amazing?”

Chen Rui smiled and said, “Of course, our Alice is the best. There are 2 stars, 3 stars and 5 stars after the 1 star mission, but Crystal Phoenix is ??still debugging. You can continue to play after her debugging is completed.”

“Sir Leader, oh, no, Sir Uncle.” It was none other than Roman, “I like this virtual training of deadly battle very much. Can I keep playing here?”

“In fact, this training game is adapted based on a certain test. For some reason, I changed the image.” Roman did not understand Chen Rui’s explanations, but he understood the next sentence, “Virtual training should be combined with real combat to be more effective. I will let Dodo come and fight with you later.”

As soon as the slime was mentioned, Master Roman suddenly wilted. He was now a dish ravaged by Dodo.

“Leader, I can’t imagine your mind.” Delia showed a sincere expression of admiration, “These virtual… Uh, games, how did you make it?”

“The legacy of the ancient alchemy civilization, the wisdom of another world… plus a little brain.” Chen Rui pointed to his head, “I should be the only person in the Demon Realm who has mastered the ancient alchemy civilization’s life crystal, so my creation should be even more unique. It will become the existence comparable to the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association, the ancient magic tower of the Dark Shadow Empire and the Book Collection Hall of the Dark Shadow Empire. In fact, alchemy is nothing more than the surface. Its influence will be far more than that. Perhaps the whole world will change because of it.”

chapters.title: Chapter 725: Empress
chapters.body:
Chapter 725: Empress

Chapter 725: Empress

Evening.

The moonlight in the sky gradually turned purple.

Her Majesty Empress stood on the balcony, leaning on the railing with both hands. Her beautiful and deep black eyes looked down at the little sparks down the mountain as she seemed to be in deep thoughts.

The cool breeze blew, and gently flicked her black hair and large robe backward, revealing the perfect outline of the body; moving with calm serenity.

“Liliz, are you here?” The empress’ voice sounded, and her tone was extremely pleasant-sounding, revealing the tranquility of ancient wells.

“Yes, Your Majesty.” The blue-robed woman under the steps bowed and responded. Just now she saw the empress immersed in the thoughts, so she didn’t interrupt her.

“Has the intel of the Jergal Fortress come?”

“There is no new intel yet. The first general is very calm, even when we were in a decisive battle with the Fallen Angel Empire previously. However, his movements in the dark have not stopped. After we have signed the alliance agreement with the Fallen Angel Empire, Broc executed several people for the crime of collaborating with the enemy. These people include his confidants and undercover agents sent by us. It is likely to eliminate some traces. For now, we don’t have much evidence to bring him down.”

Liliz thought for a while and added another sentence, “Broc was seriously injured last time for unknown reasons, and now half of his body is made of mechanical materials. His true strength is likely to surpass the average Demon Overlord.”

“His personal strength is nothing to be feared.” The empress shook her head, “What I’m afraid of is the Fire Blade Legion that he has. The Fire Blade Legion is the largest legion of the empire, and its combat power is extremely powerful which is enough to match the elites of the Bloody Empire. Elite troops. I want to take back this strength completely; it must not be buried in his hands. Broc is the first general who supported the military system reform that I implemented, plus his prestige in the army, it’s really hard to do anything openly. My intention of putting up the pretense of attacking the Fallen Angel Empire this time is also to lure the snake out of the hole, but this ‘snake’ is really calm.”

“Even so, with the implementation of the military system reform, Broc’s control over the army is declining. It is only a matter of time before getting rid of him. However, the safety of Sir Frentz and Madam Medilu… After the last secret rescue operation failed, it aroused Broc’s vigilance instead. I’m afraid it will be very difficult to sneak into the fortress again.”

The empress nodded slightly, “‘Waiting’ is certainly a stable way, but it is inevitable that there will be many unexpected situations. Unfortunately, with the current situation, this is the most appropriate way. As for the uncle’s side, don’t act rashly for the time being.”

“Yes, Your Majesty.” Liliz showed hesitation, “1 more thing…”

“Just say it, Liliz, you are my most trusted confidant. There are no outsiders here, so you can speak up.”

Liliz lowered her head and said, “It is Prince Vigelsa who has admired Your Majesty for many years. He wants to use me to explore Your Majesty’s intent…”

“Vigelsa? Except for a face and the status of the prince obtained via war, what else does he have? Unpresentable cleverness?” The empress sneered and did not conceal her contempt in front of this confidant, “When I was a princess, he used various means to get me. Even when I was in internal strife, he did not hesitate to use his forces to threaten me. He already failed at that time, let alone now!”

“I know Your Majesty hates him, but in terms of identity and status, Vigelsa is currently the most suitable candidate.” Liliz sighed while showing a serious expression, “Your Majesty has been alone for many years, and there should be a prince consort. This is not only Your Majesty’s private matter but also a major matter of the entire empire. The Dark Shadow Empire needs an inheritor.”

“I understand.” The empress gave Liliz a faint look, “I know what I’m doing and what I should do. Don’t explore this kind of matter in the future. No matter what method you use, I only need 1 result - let that guy give up completely.”

“Liliz understands.” Liliz bowed respectfully. This Your Majesty was not only the No. 1 beauty of the Demon Realm, but also the No. 1 sage. With the empress’ sober mind, she didn’t think she needed too much advice.

“What’s going on in the Fallen Angel Empire?”

“I’m about to report to Your Majesty. According to the latest intel, 3 notable events have occurred in the Fallen Angel Empire. The first thing is about the marriage of Empress Shea. Empress Shea announced that she will be married in 2 months. The prince consort is naturally the mysterious Aguile. This incident was greatly opposed by the Lucifer Royal Family and the elder families. It is said that Her Majesty said, ‘I will only choose him to be my prince consort. If you object, you will all be the biggest sinners once the empire has no legal inheritor’. The authenticity of this sentence has yet to be examined, but it is an indisputable fact that the huge economic interests in Empress Shea’s hands played a decisive role in suppressing all the opposition.”

“She is a good opponent, and I like her words.” The empress smiled. Even though she was wearing a veil, one could still feel the peerless style of that smile.

Liliz then began to report the second incident, “The Mechanic Association of the Fallen Angel Capital is recently requisitioning a large area of ??land for its relocation plan. There should be some special actions, but I have not found out exactly what it is now. However, the Fallen Angel Empire’s Mechanic Association started a new scroll learning research department. Several mechanic masters of our empire have carefully studied the scrolls brought back by the intel agents and found that the efficiency is far better than ordinary magic scrolls, and the materials are very special. According to Master Anderson’s analysis, those materials should come from the human world.”

The empress was slightly shocked. She thought for a moment and asked, “How is Chen Rui of the Dark Moon recently?”

“That human has already resigned as a financial officer and stays in the lord’s mansion all day long. He only shows up occasionally. Athena claims that Chen Rui is seriously ill. Many people know this is just an excuse. The human should be secretly protected. This is probably related to our request for him as 1 of the conditions of the peaceful negotiation last time.”

“Perhaps it’s not that simple.” The empress frowned slightly, “He must be related to the many new things of the Fallen Angel Empire, but the strange thing is that we captured some humans who came to the Demon Realm, and they had not seen those new things in the human world. I once suspected that… he came from the legendary god realm, but now the appearance of these scrolls has overturned my suspicion. In fact, no matter which kind of guess, it isn’t enough to tell the truth. Let’s collect intel honestly. At present, the intel department has 3 focuses. First, Jergal Fortress, second, the Fallen Angel Empire and Chen Rui, and third, the battle situation of the Bloody Empire.”

“Yes.”

“By the way, did you just say there is 1 more event about the Fallen Angel Empire?”

“This event has long been advertised on the Fallen Angel Empire’s ‘Empire Daily’. If Your Majesty has time, you can now turn on the magic television to have a look. It should be almost time.”

“Is it the battle ball match?” The empress asked. Battle ball had now become the most popular sport in the Demon Realm without any dispute. Every game was a full house. The television broadcasts also attracted a large number of viewers. Being able to watch the wonderful game from far away in the different empire not only brought huge economic benefits to the 2 empires, but the popularity of the battle ball also reinforced the physique and cohesion of the empire.

“No, the newspaper calls it a ‘concert’, and it also uses the words ‘intriguing’ and ‘far beyond expectation’. To be honest, this is the first time I have heard of this kind of thing.”

“We’ll know after looking at it.” The empress asked the maid to turn on the huge magic television in the palace. This was the best gift given by the Fallen Angel Empire’s Empress Shea. Whether it was the screen size or clarity, it was the best at present.

Currently, there was only 1 channel for magic television which was the Channel 1 of the Fallen Angel Empire. As soon as they turned it on, they could see a special scene.

Countless troops were attacking a small town. The sound of fighting in the smoke of gunpowder and the explosion sounds of magic crystal cannon were deafening. The soldiers and residents of the town had blocked one after another round of attacks with incredible willpower. The army was unable to conquer it.

These should be the effects created by water element magic which were similar to illusions, but very realistic.

On the screen, 10 days have passed. There was no support nor rest, only fighting to the death.

The last person in the town was fighting. A general, covered in blood, was standing on the line of defense with his last breath. The enemy troops took detours one after another and did not touch the standing corpse even if he had buried countless of their comrades.

All the sounds became silent, and the singing of a woman gradually became clear. In the grief and sorrow tune, there was a sense of unyielding and perseverance.

With the ups and downs of the singing voice, the scenes of the picture moved and switched constantly. One after another heroic and unyielding scenes reappeared. Liliz watched with emotions and tears in her eyes.

“Song of Essidor…” A thin mist rose from the empress’ serene black eyes.

The singing gradually became silent, and the touching pictures faded. The scene returned to reality. It turned out to be a huge stage in the center of the arena.

A pair of solemnly-dressed man and woman appeared on the stage. The woman spoke up through the magic speaker, “That was the ‘Song of Essidor’ personally sung by the lord of the Dark Moon, Madam Athena. Wales. The next 1 is ‘Castle in the Sky’ by Her Majesty Empress’ special guests, Ms. Adeline and Ms. Helen from the Dead Sea.”

The scene on the stage changed and turned into an endless sea. A girl with a snake body was sitting on the reef, plucking the strings of the golden harp. The elegant sound of the harp touched everyone’s heart as the surrounding sounds suddenly became quiet. A moving figure appeared in the sea in front of the reef, and began to sing with the sound of the harp.

This sound was ethereal and illusory like heavenly music which seemed to have a special magical power. Coupled with the sound of the harp, it resonated with the soul of every listener, and the dark shadows in the sky gradually became clear, revealing a castle floating in the air. It was simple, beautiful and full of incredible strength. The melodious singing carried the faint sadness of the past, but there was no lack of hope for tomorrow. This kind of emotion surrounded the castle and everyone’s heart. It did not fade for a long time.

When the singing ended, the audience was still immersed in the lingering sound.

“What song is this? Whose singing voice is this?” After a while, Liliz woke up like a dream, staring at the disappearing sky castle on the screen.

“The Dead Sea… that should be the singing of a siren, and the naga is playing the harp.” The knowledgeable Her Majesty Empress took a deep breath, “The wording of the newspaper is not exaggerated. This concert will be beyond expectation and extremely intriguing.”

chapters.title: Chapter 726: The Mystery Of The Game
chapters.body:
Chapter 726: The Mystery Of The Game

Chapter 726: The Mystery of the Game

A serene tune sounded, echoing in the deserted mountain like a fairy walking alone in the moonlight and enjoying the lonely embrace of the dark.

This was an ‘Untitled Music’ played by the wanderer, Richard, on the piccolo. Perhaps out of the need to set off the ambiance, the player had been hidden in the magical scene from beginning to end without showing up.

The performance of this piece of music was not long, and it was not outstanding compared to many excellent programs. However, when the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress in front of the magic television heard this piece, her pupils suddenly contracted.

If Liliz was not indulging in music at this time, she should be able to notice that Her Majesty Empress’ peaceful lake-like eyes had actually started to shake.

Unlike the intoxicated Liliz, although Catherine also liked music very much, she had always maintained a calm heart and viewed the concert from an empress’ perspective. What she saw was not only on the musical level, but more on the political level such as the impact of this kind of concert on the economy, development, and empire unity. However, when this ‘Untitled Music’ sounded, she could no longer stay objective.

It was not the first time that she heard this song. The first time she heard it was in Silent Night Wetland.

This was not ‘Untitled Music’, but ‘Solo Dance under the Moonlight’.

She once thought that she had successfully forgotten this song, but she didn’t realize until today that it had been in her heart. She wanted to forget it, but she couldn’t.

“Richard…” Catherine was feeling the slight tremors in her mind as she suddenly clenched her fists and muttered, “You don’t even bother to change your alias…”

This sound made Liliz wake up, “Your Majesty, what did you just say?”

Catherine had regained her composure and shook her head. Liliz didn’t pay much attention, and once again turned her attention to the magic television.

Her Majesty Empress sighed slightly and gently stroked the cloak behind her. This was not 1 of the seven artifacts, Dark Shadow Cape, but a quasi-legendary grade cloak, ‘Longing of the Stars’.

The things that were discarded were never really discarded.

The live concert on Channel 1 of the Fallen Angel Empire was quite successful and caused a huge sensation.

According to the survey conducted by the ‘Empire Daily’ afterward, the most popular segment in the concert was ‘Castle in the Sky’ performed by the 2 sea creature tribe girls. The beautiful sound of the harp combined with the soul-shaking heavenly voice intoxicated the listeners even if they didn’t understand it.

Adeline and Helen became famous overnight. They occasionally met many enthusiastic fans when they went out. The little mermaid looked very excited while the naga girl felt more moved because Chen Rui had fulfilled a promise- your graceful harp sound will intoxicate everyone.

The most talked about was the ‘Song of Essidor’ that was personally sang by the Dark Moon Lord Athena. The Town Essidor rained heavily that day as if even the sky was moved to tears. It was said that the Samael Royal Family in front of the magic television almost cried. More surprisingly, several Samael Royal Family powerhouses went to Dark Moon Estate to join Athena after that.

The finale was the new military anthem of the Fallen Angel Empire which was majestic and uplifting. Chen Rui asked Adeline to adapt it based on ‘The Mass’ in his memory. This classic song was once rumored to be the battle anthem of the first armored division of the German SS. It was widely circulated in another world as background music in many film and television programs as well as social activities. Judging from the sensation at the scene, this military anthem would be familiar to all the demons soon.

The form of expression adopted by Chen Rui was another world’s MTV, that was music television. In this dimension, it was definitely an art form that had never been seen before. It had not only soundtracks but also realistic magical images which created the perfect atmosphere. It was just like a magnificent history coming to life which could arouse strong resonance from the audience.

Although there were no items or 3D computer special effects like the previous life, there was magic in this world. The master who manipulated the water element mimicry magic was the nominated apprentice of the fairy dragon Zola and the Fallen Angel Empire’s top magician, Stiller. Although Stiller became Zola’s apprentice to protect the Boll Family at the time, she became more and more convinced of the teacher’s strength over time. Zola would also give her a few pointers when she was in a good mood which benefited her a lot.

Although Stiller’s magic was far inferior to Zola, she was definitely the pinnacle among ordinary Demon Overlords. With Chen Rui’s magic circle, the special effects created were quite outstanding.

Most of the ‘singers’ who participated in the concert became famous. At the strong request of the entire empire audience, the concert was replayed 3 days later in the prime time of the Fallen Angel Empire’s Channel 1. It was said that the next concert was already being planned. The specific time was yet to be determined, but it was certain that the 2 most popular sea creature tribe girls would attend again.

Chen Rui’s current focus was on the modification of that kind of virtual ‘game’. He did not divert his attention because of the great success of the concert, even though he himself played a song ‘Solo Dance under the Moonlight’ at the time.

This song was not only a reminiscence of the past but also an indication to an empress.

One day, I will come to the Dark Shadow Empire with the strength that makes the Demon Realm tremble… and take you away.

With his current strength, it was not impossible to achieve this goal as long as he could ‘unlock’ his strength, but she was the ruler of an empire, and there were too many responsibilities involved. The most important thing was the will of Her Majesty Empress.

Chen Rui understood Catherine’s mind very well. Even if she really loved him, it was impossible for her to abandon a lot of things. This matter must not be rushed. He could only do it slowly and steadily. As long as the song could cause a little turmoil in the heart of the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, it would be considered a success.

The ‘virtual game’ was based on the ancient alchemy civilization’s central life crystal, Crystal Phoenix. The helmet was equivalent to a mental brainwave receiver. Chen Rui was the owner of the kingdom’s spiritual imprint and the sole master of Crystal Phoenix, so he had the highest authority.

In those games, Roman experienced the most powerful and difficult ‘inheritance world’ which was the ‘abyss’ where Chen Rui accepted the test of inheritance last time. For some reason, Chen Rui adjusted the abyss environment and the monsters inside. Facts had proved that the training effect of this spiritual world combined with reality was quite significant. The Demon Overlord realm that Roman entered under Dodo’s stimulation had gradually stabilized.

The manufacturing equipment of various alchemy creatures including the assemble puppets had been repaired with the efforts of the gremlin servants and started to operate normally. Currently, the City of Stars had 15,000 gremlin servants, 500 crystal beasts, 3,000 lamp spirits (including the imperial guards team of the Fallen Angel Empire), 10 assemble puppets, and 1 giant crystal beast.

Due to the strength limitation of the central life crystal, Crystal Phoenix, the production speed of the assemble puppets and giant crystal beasts was not fast. If the upgrade materials of the center system could be collected, not only the production efficiency and speed of the alchemy beings would be greatly increased, but the upper limit of the alchemy beings that could be controlled would also increase. Unfortunately, due to the scarcity of materials, Chen Rui could only collect them slowly while asking Crystal Phoenix to calculate alternative materials.

What Delia experienced was the training world of the assemble puppet. Alice was playing ‘Chen Restaurant’ which Chen Rui adapted from his previous life’s business games. Once these games were successfully modulated, Chen Rui intended to promote it step by step in the capital with the Mechanic Association as the center.

There was no doubt that in addition to enhancing combat power and training pilots for the assemble puppet, this virtual game would also bring huge economic benefits. However, Chen Rui’s real purpose was more than that.

After the success of the 6-star evolution, a new exchange item appeared in the exchange center of the Super System, but the new item needed to be exchanged with faith crystals. Previously in the human world, he had to collect 1 million faith crystals, so he could only watch eagerly. Now that he had successfully returned to the Demon Realm, the faith crystal automatically generated by the Super System, plus the crystals converted from the faith power sent back from the human world by Shura, had accumulated a considerable amount.

There were 2 types of new items in the exchange center, 1 was faith life which had additional buffs like the Snow Dallet.

Phantom flower— Level B faith creature (wind element). Increase the speed of the Star Conferring Platform’s receiver by 20%. The exchange price is 5,000 faith crystals.

Prayer grass — Level C creature (earth element). Increases the output of faith crystals in the kingdom by 10% daily. The exchange price is 10,000 faith crystals.

The faith life of the Star Conferring Platform could overlap with the buff of the star receiver, but only 1 type of each faith life could be ‘planted’. The phantom flower and prayer grass were only Level C and Level B faith lives. Perhaps after the Pole Star Level was promoted, more faith lives would be available for exchange. Chen Rui was really lucky to get to the Level S Snow Dallet.

The second category of exchange items was very special.

The devotee’s heart - An independent core of faith which could be integrated into the object to become the center of absorbing faith power and converting faith. Its function was similar to the Tower of Faith. The exchange price was 100,000 faith crystal; only 1 exchange is allowed.

The devotee’s feet - Expands the absorption range of faith, buffs and transmits faith power. The function was similar to the Pillar of Faith. The exchange price was 100,000 faith crystals with no limit to the number of exchanges.

Chen Rui previously felt that the role of this ‘devotee’s heart’ was a bit useless: Put the Tower of Faith in the real world? Even with the identity of Aguile, people won’t believe in him.

One day, when Chen Rui was pondering on the game of the ancient alchemy civilization, he suddenly had a flash of inspiration. He used up almost all the faith crystal inventory to redeem the one and only ‘devotee’s heart”. Then, he merged the devotee’s heart with something - Crystal Phoenix!

For this reason, various games centered on Crystal Phoenix had actually become games of faith!

As long as the player showed bravery, perseverance, wisdom… and even anger, massacre and other emotions or qualities in the corresponding game, they could provide faith power!

This would not only increase the faith crystal, but he could also comprehend the strength of Demi-God territory through faith power obtained externally.

The players themselves would not suffer any losses. On the contrary, they could also obtain training or entertainment effects through the game. This had been confirmed by Chen Rui in the experiments with Roman, Delia and Alice.

The success of the experiment made Chen Rui inexplicably excited as if he had seen the formation of a huge faith network step by step in the future. Perhaps this would be a shortcut for him to take a step forward.

chapters.title: Chapter 727: The Failed Son-In-Law Strategy Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 727: The Failed Son-In-Law Strategy Plan

Chapter 727: The Failed Son-in-law Strategy Plan

“Sigh.” Daniel sighed, “What should we do?”

“Haih.” Julia shook her head, “It’s difficult. Do you guys have any ideas?”

Krobelus frowned, “It’s not only difficult, it’s not easy at all! Paglio, do you have any ideas?”

Paglio took a sip of wine, “What idea do I have? Why not just do it by force. Quoting that guy, what’s done is done. It’s too late to change by then.”

“Cheh! Bad idea!” The blue dragon and the black dragon showed contempt at the same time.

“The 1 with no standard is Sir Dragon Emperor. He actually chose such a guy to be his son-in-law.” Paglio said with indignation, “Moreover, that guy already has several women and each of them is top-notch. Even the empress is his. Dear Dragon God, it’s so unfair!”

Daniel also added indignantly, “Yes! Beast, let go of that black dragon!”

“You 2 seem to be out of topic…” Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes exuded coldness, and the blue dragon shuddered, “Sir Auglas will have standard by recruiting both of you to be his son-in-law?”

Master Poison Dragon was not afraid of Julia. Just as he was about to speak, he suddenly grinned. It turned out that his arm was twisted by Ms. Emerald Dragon’s claws. This twisting method was taught by her best friend, Ms. Yini. Pinch a bit of meat, and make a 365° turn. Not only was the pain unbearable, but it would also leave a large eye-catching bruise which was quite a shame.

“You two jealous idiots, do you want me to use the transmission stone to help you ask the Royal Highness Dragon Emperor?” Ms. Black Dragon’s killing move made the poison dragon and the blue dragon silent. Ask the Dragon Emperor now? What a joke! Isn’t this looking for death?

Julia was majestic for a while, but she soon returned to her frowning look, “Think about it, how can we let Princess Olypheus and Chen Rui become a real couple earlier? This is a task given by Sir Auglas!”

Krobelus pondered and said, “Isn’t Chen Rui engaged to Olypheus? It’s just a matter of time. In fact, Sir Auglas doesn’t need to be so anxious.”

“You don’t know the guy Chen Rui? He used Olypheus as a cheap hire, as a minesweeper… Uh, and as a friend, as a sister; it’s just not as a wife. For that bastard who prioritizes lovers over friends, as long as she becomes his woman, he will do everything he can to take care of and protect her. His visit to the Dead Sea and fighting with a Demi-God for Isabella this time is the best example. I think this is Sir Dragon Emperor’s intention. But everyone can tell that the guy who got engaged is purely acting. Up to now, he hasn’t even held Olypheus’s hand formally. If it is Athena and the others, that damn human will grab them long ago.”

Julia nodded, “Yes, but… no matter if it is Princess Olypheus or the human, there is no sign of development in this area, so I’m quite troubled now. In the beginning, Sir Auglas said that if this task is not completed, not only Daniel and I will be severely punished, next time he comes to the Dark Moon, he will take you all back to Dragon Island and put you in the black prison.”

This time even Paglio couldn’t help but shudder. The Royal Highness Dragon Emperor was a man of his words. Let alone going to the black prison, Master Poison Dragon was unwilling to just move to Dragon Island. It’s so carefree here. Freedom with good wine and good food. The rarest thing is that there are also a few close sinister friends. Where can I find such a good place?

Ms. Emerald Dragon naturally did not want to leave the comfortable place of the Dark Moon, so she had to seriously start thinking, “Even though Chen Rui is engaged, he hasn’t really regarded Olypheus as his own woman. If you want to change him in a short time, I’m afraid it’s very difficult. Even Sir Auglas couldn’t do anything when he was in the Dark Moon. So, if you want to do this, the key lies in Olypheus, but Olypheus doesn’t understand anything and always thinks that marriage is edible. Let alone… the matter between man and woman.”

“Oh, doesn’t Princess Olypheus like money?” Daniel patted his thigh, “We can start with this, give her money and let her take the initiative!”

As soon as Blue Dragon said this, the eyes of the other 3 dragons lit up at the same time.

“That’s it!” Julia made a resolute decision, but she frowned again, “The question is where does this money come from?”

As soon as the words of the black dragon came out, the other 3 dragons stared at each other with big eyes.

Dragons were all out-and-out ‘financial management experts’. If Auglas knew about this kind of bad idea to ask his daughter to offer herself, they would be lucky if they don’t get beaten up, how would they still dare to claim reimbursement? This money was obviously not a public expense, who was willing to take pay?

Daniel gritted his teeth and slapped his hand on the table, “I’ll give out 1 black crystal coin!”

“How shameless to say just 1 black crystal coin!” Paglio glanced at him disdainfully, and threw out 2 black crystal coins, “I will give 2!”

“I will give 2 too.” Ms. Emerald Dragon was very happy to follow her husband this time.

“You cheapskates! You’re all crazy!” Julia was going frantic, “You want to induce a dragon princess to voluntarily offer herself to a man with these black crystal coins?”

Ms. Emerald Dragon asked curiously, “Julia, how much will you pay?”

Ms. Black Dragon was a little lacking in confidence, “Of course… 2 black crystal coins.”

“…” All the dragons continued to stare at each other in a speechless dismay.

At this moment, Olypheus walked in from the door and saw the 7 black crystal coins on the table at a glance, “Wow, who dropped the money!”

When the word ‘wow’ was uttered, Ms. Black Dragon had already rushed over to grab the money, but all dragons had long known Olypheus’ ‘virtue’ and stopped the chick who was trying to ‘pick up’ the money in the middle.

The blue dragon’s eyes turned, “Princess Olypheus, do you want this money?”

Ms. Black Dragon nodded like a chicken pecking at rice, and the blue dragon asked tentatively, “As long as you complete a mission, the money will be yours.”

Olypheus’ eyes shone brightly, “Okay, what mission?”

“This…” Daniel showed an awkward expression. Even this shameless guy couldn’t explain what having sex was to a girl who didn’t understand anything. He immediately cast his pleading gaze on Julia and Krobelus. It was naturally better for women to explain this kind of thing.

Krobelus and Julia hurriedly pulled Ms. Black Dragon aside and muttered for a long time. Ms. Black Dragon showed a puzzled expression, “Take off the boss’ clothes… and then put the ‘something’ on his waist in my mouth. Huh? Is that delicious?”

“That can’t be eaten!” Krobelus was shocked. If this chick really eats it, it would be the biggest tragedy.

Ms. Black Dragon asked curiously, “If I can’t eat it, why do I take it in my mouth? What is it?”

“That’s… uh.” Julia wiped a cold sweat, “Weapon! That’s a weapon, you can only hold it in your mouth! Or you can lick it, but you absolutely can’t eat it! You will die if you eat it! After you finish this mission, the black crystal coins on the table are all yours.”

“Why do you want me to do this strange thing? There must be some reason…” Ms. Black Dragon showed a suspicious expression. Ms. Emerald Dragon and Ms. Black Dragon looked at each other and were secretly guilty. After all, Olypheus was not a fool.

“Well, my sister said that a good mercenary will not ask the employer for the reason. I will accept this difficult mission, but the price…”

“Double the price!” Ms. Black Dragon immediately agreed to it and looked at Ms. Emerald Dragon. The 2 breathed a sigh of relief at the same time. Fortunately, Olypheus became a fool in front of the money.

Seeing that Ms. Black Dragon took the deposit of 7 black crystal coins and left, Ms. Emerald Dragon felt unreliable, “7 black crystal coins… is all it takes?”

“Yeah.” Ms. Black Dragon said without confidence as she comforted himself, “As long as she does this step, we will basically succeed.”

“Will Olypheus… do nothing, then return to report false accounts?” Krobelus’ worries were entirely valid due to the chick’s various past records.

At this point, Ms. Black Dragon seemed to be confident, “Didn’t you hear the special explanation I just gave? We will first pay half of the deposit. When the mission is accomplished, she will get the other half. If she breaches the contract, she will have to compensate 10 times the price. With this, I believe Princess Olypheus will definitely work hard to do it.”

“Julia, you’re so smart!” It was naturally Daniel who was flattering.

“Of course, because I’m a smart person, so… the extra 7 black crystal coins will be deducted from your pocket money next month.”

“…”

Chen Rui didn’t know that a ‘conspiracy’ against him had started quietly. He was currently drinking tea in the small courtyard of Isabella.

“Does it look good?” Isabella’s clothes gradually changed from the original green skirt to a light yellow high-necked gown. This dress was the new ‘Magic Feather Tulle’. After collecting the materials, Chen Rui made 1 for Isabella. The powerful attribute of this quasi-artifact armor was nothing. What Madam Aunt loved most was the special function of changing the design and color at will.

“So beautiful.” Chen Rui took a sip of tea and smiled at the beautiful woman in front of him. No one knew if he was referring to the clothes or the person. He just finished the debugging of the Crystal Phoenix virtual game. It was great to come back to relax, drink tea, and admire the flower (Devil’s Snare Flower, of course). Such a life was so leisurely.

Hearing the man’s compliment, Isabella smiled more charmingly. Her mind moved slightly, and the clothes gradually began to change. Chen Rui suddenly spewed a sip of tea because Madam Aunt’s newly changed clothes were a set of… lingerie.

“Does it look good?” Isabella’s face was slightly flushed which made her look even more charming. The transparent black silk on her exquisite and graceful body looked alluring.

Chen Rui suddenly had the image of Madam Aunt lying under him in this set of black lingerie, and he couldn’t help feeling dry in his mouth. Facing the seduction of his beloved woman, he would no longer be a man if he could still sit and drink tea calmly.

Just when the 2 people hugged each other, kissed affectionately and were about to go further, Olypheus’ voice suddenly sounded, “Boss, are you still there?”

Both their movements paused, and they hurriedly put on their clothes. They didn’t know that Ms. Black Dragon, who knew the magic circles in this area, had jumped into the yard.

Since the Magic Feather Tulle had changed several times before, the speed of the change was greatly reduced. Isabella, who had no time to change the erotic lingerie back to formal wear, grabbed the jacket that Chen Rui took off and put it on her body in a hurry.

Chen Rui didn’t wear extra clothes as it happened to be hot these days, so he had to be shirtless.

Ms. Black Dragon, who messed up the good deeds of the 2, was startled, “Boss, sister, what are you doing?”

“Nothing.” The boss and sister said in unison.

“Boss, I think I saw you kissing sister?”

“Um…” The boss, who was glared at by sister, was anxious. “That’s called magic power replenishment, yes, it’s magic power replenishment.”

“Magic power replenishment?”

“Accurately speaking, it is the first step to replenish magic power.” Boss Chen explained solemnly. The serious expression seemed to be some kind of professional academic researcher, but his shirtless look was nondescript.

Ms. Black Dragon asked curiously, “Can I have the magic power replenishment too?”

“Of course not!” Boss Chen shook his head quickly and added, “Magic power replenishment requires money, and it’s expensive!”

“Boss, you seem to have replenished me last time.”

Boss Chen felt madam sister’s eyes become sharp like a knife, and he cried out innocently, “Don’t talk nonsense! When did I replenish for you…”

Ms. Black Dragon explained solemnly, “Didn’t you replenish it once in front of everyone during the engagement? No wonder my face felt a little hot at the time. It turned out that this was the feeling of magic power replenishment.”

Boss Chen secretly breathed a sigh of relief, “Yes, so I gave you a very expensive ring that time.”

Ms. Black Dragon’s eyes flashed with the light of coins, “How about we replenish it again?”

Boss Chen shook his head quickly. Ms. Black Dragon was a little disappointed. Thinking of the purpose of this visit, he turned to Isabella and said, “Sister, can I talk to boss about something?”

Isabella, who was wrapped in Chen Rui’s clothes, tried to keep the calm as a sister, “Of course.”

“By the way, boss, do you have an image recording stone?”

“Yes…”

“Give me 1. Sister, help us take pictures with the image recording stone.”

“Okay.”

Soon after completing the mission, Ms. Black Dragon returned to the house happily.

“Julia, I have completed the mission! Pay the balance!”

As soon as this sentence was spoken, the 4 dragons were all taken aback. She actually did it!

“Wait a minute, Princess Olypheus, you really… did what I said?” Julia was in disbelief that this difficult mission went so smoothly.

“Of course, I’m very professional. I even recorded it with an image recording stone as evidence.”

Before Julia could stop it, Olypheus had openly on the image recording stone and ‘played’ it.

There was a man and a woman in the image recording stone. No doubt, the man was Boss Chen, and the woman was Ms. Black Dragon.

Boss Chen seemed to be very hot and did not wear a shirt while holding a sword in his hand. At the request of Ms. Black Dragon, he posed with the sword on his waist, then Ms. Black Dragon took the sword and licked it. Then… no more.

“When I went there, it happened that the boss’ clothes were taken off by my sister, so I asked the boss to take out the Northsea Sword to complete this extremely difficult mission.” Ms. Black Dragon said triumphantly, “Julia, give me the money!”

“…”

chapters.title: Chapter 728: The Situation And Old Acquaintance
chapters.body:
Chapter 728: The Situation And Old Acquaintance

Chapter 728: The Situation and Old Acquaintance

The Fallen Angel Empire’s palace.

Empress Shea was listening carefully to Isabella’s report. The Snow Dallet Flower’s effect was quite magical. After Isabella recuperated for a period of time, the [Light Annihilation Seal] on her body had been completely removed. Her strength and vitality that was lost due to the seal also came back to her. Ms. Yini was originally not an idle character, especially after regaining her youth and vitality, the gloom in her heart was gone. She felt bored every day. At the invitation of Shea, she regained control of the secret intelligence department of the Fallen Angel Empire.

She undoubtedly had extraordinary talents. Soon after she had control of the secret intelligence department, the operation of the intel system in various places became more flexible.

After listening to the latest intel, Shea revealed a solemn expression, “The Bloody Empire’s Second Prince Edmund is defeated again?”

Isabella pointed to the strategy map and said, “This time he personally led the main force in a decisive battle with Aleus in Mountain Black which is at the north of the Iron Fist Estate. As a result, the army was defeated. Edmund led the remnants to flee to the Iron Fist City. Meanwhile, Aleus’ army has broken through the triple defenses of the Iron Fist Estate, approaching step by step.

It is possible that this civil war of the Bloody Empire will not be delayed for long.”

Chen Rui interjected, “This situation is a little bit beyond our expectations. Didn’t Edmund get the secret help from us and the Dark Shadow Empire? It was originally expected that the 2 sides could drag on for at least another year. Why would it be a complete defeat this time?”

“It is said that Teris, the genius prince of the Bloody Empire, stepped out of the Dark Furnace and planned the battle himself.”

Teris? Chen Rui’s eyes flashed with a different expression. An image of a gentleman appeared in his mind, and his brows wrinkled tightly.

“Teris is the youngest son of the Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen. He is hailed as the world’s top genius with extraordinary wisdom and was proficient in military strategy. At the same time, he had extraordinary performance in business, politics, potion, mechanics, and so on. He is almost an all-round genius, but unfortunately, because of his lack of talent and strength, he was regarded as the prince least likely to inherit the throne.”

Speaking of ‘all-round genius’, Isabella glanced at her man with blue eyes and said, “It is said that before Raizen trained behind closed doors, Great Prince Aleus attempted to assassinate Second Prince Edmund, but he failed. Young Prince Teris became the scapegoat on behalf of his elder brother, Aleus. He voluntarily entered the Dark Furnace to repent for half a year. The Dark Furnace is the most dangerous royal secret place in the Bloody Empire, containing a manic and dark strength. Although the Mammon Royal Family can borrow the power of the dark element to speed up training, it is equally dangerous. Many royal families have lost their lives there. Teris did not come out for half a year after entering. Many people thought he was dead. Unexpectedly, he walked out of the Dark Furnace 2 years later. It was the conspiracy of this genius prince that made Edmund suffer a heavy blow. It also made our strategy of prolonging the Bloody Empire’s long-term internal friction on the verge of failure.”

Chen Rui witnessed Teris’s ‘scapegoat’ when he was attending the royal banquet as the apprentice of the top mechanic master, Nate, of the Bloody Empire. It was just that Chen Rui always felt that Teris was not simple, especially when he learned about Master Fonsaq’s experience back then. After experiencing the tragedy of the Blue Lava Estate’s Town Lupin, he became more suspicious of Teris.

It now appears that the ’scapegoat’ at that time was possibly directed by Teris himself.

Chen Rui thought for a while and asked, “Is there any news about the closed doors training of Raizen the Great?”

“Not at the moment.” Isabella shook her head.

Shea spoke up, “Leave the matter of Teris aside. Even if the internal strife of the Bloody Empire ends, it has lost a lot of power this time, so it will not pose a threat to us in a short time. We just seize the time to develop our economic and military strength.”

“That’s right.” Chen Rui nodded, “Although the previous war with Obsidian greatly exhausted our military power, the reform of the military system of the empire is fully completed, and the cohesion is unprecedentedly strong. The Red Dragon Legion of the Warlock Fortress, the Tekula Fortress’ Saber-toothed Tiger Legion and the Dark Moon’s Red Blood Flame Army have completed the recruitment and organization. They are now stepping up their training. Probably after a couple of years, those recruits will be able to truly become the backbone of strength to compete with the elite of the 2 empires.”

“Don’t underestimate the 2 great empires, and don’t be overwhelmed by the trend of economic development as well as the small achievements in front of you.” Isabella did not agree with the man this time, and she put forward a different opinion, “Don’t forget that the military strength of the Fallen Angel Empire has always been the weakest of the 3 empires, regardless of overall strength or high-end strength. The number of Demon Overlord and Demon Emperor alone is far lower than the other 2 empires. Once the war really breaks out, we still cannot really contend.”

Shea thought for a while and nodded lightly, agreeing to Isabella’s opinion.

“Don’t worry.” Chen Rui seemed confident, “The ancient alchemy civilization castle has been restored. The castle itself is a powerful weapon that can even reverse the entire war at a critical moment. As for the alchemy beings, all the materials have been collected. Once the production is completed, we can have 100 giant crystal beasts of Demon Overlord level, at least 1,000 Demon Emperor level assemble puppets, 5,000 lamp spirits, and 10,000 powerful crystal beasts. These troops’ combat power is strong and they fully obey orders. In addition, we also have Guradam’s undead army. Combining these forces with the empire’s legions, we will definitely not be inferior to the other 2 emperor’s empires. What is needed at the moment is time and trained pilots for the assemble puppets.” Shea’s eyes brightened, “Yes, the land acquisition by the Mechanic Association has been completed. It depends on when your castle can move over. “

“Now the castle is still accumulating energy, and those training games are also being intensively debugged.” Chen Rui pondered for a while, “Judging from the current progress, it will probably take more than 1 month. Have you read the college construction plan last time?”

“You really moved everything from the human world here.” Shea smiled. “I’ve read it carefully. This plan is very good. In fact, the Demon Realm had a college many years ago, but it was discontinued for various reasons. I approve of your plan, but we still need a long term plan. Didn’t you say it? Haste makes waste. You have brought too many new things. We need to digest step by step, and finish the most important thing before we talk about it. “

Isabella’s voice intervened, “Other empires can only follow our steps eagerly and continue to imitate, but Her Majesty Empress thinks that there are too many new things. It seems that Her Majesty really has happiness troubles…”

Her Majesty Empress replied faintly, “My happiest trouble is that there is no beautiful figure of a bridesmaid at the wedding ceremony that is about to come. Fortunately, this trouble does not exist now.”

These 2 sentences made the solemn atmosphere of discussing official affairs instantly strange. A certain scum of the crystal harem lord did not dare to say anything or leave. Perhaps this was the happiest trouble.

In the evening, the Dark Moon City.

Under the bright magic lamp, there was busy traffic and bustling as usual.

Although the day was about to end, the more lively night market had just begun.

The Demon Realm concert was being replayed on the magic television of the plaza. Although it was the fourth time, the audience’s enthusiasm was still extremely high. It seemed that they would never get sick of it. It was said that the next concert date had been set to be just 1 day before the wedding ceremony of the Fallen Angel Empire’s empress, Her Majesty Shea, as a celebration.

“Delia, walk slowly, wait for me.” Roman chased after her hastily.

Delia said faintly, “Aren’t you fascinated by that beauty just now?”

“You misunderstood, I just saw that her necklace is very unique and I want to buy one for you.” Roman quickly explained, “Speaking of beauties, our Delia is the most beautiful. If you take off the veil, the entire Dark Moon City’s women will feel ashamed of their beauty.”

“Hmph! Flowery speech.” Delia glanced at him disdainfully, but she felt very pleased. She did not expose that he was actually fascinated by the deep gully under the woman’s necklace.

“I’m telling the truth, it is definitely not a flowery speech. In my heart, you are always the most beautiful.” Roman grinned, but these words were from the bottom of his heart. He took advantage of the situation to hold Delia’s hand, “Right, Paglio and those guys seem very restless these days.”

Speaking of this, Delia showed a slight smile, “It’s all because of Olypheus and leader. It seems that Sir Auglas has pressured these dragons. Unfortunately, Olypheus didn’t understand anything. She produced some pictures a few times that made them dumbfounded. .”

“Leader is really a beast!” Roman’s eyes were full of jealousy, envy and hatred.

“I’m right to call him leader, you should call him Sir Uncle.”

This way, ain’t I 1 generation later than Delia? Master Roman was dumbfounded. The back of his hand hurt as Delia’s nails had already pinched, “I know you have always used leader as a model to open the harem, but as long as I’m alive, you have no hope in this life unless I…” “No unless! Don’t worry, me and that beast leader are totally different.” Roman quickly said, but he was wailing in his heart. I am stuck with 1 tree, all forest dreams are gone. During the conversation, Delia’s hand suddenly trembled. Roman had a tacit understanding with her, so he immediately felt something was wrong.

There was a woman in front of them, wearing a large robe that covered her figure. Her head was covered in tulle, her facial features could be vaguely seen, but it was not clear. This was a typical female dress of the Dark Shadow Empire. Due to the proximity to the Dark Shadow Empire and the cooperation between the 2 empires, there were a lot of Dark Shadow Empire people here. Women in this dress were not uncommon; Delia herself was dressed like this.

“What an unexpected meeting.”

The woman’s voice was very beautiful which gave people a strange sense of tranquility in this noisy plaza.

Delia squeezed Roman’s hand tightly, making no sound.

The woman’s eyes turned to the 2 tightly held hands, “I didn’t expect to meet you here… Madam Delia.”

When Roman felt Delia’s nervousness and even fear, he took 2 steps forward, guarding her behind. A murderous intent appeared in his eyes. Judging from the name, this woman should be Delia’s old acquaintance in the Dark Shadow Empire. I wonder how she is able to see through the magic veil that Delia wears, and able to move Delia to such an extent. She must be a formidable opponent.

“Ms. Christina.” Delia finally said with a hoarse voice.

chapters.title: Chapter 729: Encounter
chapters.body:
Chapter 729: Encounter

Chapter 729: Encounter

At this moment, Roman felt a strange change in the surrounding scenes as they had moved from the plaza to a secluded alley. Based on Roman’s familiarity with the Dark Moon, he knew that this was No.7 Street in the southern block- She did not activate territory or illusion, but a real space transfer!

There was still no special breath in this mysterious Christina as if she was a powerless ordinary person, but Roman instinctively sensed a huge oppression. He had now reached the Demon Overlord level, and his spirit sensing power had taken a big leap, so he could even more keenly sense the terror of this woman.

This kind of oppression is above Paglio or even Dodo; perhaps only Zola is on par with her.

Such a powerful enemy can no longer be matched, and escape is the best way. However, Roman couldn’t do it because of Delia. Perhaps he could escape with the [Flash] talent, but with Delia’s current strength, she definitely could not escape, so his first reaction was to fight in order to buy time for Delia to escape.

In the blink of an eye, the mysterious woman’s body was instantly wrapped in countless blue light like a continuous light net. The speed of the light net was extremely fast. The whistling sound only came out after the net was completed.

Roman who had been tempered in the abyss was no longer what he used to be. This blow was his strongest killer move, [No Return], which had the meaning of not returning before killing the enemy. The terrifying point of this move lay in the countless subsequent moves hidden within it. If the opponent did not move, he would be shattered by the blade net. If the opponent moved, those subsequent moves would trigger a chain of reaction that could burst with more terrifying power. Even he himself couldn’t stop it.

In the abyss ‘game’, an early stage of the Demon Overlord’s ‘Whip Girl’ once turned into hundreds of fragments and annihilated under [No Return].

Suddenly, the blue light net suddenly dimmed and extinguished in a gloved hand. Roman’s figure appeared and took a few steps back. His hand holding the blade was trembling constantly as blood gradually seeped from the handle of the blade.

Roman ignored the sharp pain in his hand and stared at her warily. The woman dispelled all of his subsequent moves with just a wave of her hand. The strong sword qi was reflected back and shattered his hand. Obviously, the other party did not go all out.

The strength gap is too big just as I expected.

Although Roman didn’t remind her beforehand, Delia had already understood from his eye contact. She planned to take the opportunity to leave. Now that Roman was defeated quickly, she gave up the idea: Since I can’t escape, let’s face it together.

But I didn’t expect that the royal noblewoman of the Dark Shadow Empire and the inheritor of the legendary empress actually has such terrifying strength.

“I didn’t mean harm, Delia.” Christina was empathetic as she looked at the performance of the 2 including the psychological changes, omitting the title ‘madam’. “By the way, I remember you are friends with Athena, the daughter of the Fallen Angel Empire’s first general, George, and the current lord of the Dark Moon as well as the third general of the empire. Back then, you even… it turns out that you have been hiding in the Dark Moon, but please rest assured that I will not disclose your news to anyone.”

“So what if you disclose it?” Roman said coldly. His purpose of improving his strength was not only to protect Delia, but also to get rid of Broc, the beast himself. According to Aunt Isabella’s intel, Broc was now in danger, and he couldn’t get out of the Jergal Fortress. In addition, the Dark Moon had at least 3 powerful dragons sitting in town. Even if he knew that Delia was here, he dared not come.

As soon as Roman spoke, he suddenly remembered that the 2 of them were not Christina’s opponents at all, and his life was still in the hands of her, so he couldn’t help but keep quiet.

“Delia, since you and Lord Athena are friends, then it would be better. I want to meet the lover of madam lord, the famous human Financial Officer Chen Rui. Can you introduce me to him?”

“Ms. Christina.” Delia took a deep breath and recovered her calm, “If I guessed correctly, you came by the order of Catherine the Great. I’m afraid your efforts will be wasted. As far as I know, it is impossible for Chen Rui to leave the Dark Moon. If this is the case, would you use other means? For example… since you cannot use him, then he cannot be used by others as well?”

“You’re overthinking. I just want to ask him some questions.” Christina glanced at Delia, “Delia, I haven’t been shopping for a long time, can you be my guide? As for this sir… I live in the Red Fruit Hotel VIP Room No. 1. Can you come to pick up Delia after we finish shopping? However, I hope that when I come back, it will not be a few dragons who will entertain me.”

Roman frowned, “Is this a threat?”

“You can understand it as a lady’s request.” Christina smiled behind her veil, “Let’s go, Delia.”

Delia thought for a while and walked to Christina’s side. Roman snorted. With a stomp of his foot, he disappeared in place.
