“Quite fast, the [Flash] talent is indeed remarkable.” Christina lamented, “I’m surprised that you, as the Leviathan Royal Family, actually found the Belphegor Royal Family as a partner. However, judging from some details, the relationship between the both of you is very deep, and even willing to sacrifice for each other which is really enviable.”

“Does the Dark Shadow Empire noblewoman envy these things too?” Delia shook her head, and she suddenly smiled, “I know Miss is very intelligent, but you won’t get more information from me. Since it’s shopping, we will stroll around happily.”

“Love really changes a person. This smile does not belong to the Madam Black Widow whom I know.” Christina took a deep look at Delia, “Actually you have already told me a lot such as… the deep habit of trusting your companions. I’m surprised that this trust is actually present when you are talking about that human.”

Delia’s gaze was stagnant, then she shook her head, “No doubt you are still the legendary noblewoman. Your wisdom and observation alone are daunting. However, sometimes women better be foolish, especially in front of the man, otherwise you will be very tired.”

“Perhaps you are right, Delia.” Christina smiled, “I haven’t been shopping for a long time, I’m not good at this at all. I think you will have many opportunities to fight back later.”

The 2 women held hands and walked down the street intimately. Delia seemed to have forgotten her identity as a ‘hostage’ as she introduced various shops and facilities to Christina, and they even went shopping for clothes together. Christina did not look like she often went shopping. She asked various questions curiously, and she was constantly admiring the prosperity of the Dark Moon.

“It’s unbelievable that this city was still a place of dilapidation and depression a few years ago, and now it has become the most prosperous place in the Demon Realm. It is not inferior in any respect even compared to the 3 capitals.” Christina sighed, “That human is really exceptional. I can guess that he is behind the various changes of the Fallen Angel Empire. The term ‘making mundane magical’ can no longer describe his ability.”

“Of course.” Delia felt proud because Chen Rui was a true friend of hers and Roman; a lifelong friend.

“I understand your trust and protection for your friend, but you are so afraid of me dealing with him?” Christina sighed, “As far as I know, you have left 13 types of secret marks on our way here. 9 of which I don’t even understand. They should be used in the special intel departments. If my guess is right, there must be a place for you in the Dark Moon’s ‘Dark Demon’. But your worry is really unnecessary. If I really want to do anything, even the dragons of the Dark Moon may not be able to stop me.”

Delia did not explain and smiled without saying a word, but she was secretly wary in her heart. This lady is indeed terrifying. I don’t know if the leader can handle it, but no matter how smart Christina is, she won’t foresee that there are actually 6 dragons in the Dark Moon, and 1 more Dodo. As long as they find this place based on these secret marks, they can easily take this lady down.

“Sorry, Delia, it seems that I have misunderstood.” Christina suddenly apologized, and Delia was taken aback for a moment as she saw 2 familiar figures appearing in front of her - Chen Rui and Isabella.

The thing was, Roman happened to run into Chen Rui and Isabella who were returning from the passage of the Rainbow Valley when he was returning to the mansion to ask Paglio and the others to help deal with Christina.

Hearing the name ‘Christina’, Chen Rui couldn’t help but feel shocked. He knew the true identity of this lady. If he was ignorant at the Silent Night Wetland, then in Crystal Valley, Christina’s true identity had already been revealed. However, he did not expect that he just tried his luck playing ‘Solo Dance under the Moonlight’ at the concert, and this Her Majesty Empress launched an unexpected counterattack. She is actually using Christina’s identity to visit the Dark Moon in person and search by Chen Rui’s name. Wait, it should be Richard that she’s looking for. Is it exposed already? When…

Chen Rui’s surprise could not be concealed from Isabella next to him. Madam Aunt was very careful and her ‘sniffing’ was even better than the little maid, so she immediately felt that this woman was ‘suspicious’. Therefore, Madam Aunt insisted on following. Due to her presence, they could find the target immediately by tracking the secret marks.

At the moment Chen Rui saw Christina, he felt the star-like black eyes staring at him through the veil, and he couldn’t help but feel a little dazzled.

Isabella took the initiative to speak up, “Ms. Christina?”

The lady no doubt turned her attention to Madam Aunt, “Yes, you are…”

Ms. Yini ignored her. She just held Chen Rui affectionately, and pressed her plump breast to his arm, “Do you know her?”

Behind this action, there was an illusory hatchet that made Chen Rui shiver. He wanted to say that he not only know her, but they also had sex before. However, at this time, he could only pretend to be dumb, “This is my first time seeing this lady. How may I help you?”

Christina’s eyes were very calm behind the veil as she looked at Isabella.

With Isabella’s keenness, she could sense that behind this calmness was a strong self-confidence as if the opponent in front of her was not of the same level. This made Madam Aunt secretly vigilant and quite insulted. For a time, there seemed to be intangible electric sparks buzzing in between the 2 beautiful women wearing veils.

chapters.title: Chapter 730: Exposed
chapters.body:
Chapter 730: Exposed

Chapter 730: Exposed

“Sir Chen Rui,” Christina said lightly, “I’m entrusted with a few words that need to be relayed to you separately. I wonder if it is convenient?”

Before Chen Rui spoke, he felt that his arm was pinched hard, so he had to force himself to say, “If I say it is inconvenient?”

Christina was silent for a moment, “Then, I was presumptuous. Please forgive me for the interruption. I will leave now.”

“Wait a minute.” It was Isabella who spoke. When Christina bade farewell just now, she keenly sensed the fluctuations in the man’s mood, even if the fluctuations were quickly hidden. Madam Aunt was a smart woman who knew what to be unreasonable and when to be reasonable.

“It seems that there is something important. Chen Rui, just listen to it. Don’t let a lady come all the way in vain.” Madam Aunt smiled softly, “However, Ms. Christina… When asking someone next time, you should be polite and low-key. No man dares to be with an overbearing woman.”

Chen Rui was a little speechless. Madam Aunt was now speaking nonchalantly. The Lady Devil’s Snare was much more arrogant and proud than Christina now.

“Thank you for your suggestion.” Christina still had a calm expression and tone, clearly still ignoring her.

Madam Aunt sneered coldly, then she secretly pinched Chen Rui before coming to Delia. Without even looking at Christina, she turned around with her niece-in-law.

“Sir Chen Rui really has no shortage of women by his side, plus she is a very capable woman.” Christina said indifferently while staring at Isabella’s back. She seemed to have the upper hand just now, but she was unknowingly competitive in her mind. Objectively speaking, it was a tie, which Isabella also knew.

Chen Rui chuckled and Christina slowly walked forward, “I was only halfway through my shopping trip just now. Can I continue now? I’m usually very busy, and I don’t remember when was the last time I actually went shopping.”

“Oh.” Chen Rui didn’t know what Christina’s real intention was, so he had to use Zola’s moves to deal with her.

Next… it was really shopping; pure shopping.

“What is this? It’s beautiful.” Christina picked up an item from the stall.

“Auspicious knot, it is said that it can bring special luck.” Chen Rui didn’t give the vendor a chance to sell and explained directly, “In fact, it’s made of a special plant meridian, and it has no actual value… Uh, 15 white crystal coins. Fixed price, deal?”

The second half was for the vendor. He noticed that Christina really liked this exquisite thing. After some bargaining, she bought it with 18 white crystal coins. Christina watched Chen Rui bargaining with interest, then she happily accepted the gift.

After this interlude, the initially awkward atmosphere seemed to relax a lot. Chen Rui took Christina to taste the Dark Moon’s snacks, bought a few small gifts, and walked to the Red Fruit Hotel.

The Red Fruit Hotel was 1 of the largest hotels in the Dark Moon which was relatively high class. Chen Rui followed Christina into the VIP Room No. 1. In fact, it was a suite with a living room and a bedroom, as well as ‘upscale facilities’ such as magic television. This made Chen Rui inexplicably think of the word “one night stand”, and his heartbeat suddenly raced.

“I haven’t been so relaxed in a long time. It feels good.” Christina motioned to him to sit down, “Thanks to you and your little gift.”

“Miss, you are welcome.”

Christina’s tone changed, “Then, let’s talk about the main thing.”

Chen Rui’s thoughts turned, and he answered, “En.”

Christina said calmly, “I want to know if anything can be changed as long as there are enough chips?”

This question enabled Chen Rui to slightly guess her intentions in his mind, “There is no absolute thing in the world, but it also depends on what kind of ‘change’ it is.”

“Then, you should understand what I mean. Can you give me a definite answer? Bargaining chips are not a problem.”

Chen Rui pondered for a moment and gave the answer, “There are some things that can’t be placed on the trading balance, so naturally they can’t be measured by chips.”

Christina went silent for a while, and she slowly took off her veil, “I only ask you once, can I be the reason to change you?”

Chen Rui was shocked when he saw the beautiful face that he hadn’t seen for a long time, “Miss, you…”

“I already come to you with sincerity.” Christina sighed, “You shouldn’t put up a pretense anymore. Maybe you can deceive the Demon Realm, but you can’t hide from a woman’s intuition. Not to mention that you didn’t do it flawlessly. That’s why I personally came to the Dark Moon this time.”

There was a thud in Chen Rui’s mind, and he was suddenly frantic. 2 words came to his mind: I’m exposed.

He had imagined many times that he would appear in front of Catherine 1 day and declare domineeringly in her surprised gaze, “You’re mine now”. Yet, in reality, it was the other way around. Her Majesty Empress came to him and asked domineeringly, “Are you willing to be mine?”

Catherine disguised and came personally presumably because she had already seen through Chen Rui’s identity. Even if Aguile had not been exposed, at least the human and the trio-specialized mechanical master could be equated.

Chen Rui smiled bitterly, “Catherine, I…”

The Demon Realm’s top beauty, top sage and the most powerful empress watched him quietly with hope flowing from her peaceful and beautiful black eyes, “Can you give me the answer?”

It was not an order nor a request, but a hope. What a woman hoped from a man.

It was the first time that Chen Rui saw Catherine with this kind of expression. He almost blurted out ‘yes’ without thinking. After taking a deep breath, he finally calmed down.

“I’m surprised that you would propose such a bargaining chip. Yes, it is a bargaining chip.” Chen Rui stared into Catherine’s eyes with a scorching gaze. “Why did you make such a change? Or sacrifice?”

Catherine suddenly felt a little upset when she heard that her condition was classified as a ‘bargaining chip’, but her tone was still very calm, “Why ask if you know the answer? Do you want me to give you some compliments? Okay. From defeating Obsidian in the Dark Moon, Shea’s quick ascension to the throne, then turned the threat of my empire into cooperation, to the terrifying speed of development and growth now. You should know how much effort you have exerted in all these. The newspapers, magic television, princess series, aromatic millet wine, concerts… These things are all planned by you. If this continues, within 10 years, the Fallen Angel Empire will become the most terrifying empire of the Demon Realm. The threat you pose is too great. “

“Is this the reason that let our Her Majesty Empress be willing to sacrifice herself?” Chen Rui suddenly felt indignant, and he did not hide his anger.

Seeing Chen Rui’s anger, Catherine somehow felt a lot more comfortable. She shook her head slightly, “Not only that, but also because… the stability of the empire requires a prince consort, and even a throne inheritor.”

“Really?” Chen Rui sneered, “Even marriage and body are for the empire? It’s really a respectable Her Majesty Empress.”

“From the moment I put on the crown, many things are destined. A ruler has not only the supreme power but also the biggest responsibility.” Catherine looked directly at Chen Rui, “At this point, you may not have a profound understanding, but your Empress Shea will definitely have a truly personal experience. I don’t know what is the relationship between her and Aguile, or what is the relationship between you and Aguile, but I can be sure that even her range of options of marriage partner is also very small. She chooses Aguile which should be the best choice in the range or that she has paid a considerable price for it. So, I came to the Dark Moon today, do you understand? “

Chen Rui asked, “I’m just a human, is it worth it?”

“Your value far exceeds the definition of race. Even if you don’t have mechanics skills, no black potions, or any special abilities, your talent is still number 1 in the world. With your help, I believe that the Dark Shadow Empire will produce a qualitative leap. For the benefit of the empire, I think it’s worth it, plus… I don’t hate you.”

Green veins appeared on Chen Rui’s forehead: Why won’t you throw away the so-called benefits of the empire and just say you like me in the last sentence?

Catherine seemed to see through his thoughts, “I don’t want to hide it. If it’s not for the empire, Catherine. Asmodeus will not come to you like this. If you agree, you can become my only prince consort; if you can incite defection in the Dark Moon Estate, then Athena will become the first general of the Dark Shadow Empire. I won’t even mind the existence of her or other women.”

If someone nearby heard Catherine’s words to him, he would be confused and think that his hearing system was down. The Demon Realm’s top beauty, top sage, Her Majesty Empress of the Dark Shadow Empire, would actually say such a condition to a human!

“What a tempting condition. I thought of a certain newsletter advertisement. As long as you pay dozens more, you can get a discount package.” Chen Rui smiled, “I admit that I really want you; I really want it. I know that you have a place for me in your heart, and it is useless to deny it because we have experienced the battle in the Crystal Valley together. I still remember that wonderful kiss now.”

Seeing Chen Rui reminiscing, Catherine’s calmness finally began to falter with the urge to punch him, but she also admitted in her mind that from the moment this man was willing to die for her, her mind was indelibly marked with his shadow. She once thought that he was about to die, so she confessed her feelings without concealing. How would she know that this bastard was a liar? He actually feigned death after cheating her to kiss him.

If your attachment is to protect everyone, then my current attachment is just to protect you.

This sentence appeared in her dream more than once. Aside from the empire, he was indeed the only man she had ever had emotions for.

Catherine tried her best to control her emotion and said coldly, “So, do you refuse? Do you think I will leave such a huge threat to the empire?”

chapters.title: Chapter 731: The Loneliness Of The Emperor
chapters.body:
Chapter 731: The Loneliness Of The Emperor

Chapter 731: The Loneliness of the Emperor

A faint pressure exuded from Catherine’s body as if the prelude to a storm. Chen Rui squinted slightly as he suddenly felt a sense of danger.

In the [Analytical Eyes], Catherine’s overall strength had actually surpassed the original S+ and reached S++. It seemed that her strength had also improved a lot during this period. The black potions he gave away definitely had some credit.

This was like lifting a rock and stubbing his own foot.

“Wait a minute, you turn hostile too quickly, I haven’t said whether or not to agree.”

Catherine was taken aback. She retrieved most of the murderous intent and said surprisingly, “Then you just…”

“Don’t you know that there is a word called ‘reserved’? I was being reserved just now.” Chen Rui ignored the oppression and raised a finger, “I formally express my attitude - whether Catherine or Christina or some other identity, your prince consort, husband and man can only be me!”

Even Catherine was moved by that kind of resolute gaze. Her Majesty Empress’ momentum had been completely weakened. This guy added another sentence, “Of course it’s not a problem to give birth to an inheritor. I can promise to complete the task.”

This sentence made Catherine’s face feel a little hot, but she didn’t hear the next sentence for a long time. So, her pretty brows wrinkled slightly, “And?”

“And… Uh, it’s okay to have a few more inheritors!”

“That’s it?”

“Ah.”

Catherine’s murderous intent instantly soared, and her voice became cold, “Are you fooling me?”

“No, I’m serious. What I’m talking about is just a matter between a man and a woman, and it’s a man and woman who have feelings for each other and had an intimate relationship before. It has nothing to do with the empire and its interests. This is my answer. Chen Rui looked straight at Catherine, “I said back then that I will come to the Dark Shadow Empire with the strength that made the Demon Realm tremble and snatch you away. In the Crystal Valley, I also had left a will that ‘I will definitely come back’. Do you know why I didn’t go? Because my current strength is not enough.”

(Not enough.)

(Not enough to make you really let go.)

Catherine suddenly had a tacit understanding of his unspoken words. In the deep black eyes, the tranquil lake water seemed to ripple slightly like it was thrown with a stone.

After a moment of silence, Catherine said, “Could it be… you want to unify the Demon Realm to achieve this wish? If so, I can only comment on it as ‘foolish as always’. I came to the Dark Moon today not to listen to your so-called oath, so you don’t need to talk nonsense. I just want to tell you that since you don’t want to join the Dark Shadow Empire, then we are destined to become enemies.”

Chen Rui sighed and made a look of no resistance, “So, do you want to make a move? Get rid of me, the biggest threat to the survival of the empire? If you want to kill me, I don’t seem to have any room for resistance.”

Catherine’s momentum suddenly disappeared when she looked into his eyes, “I can’t kill you, not only because you are calm, but also because of my intuition; even though I have the Dark Shadow Cape and I’m only 1 step away from kingdomized. Don’t say you don’t know what is kingdomized, just like you never should doubt a woman’s intuition.”

Chen Rui smiled bitterly. A woman’s instinct is no doubt strong, but Catherine has no real killing intent from the beginning.

“Actually, I have guessed this based on Delia previously unintentionally revealing her trust in you, and the lady with the veil rest assured to leave you alone by my side. Your strength should have grown to… at least to the degree of being able to leave safely in front of me. If I knew this earlier… I would have made you stay in the Silent Night Wetland or take your life. Unfortunately, there is no way back in life.”

Chen Rui sighed, “You have never really looked back, how do you know that you can’t look back? It’s like, you have never really let go, how do you know you can’t let it go?”

“No need to waste my time. No matter what it is, you can’t shake my will. Maybe you are the only man whom I have feelings for, but I can’t let go of my persistence.” After speaking frankly about her good feelings for Chen Rui, Catherine seemed like she had removed a certain burden as her eyes became more determined, “If you really want to fulfill your foolish wish by conquering the Dark Shadow Empire, even if you succeed, you will only get my corpse. This is what I have to say and I will not disturb you anymore. You can leave. For a talent like you, I will leave a little bit of leeway. You don’t have to worry about the leak of your identity or secrets before we completely become enemies. If you change your mind, I will always welcome you. So… the next time we meet, it will be either in my palace or on the battlefield.”

No doubt she is persistent as always.

In order to protect the civilians.

Sitting alone on the icy throne.

Chen Rui stared deeply into Catherine’s beautiful and moving eyes as if he was trying to engrave her seriousness and determination in his mind.

“Frankly, Catherine, at first I was more attracted to your beauty, coupled with that relationship and man’s… possessive desire, but now, I’m truly fascinated by you, my Majesty Empress. Since the separation is coming soon, please allow me to play a tune for you.”

Catherine wanted to refuse, but her gaze turned to the familiar red piccolo in Chen Rui’s hand, and she finally nodded.

The melodious piccolo sounded. What surprised Catherine was that it was not the familiar ‘Solo Dance under the Moonlight’, but another song that she had never heard before. The clear and melancholy notes lingered in her heart with deep sentimental and persistence of no return.

She closed her eyes and seemed to see the window sill, the lonely moonlight, the vague overlapping shadows, the passersby, the reluctant gaze and the fading back.

One day, all the melancholy and sadness would no longer exist; even the soul would be annihilated, but the imprint of the intersection of 2 hearts and 2 lives was forever engraved at that moment. It was like the flash of stars in the sky; even if it was only a moment, there was no regret.

The music stopped, and Catherine who was immersed in it unconsciously opened her eyes slowly as a tear fell from the corner of her eye. She stroked the wetness on her face in astonishment, only to find that she was the only one left in the room.

Regardless of the result, for the rest of my life… will I not regret it?

After a long time.

“Damn guy… he didn’t even say the title of the song.”

Perhaps due to the music, this low voice was no longer dull and calm.

The Bloody Empire’s Iron Fist Estate.

Edmund was covered in blood as he stumbled through the woods.

The Iron Fist City fort was breached, and the last power he had in his hands was also lost.

Just half an hour ago, after his elite guards died to protect him, he had become a veritable loner without any backing.

After confirming that there were no chasing soldiers behind, Edmund panted and leaned against a tree, slowly sitting down on the ground with the long sword in his hand. The scene of the previous city collapse appeared in his mind. At that time, his army was either dead or surrendered. Seeing that the situation was over, he personally killed dozens of his wives and concubines to avoid being insulted by Aleus and others. When he was about to commit suicide, he was beaten unconscious and rescued by his elite guards.

Although his life was saved, the huge humiliation and blow of the failure were simply unacceptable by this second prince of the Bloody Empire.

“Why did Demon God bestow victory to Aleus? Why?! What did I do wrong?”

A furious shout echoed in the woods.

“You’re not wrong.”

A deep and indifferent voice sounded.

This familiar voice shocked Edmund, and his shout stopped abruptly.

“Father……”

A figure appeared in front of Edmund. He was not tall with long black hair and an ordinary face. He should be a random passerby in any place, but no one in the Demon Realm dared to ignore this ‘ordinary’ person. Instead, they needed to look up to this person.

Because he was Raizen, the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse, Raizen. Mammon.

“Father, when did you end the training…” Edmund struggled to stand up.

“Just when I learned that you failed.” Raizen stared at his son indifferently, “I’m very disappointed in you.”

“You have always been disappointed in me!” Edmund’s breathing became rapid as he said without scruples, “I’m your true eldest son. When I was young, Aleus and Teris called me elder brother. I was the Bloody Empire’s veritable great prince! Later… I became the second prince. This time I just want to regain everything that belongs to me. Unfortunately, I was wrong, seriously wrong!”

Raizen’s voice was calm, “I said that you are not wrong, Aleus is not wrong, and even… Teris is not wrong. It’s just that you lost.”

Edmund leaned down on the tree and sighed, “Yes, I lost; I lost completely. I have nothing left.”

“So I’m disappointed in you because you can’t face failure. It used to be so, and it is still the same now.” Raizen shook his head slowly, “As my son, I can spare your life and let you spend the rest of your life without worries.”

“Captive?” Edmund showed a sneer expression on his face as he clenched his fists, “Let me watch the winner reach the peak stage of strength and power step by step? Ever since I became sensible, the first thing I remember is what you said to me - The empire does not need losers.”

Raizen’s eyelids slowly closed. “There is an old saying that the losers are always in the wrong. It has been that way from ancient times to the present.”

“Yes… the empire really doesn’t need a loser.” Edmund laughed miserably as his face suddenly showed an abnormal red, then it gradually turned black. The real source of the change was in his clenched fist that held the poison crystals used for suicide. If he didn’t use his strength to resist, he would be poisoned to death in 10 seconds.

Raizen sighed softly as he quietly watched Edmund slowly fell down with a bleeding face. The faint sadness that passed through his eyes was quickly covered by the cold solemnity, and he suddenly punched to the sky.

In the dense clouds, an opening was split up as if a strange eye had been opened.

After a while, heavy rain poured down, and the blood on Edmund’s body was washed away by the rain.

In the rain, the back of that lonely emperor faded away.

chapters.title: Chapter 732: A Change That Would Affect The Overall Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 732: A Change That Would Affect The Overall Situation

Chapter 732: A Change that Would Affect the Overall Situation

Chen Rui, who left the Red Fruit Hotel, walked the streets, feeling lost.

He did not know what happened in the woods of the Iron Fist Estate, nor did he know that there was a lonely king walking in the rain. He only understood 1 thing. Catherine had never been so close yet so far out of reach.

You’re the only man whom I have feelings for.

If you really want to fulfill your foolish wish by conquering the Dark Shadow Empire, even if you succeed, you will only get my corpse.

Will it go farther and farther? The lonely shadow. Even if Chen Rui had no regrets, a faint sadness surged. He was startled and stopped suddenly because someone was waiting for him in front.

If it was his first woman whom he left just now, then this was the first woman he fell in love with. In terms of appearance, she was not the most beautiful, and in terms of strength, she was not the strongest, but she was the woman he loved the most so far.

“Athena…”

She walked over while staring at him with red gem-like eyes. In front of many people, she gently held his arm without any pretentiousness. Although she was the supreme ruler of the Dark Moon and 1 of the 3 main commanders of the empire’s military, she was the original gentle Athena in front of him.

She was always worth cherishing.

After walking slowly with him for a while, Athena said, “Is she here?”

As early as in Mountain Xilang, he confessed to Athena about his relationship with Christina. Athena was also the only 1 among his women who knew the name ‘Christina’. The rest of them just vaguely know that Chen Rui had a woman of the Dark Shadow Empire before Athena.

“En.”

“You don’t seem to be in a good mood.”

“It’s really not very good… because next time we meet, we are likely to be enemies.”

“Sorry, I heard Isabella say her name…” “Where’s Yini?” Chen Rui smiled bitterly. In order to deal with a mistress, you don’t hesitate to instigate the main wife to take action? Don’t forget, you are also a mistress.

“It should be me who should say sorry, Athena.”

“Let’s go home.” Athena gently leaned her head on his shoulder, completely ignoring the various jealousy, envy and hate gazes in the distance.

“En, go home.”

The warm-hearted man held his lover’s waist and the cuddling shadows joined together, walking forward.

A few days later.

The Dark Shadow Empire, the palace side hall.

Liliz looked at Empress Catherine at the window sill looking in the distance with some doubts in her mind. As the confidant of Her Majesty Empress, she could feel that some changes had taken place in the empress recently, especially after returning from a secret trip a few days ago. She suddenly looked into the distance a lot more. In the memory of Liliz who had served for many years, Her Majesty Catherine would habitually look far away only when she had unresolved issues in her mind.

“Liliz, do you think in a lifetime, a woman can encounter…” Catherine asked thoughtfully, then she seemed to wake up, and did not continue.

“Your Majesty?” Liliz showed a surprised expression, “Are you okay?”

Catherine shook her head. She was silent for a moment before speaking up, “You and Terdila have always been the people I trust most and are loyal. However, due to my negligence and selfishness, your relationship has dragged on for so many years. I’m sorry… From today onward, I will give you a 2-year vacation to enjoy the couple’s life. Maybe you can take the opportunity to give birth to a good descendant.

Liliz blushed, “Your Majesty…”

“Don’t refuse, just treat it as a means for me to win over my subordinates. Terdila is a good guy; cherish each other. With me as your backing, he dares not bully you, or should I say… you don’t bully him too much.”

“Thank you, Your Majesty.” Liliz bit her lip and said, “That, please forgive me for being impolite. Recently, Your Majesty is a little different from usual times. May I ask…”

“Don’t guess randomly.” Catherine stepped down the steps, “Now the Bloody Empire internal strife has just ended. Although Great Prince Aleus defeated Second Prince Edmund, his prestige is far from that of Raizen, and he needs time to stabilize the empire’s internal situation. The Fallen Angel Empire is also working hard on development. Unless Raizen ends his training, or else… Generally speaking, there shouldn’t be any major changes in the Demon Realm during these few years. You have a good rest for 2 years. This is my order.”

“The one who should rest the most is not me, but Your Majesty!” Liliz’s eyes suddenly turned red, “For so many years, Your Majesty has been supporting this empire alone to lead the people of the empire through the most difficult moment, step by step toward prosperity and stability. I know very well how much Your Majesty has sacrificed for this empire. If Your Majesty really encounters one who is worth it…”

“Liliz!” Catherine’s voice suddenly had a kind of empress majesty, “You overstepped the rules! Now, execute my order and immediately hand over all the affairs at hand to Shilu.”

Liliz did not dare to speak anymore and bowed back. When she walked to the door of the side hall, she received the intel from her subordinates.

Liliz opened it, and a shocking expression flashed past her eyes. She immediately returned to the side hall.

“Your Majesty, it’s not that I disobey, but this time my vacation… really needs to be postponed!”

The main hall of the Fallen Angel Empire.

Shea’s expression was extremely serious while looking at several emergency intel that ‘burst out’ in a day.

“Bloody Empire’s Lord Raizen ended training and declared this internal strife incident as the Second Prince Edmund’s rebellion. He commended Great Prince Aleus and Young Prince Teris who quelled the rebellion.”

“The retreating Edmund’s army suddenly changed direction, joined the elite legion personally led by the Bloody Empire’s First General Gustav, and regrouped at the Iron Fist Estate in the south. The Bloody Empire fully mobilized strategic supplies to the south, and the Warlock Fortress’ General George urgently mobilized armed forces for defense.”

“The Bloody Empire fully activated the western defense line, closed the passage with the Dark Shadow Empire’s Jergal Fortress, and sent an envoy to the Dark Shadow Empire.”

Shea looked at the ministers with the same solemn expression and spoke up, “Everyone, I need to listen to your opinions.”

The left prime minister, Oliver, spoke up, “Obviously, Raizen’s troop redeployment was aimed at us. If it is not for bluffing, then even with General George, the Warlock Fortress would not be able to stop the Bloody Empire Army. However, what I’m puzzled about is that the Bloody Empire just has ended the internal strife and its vitality has yet to recover. How could it suddenly attack our empire desperately? Of course, just in case, we should not take it lightly and immediately mobilize our troops to the north. At least, we should show the momentum of going all-out.”

The right prime minister, Stiller, agreed, “I also think it is strange. The internal strife of the Bloody Empire has just been settled down. It is impossible for Raizen to fight us with all his strength at this time. If I estimate correctly, the real purpose is to follow the example of the methods of Dark Shadow Empire back then to request conditions for cooperation from us such as requiring the technology of new things such as magic television and aromatic millet wine. But the current empire is not the empire when the Obsidian’s rebellion was just quelled. Furthermore, we have also formed an alliance with the Dark Shadow Empire. I think there is no need to fear the Bloody Empire.”

“Don’t underestimate Raizen.” The important minister of the royal family, Sarandi, shook his head, “What we have concluded with the Dark Shadow Empire is only an economic alliance, not military. Once a war really breaks out, the Dark Shadow Empire will definitely stand by while waiting for the opportunity to profit from it, so we can only rely on ourselves. Although the empire’s economic development is rapid and the military strength is also steadily recovering, our comprehensive combat power is still the last of the 3 empires. 300 years ago, I followed the Lord of Midnight Sun and joined the demons’ joint army to fight against humans. Raizen was there at the time. He was proficient in using the army. I have an ominous premonition. I’m afraid this time is not a bluff.”

“Don’t you think this so-called ‘premonition’ is ridiculous?” Lunters of the elder family sneered, “How can you prove that Raizen will do it? I bet that what Raizen is coveting for is our skills and resources. The Bloody Empire’s actions are just to apply pressure. The envoy sent to our empire should be on the way!”

Before Lunters finished speaking, a guard came to report, “Raizen the Great sent an envoy to our empire and has passed the Warlock Fortress with the permission of General George.”

Upon hearing this news, Lunters immediately showed a confident look while Sarandi showed a thoughtful expression as he frowned without saying a word.

At this time, there was also an intense debate in the main hall of the Dark Shadow Empire Palace.

On the throne, Catherine, who had been thinking silently, finally opened her eyes slowly.

“Order First General Broc to fully strengthen the defense of the Jergal Fortress; order Second General Valen to lead the Sharp Wind Legion to station in the Seg Estate in the southeast for military exercises. Do not approach Town Leia for the time being; order Bloody Vine Flower Estate Lord and Third General Crawford to assemble all elite troops in this estate and legion and be on standby at any time.”

All the ministers were shocked. Putting aside strengthening the defense of the Jergal Fortress, the ‘exercises’ of the Sharp Wind Legion stationed in the Seg Estate and the assembling of elites by Crawford are clearly intended for the Fallen Angel Empire. From this point of view, Catherine the Great’s judgment is …

“I have a premonition that Raizen will definitely take action, and he will go all out.” Catherine’s black eyes behind the veil flashed wisely, “Because he is Raizen. Mammon.”

The same word, ‘premonition’ was not deemed ridiculous by the officials of the Dark Shadow Empire because she was Catherine. Asmodeus, the Demon Realm’s top sage. This ‘premonition’ once saved the entire empire.

After the palace meeting was over, the officials retreated. Catherine’s order was communicated and executed quickly.

Catherine leaned back on the throne as her gaze that turned to the east became distant and profound.

“Raizen, have you also noticed the threat of the Fallen Angel Empire? You want to eliminate this threat in the bud before it grows?”

“No doubt, you are still so vigorous and resolute, but sometimes, being direct is the most effective way. If I was more decisive back then, maybe the Fallen Angel Empire is now in my hands. “

“So eager to make a move… In other words, your strength is already…”

“In any case, this time is a rare opportunity for the Dark Shadow Empire.”

“The Demon Realm’s overall situation is going to change again.

Catherine stood up slowly, touching something lightly in her hand, “Will you come to me?”

Obviously, the ‘you’ in this sentence were not the previous Raizen.

The white jade fingers were stroking an exquisite thing.

chapters.title: Chapter 733: Crisis
chapters.body:
Chapter 733: Crisis

Chapter 733: Crisis

The envoy of the Bloody Empire soon arrived at the Fallen Angel Capital.

Unexpectedly, this envoy only brought 1 word which was the original saying of Raizen the Great — ‘Surrender!’

This was not a humiliating condition such as cessation of land or even compensation, but a real death note for the empire.

Such a condition was impossible to accept regardless of the empress of the Fallen Angel Empire, the minister, or even the people.

After the envoy relayed Raizen’s original words, he ‘explained’ 2 more sentences. The Bloody Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire originally had an alliance agreement, but it was signed by Raizen the Great and Regent Obsidian. Now the Obsidian regime was overthrown by the ‘rebellion’, so the alliance automatically became invalid. Shea had only 1 way - surrender. If she refuses, the Fallen Angel Empire would be annihilated, and the Lucifer Royal Family would be annihilated.

This kind of blunt provocation and threat enraged the Fallen Angel Empire. In particular, Raizen defined Shea’s replacement of Obsidian as a ‘non-government military’ rebellion. It was tantamount to not recognize Shea as the empress who was recognized by the Sword of Fallen Angel. If even this kind of clause could be tolerated, then the empire’s dignity and cohesion would be gone, so Shea didn’t hesitate to expel the envoy out of the capital directly.

In fact, the so-called envoy was just a cutscene. Everyone could see that the real purpose of the Bloody Empire Lord was very clear, which was war.

It’s really war!

Previously, Lunters, who seemed confident that Raizen was just bluffing, was speechless. Oliver, Stiller and others were also shocked, but now the most important thing was not to review or be ashamed but to face the huge test that was approaching.

No doubt, after the envoy of the Bloody Empire was expelled from the Fallen Angel Capital, the army assembled in the Iron Fist Estate began to act immediately. The target was the Warlock Fortress led by General George which tightened the nerves of everyone at the Fallen Angel Empire.

“According to the reliable intel of the secret intelligence department, this time the Bloody Empire has invested at least 6 million troops in the Iron Fist Estate and they are all elite.”

Shea’s words made all the ministers shocked. There was a burst of commotion.

“How can there be 6 million elites! How are there so many troops from the Bloody Empire? Didn’t Aleus and Edmund just finish an internal strife? Is this news accurate?”

“If there is so much military power, how can the Warlock Fortress stand it?”

Shea sighed. “It’s a pity that this intel has been repeatedly confirmed. What Aleus and Edmund mobilized previously was only the strength on the surface of the Bloody Empire. These are the real trump cards that Raizen has been building up for many years.”

Although after the fall of the Midnight Sun, Raizen joined the 3 Empires Alliance agreement under the mediation of Catherine, he had never stopped the military expansion in the past few years. Whether it was on the surface or in the dark. The Dark Shadow Empire should also be the same. Only when the empire becomes stronger, it can be truly safe. It was a pity that the Fallen Angel Empire had never stopped the internal strife over the years. Compared with the other 2 empires, it had done little.

Although this was also probably attributed to the secret means of the empires and the invasion of external strength such as the Bloodfall, Obsidian’s talents were indeed mediocre. Whether it was economic or military, the development speed was far behind the other 2 empires. In order to consolidate his rule, the regent who had originally assumed the throne unjustly used most of his energy to suppress dissidents and internal friction. Especially in the conquest of the Dark Moon, the entire empire’s strength was greatly depleted and most of the elites were lost. Others were advancing, but they were regressing. It was no longer as simple as 2-1=1.

If it weren’t for the rapid economic development of the Dark Moon and the gradual recovery of military strength after Shea ascended the throne, there was no room to resist the Bloody Empire at present. The question was - could they really ‘resist’ it this time?

This time, it was completely different from the last time when the Dark Shadow Empire pressured them. Raizen really dispatched the army. It seemed that the Bloody Empire Lord was determined to expose his fangs that had been hidden for many years.

“This war is inevitable. What we need now is not to question the number and strength of the enemy, but how to face the enemy!” Sarandi spoke up, “If the Bloody Empire is really going all-out in this battle, then Raizen definitely has more than 6 million elites, and there are also an unknown number of high-level powerhouses!”

“What about Raizen himself?” Oliver suddenly asked a question that made everyone a little bit scared. Will the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse personally lead the army?

Shea spoke, “The current intel shows that Raizen seems to be in the capital and has no tendency to personally lead the army for the time being. According to the analysis, he should be guarding against the Dark Shadow Empire… Speaking of the Dark Shadow Empire, there is another piece of bad news, Catherine used military exercises as an excuse to hoard many troops in the Bloody Vine Flower Estate and the Seg Estate. The target should be the Tekula Fortress, Red Spirit Estate or Dark Moon Estate. This time, it is very likely that we will face a 2-front war.”

The consecutive bad news caused many people to panic. In fact, the relationship between empire and empire was originally like this. The so-called ‘friendship’ was only based on interests. Once it transcends interests, then the mask of friendship could be torn at any time.

If it was the Dark Shadow Empire in a weak position, the Fallen Angel Empire would also not hesitate to strike when there was a chance as long as it could get enough benefits.

So the current situation was that the Fallen Angel Empire not only had to directly face the Bloody Empire, which was almost impossible to defeat, but they also had to deal with the knife stabbed by the ‘allies’ from behind.

This war was doomed before it was fought.

Perhaps this was a war that would change the structure of the Demon Realm. It was unknown if the powerful Bloody Empire or the low-key Dark Shadow Empire would be the final winner, but there was no doubt that no matter who won or lost, the Fallen Angel Empire would be the first to be eliminated.

“Second General Gerant has fully activated the defense of the Tekula Fortress, and Red Spirit’s Lord Josh and the Dark Moon’s Lord Athena are also actively deploying defenses. However, in this way, the forces we can allocate to the White Feather Estate have been greatly reduced.”

Shea still seemed very calm. As a qualified ruler of an empire, she should not panic even in times of crisis. At least on the surface, she should not be panicking. Otherwise, the followers would really be chaotic, “The situation is extremely unfavorable to us. We will not be able to resist the enemy from the front, not to mention the enemy behind our back. At present, aside from going all out and fighting to the death, the only way is to unite with the Dark Shadow Empire to go against the Bloody Empire.”

“This is the best opportunity for annexation. Why would the Dark Shadow Empire’s empress, who is the Demon Realm’s top sage, agree?” The right prime minister Stiller shook her head, “Besides, Raizen the Great also dispatched an envoy in advance. It must be to discuss the division of our empire.”

“In any case, this is hope. We must not give up… Because of the urgency, Prince Consort Aguile is already on the way to the Dark Shadow Empire.” Shea stood up from the throne with a firm expression in her eyes, “The glory of the Sword of Fallen Angel will guide us to the end. I will go to the Warlock Fortress to supervise the battle. Shea. Lucifer vows to live and die with the empire!”

The Warlock Fortress.

The sky was overcast with clouds.

General George had received the news that reinforcements and logistical supplies led by the royal family’s peak stage of the Demon Overlord Disjaro had arrived at the fortress, but his frowning brows were not relieved at all because as the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, he had to face an unprecedentedly severe test.

A warm hand stretched out and held his palm behind his back. Even with his eyes closed, George knew whose hand it was.

“Gloria, how is the situation with the Bloody Empire Army?”

“The enemy is currently camping and gathering in front of the Town Nimbus. Counting the Bloody Red Legion led by First General Gustav that arrived this afternoon, the number of enemy troops has exceeded 2 million. Although they didn’t attack until now, the number is still increasing. All the residents of Town Nimbus have been evacuated, and all the magic hidden poles have been activated.”

“The Warlock Fortress’s garrisons are 500,000, the capital’s reinforcements are 300,000, and the White Feather Estate’s troops are 1.1 million. Although the number seems to be similar, the Bloody Empire Army are all capable elites. Except for the Warlock Fortress’s garrison, the capital’s reinforcements or White Feather Estate’s troops are much inferior. If we fight head-on, we will undoubtedly lose. Moreover, this is only the enemy’s vanguard forces of the army. I didn’t expect that Raizen would make such a determined all-out attack. This battle is likely to be the last battle in my life, you…”

“Don’t say absurd things like asking me to leave.” Madam Red Dragon sneered, but her red pupils were filled with a gentleness that was completely different from the usual coldness, “Remember those words back then? No matter what happens, we will always be together.”

George was silent for a while and did not speak. He just squeezed the hand tightly in his palm.

“The new ordnance and equipment sent by Chen Rui in batches have been assembled and set in place. The defense strength of the Warlock Fortress is much stronger than before. Even if Raizen personally came, he will not be able to break through for a while.” Madam Red Dragon gently leaned on her husband’s back, “As for Athena… you don’t have to worry too much. Your daughter has grown up and found a man who can protect her. Even if she encounters any danger, Chen Rui is there. Plus those dragons, worse come to worst, she can still escape.”

George nodded, “The Dark Shadow Empire is different from the Bloody Empire, but it is also not to be underestimated. I never thought that my daughter and I would face the Demon Realm’s top powerhouse and the Demon Realm’s top sage respectively. However, the strength of the Dark Moon is not what it used to be. It still has the Walan Fortress that is based on an advantageous land, so the Dark Shadow Empire should not choose the Dark Moon as the first point of attack. It is very likely that their primary target will be the relatively weak Red Spirit Estate. If we can effectively withstand the Bloody Empire Army’s attack, the pressure on Athena would be relatively less both psychologically and strategically…”

“General!” George’s right-hand man, Francis, hurriedly reported, “The army of the Bloody Empire began to pull out of camp and moved forward.”

“Good timing! Order the whole army to prepare for battle! Let the so-called elites of the Bloody Empire take a look at how the Warlock Fortress is the strongest and indestructible! For the empire, for Her Majesty Empress!”

George took a deep breath as a strong fighting spirit burst out all over, and the voice containing strength spread far away. From Madam Red Dragon, the right-hand man, to the soldiers around the fortress, they burst with a strong fighting spirit.

Looking at the dark clouds in the distance, the first general added a sentence in his mind: Also for you, my most beloved daughter!

chapters.title: Chapter 734: See Through
chapters.body:
Chapter 734: See Through

Chapter 734: See Through

As Shea said, the Fallen Angel Empire’s envoy team led by Aguile had passed the Seg Estate from the border of Town Leia and arrived at the Dark Shadow Empire.

Along the way, Chen Rui saw the emergency stand-by state of the Dark Shadow Empire. Although what he saw was only the tip of the iceberg, he could see that Catherine was definitely not bluffing this time.

Putting himself in her shoes to think about it, now was indeed a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to annex the Fallen Angel Empire. As a ruler, it was reasonable for Catherine to make such a decision.

It was just that the difficulty of his mission this time would be greatly increased. Christina might still be shaken by some things, but Catherine. Asmodeus would never shake the fundamental interests of the empire for personal feelings.

No doubt, Chen Rui hit the snag when he first arrived in the Dark Shadow Empire. Catherine used various excuses to delay the envoy in the Royal Hotel. They had no intention to meet him for a few days. It seemed that this delay would still continue indefinitely.

Even if he had eloquence or incredible skills, it was still useless if she didn’t want to meet him at all.

Chen Rui found Celine and tried to get through via various channels, but it was also unsuccessful. It seemed that Catherine did not plan to give ‘the Fallen Angel Empire’s envoy’ a chance at all. This made him feel anxious because a day of delay here meant the danger of the Warlock Fortress and the Fallen Angel Empire as a whole was even more increased.

Chen Rui racked his brain and suddenly thought of something, a magic badge. This badge was given to him by ‘Isis’ back then. It was said to be a special token of the Asmodeus Royal Family. If the Dark Moon had any unexpected changes, he could use this badge to look for her. ‘Isis’ was one of Catherine’s avatars who had once easily captured Azgalor, whom Chen Rui couldn’t match at the time.

Although Aguile’s identity was likely to be exposed, he couldn’t afford to care much in an emergency situation.

The Fallen Angel Empire had just finished recruiting and had not had the time to train them into the army, let alone sending them to the battlefield. Even if the number was equal to that of the Bloody Empire, they couldn’t compete with the elites. It was unimaginable how the Bloody Empire could gather these 6 million elite troops after the internal strife between Edmund and Aleus.

There was only 1 giant crystal beast and 10 assemble puppets in the ancient alchemy civilization castle. Apart from Delia who could barely control the assemble puppet, there was no qualified driver. There were only 500 crystal beasts and 3,000 lamp spirits, but very few elites reached the Demon Emperor. The lamp spirits created later were still in the charging stage and could not participate in the battle for the time being.

After Dragon Emperor Auglas got the Pseudo-God Dragon Power Essence of the holy dragon Rodriguez, he had already gone for closed training, so he didn’t know what happened in the Dark Moon. Even if he knew it, he wouldn’t let his daughter get involved. Therefore, Daniel and Julia declared that they would not participate in the war long ago and they would only protect Olypheus who insisted on staying in the Dark Moon.

As for Chen Rui himself, the [Pole Star Transformation] was sealed because of the Shackles of True Flame, so he could not compete with the kingdom-level powerhouse for the time being. The [Dual Training] skill could accelerate the absorption speed of the Shackles of True Flame to a certain extent, but it was a long cutscene after all. Even if it did not take 2 full years, it would surely take more than 1 year.

If this war happened 2 years later or even 1 year later, they would not fall into this kind of crisis. Now both Chen Rui himself and the strength at hand were greatly reduced, so teaming up with the Dark Shadow Empire was the only way to save the Fallen Angel Empire.

The ‘Asmodeus Royal Family’s special token’ was no doubt useful. Soon, Chen Rui was taken to a courtyard on the outskirts of the Dark Shadow Empire. The location was remote and very quiet.

Whether it is Christina or Isis… I don’t know how many avatars that Catherine has. Of course, this is not a habit of changing roles. What Chen Rui saw more from it was fatigue and loneliness, just like the strange and familiar figure in front of him.

Race: Lust Royal Family.

Physique: A (S++), Strength: A (S++), Spirit: A (S++), Agility: A (S++).

[Analysis]: Spirit cancellation, magic and spiritual damage debuff, puppet control, and the power of Nirvana (4).

Risk level: Quite high.

No doubt it’s her!

The ‘(4)’ after the ‘power of Nirvana’ in [Analysis] referred to the 4 times of Nirvana. Nirvana was the most powerful bloodline talent in the Asmodeus Royal Family. Each nirvana was equal to the renewal of qualitative changes in aptitude, which could break through various bottlenecks more easily. However, the higher the level of Nirvana, the greater the risk. 1 carelessness would result in annihilation.

It was said that in the history of the Asmodeus Royal Family, only 1 person had completed 5 times of Nirvana. A small number of 4 Nirvana’s geniuses chose to risk the fifth time, and they were all reduced to ashes under the flames of Nirvana.

It was precisely because of this risk that the talent of Nirvana was gradually ignored by the Asmodeus Royal Family, and they instead focused on the more practical [War Puppet].

She was still dressed in the black veil. ‘Isis’s’ gaze paused on Chen Rui’s mask as she asked faintly, “Where did your royal token come from?”

“Madam Isis, please forgive me for my presumptuous visit. The badge was handed to me by Sir Financial Officer Chen Rui of the Dark Moon. Please let me convey his sincere gratitude to Madam Isis.”

“Sir Aguile, I have already received this gratitude.” ‘Isis’ nodded, clearly making an order to leave.

Chen Rui would definitely not leave at this time. He played deaf, “Madam Isis, I have come from afar in order to hand over this token. Can you give me 10 minutes?”

“The entire Dark Shadow Empire knows Sir Aguile’s intention. Sir Aguile is the prince consort appointed by Her Majesty Shea. Although both of you are not yet married, you have the full authority to represent Her Majesty Shea. I’m just the guard of Her Majesty Catherine. You should meet Her Majesty Catherine.”

When talking about ‘meeting Her Majesty Catherine’, there was not a trace of abnormal fluctuations in those black eyes. It seems that Her Majesty is really calm.

“Then I’ll take it as Madam Isis has given me this time.” Chen Rui said brazenly, “The current situation is actually very clear. The Bloody Empire army has declared war on the Fallen Angel Empire, and the army is approaching the Warlock Fortress. Once the Fallen Angel Empire is breached, then the enemy of Raizen the Great will only be the Dark Shadow Empire. The Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire can be described as an interest-based relationship. We will benefit from each other when we cooperate, and we will be at a disadvantage when separated. Madam Isis, please tell Her Majesty Catherine, or if possible, I would like to explain the pros and cons to Her Majesty.”

“Since it is such a simple situation, Her Majesty Catherine will also have plans even without Sir Aguile. As for seeing Her Majesty… I believe Her Majesty’s current attitude is very clear. Sir Aguile is a smart person, so I don’t need to explain more.”

Chen Rui was silent for a moment before he spoke up, “Empress Catherine wants to take this opportunity to swallow the strength of the Fallen Angel Empire at the least cost? Then take advantage to go full force and defeat the Bloody Empire who exhausted their military after capturing the Fallen Angel Empire in order to unify the Demon Realm?”

“From my personal point of view, this seems to be a good suggestion. I believe it should be within the planning of Her Majesty Empress.”

Chen Rui raised his eyebrows, “As far as the level of hatred is concerned, the secretly plotting friends are more hateful than the violent enemies. Isn’t the Dark Shadow Empire afraid that the Fallen Angel Empire will directly take refuge in the Bloody Empire if it loses, then uses the strength of the Bloody Empire to destroy the Dark Shadow Empire?”

“I can’t answer you this question, but I once met Her Majesty Shea in the Dark Moon when she was only a lord at the time. From my impression, she would never surrender… Don’t you think that this trick is copying the strategy of Her Majesty Catherine back then?” Isis sneered behind the veil, “Unfortunately, Shea is not Catherine, and Raizen is not Midnight Sun. If the Fallen Angel Empire directly surrenders, then I’m sure that less than 1% of the Lucifer Royal Family can survive, just like the Samael Royal Family of the Wrath Empire.”

Chen Rui clenched his fists, “So, what if the Fallen Angel Empire gave up the northern defense line at all costs and tried its best to fight the Dark Shadow Empire to the end?”

“This kind of ridiculous threat doesn’t require Her Majesty Catherine to answer. A little guard like me can answer you.” Isis replied calmly, “Now the Fallen Angel Empire has 2/3 of its military forces focused on In the north, there is no way to turn back. Moreover, if your army gives up the defense and takes the initiative to attack, it is basically sacrificing strengths to seek shortcomings and courting death. Then, our army of the Dark Shadow Empire can just occupy the Dark Moon, Red Spirit Estate and the Tekula Fortress. We can wait for the arrival of the Bloody Empire Army while they exhaust themselves. It is equivalent to Raizen the Great working hard to capture the Fallen Angel Empire, but it turns out to be a contribution to the Dark Shadow Empire.”

Chen Rui was speechless, and it took a long time before he said, “Her Majesty Empress really wants to take this chance to unify the Demon Realm? Even if her strategy can succeed, the Fallen Angel Empire will perish and the Dark Shadow Empire’s power will be greatly enhanced, there will be stalemate when fighting against the Bloody Empire. The Demon Realm, which has only 2 empires left, will hate each other after losing the buffer of the third party. The 2 empires will be trapped in a protracted war. There will be no peace, and countless lives will be lost.”

Isis’ voice seemed cold, “The war is for the peace in the future. If the Demon Realm can finally be unified, all the sacrifices will be worthwhile.”

“Then how many years will it take to unify? 100 years? 1000 years? So what if it is finally unified? Can there be real peace? For now, how many of the royal families who died before the empire are willing to succumb? How many forces have hidden ambitions like the Bloodfall? How long can this superficial unity, which is exchanged with bloody means and sacrificed countless lives, be maintained? 100 years? 1000 years?”

In Chen Rui’s memory, the first emperor of Qin destroyed the 6 empires and unified them. As a result, Great Qin was torn apart again. Some of the most powerful dynasties in history were like this, alternating between prosperity, decline, unifying and separating. This was the natural cycle of history.

Isis just sneered at this and didn’t explain it as she said lightly, “10 minutes is up.”

Chen Rui gritted his teeth and said, “Have you seen countless homes destroyed by war? The prosperous and beautiful homes turned into 1000 miles of scorched soil in just a few moments. People have been displaced and homeless! Have you heard countless civilians cry during the massacre? The war’s death scythe, ignoring the crying and pleading of blood, reaping innocent lives ruthlessly. These are your exact words! Didn’t you experience the bloody and sorrowful scene before? What happened to your persistence? What about the things you want to protect? What about your so-called righteousness?”

Isis tore off the veil on her head, revealing her stunning face. Her cold gaze was fixed on Chen Rui’s mask, “Finally, you are no longer pretending? Sir Financial Officer, or… should I call you the Fallen Angel Empire’s Prince Consort?”

Chen Rui’s eyes were stagnant as he sighed. He took off his mask and said, “When did you see through this?”

chapters.title: Chapter 735: Make A Choice
chapters.body:
Chapter 735: Make A Choice

Chapter 735: Make a Choice

“I was already suspicious when Chen Rui first encountered ‘Isis’”. Catherine looked at him quietly, “Judging from this suspicion, you have more and more flaws… The last time I visited the Fallen Angel Empire, you used a powerful substitute which left me puzzled, but at the first sight of you today, I have completely affirmed your identity. “

“I really can’t hide from your eyes.” Chen Rui sighed and shook his head. When Catherine visited the Fallen Angel Empire, he was in the human world and Isabella suggested Zola to disguise as him. If he was there, he would definitely go there in person once he learned about Catherine’s visit. That way, he would be exposed even earlier.

“I finally understand why you refuse to accept my solicitation even when I don’t hesitate to use myself as a bargaining chip. It turns out that Shea has already given you a bargaining chip earlier.” A sense of realization appeared in Catherine’s bright eyes, “This way, the previous doubts are clarified. From reversing the Dark Moon crisis to overthrowing Obsidian, then to the development of the Fallen Angel Empire, you have full control of it, which is equivalent to holding the entire Fallen Angel Empire in your hand. If it weren’t for the Bloody Empire’s invasion, you will have enough time to develop. The strength of the Fallen Angel Empire will soar to a terrifying level in a few years. Even the Dark Shadow Empire and the Bloody Empire cannot escape the disaster. The Demon Realm will be completely controlled by you, human! Good means, good scheming!”

Means? A human controlling the Demon Realm? Chen Rui widened his eyes and smiled wryly, “I only have 1 answer, you think too much. You think that a man whom you defined as foolish would have such great ambitions?”

Catherine stared closely into his eyes. As the scenes appeared in her mind - The man’s determination to transmit Broc desperately in the Silent Night Wetland, and he crushed his heart firmly in the Crystal Valley, her deep gaze became soft. Yes, you are indeed a foolish guy.

She immediately turned her gaze to the side and sneered coldly to avoid letting him notice this soft spot, “Maybe I think too much, you are just a dissolute person who is fascinated by females. I now admire Empress Shea for spotting your talents and nature long ago. She did not hesitate to sacrifice her own beauty to make you infatuated. This let the Dark Moon rise from its downfall, defeating Obsidian with an almost impossible performance to regain the throne, and developing the Fallen Angel Empire to this level.”

“Things are not as you think.” Chen Rui shook his head, “Shea and I had a fairly ordinary relationship at first. When I first met you in the Silent Night Wetland, I was still thinking about how to get away from the Dark Moon Estate. After that… a lot of things happened, then only we really got together. To be honest, until now, the degree of intimacy between her and I is… not as good as ours.”

Catherine felt inexplicably annoyed as she sneered, “No doubt the best thing is the one that one can’t get. Shea seems to be much smarter than I thought.”

Chen Rui frowned, “In your mind, you only have vocabularies like value and bargaining chips?”

“A ruler must remain cold and ruthless. The emotional ruler in history will only make the empire decline and perish. I carry the hope of the empire on my shoulders, so I will never be influenced by personal feelings. From the moment I kill my siblings, I have made an oath that I will do everything for this empire even if my hand is full of blood, even if…” Catherine did not finish her sentence. The gradually cold eyes had indicated the meaning. Even if she had feelings for Chen Rui, she would never change her mind because of this.

Chen Rui looked directly at the coldness in Catherine’s eyes, “Are you trying to tell me that this is the real you?”

“This has always been the real me. You don’t need to waste your time to persuade anymore and I won’t take you lightly. I will explain to you frankly and honestly today.”

Catherine’s temperament changed, revealing a solemn expression, “You should be very clear that the Fallen Angel Empire is bound to be defeated, but it is not easy for Raizen to win the Fallen Angel Empire. Plus my secret means, at least half of his troops will be lost. As long as I take down the Dark Moon and Red Spirit Estate, I will just wait for the enemy to exhaust himself and take advantage of the strategic position to put up a strong defence. Within 10 years, the Bloody Empire will have no spare capacity to deal with the Dark Shadow Empire. If you help, I’m sure that the empire will surpass the Bloody Empire in 10 years. Even if Raizen is still there, the Bloody Empire will not be my opponent. You join the Dark Shadow Empire to help me destroy the Fallen Angel Empire, then destroy the Bloody Empire to establish the first unified empire in the history of the Demon Realm.”

Chen Rui’s brows moved slightly, and Catherine continued, “You’re the only man I like. I can fulfill all your requirements except for the throne. Once the Fallen Angel Empire is destroyed, with Shea’s temperament, she will surely not live with shame. Even if she doesn’t die, Raizen and I cannot allow her to live. I can tolerate all the other women except her. This is my bottom line and the last chance I give you.

We are smart people, so don’t waste time and delay, I want to hear your answer immediately. “

This kind of condition could no longer be described as ‘generous’. Just the sole condition that the Demon Realm’s top beauty empress would accommodate other women was unimaginable. Very few men in the Demon Realm could refuse it.

Chen Rui was silent for a moment, then he slowly shook his head.

This was a 2-choice question. Although this answer was a one of the choices which was not unexpected, Catherine’s mind suddenly surged with unspeakable resentment as she almost lost her usual calmness, “Is Shea so important? In this situation, if you insist on going your own way, you can only die with her!”

“I don’t know anything about a ruler’s power, I only know 1 thing. If 1 day, even if everything in the world stands on the opposite side of the woman I love, I will still be by her side.”

“Understood.” Catherine took a deep breath as her black eyes settled and exuded faint murderous intent. Her long hair began to flutter without the wind. The courtyard was suddenly full of murderous intent, “Since you refuse, then … I will not tolerate an enemy who is a huge threat to the empire to survive.”

“This yard has a magic circle that isolates teleportation or leaving. I felt it right from the moment I came in. It seems that you have planned to do this a long time ago.” Chen Rui sighed, “Do we really have to get to this point. ?”

“I gave you a choice.” Catherine’s voice was ghastly as the entire space burned suddenly, leaving only flames in Chen Rui’s eyes - black flames.

Catherine used the strongest [Black Phoenix Territory] without hesitation. In the space of black flames, 4 golden figures appeared around Chen Rui.

“Boom boom!“

The magic crystal cannons of the Warlock Fortress burst into flames. Wherever the destructive light passes, even the customized reflective shield still could not completely offset the power of this improved version of the magic crystal cannon. The soldiers holding the shields had turned into nothingness. However, the reflective shield was not completely useless, and the lethality of the magic crystal cannons were also reduced a lot.

The army of the Bloody Empire was worthy of being the well-trained elites. Although one after another companions were annihilated or collapsed, the formation was still not in disorder at all. Facing the Warlock Fortress, the Demon Realm’s the largest and the sturdiest fortress city, the soldiers kept their original speed and moved forward unhurriedly, just like how they breached the defense of Town Nimbus previously. This momentum put tremendous pressure on the defense side.

The soldiers of the Warlock Fortress had followed George, the first general of the Fallen Angel Empire, for many years. They were also experienced elites, so they didn’t burst into clamour or panic. They just silently waited for Commander Francis’ orders.

Due to the cooling period, the bombardment of the magic crystal cannons were temporarily stopped. Francis waved his hand and the herald’s magic horn blew out a strange rhythm. The goblin warriors responsible for the long-range strike were all ready to take their place. A row of strange equipment appeared on the fortress’ shooting holes.

“Ballista?”

At the Town Nimbus’ temporary base, the Bloody Empire’s First General Gustav was watching the battle of the Warlock Fortress through a huge magic crystal mirror. The Great Prince Aleus and Young Prince Teris of the Bloody Empire were next to him.

Aleus frowned, “Although the ballista has a considerable range, it has already been eliminated from the ordinary battlefield due to the complex loading, slow launch speed, and small range of strikes. At this time, even the magic bows have greater attack rate and killing range than the ballista. It’s hard to believe that George will make this kind of mistake.”

“So there must be something unusual about the ballistas.” Teris said, “In the battle between the Dark Moon and Obsidian, the improved magic crystal cannon used to exert unexpected power. I think this ballista should be 1 of the secret weapons that have not been revealed at that time. I believe we will get the answer soon.”

Teris had guessed it right. Following Francis’ order, countless spear-like crossbow bolts whistled out, and the sky was full of terrifying sounds tearing the air.

The soldiers of the Bloody Empire raised their shields together under the command of the commander. However, the reflective shield, which could offset the energy attack to a considerable extent, was as fragile as a paper in front of the terrifying crossbow bolt. The bolt easily penetrated the shield and the soldier. The bolt that penetrated the target exploded fiercely, bursting out countless small fragmented arrows which were also highly poisonous. The nearby soldiers fell to the ground 1 after another.

Each arrow shot could take the lives of several soldiers. What’s more terrifying was that the loading speed of this ballista was much faster than ordinary ballistas. Although it was also due to the operation standard of the goblin warriors, the more important reason was the ballista’s improvement.

The Bloody Empire Army suffered countless casualties under the bolt rain of the ballista, but they still tried to maintain its formation. It was just that their advancement was slowed down.

“No doubt there is something unusual.” Gustav who was in front of the magic mirror slowly said, “The soldiers will not die in vain. We have determined the enemy’s long-range strike range. It should be possible to construct catapults and great shield barriers immediately. The aerial legion should also start preparing.”

“Yes, the real war has just begun. This will be a great feast that can change the history of the Demon Realm.” Teris smiled elegantly as a strange light flashed across his eyes.

chapters.title: Chapter 736: Burning Of The Left Arm
chapters.body:
Chapter 736: Burning Of The Left Arm

Chapter 736: Burning of the Left Arm

Chen Rui did not move. The black flames of the [Black Phoenix Territory] contained a strange breath which could absorb life and spirit power. Any movement, even mental thinking, would consume more strength than usual. If the time extended, the burden caused would be quite shocking. This was only the surface power of the [Black Phoenix Territory].

The strange thing was that Chen Rui felt that his body inexplicably had a strange power which actually appeared to be a strange fit with the [Black Phoenix Territory]. Not only was he not affected by the debuff state, but there was a warm feeling as if this terrifying territory was a comfortable nest.

Is it the Nirvana power in the body? Or is it due to the [Fire Phoenix Stigmata]?

[Fire Phoenix Stigmata] can reduce fire damage by 90%, and there is a 10% chance of being completely immune, but the flame of [Black Phoenix Territory] is not a pure fire power… Chen Rui was a little puzzled, but he had no time to think about it as 4 golden human figures surrounded him.

These figures were about 2 meters tall. Their eyes were shining with pale red light, their facial features were slightly blurred, and their bodies were engraved with strange patterns like totems.

It was not the first time that Chen Rui had seen this kind of human figure. In the Crystal Valley, it was the 4 best golden puppets that made Azgalor, the peak stage of the Demon Emperor, run away. Now, he not only had to face the [Black Phoenix Territory] and the 4 golden puppets, but also Catherine who was even more powerful.

The 4 golden puppets had encircled him. Asmodeus Royal Family’s [War Puppet] talent was famous in the Demon Realm. These puppets were made using the power of their own bloodline and mixed with the secret technique. The higher the level, the stronger the combat power. Not only could it not feel any pain, it was extremely tough as it would not stop until it died. The ones activated by Catherine were enough to match the peak stage of the Demon Overlord.

Chen Rui’s hands drew ripples to circle the golden puppets into a strange force field that was soft like water.

A surprised expression flashed past Catherine’s eyes. This combat skill was somewhat similar to her technique. In fact, Chen Rui comprehended this after he witnessed Catherine’s battle in the Crystal Valley last time, combined with the mystery of water. For a time, the golden puppets were stumbling around. They could not unleash their power.

The golden puppets’ bodies shone circles of light yellow light, and Chen Rui’s body seemed to be bound by an intangible rope. It was difficult to move for a while. This was the skill that only the best puppet had. When Chen Rui’s hands made an embracing gesture, a huge black hole appeared beside him, and the binding light was sucked into the black hole. Not only that, the flame of the entire [Black Phoenix Territory] was quickly devoured by the black hole. The golden puppets were also dragged step by step toward the black hole.

All of a sudden, Chen Rui had a warning omen in his mind. Catherine’s figure had appeared behind him like a ghost. Her knife-like palms pierced through his body silently. Catherine’s brow furrowed. It turned out that the seemingly successful attack was in vain. The opponent’s figure had instantly appeared in the distance, and the strange devouring black hole gradually disappeared. Several destructive light balls whistled over. As Catherine spread her palm to draw a circle, the speed of those light balls suddenly slowed down as if they were in the mud, and they were lit up by the black flame. The light balls quickly began to shrink. When they reached Catherine, they were only the size of a fist. With a wave, they disappeared without a trace.

The figures of the 2 separated and merged quickly in the territory. Chen Rui fought hard against the holy dragon possessed by Dodo in the Tower of Glory, then he later battled against Dodo many times for training. So when he faced Catherine’s strength, he appeared at ease even though his strength was suppressed at the disadvantage. Of course, not being affected by the [Black Phoenix Territory] was also a key factor.

Catherine obviously noticed the problem with her own territory. There was a glimmer of cold light across her beautiful eyes, and the strength of [Black Phoenix Territory] suddenly increased tenfold. It turned out that Catherine had not used all her power all the time. However, that [Black Phoenix Territory]’s debuff and absorption still couldn’t have an effect on Chen Rui, but the feeling of warmth became more intense.

“Whoosh“, Chen Rui, who was repelled to the distance, suddenly burned with black flames.

Catherine paused and looked at the black flame braving the familiar breath in disbelief, “Nirvana’s Flame!”

That’s right, very pure nirvana power! The flame of life exclusive to the Asmodeus Royal Family actually appeared on this human body!

“How can you own Nirvana’s Flame?”

“I don’t know. I have this kind of flame power after getting your Nirvana blood at the Silent Night Wetland.” The real reason should be the Super System, but Chen Rui would definitely not say it. Nonetheless, he was surprised that since entering the [Black Phoenix Territory], Nirvana’s Flame had been flickering, then it just burst out on its own.

“Impossible!” Catherine frowned. People who get the blood of Nirvana would at best resurrect. It is absolutely impossible for people who are not from the Asmodeus Royal Family to have the power of Nirvana. There has never been such an example in the history of the royal family. Even if the Asmodeus Royal Family has the power of Nirvana, it is impossible to be immune to my territory’s power.
