Chen Rui was about to speak when he felt a burning sensation from his left arm, and the black flame on his body suddenly flourished, extending into the sea of ??fire of the [Black Phoenix Territory] and actually blending into 1.

Catherine was taken aback and only felt that the [Black Phoenix Territory] had incorporated a strange kind of strength which seemed to be a purer force of nirvana. At the same time, a strange feeling invaded her body. Her face suddenly blushed abnormally and said angrily, “Stop!”

Chen Rui himself didn’t understand how Nirvana’s Flame could suddenly undergo such an abnormal change, let alone why a burning sensation came from his left arm.

While in doubt, [Black Phoenix Territory] had disappeared and they returned to the original courtyard. Catherine, who had retrieved her strength, looked a bit strange, but her expression was extremely cold, “What despicable means did you use?”

Chen Rui felt wronged as she was the one who made a move first, and now she blamed him. Nevertheless, after the [Black Phoenix Territory] disappeared, the burning sensation in his left arm also faded. It was almost like some resonance-like mutation caused by the blood of Nirvana.

“I didn’t do anything, maybe… it’s the mark that you left me last time, the mark that goes deep into my life.”

Catherine didn’t speak and just stared at him closely. The atmosphere was awkward for a while.

Chen Rui was sweating on his forehead from the stare. He finally spoke up, “Uh… Catherine, let’s not fight. Although I am not your opponent, I still have a way if I want to escape. “

Catherine said coldly, “Your strength growth is astonishing. As far as combat power is concerned, it has far surpassed the average peak stage of the Demon Overlord. No wonder even Obsidian died in your hands. I know you still have some hidden skills. In terms of strength, you have barely qualified to have an equal dialogue with me.”

Chen Rui understood that Catherine did not use all her strength. The battle just now was more of a test, and he already faintly guessed her true intentions, “Since this is the case… Can we continue the previous conversation calmly?”

“Do you think we can?” Catherine asked back with a displeased expression.

“Shamelessly speaking, don’t I play a vital role in your grand plan for the future?” Chen Rui grinned, “Without me as a key figure, then even if you win half of the Fallen Angel Empire, It is also difficult to contend with the Bloody Empire. In other words, the war between the 2 empires will be protracted. Can you bear to see the people being dragged into wars that will last for hundreds of thousands of years or even longer?”

“You overestimated yourself.” Catherine sneered, “If my guess is right, Raizen may have reached the kingdom level after coming out of the closed training. Upon reaching this level, he must spend a lot of time and effort comprehending and training in order to stabilize the kingdom and explore the mystery of faith. Raizen is a person who pursues strength at all costs and will definitely abandon the position of king to focus on the road of strength. Neither Aleus or Teris can compare with Raizen. If Raizen leaves, the Bloody Empire’s strength will definitely decline and may be taken advantage of by me or Shea. Therefore, Raizen must clear the obstacles for the Bloody Empire before he leaves the throne. Although it is not the best time to use troops, he still went all out without hesitation.”

Chen Rui suddenly realized it. No wonder that Raizen was so eager to launch the war. This is actually the case.

“Haste makes waste. I’m ready for a protracted battle. As long as I can use the Fallen Angel Empire’s estates as a buffer zone to withstand the first few waves of the Bloody Empire’s offense. The Bloody Empire will become weaker toward the end. Even without your help, I can still succeed, but the time will be longer.”

“May I ask a question.” Chen Rui asked humbly, “How could the Bloody Empire suddenly have 6 million elites?”

“The Bloody Empire is a well-developed agricultural empire. The folkway is extremely strong, brave and competitive. 60% of the residents of the empire are engaged in planting. A considerable number of them are the most terrifying warriors when they put down their farm tools and pick up the sword.”

Chen Rui was secretly shocked when he thought of the Xiongnu people who were soldiers in the history of China.

“This strength cannot be hoarded in a short time, but the past Bloody Empire kings have not lacked the ambition to unify the Demon Realm. Therefore, the number of 6 million… is just the minimum.” Catherine’s face showed a solemn expression, “In the war that conquered the human world, the 3 empires all lost a lot of troops and elites. The Fallen Angel Empire was the most, and even the Lord of Midnight Sun died. However, in comparison to the Bloody Empire with great background, the loss of strength was the smallest, so it can replace the Fallen Angel Empire and become the strongest empire.”

“At that time, if you hadn’t spotted the right time to join forces with Obsidian to pressure, forcing Raizen to sign an alliance agreement, the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire have already perished.” Chen Rui smiled slightly, “Since you could see the situation clearly at that time, why not now? The reason why Raizen’s use of troops is not the best time is because the Fallen Angel Empire and the Dark Shadow Empire are cooperative empires. We have common interests in multiple fields. Once the 2 empires are united, it is very difficult for the Bloody Empire to win this war. On the contrary, the 2 empires are likely to be invaded individually. You said just now that the 6 million elites are only the minimum, then please answer me truthfully, even if the Fallen Angel Empire consumes part of the Bloody Empire’s strength … Is the Dark Shadow Empire really sure that it can withstand Raizen who went all out?”

Catherine was silent for a moment, and she finally said the real answer, “No.”

chapters.title: Chapter 737: [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] And The Battle Of Fortress
chapters.body:
Chapter 737: [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] And The Battle Of Fortress

Chapter 737: [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] and the Battle of Fortress

“Please forgive me for not being able to accept your terms just now.” Chen Rui understood the true meaning of Catherine’s move, “Then, let’s sit down calmly and have a good talk again.”

“You have to accept.” Catherine’s indifferent tone was full of determination, “Otherwise, there is nothing to talk about. You should understand that the Dark Shadow Empire absolutely stands a chance. I don’t necessarily need an alliance, but Shea has only 1 choice.”

“Am I so popular? So now should I be proud or depressed?” Chen Rui smiled wryly and did not argue about this matter. His tone changed, “The Dark Shadow Empire has a lot of unstable factors now such as Broc. According to the intel I received, you have always wanted to eliminate Broc without losing the Fire Blade Legion. Now the war has suddenly erupted. The Jergal Fortress where Broc is located is the throat location adjacent to the Bloody Empire. A slight change may affect the entire empire. I can help you solve this trouble.”

Chen Rui also did not state another intent. The reason why Catherine pretends to go against the Fallen Angel Empire is to take advantage of the fire and seize the benefits including ‘Chen Rui’. Secondly, she also wants to use it as a cover. In addition to paralyzing Raizen, she can solve her major problem of Broc at the fastest speed, maintaining internal security and repelling foreign invasion.

“It’s just a mere Broc, do you think I can’t solve it?”

“Of course you can!” Chen Rui smirked as he suddenly thought of something, “By the way, I have something for you…”

Catherine’s gaze turned to the thing that Chen Rui took out and said emotionally, “[Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]!”

Chen Rui took out the gold puppet that he got in the black rainforest back then. This puppet was one of the assets of the red dragon swallowed by Dodo. When he joined the Dark Shadow Empire’s Mechanic Association last time, he wanted to give it to Catherine, but he never had a chance. He finally remembered it now. This humble puppet is actually the secret treasure of the Asmodeus Royal Family, the strongest war puppet in the legend - [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet]!

Catherine’s surprise was extraordinary. [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet] had an immortal attribute and would never be eliminated. It was the most important treasure apart from the Dark Shadow Cape. Unfortunately, it was lost thousands of years ago and its whereabouts were still unknown. She didn’t expect it to be in Chen Rui’s hands. With this puppet, plus the Dark Shadow Cape, her combat power would be greatly improved. Even if she encountered Raizen alone, she might stand a chance in the battle.

Catherine’s emotions quickly stabilized as she stared into Chen Rui’s eyes, “Is this your exchange in the name of the Fallen Angel Empire or is it something you gave me personally?”

When Chen Rui heard that this gold puppet was actually [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet], he did have some thoughts. He finally sighed when he saw Catherine’s eyes, “This is a gift that I wanted to give you a long time ago. I never knew it was the [Immortal Dark Gold War Puppet].”

“Hmph, you finally told the truth.” Catherine took the puppet with an unbearable joy in her eyes. A veil suddenly covered her face. “About Jergal Fortress… Talk about your plan.”

Does this count as bribery? Chen Rui muttered in his mind, but fortunately, the ‘negotiation’ finally got on the right track.

In front of the Warlock Fortress, huge shields overlapped each other to form a temporary barrier. The position of this barrier was very particular, which was just outside the attack range of the magic crystal cannons and ballistas. The occasional ‘stray shots’ that flew over couldn’t break through the defense of the giant shield.

Behind the giant shield, the goblin warriors were rapidly forming several catapults which gradually took shape. These catapults were installed with suitable arms according to the estimated distance so that the range could effectively attack the fortress.

The soldiers of the Bloody Empire in front had already approached the moat outside the fortress wall after sacrificing many casualties.

The surface of the moat was about 30 meters wide and was dug quite deep. The magician team began to cast magic under strict protection. The surface of the river froze rapidly and became thicker. Soon, it was completely frozen. The Bloody Empire soldiers had special anti-slip serrations on the bottom of their leather boots which enabled them to walk on the ice like flat ground.

Halfway through, the ice surface suddenly shattered, and countless sharp vines emerged like solid walls. One after another soldiers who were approaching were attacked by the vines. Many of them were knocked unconscious. These were the guardian vines redeemed by Chen Rui in the Super System. They had attributes such as regeneration, stun, and restraint with extremely strong protection capabilities. Any enemy creatures that come close would be attacked. The army in front was blocked, and the speed at the back also slowed down. On the fortress, the arrows splashed down like locusts. Mixed with the sounds of the ballista and the giant crossbow arrows, they quickly harvested the lives of the enemy.

The catapults behind the great shield of the Bloody Empire were quickly assembled, and the huge rocks blazing were thrown toward the Warlock Fortress like meteors.

At this moment, several huge figures suddenly flew out of the Warlock Fortress at a high speed, and they flew toward the flaming meteor launched by catapult as if they had eyes.

The 2 crashed together with a “boom” and shattered at the same time. The flaming rubble fell on the heads of the soldiers of the Bloody Empire below, and some of them who did not manage to lift their shields on time were smashed in their brains.

“What is this?” At Town Nimbus’ Bloody Empire camp, Aleus frowned as he looked at the scene in the magic mirror.

Teris spoke up, “It should be stone shots ejected by a special machine. The launch strength is very strong, and the speed is faster than catapult stones. There should be special inscribed magic patterns on those stone shots which can automatically track fire elements or earth elements. This is the first time I have seen this kind of ordnance, including the previous explosive crossbow cart. It seems that the Fallen Angel Empire has brought us a lot of new toys. Today’s attack is counted as successful if we can force the Fallen Angel Empire to use its trump card.”

“The loss of the frontline troops is quite severe.” Gustav nodded, “The Warlock Fortress is famous for its sturdiness in the Demon Realm, and the terrain is special. If you really want to win it, you will have to pay a considerable price.”

Teris smiled indifferently, “For the great achievements of unifying the Demon Realm, all costs are worth it.”

The catapults behind the great shield barrier fired several rounds of flame meteors in succession. 70% of them were intercepted by the boulders launched by the Warlock Fortress, and the rest flew to the Warlock Fortress. Layers of ripples were smashed out of the surface of the walls with inscribed magic patterns, but they remained undamaged. In addition to the ‘intercepting missiles’, huge rocks with flames were also shot from the Warlock Fortress. This was not an attack that a shield could block. Within the power range, it was full of scorched corpses.

The quality of the soldiers of the Bloody Empire was evident at this time. Although there were many casualties, they still maintained a rough attacking formation and rhythm. Under the command of the generals, the soldiers killed all the way and completely suppressed the guardian vines. The magician team was divided into 2 batches. 1 batch reinforced and filled the ice surface while the other batch assisted the soldiers in eliminating the vines.

It didn’t take long for the guardian vines to be completely crushed. The Bloody Empire Army successfully passed the moat and came to the city.

After clearing the magic dark mines in front, one after another machine was pushed up from behind. The front was a kind of iron cart carrying a huge hammer like a pole that was used to strike a bell. Amidst the sound of the machine, the ramming pole flew out and hit the outermost wall, making a deafening sound. The water-like ripples on the surface of the wall kept shaking as the sand rustled down.

This kind of battering ram could greatly damage the fortress wall protected by the inscribed magic patterns. Although many controllers were shot by arrows, many battering rams began to attack the fortress wall under the cover of the shield. More and more defensive inscribed magic patterns were destroyed.

Vehicles carrying a long ladder were pushed forward, obviously for the purpose of ascending the city. There were also taller chariots behind, carrying a group of soldiers. It was quite similar to an escalade where one could shoot arrows and cast magic from the top. These siege weapons were personally improved by the Bloody Empire’s Young Prince Teris, and they played a huge role in the recent battle to conquer the Iron Fist City and defeat Edmund.

The city climbers braved the arrow rain and came to the forefront. The ladder behind it automatically extended and landed on the fortress wall that had lost its protective magic. The suicide squad, which was good at climbing, quickly climbed up the city. The physical attributes of these soldiers were very strong. Although the fortress wall was tens of meters high and some ladders were not long enough, the suicide squad members jumped using the ladder and reached the fortress wall. It was a pity that as soon as they jumped up, they were decimated by the rows of fortress defending soldiers who had been on stand-by long ago.

The escalade chariots behind pushed forward and rose steadily almost to the level of the fortress wall. On the top of the escalade, a burst of colorful magic attacks was launched at the fortress defending soldiers who were stopping them from reaching the fortress wall. Some soldiers also used the rope to jump into the wall and fight. Not long after, more and more soldiers of the Bloody Empire began to climb up the walls.

Seeing the critical situation, Francis on the tower remained unmoved. With a wave of his hand, the herald once again blew out a strange rhythm. A row of defending soldiers stood out and threw round objects down the city wall.

These things were like fruits. Soon after they landed, they immediately changed. Numerous huge vines with thorns suddenly appeared. These vines would take the initiative to attack. They were thicker and stronger than those at the moat previously. Not only did they have a powerful entangling ability, they could devour the flesh and blood of the enemy as a nutrient.

Whether it was the battering ram, the ladder cart or the escalade cart, they couldn’t retreat in time. Under this terrifying twist and tear, the soldiers either fell or were entangled and devoured by the huge vines.

This kind of gluttonous vine was also an royal spirit item exchanged by Chen Rui for George. Compared with the guardian vines that were proficient in protection, it was more aggressive. After releasing the aura seed, it could quickly take shape within 10 seconds.

Originally, all the royal spirit items could only be activated by Chen Rui himself, but starting from 5-star evolution, the exchange center had bestow fruits which enabled others to use the royal spirit plant. The soldiers threw out the bestow fruit that had absorbed the gluttonous vine seeds.

The siege equipment of the Bloody Empire was almost completely destroyed by the gluttonous vine, and the previous fierce offensive was completely submerged in the sea of ??countless ‘tentacles’.

At this moment, rows of dense black spots appeared in the sky behind the shield wall. The gradually magnified aerial legion of the Bloody Empire was finally dispatched.

In the central command of the Warlock Fortress, Madam Red Dragon Gloria’s voice sounded, “It’s the Wind Dragon Legion of the Bloody Empire! George, let me go with the Flying Cloud Legion!”

“The Flying Cloud Legion’s vitality has not recovered after the Dark Moon battle. If you fight head-on, it will be difficult to match the Wind Dragon Legion, but don’t worry.” George said with a confident smile, “Because an old friend of mine has already arrived from the Dark Moon.”

chapters.title: Chapter 738: Roar
chapters.body:
Chapter 738: Roar

Chapter 738: Roar

Facing the approaching Wind Dragon Legion, the Warlock Fortress just dispatched dozens of griffins. No matter strength or quantity, these griffins were far inferior to the Wind Dragon Legion. They wore strange hoods on their heads. The riders on their backs also wore masks and carried a huge cylinder.

The cylinder behind the riders began to eject a thick smoke, floating around in the air. These mists seemed to have a special composition as it was difficult to dissipate. Soon, a thick sea of mist formed over the Warlock Fortress like a dark cloud, concealing the situation inside.

The Wind Dragon Legion had come to the sea of ??mist. The leader, Legion Commander Argon, was suspicious as he looked at these dense mist. He commanded the army to circle in place while he chanted spells silently. A small whirlwind appeared in front. Wherever the whirlwind went, the mist dissipated as if it was torn apart, then it soon closed again. However, there was no ambush. The griffin that had been covered in the mist just now seemed to have left as well.

“Dust of sound wave grass?” Argon took a piece of mist and sniffed it. He was determined in his mind. The sound wave grass was a relatively common plant. Its dust could be suspended in the air in the form of smoke and had the special effect of spreading and amplifying sound. It was commonly used in some magic communication items, and more importantly, it was not poisonous.

“Want to delay the time to deal with the infantry? A poor deceptive tactic!” This was the battlefield. It was a felony to miss the most advantageous period. Argon made a firm decision and ordered the Wind Dragon Legion to move forward, but they did not advance at full speed out of caution.

The Wind Dragon Legion entered the sea of mist. Due to the sound wave grass, Argon was able to clearly feel the situation of his nearby companions. No doubt they did not encounter an ambush.

At this moment, the wyvern beneath him suddenly began to scowl uneasily which affected all the other wyverns. A dangerous omen surged in Argon’s mind as he loudly ordered the team to proceed carefully.

As soon as Argon finished commanding, he suddenly felt a terrifying breath, and saw a huge vague figure appearing in front of him. Before he could make the next reaction, a certain kind of air wave surged out violently. The surrounding mist was instantly dissipated by the terrifying sound wave, and the giant figure became clear.

This was a terrifying giant dragon with brown scales. There was a row of short horns on its head and fins on its cheeks. It wore a set of black armor. It flapped its huge wings, and its dark golden snake eyes exuded a sharp murderous intent.

Argon’s visual image was frozen in this scene. In the next second, there was a sudden “boom” in his brain as if something exploded. The entire world seemed to be turned upside down; his mind was blank, then he heard nothing. The only thing that could be felt was the severe tremor deep in his soul.

The entire battlefield heard that terrifying roar. This roar with special deterrence lasted for a few minutes. The sound was so strong after being amplified by that sound wave grass dust that the soldiers below threw their weapons to cover their ears in pain. The weaker one was stunned and fainted on the spot.

In the sea of mist, the wyverns and griffins fell like hailstones. Many unlucky soldiers that were hit were injured and fractured.

Argon’s mutated wyvern flopped its wings crookedly, and it couldn’t hold any longer in the end. It fell straight down.

Even the soldiers on the Warlock Fortress who had put on earplugs in advance before the mist spread still showed uncomfortable expressions. Only the gluttonous vines were unaffected and became more manic in devouring the nearby soldiers who had lost their resistance.

In front of the Town Nimbus magic mirror, the 3 leaders of the Bloody Empire were all baffled, “What happened?”

The magic mirror couldn’t transmit sound, so the 3 of them didn’t hear the terrifying roar. They only saw the Wind Dragon Legion falling like rain shortly after entering the mist.

With just 1 blow, the entire Wind Dragon Legion was defeated, including the Argon of the early stage of the Demon Overlord. Even a peak stage Demon Overlord could not do it. What kind of weapon or powerhouse is this?

The dragon, who just unleashed his prowess, was secretly rejoicing. This blow just now was the profound meaning of the [Raging Dragon Roar] imparted to him by Dragon Emperor Auglas. The ability to attack the enemy with a mix of dragon demeanor and sound. Plus the effect of sound wave grass dust, this move was devastating.

After transforming back into a human form, the dragon flew back to the fortress silently, but in his mind he wondered how to brag about his great achievement of smashing the army with a roar in front of someone next time.

The mist in the sky gradually dissipated, and there was nothing inside. The siege equipment and the Bloody Empire soldiers on the wall below were almost completely dead under the attack of the gluttonous vines.

Finally, the retreat horn sounded at the back. Seeing the enemy troops gradually retreating, the defending soldiers of the Warlock Fortress cheered…

The Dark Shadow Empire, Jergal Fortress.

Unlike the overall urban architecture of the Warlock Fortress, the core of the Jergal Fortress was the giant castle in the center, surrounded by barracks and fortifications.

The highest command of the castle.

“What?” The Dark Shadow Empire’s First General Broc showed a disbelief look as he listened to the guard’s report, “Loki?”

“Yes, General Loki has returned to the fortress, asking to see general outside the castle.”

Broc’s brows frowned. Loki. Leviathan used to be his most powerful deputy, but about 2 years ago, Loki suddenly disappeared. There was no more news after that. He didn’t expect Loki to be back in the fortress.

Broc knew very well that Loki was actually sent out by him secretly. At that time, Broc took his father-in-law, Frentz, and his wife to Jergal Fortress on the grounds that his father-in-law was unwell. In fact, they were taken hostages. This made Catherine unable to punish Broc to avoid harm to the innocent, but she responded immediately by betrothing Fini to him. Asmodeus, the daughter of Rummenigge, a senior master of the Mechanic Association, to First General Broc as a concubine.

Broc claimed to have a deep relationship with his wife, Medilu, and declined the marriage granted by the empress, then he asked Catherine the Great on behalf of his subordinates, Loki, to marry Fini as the legal wife. Upon Catherine the Great’s serious consideration, she agreed to Broc’s request and agreed to Loki to go to the capital to marry Fini.

This marriage seemed simple. In the game between Broc and Catherine, Fini was sacrificed. Surprisingly, Fini eloped with Monroe, Fini’s childhood sweetheart and the son of Third General Crawford. This was originally expected by Broc. Therefore, Loki was secretly sent to hunt down and kill Monroe and Fini, then let their bodies appear in the Dark Moon Estate so as to dissolve Catherine’s secret means. At the same time, it would affect the cooperative relationship between the Dark Moon and Bloody Vine Flower Estate.

It happened that Chen Rui went to Town Leia to participate in the plants trade fair. He killed the traitors next to Monroe in the Dark Moon territory, defeated Loki, and saved the young couple. Monroe was grateful for his life-saving grace and devoted himself to the Dark Moon.

Loki was controlled by Chen Rui with the God-Eating Mask and became a puppet. Of course, Broc didn’t know this.

Broc also didn’t know that Her Majesty Empress and the Fallen Angel Empire’s ‘envoy’, who should be far away in the capital, had come to the Thunder Estate in the east of Jergal Fortress through a secret teleportation array.

“Did Loki bring anyone else back?”

“No, General Loki came back alone.”

“Let him wait for me in the side hall.”

Now that the Fallen Angel Empire and the Bloody Empire were at war, the Dark Shadow Empire was stocking heavily in the southeast, preparing to attack the Fallen Angel Empire. The Jergal Fortress was the most important line of defense at the border with the Bloody Empire. In this sensitive period, the sudden appearance of Loki, who had been missing for a long time, made Broc feel suspicious.

Soon, Broc met Loki in the side hall.

When Loki saw Broc, he quickly saluted, “General!”

Broc glanced at him and said flatly, “You are back.”

“Yes, general.”

Since entering, Broc had been carefully observing Loki, feeling that the opponent had no flaws in strength, movement details and tone. It should be the Loki whom he was familiar with. He nodded immediately, “I want to hear the explanation of your disappearance for 2 years.”

When Loki looked around, Broc waved his hand and the guards retreated.

Then only Loki spoke up, “At the beginning, I was ordered by sir to intercept and hunt Monroe and Fini. I ended up encountering a terrifying dragon in the Dark Moon. I managed to flee desperately, then I wanted to wait for an opportunity to make a secret move. I didn’t expect Monroe to join the Dark Moon. After my ambush failed, I nearly died and had to run away. Later, I was captured by a man and was forced to join a secret organization. I have been unable to get out… until now.

Broc raised his brows, “Secret organization?”

“It’s an honor, general. In a sense, we are still colleagues because…” Loki’s eyes turned to Broc’s face, “Because the man who captured me was called Azgalor… Azgalor. Beelzebub.”

“Beelzebub Royal Family?” Broc’s eyes squinted, “I don’t understand what you mean. It seems that you need to write a report on these experiences and submit it to Her Majesty Empress.”

Loki shook his head and didn’t continue on this topic, “In any case, I’m from the Leviathan Royal Family and also general’s right-hand man. I will try my best to help general.”

“Really?” Broc’s voice suddenly became cold, and an icy breath gradually spread. The temperature of the entire room suddenly dropped and began to freeze.

Loki didn’t expect that. Broc would still make things difficult for him without warning after he explained it this way. There was already a pair of gloves in his hand, and his whole body was emitting a faint blue light. He tried his best to resist the cold breath, but his body still could not resist and gradually stiffened. His feet had frozen into ice, and the ice surface was still spreading upward.

As soon as Loki gritted his teeth, the pupil and white of his right eye suddenly turned black. As a strange strength spread out, the speed of freezing was immediately relieved a lot.

Broc sneered as his pupils turned black. Loki screamed, and blood oozed from his right eye. Though both were also [The Eye of Incubus], Loki and Broc were not on the same level in terms of quality or quantity.

Seeing his life on the line, Loki yelled out 3 words vigorously in his throat, “Illusive Demon Shield!”

Broc suddenly stopped his power, and his pupils instantly returned to their original blue. The ice on Loki’s body slowly melted.

“General’s test should be over.” Loki wiped the blood from his right eye and said lightly, “As for other matters… I’m a little tired, general.”

“[The Eye of Incubus] and water element proficiency. These 2 royal talents cannot be faked, you are no doubt Loki.” A smile appeared on Broc’s gloomy face as if the killing move just now was really just a test of identity, ” Very good, go and rest first, General Loki.”

Loki bowed slightly and turned away.

Looking at Loki’s back, Broc’s eyes turned ghastly.

chapters.title: Chapter 739: Launch
chapters.body:
Chapter 739: Launch

Chapter 739: Launch

Late at night.

Sensing the danger, Loki opened his eyes abruptly and saw a pair of black eyes that were incredibly shiny in the darkness. Before he had time to react, the amount of terrifying spirit power already swarmed over like a tide. Loki only resisted for less than a minute before he completely lost consciousness.

A large amount of black smoke came out of those black eyes, enveloping Loki’s body. Traces of black gas penetrated into his body. Loki’s eyes slowly opened, and his pupils turned grayish white.

The black smoke gradually condensed into Broc’s figure. He looked at Loki with gray eyes, showing a satisfied expression.

“Who are you?”

“Loki. Leviathan.”

“What is your real purpose in coming to the Jergal Fortress?”

“On the order of Sir Azgalor, I use the Illusive Demon Shield as a bait to persuade Broc to defect to the Bloody Empire. In the past 2 years, Bloodfall has placed a spy in the Dark Moon that can be used at any time. He is ready to cooperate with the Bloody Empire to attack the Dark Moon internally and externally.”

“The Bloodfall and the Bloody Empire work together? Absurd!” Broc sneered, “Why didn’t I know that the Bloodfall had this plan?”

“I overheard Sir Azgalor’s conversation with a mysterious figure. It is said that this plan was decided temporarily by the leader of the Bloodfall. The Dark Moon is the main target, and the real role of the Jergal Fortress is to attract the attention of the Dark Shadow Empire. If necessary, we can sacrifice Broc…”

“If Broc rejects the plan, I will try to kill Uncle Frentz of the Dark Shadow Empire and his daughter, Medilu. Then, create rumors and blame it on Broc, causing an internal strife in the Fire Blade Legion. Subsequently, combine internal and external forces to occupy the Jergal Fortress, then I can replace Broc and become the controller of the Leviathan Royal Family…”

Loki’s words made Broc’s eyes even colder. Although there are still many suspicious points in this plan, the mysterious leader of the Bloodfall has always been unpredictable and cannot be estimated by common sense. After the Crystal Valley was destroyed, Azgalor went to the Dark Moon and disappeared mysteriously for some time. I didn’t expect that he had been lurking in the Dark Moon for planning. The mysterious leader of the Bloodfall probably wanted to take the opportunity of the turmoil in the Demon Realm to fish in troubled waters. I wonder how many other people are behind-the-scenes.

However, I, Broc, is not an easy opponent either. I have my own plan long ago, and I will not fall victim to it!

“Where is the Illusive Demon Shield?”

“Illusive Demon Shield…” Loki’s body trembled, and his sluggish expression began to change. The white color in his pupils flickered as if he was fiercely struggling. Broc asked a few more questions, and found that [The Eye of Incubus]’s control power became more turbulent. He got this kind of soul-controlled supernatural power in an unexpected situation. Although it was successful, the resistance was relatively strong for Loki who also had [The Eye of Incubus]. If he continued, Loki’s soul power was likely to collapse and die.

Right now is a critical moment. Loki is just a pawn that is manipulated. For the time being, there is still considerable use value, so he is more useful alive.

Thinking of this, Broc’s eyes exuded black smoke which transformed into a shackle shape, sinking into Loki’s chest before the power of the soul control dissipated.

The magic lamp in the room lit up, reflecting Loki’s pale face. After a while, Loki’s eyes opened slowly. Seeing the figure in the room, he said with a hoarse voice, “General!”

Then he remembered something again and showed a surprised expression, “What happened just now?”

“Stop pretending, Loki.” Broc looked at him coldly, “You know my style and methods.”

Loki seemed to be channeling the strength in his body, and his complexion changed drastically, “[Soul Shackles]! You actually applied [Soul Shackles] on me!”

[Soul Shackles] was 1 of the Leviathan Royal Family’s bloodline talents which was similar to the master-servant contract with a limited number of more than 1. The controller could transcend the space limitations to punish or kill the controlled person.

“Where is the Illusive Demon Shield?” When Broc’s mind moved, Loki screamed and covered his chest. The strength that he had just condensed suddenly collapsed. His facial features twisted in pain, and he could only roll around the ground.

Broc turned a blind eye to Loki’s pain as he said lightly, “You should be very aware of the power of the [Soul Shackles]. You can’t even commit suicide now.”

“General, have you misunderstood! Ah…”

“If you say another nonsense, the punishment will be 10 times more intense.”

Loki knew he had failed, so he gritted his teeth and said, “Sir Azgalor won’t let you go!”

“Azgalor? If he can get me, will he let you come alone?” Broc showed a contemptuous expression, “As long as I’m in this fortress, even Catherine won’t be able to touch me. Cut the nonsense, where is the Illusive Demon Shield?”

Loki knew he had to tell the truth, sp he said honestly, “The IIlusive Shield’s whereabouts are unknown, but Sir Azgalor did get the Demon Shield. I have seen it with my own eyes. This time he wants to use the Demon Shield as a bargaining chip to let general betray the Dark Shadow Empire at the Jergal Fortress to attract the attention of the Dark Shadow Empire. Meanwhile, Sir Azgalor will launch a coup in the Dark Moon and occupy the Dark Moon Estate.”

“Anything else?”

“Nothing else…”

As soon as he finished speaking, the [Soul Shackles] began to torment Loki again. Loki hurriedly begged for mercy.

“Why don’t you say that you can sacrifice me if necessary? If I refuse, you will kill Frentz and his daughter and blame them on me? I underestimated you previously. I didn’t expect you to have the ambition to replace me!”

When Loki heard the news, his facial expression became even more unsightly. He said unreservedly, “Everyone has ambitions. Didn’t you also get your current position by killing Sir Manu? You only hide in the fortress all day. Now the empress’ military reform is about to complete. When you can’t fully control the army, there is only a dead end! It doesn’t matter if you die, you can’t bury the entire Leviathan Royal Family! I’m doing this for the benefit of our people!”

“Shameless bragging!” Broc snorted disdainfully, “Do you think Azgalor or the Bloodfall can give you a way to survive? With the current situation, the Bloody Empire is obviously stronger than the Dark Shadow Empire and the Fallen Angel Empire. Catherine did not cooperate with the Fallen Angel Empire for all sorts of considerations or concerns. Instead, she wanted to take advantage of the opportunity to annex the Fallen Angel Empire and compete with the Bloody Empire. In this game, Jergal Fortress is a very important chess piece, and the opportunity I have been waiting for has finally come… …”

Loki knew Broc very well. When he saw his expression, he was slightly shocked, “Are you already…”

“I have never been willing to be inferior to others. I understand Catherine’s fear of me, and I understand better what I should do.” Broc did not go on, “Whether it is Catherine or the Bloodfall, it is just the strength I use. Catherine is still waiting and watching now, but I didn’t expect that the Bloodfall couldn’t hold on anymore. It just so happens that your return is also considered an important opportunity to launch. Therefore, you still have a way to survive that is to completely surrender to me!”

“You really won’t kill me?” Loki looked up dejectedly, showing another expression of hope.

“Once you lose your value, I will kill you without hesitation! With the [Soul Shackles], it’s no use wherever you hide. What you have to do now is to maintain the value of your existence. If you can play the role that I expect in the move this time and help me regain the Demon Shield, I will cancel your [Soul Shackles].”

“Okay!” Loki gritted his teeth and stood up.

Broc nodded slowly, and his gloomy face finally smiled, but he didn’t notice the strange light yellow that flashed in Loki’s eyes.

The next day, Broc officially announced the return of Loki, who was performing a secret mission outside, and he would regain his military power. A military meeting was held in the castle in the afternoon.

At the meeting, Ordogas, the lead spiritual officer directly appointed by Empress Catherine who was at the same level as Broc, was the first to raise the issue, “General Broc, Loki killed 3 high level spiritual officers today under the pretext of seizing power. I need an explanation!”

It turned out that on the first day Loki took office, he used various reasons and methods to remove several ‘thorns’. They were actually the unsafe factor that Catherine placed in the army including 3 high level spiritual officers.

The term spiritual officer originated from Chen Rui, which was actually a political commissar. The superficial duty was to listen to the voice of the ‘basic level’, to appease the military, and to recruit surrenderers. In fact, they were actually responsible for instilling the empress supremacy and other ideological work in the soldiers.

With the implementation of Catherine’s military system reform, now every centenarian in the legion had 1 spiritual officer. The lower level would obey the higher level. The highest level in the Jergal Fortress was the great spiritual officer who was equal to Broc. In this way, the power of the army could be divided. The legion commander only had the right to command soldiers to fight, and he was governed by the political commissar. This avoided the phenomenon that the legion commander had his own soldiers.

“Loki went out to perform secret missions for 2 years. He didn’t know much about the new reforms of the army. Therefore, he had a conflict with 3 high level spiritual officers because of power distribution. His temperament was known to all. He killed 3 spiritual officers by mistake. I feel very regretful.”

Ordogas said angrily, “Just a mistake? According to military law, Loki should be executed to show an example to the public!”

Broc said calmly, “The power of the spiritual officer is just to appease the military. Ordogas, it is not your place to intervene in the specific affairs of the Fire Blade Legion. I have already removed Loki from his post and investigated it in the first place. This matter is quite special. I will personally report to Catherine the Great and follow Her Majesty’s decision.”

Ordogas couldn’t continue on since Broc had mentioned Catherine. Broc began to announce the theme of the meeting to discuss various issues arising from the reform of the military system.

This was an old topic. There had been many problems in the reform of the new military system, and opinions were not unanimous. The strange thing was that Broc did not oppose or reject Ordogas’ request this time. Instead, he conducted more in-depth group discussions which went very smoothly.

Before they knew it, the meeting had been going on for several hours, and it was getting late.

At this time, a spiritual officer walked into the conference room from outside and whispered a few words in Ordogas’ ears.

Ordogas showed a shocked expression as he got up, “General Broc! 2 hours ago, you secretly ordered as a legion commander to withdraw the armed forces outside the fortress and close the protective magic circle as well as early warning system in the east. Why?”

Broc smiled strangely, “This has nothing to do with the meeting. I’ll explain it to you later.”

Ordogas said furiously, “Broc! It’s about the life and death of the fortress! You have to explain right away. What are you trying to do?”

Broc smiled without saying a word. Ordogas immediately spoke to the high level spiritual officers on the side, “Varota, immediately take someone to the east of the fortress and reactivate the protective magic circle!”

Broc waved his hand and the door of the conference hall closed automatically.

“Don’t even think about going anywhere.” Broc’s grim laughter sounded through the hall, and black light began to appear in his eyes. Everyone felt their vision turn dark, and the magic lamp light in the entire hall was dimmed.

chapters.title: Chapter 740: Old Accounts
chapters.body:
Chapter 740: Old Accounts

Chapter 740: Old Accounts

The darkness spread across the entire castle hall in an instant. Many military officers showed weapons in their hands, surrounding the rest of the military officers and spiritual officers. The tense atmosphere was full of terrifying murderous intent.

Ordogas shouted, “Broc, what do you mean?”

Broc’s eyes completely turned into a strange black as a gloomy voice sounded through the hall, “It’s very simple, those who follow me will live; those who oppose me will die.”

“Bold!” Ordogas held a greatsword, pointing to Broc and shouting, “I represent Catherine the Great, you are committing treason! You…”

Ordogas was still furious when a blade suddenly protruded from his heart. The subsequent words came to an abrupt end as he glanced back with an expression of disbelief on his face. It turned out that it was Varota whom he trusted the most.

Varota did not hesitate to stab Ordogas who had absolute trust in him. He pierced Ordogas’ vitals in a slash.

“You are Broc’s man!” Ordogas suddenly understood. He furiously roared, trying to use his last strength to kill the traitor, but he felt that his strength was fading quickly. He couldn’t gather it at all. There was extremely deadly poison on the blade!

“Didn’t the general say? Those who follow him will live and those who oppose will die.” Varota said blankly as the tip of the blade burned with black flames. Ordogas’ body quickly scorched as if the blood had been sucked up. Finally, he was actually burnt down to ashes.

Due to the internal change, the rest of the people did not have time to react. The leader of the spiritual officer, Ordogas, who was loyal to Catherine, had been killed by his confidant, Varota.

“Varota, you did a good job. I won’t say the same thing again.” Broc laughed sinisterly and took out a magic appointment letter, “This is the appointment letter signed by the Bloody Empire Lord Raizen which appoints me as the second general of the Bloody Empire. I have completely withdrawn the defense of the Jergal Fortress, and the army of the Bloody Empire is coming soon! If you don’t want to die, just follow me. Not only can you keep your life and bloodline, but you can also enjoy the riches!”

This news shocked everyone nearby. Someone blurted out, “Isn’t the Bloody Empire attacking the Fallen Angel Empire with all its strength? How could it be possible to divide its forces against us?”

Broc said with a firm expression, “This time, Raizen the Great aims to unify the Demon Realm in one go. Either the Fallen Angel Empire or the Dark Shadow Empire, it will not be able to stop the Bloody Empire. The supporters will become the meritorious officials of the empire while the obstructors will die without a burial place!”

The spiritual officers and the military officers looked at each other. The strongest among them were Ordogas and Varota of the Demon Overlord. However, Varota suddenly turned sides and killed Ordogas. Facing Varota and Broc, plus a Demon Overlord Stanmi on Broc’s side, everyone had no chance of winning. They were in a dilemma for a while.

“I’m not asking you to consider, but to let you choose! Even if you are all dead, I have a way to command the soldiers. Worse comes to worst… I’ll let the entire Fire Blade Legion and Jergal Fortress be buried together! Now, I will give you 10 seconds. If you don’t want to die, put down your weapon and stand there!”

“Clang!” Finally, someone couldn’t resist the pressure, dropped the weapon, and walked to the place designated by Broc.

As soon as someone took the lead, the number of people behind suddenly increased, and only less than 6 people remained unmoved.

“Broc! You ungrateful traitor!” An Asmodeus Royal Family spiritual officer stood up and scolded loudly, “Sir Frentz was really blind back then to marry his daughter to you! You failed Her Majesty Catherine’s trust. Her Majesty will definitely not let you go!”

“Frentz was indeed blind.” Broc smiled ghastly, “He was blinded by me because he also said something like you just now. To be fair, I will gouge your eyes now.”

Broc’s body suddenly exuded black mist which wrapped toward the spiritual officer. A huge bronze puppet suddenly appeared in front of the spiritual officer, attacking the black mist. However, the black mist was not a solid entity, so the bronze puppet could only disperse the black mist, but it couldn’t cause any damage. Instead, it was wrapped in the black mist. Its body began to corrode and decay at a speed visible to the naked eye. It took a while before it dissipated into a pile of residue.

The black mist condensed into the shape of Broc, and he was already clasping the spiritual officer’s head. Just as he was about to exert his strength, a warning sign suddenly appeared in his mind. He instantly dissipated into smoke. In the next second, the smoke was already penetrated by a golden light from behind.

The golden light seemed to be only penetrating the smoke and could not cause damage, but Broc’s muffled sound came from the smoke. Everyone was taken aback, and their eyes were fixed on a military officer wearing glasses who had ‘surrendered’.

The smoke turned into countless swordsmen that went toward the military officer with glasses. In the blink of an eye, the military appeared in another direction at an incredible speed. The golden glow in his left eye was beaming as another light shot toward the smoke that Broc had turned into.

The golden light seemed to be the nemesis of the smoke. It could directly make a powerful attack on the soul with spirit power. Broc did not dare to forcefully resist it and he changed to human form. He opened his left palm, showing a clear color, blocking the golden light.

The golden light shot into the palm and refracted from Broc’s arm and other places. After the light was scattered and refracted by the strange edges, it had already lost its power. A cold murderous aura appeared in Broc’s incubus-like black pupil, “[The Eye of Evil]!”

[The Eye of Evil] and [The Eye of Incubus] were the bloodline talents of the Belphegor Royal Family and Leviathan Royal Family respectively. They were regarded as the left and right eyes of the Demon God with their own abilities. The 2 families were each other’s mortal enemies. Facing the strong enemy of the Belphegor Royal Family, Broc would not take any chances regardless of the origin; he would only kill the opponent.

The military officer’s appearance with glasses gradually changed, and Broc’s pupils suddenly shrank: It’s actually him!

Of course, Broc would not forget the man from the Belphegor Royal Family who seduced his sister, Delia, whom he regarded as a tool and forbidden beauty, but he also killed the man’s father. The most hated thing was that this man and his accomplice actually took Delia who has the Illusive Shield and escaped under my watch in the Silent Night Wetland!

Since then, Delia and this guy seem to have evaporated. Because of the IIlusive Shield, I cannot detect where Delia is, nor can I use [Soul Shackles] to kill Delia. I didn’t expect this guy to actually come to the Jergal Fortress now. He even has the strength to compete with me!

Roman. Belphegor!

“Ignorant trash. You actually seek death yourself!” Broc had a long sword in his hand as he looked at Roman coldly: As long as I take down this guy, Delia and the Illusive Shield will naturally come. Even though Roman has reached the Demon Overlord level, the blow just now is obviously buffed by that pair of glasses which is the secret treasure, ‘Evil Blue Tear’, of the Belphegor Royal Family. His real strength should be below me. It is said that this pair of glasses has a special function of concealing breath. No wonder I did not discover him just now. The most important thing is that this is the Jergal Fortress which is my site. Even the peak stage of the Demon Overlord can’t do anything to me!

The surrounding military officers immediately surrounded Roman whose complexion remained unchanged. He just said lightly, “Those who are not on Broc’s side, just stand behind me!”

The spiritual officers hurriedly stood behind Roman, and several military officers who had surrendered also walked over.

“Kill them!” Broc immediately issued an order against his opponent.

All of a sudden, more than a dozen strange figures appeared in front of Roman. These figures floated low in the air. The main body was the huge eyes in the head which occupied the entire head. The limbs were several tentacles which seemed to move very slowly.

“Evil eyes!” Broc was secretly shocked. Evil eye is a very special creature of the Demon Realm with terrifying spirit power and long-range attacks. It is said that [The Eye of Evil] of the Belphegor Royal Family can not only subdue it as a lifelong companion beast and promote it to the level of [Destroying Evil], it can also instruct the evil eyes to attack as a slave.

This Roman was only the Demon King-level strength at the beginning. What made him actually reach the Demon Overlord level in such a short period of time? He also possessed the [Destroying Evil] level of [The Eye of Evil]! While he can still be suppressed now, he must be eliminated as soon as possible!

These evil eyes were subdued by Roman when he went to Trevante’s underground cave after he reached the Demon Overlord level and comprehended the power of [Destroying Evil]. The evil eye tyrant had reached the peak stage of the Demon Emperor. He followed Chen Rui to the Dark Shadow Empire this time to kill Broc in order to avenge his father and the shame of his beloved woman, Delia, as well as to cancel the [Soul Shackles] that had troubled her for many years.

Under Roman’s order, the evil eyes launched a powerful mental attack. Except for the spiritual officers behind him and a few Demon Overlords in the hall, all the others covered their heads and screamed as they fell to the ground.

Although the 2 Demon Overlords apart from Broc were deterred by the evil eye tyrant’s spirit power, they were not easy to deal with. As long as the evil eye tyrant’s spirit power showed exhaustion, they would counter with all forces.

With a wave of the longsword in Broc’s hand, a sharp sword qi slashed toward Roman. Roman’s body was split in half, but that was just an afterimage. The real Roman had instantly appeared on Broc’s left side at an incredible speed. Countless blue rays of light intertwined into a giant net, wrapping Broc in it.

Roman hated Broc very much that his first move was the killing move, [No Return].

Broc’s left arm suddenly turned into a large shield. There was only high-speed and dense clanging sound. [No Return] was actually completely blocked by that shield.

Roman’s figure flashed and pulled away. There was a wound cut by a sharp sword on his face.

“My body has been transformed into the strongest weapon which can be changed at will.” Broc’s left hand has become a longsword. “Not only that, I can have an invincible body in this castle. Let alone your attack of this level, even the peak stage of the Demon Overlord can’t hurt me at all…”

Before he finished speaking, a strong sense of crisis suddenly appeared in his mind. Almost at the same time, a fist magnified in front of his eyes. “Bang!“, he flew out and smashed the wall hard. The wall with a powerful enchantment was actually cracked.

Broc stood up unstably with a clear fist mark on his cheek. He coughed a few times, spit out a few bloody teeth and looked at this strange enemy who appeared out of thin air with a horrified face. He mumbled, “How could you hurt me…”

“Does your so-called invincible body rely on this thing?” The opponent threw a fist-sized red crystal in his hand, “Without it, you are like a hellhound without claws. It’s useless even if you show your sharp fangs. Today is a good day. My friends and I will clearly settle the old accounts with you!”

chapters.title: Chapter 741: Dead End
chapters.body:
Chapter 741: Dead End

Chapter 741: Dead End

“The heart of fortress!” Broc looked at the red crystal in disbelief, “Impossible! Where did you get it!”

“The heart of fortress can connect you to the entire fortress which makes you indestructible. The normal fortress doesn’t have this thing. It seems that you spent painstaking effort in protecting yourself.” The person played with the crystal while showing a calm smile, “This is indeed an amazing top-level magic item; the magic circle is quite complicated. Even with Loki’s help, it took me 2 hours to remove it. If your meeting is shorter, maybe this ‘cheat’ can be used a little longer.”

“Loki!” Broc gritted his teeth and spat out the name. Loki clearly told all the ‘truth’ under the power of [The Eye of Incubus], and he is firmly controlled by my [Soul Shackles]. Whether it is for life or benefit, it is impossible that he will betray in such a short period of time. I didn’t expect that the problem lies with this ‘impossible person’!

Could it be that Roman and this mysterious strange powerhouse are from the Bloodfall?

Or, they are Catherine’s… Broc was shocked and mad. When his mind moved, the [Soul Shackles] immediately took effect and completely cut off Loki’s vitality.

“It’s useless even if you kill Loki, his mission has been successfully completed.” The other party had obviously guessed Broc’s actions as he smiled casually, “During this meeting, a lot of things happened outside which you have no idea of, but the soldiers outside know everything about what happened in the hall including your classic sentence, “Worse comes worst, I’ll let the entire Fire Blade Legion and Jergal Fortress be buried together.” In this world, there is something called the magic television …”

“What?!” Broc was in a panic. All the soldiers… Although Broc was flustered, a wisp of black mist came out silently from behind the opponent, and the goal was the heart of fortress in his hand. No matter how the situation deteriorates, as long as I regain the heart of fortress, I can at least remain invincible.

The man grabbed behind suddenly, and the palm of his hand seemed to have a special suction force, grabbing the intangible black mist in his hand. There was a strange chill which contained terrifying destructive power in the black mist. It made Broc, who was proficient in water element, shudder.

When the person pulled in his hand, it was clearly aimed at the black mist, but Broc’s body was involuntarily pulled and flew forward, then he heard the sound of his nasal bone breaking. The pain caused his tear gland to lose control for a while as blood and mucus flowed out together. He backed 8 steps as he covered his face in pain.

“I really want to break your scumbag bones into pieces.” The person glanced at Roman, “But your life is his.”

“Leave it to me, leader.” Roman’s blue blades buzzed as he slowly walked toward Broc.

Leader? This title changed Broc’s face dramatically. He was frightened and angry, “It’s you!”

It is precisely this person that caused my plotting against ‘Christina’ to fail back then. He even used poison to leave an indelible trace of shame on my face; later in the Silent Night Wetland treasure hunt, he made me miss the IIlusive Shield and even took Delia and Roman away! He is simply my nemesis.

This ant, which was originally just a Higher Demon, had now grown into a terrifying powerhouse that made him tremble!

This person was obviously Chen Rui. His appearance was a random disguise. At this time, Varota and Stanmi on the side had already rushed over. As Chen Rui waved his hand, a faint chill spread; the whole hall became cold in the blink of an eye. This kind of chill was not freezing in the ordinary sense. There was no freezing on the surface of the body, but the terrifying destructive breath had penetrated into the soul. The soul, spirit, strength, and blood seemed to be frozen at the same time, making one tremble and despair inside out.

Broc’s [Incubus Territory] was completely frozen and lost its effect. Varota and Stanmi’s movements suddenly slowed down as if they had begun to freeze. The bodies of the other party members with weaker strength instantly became stiff and completely lost their resistance.

Half of Broc’s body was a non-life entity. After being transformed into a ‘machine man’, his physique was special. The resistance to [Winter Territory] was far better than ordinary people, but his soul could still feel the overwhelming breath. He knew things were going bad, so he shouted, “Stop, the lives of Frentz and Medilu are still in my hands, I can always…”

“Then kill them quickly.” Roman sneered and interrupted his threat. Those evil eyes had been put away. The phantasms merged into his body again, and the gold color in the pupil of his left eye became even more solid. The murderous intent was getting more and more violent.

Broc saw that the other party really didn’t care about the 2 ‘important’ lives, so he didn’t dare to easily destroy the 2 trump cards. At this time, Roman’s dual blades had turned into light streams whistling toward him. Having lost the heart of fortress, Broc was no longer immune to damage. While enduring the sharp pain on his face, his left arm turned into a shield, and his right hand became a long sword that parried the light stream.

Meanwhile, Varota and Stanmi were desperately activating territory power to resist the terrifying cold that eroded their souls. All of a sudden, they sensed a shadow in front of them; and at the same time, a strong force was approaching. Both of them seemed to be trapped in a surfy sea, and the impact of an irresistible force came one after another like a sledgehammer. They were already sore and weak after blocking 2 waves. They spat out a mouthful of blood and fainted simultaneously.

The battle between Broc and Roman quickly intensified. Roman’s [Flash] talent was unleashed to the extreme. The spiritual officers in the distance could only see countless blue lights that split the air and a faint shadow. After a few exchanges, both sides were injured.

The true strength of Broc was actually the early stage of the Demon Overlord. As a machine man, his combat power could compete with the intermediate stage of the Demon Overlord. Under normal conditions, his strength was greater than Roman, but now that the mutiny had failed, [Incubus Territory] was suppressed by the [Winter Territory], and he even lost the heart of fortress. He had zero fighting spirit. In contrast, Roman was determined to kill. His slashes were extremely deadly.

Broc was secretly frightened as he caught a glimpse of Varota and Stanmi being easily knocked down by Chen Rui. With this distraction, Roman spotted a flaw, and immediately slashed toward Broc’s neck. Broc couldn’t dodge, and his long sword pierced toward Roman’s abdomen, intending to force him to dodge. However, Roman’s blade light did not have the slightest tendency to dodge; he seemed determined to die together.

Broc was taken aback and leaned back with all his strength to avoid the beheading disaster. The blade cut diagonally into his collarbone, almost cutting off his neck. As the sword was also deviated, Roman’s ribs had a wound deep to the bone.

Roman didn’t realize it as he said with a cold smile, “This is for me.”

Broc howled in pain. The long sword in his left hand turned into a red-hot claw that grabbed Roman’s chest. Roman did not retreat but moved forward, allowing Broc’s claws to dig a bloody hole in his chest. He turned the blade and chopped off Broc’s right arm that was holding the sword.

“This is for Delia.”

Broc’s scream turned into a tragic cry as his feet changed into a certain leg shape of jumpy demonic beasts. He hopped off the ground and finally distanced himself from Roman.

The desperate effort just now happened in a flash. Many people only saw the 2 figures quickly separated after fighting, then Roman’s chest and abdomen were bloodstained while Broc’s right hand was cut below the elbow.

Broc’s bloody face twitched from the severe pain. His gaze was fearful as the words ‘lunatic’ came to his heart. What he feared most was this kind of opponent. Just like a certain person who used poison to blow himself up in the Silent Night Wetland, this Roman was also a desperate lunatic!

Now that the general situation is over and nothing can be done. In addition to Roman, there is also the ‘leader’ who is far superior to him.

As soon as Broc thought of this, his left arm burst out with a dazzling light like a mini sun, making it impossible to look directly at it. Suddenly, Roman couldn’t see things for a while, so he had to swing his double blades to protect his whole body.

Chen Rui felt the breath emanating from the light was different. He shouted, closed his eyes and threw a punch, only to hear the sound of something cracking. Broc in the [Analytical Eyes] had disappeared.

After the light disappeared, Roman opened his eyes and found that Broc was gone. Chen Rui was thinking about something with some broken crystals in his hand. Roman quickly asked, “Where is Broc?”

“He should have a special rune teleportation magic in his body. No doubt this machine man is a bit interesting… but he was punched by me which greatly affected the teleportation distance. With these broken rune crystals, I can accurately track him down.”

With that said, Chen Rui looked at the terrible wounds on Roman’s body, “You should wear the Mystic Jade Armor.”

Roman gently stroked the worn-out clothes, “This is the first clothes Delia gave me back then.”

Chen Rui understood his mood very well and patted him on the shoulder, “Your injuries are very serious. They must be treated immediately. Leave the rest to me.”

Roman nodded silently, and suddenly grinned, “Pat gently.”

“This is the map I drew based on the heart of fortress. Frentz and Medilu should be imprisoned somewhere. Go rescue them later. Be careful to avoid the traps as labelled here.” With that said, Chen Rui tossed a bottle of potion and a map to Roman before he disappeared in place.

Somewhere outside the Jergal Fortress, the figure of Broc appeared in the sky with a blur. As soon as he landed, he felt that his footing was unstable and fell.

Broc looked haggard. The bridge of his nose sunk in, his neck was bloody, only half of his right arm was left, his left arm was cracked, and the limbs below the knee of his left leg were broken. No wonder he could not stand firmly.

Just now he cast the emergency teleportation array, a kind of illusion suddenly appeared at the moment he was about to teleport away. It was as if time stopped, then a terrifying strength came, almost shattering the shield of his left arm. The transformed left leg was also broken by this blow. After the ‘illusion’ had passed, the teleportation was completed, and he was in another place.

The facts told him that it was not an illusion just now!

Broc was petrified. That person has an incredible strength that makes time stop… Fortunately, I fled early when I saw the opportunity. Otherwise, I would have fallen into his hands.

Broc’s broken left leg extended a little. He barely maintained his balance as he looked around, but he was surprised again. Dead bodies, dead bodies everywhere! By the way, this environment… it should be the small plain to the east of the Jergal Fortress. Judging from the equipment and flags of the dead, it should be the soldiers of the Bloody Empire!

It seems that the Bloody Empire military, that was preparing for a sneak attack, had retreated with failure!

At this moment, Broc felt strange instinctively. As soon as he turned his head, he saw a graceful figure under the moonlight looking at him faintly in the distance. The deep gaze was as calm as water.

chapters.title: Chapter 742: Surprise! The Early Meeting Of The 2 Rulers
chapters.body:
Chapter 742: Surprise! The Early Meeting Of The 2 Rulers

Chapter 742: Surprise! The Early Meeting of the 2 Rulers

Broc looked at the veiled woman in the distance with horror, and he looked at the deep gaze that seemed to see through the soul. He tried to calm down, but his body trembled uncontrollably.

He knew the identity of this woman better than anyone else in his mind. This woman was the person he hated and feared the most.

As long as this woman exists, I can only be the first general of the Dark Shadow Empire, not the king of the Envy Royal Family, Broc. Leviathan. Unless this woman is eliminated…

This was obviously an impossible task. Once, he accidentally got very close to this goal. However, he failed in the end because of a damn guy. From then on, he was forced to curb his ambitions, stay in the Jergal Fortress and make a series of life-saving precautions…

Broc’s first reaction was to escape, but when he turned his head, he found that there was already a person in front of him silently - An acquaintance.

A tall, purple-haired man wearing golden armor. He had a square face, deep brow bones, and pale golden pupils exuding a stern light which made him look deterrent without being furious.

“Azgalor!” Broc shook. He suddenly thought of the abnormality on those corpses just now and immediately realized it as he exclaimed, “You actually defected to the Dark Shadow Empire!”

“Hmph!” Azgalor snorted coldly without explaining.

When he was easily captured by ‘Isis’ in the Dark Moon back then, Catherine gave him a way to survive which was to serve for the Dark Shadow Empire for 100 years. She would give the Beelzebub Royal Family an estate as a place to survive, and the control of this estate was also 100 years. After that, Azgalor could leave with his family at his will. If he continued to serve, the control of the estate would be extended accordingly.

The rule of the Demon Realm was honoring the powerhouses. Facing the threat of life, Azgalor had no choice. Moreover, being able to give the Beelzebub Royal Family an open space for survival and development could be regarded as killing 2 birds with a stone. Therefore, Azgalor and Catherine signed an equality contract.

For the past 2 years, Azgalor had been lurking in the dark to help Catherine clean up the Bloodfall forces in the Dark Shadow Empire. This time he followed Catherine and led his army to destroy an elite legion of the Bloody Empire that came to ambush the Jergal Fortress. He was very diligent indeed. Particularly, the [Demonic Flies Transformation] of the Beelzebub Royal Family played a key role, annihilating this legion without any survivor.

Azgalor was very aware of the wisdom and means of the Demon Realm’s top sage. Since she dared to accommodate him and use him, she must have confidence for complete control. This time, she jeopardized Broc’s scheme and wiped out the force which he painstakingly accumulated at one go. It might serve as a warning. Therefore, Azgalor could only temporarily suppress his wild ambitions so as not to follow Broc’s footsteps.

Broc’s teleportation array could no longer be used. Let alone Catherine, he couldn’t cast and escape with the water element’s [Time and Space Gate] even in the presence of Azgalor. He immediately spoke up, “The lives of Frentz and Medilu are in my hands!”

Catherine smiled, “Are you that scared?”

Even at this distance, Broc could feel the contempt in her smile as he gritted his teeth, “You don’t care about the lives of Frentz and his daughter?”

“No doubt you are struck with terror.” Catherine shook her head, “If you openly threaten me, I will still have some scruples considering the people’s will and the military’s will. But here, do you think I will care about those 2 lives?”

Broc’s heart trembled. Yes! The ruler is ruthless. If it’s me, I can even abandon my own child or people of my family for benefits; let alone the Demon Realm’s top sage?

At this moment, Catherine and Azgalor’s gaze turned to the distant woods at the same time. Broc turned his head and saw that there was a figure walking toward them slowly.

The figure’s footsteps had a strange rhythm. The sound was not very loud, but it echoed through the mind. Broc unconsciously indulged in it after just listening for a while. Even his heartbeat was controlled by that rhythm. His eyes flashed black light as he struggled with the strength of [The Eye of Incubus] with great effort, but there was still an unstoppable pain in his chest. The blood in his body almost flowed backward. He was dizzy and fell to the ground.

Broc was in cold sweats. He had never encountered such an incident before. The sound of footsteps almost killed him!

The figure’s steps seemed unhurried, but he came to the small plain in the blink of an eye. This man was not tall and looked a little slender with long black hair, but his facial features were a little fuzzy. Even with Broc’s eyesight, he couldn’t see the face clearly.

Both Catherine and Azgalor were taken aback. Catherine had been staring at this person. All of a sudden, as if she recalled something, a strange expression flashed past her black eyes behind the veil. There was already a light gray cloak behind her.

The man’s footsteps slowed down as he seemed to be looking at the corpses along the way. He stopped abruptly. His eyes fixed on Azgalor, and his low voice sounded, “It’s you who killed my soldiers?”

This sentence has already pointed out his position, the people of the Bloody Empire!

Although Azgalor faintly sensed the power of this figure, he thought about his strength and even Catherine beside him. He immediately snorted and his eyes were full of murderous intent, “I don’t mind killing another commander.”

Broc was already almost hopeless. Unexpectedly, there would be such a mysterious person suddenly. He hurriedly crawled toward the figure and said, “General, I’m the newly appointed second general of the Bloody Empire. Hurry up! Cover my escape from here!”

“Second general?” The man glanced at Broc and said flatly, “Why didn’t I know that the second general had been replaced?”

“It’s true!” Broc took out a leather scroll from the space ring, “This is the appointment letter signed by the Bloody Empire’s Royal Majesty Raizen himself!”

The man waved his hand, and the scroll fell into his hand. He took a look, “Are you Broc of the Jergal Fortress? Where did this appointment letter come from?”

Broc quickly replied, “It was the confidant of Royal Highness Aleus, Elly, who came to the Jergal Fortress in secret and handed it to me personally. It is absolutely true. I’m really the empire general appointed by His Majesty!”

“Aleus… very good!” The man’s voice seemed to turn hoarse. He took a deep breath and calmed down again, “Judging from your appearance, the Jergal Fortress mutiny should have failed.”

“In any case, His Majesty’s appointment scroll is not false. Quickly cover my escape, and I will definitely repay you!” Broc did not reveal that the woman opposite was Catherine, lest the man left him and escaped alone.

Unexpectedly, the man said lightly, “If this is the case, then you can die.”

Broc didn’t expect his savior to become a killer. He was so frightened that he was about to run away. The man put a finger on his forehead, then he didn’t even look at Broc again, and he slowly walked toward Azgalor.

“Why…” Broc’s shaky voice sounded behind, “I was really appointed by His Majesty Raizen himself…”

“For the sake of telling me about Aleus, I will give you the final answer.” The man did not stop walking, “Because… I don’t remember signing such an appointment.”

Broc’s eyes widened as an unbelievable expression bloomed. His consciousness was frozen, and his whole body instantly turned into black ashes, disappearing without a trace.

At the same time, Catherine’s voice sounded, “Azgalor! Retreat now!”

Azgalor did not relax his vigilance all this while. He had already gathered his strength and was ready to attack at any time, but he did not expect that the opponent would kill the ‘comrade’ Broc first. Then, he heard the shocking answer. Like Broc, he could hardly believe his ears.

At this moment, Azgalor heard Catherine’s shout. At the same time, he was enveloped by an unprecedented sense of crisis. Even his hairs were standing up. In Azgalor’s violent shout, the accumulated strength exploded fiercely. He was not advancing but retreating. At this moment, he had already used all his strength which was even a bit more vigorous than the usual optimum state.

However, it was too late. Azgalor felt a pain in his chest as if he had been hit by something, but he managed to fly back to Catherine’s side. He looked down and saw that the chest part of the quasi-legendary grade golden armor had dented in, showing the shape of a fist mark. He was secretly relieved.

“Immediately lead the army to withdraw to the Jergal Fortress and activate on the highest defense state.” Catherine’s voice sounded in Azgalor’s ear which was exactly what he had in his mind— Serving is one thing; sacrificing life is another thing. I don’t want to face that man. The Demon Realm’s top powerhouse, Raizen. Mammon!

Raizen didn’t stop Azgalor from escaping. Instead, he set his gaze on Catherine as if he only had this woman in his eyes.

“I didn’t expect you to be here.” Catherine sighed softly.

“I didn’t expect myself to come here too, let alone meet you.” Raizen said lightly, “I was just investigating something. I have almost got the answer now. I have an excellent son, but he is too impatient.”

“Aleus?” Catherine pondered, “The ambush on the Jergal Fortress shouldn’t be your plan, but the work of this great prince, right? Or you don’t even know about it?”

“Yes, by the time I knew it, it was already too late, so I came a step later. Otherwise, these soldiers would not be sacrificed.” Raizen smiled suddenly, “However, it was indeed an unexpected gain to see you. If I remember correctly, you almost became my concubine back then.”

“Yes, almost.” Catherine also showed a light smile, “The Dark Shadow Empire was almost swallowed by the Bloody Empire, but I didn’t compromise in the end, nor did the Dark Shadow Empire.”

“I’m glad you didn’t. It’s just that there is 1 less political marriage, but 1 more respectable opponent. Unfortunately, your strength is not as outstanding as your wisdom.” Raizen’s tone was full of unpretentious regrets with an undisguised killing intent.

chapters.title: Chapter 743: Leave Me, Run Away Quickly
chapters.body:
Chapter 743: Leave Me, Run Away Quickly

Chapter 743: Leave Me, Run Away Quickly

Facing Raizen’s killing intent, Catherine still looked calm, “No doubt it is the Raizen who pursued strength at all costs. Unfortunately, the Midnight Sun is dead and you no longer have a real opponent.”

Speaking of the Midnight Sun, Raizen’s gaze changed suddenly, “You’re wrong. Midnight Sun has never been my opponent. He is the target I need to look up to. The most I can do is peerless among the same level, but he can fight with those at a higher level. With him around, I can’t even be peerless. I’ve been catching up with him all my life. Unfortunately, until now, I have not been able to achieve his state back then.”

“Peerless…” Catherine was silent for a moment, “If I have been kingdomized, I might be able to challenge your so-called peerless, but unfortunately, I’m still 1 step away from the kingdom. It seems that I can’t survive today.”

“We will have a battle sooner or later, but the time has unexpectedly advanced.” Raizen’s indifferent gaze began to become sharp, “You’re very smart. You know that my kingdom’s will has invaded the entire plain long ago, and if you run abruptly, even if you have the Dark Shadow Cape, I will notice it. However, you have never found a suitable opportunity from just now until now; even when you mentioned the Midnight Sun which moved me the most. As an opponent who respects you, I can only give you respectful death.”

Catherine didn’t talk any more nonsense. She understood that Raizen was never a talkative person. The reason why he said so much and even pointed out the inside story of Aleus was of course out of the respect of the opponent, and the more important reason was that he did not plan to let her leave alive from the beginning.

It was considered a final farewell for the old opponent.

The color of the moonlight gradually changed, and the nearby scenery did not change, but it was coated with a layer of blood except for Catherine and Raizen.

Catherine’s gaze became more solemn than ever. If Demon Overlord’s strength was a fire spark, then this kind of strength was a sea of ??fire. It was far greater in terms of quality or quantity. Her current strength was between the peak stage of the Demon Overlord and the kingdom level which could be regarded as the quasi-kingdom level, but she had not reached the kingdom level after all, so she was definitely not Raizen’s opponent.
